<template>
  <el-scrollbar ref="scrollContainer" :vertical="false" class="scroll-container" @wheel.native.prevent="handleScroll">
    <slot />
  </el-scrollbar>
</template>
<script>
const tagAndTagSpacing = 4 // tagAndTagSpacing
export default {
  name: 'ScrollPane',
  data() {
    return {
      left: 0
    }
  },
  computed: {
    scrollWrapper() {
      return this.$refs.scrollContainer.$refs.wrap
    }
  },
  mounted() {
    this.scrollWrapper.addEventListener('scroll', this.emitScroll, true)
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    this.scrollWrapper.removeEventListener('scroll', this.emitScroll)
  },
  methods: {
    handleScroll(e) {
      const eventDelta = e.wheelDelta || -e.deltaY * 40
      const $scrollWrapper = this.scrollWrapper
      $scrollWrapper.scrollLeft = $scrollWrapper.scrollLeft + eventDelta / 4
    },
    emitScroll() {
      this.$emit('scroll')
    },
    moveToTarget(currentTag) {
      const $container = this.$refs.scrollContainer.$el
      const $containerWidth = $container.offsetWidth
      const $scrollWrapper = this.scrollWrapper
      const tagList = this.$parent.$refs.tag
      let firstTag = null
      let lastTag = null
      // find first tag and last tag
      if (tagList.length > 0) {
        firstTag = tagList[0]
        lastTag = tagList[tagList.length - 1]
      }
      if (firstTag === currentTag) {
        $scrollWrapper.scrollLeft = 0
      } else if (lastTag === currentTag) {
        $scrollWrapper.scrollLeft = $scrollWrapper.scrollWidth - $containerWidth
      } else {
        // find preTag and nextTag
        const currentIndex = tagList.findIndex(item => item === currentTag)
        const prevTag = tagList[currentIndex - 1]
        const nextTag = tagList[currentIndex + 1]
        // the tag's offsetLeft after of nextTag
        const afterNextTagOffsetLeft = nextTag.$el.offsetLeft + nextTag.$el.offsetWidth + tagAndTagSpacing
        // the tag's offsetLeft before of prevTag
        const beforePrevTagOffsetLeft = prevTag.$el.offsetLeft - tagAndTagSpacing
        if (afterNextTagOffsetLeft > $scrollWrapper.scrollLeft + $containerWidth) {
          $scrollWrapper.scrollLeft = afterNextTagOffsetLeft - $containerWidth
        } else if (beforePrevTagOffsetLeft < $scrollWrapper.scrollLeft) {
          $scrollWrapper.scrollLeft = beforePrevTagOffsetLeft
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
.scroll-container {
  white-space: nowrap;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  width: 100%;
  ::v-deep {
    .el-scrollbar__bar {
      bottom: 0px;
    }
    .el-scrollbar__wrap {
      height: 49px;
    }
  }
}
</style>
<template>
  <div :class="classObj" class="app-wrapper" :style="{'--current-color': theme}">
    <div v-if="device==='mobile'&&sidebar.opened" class="drawer-bg" @click="handleClickOutside"/>
    <sidebar v-show="$store.getters.menuFlag" v-if="!sidebar.hide" class="sidebar-container" :style="{ backgroundColor: sideTheme === 'theme-dark' ? variables.menuBg : variables.menuLightBg }" />
    <div :class="{hasTagsView:needTagsView,sidebarHide:sidebar.hide,'fullscrollstyle': !$store.getters.menuFlag}" class="main-container">
      <div :class="{'fixed-header':fixedHeader}" v-show="$store.getters.menuFlag">
        <navbar />
        <tags-view v-if="needTagsView" />
      </div>
      <app-main />
      <right-panel>
        <settings />
      </right-panel>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import RightPanel from '@/components/RightPanel'
import { AppMain, Navbar, Settings, Sidebar, TagsView } from './components'
import ResizeMixin from './mixin/ResizeHandler'
import { mapState } from 'vuex'
import variables from '@/assets/styles/variables.scss'
export default {
  name: 'Layout',
  components: {
    AppMain,
    Navbar,
    RightPanel,
    Settings,
    Sidebar,
    TagsView
  },
  mixins: [ResizeMixin],
  computed: {
    ...mapState({
      theme: state => state.settings.theme,
      sideTheme: state => state.settings.sideTheme,
      sidebar: state => state.app.sidebar,
      device: state => state.app.device,
      needTagsView: state => state.settings.tagsView,
      fixedHeader: state => state.settings.fixedHeader
    }),
    classObj() {
      return {
        hideSidebar: !this.sidebar.opened,
        openSidebar: this.sidebar.opened,
        withoutAnimation: this.sidebar.withoutAnimation,
        mobile: this.device === 'mobile'
      }
    },
    variables() {
      return variables;
    }
  },
  methods: {
    handleClickOutside() {
      this.$store.dispatch('app/closeSideBar', { withoutAnimation: false })
    }
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <div>
    <el-dialog title="选择资产" :visible.sync="openLocationList" width="1100px" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
      <div class="app-container">
        <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="true" label-width="68px">
          <el-form-item label="资产分类" prop="assetsClass">
            <treeselect ref="treeselect" v-model="queryParams.assetsClass" :options="classOptions" style="width:200px" clearable @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
            placeholder="请选择资产分类" />
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item label="资产编号" prop="assetsCode">
            <el-input
              v-model="queryParams.assetsCode"
              placeholder="请输入资产编号"
              clearable
              @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
            />
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item label="资产名称" prop="assetsName">
            <el-input
              v-model="queryParams.assetsName"
              placeholder="请输入资产名称"
              clearable
              @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
            />
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item>
            <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
            <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
            <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-submit" size="mini" @click="handleSetSelectSubmit">确定({{this.selectedInfo.length}})</el-button>
            <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQueryCancel">取消</el-button>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-form>
        <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="infoList" ref="multipleTable" @select='onTableSelect' @select-all="handleSelectionChange" @selection-change="handleSelectionAssets">
          <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center"/>
          <el-table-column label="序号" type="index" width="50" align="center"/>
          <el-table-column label="状态" align="center" prop="assetsStatus">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <dict-tag :options="dict.type.assets_status" :value="scope.row.assetsStatus"/>
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
          <el-table-column label="资产编号" align="center" prop="assetsCode"/>
          <el-table-column label="资产分类" align="center" prop="assetsClassName"/>
          <el-table-column label="资产名称" align="center" prop="assetsName"/>
          <el-table-column label="照片" align="center" prop="pic" width="160">
          <template slot-scope="scope">
            <div class="flex" style="width:160px; !important">
              <div v-for="(item, index) in scope.row.assetsPicList" :key="index" style="margin-bottom: 0px; !important" class="img-box">
                <el-image style="max-height:40px;max-width: 40px;z-index: 99;" :src="item.url" class="avatar el-img" :preview-src-list="scope.row.preViewList"></el-image>
              </div>
            </div>
          </template>
          </el-table-column>
          <el-table-column label="品牌" align="center" prop="brand"/>
          <el-table-column label="型号" align="center" prop="model"/>
          <el-table-column label="计量单位" align="center" prop="unit">
          <template slot-scope="scope">
            <dict-tag :options="dict.type.assets_unit" :value="scope.row.unit"/>
          </template>
          </el-table-column>
        </el-table>
        <pagination
          v-show="total>0"
          :total="total"
          :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
          :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
          @pagination="getList"
        />
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { listSelect,treeselectClass } from "@/api/assets/info";
import Treeselect from "@riophae/vue-treeselect";
import "@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css";
export default {
  components: {Treeselect},
  name: "Info",
  props: {
    buildSelectInfo: null,
    applyId: null
  },
  dicts: ['assets_unit','assets_source','assets_status'],
  data() {
    return {
      applyId: null,
      openLocationList: true, 
      assetsPicList:[],
      preViewList:[],
      deptNameInfo:null,
      userNameInfo: null,
      deptIdInfo: null,
      userIdInfo: null,
      // 分类选项
      classOptions: undefined,
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      // 非单个禁用
      single: true, 
      // 已选择的信息
      selectedInfo:[],
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      // 显示搜索条件 
      // 已选择的是否显示
      selectOpen: false,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 资产信息（主要）表格数据
      infoList: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      // 部门树选项
      deptOptions: undefined,
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false, 
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        assetsStatus: 0,
        assetsCode: null,
        assetsClass: null,
        assetsClassName: null,
        model: null,
        unit: null,
        source: null,
        brand: null,
        procureTime: null,
        procureUserName: null,
        warranty: null,
        num: null,
        amount: null,
        useUserId:null,
        useDeptId: null,
        assetsName: null
      },
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.selectedInfo = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.buildSelectInfo));
    this.getClassTree();
    this.getList();
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询资产信息（主要）列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      this.queryParams.applyId = this.applyId;
      listSelect(this.queryParams).then(response => {
        this.infoList = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
        this.infoList.forEach(row => {
          row.preViewList = []
          row.assetsPicList.forEach(element => {
            row.preViewList.push( element.url);
          }); 
        })
        // 回显选择的物资信息
        this.$nextTick(() => {
          this.selectedInfo.forEach(assets => {
            this.infoList.forEach(row => {
              if (row.assetsId === assets.assetsId) {
                this.$refs.multipleTable.toggleRowSelection(row, true);
              }
            })
          })
        })
      });
    },
    getClassTree(){
      treeselectClass().then(response => {
        this.classOptions = response.data;
      });
    },
    handleSetSelectSubmit(){
      this.$emit('buildSelectChange', this.selectedInfo);
      this.handleClose();
    },
    handleMouseEvents(event) {
      this.selectOpen = true;
    },
    handleMouseLeave(){
      this.selectOpen = false; 
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    resetQueryCancel(){
      this.selectedInfo = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.buildSelectInfo));
      this.infoList.forEach(row => {
        let flag = false;
        this.selectedInfo.forEach(assets => {
          if (row.assetsId == assets.assetsId) {
            flag = true
          } 
        })
        this.$refs.multipleTable.toggleRowSelection(row, flag);
      })
    },
    // 关闭方法
      handleClose() {
        this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) { 
    // 1 是个数据 
      this.infoList.forEach(item => {
        let flag = false;
        selection.forEach(selInfo => {
          if (item.assetsId == selInfo.assetsId) {
            flag = true; 
          }
        })
        if (flag == true) {
          //添加
          this.addAssetsInfo(item);
        } else {
          //移除
          this.deleteAssetsInfo(item);
        }
      })
      this.ids = this.selectedInfo.map(item => item.assetsId)
    },
    handleSelectionAssets(selection){
      this.single = selection.length!==1
      this.multiple = !selection.length
    },
    onTableSelect(rows, row) {
      let selected = rows.length && rows.indexOf(row) !== -1
      if (selected == true) {
        this.addAssetsInfo(row)
      } else {
        this.deleteAssetsInfo(row);
      }
    },
    addAssetsInfo(row){
      //判断是否再之前的信息中，有则不进行添加
      let flagInfo = false;
      this.selectedInfo.forEach(item =>{
        if (item.assetsId == row.assetsId) {
          flagInfo = true;
        }
      })
      if (flagInfo == false) {
        this.selectedInfo.push(row);
        this.ids.push(row.assetsId);
      }
    },
    deleteAssetsInfo(row){ 
      this.selectedInfo=this.selectedInfo.filter(item=>item.assetsId != row.assetsId);
      this.ids=this.ids.filter(item=>item != row.assetsId); 
    }, 
  }
};
</script> 
<style scoped>
.flex {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: flex-start;
}
.el-img {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 9999;
}
.img-box {
position: relative;
  margin-right: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.el-upload-list {
    display: none;
}
</style>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch" label-width="100px">
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="6">
          <el-form-item label="资产分类" prop="assetsClass">
            <treeselect ref="treeselect" v-model="queryParams.assetsClass" :options="classOptions" style="width:215px" clearable @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
            placeholder="请选择资产分类" />
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="6">
          <el-form-item label="申请时间" prop="applyTime">
            <el-date-picker
              v-model="daterangeApplyTime"
              style="width: 215px"
              value-format="yyyy-MM-dd"
              type="daterange"
              range-separator="-"
              start-placeholder="开始日期"
              end-placeholder="结束日期"
            ></el-date-picker>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="6">
          <el-form-item :label="userNameTitle[this.applyTypeInfo-1]" prop="applyUserId">
            <el-select v-model="queryParams.applyUserId" filterable style="width:215px">
              <el-option v-for="item in userInfoOption" :key="item.userId" :label="item.nickName" :value="item.userId"></el-option>
            </el-select>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="6">
          <el-form-item label="状态" prop="applyStatus">
            <el-select v-model="queryParams.applyStatus" filterable style="width:215px">
              <el-option v-for="item in applyTypeInfo==1?dict.type.apply_status_use:dict.type.apply_status_other" :key="item.value" :label="item.label" :value="item.value" placeholder="请选择资产状态" ></el-option>
            </el-select>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="6">
          <el-form-item label="审批人" prop="approveUserId">
            <el-select v-model="queryParams.approveUserId" filterable style="width:215px">
              <el-option v-for="item in userInfoOption" :key="item.userId" :label="item.nickName" :value="item.userId"></el-option>
            </el-select>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="6">
          <el-form-item>
            <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
            <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
    </el-form>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="infoList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column label="序号" type="index" width="50" align="center"/>
      <el-table-column v-for="(item,index) in this.columns" :key="index" :label="item.label" align="center" :prop="item.prop">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <dict-tag v-if="item.dict != undefined && item.dict != null" :options="dict.type[item.dict]" :value="scope.row[item.prop]"/>
          <span v-else-if="item.dataType">{{parseTime(scope.row[item.prop], '{y}-{m}-{d} {h}:{i}') }}</span>
          <p v-else >{{scope.row[item.prop]}}</p>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['approve:use:deal','approve:back:deal','approve:delete:deal','approve:move:deal']"
            v-if="scope.row.isApproveBtn==1"
          >审核
          </el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-search"
            @click="handleDetail(scope.row)"
            v-if="scope.row.isApproveBtn!=1"
            v-hasPermi="['approve:use:detail','approve:back:detail','approve:delete:detail','approve:move:detail']"
          >查看 
          </el-button>
          <!-- <el-button
              size="mini"
              type="text"
              icon="el-icon-search"
              @click="handleUse(scope.row)"
          >领用
          </el-button> -->
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination
      v-show="total>0"
      :total="total"
      :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
      :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
      @pagination="getList"
    />
    <!-- 添加或修改资产相关申请对话框 -->
    <el-dialog title="审核" :visible.sync="open" width="1000px" append-to-body @close="handleClose">
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="80px">
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <span style="font-size: 20px; font-family: -webkit-body;font-weight: bolder; !important">基本信息</span>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row v-if="this.applyTypeInfo == 1">
          <el-col :span="24">
             <el-row>
              <el-col :span="24">
                <el-form-item label="申请日期:" prop="applyTime" style="margin-left:40px;margin-bottom:0px;" >
                {{parseTime(this.form.applyTime, '{y}-{m}-{d} {h}:{i}') }}
                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
            </el-row>
            <el-row>
              <el-col :span="24">
                <el-form-item label="所属部门:" prop="applyDeptName" style="margin-left:40px;margin-bottom:0px;" >
                  {{this.form.applyDeptName}}
                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
            </el-row>
            <el-row>
              <el-col :span="24">
                <el-form-item label="领用人:" prop="applyUserName" style="margin-left:40px;margin-bottom:0px;" >
                  {{this.form.applyUserName}}
                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
            </el-row>
            <el-row>
              <el-col :span="24">
                <el-form-item label="申请描述:" prop="applyRemark" style="margin-left:40px;margin-bottom:0px;" >
                  {{this.form.applyRemark}}
                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
            </el-row>
            <el-row>
              <el-col :span="24">
                <el-form-item label="状态:" prop="applyStatus" style="margin-left:40px;margin-bottom:0px;" >
                  <dict-tag :options="dict.type.apply_status_use" :value="this.form.applyStatus"/>
                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
            </el-row>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row v-if="this.applyTypeInfo == 2">
          <el-col :span="24">
             <el-row>
              <el-col :span="24">
                <el-form-item label="申请日期:" prop="applyTime" style="margin-left:40px;margin-bottom:0px;" >
                  {{parseTime(this.form.applyTime, '{y}-{m}-{d} {h}:{i}') }}
                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
            </el-row>
            <el-row>
              <el-col :span="24">
                <el-form-item label="所属部门:" prop="applyDeptName" style="margin-left:40px;margin-bottom:0px;" >
                  {{this.form.applyDeptName}}
                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
            </el-row>
            <el-row>
              <el-col :span="24">
                <el-form-item label="退库人:" prop="applyUserName" style="margin-left:40px;margin-bottom:0px;" >
                  {{this.form.applyUserName}}
                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
            </el-row>
            <el-row>
              <el-col :span="24">
                <el-form-item label="退库原因:" prop="applyReason" style="margin-left:40px;margin-bottom:0px;" >
                  {{this.form.applyReason}}
                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
            </el-row>
            <el-row>
              <el-col :span="24">
                <el-form-item label="退库备注:" prop="applyRemark" style="margin-left:40px;margin-bottom:0px;" >
                  {{this.form.applyRemark}}
                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
            </el-row>
            <el-row>
              <el-col :span="24">
                <el-form-item label="状态:" prop="updateTime" style="margin-left:40px;margin-bottom:0px;" >
                   <dict-tag :options="dict.type.apply_status_other" :value="this.form.applyStatus"/>
                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
            </el-row>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row v-if="this.applyTypeInfo == 3">
          <el-col :span="24">
             <el-row>
              <el-col :span="24">
                <el-form-item label="申请日期:" prop="applyTime" style="margin-left:40px;margin-bottom:0px;" >

                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
            </el-row>

                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>

          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row v-if="this.applyTypeInfo == 4">
          <el-col :span="24">
             <el-row>
              <el-col :span="24">
                <el-form-item label="申请日期:" prop="applyTime" style="margin-left:40px;margin-bottom:0px;" >
                  {{parseTime(this.form.applyTime, '{y}-{m}-{d} {h}:{i}') }}
                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
            </el-row>

              <el-col :span="12">

                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
              <el-col :span="12">
                <el-form-item label="转移部门:" prop="transferDeptName" style="margin-left:40px;margin-bottom:0px;" >
                  {{this.form.transferDeptName}}
                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
            </el-row>
            <el-row>
              <el-col :span="12">
                <el-form-item label="申请人:" prop="applyUserName" style="margin-left:40px;margin-bottom:0px;" >
                  {{this.form.applyUserName}}
                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
              <el-col :span="121">
                <el-form-item label="转移人:" prop="transferUserName" style="margin-left:40px;margin-bottom:0px;" >
                  {{this.form.transferUserName}}
                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
            </el-row>
            <el-row>
              <el-col :span="24">
                <el-form-item label="转移原因:" prop="applyReason" style="margin-left:40px;margin-bottom:0px;" >
                  {{this.form.applyReason}}
                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
            </el-row>
            <el-row>
              <el-col :span="24">
                <el-form-item label="转移备注:" prop="applyRemark" style="margin-left:40px;margin-bottom:0px;" >
                  {{this.form.applyRemark}}
                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
            </el-row>
            <el-row>
              <el-col :span="24">
                <el-form-item label="状态:" prop="updateTime" style="margin-left:40px;margin-bottom:0px;" >
                  <dict-tag :options="dict.type.apply_status_other" :value="this.form.applyStatus"/>
                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
            </el-row>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row>
          <el-col style="margin-top: 30px;" :span="24">
            <span style="font-size: 20px; font-family: -webkit-body;font-weight: bolder; !important">资产明细</span>
            <el-button type="primary" @click="showSelectPage" style="margin-left: 30px;!important"
              v-hasPermi="['approve:use:selectassets']"
              v-if="selectAssetsBtnVis">选择资产</el-button>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="detailInfoList" style="margin-top:20px; !important" ref="multipleTable">
              <el-table-column label="序号" type="index" width="50" align="center"/>
              <el-table-column label="申请照片" align="center" prop="pic" width="180" v-if="this.applyTypeInfo==2 || this.applyTypeInfo==3">
                <template slot-scope="scope">
                  <div class="flex" style="width:100%; !important">
                    <div v-for="(item, index) in scope.row.applyDetailPicList" :key="index" style="margin-bottom: 0px; !important" class="img-box">
                      <el-image style="max-height:40px;max-width: 40px;z-index: 99;" :src="item.url" class="avatar el-img" :preview-src-list="scope.row.preApplyDetailViewList"></el-image>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </template>
              </el-table-column>
              <el-table-column label="资产照片" align="center" prop="pic" width="180">
                <template slot-scope="scope">
                  <div class="flex" style="width:100%; !important">
                    <div v-for="(item, index) in scope.row.assetsPicList" :key="index" style="margin-bottom: 0px; !important" class="img-box">
                      <el-image style="max-height:40px;max-width: 40px;z-index: 99;" :src="item.url" class="avatar el-img" :preview-src-list="scope.row.preViewList"></el-image>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </template>
              </el-table-column>
              <el-table-column label="资产编号" align="center" prop="assetsCode" width="120"/>
              <el-table-column label="资产名称" align="center" prop="assetsName"/>
              <el-table-column label="资产分类" align="center" prop="assetsClassName"/>
              <el-table-column label="品牌" align="center" prop="brand"/>
              <el-table-column label="型号" align="center" prop="model"/>
              <el-table-column label="计量单位" align="center" prop="unit">
                <template slot-scope="scope">
                  <dict-tag :options="dict.type.assets_unit" :value="scope.row.unit"/>
                </template>
              </el-table-column>
            </el-table>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row>
          <el-col style="margin-top: 30px;" :span="24">
            <span style="font-size: 20px; font-family: -webkit-body;font-weight: bolder; !important">审批进度</span>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <Steps v-if="showStep"
              :currentStep="currentStep"
              :totalSteps="totalSteps"
              :stepsLabelInfo="stepsLabelInfo"
              :totalWidth="800"
              :descMaxWidth="160"
              @change="onChange" />
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
        <el-button type="primary" v-if="this.form.isApproveBtn==1 && !this.isDetail" @click="showApproveReason(0)">拒 绝</el-button>
        <el-button type="primary" v-if="this.form.isApproveBtn==1 && !this.isDetail" @click="showApproveReason(1)">通 过</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <!-- 领用 -->
    <el-dialog :title="approveReasonDialogTitle" :visible.sync="approveReasonDialog" width="600px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form"  label-width="100px">
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item v-if="approveReasonDialogTitle === '审核拒绝'" label="审批理由" prop="approveReason" :rules=" [{ required: true, message: '请输入审批理由', trigger: 'blur' }]">
              <el-input v-model="form.approveReason" placeholder="请输入审批理由" maxlength="200" show-word-limit type="textarea" rows="3" resize="none" />
            </el-form-item>
            <el-form-item v-else label="审批理由" prop="approveReason">
              <el-input v-model="form.approveReason" placeholder="请输入审批理由" maxlength="200" show-word-limit type="textarea" rows="3" resize="none" />
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm( approveReasonDialogTitle === '审核拒绝' ? 0 : 1)">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <BuildSelect v-if="visibleBuildSelect" :visible.sync="visibleBuildSelect" :buildSelectInfo="selectInfoFromBuild" :applyId="selectApplyId"
      @buildSelectChange="buildSelectChange"></BuildSelect>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {delInfo, getInfo, listInfo, approveInfo,getUseInfo} from "@/api/assets/apply";
import {treeselectClass} from "@/api/assets/info";
import Treeselect from "@riophae/vue-treeselect";
import {getUserList} from "@/api/system/user";
import "@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css";
import Steps from '@/views/assets/apply/Step'
import BuildSelect from '@/views/assets/apply/buildSelect'
export default {
  name: "Info",
  dicts: ['apply_status_use','apply_status_other','assets_unit'],
  components: {Treeselect ,Steps,BuildSelect},
  data() {
    return {
      selectApplyId:null,
      // 审批节点信息
      stepsLabelInfo:[{step:"Step 1",desc:"description",date:"dsfdsf"},{step:"Step 2",desc:"description",date:"dsfdsf"},{step:"Step 3",desc:"description",date:"dsfdsf"}],
      // 当前审批步骤
      currentStep:1,
      // 审批节点总数
      totalSteps: 3,
      // 申请类型信息
      applyTypeInfo:null,
      // 子页面选中信息
      selectInfoFromBuild:null,
      // 是否显示
      visibleBuildSelect:false,
      // 选中信息
      selectDataInfo:[],
      // 详细信息
      detailInfoList:[],
      // 是否是查看详情
      isDetail:false,
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 显示审批节点
      showStep:false,
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      // 非单个禁用
      single: true,
      approveReasonDialog : false,
      approveReasonDialogTitle:"",
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      // 选择资产按钮是否显示
      selectAssetsBtnVis:false,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 分类选项
      classOptions: undefined,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 资产相关申请主表格数据
      infoList: [],
      // 用户信息
      userInfoOption:[],
      // 申请时间查询范围
      daterangeApplyTime: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        applyDesc: null,
        applyTime: null,
        applyUserId: null,
        applyUserName: null,
        applyDeptId: null,
        applyDeptName: null,
        applyStatus: null,
        applyType: null,
        applyFlowSatus: null,
        applyReason: null,
        applyRemark: null,
        auditStep: null,
        transferUserId: null,
        transferUserName: null,
        transferDeptId: null,
        transferDeptName: null,
        receiveStatus: null,
        createById: null,
        updateById: null,
        deptId: null
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {},
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
      },
      // table列信息
      columns: [],
      // 用户名称标题
      userNameTitle:[`领用人`,`退库人`,`申请人`,`申请人`],
      // 行信息元数据
      columnsAll:[
        // 领用审核列信息
        [
          {key: 0, label: `申请时间`, visible: true,prop:`applyTime`,dataType: true},
          {key: 1, label: `领取时间`, visible: true,prop:`receiveTime`,dataType: true},
          {key: 2, label: `使用部门`, visible: true,prop:`applyDeptName`},
          {key: 3, label: `领用人`, visible: true,prop:`applyUserName`},
          {key: 4, label: `申请描述`, visible: true,prop:`applyRemark`},
          {key: 5, label: `审批人`, visible: true,prop:`approveUserAll`},
          {key: 6, label: `状态`, visible: true,prop:`applyStatus`,dict:`apply_status_use`,dictValue:`scope.row.applyStatus`}
        ],
        // 退库审核列信息
        [
          {key: 0, label: `申请时间`, visible: true,prop:`applyTime`,dataType: true},
          {key: 1, label: `使用部门`, visible: true,prop:`applyDeptName`},
          {key: 2, label: `退库人`, visible: true,prop:`applyUserName`},
          {key: 3, label: `退库原因`, visible: true,prop:`applyReason`},
          {key: 4, label: `审批人`, visible: true,prop:`approveUserAll`},
          {key: 5, label: `状态`, visible: true,prop:`applyStatus`,dict:`apply_status_other`,dictValue:`scope.row.applyStatus`}
        ],
        // 报废审核列信息
        [
          {key: 0, label: `申请时间`, visible: true,prop:`applyTime`,dataType: true},
          {key: 1, label: `申请部门`, visible: true,prop:`applyDeptName`},
          {key: 2, label: `申请人`, visible: true,prop:`applyUserName`},
          {key: 3, label: `报废原因`, visible: true,prop:`applyReason`},
          {key: 4, label: `审批人`, visible: true,prop:`approveUserAll`},
          {key: 5, label: `状态`, visible: true,prop:`applyStatus`,dict:`apply_status_other`,dictValue:`scope.row.applyStatus`},
        ],
        // 转移审核列信息
        [
          {key: 0, label: `申请时间`, visible: true,prop:`applyTime`,dataType: true},
          {key: 1, label: `申请部门`, visible: true,prop:`applyDeptName`},
          {key: 2, label: `申请人`, visible: true,prop:`applyUserName`},
          {key: 3, label: `转移部门`, visible: true,prop:`transferDeptName`},
          {key: 4, label: `转移人`, visible: true,prop:`transferUserName`},
          {key: 5, label: `转移原因`, visible: true,prop:`applyReason`},
          {key: 6, label: `审批人`, visible: true,prop:`approveUserAll`},
          {key: 6, label: `状态`, visible: true,prop:`applyStatus`,dict:`apply_status_other`,dictValue:`scope.row.applyStatus`},
        ]
      ],
    };
  },
  created() { 
    this.applyTypeInfo = this.$route.query.applyType
    this.setColumsInfo();
    this.getClassTree();
    this.getUserInfoOption();
    this.getList();
  },
  methods: {
    setColumsInfo(){
      this.columns = this.columnsAll[this.applyTypeInfo - 1]
    },
    /** 查询资产相关申请主列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      this.$set(this.queryParams,"applyType",this.applyTypeInfo);
      this.queryParams.params = {};
      if (null != this.daterangeApplyTime && '' != this.daterangeApplyTime) {
        this.queryParams.params["beginApplyTime"] = this.daterangeApplyTime[0];
        this.queryParams.params["endApplyTime"] = this.daterangeApplyTime[1];
      }
      this.queryParams.fromType = '1'
      listInfo(this.queryParams).then(response => {
        this.infoList = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    onChange (index) { 
      // 父组件获取切换后的选中步骤
    },
    // 关闭审批信息
    handleClose(){
      this.open = false;
      this.showStep = false;
      this.detailInfoList = [];
      this.reset();
    },
    // 子页面调用方法
    buildSelectChange(selection){ 
      this.selectDataInfo = selection;
      this.detailInfoList = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.selectDataInfo));
      this.setAsstesPci();
    },
    // 设置资产预览信息
    setAsstesPci(){
      this.detailInfoList.forEach(row => { 
        this.$set(row,'preViewList',[]); 
        this.$set(row,'preApplyDetailViewList',[]);
        row.assetsPicList.forEach(element => {
          row.preViewList.push( element.url);
        }); 
        row.applyDetailPicList.forEach(element => {
          row.preApplyDetailViewList.push( element.url);
        }); 
      })
    },
    // 取消按钮
    cancel() {
      this.open = false;
      this.showStep = false;
      this.detailInfoList = [];
      this.approveReasonDialog = false;
      this.reset();
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.form = {
        applyId: null,
        applyDesc: null,
        applyTime: null,
        applyUserId: null,
        applyUserName: null,
        applyDeptId: null,
        applyDeptName: null,
        applyStatus: "0",
        applyType: null,
        applyFlowSatus: null,
        applyReason: null,
        applyRemark: null,
        auditStep: null,
        transferUserId: null,
        transferUserName: null,
        transferDeptId: null,
        transferDeptName: null,
        receiveStatus: "0",
        createById: null,
        createBy: null,
        createTime: null,
        updateById: null,
        updateBy: null,
        updateTime: null,
        delFlag: null,
        remark: null,
        deptId: null,
        approveReason: null
      };
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.daterangeApplyTime = [];
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.applyId)
      this.single = selection.length!==1
      this.multiple = !selection.length
    },
    /** 新增按钮操作 */
    handleAdd() {
      this.reset();
      this.open = true;
      this.title = "添加资产相关申请主";
    },
    /** 获取分类树信息 */
    getClassTree(){
      treeselectClass().then(response => {
        this.classOptions = response.data;
      });
    },
    /** 获取用户信息 */
    getUserInfoOption(){
      getUserList().then(response => {
        this.userInfoOption = response.data;
        this.userInfoOptionDept = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.userInfoOption));
      });
    },
    /** 修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset();
      const applyId = row.applyId || this.ids
      this.isDetail = false;
      this.selectApplyId = row.applyId ;
      getInfo(applyId).then(response => { 
        this.showStep = true
        console.log(response.data);
        this.form = response.data;
        this.setStepInfo();
        this.open = true;
        this.title = "审核";
        this.selectDataInfo = [];
        if (this.form.detailInfo == null || this.form.detailInfo.length == 0) {
          this.selectAssetsBtnVis = true;
        } else {
          this.selectAssetsBtnVis = false;
          this.setDetailInfoList(); 
        }
      });
    },
    /** 申请单详情 */
    handleDetail(row){ 
      this.reset();
      const applyId = row.applyId || this.ids
      this.isDetail = true;
      this.selectApplyId = row.applyId ;
      getInfo(applyId).then(response => { 
        console.log(response.data);
        this.showStep = true
        this.form = response.data;
        this.setStepInfo();
        this.open = true;
        this.title = "详情";
        this.detailInfoList = [];
        this.selectInfoFromBuild = null;
        if (this.form.detailInfo == null || this.form.detailInfo.length == 0) {
          this.selectAssetsBtnVis = true;
        } else {
          this.setDetailInfoList();
        }
      });
    },
    /** 领用申请单下资产 */
    handleUse(row) {
      const applyId = row.applyId
      getUseInfo(applyId).then(response => { 
        this.$modal.msgSuccess(response.msg); 
      });
    },
    /** 设置明细信息 */
    setDetailInfoList(){
      this.detailInfoList = [];
      this.form.detailInfo.forEach((item,index) => {
        let assetsInfo = item.assetsInfo;
        this.$set(assetsInfo,"detailId",item.detailId)
        if (assetsInfo != null) {
          this.$set(assetsInfo,"applyDetailPicList",item.picList);
          this.$set(assetsInfo,"assetsPicList",item.assetsInfo.assetsPicList)
        }
        this.detailInfoList.push(assetsInfo);
      });
      this.setAsstesPci();
    },
    /** 显示数据选择页面 */
    showSelectPage(){
      this.selectInfoFromBuild = this.selectDataInfo
      this.visibleBuildSelect = true;
    },
    /** 设置审批步骤 */
    setStepInfo(){
      this.stepsLabelInfo = [];
      this.currentStep = 0;
      this.totalSteps = this.form.setDetails.length;
      this.form.setDetails.forEach((item,index) => {
        if (this.form.auditStep == item.auditStep) {
          this.currentStep = index +1;
        }
        let descInfo = item.auditStepName;
        let timeInfo = this.parseTime(item.approveTime, '{y}-{m}-{d} {h}:{i}')
        let userNameInfo = item.auditUserName;
        if (item.approveUserName) {
          userNameInfo = item.approveUserName;
        }
        if (index == this.totalSteps - 1) {
          userNameInfo = item.auditStepName;
          descInfo = "";
        }
        let remark = null;
        if (item.approveRemark) {
          remark = item.approveRemark;
        }
        let info ={
          desc : descInfo,
          date : timeInfo,
          step : userNameInfo,
          remark : remark
        }
        this.stepsLabelInfo.push(info)
      }); 
    },
    /** 显示审批原因 */
    showApproveReason (optType) {
      this.form.approveReason = null;
      this.approveReasonDialogTitle = optType == 1 ? "审核通过" : "审核拒绝";
      this.approveReasonDialog = true;
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm(optType) {
      let test = optType == 1?'通过':'拒绝'
      let that = this; 
      if (this.detailInfoList.length != 0 && that.form.applyType == '1') { 
        this.$set(this.form,"detailInfo",this.detailInfoList);
      }
      if (optType != 1) { 
        console.log(222222222)
        this.$refs["form"].validate(valid => {
          console.log(valid)
          if (valid) {
            that.$set(that.form,"optType",optType)
            approveInfo(that.form).then(response => {
              that.getList();
              that.open = false;
              that.$modal.msgSuccess("审核成功");
              that.approveReasonDialog = false;
              that.reset()
            }); 
          }
        });
      } else {
        this.$modal.confirm('是否确认'+test+'审核？').then(function() {
        that.$set(that.form,"optType",optType)
        approveInfo(that.form).then(response => {
          that.getList();
          that.open = false;
          that.$modal.msgSuccess("审核成功");
          that.approveReasonDialog = false;
          that.reset()
        });
      }).then(() => {
      }).catch((e) => {
        console.log(e);
      });
      }
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const applyIds = row.applyId || this.ids;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除资产相关申请主编号为"' + applyIds + '"的数据项？').then(function() {
        return delInfo(applyIds);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.download('project/info/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `info_${new Date().getTime()}.xlsx`)
    }
  }
};
</script>
<style scoped>
.flex {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: center;
}
.el-img {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 9999;
}
.img-box {
  position: relative;
  margin-right: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.el-upload-list {
  display: none;
}
</style>
<template>
  <div class="m-steps-area" :style="`width: ${totalWidth}px;`">
    <div class="m-steps">
      <div :class="['m-steps-item',
        {
          'finished': current > n,
          'process': current === n && n !== totalSteps,
          'last-process': current === totalSteps && n === totalSteps,
          'middle-wait': current < n && n !== totalSteps,
          'last-wait': current < n && n === totalSteps
        }
        ]"
        v-for="n in totalSteps"
        :key="n">
        <div class="m-info-wrap" >
          <!-- @click="onChange(n)" -->
          <div class="m-steps-icon" style="margin-top:30px;!important">
            <span class="u-icon" v-if="current<=n">{{ n }}</span>
            <svg class="u-icon" v-else viewBox="64 64 896 896" data-icon="check" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false"><path d="M912 190h-69.9c-9.8 0-19.1 4.5-25.1 12.2L404.7 724.5 207 474a32 32 0 0 0-25.1-12.2H112c-6.7 0-10.4 7.7-6.3 12.9l273.9 347c12.8 16.2 37.4 16.2 50.3 0l488.4-618.9c4.1-5.1.4-12.8-6.3-12.8z"></path></svg>
          </div>
          <div class="m-steps-content">
            <div class="u-steps-time" style="height: 30px;position: relative;font-size:14px;!important">{{ stepsLabelInfo[n-1].date}}</div>
            <div class="u-steps-title">{{ stepsLabelInfo[n-1].step }}</div>
            <div class="u-steps-description" v-show="stepsLabelInfo[n-1].desc" :style="`max-width: ${descMaxWidth}px;`">{{ stepsLabelInfo[n-1].desc}}</div>
            <div class="u-steps-description" v-show="stepsLabelInfo[n-1].remark" :style="`max-width: ${descMaxWidth}px;`">审批理由：{{ stepsLabelInfo[n-1].remark}}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
export default {
  name: 'Steps',
  props: {
    stepsLabelInfo: { // 步骤标题数组
      type: Array,
      default: () => {
        return []
      }
    },
    totalSteps: { // 步骤总数
      type: Number,
      default: 3
    },
    currentStep: { // 当前选中的步骤
      type: Number,
      default: 1
    },
    totalWidth: { // 步骤条总宽度
      type: Number,
      default: 900
    },
    descMaxWidth: { // 描述文本最大宽度
      type: Number,
      default: 140
    }
  },
  data () {
    return {
      // 若当前选中步骤超过总步骤数，则默认选择步骤1
      current: this.currentStep > this.totalSteps ? 1 : this.currentStep
    }
  },
  created(){
  },
  methods: {
    onChange (index) { // 点击切换选择步骤
      // e.stopPropagation()
      if (this.current !== index) {
        this.current = index
        this.$emit('change', index)
      }
    }
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch">
      <el-form-item label="分类名称" prop="className">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.className"
          placeholder="请输入分类名称"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item>
        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleAdd"
          v-hasPermi="['assets:class:add']"
        >新增</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="info"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-sort"
          size="mini"
          @click="toggleExpandAll"
        >展开/折叠</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <right-toolbar :showSearch.sync="showSearch" @queryTable="getList"></right-toolbar>
    </el-row>
    <el-table
      v-if="refreshTable"
      v-loading="loading"
      :data="regionList"
      row-key="classId"
      :default-expand-all="isExpandAll"
      :tree-props="{children: 'children', hasChildren: 'hasChildren'}"
    >
      <el-table-column label="序号" type="index" width="50" align="center"/>
      <el-table-column prop="className" label="分类名称"  align="center" :show-overflow-tooltip="true"  ></el-table-column>
      <el-table-column prop="createBy" label="创建人"   align="center"></el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" fixed="right" width="200">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-plus"
            @click="handleAdd(scope.row,1)"
            v-hasPermi="['assets:class:add']"
            v-if="scope.row.parentId == 0"
          >新增子级</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            @click="handleUpdate(scope.row,0)"
            v-hasPermi="['assets:class:edit']"
          >编辑</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-delete"
            @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['assets:class:remove']"
          >删除</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <!-- 添加或修改分类对话框 -->
    <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="open" width="680px" append-to-body>
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="100px">
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24" v-if="editType == 1">
            <el-form-item label="上级分类" prop="parentId" disabled >
              <treeselect
                v-model="form.parentId"
                :options="regionOptions"
                :normalizer="normalizer"
                :show-count="true"
                placeholder="选择上级分类"
                disabled
              />
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item label="分类名称" prop="className">
              <el-input v-model="form.className" placeholder="请输入分类名称" />
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { listRegion, getRegion, delRegion, addRegion, updateRegion,handleRegionTree } from "@/api/assets/class";
import Treeselect from "@riophae/vue-treeselect";
import "@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css";
import IconSelect from "@/components/IconSelect";
import { getToken } from "@/utils/auth";
export default {
  name: "Class",
  components: { Treeselect, IconSelect },
  data() {
    return {
      // 政府负责人
      governmentList:[],
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 分类表格树数据
      regionList: [],
      // 分类树选项
      regionOptions: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      // 是否展开，默认全部折叠
      isExpandAll: false,
      // 重新渲染表格状态
      refreshTable: true,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        className: undefined,
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {},
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
        parentId: [{ required: true, message: "请选择上级分类", trigger: "blur" }],
        className: [{ required: true, message: "分类名称不能为空", trigger: "blur" }],
        type:[{ required: true, message: "请选择分类类型", trigger: "blur"}]
      },
      editType: 0
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
    console.log("Bearer " + getToken())
  },
  methods: {
    //** 选择框变更事件 */
    changeValue(){
      let filteredItem = this.governmentList.filter(item => item.userId === this.form.userId)[0];
      if(filteredItem==undefined){
        this.$set(this.form, 'userPhone', '');
        this.$set(this.form, 'userName','');
      }else{
        this.$set(this.form, 'userPhone', filteredItem.phonenumber);
        this.$set(this.form, 'userName', filteredItem.nickName);
      }
    },
    // 选择图标
    selected(name){
      this.form.icon = name;
    },
    /** 查询分类列表 */
    getList(){
      this.loading = true;
      listRegion(this.queryParams).then(response => {
        this.regionList = this.handleTree(response.rows, "classId");
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    /** 转换分类数据结构 */
    normalizer(node){
      if (node.children && !node.children.length) {
        delete node.children;
      }
      return {
        id: node.classId,
        label: node.className,
        children: node.children
      };
    },
    /** 查询分类下拉树结构 */
    getTreeselect(){
      listRegion().then(response => {
        this.regionOptions = [];
        const region = { classId: 0, className: '主类目', children: [] };
        region.children = this.handleTree(response.rows, "classId");
        this.regionOptions.push(region);
      });
    },
    /** 取消按钮 */
    cancel(){
      this.open = false;
      this.reset();
    },
    /** 表单重置 */
    reset(){
      this.form = {
        classId: undefined,
        className: undefined,
        remark: ""
      };
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery(){
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery(){
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    /** 新增按钮操作 */
    handleAdd(row,editType){
      this.reset();
      this.getTreeselect();
      if (row!=null && row.classId) {
        this.form.parentId = row.classId;
        this.editType = 1;
      } else {
        this.form.parentId = 0;
        this.editType = 0;
      }
      this.open = true;
      this.title = "添加分类";
    },
    /** 展开/折叠操作 */
    toggleExpandAll(){
      this.refreshTable = false;
      this.isExpandAll = !this.isExpandAll;
      this.$nextTick(() => {
        this.refreshTable = true;
      });
    },
    /** 修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row,editType){
      this.editType = editType,
      this.reset();
      this.getTreeselect();
      getRegion(row.classId).then(response => {
        this.form = response.data;
        this.open = true;
        this.title = "修改分类";
      });
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm: function(){
      this.$refs["form"].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          if(this.form.parentId==null||this.form.parentId==undefined||this.form.parentId==''){
            this.form.parentId = 0;
          }
          if (this.form.classId != undefined) {
            updateRegion(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          } else {
            addRegion(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          }
        }
      });
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row){
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除名称为"' + row.className + '"的数据项？').then(function() {
        return delRegion(row.classId);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch" label-width="100px">
      <el-form-item label="资产分类" prop="classId">
        <treeselect ref="treeselect" v-model="queryParams.classId" :options="classOptions" style="width: 200px"
          clearable @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" placeholder="请选择资产分类" />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="预警接收人" prop="receiveUser">
        <el-input v-model="queryParams.receiveUser" placeholder="请输入预警接收人" clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="资产名称" prop="assetsName">
        <el-input v-model="queryParams.assetsName" placeholder="请输入资产名称" clearable @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="预警时间" prop="warnTimeQuery">
        <el-date-picker v-model="queryParams.warnTimeQuery" type="date" value-format="yyyy-MM-dd" placeholder="选择日期" />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="资产编号" prop="assetsCode">
        <el-input v-model="queryParams.assetsCode" placeholder="请输入资产编号" clearable @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item>
        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="infoList" ref="multipleTable">
      <el-table-column label="序号" type="index" width="50" align="center" />
      <el-table-column label="资产名称" align="center" prop="assetsName" />
      <el-table-column label="资产编号" align="center" prop="assetsCode" />
      <el-table-column label="资产分类" align="center" prop="className" />
      <el-table-column label="预警时间" align="center" prop="warnTime" />
      <el-table-column label="有效期" align="center" prop="expirationDate" />
      <el-table-column label="临期预警天数" align="center" prop="expireWarnDays">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          {{ scope.row.expireWarnDays == null ? "" : "到期前" + scope.row.expireWarnDays + "天" }}
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="预警接收人" align="center" prop="receiveUser" />
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
      @pagination="getList" />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { treeselectClass } from "@/api/assets/info";
import { expireWarnList } from "@/api/assets/warn";
import Treeselect from "@riophae/vue-treeselect";
import "@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css";
export default {
  components: { Treeselect },
  name: "Info",
  data() {
    return {
      // 分类选项
      classOptions: undefined,
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 资产信息（主要）表格数据
      infoList: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        classId: null,
        assetsName: null,
        assetsCode: null,
        warnTimeQuery: null,
        receiveUser: null,
      },
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getClassTree();
    this.getList();
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询资产信息（主要）列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      expireWarnList(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.infoList = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    getClassTree() {
      treeselectClass().then((response) => {
        this.classOptions = response.data;
      });
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
  },
};
</script>

}

  position: relative;
  margin-right: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

            <el-col :span="12">
