                <el-upload class="upload-demo" ref="upload" :action="uploadUrl" :auto-upload="true" :headers="headers"
                  :data="formUser" :on-error="handleUploadError" :on-exceed="handleExceed" :on-success="handleUploadSuccessAll(indexAll)"
                  :on-change="handleChange" :on-remove="handleRemove" accept=".png,.jpg,.jpeg" multiple :limit="3"
                  :file-list="selInfo.picList" :show-file-list="false">
                  <el-button size="small" type="primary">点击上传</el-button>
                  <div slot="tip" class="el-upload__tip">支持扩展名：.png .jpg .jpeg</div>
                </el-upload>
                <div class="flex" style="width:350px !important">
                  <div v-for="(item, index) in selInfo.picList" :key="index" class="img-box">
                    <el-image style="max-height:100px;max-width: 100px;" :src="item.url" class="avatar el-img"></el-image>
                    <i class="el-icon-close" @click="handleRemoveAll(item,indexAll)"></i>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </el-form-item>
            </el-col>
          </el-row>
        </div>
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item label="退库原因" prop="applyReason" :rules="!openFastReback?[]:[{ required: true, message: '请输入退库原因', trigger: 'blur' }]">
              <el-input v-model="formUser.applyReason" placeholder="请输入退库原因" maxlength="200" show-word-limit type="textarea" rows="3" resize="none" />
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item label="退库备注" prop="applyRemark" :rules="!openFastReback?[]:[{ required: true, message: '请输入退库备注', trigger: 'blur' }]">
              <el-input v-model="formUser.applyRemark" placeholder="请输入退库备注" maxlength="200" show-word-limit type="textarea" rows="3" resize="none" />
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitFormUse">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <!-- 报废 -->
    <el-dialog title="报废" :visible.sync="openFastDelete" width="600px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-form ref="formUser" :model="formUser" :rules="rules" label-width="100px">
        <div v-for="(selInfo, indexAll) in selectedInfo" :key="indexAll" :v-if="openFastReback">
          <el-row>
            <el-col :span="24">
              <el-form-item label="资产编号" >
                {{selInfo.assetsCode}}
              </el-form-item>
            </el-col>
          </el-row>
          <el-row>
            <el-col :span="24">
              <el-form-item label="资产名称">
                {{selInfo.assetsName}}
              </el-form-item>
            </el-col>
          </el-row>
          <el-row >
            <el-col :span="12">
              <el-form-item v-if="openFastDelete" label="上传图片:" :prop="getProp(indexAll)" :rules="!openFastDelete?[]:[{ required: true, message: '请选择照片', trigger: 'blur' }]">
                <el-upload class="upload-demo" ref="upload" :action="uploadUrl" :auto-upload="true" :headers="headers"
                  :data="formUser" :on-error="handleUploadError" :on-exceed="handleExceed" :on-success="handleUploadSuccessAll(indexAll)"
                  :on-change="handleChange" :on-remove="handleRemove" accept=".png,.jpg,.jpeg" multiple :limit="3"
                  :file-list="selInfo.picList" :show-file-list="false">
                  <el-button size="small" type="primary">点击上传</el-button>
                  <div slot="tip" class="el-upload__tip">支持扩展名：.png .jpg .jpeg</div>
                </el-upload>
                <div class="flex" style="width:350px !important">
                  <div v-for="(item, index) in selInfo.picList" :key="index" class="img-box">
                    <el-image style="max-height:100px;max-width: 100px;" :src="item.url" class="avatar el-img"></el-image>
                    <i class="el-icon-close" @click="handleRemoveAll(item,indexAll)"></i>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </el-form-item>
            </el-col>
          </el-row>
        </div>
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item label="报废原因" prop="applyReason" :rules="!openFastDelete?[]:[{ required: true, message: '请输入报废原因', trigger: 'blur' }]">
              <el-input v-model="formUser.applyReason" placeholder="请输入报废原因" maxlength="200" show-word-limit type="textarea" rows="3" resize="none" />
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitFormUse">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <!-- 转移 -->
    <el-dialog title="转移" :visible.sync="openFastMove" width="600px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-form ref="formUser" :model="formUser" :rules="rules" label-width="100px">
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item label="所属部门" prop="applyDeptId">
              {{deptNameInfo}}
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item label="领用人" prop="applyUserId">
              {{userNameInfo}}
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <div v-for="(selInfo, indexAll) in selectedInfo" :key="indexAll" :v-if="openFastReback">
          <el-row>
            <el-col :span="24">
              <el-form-item label="资产编号">
                {{selInfo.assetsCode}}
              </el-form-item>
            </el-col>
          </el-row>
          <el-row>
            <el-col :span="24">
              <el-form-item label="资产名称">
                {{selInfo.assetsName}}
              </el-form-item>
            </el-col>
          </el-row>
        </div>
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item label="转移部门" prop="transferDeptId" :rules="!openFastMove?[]:[{ required: true, message: '请选择转移部门', trigger: 'blur' }]">
              <treeselect v-model="formUser.transferDeptId" :options="deptOptions" @select="userDeptChane" placeholder="请选择使用部门" style="width:100%"/>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item label="转移人" prop="transferUserId" :rules="!openFastMove?[]:[{ required: true, message: '请选择转移人', trigger: 'blur' }]">
              <el-select v-model="formUser.transferUserId" filterable style="width:100%" @change="userMoveChane">
                <el-option v-for="item in userInfoOptionDept" :key="item.userId" :label="item.nickName" :value="item.userId"></el-option>
              </el-select>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item label="转移原因" prop="applyReason" :rules="!openFastMove?[]:[{ required: true, message: '请输入转移原因', trigger: 'blur' }]">
              <el-input v-model="formUser.applyReason" placeholder="请输入转移原因" maxlength="200" show-word-limit type="textarea" rows="3" resize="none" />
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item label="转移备注" prop="applyRemark" :rules="!openFastMove?[]:[{ required: true, message: '请输入退库备注', trigger: 'blur' }]">
              <el-input v-model="formUser.applyRemark" placeholder="请输入退库备注" maxlength="200" show-word-limit type="textarea" rows="3" resize="none" />
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitFormUse">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog :title="uploadData.title" :visible.sync="uploadData.open" width="400px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-upload ref="uploadData" :limit="1" accept=".xlsx, .xls" :headers="uploadData.headers"
        :action="uploadData.url" :auto-upload="false"
        :disabled="uploadData.isUploading" :on-progress="handleFileUploadProgress" :on-success="handleFileSuccess"
          drag>
        <i class="el-icon-upload"></i>
        <div class="el-upload__text">
          将文件拖到此处，或
          <em>点击上传</em>
        </div>
        <div class="el-upload__tip" slot="tip">
          <el-link type="info" style="font-size:12px; color:#1890ff" @click="importTemplate">下载模板</el-link>
        </div>
        <div class="el-upload__tip" style="color:red" slot="tip">提示：仅允许导入“xls”或“xlsx”格式文件！</div>
      </el-upload>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitFileForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="uploadData.open = false">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog title="资产处理" :visible.sync="dealOpen" width="400px" style="margin-top:200px" append-to-body  :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8" style="text-align: center;">
        <el-col :span="24">
          <el-button type="primary"
            plain
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            size="mini"
            @click="handleDealFastUse"
            style="width:200px;margin-top: 10px;"
           >领用
          </el-button>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="24">
          <el-button type="primary"
            plain
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            size="mini"
            @click="handleDealFastReback"
            style="width:200px;margin-top: 10px;"
           >退库
          </el-button>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="24">
          <el-button type="primary"
            plain
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            size="mini"
            @click="handleDealFastDelete"
            style="width:200px;margin-top: 10px;"
           >报废
          </el-button>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="24">
          <el-button type="primary"
            plain
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            size="mini"
            @click="handleDealFastMove"
            style="width:200px;margin-top: 10px;"
           >转移
          </el-button>
        </el-col>
       </el-row>
    </el-dialog>
    <div v-if="false" style="width:50%; position: absolute; right: 200px; top: 100px;z-index:9999;bo">
      <el-table :data="selectedInfo" width="600px" height="300px">
        <el-table-column label="序号" type="index" width="50" align="center"/>
        <el-table-column label="状态" align="center" prop="assetsStatus">
          <template slot-scope="scope">
            <dict-tag :options="dict.type.assets_status" :value="scope.row.assetsStatus"/>
          </template>
        </el-table-column>
        <el-table-column label="资产编号" align="center" prop="assetsCode"/>
        <el-table-column label="资产分类" align="center" prop="assetsClassName"/>
        <el-table-column label="品牌" align="center" prop="brand"/>
        <el-table-column label="型号" align="center" prop="model"/>
      </el-table>
    </div>
    <!-- 添加或修改资产相关申请对话框 -->
    <el-dialog title="流转记录" :visible.sync="openFlowInfo" width="1000px" append-to-body @close="handleClose" >
      <el-form label-width="80px">
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="flowInfoList" style="margin-top:20px;height:400px;overflow-y: auto; !important" ref="multipleTable">
              <el-table-column label="序号" type="index" width="50" align="center"/>
              <el-table-column label="操作时间" align="center" prop="createTime"/>
              <el-table-column label="操作人" align="center" prop="transferUserName"/>
              <el-table-column label="操作类型" align="center" prop="flowType">
                <template slot-scope="scope">
                  <dict-tag :options="dict.type.flow_type" :value="scope.row.flowType"/>
                </template>
              </el-table-column>
            </el-table>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
      </el-form>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {addInfo, delInfo, getInfo, listInfo, updateInfo,treeselectClass ,getFlowInfo} from "@/api/assets/info";
import Treeselect from "@riophae/vue-treeselect";
import "@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css";
import { isMoney } from '@/utils/validate'
import { getToken } from "@/utils/auth";
import { QRCodeGenerator } from 'vue-qrcode-component';
import {treeselect} from "@/api/system/dept";
import {getUserList} from "@/api/system/user";
import {addApplyInfo} from "@/api/assets/apply";
  export default {
    components: {Treeselect,QRCodeGenerator},
    name: "Info",
    dicts: ['assets_unit','assets_source','assets_status','flow_type'],
    data() {
      return {
        // 二维码数据
        qrCodeData:"",
        // 上传路径
        uploadUrl: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API + "/file/upload", // 上传的图片服务器地址
        // 基础路径
        basePath: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API,
        // 消息头信息
        headers: {
          Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken()
        },
        // 资产图片集合
        assetsPicList:[],
        // 图片预览集合
        preViewList:[],
        // 流转记录
        flowInfoList:[],
        // 部门名称信息
        deptNameInfo:null,
        // 用户名称信息
        userNameInfo: null,
        // 部门id信息
        deptIdInfo: null,
        // 用户id信息
        userIdInfo: null,
        // 流转信息
        openFlowInfo:false,
        // 分类选项
        classOptions: undefined,
        // 遮罩层
        loading: true,
        // 选中数组
        ids: [],
        // 非单个禁用
        single: true,
        //用户信息选项
        userInfoOption:[],
        // 部门过滤
        userInfoOptionDept:[],
        // 已选择的信息
        selectedInfo:[],
        // 非多个禁用
        multiple: true,
        // 显示搜索条件
        showSearch: true,
        // 已选择的是否显示
        selectOpen: false,
        // 快速领用
        openFastUse:false,
        // 快速退库
        openFastReback:false,
        // 快速转移
        openFastMove: false,
        // 总条数
        total: 0,
        // 资产信息（主要）表格数据
        infoList: [],
        // 弹出层标题
        title: "",
        // 部门树选项
        deptOptions: undefined,
        // 是否显示弹出层
        open: false,
        // 快速处理选择框开关
        dealOpen:false,
        // 报废
        openFastDelete:false,
        // 查询参数
        queryParams: {
          ids: [],
          pageNum: 1,
          pageSize: 10,
          assetsStatus: null,
          assetsCode: null,
          assetsClass: null,
          assetsClassName: null,
          model: null,
          unit: null,
          source: null,
          brand: null,
          procureTime: null,
          procureUserName: null,
          warranty: null,
          num: null,
          amount: null,
          useUserId:null,
          useDeptId: null,
          assetsName: null,
          useUserName: null
        },
        // 表单参数
        form: {},
        // 表单校验
        rules: {},
        // 上传配置信息
        upload: {
          // 是否显示弹出层（用户导入）
          open: false,
          // 弹出层标题（用户导入）
          title: "",
          // 是否禁用上传
          isUploading: false,
          // 是否更新已经存在的用户数据
          updateSupport: 0,
          memberType: 1,
          // 设置上传的请求头部
          headers: {
            Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken()
          },
          // 上传的地址
          url: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API + "/jufe/assets/importData",
       },
        // 上传配置信息
        uploadData: {
          // 是否显示弹出层（用户导入）
          open: false,
          // 弹出层标题（用户导入）
          title: "",
          // 是否禁用上传
          isUploading: false,
          // 是否更新已经存在的用户数据
          updateSupport: 0,
          memberType: 1,
          // 设置上传的请求头部
          headers: {
            Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken()
          },
          // 上传的地址
          url: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API + "/jufe/assets/importData",
       },
      //申请表单
      formUser:{
        detailInfo: [],
        applyDeptId: null,
        applyUserId: null,
        applyDesc: null,
        applyType: null
      },
      // 上传文件列表
      uploadFileList: [],
      };
    },
    created() {
      this.getClassTree();
      this.getTreeselect();
      this.getUserInfoOption();
      this.getList();
    },
    methods: {
       isMoney:isMoney,
      /** 查询资产信息（主要）列表 */
      getList() {
        this.loading = true;
        listInfo(this.queryParams).then(response => {
          this.infoList = response.rows;
          this.total = response.total;
          this.loading = false;
          this.infoList.forEach(row => {
            row.preViewList = []
            row.assetsPicList.forEach(element => {
              row.preViewList.push( element.url);
            });
          })
          // 回显选择的物资信息
          this.$nextTick(() => {
            this.selectedInfo.forEach(assets => {
              this.infoList.forEach(row => {
                if (row.assetsId === assets.assetsId) {
                  this.$refs.multipleTable.toggleRowSelection(row, true);
                }
              })
            })
          })
        });
      },
      getClassTree(){
        treeselectClass().then(response => {
          this.classOptions = response.data;
        });
      },
    // 删除照片
    handleRemove(item) {
      this.assetsPicList.splice(this.assetsPicList.indexOf(item), 1)
      this.preViewList = []
        this.assetsPicList.forEach(element => {
          this.preViewList.push(this.basePath +element.fileName);
        });
      this.form.assetsPicList = this.assetsPicList;
    },
    /** 树变更 */
    treeSelectChange(raw, instanceId) {
      if(  raw.parentId == 0) {
        this.$message.error('请选择二级分类');
        this.$refs.treeselect.clear()
      }
    },
    handleRemoveAll(item,index) {
      this.selectedInfo[index].picList.splice(this.selectedInfo[index].picList.indexOf(item), 1)
      this.preViewList = []
        this.assetsPicList.forEach(element => {
          this.preViewList.push(this.basePath +element.fileName);
        });
      this.form.assetsPicList = this.assetsPicList;
    },
    handleUploadError(err) {
      this.$message.error("上传失败, 请重试");
      this.assetsPicList = []
    },
    handleExceed() {
      this.$message.error(`最多可上传三张图片`);
    },
    handleMouseEvents(event) {
      this.selectOpen = true;
    },
    handleMouseLeave(){
      this.selectOpen = false;
    },
     generateQRCode() {
      this.qrCodeData = 'qweqwewqeqwe'; // 替换为你想要生成二维码的链接或文本
    },
    handleChange(val) {
    },
    /** 查询部门下拉树结构 */
    getTreeselect() {
      treeselect().then(response => {
        this.deptOptions = response.data;
        console.log(response.data);
      });
    },
    getUserInfoOption(){
      getUserList().then(response => {
        this.userInfoOption = response.data;
        this.userInfoOptionDept = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.userInfoOption));
      });
    },
      // 取消按钮
    cancel() {
      this.open = false;
      this.openFastUse = false;
      this.openFastReback = false;
      this.openFastDelete = false;
      this.openFastMove = false;
      this.reset();
    },
    userDeptChane(node){
      this.form.useUserId = null
      this.formUser.applyUserId = null;
      if (node.id == 100) {
        this.userInfoOptionDept = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.userInfoOption));
      } else {
        this.userInfoOptionDept = [];
        this.userInfoOption.forEach(item => {
          if (item.deptId != null && node.id == item.deptId ) {
            this.userInfoOptionDept.push(item);
          }
        })
      }
    },
    handleClose(){
      this.openFlowInfo = false;
      this.detailInfoList = [];
    },
    handleUploadSuccess(res, file, fileList) {
      if (res.code == 200) {
        //参考如下代码即可
        if (fileList.every(item => item.status == "success")) {
          //由于fileList是所有的文件包含之前已上传过的，这里需要做区分（带response的即为新上传的）
          fileList.map(item => {
            if (item.response != undefined) {
              console.log("assetsPicList"+item.response.data.url);
              this.assetsPicList.push({ fileName: item.response.fileName, originalFilename: item.response.originalFilename, url: item.response.data.url });
            }
          })
          if (this.assetsPicList != undefined) {
            this.preViewList = []
            this.assetsPicList.forEach(element => {
              console.log(element.url);
              this.preViewList.push( element.url);
            });
          }
          this.form.assetsPicList = this.assetsPicList
        }
      } else {
        fileList.filter(o => o.uid != file.uid)
        this.assetsPicList = fileList;
        if (this.assetsPicList != undefined) {
          this.preViewList = []
          this.assetsPicList.forEach(element => {
            this.preViewList.push( element.url);
          });
        }
         this.form.assetsPicList = this.assetsPicList
      }
    },
    userMoveChane(val){
      if (val == this.userIdInfo) {
        // this.formUser.transferUserId = null
        this.$modal.msgError("无法将资产转移给本人");
      }
    },
    handleUploadSuccessAll(index){
      return (res, file, fileList) => {
        if (res.code == 200) {
          //参考如下代码即可
          if (fileList.every(item => item.status == "success")) {
            //由于fileList是所有的文件包含之前已上传过的，这里需要做区分（带response的即为新上传的）
            fileList.map(item => {
              if (item.response != undefined) {
                this.selectedInfo[index].picList.push({ fileName: item.response.data.fileName, originalFilename: item.response.originalFilename, url: item.response.data.url });
              }
            })
           this.$set(this.formUser.selectedInfo[index],"picList",this.selectedInfo[index].picList);
          }
        } else {
          fileList.filter(o => o.uid != file.uid)
          this.selectedInfo[index].picList = fileList;
          if (this.selectedInfo[index].picList != undefined) {
          }
          this.$set(this.formUser.selectedInfo[index],"picList",this.selectedInfo[index].picList);
        }
      };
    },
      // 表单重置
      reset() {
        this.form = {
          assetsId: null,
          assetsStatus: "0",
          assetsCode: null,
          assetsClass: null,
          assetsClassName: null,
          model: null,
          unit: null,
          source: null,
          brand: null,
          procureTime: null,
          procureUserName: null,
          warranty: null,
          num: null,
          amount: null,
          createById: null,
          createBy: null,
          createTime: null,
          updateById: null,
          updateBy: null,
          updateTime: null,
          deptId: null,
          delFlag: 0,
          remark: null,
          assetsPicList:[],
          useUserId:null,
          assetsInfos:[],
          useDeptId:null
        };
        this.resetForm("form");
        // 申请表单
        this.formUser = {
          detailInfo: [],
          applyDeptId: null,
          applyUserId: null,
          applyDesc: null,
          applyType: null
        };
        this.resetForm("formUser");
      },
      /** 搜索按钮操作 */
      handleQuery() {
        this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
        this.getList();
      },
      /** 重置按钮操作 */
      resetQuery() {
        this.selectedInfo = [];
        this.ids = [];
        this.queryParams.ids = []
        this.resetForm("queryForm");
        this.handleQuery();
      },
      // 多选框选中数据
      handleSelectionChange(selection) {
        //首先判断当前页面数据是否再选中 selection
        // 1 是个数据
        this.infoList.forEach(item => {
          let flag = false;
          selection.forEach(selInfo => {
            if (item.assetsId == selInfo.assetsId) {
              flag = true;
            }
          })
          if (flag == true) {
            //添加
            this.addAssetsInfo(item);
          } else {
            //移除
            this.deleteAssetsInfo(item);
          }
        })
        this.ids = this.selectedInfo.map(item => item.assetsId)
      },
      // 选中资产事件
      handleSelectionAssets(selection){
        this.single = selection.length!==1
        this.multiple = !selection.length
      },
      onTableSelect(rows, row) {
        let selected = rows.length && rows.indexOf(row) !== -1
        if (selected == true) {
          this.addAssetsInfo(row)
        } else {
          this.deleteAssetsInfo(row);
        }
      },
      // 新增资产
      addAssetsInfo(row){
        //判断是否再之前的信息中，有则不进行添加
        let flagInfo = false;
        this.selectedInfo.forEach(item =>{
          if (item.assetsId == row.assetsId) {
            flagInfo = true;
          }
        })
        if (flagInfo == false) {
          this.selectedInfo.push(row);
          this.ids.push(row.assetsId);
        }
      },
      deleteAssetsInfo(row){
        this.selectedInfo=this.selectedInfo.filter(item=>item.assetsId != row.assetsId);
        this.ids=this.ids.filter(item=>item != row.assetsId);
      },
      /** 新增按钮操作 */
      handleAdd() {
        this.reset();
        this.open = true;
        this.title = "添加资产信息";
        this.assetsPicList = []
      },
      handleDealFast(){
        this.dealOpen = true;
      },
      /** 修改按钮操作 */
      handleUpdate(row) {
        this.reset();
        const assetsId = row.assetsId || this.ids
        getInfo(assetsId).then(response => {
          this.form = response.data;
          this.open = true;
          this.title = "修改资产信息";
          this.assetsPicList = this.form.assetsPicList
          this.preViewList = []
          this.assetsPicList.forEach(element => {
            this.preViewList.push( element.url);
          });
        });
      },
      handleFlowInfo(row){
        this.flowInfoList = [];
        this.openFlowInfo = true;
        const assetsId = row.assetsId || this.ids
        getFlowInfo(assetsId).then(response => {
          this.flowInfoList = response.data;
        });
      },
      /** 提交按钮 */
      submitForm() {
        this.$refs["form"].validate(valid => {
          if (valid) {
            if (this.form.assetsId != null) {
              updateInfo(this.form).then(response => {
                this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
                this.open = false;
                this.getList();
              });
            } else {
              addInfo(this.form).then(response => {
                this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
                this.open = false;
                this.getList();
              });
            }
          }
        });
      },
      /** 提交按钮 */
      submitFormUse() {
        this.$refs["formUser"].validate(valid => {
          if (valid) {
            let detailInfo = [];
            this.selectedInfo.forEach((el, index) => {
              let info = {
                assetsId : el.assetsId,
                assetsCode : el.assetsCode,
                assetsName : el.assetsName,
                sort : index,
                picList: el.picList
              }
              detailInfo.push(info);
            })
            if (detailInfo == null || detailInfo.length == 0) {
              this.$modal.msgError("请选择需要处理的数据");
              return;
            }
            this.formUser.detailInfo = detailInfo;
            this.formUser.fromType = '1';
            if (this.formUser.applyType == 4) {
              this.formUser.applyUserId = this.userIdInfo;
              this.formUser.applyUserName = this.userNameInfo;
              this.formUser.applyDeptId = this.deptIdInfo;
              this.formUser.applyDeptName = this.deptNameInfo;
            }
            addApplyInfo(this.formUser).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.selectedInfo = [];
              this.ids = [];
              this.openFastReback = false;
              this.openFastUse = false;
              this.openFastDelete = false;
              this.openFastMove = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          }
        });
      },
      /** 删除按钮操作 */
      handleDelete(row) {
        const assetsIds = row.assetsId || this.ids;
        const assetsCodes = row.assetsCode
        this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除资产资产编号为"' + assetsCodes + '"的数据项？').then(function() {
          return delInfo(assetsIds);
        }).then(() => {
          this.getList();
          this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
        }).catch(() => {});
      },
  /** 导出按钮操作 */
  handleExport() {
    this.queryParams.ids = this.ids
    this.download('jufe/assets/export', {
      ...this.queryParams
    }, `资产信息_${new Date().getTime()}.xls`)
  },
  /** 导出二维码 */
  handleExportQrCode(){
    this.queryParams.ids = this.ids
    this.download('jufe/assets/exportQrCode', {
      ...this.queryParams
    }, `二维码信息_${new Date().getTime()}.doc`)
  },
   handleImport() {
        this.uploadData.title = "导入";
        this.uploadData.open = true;
    },
    /** 下载模板操作 */
    importTemplate() {
      this.download('jufe/assets/importTemplate', {
      }, `资产导入模板.xlsx`)
    },
    /** 领用 */
    handleDealFastUse(){
      this.reset()
      let flagInfo = false;
      this.selectedInfo.forEach(row => {
        if (row.assetsStatus == 1) {
          flagInfo = true;
          return;
        }
      })
      if (flagInfo) {
        this.$modal.msgError("已选数据含有在用资产，请重新选择");
        return;
      }
      this.dealOpen = false;
      this.openFastUse = true;
      this.formUser.applyType = "1";
    },
    /** 退库 */
    handleDealFastReback(){
      this.reset()
      let flagInfo = false;
       let that = this;
      let flag = this.checkInfoUserNull();
      if (flag) {
        this.$modal.msgError("请选择在用资产进行退库");
        return;
      }
      flag = this.checkInfoUserRepeat();
      if (flag) {
        this.$modal.msgError("请选择同一用户进行操作");
        return;
      }
      this.selectedInfo.forEach(row => {
        that.$set(row,"picList",[]);
         if (row.assetsStatus == 0) {
            flagInfo = true;
            return;
         }
      })
      if (flagInfo) {
        this.$modal.msgError("已选数据含有闲置资产，请重新选择");
        return;
      }
      that.$set(this.formUser,"selectedInfo",this.selectedInfo);
      this.dealOpen = false;
      this.openFastReback = true;
      this.formUser.applyType = "2";
      this.getDealInfo()
      this.formUser.applyUserId = this.selectedInfo[0].useUserId;
      this.formUser.applyUserName = this.selectedInfo[0].userName;
      this.formUser.applyDeptId = this.selectedInfo[0].useDeptId;
      this.formUser.applyDeptName = this.selectedInfo[0].deptName;
    },
    /** deptNameInfo */
    getDealInfo() {
      this.deptNameInfo = this.selectedInfo[0].deptName;
      this.userNameInfo = this.selectedInfo[0].userName;
      this.deptIdInfo = this.selectedInfo[0].useDeptId;
      this.userIdInfo = this.selectedInfo[0].useUserId;
    },
    checkInfoUserNull () {
      let flag = false;
      this.selectedInfo.forEach(row => {
        if (row.useUserId == null || row.useUserId == "") {
          flag = true;
          return;
        }
      })
      return flag;
    },
    checkInfoUserRepeat () {
      let flag = false;
      let userId = null;
      this.selectedInfo.forEach((row,index) => {
        if (index == 0) {
          userId = row.useUserId;
        } else {
          if (row.useUserId != userId) {
            flag= true;
            return;
          }
        }
      })
      return flag;
    },
    getPicListInfo (index) {
      return this.selectedInfo[index].indexAll;
    },
    /** 报废 */
    handleDealFastDelete () {
      this.reset()
      let flagInfo = false;
      let that =  this;
      this.selectedInfo.forEach(row => {
        that.$set(row,"picList",[]);
        if (row.assetsStatus == 1) {
          flagInfo = true;
          return;
        }
      })
      if (flagInfo) {
        this.$modal.msgError("已选数据含有在用资产，请重新选择");
        return;
      }
      that.$set(this.formUser,"selectedInfo",this.selectedInfo);
      this.dealOpen = false;
      this.openFastDelete = true;
      this.formUser.applyType = "3";
    },
    /** 获取prop */
    getProp(index){
      return "selectedInfo["+index+"].picList";
    },
    /** 转移 */
    handleDealFastMove(){
      this.reset()
      let flagInfo = false;
      this.selectedInfo.forEach(row => {
        if (row.assetsStatus == 0) {
          flagInfo = true;
          return;
        }
      })
      if (flagInfo) {
        this.$modal.msgError("已选数据含有闲置资产，请重新选择");
      }
      let flag = this.checkInfoUserNull();
      if (flag) {
        this.$modal.msgError("请选择在用资产进行操作");
        return;
      }
      flag = this.checkInfoUserRepeat();
      if (flag) {
        this.$modal.msgError("请选择同一用户进行操作");
        return;
      }
      this.dealOpen = false;
      this.openFastMove = true;
      this.formUser.applyType = "4";
      this.formUser.applyUserId = this.userIdInfo;
      this.getDealInfo()
    },
    submitFileForm(){
      this.$refs.uploadData.submit();
    },
    handleFileSuccess(response, file, fileList) {
      this.uploadData.open = false;
      this.uploadData.isUploading = false;
      this.$refs.uploadData.clearFiles();
      this.$alert(response.msg, "导入结果", {
        dangerouslyUseHTMLString: true,
        customClass: 'message_box_alert'
      });
      this.getList();
    },
    handleFileUploadProgress(event, file, fileList){
      this.uploadData.isUploading = true;
    },
  }
};
</script>
<style scoped>
.flex {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: center;
}
.el-img {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 9999;
}
.img-box {
  position: relative;
  margin-right: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
</style>
<template>
  <div class="dashboard-editor-container">
    <p style = "    font-weight: bold;">审核状态统计</p>
    <panel-group-assets @handleSetLineChartData="handleSetLineChartData" :dataCount ="applyStatusCount" />
    <el-row :gutter="32">
      <el-col :xs="24" :sm="24" :lg="12">
        <p style = "    font-weight: bold;">资产使用统计</p>
        <div class="chart-wrapper" style="margin-top:16px; !important">
          <pie-chart :assetsArray = "assetsArray" />
        </div>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :xs="24" :sm="24" :lg="12">
        <p style = "    font-weight: bold;">资产类型统计</p>
        <el-table  v-loading="loading" :data="classCountList"  style="height:400px;overflow-y: auto; !important" ref="multipleTable"  >
            <el-table-column label="序号" type="index" width="50" align="center"/>
            <el-table-column label="资产类型" align="center" prop="className"/>
            <el-table-column label="资产总量" align="center" prop="allCount">
              <template slot-scope="scope">
                {{scope.row.unuseCount + scope.row.useCount}}
              </template>
            </el-table-column>
            <el-table-column label="库存数量(余量)" align="center" prop="unuseCount"/>
            <el-table-column label="在用数量" align="center" prop="useCount"/>
            <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width">
              <template slot-scope="scope">
                <el-button
                    size="mini"
                    type="text"
                    icon="el-icon-search"
                    @click="handleClassDetailInfo(scope.row)"
                >详细
                </el-button>
              </template>
          </el-table-column>
        </el-table>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <el-dialog :title="detialTitle" :visible.sync="openDetailInfo" width="600px" append-to-body @close="handleClose" >
      <el-table  v-loading="loading" :data="classCountTwoList" max-height="500" ref="multipleTable"  >
        <el-table-column label="序号" type="index" width="50" align="center"/>
        <el-table-column label="资产名称" align="center" prop="className"/>
        <el-table-column label="资产总量" align="center" prop="allCount">
          <template slot-scope="scope">
            {{scope.row.unuseCount + scope.row.useCount}}
          </template>
        </el-table-column>
        <el-table-column label="库存数量(余量)" align="center" prop="unuseCount"/>
        <el-table-column label="在用数量" align="center" prop="useCount"/>
      </el-table>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import PanelGroupAssets from '../.././dashboard/PanelGroupAssets'
import PieChart from './PieChart.vue'
import {applyStatusCountInfo, assetsStatusCountInfo, assetsClassCountInfo} from "@/api/assets/count";
export default {
  name: 'Index',
  components: {
    PanelGroupAssets,
    PieChart,
  },
  created() {
    this.getCountInfo();
  },
  data() {
    return {
      /** 统计日期范围 null 全部，1 当天，2 当月 */
      dateType: null ,
      /**  分类id null 查询当前所有一级分类的数量  */
      classId: null,
      /** 一级分类统计信息 */
      classOneList : [],
      /** 二级分类统计信息 */
      classTwoList : [] ,
      /** 申请状态统计信息 */
      applyStatusCount: [],
      classCountList:[],
      classCountTwoList:[],
      assetsArray:[],
      loading: true,
      openDetailInfo:false,
      detialTitle:null,
    }
  },
  methods: {
    handleClose(){
      this.openDetailInfo = false;
      this.classCountTwoList = [];
    },
    handleSetLineChartData(type) {
      this.getApplyStatusCountInfo(type);
    },
    /** 初始化页面获取统计信息 */
    getCountInfo () {
      /** 获取申请单状态数量统计 */
      this.getApplyStatusCountInfo();
      /** 获取资产状态数量统计 */
      this.getAssetsStatusCountInfo();
      /** 获取资产类型统计信息 */
      this.getAssetsClassCountInfo();
    },
    /** 获取申请单状态数量统计 */
    getApplyStatusCountInfo(dateType) {
      if (dateType == undefined) {
         dateType =  null;
      }
      applyStatusCountInfo(dateType).then(response => {
        if (response.code == 200) {
          this.applyStatusCount = response.data;
        }
      });
    },
     /** 获取资产状态数量统计 */
    getAssetsStatusCountInfo () {
      assetsStatusCountInfo().then(response => {
         this.assetsArray = response.data;
      });
    },
    /** 获取申请单状态数量统计 */
    getAssetsClassCountInfo(classId){
      if (classId == undefined) {
        classId = 0;
      }
      assetsClassCountInfo(classId).then(response => {
        if (classId == 0) {
          this.classCountList = response.data
        } else {
          this.classCountTwoList = response.data;
          this.openDetailInfo = true;
        }
         this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    handleClassDetailInfo(row){
      this.detialTitle = row.className
      this.getAssetsClassCountInfo(row.classId);
    }
  }
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
.dashboard-editor-container {
  padding: 32px;
  background-color: rgb(240, 242, 245);
  position: relative;
  .chart-wrapper {
    background: #fff;
    padding: 16px 16px 0;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }
}
@media (max-width:1024px) {
  .chart-wrapper {
    padding: 8px;
  }
}
</style>
<template>
  <div :class="className" :style="{height:height,width:width}" />
</template>
<script>
import * as echarts from 'echarts'
require('echarts/theme/macarons') // echarts theme
import resize from '../../dashboard/mixins/resize'
export default {
  mixins: [resize],
  props: {
    className: {
      type: String,
      default: 'chart'
    },
    width: {
      type: String,
      default: '100%'
    },
    height: {
      type: String,
      default: '383px'
    },
    assetsArray: {
      type: Array,
      required: true
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      chart: null,
      status: [],
      finalData:[],
    }
  },
  mounted() { 
  let timer = setInterval(() => { 
    if (this.assetsArray != undefined) {
        this.finalData = [];
        this.assetsArray.forEach((item)=>{
          let title = "在用";
          if (item.assetsStatus == '0') {
              title = "闲置"
          }
          let info = {"name":title ,"value":item.countInfo}
          this.finalData.push(info)
        })
        this.initChart();
        clearInterval(timer);
      }
    }, 1000); 
  },
  created(){
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    if (!this.chart) {
      return
    }
    this.chart.dispose()
    this.chart = null
  },
  methods: {
    initChart() {
      this.chart = echarts.init(this.$el, 'macarons') 
      this.chart.setOption({ 
        title : {
            text: '资产使用统计'
        },
        tooltip: {
          trigger: 'item',
          formatter: '{a} <br/>{b} : {c} ({d}%)'
        },
        legend: {
          left: 'center',
          bottom: '5',
          data: ['在用', '闲置']
        },
        series: [
          {
            name: '资产状态统计',
            type: 'pie',
            // roseType: 'radius',
            radius: [0, 100],
            center: ['50%', '50%'],
            data: this.finalData,
            animationEasing: 'cubicInOut',
            animationDuration: 2600
          }
        ]
      })
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
    <div class="app-container">
        <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch"
            label-width="100px">
            <el-form-item label="资产分类" prop="classId">
                <treeselect ref="treeselect" v-model="queryParams.classId" :options="classOptions" style="width: 200px"
                    clearable @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" placeholder="请选择资产分类" />
            </el-form-item>
            <el-form-item label="预警时间" prop="warnTimeQuery">
                <el-date-picker v-model="queryParams.warnTimeQuery" type="date" value-format="yyyy-MM-dd"
                    placeholder="选择日期" />
            </el-form-item>
            <el-form-item label="预警接收人" prop="receiveUser">
                <el-input v-model="queryParams.receiveUser" placeholder="请输入预警接收人" clearable
                    @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" />
            </el-form-item>
            <el-form-item>
                <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
                <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
            </el-form-item>
        </el-form>
        <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="infoList" ref="multipleTable">
            <el-table-column label="序号" type="index" width="50" align="center" />
            <el-table-column label="资产分类" align="center" prop="className" />
            <el-table-column label="预警时间" align="center" prop="warnTime" />
            <el-table-column label="库存预警数" align="center" prop="stockWarnNum">
                <template slot-scope="scope">
                    {{ scope.row.stockWarnNum == null ? "" : "小于" + scope.row.stockWarnNum }}
                </template>
            </el-table-column>
            <el-table-column label="库存" align="center" prop="stockNum" />
            <el-table-column label="预警接收人" align="center" prop="receiveUser" />
        </el-table>
        <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
            :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize" @pagination="getList" />
    </div>
</template>
<script>
import { treeselectClass } from "@/api/assets/info";
import { stockWarnList } from "@/api/assets/warn";
import Treeselect from "@riophae/vue-treeselect";
import "@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css";
export default {
  components: { Treeselect },
  name: "Info",
  data() {
    return {
      // 分类选项
      classOptions: undefined,
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 资产信息（主要）表格数据
      infoList: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        classId: null,
        warnTimeQuery: null,
        receiveUser: null,
      },
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getClassTree();
    this.getList();
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询资产信息（主要）列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      stockWarnList(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.infoList = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    getClassTree() {
      treeselectClass().then((response) => {
        this.classOptions = response.data;
      });
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
  },
};
</script>
<style>
.flex {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: row;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    justify-content: center;
}
.el-img {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 9999;
}
.img-box {
    position: relative;
    margin-right: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}
</style>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch">
      <el-form-item label="分类名称" prop="className">
        <el-input v-model="queryParams.className" placeholder="请输入分类名称" clearable @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item>
        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button type="info" plain icon="el-icon-sort" size="mini" @click="toggleExpandAll">展开/折叠</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <right-toolbar :showSearch.sync="showSearch" @queryTable="getList"></right-toolbar>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-if="refreshTable" v-loading="loading" :data="regionList" row-key="classId"
      :default-expand-all="isExpandAll" :tree-props="{ children: 'children', hasChildren: 'hasChildren' }">
      <el-table-column label="序号" type="index" width="50" align="center" />
      <el-table-column prop="className" label="分类名称" align="center" :show-overflow-tooltip="true"></el-table-column>
      <el-table-column prop="stockWarnNum" label="库存预警数量" align="center">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          {{ scope.row.stockWarnNum == null ? '' : '小于' + scope.row.stockWarnNum }}
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column prop="expireWarnDays" label="库存预警天数" align="center">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          {{ scope.row.expireWarnDays == null ? '' : '到期前' + scope.row.expireWarnDays + '天' }}
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" fixed="right" width="200">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button v-if="scope.row.parentId != 0" size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit"
            @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)" v-hasPermi="['assets:warn:edit']">编辑</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <!-- 添加或修改分类对话框 -->
    <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="open" width="680px" append-to-body>
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" label-width="100px">
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item label="分类名称" prop="className">
              <el-input v-model="form.className" disabled placeholder="请输入分类名称" />
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item label="库存预警数量" prop="stockWarnNum">
              <el-input v-model="form.stockWarnNum" placeholder="请输入库存预警数量" maxlength="10" clearable
                @input="onIntInput('stockWarnNum', $event)" >
                <template slot="prepend">小于</template>
              </el-input>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item label="库存预警天数" prop="expireWarnDays">
              <el-input v-model="form.expireWarnDays" placeholder="请输入库存预警天数" maxlength="10" clearable
                @input="onIntInput('expireWarnDays', $event)" >
                <template slot="prepend">到期前</template>
                <template slot="append">天</template>
              </el-input>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { listRegion, getRegion, warnEdit } from "@/api/assets/class";
import Treeselect from "@riophae/vue-treeselect";
import "@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css";
import IconSelect from "@/components/IconSelect";
import { getToken } from "@/utils/auth";
export default {
  name: "Class",
  components: { Treeselect, IconSelect },
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 分类表格树数据
      regionList: [],
      // 分类树选项
      regionOptions: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      // 是否展开，默认全部折叠
      isExpandAll: false,
      // 重新渲染表格状态
      refreshTable: true,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        className: undefined,
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {},
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
    console.log("Bearer " + getToken())
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询分类列表 */
    getList(){
      this.loading = true;
      listRegion(this.queryParams).then(response => {
        this.regionList = this.handleTree(response.rows, "classId");
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    /** 查询分类下拉树结构 */
    getTreeselect(){
      listRegion().then(response => {
        this.regionOptions = [];
        const region = { classId: 0, className: '主类目', children: [] };
        region.children = this.handleTree(response.rows, "classId");
        this.regionOptions.push(region);
      });
    },
    /** 取消按钮 */
    cancel(){
      this.open = false;
      this.reset();
    },
    /** 表单重置 */
    reset(){
      this.form = {
        classId: undefined,
        className: undefined,
        stockWarnNum: undefined,
        expireWarnDays: undefined
      };
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery(){
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery(){
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    /** 展开/折叠操作 */
    toggleExpandAll(){
      this.refreshTable = false;
      this.isExpandAll = !this.isExpandAll;
      this.$nextTick(() => {
        this.refreshTable = true;
      });
    },
    /** 修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row){
      this.reset();
      this.getTreeselect();
      getRegion(row.classId).then(response => {
        this.form = response.data;
        this.open = true;
        this.title = "告警设置";
      });
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm: function(){
      this.$refs["form"].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          var data = {
            classId: this.form.classId,
            stockWarnNum: this.form.stockWarnNum,
            expireWarnDays: this.form.expireWarnDays
          }
          warnEdit(data).then(response => {
            this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
            this.open = false;
            this.getList();
          });
        }
      });
    },
    onIntInput(field, value) {
      const s = this.sanitizePositiveInt(value);
      this.$set(this.form, field, s);
    },
    sanitizePositiveInt(value) {
      if (value === undefined || value === null) return '';
      let str = String(value).replace(/\D/g, '');
      str = str.replace(/^0+/, '');
      return str;
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch" label-width="110px">
      <el-form-item label="中心服务器编号" prop="centerCode">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.centerCode"
          placeholder="请输入中心服务器编号"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="中心服务器名称" prop="centerName">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.centerName"
          placeholder="请输入中心服务器名称"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="中心服务器类型" prop="centerType" :formatter="centerTypeFormat">
        <el-select v-model="queryParams.centerType" placeholder="请选择设备状态" clearable size="small">
          <el-option
            v-for="dict in centerTypeOptions"
            :key="dict.dictValue"
            :label="dict.dictLabel"
            :value="dict.dictValue"
          ></el-option>
        </el-select>
