      <el-form-item label="中心服务IP" prop="centerIp">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.centerIp"
          placeholder="请输入中心服务IP"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="中心服务MAC" prop="centerMac">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.centerMac"
          placeholder="请输入中心服务MAC"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item>
        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleAdd"
          v-hasPermi="['center:add']"
        >新增</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="success"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-edit"
          size="mini"
          :disabled="single"
          @click="handleUpdate"
          v-hasPermi="['center:edit']"
        >修改</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="danger"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-delete"
          size="mini"
          :disabled="multiple"
          @click="handleDelete"
          v-hasPermi="['center:remove']"
        >删除</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="warning"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-download"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleExport"
          v-hasPermi="['center:export']"
        >全部导出</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <right-toolbar :showSearch.sync="showSearch" @queryTable="getList"></right-toolbar>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="centerList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
      <el-table-column label="中心服务器编号" align="center" prop="centerCode" />
      <el-table-column label="中心服务器名称" align="center" prop="centerName" />
      <el-table-column label="中心服务IP" align="center" prop="centerIp" />
      <el-table-column label="中心服务MAC" align="center" prop="centerMac" />
      <el-table-column label="中心服务器类型" align="center" prop="centerType" :formatter="centerTypeFormat">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <span v-if="scope.row.centerType == 1" >监控</span>
          <!--          <span v-else-if="scope.row.centerType == 2" >离线</span>-->
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            @click="handleView(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['center:query']"
          >查看
          </el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['center:edit']"
          >修改</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-delete"
            @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['center:remove']"
          >删除</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination
      v-show="total>0"
      :total="total"
      :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
      :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
      @pagination="getList"
    />
    <!-- 添加或修改中心服务信息对话框 -->
    <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="open" width="500px" append-to-body>
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="130px">
        <el-form-item label="中心服务器编号" prop="centerCode">
          <el-input v-model="form.centerCode" placeholder="请输入中心服务器编号" maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="中心服务器名称" prop="centerName">
          <el-input v-model="form.centerName" placeholder="请输入中心服务器名称" maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="中心服务器IP" prop="centerIp">
          <el-input v-model="form.centerIp" placeholder="请输入中心服务IP" maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="中心服务器MAC" prop="centerMac">
          <el-input v-model="form.centerMac" placeholder="请输入中心服务MAC" maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="中心服务器类型" prop="centerType">
          <el-select v-model="form.centerType" placeholder="请选择设备状态" clearable size="small" style="width:330px;height:36px">
            <el-option
              v-for="dict in centerTypeOptions"
              :key="dict.dictValue"
              :label="dict.dictLabel"
              :value="dict.dictValue"
            ></el-option>
          </el-select>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="备注" prop="remark">
          <el-input type="textarea"
                    rows="3"
                    resize="none"
                    maxlength="100"
                    show-word-limit
                    v-model="form.remark"
                    placeholder="请输入备注"/>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
      <!-- 查看  -->
    <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="viewPage" width="500px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="130px">
        <el-form-item label="中心服务器编号" prop="centerCode">
          <el-input v-model="form.centerCode" placeholder="请输入中心服务器编号" :disabled="true"/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="中心服务器名称" prop="centerName">
          <el-input v-model="form.centerName" placeholder="请输入中心服务器名称" :disabled="true"/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="中心服务IP" prop="centerIp">
          <el-input v-model="form.centerIp" placeholder="请输入中心服务器IP" :disabled="true"/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="中心服务MAC" prop="centerMac">
          <el-input v-model="form.centerMac" placeholder="请输入中心服务器MAC" :disabled="true"/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="中心服务器类型" prop="centerType">
          <el-select v-model="form.centerType" placeholder="请选择设备状态" clearable size="small" style="width:330px" :disabled="true">
            <el-option
              v-for="dict in centerTypeOptions"
              :key="dict.dictValue"
              :label="dict.dictLabel"
              :value="dict.dictValue"
            ></el-option>
          </el-select>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="备注" prop="remark">
          <el-input type="textarea"
                    rows="3"
                    resize="none"
                    maxlength="100"
                    show-word-limit
                    v-model="form.remark"
                    placeholder="请输入备注"
                    :disabled="true"/>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button @click="cancelView">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { listCenter, getCenter, delCenter, addCenter, updateCenter } from "@/api/devServiceCenter/center";
export default {
  name: "Center",
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      // 非单个禁用
      single: true,
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 查看弹出层
      viewPage: false,
      // 中心服务信息表格数据
      centerList: [],
      //服务器状态字典
      centerTypeOptions: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        centerCode: null,
        centerName: null,
        centerIp: null,
        centerMac: null,
        centerType: null,
        createById: null,
        updateById: null,
        deptId: null
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {},
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
        centerCode: [
          { required: true, message: '中心服务器编号不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }
        ],
        centerName: [
          { required: true, message: '中心服务器名称不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }
        ],
        centerIp: [
          { required: true, message: '中心服务器IP不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }
        ],
        centerMac: [
          { required: true, message: '中心服务器MAC不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }
        ],
        centerType: [
          { required: true, message: '中心服务器类型不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }
        ]
      }
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
    this.getDicts('center_type').then(response => {
      this.centerTypeOptions = response.data
    })
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询中心服务信息列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listCenter(this.queryParams).then(response => {
        this.centerList = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    centerTypeFormat(row, column) {
      return this.selectDictLabel(this.centerTypeOptions, row.centerType)
    },
    // 取消按钮
    cancel() {
      this.open = false;
      this.reset();
    },
    //取消查看按钮
    cancelView() {
      this.viewPage = false
      this.reset()
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.form = {
        centerId: null,
        centerCode: null,
        centerName: null,
        centerIp: null,
        centerMac: null,
        centerType: null,
        createById: null,
        createBy: null,
        createTime: null,
        updateById: null,
        updateBy: null,
        updateTime: null,
        remark: null,
        delFlag: null,
        deptId: null
      };
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.centerId)
      this.single = selection.length!==1
      this.multiple = !selection.length
    },
    /** 查看按钮操作 */
    handleView(row) {
      this.reset()
      const centerId = row.centerId || this.ids
      getCenter(centerId).then(response => {
        this.form = response.data
        this.viewPage = true
        this.title = '查看'
      })
    },
    /** 新增按钮操作 */
    handleAdd() {
      this.reset();
      this.open = true;
      this.title = "添加中心服务信息";
    },
    /** 修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset();
      const centerId = row.centerId || this.ids
      getCenter(centerId).then(response => {
        this.form = response.data;
        this.open = true;
        this.title = "修改中心服务信息";
      });
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs["form"].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          if (this.form.centerId != null) {
            updateCenter(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          } else {
            addCenter(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          }
        }
      });
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const centerNames = row.centerName || this.ids;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除中心服务器名称为"' + centerNames + '"的数据项？').then(function() {
        return delCenter(centerNames);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.download('jufe/center/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `center_${new Date().getTime()}.xlsx`)
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <div>
    <div ref="barlist" :class="className" :style="{height:height,width:width}" />
    <lock v-if="lockVisible" :visible.sync="lockVisible" :query-params="queryParams" :title="'门锁电量统计'" @close="close" />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import * as echarts from 'echarts'
import resize from './mixins/resize'
import { getLockBar } from '@/api/index'
import Lock from '@/views/charts/locks.vue'
const animationDuration = 2000
export default {
  components: { Lock },
  mixins: [resize],
  props: {
    className: {
      type: String,
      default: 'chart'
    },
    width: {
      type: String,
      default: '100%'
    },
    height: {
      type: String,
      default: '100%'
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      chart: null,
      xDatas: [],
      yDatas: [],
      lockVisible: false,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        from: 1,
        params: {
          start: null,
          end: null
        }
      }
    }
  },
  mounted() {
    getLockBar().then(res => {
      this.xDatas = res.data.xDatas
      this.yDatas = res.data.yDatas
      this.initChart()
    })
    const that = this
    setInterval(function() {
      getLockBar().then(res => {
        that.xDatas = res.data.xDatas
        that.yDatas = res.data.yDatas
        that.setOptions()
      })
    }, 60000)
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    if (!this.chart) {
      return
    }
    this.chart.dispose()
    this.chart = null
  },
  methods: {
    initChart() {
      this.chart = echarts.init(this.$refs.barlist)
      this.setOptions()
    },
    setOptions() {
      const that = this
      this.chart.setOption({
        tooltip: {
          trigger: 'axis',
          axisPointer: { // 坐标轴指示器，坐标轴触发有效
            type: 'shadow' // 默认为直线，可选为：'line' | 'shadow'
          }
        },
        grid: {
          top: 20,
          left: '8%',
          right: '8%',
          bottom: 20,
          containLabel: true
        },
        xAxis: {
          data: this.xDatas,
          type: 'category',
          // name: '电量',
          nameTextStyle: {
            fontSize: 11,
            color: '#ccc'
          },
          axisLabel: {
            interval: 0,
            color: '#ccc' // 修改标签颜色为 #fff
          },
          axisLine: {
            show: false
          },
          axisTick: {
            show: false
          }
        },
        yAxis: [{
          type: 'value',
          splitNumber: 2,
          axisTick: {
            show: false
          },
          axisLabel: {
            color: '#ccc',
            margin: -10
          },
          splitLine: {
            show: false
          }
        }],
        series: [
          {
            type: 'bar',
            itemStyle: {
              color: function(params) {
                const gradientColors = [
                  ['#FE0101', '#FF5757'],
                  ['#FE431B', '#FE9A1A'],
                  ['#FC9601', '#FED601'],
                  ['#0585DE', '#66DFE3'],
                  ['#0336FF', '#01B4FF']
                ]
                return {
                  type: 'linear',
                  x: 0,
                  y: 0,
                  x2: 0,
                  y2: 1,
                  colorStops: [
                    { offset: 0, color: gradientColors[params.dataIndex][0] },
                    { offset: 1, color: gradientColors[params.dataIndex][1] }
                  ]
                }
              }
            },
            barWidth: '30%',
            data: this.yDatas,
            animationDuration,
            label: {
              show: true,
              position: 'top',
              color: '#14B6F3',
              fontSize: 12
            }
          }
        ]
      })
      // 处理点击事件并且跳转到相应的百度搜索页面
      this.chart.on('click', function(params) {
        if (params.dataIndex === 0) {
          that.queryParams.params.start = 0
          that.queryParams.params.end = 20
        } else if (params.dataIndex === 1) {
          that.queryParams.params.start = 20
          that.queryParams.params.end = 40
        } else if (params.dataIndex === 2) {
          that.queryParams.params.start = 40
          that.queryParams.params.end = 60
        } else if (params.dataIndex === 3) {
          that.queryParams.params.start = 60
          that.queryParams.params.end = 80
        } else if (params.dataIndex === 4) {
          that.queryParams.params.start = 80
          that.queryParams.params.end = 100
        }
        that.showLocks()
      })
    },
    showLocks() {
      this.lockVisible = true
      this.$emit('right-heigh', this.lockVisible)
    },
    close() {
      this.$emit('right-low', this.lockVisible)
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div :style="{height:height,width:width}">
    <div ref="gatetree" :class="className" :style="{height:height,width:width}" />
    <group v-if="groupVisible" :visible.sync="groupVisible" :query-params="groupQueryParams" @close="close" />
    <lock v-if="lockVisible" :visible.sync="lockVisible" :query-params="lockQueryParams" :title="'门锁离线统计'"/>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import * as echarts from 'echarts';
require('echarts/theme/macarons') // echarts theme
import resize from './mixins/resize'
import gateway from '@/assets/images/indexchart/gateway.png'
import group from '@/assets/images/indexchart/group.png'
import offgroup from '@/assets/images/indexchart/offgroup.png'
import offlock from '@/assets/images/indexchart/offlock.png'
import ongroup from '@/assets/images/indexchart/ongroup.png'
import onlock from '@/assets/images/indexchart/onlock.png'
import platform from '@/assets/images/indexchart/platfrom.png'
import { getGateTreeData, listGroup,listLock } from '@/api/index'
import Group from '@/views/charts/groups.vue'
import Lock from '@/views/charts/locks.vue'
const animationDuration = 6000
export default {
  components: { Lock, Group },
  mixins: [resize],
  props: {
    className: {
      type: String,
      default: 'chart'
    },
    width: {
      type: String,
      default: '100%'
    },
    height: {
      type: String,
      default: '100%'
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      chart: null,
      chartData : [],
      groupVisible:false,
      lockVisible:false,
      // 查询参数
      groupQueryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        buildPosId:null,
        onlineStatus:'0'
      },
      // 查询参数
      lockQueryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        from:2,
        locationId:null,
        onlineStatus:'0'
      },
    }
  },
  mounted() {
    getGateTreeData().then(res=>{
      this.chartData = res.data
      this.initChart()
    })
    const that = this
    setInterval(function(){
      getGateTreeData().then(res=>{
        that.chartData = res.data
        that.setOptions()
      })
    }, 60000);
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    if (!this.chart) {
      return
    }
    this.chart.dispose()
    this.chart = null
  },
  methods: {
    initChart() {
      this.chart = echarts.init(this.$refs.gatetree, 'macarons')
      this.setOptions()
    },
    setOptions() {
      this.chart.setOption({
        tooltip: {
          trigger: 'item',
          triggerOn: 'mousemove'
        },
        series: [
          {
            type: 'tree',
            data: this.chartData,
            lineStyle: {
              color: '#1720EC', // 设置树枝线的颜色
            },
            left: '2%',
            right: '2%',
            top: '15%',
            bottom: '15%',
            initialTreeDepth: 10,
            symbol: function(value,params){
              let pic ;
              if(params.data.type===1){
                pic = platform
              }else if(params.data.type===2){
                pic = gateway
              }else if(params.data.type===3){
                pic = group
              }else if(params.data.type===4){
                pic = ongroup
              }else if(params.data.type===5){
                pic = offgroup
              }else if(params.data.type===6){
                pic = onlock
              }else if(params.data.type===7){
                pic = offlock
              }
              return 'image://'+pic
            },
            symbolSize:function(value,params){
              if(params.data.type===1){
                return [100,50]
              }else if(params.data.type===2){
                return [80,40]
              }else if(params.data.type===3){
                return [30,40]
              }else if(params.data.type===4){
                return [20,25]
              }else if(params.data.type===5){
                return [20,25]
              }else if(params.data.type===6){
                return [20,25]
              }else if(params.data.type===7){
                return [20,25]
              }
            },
            orient: 'vertical', //vertical    horizontal
            edgeShape:"polyline", //curve 曲线 和 polyline直线
            expandAndCollapse: true,
            label: {
              position: 'bottom',
              distance: 15,
              rotate: 0,
              verticalAlign: 'middle',
              align: 'center',
              fontSize: 11,
              fontWeight: 400,
              color: '#00F1FF',
              rich: {
                a: {
                  borderColor: '#11F4FF',
                  borderWidth: 0.5,
                  padding: 5,
                  borderRadius: 3,
                },
              },
              formatter: function(params) {
                if (params.data.type===1 || params.data.type===2 || params.data.type===3) {
                  return `{a|${params.data.name + (params.data.value != null ? ":" + params.data.value : "")}}`;
                }else{
                  return params.data.name+(params.data.value!=null?":"+params.data.value:"")
                }
              }
            },
            leaves: {
              label: {
                position: 'bottom',
                rotate: 0,
                verticalAlign: 'middle',
                align: 'center',
                fontSize: 11,
                fontWeight: 400,
                rich: {
                  c: {
                    color: '#ccc',
                  },
                  d: {
                    color: 'red',
                  },
                },
                formatter: function(params) {
                  if (params.data.type >= 5) {
                    if((params.data.type===5&&params.data.value>0)||(params.data.type===7&&params.data.value>0)){
                      return `{d|${params.data.name + (params.data.value != null ? ":" + params.data.value : "")}}`;
                    }else{
                      return `{c|${params.data.name + (params.data.value != null ? ":" + params.data.value : "")}}`;
                    }
                  }
                }
              }
            },
            animationDurationUpdate: 750
          }
        ]
      })
      const that = this
      // 处理点击事件并且跳转到相应的百度搜索页面
      this.chart.on('click', function(params) {
        // 判断点击的节点是否是叶子节点
        if (!params.data.children || params.data.children.length === 0) {
          // 在这里执行点击叶子节点时的操作
          if(params.data.type===5){
            that.groupQueryParams.buildPosId = params.data.locationId
            that.groupQueryParams.upId = params.data.gatewayId
            that.showGroups()
          }else if(params.data.type===7){
            that.lockQueryParams.locationId = params.data.locationId
            that.showLocks()
          }
        }
      });
    },
    showGroups(){
      this.groupVisible = true
      this.$emit('center-heigh', this.groupVisible);
    },
    showLocks(){
      this.lockVisible = true
      this.$emit('center-heigh', this.lockVisible);
    },
    close() {
      this.$emit('center-low', this.groupVisible);
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div v-if="visible" class="dialog-bg">
    <div class="dialog">
      <div class="dialog-close" @click="handleClose">
        <img src="@/assets/images/index/closeDialog.png">
      </div>
      <div class="dialog-title">分组离线统计</div>
      <div v-if="groups.length != 0" ref="myElement" class="table" :style="{ 'line-height': computedLineHeight }">
        <table>
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th>序号</th>
              <th>网关</th>
              <th>分组名称</th>
              <th>分组MAC</th>
              <th>分组IP</th>
              <th>在线状态</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            <tr v-for="(group, index) in groups" :key="group.id" :class="{ odd: index % 2 === 0 }">
              <td>{{ index + 1 }}</td>
              <td>{{ group.upName }}</td>
              <td>{{ group.deviceName }}</td>
              <td>{{ group.deviceMac }}</td>
              <td>{{ group.deviceIp }}</td>
              <td>
                <div v-if="group.onlineStatus == '1'" class="tag-open">在线</div>
                <div v-if="group.onlineStatus == '0'" class="tag-open">离线</div>
                <div v-else class="tag-close" />
              </td>
            </tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
      <img v-else class="empty" src="@/assets/images/index/kong.png">
      <pagination
        v-show="total > 0"
        :total="total"
        :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
        :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
        :layout="'total, prev, pager, next, jumper'"
        @pagination="getList"
      />
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { listGroup } from '@/api/index'
export default {
  name: 'Group',
  props: {
    queryParams: {
      type: Object,
      default: {}
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      loading: false,
      total: 0,
      groups: [],
      tableHeight: null
    }
  },
  computed: {
    computedLineHeight() {
      const lineHeight = Math.floor((this.tableHeight - 44) / 10 - 20)
      return lineHeight + 'px' // 返回带有单位的字符串
    }
  },
  watch: {
    'locks.length'(newLength) {
      if (newLength > 0) {
        this.calculateTableHeight()
      }
    },
    tableHeight(newHeight) {
      return newHeight
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  mounted() {
    this.calculateTableHeight()
    window.addEventListener('resize', this.calculateTableHeight)
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    window.removeEventListener('resize', this.calculateTableHeight)
  },
  methods: {
    getList() {
      this.loading = true
      listGroup(this.queryParams).then((e) => {
        this.total = e.total
        this.groups = e.rows
        this.loading = false
      })
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    calculateTableHeight() {
      this.$nextTick(() => {
        if (this.$refs.myElement) {
          const elementHeight = this.$refs.myElement.offsetHeight
          this.tableHeight = elementHeight
        }
      })
    }
  }
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
.dialog-bg {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  z-index: 9998;
  .dialog {
    position: absolute;
    top: 15%;
    bottom: 15%;
    left: 11%;
    right: 11%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    padding: 30px 130px;
    z-index: 9999;
    background: url("../../assets/images/index/dialog.png") no-repeat;
    background-size: 100% 100%;
  }
  .dialog-close {
    position: absolute;
    top: 10px;
    right: 10px;
    height: 32px;
    width: 32px;
    cursor: pointer;
    img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
    }
  }
  .dialog-title {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 28px;
    font-family: Source Han Sans CN;
    font-weight: bold;
    color: #02e1f2;
  }
}
// 表格
.table {
  margin-top: 30px;
  font-family: Source Han Sans CN;
  font-weight: 400;
  color: #FFFFFF;
  height: calc(100% - 127px);
  table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    th, td {
      text-align: center;
      padding: 10px;
    }
    thead th {
      line-height: 24px;
      font-size: 18px;
      font-weight: 500;
    }
    tbody tr {
      &.odd {
        background: rgba(33, 73, 166, 0.5);
      }
    }
  }
}
// 分页
::v-deep .pagination-container {
  background: none !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  .el-pagination__total {
    color: #FFFFFF;
  }
  .el-pagination__jump {
    color: #FFFFFF;
  }
}
.empty {
  width: 279px;
  height: 243px;
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
}
</style>
<template>
  <div v-if="visible" class="dialog-bg">
    <div class="dialog">
      <div class="dialog-close" @click="handleClose">
        <img src="@/assets/images/index/closeDialog.png">
      </div>
      <div class="dialog-title">{{ title }}</div>
      <div v-if="locks.length != 0" ref="myElement" class="table" :style="{ 'line-height': computedLineHeight }">
        <table>
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th>序号</th>
              <th>门锁名称</th>
              <th>教室编号</th>
              <th>所属教室</th>
              <th>在线状态</th>
              <th v-if="queryParams.from === 1">电池类型</th>
              <th v-if="queryParams.from === 1">当前电量</th>
              <th v-if="queryParams.from === 2">门锁状态</th>
              <th v-if="queryParams.from === 2">门状态</th>
              <th v-if="queryParams.from === 2">门锁类型</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            <tr v-for="(lock, index) in locks" :key="lock.id" :class="{ odd: index % 2 === 0 }">
              <td>{{ index + 1 }}</td>
              <td>{{ lock.deviceName }}</td>
              <td>{{ lock.roomId }}</td>
              <td>{{ lock.roomName }}</td>
              <td>{{ lock.params.onlineStatusName }}</td>
              <td v-if="queryParams.from === 1">{{ lock.params.eleTypeName }}</td>
              <td v-if="queryParams.from === 1">{{ lock.eleQuantity }}</td>
              <td v-if="queryParams.from === 2">{{ lock.params.openStatusName }}</td>
              <td v-if="queryParams.from === 2">{{ lock.params.doorStatusName }}</td>
              <td v-if="queryParams.from === 2">{{ lock.params.deviceTypeName }}</td>
            </tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
      <img v-else class="empty" src="@/assets/images/index/kong.png">
      <pagination
        v-show="total > 0"
        :total="total"
        :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
        :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
        :layout="'total, prev, pager, next, jumper'"
        @pagination="getList"
      />
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { listLock } from '@/api/index'
export default {
  name: 'Lock',
  props: {
    queryParams: {
      type: Object,
      default: {}
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    title: {
      type: String,
      default() {
        return ''
      }
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      loading: false,
      locks: [],
      total: 0,
      tableHeight: null
    }
  },
  computed: {
    computedLineHeight() {
      const lineHeight = Math.floor((this.tableHeight - 44) / 10 - 20)
      return lineHeight + 'px' // 返回带有单位的字符串
    }
  },
  watch: {
    'locks.length'(newLength) {
      if (newLength > 0) {
        this.calculateTableHeight()
      }
    },
    tableHeight(newHeight) {
      return newHeight
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  mounted() {
    this.calculateTableHeight()
    window.addEventListener('resize', this.calculateTableHeight)
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    window.removeEventListener('resize', this.calculateTableHeight)
  },
  methods: {
    getList() {
      this.loading = true
      listLock(this.queryParams).then(e => {
        this.loading = false
        this.locks = e.rows
        this.total = e.total
      })
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    calculateTableHeight() {
      this.$nextTick(() => {
        if (this.$refs.myElement) {
          const elementHeight = this.$refs.myElement.offsetHeight
          this.tableHeight = elementHeight
        }
      })
    }
  }
}
</script>

    }

      }

  background: none !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  .el-pagination__total {
    color: #FFFFFF;
  }
  .el-pagination__jump {
    color: #FFFFFF;
  }

  width: 279px;
  height: 243px;
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
}
</style>
<template>
  <div v-if="visible" class="dialog-bg">
    <div class="dialog">
      <div class="dialog-close" @click="handleClose">
        <img src="@/assets/images/index/closeDialog.png">
      </div>
      <div class="dialog-title">电源离线统计</div>
      <div v-if="powers.length != 0" ref="myElement" class="table" :style="{ 'line-height': computedLineHeight }">
        <table>
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th>序号</th>
              <th>名称</th>
              <th>教室编号</th>
              <th>所属教室</th>
              <th>类型</th>
              <th>在线状态</th>
              <th>空开状态</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            <tr v-for="(power, index) in powers" :key="index" :class="{ odd: index % 2 === 0 }">
              <td>{{ index + 1 }}</td>
              <td>{{ power.powerNodeNode }}</td>
              <td>{{ power.roomCode }}</td>
              <td>{{ power.roomName }}</td>
              <td>{{ power.params.deviceNodeTypeName }}</td>
              <td>
                <span v-if="power.deviceNodeType==='1'||power.deviceNodeType==='3'">
                  --
                </span>
                <span v-else>
                  {{ power.params.onlineStatusName }}
                </span>
              </td>
              <td>
                <span v-if="power.deviceNodeType==='1'||power.deviceNodeType==='3'||power.onlineStatus==='0'">
                  --
                </span>
                <span v-else>
                  {{ power.params.onoffStatusName }}
                </span>
              </td>
            </tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
      <img v-else class="empty" src="@/assets/images/index/kong.png">
      <pagination
        v-show="total > 0"
        :total="total"
        :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
        :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
        :layout="'total, prev, pager, next, jumper'"
        @pagination="getList"
      />
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { listPower } from '@/api/index'
export default {
  name: 'Powers',
  props: {
    queryParams: {
      type: Object,
      default: {}
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      loading: false,
      total: 0,
      powers: [],
      tableHeight: null
    }
  },
  computed: {
    computedLineHeight() {
      const lineHeight = Math.floor((this.tableHeight - 44) / 10 - 20)
      return lineHeight + 'px' // 返回带有单位的字符串
    }
  },
  watch: {
    'locks.length'(newLength) {
      if (newLength > 0) {
        this.calculateTableHeight()
      }
    },
    tableHeight(newHeight) {
      return newHeight
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  mounted() {
    this.calculateTableHeight()
    window.addEventListener('resize', this.calculateTableHeight)
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    window.removeEventListener('resize', this.calculateTableHeight)
  },
  methods: {
    getList() {
      this.loading = true
      listPower(this.queryParams).then(e => {
        this.total = e.total
        this.loading = false
        this.powers = e.rows
      })
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    calculateTableHeight() {
      this.$nextTick(() => {
        if (this.$refs.myElement) {
          const elementHeight = this.$refs.myElement.offsetHeight
          this.tableHeight = elementHeight
        }
      })
    }
  }
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
.dialog-bg {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);

}

<template>
  <div :style="{height:height,width:width}">
    <div ref="powers" :class="className" :style="{height:height,width:width}" />
    <powers v-if="powerVisible" :visible.sync="powerVisible" :query-params="queryParams"/>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import * as echarts from 'echarts';
require('echarts/theme/macarons') // echarts theme
import resize from './mixins/resize'
import platfrom from '@/assets/images/indexchart/platfrom1.png'
import building from '@/assets/images/indexchart/building.png'
import floor from '@/assets/images/indexchart/floor.png'
import onzong from '@/assets/images/indexchart/onzong.png'
import offzong from '@/assets/images/indexchart/offzong.png'
import onsub from '@/assets/images/indexchart/onsub.png'
import offsub from '@/assets/images/indexchart/offsub.png'
import { getLockBar, getPowerData } from '@/api/index'
import Powers from '@/views/charts/powers.vue'
const animationDuration = 6000
export default {
  components: { Powers },
  mixins: [resize],
  props: {
    className: {
      type: String,
      default: 'chart'
    },
    width: {
      type: String,
      default: '100%'
    },
    height: {
      type: String,
      default: '100%'
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      chartData:[],
      powerVisible:false,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        onlineStatus:"0",
        deviceNodeType:null
      },
    }
  },
  mounted() {
    getPowerData().then(res=>{
      this.chartData = res.data
      this.initChart()
    })
    const that = this
    setInterval(function(){
      getPowerData().then(res=>{
        that.chartData = res.data
        that.setOptions()
      })
    }, 60000);
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    if (!this.chart) {
      return
    }
    this.chart.dispose()
    this.chart = null
  },
  methods: {
    initChart() {
      this.chart = echarts.init(this.$refs.powers, 'macarons')
      this.setOptions()
    },
    setOptions() {
      this.chart.setOption(
        {
          tooltip: {
            trigger: 'item',
            triggerOn: 'mousemove'
          },
          series: [
            {
              type: 'tree',
              data: this.chartData,
              lineStyle: {
                color: '#1720EC', // 设置树枝线的颜色
              },
              left: '2%',
              right: '2%',
              top: '15%',
              bottom: '15%',
              initialTreeDepth: 10,
              symbol: function(value,params){
                let pic ;
                if(params.data.type===1){
                  pic = platfrom
                }else if(params.data.type===2){
                  pic = building
                }else if(params.data.type===3){
                  pic = floor
                }else if(params.data.type===4){
                  pic = onzong
                }else if(params.data.type===5){
                  pic = onsub
                }else if(params.data.type===6){
                  pic = onsub
                }else if(params.data.type===7){
                  pic = offsub
                }else if(params.data.type===8){
                  pic = offsub
                }
                return 'image://'+pic
              },
              symbolSize:function(value,params){
                if(params.data.type===1){
                  return [120,60]
                }else if(params.data.type===2){
                  return [50,45]
                }else if(params.data.type===3){
                  return [60,40]
                }else if(params.data.type===4){
                  return [20,20]
                }else if(params.data.type===5){
                  return [20,20]
                }else if(params.data.type===6){
                  return [15,15]
                }else if(params.data.type===7){
                  return [15,15]
                }else if(params.data.type===8){
                  return [15,15]
                }
              },
              orient: 'vertical', //vertical    horizontal
              edgeShape:"polyline", //curve 曲线 和 polyline直线
              expandAndCollapse: true,
              label: {
                position: 'bottom',
                distance: 15,
                rotate: 0,
                verticalAlign: 'middle',
                align: 'center',
                fontSize: 11,
                fontWeight: 400,
                color: '#00F1FF',
                rich: {
                  a: {
                    borderColor: '#11F4FF',
                    borderWidth: 0.5,
                    padding: 5,
                    borderRadius: 3,
                  },
                },
                formatter: function(params) {
                  if (params.data.type===1 || params.data.type===2 || params.data.type===3) {
                    return `{a|${params.data.name+(params.data.type>3?":"+params.data.value:"")}}`;
                  }else{
                    return params.data.name+(params.data.type>3?":"+params.data.value:"")
                  }
                }
              },
              leaves: {
                label: {
                  position: 'bottom',
                  rotate: 0,
                  verticalAlign: 'middle',
                  align: 'center',
                  fontSize: 11,
                  fontWeight: 400,
                  // formatter:function(params){
                  //   return params.data.name+(params.data.type>3?":"+params.data.value:"")
                  // },
                  rich: {
                    c: {
                      color: '#ccc',
                    },
                    d: {
                      color: 'red',
                    },
                  },
                  formatter: function(params) {
                    if (params.data.type >= 5) {
                      if((params.data.type===7||params.data.type===8)&&params.data.value>0){
                        return `{d|${params.data.name+(params.data.type>3?"\n"+params.data.value:"")}}`;
                      }else{
                        return `{c|${params.data.name+(params.data.type>3?"\n"+params.data.value:"")}}`;
                      }
                    }
                  }
                }
              },
              animationDurationUpdate: 750
            }
          ]
        }
      )
      const that = this
      this.chart.on('click', function(params) {
        // 判断点击的节点是否是叶子节点
        if (!params.data.children || params.data.children.length === 0) {
          // 在这里执行点击叶子节点时的操作
          if(params.data.type===7||params.data.type===8){
            that.queryParams.locationId = params.data.locationId
            if(params.data.type===7){
              that.queryParams.deviceNodeType = "2"
            }else if(params.data.type===8){
              that.queryParams.deviceNodeType = "4"
            }
            that.showPowers()
          }
        }
      });
    },
    showPowers(){
      this.powerVisible = true
      this.$emit('center-heigh', this.powerVisible);
    },
    close() {
      this.$emit('center-low', this.groupVisible);
    }
  }
}
</script>

            v-if="title!='教室查看'">选择电源</a> -->
          <div v-for="(item,index) in idsShowRoomPower" :key="index">
            <span>{{item}}</span>
          </div>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="备注" prop="remark">
          <el-input v-model="form.remark" type="textarea" placeholder="请输入备注" :disabled="title=='教室查看'"
                    maxlength="200" show-word-limit rows="3" resize="none"/>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm" v-if="title!='教室查看'">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">{{title=='教室查看'?"返 回":"取 消"}}</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog title="选择门锁" :visible.sync="openLock" width="700px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-transfer filterable v-model="form.doorLocks" :data="usableLockList"
                   :props="{key: 'deviceId',label: 'deviceName'}">
      </el-transfer>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitFormLock">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancelLock">返回</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog title="选择电源" :visible.sync="openRoomPower" width="700px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-form :model="queryParamsRoomPower" ref="queryFormRoomPower" size="small" :inline="true" label-width="68px">
        <el-form-item label="编号" prop="powerCode">
          <el-input v-model="queryParamsRoomPower.powerCode" placeholder="请输入" clearable
                    @keyup.enter.native="handleQueryRoomPower" />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="名称" prop="name">
          <el-input v-model="queryParamsRoomPower.name" placeholder="请输入" clearable
                    @keyup.enter.native="handleQueryRoomPower" />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="IP" prop="powerIp">
          <el-input v-model="queryParamsRoomPower.powerIp" placeholder="请输入" clearable
                    @keyup.enter.native="handleQueryRoomPower" />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item>
          <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQueryRoomPower">搜索</el-button>
          <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQueryRoomPower">重置</el-button>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <el-table v-loading="loadingRoomPower" :data="roomPowerList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChangeRoomPower"
                row-key="powerId" :tree-props="{children: 'children', hasChildren: 'hasChildren'}">
        <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
        <el-table-column label="编号" align="center" prop="powerCode" />
        <el-table-column label="名称" align="center" prop="name" />
        <el-table-column label="类型" align="center" prop="powerType">
          <template slot-scope="scope">
            {{scope.row.powerType=='1'?'总电源':'子电源'}}
          </template>
        </el-table-column>
        <el-table-column label="IP" align="center" prop="powerIp" />
      </el-table>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitFormRoomPower">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancelRoomPower">返回</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog :title="upload.title" :visible.sync="upload.open" width="400px" append-to-body
               :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-upload ref="upload" :limit="1" accept=".xlsx, .xls" :headers="upload.headers"
                 :action="upload.url + '?updateSupport=' + upload.updateSupport + '&memberType=' + upload.memberType + '&locationId=' + queryParams.locationId"
                 :disabled="upload.isUploading" :on-progress="handleFileUploadProgress" :on-success="handleFileSuccess"
                 :auto-upload="false" drag>
        <i class="el-icon-upload"></i>
        <div class="el-upload__text">
          将文件拖到此处，或
          <em>点击上传</em>
        </div>
        <div class="el-upload__tip" slot="tip">
          <!-- <el-checkbox v-model="upload.updateSupport" />是否更新已经存在的用户数据 -->
          <el-link type="info" style="font-size:12px; color:#1890ff" @click="importTemplate">下载模板</el-link>
        </div>
        <div class="el-upload__tip" style="color:red" slot="tip">提示：仅允许导入“xls”或“xlsx”格式文件！</div>
      </el-upload>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitFileForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="upload.open = false">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog title="批量设置部门" :visible.sync="openSetDept" width="600px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" label-width="120px">
        <el-form-item label="所属部门" prop="chargeDeptId">
          <treeselect v-model="form.chargeDeptId" :options="deptOptions" :show-count="true" placeholder="请选择所属部门"/>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitFormSetDept" >确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog title="批量设置负责人" :visible.sync="openSetPrincipal" width="600px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" label-width="120px">
        <el-form-item label="负责人" prop="principal">
          <el-select v-model="form.principal" multiple placeholder="请选择负责人" size="small" filterable clearable
                     style="width:440px" >
            <el-option v-for="item in teaInfoList" :key="item.user_id" :label="item.nick_name+'-'+item.dept_name" :value="item.user_id" />
          </el-select>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitFormSetPrincipal" >确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <!-- 教室今日课表 -->
    <el-dialog title="查看课程" :visible.sync="roomClassInfoShow" width="900px" height="800px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-tabs v-model="activeName" @tab-click="handleClick">
        <el-tab-pane key="0" label="今日课表" name="0"></el-tab-pane>
        <el-tab-pane key="1" label="明日课表" name="1"></el-tab-pane>
        <el-tab-pane key="2" label="后日课表" name="2"></el-tab-pane>
      </el-tabs>
      <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="roomClassList"   height="500px">
        <el-table-column label="课节" align="center" prop="sectionName" width="100" />
        <el-table-column label="时间" align="center" prop="roomName">
          <template slot-scope="scope">
            {{scope.row.startTime}}--{{scope.row.endTime}}
          </template>
        </el-table-column>
        <el-table-column label="科目" align="center" prop="courseName" />
        <el-table-column label="主讲老师" align="center" prop="stuWorkName" width="200"/>
        <!-- 20260128 需求注释掉操作列 -->
        <!-- <el-table-column label="操作" align="center"  width="120" >
          <template  slot-scope="scope">
            <template v-if="scope.row.startTime !== null && scope.row.startTime !== ''&&scope.row.endFob!==1 ">
              <template v-if="scope.row.oneMore !==1">
                <template v-if="scope.row.inBlack === 1">
                  <el-button  v-if="scope.row.startFob!==1" size="mini" type="text" @click="handleRmClassFromBlack(scope.row)"
                              v-hasPermi="['jufe:room:classBlack']">恢复</el-button>
                </template>
                <template v-else>
                  <el-button v-if="scope.row.startFob!==1" size="mini" type="text" @click="handleRmClassFromBlack(scope.row)"
                             v-hasPermi="['jufe:room:classBlack']">禁用</el-button>

              </template> -->

              <!-- <el-button size="mini" type="text" @click="delayNum(scope.row)"
                         v-hasPermi="['jufe:room:delayNum']">延时</el-button>
            </template>
          </template>
        </el-table-column> -->
      </el-table>
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog title="教室实况" v-if="roomShow" :visible.sync="roomShow" width="600px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false" :before-close="closeRoomShow">
      <el-card>
        <el-empty v-if="roomDetail.hasCollector === 'N'" :image-size="200" :description="'暂无采集器'"></el-empty>
        <el-descriptions v-else class="margin-top" title="" :column="1" border>
          <el-descriptions-item>
            <template slot="label">
              <i class="el-icon-user"></i>
              水浸
            </template>
            <span :class="roomDetail.sfsj ==='-'?'':roomDetail.sfsj ==='是'?'red':'green'">
              {{ roomDetail.sfsj ==='-'?'-':roomDetail.sfsj ==='是'?"异常":"正常"}}
            </span>
          </el-descriptions-item>
          <el-descriptions-item>
            <template slot="label">
              <i class="el-icon-mobile-phone"></i>
              烟感
            </template>
            <span :class="roomDetail.sfyg ==='-'?'':roomDetail.sfyg ==='是'?'red':'green'">
            {{ roomDetail.sfyg ==='-'?'-':roomDetail.sfyg ==='是'?"异常":"正常"}}
            </span>
          </el-descriptions-item>
          <el-descriptions-item>
            <template slot="label">
              <i class="el-icon-mobile-phone"></i>
              窗磁
            </template>
            <span :class="roomDetail.sfkc ==='-'?'':roomDetail.sfkc ==='开'?'red':'green'">
            {{ roomDetail.sfkc}}
            </span>
          </el-descriptions-item>
          <el-descriptions-item>
            <template slot="label">
              <i class="el-icon-mobile-phone"></i>
              温度
            </template>
            <span :class="roomDetail.wdNum ==='-'?'':roomDetail.wdgj ==='Y'?'red':'green'">
            {{ roomDetail.wdNum+' ℃' }}
            </span>
          </el-descriptions-item>
          <el-descriptions-item>
            <template slot="label">
              <i class="el-icon-mobile-phone"></i>
              湿度
            </template>
            <span :class="roomDetail.sdNum ==='-'?'':roomDetail.sdgj ==='Y'?'red':'green'">
            {{ roomDetail.sdNum+' %rh' }}
            </span>
          </el-descriptions-item>
          <el-descriptions-item>
            <template slot="label">
              <i class="el-icon-mobile-phone"></i>
              光照
            </template>
            <span :class="roomDetail.gzNum ==='-'?'':roomDetail.gzgj ==='Y'?'red':'green'">
            {{ roomDetail.gzNum+' lx' }}
            </span>
          </el-descriptions-item>
          <el-descriptions-item>
            <template slot="label">
              <i class="el-icon-mobile-phone"></i>
              空气质量(PM2.5)
            </template>
            <span :class="roomDetail.pm25Num ==='-'?'':roomDetail.pm25gj ==='Y'?'red':'green'">
            {{ roomDetail.pm25Num+' ug/m³' }}
            </span>
          </el-descriptions-item>
          <el-descriptions-item>
            <template slot="label">
              <i class="el-icon-mobile-phone"></i>
              空气质量(PM10)
            </template>
            <span :class="roomDetail.pm10Num ==='-'?'':roomDetail.pm10gj ==='Y'?'red':'green'">
            {{ roomDetail.pm10Num +' ug/m³'}}
            </span>
          </el-descriptions-item>
        </el-descriptions>
      </el-card>
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog title="延时" v-if="delayVisible" :visible.sync="delayVisible" width="600px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false" :before-close="closeDelay">
      <el-form ref="delayform" :model="delayNumItem" label-width="120px">
        <el-form-item>
          <span>最大延时:{{delayNumItem.delayNumMax}} 分钟,已延时{{delayNumItem.baseDelayNum}} 分钟</span>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="延时时长" prop="delayNum"
                      :rules="[{ required: true, message: '延时时长不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },
                      { validator: isInt, message: '请输入正确分钟数', trigger: 'blur' }]">
          <el-input v-model="delayNumItem.delayNum" :min="1" :max="delayNumItem.delayNumMax">
            <template slot="append">分钟</template>
          </el-input>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitDelayNum" :plain="true">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="closeDelay">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  listRoom,
  getRoom,
  delRoom,
  addRoom,
  updateRoom,
  batchSetRoom,
  listTeaInfo,
  listRoomClass,
  updateRoomClassStatus,
  getRoomInfo, delayNum
} from '@/api/jufe/room'
import {
  getUsableBoardList
} from "@/api/jufe/board";
import {
  getAllRoomPowerList
} from "@/api/jufe/roomPower";
import {
  getLocation,
  locationTree
} from '@/api/location/location'
import {
  getUsableLockList
} from "@/api/jufe/lock";
import {
  deptTreeSelect
} from "@/api/system/user";
import Treeselect from "@riophae/vue-treeselect";
import "@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css";
import { getToken } from "@/utils/auth";
import { formatDate } from '@/utils'
import {isInt} from '@/utils/validate'
import { getBaseSetInfo } from '@/api/jufe/basesetinfo'
import VideoPlayer from "@/components/VideoPlayer/index.vue";
import {getMonitors} from "@/api/jufe/command";
import Play from "@/views/classroom/management/play.vue";
import Add from "@/views/jufe/apksource/add.vue";
export default {
  name: "Room",
  dicts: ['device_room_status'],
  components: {
    Add,
    Play,
    VideoPlayer,
    Treeselect
  },
  data() {
    return {
      monitorOpen:false,
      monitor: {
        title: "视频监控",
        open: false,
        videos: []
      },
      //添加修改教室时显示位置
      loaclShowName:"",
      // 部门树选项
      deptOptions: undefined,
      locationOptions: [],
      questionForm: {},
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      loadingRoomPower: false,
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      idsRoomPower: [],
      idsShowRoomPower: [],
      // 选中的双向数据
      transvalue: [],
      // 非单个禁用
      single: true,
      single1: true,
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 班牌信息表格数据
      roomList: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      openLock: false,
      openRoomPower: false,
      openSetPrincipal: false,
      openSetDept: false,
      delayVisible:false,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        roomName: null,
        lockNameSelect: null,
        lockCodeSelect: null,
        powerNameSelect: null,
        powerCodeSelect: null,
        boardNameSelect: null,
        boardCodeSelect: null,
        sourceType: null,
        locationName: null,
        locationId: null,
      },
      queryParamsRoomPower: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        powerCode: null,
        name: null,
        powerIp: null,
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {},
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
        roomName: [{
          required: true,
          message: "教室名称不能为空",
          trigger: "blur"
        }],
        roomCode: [
          {
            required: true,
            message: "教室编号不能为空",
            trigger: "blur"
          },
        ],
        chargeDeptId: [{
          required: true,
          message: "请选择所属部门",
          trigger: "blur"
        }],
      },
      location:null,
      //负责人集合
      teaInfoList: [],
      //班牌集合
      usableBoardList: [],
      //门锁集合
      usableLockList: [],
      //电源集合
      roomPowerList: [],
      //全部电源集合
      roomPowerListAll: [],
      defaultProps: {
        children: "children",
        label: "label"
      },
      // 楼层名称
      locationName: undefined,
      lockValues: [],
      // 用户导入参数
      upload: {
        // 是否显示弹出层（用户导入）
        open: false,
        // 弹出层标题（用户导入）
        title: "",
        // 是否禁用上传
        isUploading: false,
        // 是否更新已经存在的用户数据
        updateSupport: 0,
        memberType: 1,
        // 设置上传的请求头部
        headers: {
          Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken()
        },
        // 上传的地址
        url: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API + "/jufe/room/importData",
      },
      //是否显示今日课表
      roomClassInfoShow:false ,
      roomShow:false,
      roomDetail:{},
      //今日课程
      roomClassList:[],
      //教室课程查询
      roomClassSel:{},
      delayNumItem:{
        id:null,
        roomId:null,
        baseDelayNum:0,
        delayNum:null,
        delayNumMax:null
      },
      baseSet:null,
      activeName: '0',
      activeRoomId:null,
      // chrome浏览器nvr插件id
      nvrExtensionId: null
    };
  },
  watch: {
    // 根据名称筛选树
    locationName(val) {
      this.$refs.tree.filter(val);
    }
  },
  created() {
    getBaseSetInfo().then(res=>{
      this.baseSet = res.data
    })
    this.getTreeselect();
    this.getList();
    listTeaInfo().then(response => {
      this.teaInfoList = response.data;
    });
    this.getDeptTree();
    // 向nvr插件请求插件id
    window.addEventListener('nvr-extension-id-ready', this.handleExtensionIdReady, { once: true });
    console.log('Vue组件已挂载，正在请求扩展ID...');
    window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('request-nvr-extension-id'));
  },
  methods: {
    /**
     * 收到nvr插件id
     * @param event 
     */
    handleExtensionIdReady(event) {
      console.log('收到扩展ID:', event.detail.extensionId);
      const extensionId = event.detail.extensionId;
      if (extensionId) {
        this.nvrExtensionId = extensionId;
      }
    },
    gotoMonitor(roomId){
      getMonitors(roomId).then(e=>{
        this.monitor.open = true
        this.monitor.videos = e.data
        this.monitorOpen = true
        console.log(this.monitor.videos)
      })
    },
    handleClick(tab, event) {
      this.getClassInfoByRoomId(this.activeName);
    },
    isInt:isInt,
    openDialogLock() {
      this.openLock = true
    },
    openDialogRoomPower() {
      this.openRoomPower = true;
      this.getRoomPowerList();
    },
    /** 查询教室信息列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = false;
      listRoom(this.queryParams).then(response => {
        this.roomList = response.rows;
        this.roomList.forEach((item) => {
          var lockNames = item.lockNames;
          item.lockNames = [];
          if (lockNames) {
            item.lockNames = lockNames.split(',');
          }
          var principalNames = item.principalNames;
          item.principalNames = [];
          if (principalNames) {
            item.principalNames = principalNames.split(',');
          }
          var roomPowerNames = item.roomPowerNames;
          item.roomPowerNames = [];
          if (roomPowerNames) {
            item.roomPowerNames = roomPowerNames.split(',');
          }
        });
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    getRoomPowerList() {
      this.loadingRoomPower = false;
      getAllRoomPowerList(this.queryParamsRoomPower).then(response => {
        this.roomPowerListAll = response.data;
        this.roomPowerList = this.handleTree(response.data, "powerId", "parentPowerId");;
        this.loadingRoomPower = false;
      });
    },
    getUsableBoardListData(roomId) {
      getUsableBoardList(roomId).then(response => {
        this.usableBoardList = response.data;
      });
    },
    getUsableLockListData(roomId) {
      getUsableLockList({
        roomId: roomId
      }).then(response => {
        this.usableLockList = response.data;
      });
    },
    // 取消按钮
    cancel() {
      this.open = false;
      this.openSetDept = false;
      this.openSetPrincipal = false;
      this.reset();
    },
    cancelLock() {
      this.openLock = false;
    },
    cancelRoomPower() {
      this.openRoomPower = false;
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.form = {
        roomId: null,
        roomName: null,
        roomBm: null,
        buildings: null,
        floor: null,
        square: null,
        computersNum: null,
        isMultimedia: null,
        isMultiplex: null,
        isSchedule: null,
        unitCode: null,
        category: null,
        categorySub: null,
        useInfo: null,
        usePlan: null,
        remark: null,
        createById: null,
        createBy: null,
        createTime: null,
        updateById: null,
        updateBy: null,
        updateTime: null,
        sourceType: null,
        roomType: null,
        delFlag: null,
        deptId: null,
        principal: [],
        doorLocks: [],
        boardIds:[],
        syncRoomCode: null
      };
      this.resetForm("form");
      this.queryParamsRoomPower = {
        powerCode: null,
        name: null,
        powerIp: null,
        selectRoomId: null
      };
      this.resetForm("queryFormRoomPower");
      this.lockValues = [];
      this.idsShowRoomPower = [];
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 电源 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQueryRoomPower() {
      this.queryParamsRoomPower.pageNum = 1;
      this.getRoomPowerList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.queryParams.locationId = undefined;
      this.$refs.tree.setCurrentKey(null);
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    /** 电源 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQueryRoomPower() {
      this.resetForm("queryFormRoomPower");
      this.getRoomPowerList();
    },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.roomId)
      this.single = selection.length !== 1
      this.multiple = !selection.length
    },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChangeRoomPower(selection) {
      this.idsRoomPower = selection.map(item => item.powerId)
      this.single1 = selection.length !== 1
    },
    /** 新增按钮操作 */
    handleAdd() {
      if (this.queryParams.locationId == null) {
        this.$modal.msgError("请选择位置");
        return
      }
      getLocation(this.queryParams.locationId).then(response => {
        this.loaclShowName =   response.data.parentName +"-"+ response.data.locationName;
        var ancestor = response.data.ancestors;
        var index = ancestor.indexOf(',');
        var num =0;
        while(index !== -1){
          num++;
          index = ancestor.indexOf(',',index + 1)
        }
        if(num != 2){
          this.open = false;
          this.$modal.msgError("请您在第3层级楼层位置新增教室!");
          // this.$modal.msgError({
          //   dangerouslyUseHTMLString: true,
          //   message: '当前层级位置不可新增教室 <br> 请您在第3层级楼层位置新增教室'
          // });
          return
        }
        this.open = true;
        this.reset();
        this.getUsableBoardListData(null);
        // this.getUsableLockListData(null);
        this.title = "新增教室";
        this.resetForm("queryFormRoomPower");
        this.form.locationId = this.queryParams.locationId;
      });
    },
    /** 修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      const roomId = row.roomId || this.ids
      this.reset();
      this.getUsableBoardListData(roomId);
      this.getUsableLockListData(roomId);
      getRoom(roomId).then(response => {
        this.loaclShowName = response.data.locationName;
        this.form = this.$copy(response.data);
        this.form.doorLocks = [];
        if (row.lockIds) {
          let dataStrArrLockIds = row.lockIds.split(','); //分割成字符串数组
          let dataIntArrLockIds = [];
          dataIntArrLockIds = dataStrArrLockIds.map(item => {
            return +item;
          });
          this.form.doorLocks = dataIntArrLockIds;
        }
        this.form.principal = row.principal;
        this.form.boardIds = row.boardIds;
        this.form.roomPowers = [];
        if (row.roomPowerIds) {
          let dataStrArrRoomPowerIds = row.roomPowerIds.split(','); //分割成字符串数组
          let dataIntArrRoomPowerIds = [];
          dataIntArrRoomPowerIds = dataStrArrRoomPowerIds.map(item => {
            return +item;
          });
          this.form.roomPowers = dataIntArrRoomPowerIds;
        }
        this.lockValues = row.lockNames;
        this.idsShowRoomPower = row.roomPowerNames;
        this.queryParamsRoomPower.selectRoomId = this.form.roomId
        this.open = true;
        this.title = "编辑教室";
      });
    },
    /** 查看按钮操作 */
    handleLook(row) {
      this.reset();
      const roomId = row.roomId || this.ids
      this.getUsableBoardListData(roomId);
      this.getUsableLockListData(roomId);
      getRoom(roomId).then(response => {
        this.form = response.data;
        this.form.doorLocks = [];
        if (row.lockIds) {
          let dataStrArrLockIds = row.lockIds.split(','); //分割成字符串数组
          let dataIntArrLockIds = [];
          dataIntArrLockIds = dataStrArrLockIds.map(item => {
            return +item;
          });
          this.form.doorLocks = dataIntArrLockIds;
        }
        this.form.principal = row.principal;
        this.form.boardIds = row.boardIds;
        this.form.roomPowers = [];
        if (row.roomPowerIds) {
          let dataStrArrRoomPowerIds = row.roomPowerIds.split(','); //分割成字符串数组
          let dataIntArrRoomPowerIds = [];
          dataIntArrRoomPowerIds = dataStrArrRoomPowerIds.map(item => {
            return +item;
          });
          this.form.roomPowers = dataIntArrRoomPowerIds;
        }
        this.lockValues = row.lockNames;
        this.idsShowRoomPower = row.roomPowerNames;
        this.queryParamsRoomPower.selectRoomId = this.form.roomId
        this.open = true;
        this.title = "教室查看";
      });
    },
    handleShowClass(row){
      this.activeName = '0'
      this.roomClassList = [];
      this.activeRoomId = row.roomId
      this.getClassInfoByRoomId(this.activeName);
      this.roomClassInfoShow = true;
      this.roomClassSel = row;
    },
    handleShowRoom(roomId){
      getRoomInfo(roomId).then(e=>{
        this.roomDetail = e.data
        this.roomShow = true;
      })
    },
    closeRoomShow(){
      this.roomShow = false;
    },
    //获取教室今日课程信息
    getClassInfoByRoomId(day){
      let queryClassParams = {
        roomId: this.activeRoomId,
        classDay: day
      }
      this.loading = false;
      listRoomClass(queryClassParams).then(response => {
        this.roomClassList = response.rows;
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    closeClassShow(){
      this.roomClassList = [];
      this.roomClassInfoShow = false;
    },
    delayNum(row){
      this.delayNumItem.roomId = null
      this.delayNumItem.delayNumMax = null
      this.delayNumItem.schedulingId = null
      this.delayNumItem.delayNum = null
      this.delayNumItem.baseDelayNum = 0
      let start = new Date(row.courseDate+' '+ row.endTime + ':00')
      let end;
      let index = row.classSection - 1
      this.roomClassList.some((e,i)=>{
        if(i>index&&e.schedulingId){
          end = new Date(row.courseDate+' '+ e.startTime + ':00');
          return true;
        }
      })
      if(!end){
        end = new Date(row.courseDate + ' '+ '23:59:00');
      }
      const timeDiffInMilliseconds = end - start;
      let timeDiffInMinutes = (timeDiffInMilliseconds / (1000 * 60)) - Number(this.baseSet.advanceTime) - Number(this.baseSet.delayTime)
      if(row.delayNum){
        this.delayNumItem.baseDelayNum = row.delayNum
        // this.delayNumItem.delayNum = row.delayNum
        timeDiffInMinutes = timeDiffInMinutes - row.delayNum
      }
      if(timeDiffInMinutes<=0){
        this.$message.error('可延时时长小于0！')
        return
      }
      this.delayNumItem.roomId = row.roomId
      this.delayNumItem.delayNumMax = timeDiffInMinutes
      this.delayNumItem.schedulingId = row.schedulingId
      this.delayVisible = true
    },
    closeDelay(){
      this.delayVisible = false
    },
    submitDelayNum(){
      if(this.delayNumItem.delayNum > this.delayNumItem.delayNumMax) {
        this.$message.error('延时时长不可超过'+this.delayNumItem.delayNumMax+'分钟')
        return
      }
      const that = this
      this.$refs["delayform"].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          delayNum(this.delayNumItem).then(e=>{
            that.delayVisible = false
            this.getClassInfoByRoomId(this.activeName);
            that.$modal.msgSuccess("操作成功");
          })
        }
      });
    },
    //修改是否在黑名单状态
    handleRmClassFromBlack(row){
      row.classDay = 0 ;
      let that = this;
      let text =   row.courseName + '"的课程？';
      if(row.oneMore===1){
        if(row.inBlack===1){
          text = '是否取消占用下节课？'
        }else{
          text = '是否占用下节课？'
        }
      }else{
        if(row.inBlack===1){
          text =  '是否恢复"' + row.courseName + '"的课程？'
        }else{
          text = '是否禁用"' + row.courseName + '"的课程？'
        }
      }
      this.$modal.confirm(text).then(function() {
        updateRoomClassStatus(row).then(response => {
          that.$modal.msgSuccess("操作成功");
          if(response.code==200){
            that.handleShowClass(that.roomClassSel)
          }
        });
      }).then(() => {
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    // 确定按钮
    submitFormLock() {
      if (this.form.doorLocks.length != 0) {
        this.openLock = false;
        this.lockValues = [];
        this.usableLockList.forEach((item) => {
          this.form.doorLocks.forEach((item2) => {
            if (item.deviceId == item2) {
              this.lockValues.push(item.deviceName + '-' + item.deviceCode);
            }
          });
        });
      }
      // else {
      //   this.$modal.msgSuccess("请选择数据");
      // }
    },
    // 电源列表确认
    submitFormRoomPower() {
      if (this.idsRoomPower.length != 0) {
        this.openRoomPower = false;
        this.idsShowRoomPower = [];
        this.form.roomPowers = this.idsRoomPower;
        this.roomPowerListAll.forEach((item) => {
          this.idsRoomPower.forEach((item2) => {
            if (item.powerId == item2) {
              this.idsShowRoomPower.push(item.name + '-' + item.powerCode);
            }
          });
        });
      }
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs["form"].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          if (this.form.roomId != null) {
            updateRoom(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          } else {
            addRoom(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          }
        }
      });
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const roomIds = row.roomId || this.ids;
      this.$modal.confirm((row.boardId || row.lockIds || row.roomPowerIds) ? '是否确定删除？如果删除将导致该教室的班牌/门锁/电源不可使用。' :
        '是否确定删除？').then(function() {
        return delRoom(roomIds);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.download('jufe/room/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `room_${new Date().getTime()}.xlsx`)
    },
    /** 查询位置下拉树结构 */
    getTreeselect() {
      locationTree().then(response => {
        this.locationOptions = response.data
      })
    },
    // 筛选节点
    filterNode(value, data) {
      if (!value) return true;
      return data.label.indexOf(value) !== -1;
    },
    // 节点单击事件
    handleNodeClick(data) {
      this.queryParams.locationId = data.id;
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    /** 查询部门下拉树结构 */
    getDeptTree() {
      deptTreeSelect().then(response => {
        this.deptOptions = response.data;
      });
    },
    /** 导入按钮操作 */
    handleImport() {
      if (this.queryParams.locationId != null) {
        getLocation(this.queryParams.locationId).then(response => {
          var ancestor = response.data.ancestors;
          var index = ancestor.indexOf(',');
          var num =0;
          while(index !== -1){
            num++;
            index = ancestor.indexOf(',',index + 1)
          }
          if (num !=2) {
            this.$modal.msgError("请您在第3层级楼层位置导入教室!");
            return
          }
          this.upload.title = "导入";
          this.upload.open = true;
        });
      }else if(this.queryParams.locationId == null){
        this.$modal.msgError("请选择位置");
        return
      }
    },
    // 文件上传中处理
    handleFileUploadProgress(event, file, fileList) {
      this.upload.isUploading = true;
    },
    // 文件上传成功处理
    handleFileSuccess(response, file, fileList) {
      this.upload.open = false;
      this.upload.isUploading = false;
      this.$refs.upload.clearFiles();
      this.$alert(response.msg, "导入结果", {
        dangerouslyUseHTMLString: true,
        customClass: 'message_box_alert'
      });
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 下载模板操作 */
    importTemplate() {
      this.download('/jufe/room/importTemplate', {
      }, `教室管理导入模板.xlsx`)
    },
    // 提交上传文件
    submitFileForm() {
      this.$refs.upload.submit();
    },
    /** 批量设置部门 按钮操作 */
    handleSetDept() {
      this.reset();
      this.openSetDept = true;
    },
    /** 批量设置负责人 按钮操作 */
    handleSetPrincipal() {
      this.reset();
      this.openSetPrincipal = true;
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitFormSetDept() {
      batchSetRoom({ids:this.ids,principal:this.form.principal,chargeDeptId:this.form.chargeDeptId}).then(response => {
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
        this.openSetDept = false;
        this.getList();
      });
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitFormSetPrincipal() {
      batchSetRoom({ids:this.ids,principal:this.form.principal,chargeDeptId:this.form.chargeDeptId}).then(response => {
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
        this.openSetPrincipal = false;
        this.getList();
      });
    },
    /** 打开硬盘录像机 */
    handleVideo(targetIp) {
      if (this.nvrExtensionId && window.chrome && chrome.runtime && chrome.runtime.sendMessage) {
        chrome.runtime.sendMessage(
          this.nvrExtensionId,
          { action: 'ping' }, // 发送一个“心跳”消息
          (response) => {
            if (chrome.runtime.lastError) {
              // 如果发生错误（例如插件不存在或未启用），lastError 会被设置
              console.warn('插件未安装或未启用:', chrome.runtime.lastError.message);
              this.$modal.msgError("插件未安装或未启用，请先安装插件");
            } else if (response && response.installed) {
              // 如果收到回复，说明插件已安装
              console.log('插件已安装。');
              const username = "jkck";
              const password = "ptyh#4573";
              chrome.runtime.sendMessage(this.nvrExtensionId, {
                action: 'autoLogin',
                username: username,
                password: password
              }, (response) => {
                if (response && response.success) {
                  console.log('自动登录成功');
                  // 登录成功后，打开视频页面
                  const baseUrl = `http://${targetIp}/doc/index.html`;
                  // const urlWithParams = `${baseUrl}#/portal/login?t=${new Date().getTime()}&autologin_user=${encodedUsername}&autologin_pass=${encodedPassword}`;
                  const urlWithParams = `${baseUrl}#/portal/login?t=${new Date().getTime()}`;
                  // 判断是否已经打开了该 targetIp 的窗口
                  const existingWindow = window.open(urlWithParams, '_blank');
                } else {
                  console.error('自动登录失败:', response);
                  this.$modal.msgError("插件未安装或未启用，请先安装插件");
                }
              })
            } else {
              this.$modal.msgError("插件未安装或未启用，请先安装插件");
            }
          }
        );
      } else {
        // 如果连 chrome.runtime API 都不存在，那肯定不是 Chrome 浏览器
        console.log('非 Chrome 浏览器或 API 不可用。');
        this.$modal.msgError("当前浏览器不支持查看视频，请使用chrome浏览器");
        return;
      }
    }
  }
};
</script>
