<template>
    <video ref="video-player" width="640" height="480" controls  autoplay> </video>
</template>
<script>
import flvjs from "flv.js";
export default {
  name: 'Play',
  props:{
  },
  data() {
    return {
      timer:null,
      flvPlayer: null,
      wsId:null,
      url:"rtsp://admin:1111111q@10.0.90.110:554/h264/ch1/main/av_stream" ,
    };
  },
  mounted() {
    const { v4: uuidv4 } = require('uuid')
    this.wsId = uuidv4()
    this.$nextTick(() => {
      this.initWebSocket();
    });
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    clearInterval(this.timer); // 清除定时器
    this.stopVideo();
  },
  methods: {
    handleClose() {
      this.stopVideo();
      this.$emit('update:visible', false);
      this.$emit('close');
    },
    initWebSocket() {
      const attachMediaElement = this.$refs["video-player"]
      this.$nextTick(()=>{
        if (flvjs.isSupported()) {
          this.flvPlayer = flvjs.createPlayer({
            type: "flv",
            url: 'ws://192.168.1.90:9999/websocket?id='+this.wsId+"&url="+encodeURIComponent(this.url),
            isLive: true,
            hasAudio: true,
            hasVideo: true,
          },{
              enableStashBuffer: true, // 是否启用缓存
              stashInitialSize:1024,
              autoCleanupSourceBuffer: true, // 是否自动清理缓存
              lazyLoad:true,
              lazyLoadMaxDuration:60,
              lazyLoadRecoverDuration:30,
              autoCleanupMaxBackwardDuration:10*60,
              autoCleanupMinBackwardDuration:5*60,
          })
          this.flvPlayer.attachMediaElement(attachMediaElement);
          this.flvPlayer.load();
          this.$nextTick(()=>{
            this.flvPlayer.play();
          })
          const that = this
          this.timer = setInterval(() => {
            console.log('===========================================')
            console.log('that.flvPlayer.buffered------>',that.flvPlayer.buffered)
            console.log('that.flvPlayer.buffered.length------>',that.flvPlayer.buffered.length)
            console.log('that.flvPlayer.mediaInfo------>',that.flvPlayer.mediaInfo)
            console.log('that.flvPlayer.statisticsInfo------>',that.flvPlayer.statisticsInfo)
            if (that.flvPlayer.buffered && that.flvPlayer.buffered.length) {
              let end = that.flvPlayer.buffered.end(0); // 获取当前buffered值
              let diff = end - that.flvPlayer.currentTime; // 获取buffered与currentTime的差值
              console.log('当前时间差-----》',diff)
              if (diff >= 60) { // 如果差值大于等于60秒，手动跳帧或者重新拉流
                console.log('重新加载----------------------')
                clearInterval(this.timer); // 清除定时器
                // 重新加载当前停止的视频流，根据个人的方法来配置
                // that.initWebSocket()
              }
            }
          }, 2000); // 每2000毫秒执行一次
          // // 报错重连
          this.flvPlayer.on(flvjs.Events.ERROR, (errType, errDetail) => {
            if (this.flvPlayer) {
              this.stopVideo()
              this.initWebSocket()
            }
          })
        }
      })
    },
    stopVideo() {
      if (this.flvPlayer) {
        this.flvPlayer.pause()
        this.flvPlayer.unload();
        this.flvPlayer.detachMediaElement();
        this.flvPlayer.destroy();
        this.flvPlayer = null;
      }
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <div ref="bar" class="bar-chart" :style="{height: '100%', width: '100%'}"  @mouseover="mouseover" @mouseout="mouseout" />
</template>
<script>
import * as echarts from 'echarts'
import resize from '../../../charts/mixins/resize'
export default {
  name: "barCharts",
  mixins: [resize],
  props: {
    chartData: {
      type: Object,
      default: () => ({})
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      chart: null,
      interval:null,
      interval2:null,
      index:0,
      dataZoomIndex:0,
      dataZoom:{
        startValue:0,
        endValue:7,
      },
    }
  },
  watch: {
    // 监听 chartData 的变化
    chartData: {
      deep: true,
      handler(newData) {
        if (newData && Object.keys(newData).length > 0) {
          this.setOptions()
        }
      }
    },
  },
  mounted() {
    this.initChart()
    this.index = 0
    this.dataZoomIndex = 0
    this.interval = setInterval(() => {
      this.startAnimation();
    }, 3000);
    this.interval2 = setInterval(() => {
      this.scrollData();
    }, 3000);
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    if (this.chart !== null) {
      this.chart.dispose()
    }
    clearInterval(this.interval)
    clearInterval(this.interval2)
  },
  methods: {
    mouseover() {
      clearInterval(this.interval);
      clearInterval(this.interval2);
    },
    mouseout() {
      this.interval = setInterval(() => {
        this.startAnimation();
      }, 3000);
      this.interval2 = setInterval(() => {
        this.scrollData();
      }, 3000);
    },
    initChart() {
      this.chart = echarts.init(this.$refs.bar)
      this.setOptions()
    },
    setOptions() {
      const that = this
      this.chart.setOption({
        grid:{  // 布满div
          top:"40px",
          left:"50px",
          right:"25px",
          bottom:that.chartData.xDatas.length>10?"60px":'40px'
        },
        tooltip: {
          trigger: 'axis',
          backgroundColor:'rgba(0,0,0,0.7)',
          borderWidth: 0,
          textStyle:{
            color:'#fff'
          },
          confine:true,
          axisPointer: {
            // Use axis to trigger tooltip
            type: 'shadow' // 'shadow' as default; can also be 'line' or 'shadow'
          },
          formatter: function(params) {
            var res = '<div><p>' + '房间号：' + params[0].name + '</p>'
              res += '<p style="text-align: left">' + '空开数量：' +  params[0].value + '个' + '</p></div>'
              res += '<p style="text-align: left">' + '门锁数量：' +  params[1].value + '个' + '</p></div>'
              res += '<p style="text-align: left">' + '采集类设备数量：' +  params[2].value + '个' + '</p></div>'
            return res;
          },
        },
        legend: {
          data: ['空开', '门锁', '采集类设备'],
          textStyle: {
            color: "rgba(255, 255, 255, 1)"
          },
          top: 8,
          right: 20,
          itemWidth: 16,
          itemHeight: 5
        },
        dataZoom: [
          {
            borderRadius: 0,
            height: 15,
            show:that.chartData.xDatas.length>8,
            type: 'slider',
            startValue: that.dataZoom.startValue,
            endValue: that.dataZoom.endValue,
            minValueSpan:8,
            maxValueSpan:8,
            bottom:20
          },
        ],
        xAxis: {
          type: 'category',
          axisLine:{
            lineStyle:{
              color:'#fff'
            }
          },
          axisTick: {
            show: false
          },
          data: that.chartData.xDatas
        },
        yAxis: {
          name: "单位：个",
          minInterval:1,
          axisLine:{
            lineStyle:{
              color:'#fff'
            }
          },
          splitLine: {
            show: true,
            lineStyle: {
              color:'#9f9f9f',
              type: 'dashed',
              width: 0.8
            }
          }
        },
        // Declare several bar series, each will be mapped
        // to a column of dataset.source by default.
        series: [
          {
            name:'空开',
            type: 'bar',
            itemStyle: {
              color: new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                { offset: 0, color: 'rgba(52, 158, 255, 1)' },
                { offset: 1, color: 'rgba(52, 158, 255, 0)' }
              ]),
              borderRadius: [25, 25, 0, 0]
            },
            barWidth: 10,
            data: that.chartData.yDatas_power
          },
          {
            name:'门锁',
            type: 'bar',
            itemStyle: {
              color: new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                { offset: 0, color: 'rgba(97, 239, 166, 1)' },
                { offset: 1, color: 'rgba(97, 239, 166, 0)' }
              ]),
              borderRadius: [25, 25, 0, 0]
            },
            barWidth: 10,
            data: that.chartData.yDatas_lock
          },
          {
            name:'采集类设备',
            type: 'bar',
            itemStyle: {
              color: new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                { offset: 0, color: 'rgba(255, 189, 48, 1)' },
                { offset: 1, color: 'rgba(255, 189, 48, 0)' }
              ]),
              borderRadius: [25, 25, 0, 0]
            },
            barWidth: 10,
            data: that.chartData.yDatas_collector
          }
        ]
      })
    },
    startAnimation() {
      this.chart.dispatchAction({
        type: 'showTip',
        seriesIndex: 1,
        dataIndex: this.index,
      });
      if (this.index>(this.chartData.xDatas.length-2)){
        this.index = 0
      }else {
        this.index++
      }
    },
    scrollData(){
      this.chart.dispatchAction({
        type: 'dataZoom',
        startValue: this.dataZoomIndex,
        endValue: this.dataZoomIndex+7,
      });
      if ((this.dataZoomIndex+7)>(this.chartData.xDatas.length-2)){
        this.index = 0
        this.dataZoomIndex = 0
      }else {
        this.dataZoomIndex++
      }
    },
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div ref="bar" class="bar-chart" :style="{height: '100%', width: '100%'}" />
</template>
<script>
import * as echarts from 'echarts'
import resize from '../../../charts/mixins/resize'
import data from "../../../system/dict/data";
export default {
  name: "gaugeCharts",
  mixins: [resize],
  props: {
    chartData: {
      type: Object,
      default: () => ({})
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      chart: null,
      interval:null,
      num:0
    }
  },
  watch: {
    // 监听 chartData 的变化
    chartData: {
      deep: true,
      handler(newData) {
        if (newData && Object.keys(newData).length > 0) {
          this.setOptions()
        }
      }
    }
  },
  mounted() {
    this.num = this.chartData.num
    this.initChart()
    this.interval = setInterval(() => {
      this.startAnimation();
    }, 3000);
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    if (this.chart !== null) {
      this.chart.dispose()
    }
    clearInterval(this.interval)
  },
  methods: {
    initChart() {
      this.chart = echarts.init(this.$refs.bar)
      this.setOptions()
    },
    setOptions() {
      const that = this
      let chartData = this.chartData
      this.chart.setOption({
        grid:{  // 布满div
          top:"0px",
          left:"0px",
          right:"0px",
          bottom:"0px"
        },
        angleAxis: {
          show: false,
          type: 'value',
          startAngle: 180, //极坐标初始角度
          endAngle:0,
          splitLine: {
            show: false,
          },
        },
        barMaxWidth: 10, //圆环宽度
        radiusAxis: {
          show: false,
          type: 'category',
        },
        //圆环位置和大小
        polar: {
          center: ['50%', '80%'],
          radius: '170%',
        },
        series: [
          {
            type: 'bar',
            stack: '测试',
            data: [
              {
                //上层圆环，显示数据
                value: chartData.num,
                name: 'sdfasdf',
                itemStyle: {
                  color: new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(1, 0, 0, 0, [
                    {
                      offset: 1,
                      color: chartData.colors[0],
                    },
                    {
                      offset: 0.5,
                      color: chartData.colors[1],
                    },
                    {
                      offset: 0,
                      color: chartData.colors[2],
                    },
                  ]),
                },
              },
            ],
            barGap: '-100%', //柱间距离,上下两层圆环重合
            coordinateSystem: 'polar',
            roundCap: true, //顶端圆角从 v4.5.0 开始支持
            z: 2, //圆环层级，同zindex
          },
          {
            //下层圆环，显示最大值
            type: 'bar',
            data: [
              {
                value: chartData.total,
                itemStyle: {
                  color: {
                    //图形渐变颜色方法，四个数字分别代表，右，下，左，上，offset表示0%到100%
                    type: 'linear',
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0,
                    x2: 1, //从左到右 0-1
                    y2: 0,
                    colorStops: [
                      {
                        offset: 0,
                        color: chartData.bgColor,
                      },
                      {
                        offset: 1,
                        color: chartData.bgColor,
                      },
                    ],
                  },
                },
              },
            ],
            barGap: '-100%',
            coordinateSystem: 'polar',
            roundCap: true,
            z: 1,
          },
          {
            stack: '测试',
            type: 'bar',
            data: [0.01],
            showBackground: false,
            coordinateSystem: 'polar',
            roundCap: true,
            z: 100,
            barWidth: 10,
            itemStyle: {
              color: chartData.textColor,
              borderColor: chartData.textColor,
              borderWidth: 8,
            },
          },
          {
            name: '数据',
            type: 'gauge',
            startAngle: 210,
            endAngle: -30,
            radius: '70%',
            min: 0,
            max: chartData.total,
            splitNumber: 1,
            axisLine: {
              show: false,
            },
            center: ["50%", "82%"],
            //仪表盘文字
            axisLabel: {
              show: true,
              textStyle: {
                fontSize: 16,
                color: chartData.textColor,
                fontWeight: 600,
                padding: -55
              },
            }, //刻度标签。
            axisTick: {
              show: false,
            }, //刻度样式
            splitLine: {
              show: false,
            }, //分隔线样式
            pointer: {
              show: false,
            },
            title: {
              show: false,
            },
            detail: {
              valueAnimation: true,
              width: '60%',
              borderRadius: 8,
              offsetCenter: [0, '-45%'],
              fontSize: 30,
              fontWeight: '400',
              formatter: '{value}', // %文字大小调整
              color: chartData.textColor
            },
            data: [
              {
                value: chartData.num,
              },
            ],
          },
          {
            name: '单位',
            type: 'gauge',
            //  center: ['20%', '50%'],
            radius: '70%',
            axisLine: {
              show: false,
            },
            //仪表盘文字
            axisLabel: {
              show: false,
            }, //刻度标签。
            axisTick: {
              show: false,
            }, //刻度样式
            splitLine: {
              show: false,
            }, //分隔线样式
            detail: {
              show: false,
            },
            pointer: {
              show: false,
            },
            title: {
              show: false,
            },
            data: [
              {
                value: chartData.total,
              },
            ],
          },
        ],
      })
    },
    startAnimation() {
      this.chart.dispose()
      this.initChart()
      // this.chartData.num = 0
      // let that = this
      // setTimeout(function () {
      //   that.chartData.num = that.num
      // }, 500)
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div ref="bar" class="bar-chart" :style="{height: '100%', width: '100%'}"  @mouseover="mouseover" @mouseout="mouseout" />
</template>
<script>
import * as echarts from 'echarts'
import resize from '../../../charts/mixins/resize'
export default {
  name: "lineCharts",
  mixins: [resize],
  props: {
    chartData: {
      type: Object,
      default: () => ({})
    },
    activetab:{
      type: Number,
      default: 1
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      chart: null,
      index:0,
      dataZoom:{
        startValue:0,
        endValue:20,
      },
      setInterval:null,
      setInterval2:null,
    }
  },
  watch: {
    // 监听 chartData 的变化
    chartData: {
      deep: true,
      handler(newData) {
        if (newData && Object.keys(newData).length > 0) {
          this.dataZoom = {
            startValue:0,
            endValue:20,
          }
        }
      }
    },
    activetab:{
      deep: true,
      handler(newData) {
        if (newData) {
          this.dataZoom = {
            startValue:0,
            endValue:20,
          }
        }
      }
    },
  },
  mounted() {
    this.initChart()
    let that = this
    this.setInterval = setInterval(() => {
      this.startAnimation();
    }, 3000);
    this.setInterval2 = setInterval(() => {
      that.chart.dispose()
      that.initChart()
    }, 30000);
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    clearInterval(this.setInterval);
    clearInterval(this.setInterval2);
    if (this.chart !== null) {
      this.chart.dispose()
    }
  },
  methods: {
    mouseover() {
      clearInterval(this.setInterval);
      clearInterval(this.setInterval2);
    },
    mouseout() {
      let that = this
      this.setInterval = setInterval(() => {
        this.startAnimation();
      }, 3000);
      this.setInterval2 = setInterval(() => {
        that.chart.dispose()
        that.initChart()
      }, 30000);
    },
    initChart() {
      this.chart = echarts.init(this.$refs.bar)
      this.setOptions()
    },
    setOptions() {
      const that = this
      let yDatas = []
      let typeNmae = ''
      let unit = ''
      let selColor = []
      if (this.activetab==1){
        yDatas.push(that.chartData.yDatas_wd)
        typeNmae = '温度'
        unit = '℃'
        selColor.push("rgba(18, 140, 255, 1)")
      }
      if (this.activetab==2){
        yDatas.push(that.chartData.yDatas_sd)
        typeNmae = '湿度'
        unit = 'RH'
        selColor.push("rgba(97,239,166, 1)")
      }
      if (this.activetab==3){
        yDatas.push(that.chartData.yDatas_pm25)
        typeNmae = 'PM2.5'
        unit = 'μg/m³'
        selColor.push("rgba(255,189,48, 1)")
      }
      if (this.activetab==4){
        yDatas.push(that.chartData.yDatas_pm10)
        typeNmae = 'PM10'
        unit = 'μg/m³'
        selColor.push("rgba(255,84,85, 1)")
      }
      if (this.activetab==5){
        yDatas.push(that.chartData.yDatas_gz)
        typeNmae = '光照'
        unit = 'Lux'
        selColor.push("rgba(35,255,255, 1)")
      }
      let names = ['温度','湿度','PM2.5','PM10','光照',]
      let units = ['℃','RH','μg/m³','μg/m³','Lux']
      this.chart.setOption({
        grid:{  // 布满div
          top:"50px",
          left:"50px",
          right:"25px",
          bottom:'30px'
        },
        tooltip: {
          trigger: 'axis',
          backgroundColor:'rgba(0,0,0,0.7)',
          borderWidth: 0,
          textStyle:{
            color:'#fff'
          },
          confine:true,
          axisPointer: {
            // Use axis to trigger tooltip
            type: 'shadow' // 'shadow' as default; can also be 'line' or 'shadow'
          },
          formatter: function(params) {
            var res = '<div><p>教室编号：' + params[0].name + '</p>'
            for (let i=0;i<5;i++){
              res += '<p style="text-align: left">' + names[i]+ '：' +  params[0].value + units[i] + '</p></div>'
            }
            return res;
          },
        },
        legend: {
          type: 'scroll',
          data: names,
          pageIconColor:'#fff',
          pageIconInactiveColor:'#6b6b6b',
          pageTextStyle:{
            color:'#fff'
          },
          textStyle: {
            color: "rgba(255, 255, 255, 1)"
          },
          top:18,
          right: 30,
          itemWidth: 16,
          itemHeight: 5
        },
        xAxis: {
          type: "category",
          data: that.chartData.xDatas,
          axisLine:{
            lineStyle:{
              color:'#fff'
            }
          },
          axisTick: {
            show: false
          },
        },
        yAxis: {
          axisLine:{
            lineStyle:{
              color:'#fff'
            }
          },
          splitLine: {
            show: true,
            lineStyle: {
              color:'#9f9f9f',
              type: 'dashed',
              width: 0.8
            }
          }
        },
        series: [
          {
            data: that.chartData.yDatas_wd,
            name:names[0],
            type: "line",
            smooth:true,
            symbol: "circle",
            symbolSize: 4,
            itemStyle: {
              color: (params)=>{
                if (params.value>=20&&params.value<=25){
                  return 'rgba(18, 140, 255, 1)'
                }else{
                  return '#FF3030'
                }
              }
            },
            areaStyle: {
              normal: {
                //颜色渐变函数 前四个参数分别表示四个位置依次为左、下、右、上
                color: new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                  {
                    offset: 0,
                    color: 'rgba(18, 140, 255, 1)', // 0% 处的颜色
                  },
                  {
                    offset: 1,
                    color: "rgba(18, 140, 255, 0)", // 100% 处的颜色
                  },
                ]), //背景渐变色
              }
            },
            lineStyle:{
              type:'solid',
              color: 'rgba(18, 140, 255, 1)',
            }
          },
          {
            data: that.chartData.yDatas_sd,
            name:names[1],
            type: "line",
            smooth:true,
            symbol: "circle",
            symbolSize: 4,
            itemStyle: {
              // color:selColor[i]
              color: (params)=>{
                if (params.value>=30&&params.value<=60){
                  return 'rgba(97,239,166, 1)'
                }else{
                  return '#FF3030'
                }
              }
            },
            areaStyle: {
              normal: {
                //颜色渐变函数 前四个参数分别表示四个位置依次为左、下、右、上
                color: new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                  {
                    offset: 0,
                    color: 'rgba(97,239,166, 1)', // 0% 处的颜色
                  },
                  {
                    offset: 1,
                    color: "rgba(97, 239, 166, 0)", // 100% 处的颜色
                  },
                ]), //背景渐变色
              }
            },
            lineStyle:{
              type:'solid',
              color: 'rgba(97,239,166, 1)',
            }
          },
          {
            data: that.chartData.yDatas_pm25,
            name:names[2],
            type: "line",
            smooth:true,
            symbol: "circle",
            symbolSize: 4,
            itemStyle: {
              // color:selColor[i]
              color: (params)=>{
                if (params.value>75){
                  return '#FF3030'
                }else{
                  return 'rgba(255,189,48, 1)'
                }
              }
            },
            areaStyle: {
              normal: {
                //颜色渐变函数 前四个参数分别表示四个位置依次为左、下、右、上
                color: new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                  {
                    offset: 0,
                    color: 'rgba(255,189,48, 1)', // 0% 处的颜色
                  },
                  {
                    offset: 1,
                    color: "rgba(255,189,48, 0)", // 100% 处的颜色
                  },
                ]), //背景渐变色
              }
            },
            lineStyle:{
              type:'solid',
              color: 'rgba(255,189,48, 1)',
            }
          },
          {
            data: that.chartData.yDatas_pm10,
            name:names[3],
            type: "line",
            smooth:true,
            symbol: "circle",
            symbolSize: 4,
            itemStyle: {
              // color:selColor[i]
              color: (params)=>{
                if (params.value>150){
                  return '#FF3030'
                }else{
                  return 'rgba(186, 85, 211, 1)'
                }
              }
            },
            areaStyle: {
              normal: {
                //颜色渐变函数 前四个参数分别表示四个位置依次为左、下、右、上
                color: new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                  {
                    offset: 0,
                    color: 'rgba(186, 85, 211, 1)', // 0% 处的颜色
                  },
                  {
                    offset: 1,
                    color: "rgba(186, 85, 211, 0)", // 100% 处的颜色
                  },
                ]), //背景渐变色
              }
            },
            lineStyle:{
              type:'solid',
              color: 'rgba(186, 85, 211, 1)',
            }
          },
          {
            data: that.chartData.yDatas_gz,
            name:names[4],
            type: "line",
            smooth:true,
            symbol: "circle",
            symbolSize: 4,
            itemStyle: {
              // color:selColor[i]
              color: (params)=>{
                if (params.value>=30&&params.value<=60){
                  return 'rgba(35,255,255, 1)'
                }else{
                  return '#FF3030'
                }
              }
            },
            areaStyle: {
              normal: {
                //颜色渐变函数 前四个参数分别表示四个位置依次为左、下、右、上
                color: new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                  {
                    offset: 0,
                    color: 'rgba(35,255,255, 1)', // 0% 处的颜色
                  },
                  {
                    offset: 1,
                    color: "rgba(35,255,255, 0)", // 100% 处的颜色
                  },
                ]), //背景渐变色
              }
            },
            lineStyle:{
              type:'solid',
              color: 'rgba(35,255,255, 1)',
            }
          },
        ]
      })
    },
    startAnimation() {
      this.chart.dispatchAction({
        type: 'showTip',
        seriesIndex: 1,
        dataIndex: this.index,
      });
      if (this.index>(this.chartData.xDatas.length-2)){
        this.index = 0
      }else {
        this.index++
      }
    },
    // scrollData(){
    //   this.setInterval = setInterval(() => {
    //     if (this.dataZoom.endValue==this.chartData.xDatas.length-1){
    //       this.dataZoom.startValue=0
    //       this.dataZoom.endValue=19
    //     }else{
    //       this.dataZoom.startValue++
    //       this.dataZoom.endValue++
    //     }
    //     this.setOptions()
    //   }, 1000);
    // },
    setOn() {
      this.chart.dispose()
      this.initChart()
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
    <div class="head">
        <div class="time">{{ currentDateTime }}</div>
        <div class="list">
            <div class="item">
              <div class="itemBox">
                <div class="num">{{ totalNum }}</div>
                <div class="item-bottom"></div>
              </div>
              <div class="text"><span class="text-one">{{ total }}</span><span class="text-two">{{ unit }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="item">
                  <div class="itemBox">
                    <div class="num">{{ todayNum }}</div>
                    <div class="item-bottom"></div>
                  </div>
              <div class="text"><span class="text-one">{{ today }}</span><span class="text-two">{{ unit }}</span></div>
            </div>
            <div class="item item-center">
                <div class="center-icon"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="item">
              <div class="itemBox">
                <div class="num">{{ signNum }}</div>
                <div class="item-bottom"></div>
              </div>
              <div class="text"><span class="text-one">{{ sign }}</span><span class="text-two">{{ units }}</span></div>
            </div>
            <div class="item">
              <div class="itemBox">
                <div class="num">{{ idleNum }}</div>
                <div class="item-bottom"></div>
              </div>
              <div class="text"><span class="text-one">{{ idle }}</span><span class="text-two">{{ units }}</span></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="head-bottom"></div>
    </div>
</template>
<script>
import moment from 'moment';
export default {
    props: {
        unit: {//单位次
            type: String,
            default: ''
        },
        units: {//个
            type: String,
            default: ''
        },
        total: {//总预约数
            type: String,
            default: ''
        },
        totalNum: {//数量
            type: String,
            default: ''
        },
        today: {//今日
            type: String,
            default: ''
        },
        todayNum: {//数量
            type: String,
            default: ''
        },
        sign: {//签到
            type: String,
            default: ''
        },
        signNum: {//签到数量
            type: String,
            default: ''
        },
        idle: {//座位
            type: String,
            default: ''
        },
        idleNum: {//空闲座位数量
            type: String,
            default: '0/50'
        },
    },
    data() {
        return {
            currentDateTime: ''
        }
    },
    methods: {
        updateDateTime() {
            this.currentDateTime = moment().format('YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss');
        }
    },
    mounted() {
        this.updateDateTime();
        setInterval(() => {
            this.updateDateTime();
        }, 1000);
    },
}
</script>

<template>
  <div class="content">
    <div class="contentTitle" @dblclick="dboubleClick">
      <span>设备看板</span>
    </div>
    <div class="contentBox">
      <div class="infoBox">
          <Tab :unitone="'/个'" :unittwo="'/个'" :unitthree="'/个'" :unitfour="'/个'" :total="'设备数量'" :totalNum="Number(statistics.total)" :today="'采集器数量'"
               :todayNum="Number(statistics.collectorNum)" :sign="'空开在线数量'" :signNum="statistics.onlinePower==0?0:`${statistics.onlinePower}/${statistics.totalPower}`" :idle="'门锁在线数量'"
               :idleNum="`${statistics.onlineLock}/${statistics.totalLock}`"></Tab>
      </div>
      <div class="scrollBox">
        <div class="environmentalMonitoring">
          <line-charts ref="environmental" v-if="chartData" :activetab="activetab" :chart-data="chartData"/>
          <div v-else class="null-div">
            <img  class="null-img" src="@assets/images/nodata.png">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="bottomBox">
          <div class="EquipmentDistribution">
            <bar-charts v-if="barchartData" :chart-data="barchartData"></bar-charts>
            <div v-else class="null-div">
              <img  class="null-img" src="@assets/images/nodata.png">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="batteryDeficit">
            <div class="batteryDeficitNum">
              <gauge-charts v-if="gaugeChartsData" :chart-data="gaugeChartsData"></gauge-charts>
              <div class="shortagesNumber" v-if="gaugeChartsData">
                <span>电池亏电数量</span>
                <img src="@/assets/images/equipment/shadowRed.png">
              </div>
              <div v-else class="null-div">
                <img  class="null-img" src="@assets/images/nodata.png">
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="lockTotal">
              <div class="lockNum">
                <span class="lock">{{lockTotal}}</span>
              </div>
<!--              <span class="bottonSpan">门锁数量</span>-->
              <div class="lockNumber">
                <span>门锁数量</span>
                <img src="@/assets/images/safeIcon/yylxBot.png">
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="normalNum">
              <gauge-charts v-if="normalChartsData" :chart-data="normalChartsData"></gauge-charts>
              <div class="normalNumber" v-if="normalChartsData">
                <span>电池正常数量</span>
                <img src="@/assets/images/equipment/shadowGreen.png">
              </div>
              <div v-else class="null-div">
                <img  class="null-img" src="@assets/images/nodata.png">
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

          <div class="card-panel" >
            <div class="card-panel-icon-wrapper icon-people">
              <svg-icon icon-class="lock" class-name="card-panel-icon" />
            </div>
            <div class="card-panel-description">
              <div class="card-panel-text">
                在线门锁
              </div>
              <count-to :start-val="0" :end-val="deviceNums.onLockNum" :duration="3000" class="card-panel-num" />
            </div>
          </div>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
    </el-card>
    <el-card>
      <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
        <el-col :span="1.5">
          <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" :inline="true" label-width="100px">
            <el-form-item label="教室编号" prop="roomId">
              <el-input v-model="queryParams.roomId"  placeholder="请输入教室编号" clearable />
            </el-form-item>
            <el-form-item label="房间类型" prop="isSchedule">
              <el-select v-model="queryParams.isSchedule">
                <el-option
                  label="全部"
                  value=""
                />
                <el-option
                  label="实验室"
                  value="1"
                />
                <el-option
                  label="非实验室"
                  value="0"
                />
              </el-select>
            </el-form-item>
            <el-form-item>
              <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search"  @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>

            :key="item.key"
            :class="selectedButtons.includes(item.key)?'selected-color':''"
            @click="clickButton(item.key)"
            :type="selectedButtons.includes(item.key)?'primary':''"
          >
          <span :class="(item.key!=='ykjs'&&item.count>0) ? 'danger-color' : selectedButtons.includes(item.key) ? 'white-color' :'undanger-color'">
            {{ item.name }}&nbsp;&nbsp;{{item.count}}
          </span>
          </el-button>
        </el-col>

        </el-table-column>
        <el-table-column label="门状态" align="center" prop="sfkm"  width="70"/>
        <el-table-column label="电状态" align="center" prop="sftd"  width="70"/>
        <el-table-column label="电池亏电" align="center" prop="sfkd"  width="80">
          <template v-slot="scope">
            <span :class="scope.row.sfkd==='是'?'danger-color':''">{{scope.row.sfkd}}</span>
          </template>

            <span :class="scope.row.wdgj==='Y'?'danger-color':''">{{scope.row.wd_num}}</span>
          </template>
        </el-table-column>

            <span :class="scope.row.sdgj==='Y'?'danger-color':''">{{scope.row.sd_num}}</span>
          </template>
        </el-table-column>
        <el-table-column label="水浸" align="center" prop="sfsj" width="70">
          <template v-slot="scope">
            <span :class="scope.row.sfsj==='是'?'danger-color':''">{{scope.row.sfsj}}</span>
          </template>
        </el-table-column>
        <el-table-column label="烟感" align="center" prop="sfyg" width="70">
          <template v-slot="scope">
            <span :class="scope.row.sfyg==='是'?'danger-color':''">{{scope.row.sfyg}}</span>
          </template>
        </el-table-column>
        <el-table-column label="光照(lx)" align="center" prop="gz_num" width="80">
          <template v-slot="scope">
            <span :class="scope.row.gzgj==='Y'?'danger-color':''">{{scope.row.gz_num}}</span>
          </template>
        </el-table-column>
        <el-table-column label="pm2.5(ug/m³)" align="center" prop="pm25_num" width="120">
          <template v-slot="scope">
            <span :class="scope.row.pm25gj==='Y'?'danger-color':''">{{scope.row.pm25_num}}</span>
          </template>
        </el-table-column>
        <el-table-column label="pm10(ug/m³)" align="center" prop="pm10_num" width="120">
          <template v-slot="scope">
            <span :class="scope.row.pm10gj==='Y'?'danger-color':''">{{scope.row.pm10_num}}</span>
          </template>
        </el-table-column>
      </el-table>
      <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                  @pagination="getList" />
    </el-card>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  listOverview,
} from "@/api/jufe/room";
import {getDeviceNums, getRoomStatusNums} from '@/api/index'
import CountTo from "vue-count-to";
export default {
  name: "RoomOverView",
  components: {CountTo},
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        roomId:null,
        isSchedule:null,
        querys:null
      },
      buttons:[],
      selectedButtons:[],
      deviceNums:{
        powerNum:0,
        onPowerNum:0,
        lockNum:0,
        onLockNum:0
      }
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getButtons()
    this.getList()
    this.getDeviceNums()
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询计划列列表 */
    getDeviceNums(){
      getDeviceNums().then(res=>{
        this.deviceNums = res.data
        console.log(this.deviceNums)
      })
    },
    getButtons(){
      getRoomStatusNums().then(res=>{
        this.buttons = res.data
      })
    },
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listOverview(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      }).catch(e=>{
        this.loading = false
      });
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.querys = this.selectedButtons.join(",")
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    resetQuery() {
      this.selectedButtons = []
      this.queryParams.querys = null
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery()
    },
    clickButton(key){
      if(this.selectedButtons.includes(key)){
        this.selectedButtons.splice(this.selectedButtons.indexOf(key),1)
      }else{
        this.selectedButtons.push(key)
      }
      this.handleQuery()
    }
  }
};
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
.danger-color {
  color:red;
}
.undanger-color {
  color:black;
}
.white-color {
  color: #fff !important;
}
.selected-color {
  background:#1890FF;
}
.panel-group {
  margin-top: 18px;
  .card-panel-col {
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }
  .card-panel {

<template>
  <div class="content">
    <div class="contentTitle" @dblclick="dboubleClick">
      <img src="@/assets/images/equipment/equipment.png">
    </div>
    <div class="contentBox">
      <div class="infoBox">
          <Tab :unitone="'/个'" :unittwo="'/个'" :unitthree="'/个'" :unitfour="'/个'" :total="'设备数量'" :totalNum="Number(statistics.total)" :today="'采集器数量'"
               :todayNum="Number(statistics.collectorNum)" :sign="'空开在线数量'" :signNum="statistics.onlinePower==0?0:`${statistics.onlinePower}/${statistics.totalPower}`" :idle="'门锁在线数量'"
               :idleNum="`${statistics.onlineLock}/${statistics.totalLock}`"></Tab>
      </div>
      <div class="scrollBox">
        <div class="environmentalMonitoring"  @mouseover="mouseover" @mouseout="mouseout">
          <div class="tabList">
          <span :class="['tabbox', { active: activetab === item.value }]"
                v-for="(item,index) in tabList"
                @click="changeTab(item)"
                :key="index">{{item.name}}</span>
          </div>
          <line-charts v-if="chartData" :activetab="activetab" :chart-data="chartData"/>
          <div v-else class="null-div">
            <img  class="null-img" src="@assets/images/nodata.png">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="bottomBox">
          <div class="EquipmentDistribution">
            <bar-charts v-if="barchartData" :chart-data="barchartData"></bar-charts>
            <div v-else class="null-div">
              <img  class="null-img" src="@assets/images/nodata.png">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="batteryDeficit">
            <div class="batteryDeficitNum">
              <gauge-charts v-if="gaugeChartsData" :chart-data="gaugeChartsData"></gauge-charts>
              <div class="shortagesNumber">
                <span>电池亏电数量</span>
                <img src="@/assets/images/equipment/shadowRed.png">
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="lockTotal">
              <div class="lockNum">
                <span class="lock">200</span>
              </div>
              <span class="bottonSpan">门锁数量</span>
            </div>
            <div class="normalNum">
              <gauge-charts v-if="normalChartsData" :chart-data="normalChartsData"></gauge-charts>
              <div class="normalNumber">
                <span>电池正常数量</span>
                <img src="@/assets/images/equipment/shadowGreen.png">
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import Tab from '@/views/safeBoard/components/Tab.vue' // 头部
import lineCharts from './components/lineCharts'
import barCharts from './components/barCharts'
import gaugeCharts from './components/gaugeCharts'
import {sbtj,hjjc,sbfb,dcks} from "@/api/jufe/room";
import Vue from 'vue'
import fullscreen from 'vue-fullscreen'
Vue.use(fullscreen)
export default {
  name: "index",
  components:{barCharts, lineCharts,gaugeCharts,Tab},
  data(){
    return{
      statistics:{
        total:0,
        collectorNum:0,
        onlinePower:0,
        totalPower:0,
        onlineLock:0,
        totalLock:0,
      },
      activetab:1,
      tabList:[
        {
          name:'温度',
          value:1
        },
        {
          name:'湿度',
          value:2
        },
        {
          name:'PM2.5',
          value:3
        },
        {
          name:'PM10',
          value:4
        },
        {
          name:'光照',
          value:5
        },
      ],
      chartData:null,
      barchartData:null,
      gaugeChartsData:null,
      normalChartsData:null,
      interval:null,
    }
  },
  mounted() {
    this.getList()
    this.interval = setInterval(() => {
      this.startAnimation();
    }, 3000);
  },
  methods:{
    // 双击全屏
    dboubleClick() {
      this.$store.commit('SET_MENUFLAG')
      // 事件总线起始页面
      this.$fullscreen.toggle()
    },
    mouseover() {
      clearInterval(this.interval);
    },
    mouseout() {
      this.interval = setInterval(() => {
        this.startAnimation();
      }, 3000);
    },
    getList(){
      this.statistics = {
        total:125,
        collectorNum:3,
        onlinePower:2,
        totalPower:5,
        onlineLock:3,
        totalLock:4,
      }
      let dataDemo = {
        "msg": "string",
        "code": 0,
        "data": {
          "xDatas": ['101', '102', '103', '201', '202', '203','301', '302', '302', '304','401', '402', '402', '404','501', '502', '503', '504','505','506','1301', '1302', '1303', '1201', '1202', '1203','3101', '3102', '3102', '3104','1401', '1402', '1403', '1404','1501', '1502', '1503', '1504','1505','1506'],
          "yDatas_gz": [54, 66, 47, 86, 32, 59, 34, 43, 16, 42, 99, 24, 24, 10,14,12,53,23,65,64,54, 25, 45, 24, 64, 35, 42, 45, 4, 5, 63, 54, 24, 62,25,54,52,25,43,26],
          "yDatas_sd": [14, 42, 14, 43, 24, 2, 43,56, 32, 3, 54, 24, 63, 26,61,74,2,5,74,35,2, 3, 21, 23, 13, 2, 14,24, 12, 32, 42, 34, 21, 42,13,13,2,32,1,21],
          "yDatas_pm10": [5, 6, 7, 8, 3, 9, 10,7, 7, 7, 3, 6, 2, 5,2,6,7,3,2,6,4, 10, 3, 8, 2, 4, 10,4, 7, 3, 3, 6, 5, 2,2,6,4,6,2,9],
          "yDatas_wd": [24, 25, 24, 14, 31, 31, 24,24, 27, 28, 32, 33, 13, 23,13,25,24,15,15,31,31, 28, 24, 25, 31, 24, 27,27, 31, 28, 32, 33, 13, 23,13,25,24,15,15,31],
          "yDatas_pm25": [1.2, 3.0, 2.1, 0.5, 2.9, 4.5, 9.6,1.6, 4.3, 7.1, 4.5, 6.2, 4.2, 1.6,1.4,1.5,4.5,3.6,2.7,7.4,1.2, 3.0, 2.1, 0.5, 2.9, 4.5, 9.6,1.6, 4.3, 7.1, 4.5, 6.2, 4.2, 1.6,1.4,1.5,4.5,3.6,2.7,7.4]
        }
      }
      this.chartData = dataDemo.data
      let dataDemo2 = {
        "msg": "string",
        "code": 0,
        "data": {
          "xDatas": ['301','302','303','304'],
          "yDatas_lock": [1,4,6,3],
          "yDatas_collector": [0,4,2,6],
          "yDatas_power": [4,2,1,0]
        }
      }
      this.barchartData = dataDemo2.data
      let dataDemo3 = {
        "msg": "string",
        "code": 0,
        "data": [
          {
            value:1
          },
          {
            value:2
          },
          {
            value:3
          },
        ]
      }
      this.gaugeChartsData = {
        total:dataDemo3.data[2].value,
        num:dataDemo3.data[0].value,
        colors:[
          'rgba(36, 2, 2, 0.5)',
          'rgba(172, 38, 39, 0.55)',
          'rgba(255, 84, 85, 0.69)'
        ],
        bgColor:'rgba(14, 42, 97, 1)',
        textColor:'rgba(255, 84, 85, 1)'
      }
      this.normalChartsData = {
        total:dataDemo3.data[2].value,
        num:dataDemo3.data[1].value,
        colors:[
          'rgba(10, 47, 86, 0.5)',
          'rgba(42, 167, 173, 0.6)',
          'rgba(65, 255, 232, 0.69)'
        ],
        bgColor:'rgba(14, 42, 97, 1)',
        textColor:'rgba(70, 253, 237, 1)'
      }
    },
    changeTab(item){
      this.activetab = item.value
    },
    startAnimation() {
      if (this.activetab>4){
        this.activetab = 1
      }else {
        this.activetab++
      }
    }
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <div class="icons-container">
    <aside>
      <a href="#" target="_blank">Add and use
      </a>
    </aside>
    <el-tabs type="border-card">
      <el-tab-pane label="Icons">
        <div v-for="item of svgIcons" :key="item">
          <el-tooltip placement="top">
            <div slot="content">
              {{ generateIconCode(item) }}
            </div>
            <div class="icon-item">
              <svg-icon :icon-class="item" class-name="disabled" />
              <span>{{ item }}</span>
            </div>
          </el-tooltip>
        </div>
      </el-tab-pane>
      <el-tab-pane label="Element-UI Icons">
        <div v-for="item of elementIcons" :key="item">
          <el-tooltip placement="top">
            <div slot="content">
              {{ generateElementIconCode(item) }}
            </div>
            <div class="icon-item">
              <i :class="'el-icon-' + item" />
              <span>{{ item }}</span>
            </div>
          </el-tooltip>
        </div>
      </el-tab-pane>
    </el-tabs>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import svgIcons from './svg-icons'
import elementIcons from './element-icons'
export default {
  name: 'Icons',
  data() {
    return {
      svgIcons,
      elementIcons
    }
  },
  methods: {
    generateIconCode(symbol) {
      return `<svg-icon icon-class="${symbol}" />`
    },
    generateElementIconCode(symbol) {
      return `<i class="el-icon-${symbol}" />`
    }
  }
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>

  margin: 10px 20px 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  .icon-item {

    float: left;

    pointer-events: none;
