<template>
    <div class="reservation">
        <div class="content" ref="bmyy" @mouseover="mouseover" @mouseout="mouseout"></div>
    </div>
</template>
<script>
import resize from '../../charts/mixins/resize.js'
import * as echarts from 'echarts'
export default {
    name: 'barCharts',
    mixins: [resize],
    props: {
        barData: {
            type: Array,
            default: () => ({})
        },
    },
    data() {
        return {
            chart: null,
            // 控制轮播
            index: 0,
            timer: null,
            newData: null
        }
    },
    watch: {
        // 监听 barData 的变化
        barData: {
            deep: true,
            handler(newData) {
                if (newData && Object.keys(newData).length > 0) {
                    this.setOptions()
                }
            }
        },
    },
    methods: {
        // 绘制立方柱体
        cube() {
            // 绘制左侧面
            const CubeLeft = echarts.graphic.extendShape({
                shape: {
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0
                },
                buildPath: function (ctx, shape) {
                    const xAxisPoint = shape.xAxisPoint
                    const c0 = [shape.x, shape.y]
                    const c1 = [shape.x - 8, shape.y - 8]
                    const c2 = [xAxisPoint[0] - 8, xAxisPoint[1] - 8]
                    const c3 = [xAxisPoint[0], xAxisPoint[1]]
                    ctx.moveTo(c0[0], c0[1]).lineTo(c1[0], c1[1]).lineTo(c2[0], c2[1]).lineTo(c3[0], c3[1]).closePath()
                }
            })
            // 绘制右侧面
            const CubeRight = echarts.graphic.extendShape({
                shape: {
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0
                },
                buildPath: function (ctx, shape) {
                    const xAxisPoint = shape.xAxisPoint
                    const c1 = [shape.x, shape.y]
                    const c2 = [xAxisPoint[0], xAxisPoint[1]]
                    const c3 = [xAxisPoint[0] + 13, xAxisPoint[1] - 4]
                    const c4 = [shape.x + 13, shape.y - 4]
                    ctx.moveTo(c1[0], c1[1]).lineTo(c2[0], c2[1]).lineTo(c3[0], c3[1]).lineTo(c4[0], c4[1]).closePath()
                }
            })
            // 绘制顶面
            const CubeTop = echarts.graphic.extendShape({
                shape: {
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0
                },
                buildPath: function (ctx, shape) {
                    const c1 = [shape.x, shape.y]
                    const c2 = [shape.x + 13, shape.y - 4]
                    const c3 = [shape.x + 5, shape.y - 12]
                    const c4 = [shape.x - 8, shape.y - 8]
                    ctx.moveTo(c1[0], c1[1]).lineTo(c2[0], c2[1]).lineTo(c3[0], c3[1]).lineTo(c4[0], c4[1]).closePath()
                }
            })
            // 注册三个面图形
            echarts.graphic.registerShape('CubeLeft', CubeLeft)
            echarts.graphic.registerShape('CubeRight', CubeRight)
            echarts.graphic.registerShape('CubeTop', CubeTop)
        },
        initChart() {
            this.chart = echarts.init(this.$refs.bmyy)
            this.setOptions()
        },
        setOptions() {
            // console.log(this.barData, 'xxxxxxxx')
            let x = []
            let y = []
            this.barData.forEach((item) => {
                x.push(item.stu_work_name || '未知'),
                    y.push(item.total_class_hours || 0)
            });
            this.newData = {
                xDatas: x,
                ydata: y
            }
            const that = this
            this.chart.setOption({
                tooltip: {
                    trigger: 'axis',
                    backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.7)',
                    borderWidth: 0,
                    textStyle: {
                        color: '#fff'
                    },
                    formatter: function (params) {
                        var res = '<div><p>' + '教师姓名：' + params[0].name + '</p>'
                        res += '<p style="text-align: left">' + '教师课时：' + params[0].value + '学时' + '</p></div>'
                        return res;
                    },
                },
                grid: {  // 布满div
                    top: "40px",
                    left: "50px",
                    right: "25px",
                    bottom: "16px",
                    containLabel: true
                },
                dataZoom: [
                    {
                        type: 'slider',
                        show: true,
                        xAxisIndex: [0],
                        start: 0,
                        end: 3,
                        handleSize: 8,
                        height: 10,
                        bottom: 10,
                        fillerColor: 'rgba(54, 162, 235, 0.2)',
                        borderColor: 'rgba(54, 162, 235, 1)',
                        borderWidth: 1
                    }
                ],
                xAxis: {
                    type: 'category',
                    data: that.newData.xDatas,
                    axisLine: {
                        show: true,
                    },
                    axisTick: {
                        show: false,
                        length: 9,
                        alignWithLabel: true,
                        lineStyle: {
                            color: '#7DFFFD'
                        }
                    },
                    axisLabel: {
                        show: true,
                        fontSize: 12,
                        color: '#fff'
                    }
                },
                yAxis: [
                    {
                        // interval: 250,
                        type: 'value',
                        min: 0,
                        name: '单位：学时',
                        axisLine: {
                            show: false,
                            lineStyle: {
                                color: 'white'
                            }
                        },
                        splitLine: {
                            show: true,
                            lineStyle: {
                                type: 'dashed',
                                color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)'
                            }
                        },
                        axisTick: {
                            show: false
                        },
                        axisLabel: {
                            show: true,
                            fontSize: 12
                        },
                        boundaryGap: ['20%', '20%']
                    }
                ],
                series: [
                    {
                        type: 'custom',
                        renderItem: (params, api) => {
                            const location = api.coord([api.value(0), api.value(1)])
                            var color =
                                new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                                    {
                                        offset: 0,
                                        color: '#5cc4eb'
                                    },
                                    {
                                        offset: 0.8,
                                        color: '#21658c'
                                    }
                                ])
                            return {
                                type: 'group',
                                children: [
                                    {
                                        type: 'CubeLeft',
                                        shape: {
                                            api,
                                            x: location[0],
                                            y: location[1],
                                            xAxisPoint: api.coord([api.value(0), 0])
                                        },
                                        style: {
                                            fill: (color = new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                                                {
                                                    offset: 0,
                                                    color: '#5cc4eb'
                                                },
                                                {
                                                    offset: 0.8,
                                                    color: '#21658c'
                                                }
                                            ]))
                                        }
                                    },
                                    {
                                        type: 'CubeRight',
                                        shape: {
                                            api,
                                            x: location[0],
                                            y: location[1],
                                            xAxisPoint: api.coord([api.value(0), 0])
                                        },
                                        style: {
                                            fill: (color = new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                                                {
                                                    offset: 0,
                                                    color: '#048fd4'
                                                },
                                                {
                                                    offset: 0.8,
                                                    color: '#195684'
                                                }
                                            ]))
                                        }
                                    },
                                    {
                                        type: 'CubeTop',
                                        shape: {
                                            x: location[0],
                                            y: location[1],
                                        },
                                        style: {
                                            fill: (color = new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                                                {
                                                    offset: 0,
                                                    color: '#65c7ec'
                                                },
                                                {
                                                    offset: 1,
                                                    color: '#65c7ec'
                                                }
                                            ]))
                                        }
                                    }
                                ]
                            }
                        },
                        data: that.newData.ydata
                    }
                ]
            })
        },
        autoTooltip() {
            // console.log('执行了吗', this.index)
            this.chart.dispatchAction({
                type: 'showTip',
                seriesIndex: 0,
                dataIndex: this.index,
            });
            if (this.index > (this.newData.xDatas.length - 2)) {
                this.index = 0
            } else {
                this.index++
            }
        },
        mouseover() {
            clearInterval(this.timer);
        },
        mouseout() {
            this.timer = setInterval(() => {
                this.autoTooltip();
            }, 3000);
        },
    },
    mounted() {
        this.cube()
        this.initChart()
        this.timer = setInterval(() => {
            this.autoTooltip();
        }, 3000);
    },
    beforeDestroy() {
        // 销毁图表实例，释放内存
        if (this.chart !== null) {
            this.chart.dispose()
        }
        clearInterval(this.timer)
    },
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
.reservation {
    width: 100%;
    height: 84%;
    position: relative;
    .content {
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
    }
    .nodata {
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        display: flex;
        justify-content: center;
        align-items: center;
    }
}
</style>
<template>
    <div class="reservation">
        <div class="content" ref="kcap" @mouseover="mouseover" @mouseout="mouseout">
        </div>
    </div>
</template>
<script>
import resize from '../../charts/mixins/resize.js';
import * as echarts from 'echarts'
export default {
    name: 'barCharts',
    mixins: [resize],
    props: {
        kcapData: {
            type: Array,
            default: () => ({})
        },
        kcapDataBar: {
            type: Array,
            default: []
        }
    },
    data() {
        return {
            prev: false,
            three: true,
            next: false,
            chart: null,
            timer: null,
            isScatter: true, // 标记当前图表类型
        }
    },
    watch: {
        // 监听 kcapData 的变化
        kcapData: {
            deep: true,
            handler(newData) {
                if (newData && Object.keys(newData).length > 0) {
                    this.initChart()
                }
            }
        },
    },
    methods: {
        initChart() {
            const scatterData = this.prepareData();
            if (!this.chart) {
                this.chart = echarts.init(this.$refs.kcap)
            }
            this.setOptions(scatterData)
        },
        setOptions(scatterData) {
            const option = {
                tooltip: {
                    trigger: 'item',
                    borderWidth: 0,
                    backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.7)',
                    formatter: this.isScatter ? params => {
                        const { value } = params;
                        const date = scatterData.dates[value[0]];
                        const timeRange = scatterData.timeRanges[value[1]];
                        const count = value[2];
                        return `日期：${params.name}<br/>时间段：${timeRange}<br/>课程数量: ${count}`;
                    } : (val) => {
                        return `日期：${val.name}<br/>总课程数量：${val.value}`
                    },
                    textStyle: {
                        align: 'left',
                        color: '#fff'
                    }
                },
                grid: {  // 布满div
                    top: "38px",
                    left: "15px",
                    right: "45px",
                    bottom: "13px",
                    containLabel: true
                },
                xAxis: {
                    type: 'category',
                    data: ['星期一', '星期二', '星期三', '星期四', '星期五', '星期六', '星期日'],
                    axisLine: {
                        show: false,
                        lineStyle: {
                            color: '#7DFFFD'
                        }
                    },
                    axisTick: {
                        show: false,
                        length: 9,
                        alignWithLabel: true,
                        lineStyle: {
                            color: '#7DFFFD'
                        }
                    },
                    axisLabel: {
                        show: true,
                        fontSize: 12,
                        color: '#fff'
                    }
                },
                yAxis: {
                    type: this.isScatter ? 'category' : 'value',
                    data: this.isScatter ? scatterData.timeRanges : '',
                    name: this.isScatter ? '时间段                               ' : '课程总数',
                    axisTick: {
                        show: false
                    },
                    axisLine: {
                        show: false,
                        lineStyle: {
                            color: 'white'
                        }
                    },
                    splitLine: {
                        show: true,
                        lineStyle: {
                            type: 'dashed',
                            color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)'
                        }
                    },
                },
                series: [{
                    type: this.isScatter ? 'scatter' : 'bar',
                    data: this.isScatter ? scatterData.points : this.kcapDataBar,
                    barWidth: '40%',
                    symbolSize: function (data) {
                        if (data[2] < 20) {
                            return data[2] * 2
                        } else if (data[2] >= 20) {
                            return 35
                        }
                    },
                    universalTransition: {
                        enabled: true,
                        delay: function () {
                            return Math.random() * 400;
                        }
                    },
                    itemStyle: {
                        color: this.isScatter ? function (data) {
                            // console.log(data)
                            const count = data.data[2]
                            if (count >= 0 && count <= 5) {
                                return '#ECF6FF';
                            } else if (count > 5 && count <= 10) {
                                return '#D9ECFF';
                            } else if (count > 10 && count <= 15) {
                                return '#C6E2FF';
                            } else if (count > 15 && count <= 20) {
                                return '#79BBFF';
                            } else {
                                return '#1890FF';
                            }
                        } : '#5470C6',
                        normal: this.isScatter ? {
                            color: function (data) {
                                // console.log(data.data[2],'000000000000')
                                const count = data.data[2]
                                if (count >= 0 && count <= 5) {
                                    return '#ECF6FF';
                                } else if (count > 5 && count <= 10) {
                                    return '#D9ECFF';
                                } else if (count > 10 && count <= 15) {
                                    return '#C6E2FF';
                                } else if (count > 15 && count <= 20) {
                                    return '#79BBFF';
                                } else {
                                    return '#1890FF';
                                }
                            }, // 点的基础颜色
                            shadowColor: '#C6E2FF',
                            shadowBlur: 10, // 阴影模糊度，数值越大越模糊，发光效果越明显
                            shadowOffsetX: 0, // 阴影在X方向的偏移量
                            shadowOffsetY: 0 // 阴影在Y方向的偏移量
                        } : {
                            color: '#79BBFF'
                        }
                    }
                }]
            };
            this.chart.setOption(option);
        },
        // 格式化数据
        prepareData() {
            const dates = Object.keys(this.kcapData[0]);
            var timeRanges
            let longestArray = []
            let maxLength = 0;
            for (let i = 0; i < dates.length; i++) {
                const dayData = this.kcapData[0][dates[i]];
                if (dayData.length > maxLength) {
                    maxLength = dayData.length;
                    longestArray = dayData;
                }
            }
            timeRanges = [...new Set(longestArray.map(item => item.time_range))];
            const points = [];
            dates.forEach((date, dateIndex) => {
                this.kcapData[0][date].forEach(item => {
                    const timeIndex = timeRanges.indexOf(item.time_range);
                    if (timeIndex !== -1) {
                        points.push([dateIndex, timeIndex, item.count]); // Scale count for better visibility
                    }
                });
            });
            return { dates, timeRanges, points };
        },
        startChartSwitching() {
            this.intervalId = setInterval(() => {
                this.isScatter = !this.isScatter; // 切换图表类型
                const scatterData = this.prepareData();
                this.setOptions(scatterData);
            }, 30000); // 每秒切换一次
        },
        mouseover() {
            clearInterval(this.intervalId); // 清除定时器
        },
        mouseout() {
            this.startChartSwitching()
        }
    },
    mounted() {
        this.initChart()
        this.startChartSwitching()
    },
    beforeDestroy() {
        // 销毁图表实例，释放内存
        if (this.chart !== null) {
            this.chart.dispose()
        }
        clearInterval(this.intervalId); // 清除定时器
    },
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
.reservation {
    width: 100%;
    height: 92%;
    position: relative;
    .content {
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
    }
}
::v-deep .head .tab {
    display: none;
}
</style>
<template>
    <div class="reservation">
        <div class="content" ref="kczb" @mouseover="mouseover" @mouseout="mouseout">
        </div>
    </div>
</template>
<script>
import * as echarts from 'echarts'
import resize from '../../charts/mixins/resize'
export default {
    name: "coursePieCharts",
    mixins: [resize],
    props: {
        pieData: {
            type: Array,
            default: () => ({})
        },
        totalHours: {
            type: Number,
            default: 0
        }
    },
    data() {
        return {
            chart: null,
            interval: null,
            index: 0,
            empty: false
        }
    },
    watch: {
        // 监听 pieData 的变化
        pieData: {
            deep: true,
            handler(newData) {
                if (newData && Object.keys(newData).length > 0) {
                    this.setOptions()
                }
            }
        },
    },
    mounted() {
        this.initChart()
        this.index = 0
        this.interval = setInterval(() => {
            this.startAnimation();
        }, 3000);
    },
    beforeDestroy() {
        if (this.chart !== null) {
            this.chart.dispose()
        }
        clearInterval(this.interval)
    },
    methods: {
        mouseover() {
            clearInterval(this.interval);
            this.chart.dispatchAction({
                type: 'downplay',
                seriesIndex: 0,
                dataIndex: this.index == 0 ? this.pieData.length - 1 : this.index - 1,
            });
        },
        mouseout() {
            this.interval = setInterval(() => {
                this.startAnimation();
            }, 3000);
        },
        initChart() {
            this.chart = echarts.init(this.$refs.kczb)
            this.setOptions()
        },
        setOptions() {
            const that = this
            let color = ['#349eff', '#61efa6', '#ffbd30', '#ff5455', '#6e38db', '#ff7200', '#23ffff',]
            let seriesData = []
            this.pieData.map((v, i) => {
                seriesData.push({
                    value: v.total_class_hours
                    , name: v.dept_name, itemStyle: { color: color[i % 12] }
                })
            })
          this.chart.setOption({
                grid: {  // 布满div
                    top: "70px",
                    left: "50px",
                    right: "25px",
                    bottom: "20px"
                },
                tooltip: {
                    trigger: 'none',
                    confine: true,
                },
                legend: {
                    type: 'scroll',
                    orient: 'vertical',
                    width: '35%',
                    height: '60%',
                    padding: [45, 100, 0, 0],
                    right: '0',
                    icon: 'rect',
                    pageIconColor: '#fff',
                    pageIconInactiveColor: '#6b6b6b',
                    itemWidth: 20,
                    itemHeight: 5,
                    pageIconSize: [10, 10],
                    textStyle: {
                        color: '#fff',
                    },
                    pageTextStyle: {
                        color: '#fff'
                    },
                },
                series: [
                    {
                        type: 'pie',
                        center: ['38%', '50%'],
                        radius: ['45%', '70%'],
                        // left: -50,
                        itemStyle: {
                            borderRadius: 3
                        },
                        avoidLabelOverlap: true,
                        label: {
                            normal: {
                                show: true,
                                position: 'center', // 展示在中间位置
                                formatter: () => {
                                    return `{a|${this.totalHours}}\n{b|课程数量(个)}`
                                },
                                rich: {
                                    a: {
                                        fontFamily: 'Microsoft YaHei',
                                        fontWeight: 'bold',
                                        fontSize: 28,
                                        color: '#ffffff'
                                    },
                                    b: {
                                        fontFamily: 'Microsoft YaHei',
                                        fontWeight: 300,
                                        fontSize: 16,
                                        color: '#ffffff',
                                        opacity: 0.5
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        },
                        labelLine: {
                            show: true,
                            length: 30,
                            length2: 0
                        },
                        labelLayout: {
                            verticalAlign: 'middle',
                        },
                        data: seriesData
                    },
                    {
                        type: 'pie',
                        center: ['38%', '50%'],
                        radius: ['45%', '70%'],
                        // left: -50,
                        itemStyle: {
                            borderRadius: 3
                        },
                        avoidLabelOverlap: true,
                        label: {
                            show: false,
                            fontSize: 14,
                            padding: [0, 0],
                            position: 'outside',
                            formatter: '{b}：' + '{c}' + '%',
                        },
                        emphasis: {
                            label: {
                                show: true,
                                fontSize: 14,
                                fontWeight: 'bold',
                                color: 'inherit',
                            }
                        },
                        labelLine: {
                            show: true,
                            length: 30,
                            length2: 0
                        },
                        labelLayout: {
                            verticalAlign: 'middle',
                        },
                        data: seriesData
                    }
                ]
            })
        },
        startAnimation() {
            this.chart.dispatchAction({
                type: 'downplay',
                seriesIndex: 1,
                dataIndex: this.index == 0 ? this.pieData.length - 1 : this.index - 1,
            });
            this.chart.dispatchAction({
                type: 'highlight',
                seriesIndex: 1,
                dataIndex: this.index,
            });
            if (this.index > (this.pieData.length - 2)) {
                this.index = 0
            } else {
                this.index++
            }
        }
    }
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
.reservation {
    width: 100%;
    height: 84%;
    position: relative;
    .content {
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
    }
}
.nodata {
    width: 100%;
    height: calc(100% - 16%);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}
::v-deep .head .tab {
    display: none;
}
</style>
<template>
    <div class="content">
        <div class="title" @dblclick="toggleFullScreen">
            <span>课程看板</span>
        </div>
        <div class="continer">
            <div class="tab">
                <Tab :unitone="'/个'" :unittwo="'/人'" :unitthree="'/人'" :unitfour="'/个'" :total="'课程数量'"
                    :totalNum="totalNum" :today="'学生数量'" :todayNum="todayNum" :sign="'教师数量'" :signNum="signNum"
                    :idle="'开课单位数量'" :idleNum="idleNum"></Tab>
            </div>
            <div class="charts">
                <div class="charts-left">
                    <div class="courseHead">
                        <div class="tab">
                            <div class="head-tab prev" :class="{ 'has-bg': prev, 'stop': start }" @click="prevWeek">上一周
                            </div>
                            <div class="head-tab tab-week" :class="{ 'has-bg': now }" @mouseover="mouseoverNow"
                                @mouseout="mouseoutNow">第{{ week }}周
                                <div v-show="flage" class="now-time">{{ startTime }} 至 {{ endTime }}</div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="head-tab next" :class="{ 'has-bg': next, 'stop': last }" @click="nextWeek">下一周
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <courseCharts v-loading="isLoading" v-if="kcapDataBar" :kcapData="kcapData"
                        :kcapDataBar="kcapDataBar"></courseCharts>
                    <div v-else style="height: 91%;"  v-loading="isLoading" class="nodata">
                        <img src="~@assets/images/nodata.png" alt="">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="charts-right">
                    <div class="right-box kczb">
                        <div class="head">
                        </div>
                        <PieChart v-if="pieData" :pieData="pieData" :totalHours="totalHours"></PieChart>
                        <div v-else class="nodata">
                            <img src="~@assets/images/nodata.png" alt="">
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="right-box ksph">
                        <div class="head">
                        </div>
                        <barCharts v-if="barData" :barData="barData"></barCharts>
                        <div v-else class="nodata">
                            <img src="~@assets/images/nodata.png" alt="">
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</template>
<script>
import Tab from '../safeBoard/components/Tab.vue'
import barCharts from './components/barCharts.vue';
import courseCharts from './components/courseCharts.vue';
import PieChart from './components/pieCharts.vue';
import ShareChartsHead from '../../views/safeBoard/components/ShareChartsHead.vue'
import { getDataStatistics, getCourseProportion, getTeacherCourseProportion, getCourseArrangement, getCurrentWeek, getWeekLastAndEndTime } from '@/api/courseBoard/course.js'
import Vue from 'vue'
import fullscreen from 'vue-fullscreen'
import { start } from 'nprogress';
Vue.use(fullscreen)
export default {
    components: {
        Tab,
        barCharts,
        courseCharts,
        PieChart,
        ShareChartsHead
    },
    data() {
        return {
            intervalYylx: null,
            intervalJslx: null,
            totalNum: '',
            todayNum: '',
            signNum: '',
            idleNum: '',
            // 课程占比
            totalHours: null,
            // 课时排行
            barData: null,
            pieData: [],
            kcapData: null,
            kcapDataBar: null,
            // 课程安排
            prev: false,
            now: true,
            next: false,
            flage: false,
            endTime: null,
            startTime: null,
            week: null,
            weekFlage: null,
            end: true,
            start: false,
            last: false,
            isLoading: false
        }
    },
    methods: {
        getHeadData() {
            // 头部数据
            getDataStatistics().then(res => {
                // console.log(res,'头')
                if (res.code == 200) {
                    this.totalNum = res.data.courseCount
                    this.todayNum = res.data.studentCount
                    this.signNum = res.data.teacherCount
                    this.idleNum = res.data.openCourseDeptCount
                }
            })
        },
        // 课程占比
        getKczb() {
            getCourseProportion().then(res => {
                this.pieData = []
                if (res.code == 200) {
                    this.totalHours = res.data[0].total_class_hours;
                    res.data.slice(1).forEach((item) => {
                        if (item != null) {
                            const deptName = item.dept_name || '未知部门';
                            const hours = item.total_class_hours;
                            const percentage = (hours / this.totalHours) * 100;
                            this.pieData.push({
                                dept_name: deptName,
                                total_class_hours: `${percentage.toFixed(2)}`
                            });
                        }
                    })
                }
            })
        },
        // 教室课时
        getJskc() {
            getTeacherCourseProportion().then(res => {
                this.barData = res.data
            })
        },
        // 课程安排
        getKcap() {
            getCourseArrangement(this.weekFlage).then(res => {
                if (res.code == 200) {
                    this.isLoading = false
                }
                if (res.data.lastWeek) {
                    this.end = false
                    this.last = true
                    this.$message({
                        message: '本周是最后一周',
                        type: 'warning'
                    });
                } else {
                    this.last = false
                }
                if (res.data.firstWeek) {
                    this.start = true
                    this.$message({
                        message: '本周是第一周',
                        type: 'warning'
                    });
                } else {
                    this.start = false
                }
                const data = res.data.courseArrangement
                const extractedData = [];
                data.forEach(function (item) {
                    const key = Object.keys(item)[0];
                    if (["1", "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7"].includes(key)) {
                        extractedData.push(item[key]);
                    }
                });
                // 柱状图数据
                extractedData.every((item) => {
                    if (item > 0) {
                        this.kcapDataBar = extractedData
                    } else {
                        this.kcapDataBar = null
                    }
                })
                // this.kcapDataBar = extractedData
                let newKcapData = {};
                // 遍历原始数据，提取每个星期的数据并组成新的结构
                Object.keys(data).forEach((key) => {
                    const item = data[key];
                    const day = Object.keys(item).find((k) => k !== "1" && k !== "2" && k !== "3" && k !== "4" && k !== "5" && k !== "6" && k !== "7");
                    if (!newKcapData[day]) {
                        newKcapData[day] = [];
                    }
                    newKcapData[day] = newKcapData[day].concat(item[day]);
                });
                // console.log(newKcapData, 'aaaaaaa')
                this.kcapData = [newKcapData];
                // console.log(this.kcapData)
            })
        },
        // 查询当前周
        getCurrentWeekData() {
            getCurrentWeek().then(res => {
                // console.log(res, '当前周')
                if (res.code == 200) {
                    this.endTime = res.data.endTime
                    this.startTime = res.data.startTime
                    this.week = res.data.week
                    this.weekFlage = res.data.week
                    this.getKcap()
                }
            })
        },
        // 上一周
        prevWeek() {
            this.isLoading = true
            if (this.weekFlage > 1) {
                this.end = true
                this.prev = true
                this.now = false
                this.next = false
                this.weekFlage -= 1
                this.getKcap()
                this.getDate()
            } else {
                this.$message({
                    message: '已经是第一周',
                    type: 'warning'
                });
            }
        },
        nextWeek() {
            this.isLoading = true
            // console.log(this.end)
            if (this.end) {
                this.prev = false
                this.now = false
                this.next = true
                this.weekFlage += 1
                this.getKcap()
                this.getDate()
            } else {
                this.$message({
                    message: '已经是最后一周',
                    type: 'warning'
                });
            }
        },
        // 获取日期
        getDate() {
            getWeekLastAndEndTime(this.weekFlage).then(res => {
                this.endTime = res.data.endTime
                this.startTime = res.data.startTime
                this.week = res.data.week
                // }
            })
        },
        mouseoverNow() {
            this.flage = true
        },
        mouseoutNow() {
            this.flage = false
        },
        // 双击全屏
        toggleFullScreen() {
            this.$store.commit('SET_MENUFLAG')
            // 事件总线起始页面
            this.$fullscreen.toggle()
        }
    },
    mounted() {
        this.getHeadData()
        this.getJskc()
        this.getKczb()
        // this.getKcap()
        this.getCurrentWeekData()
    },
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>

        // 查询当前周
        getCurrentWeekData() {
            getCurrentWeek().then(res => {
                // console.log(res, '当前周')
                if (res.code == 200) {
                    this.endTime = res.data.endTime
                    this.startTime = res.data.startTime
                    this.week = res.data.week
                    this.getKcap()
                }
            })
        },
        // 上一周
        prevWeek() {
            if (this.week > 1) {
                this.end = true
                this.prev = true
                this.now = false
                this.next = false
                this.week -= 1
                this.getKcap()
                this.getDate()
            }
        },
        // 下一周
        nextWeek() {
            console.log(this.end)
            if (this.end) {
                this.prev = false
                this.now = false

                this.getDate()

        getDate() {

                this.endTime = res.data.endTime
                this.startTime = res.data.startTime
                if (!res.data.endTime) {
                    this.end = false
                }

            this.flage = true
        },
        mouseoutNow() {
            this.flage = false
        },

            this.$store.commit('SET_MENUFLAG')
            // 事件总线起始页面
            this.$fullscreen.toggle()
        }

        this.getHeadData()

        // this.getKcap()

<script>
import echarts from 'echarts'
require('echarts/theme/macarons') // echarts theme
import resize from './mixins/resize'
const animationDuration = 6000
export default {
  mixins: [resize],
  props: {
    className: {
      type: String,
      default: 'chart'
    },
    width: {
      type: String,
      default: '100%'
    },
    height: {
      type: String,
      default: '300px'
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      chart: null
    }
  },
  mounted() {
    this.$nextTick(() => {
      this.initChart()
    })
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    if (!this.chart) {
      return
    }
    this.chart.dispose()
    this.chart = null
  },
  methods: {
    initChart() {
      this.chart = echarts.init(this.$el, 'macarons')
      this.chart.setOption({
        tooltip: {
          trigger: 'axis',
          axisPointer: { // 坐标轴指示器，坐标轴触发有效
            type: 'shadow' // 默认为直线，可选为：'line' | 'shadow'
          }
        },
        grid: {
          top: 10,
          left: '2%',
          right: '2%',
          bottom: '3%',
          containLabel: true
        },
        xAxis: [{
          type: 'category',
          data: ['Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', 'Fri', 'Sat', 'Sun'],
          axisTick: {
            alignWithLabel: true
          }
        }],
        yAxis: [{
          type: 'value',
          axisTick: {
            show: false
          }
        }],
        series: [{
          name: 'pageA',
          type: 'bar',
          stack: 'vistors',
          barWidth: '60%',
          data: [79, 52, 200, 334, 390, 330, 220],
          animationDuration
        }, {
          name: 'pageB',
          type: 'bar',
          stack: 'vistors',
          barWidth: '60%',
          data: [80, 52, 200, 334, 390, 330, 220],
          animationDuration
        }, {
          name: 'pageC',
          type: 'bar',
          stack: 'vistors',
          barWidth: '60%',
          data: [30, 52, 200, 334, 390, 330, 220],
          animationDuration
        }]
      })
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div :class="className" :style="{height:height,width:width}" />
</template>
<script>
import echarts from 'echarts'
require('echarts/theme/macarons') // echarts theme
import resize from './mixins/resize'
export default {
  mixins: [resize],
  props: {
    className: {
      type: String,
      default: 'chart'
    },
    width: {
      type: String,
      default: '100%'
    },
    height: {
      type: String,
      default: '350px'
    },
    autoResize: {
      type: Boolean,
      default: true
    },
    chartData: {
      type: Object,
      required: true
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      chart: null
    }
  },
  watch: {
    chartData: {
      deep: true,
      handler(val) {
        this.setOptions(val)
      }
    }
  },
  mounted() {
    this.$nextTick(() => {
      this.initChart()
    })
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    if (!this.chart) {
      return
    }
    this.chart.dispose()
    this.chart = null
  },
  methods: {
    initChart() {
      this.chart = echarts.init(this.$el, 'macarons')
      this.setOptions(this.chartData)
    },
    setOptions({ expectedData, actualData } = {}) {
      this.chart.setOption({
        xAxis: {
          data: ['Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', 'Fri', 'Sat', 'Sun'],
          boundaryGap: false,
          axisTick: {
            show: false
          }
        },
        grid: {
          left: 10,
          right: 10,
          bottom: 20,
          top: 30,
          containLabel: true
        },
        tooltip: {
          trigger: 'axis',
          axisPointer: {
            type: 'cross'
          },
          padding: [5, 10]
        },
        yAxis: {
          axisTick: {
            show: false
          }
        },
        legend: {
          data: ['expected', 'actual']
        },
        series: [{
          name: 'expected', itemStyle: {
            normal: {
              color: '#FF005A',
              lineStyle: {
                color: '#FF005A',
                width: 2
              }
            }
          },
          smooth: true,
          type: 'line',
          data: expectedData,
          animationDuration: 2800,
          animationEasing: 'cubicInOut'
        },
        {
          name: 'actual',
          smooth: true,
          type: 'line',
          itemStyle: {
            normal: {
              color: '#3888fa',
              lineStyle: {
                color: '#3888fa',
                width: 2
              },
              areaStyle: {
                color: '#f3f8ff'
              }
            }
          },
          data: actualData,
          animationDuration: 2800,
          animationEasing: 'quadraticOut'
        }]
      })
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <el-row :gutter="40" class="panel-group">
    <el-col :xs="12" :sm="12" :lg="6" class="card-panel-col">
      <div class="card-panel" @click="handleSetLineChartData('newVisitis')">

<template>
  <el-row :gutter="40" class="panel-group">
    <el-col :xs="12" :sm="12" :lg="4" class="card-panel-col">
      <div class="card-panel"  >
        <div class="card-panel-description">
          <div class="card-panel-text">

          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </el-col>
    <el-col :xs="12" :sm="12" :lg="4" class="card-panel-col">

          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </el-col>
    <el-col :xs="12" :sm="12" :lg="4" class="card-panel-col">

          <div class="card-panel-text">

          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </el-col>
    <el-col :xs="12" :sm="12" :lg="4" class="card-panel-col">
      <div class="card-panel" >
        <div class="card-panel-description">
          <div class="card-panel-text">
            已领取
          </div>
          <div style=" text-align: center">
            <count-to :start-val="0" :end-val="getStatusCount('4')" :duration="3600" class="card-panel-num" />
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </el-col>
    <el-col :xs="12" :sm="12" :lg="4" class="card-panel-col">
      <div class="card-panel"  >
        <div class="card-panel-description">
          <div class="card-panel-text">
            已拒绝
          </div>
          <div style=" text-align: center">
              <count-to :start-val="0" :end-val="getStatusCount('0')" :duration="3600" class="card-panel-num" />
          </div> 
        </div>
      </div>
    </el-col>
    <el-col :xs="12" :sm="12" :lg="4" class="card-panel-col">
      <div style="margin-top: -50px;">
        <el-radio-group v-model="dateType" @change="selectType">
          <el-radio-button label="-1">全部</el-radio-button>
          <el-radio-button label="1">今日</el-radio-button>
          <el-radio-button label="2">本月</el-radio-button>
        </el-radio-group>
      </div>
    </el-col>
  </el-row>

<script>
import CountTo from 'vue-count-to'
export default {
  components: {
    CountTo
  },
  props: {
    dataCount:{
      type: Array,
      required: true
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      dateType: '-1',
    }
  },
  methods: {
    handleSetLineChartData(type) {
      this.$emit('handleSetLineChartData', type)
    },
    getStatusCount(type){
      let countInfo = 0;
      this.dataCount.forEach((item,index)=>{
        if (type == item.status) {
          countInfo = item.countInfo;
          return;
        }
      }); 
      return countInfo;
    },
    selectType(){
       let type = this.dateType === '-1' ? undefined : this.dateType;
       this.$emit('handleSetLineChartData', type)
    }
  }
}
</script>

<script>
import * as echarts from 'echarts'
require('echarts/theme/macarons') // echarts theme
import resize from './mixins/resize'
export default {
  mixins: [resize],
  props: {
    className: {
      type: String,
      default: 'chart'
    },
    width: {
      type: String,
      default: '100%'
    },
    height: {
      type: String,
      default: '300px'
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      chart: null
    }
  },
  mounted() {
    this.$nextTick(() => {
      this.initChart()
    })
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    if (!this.chart) {
      return
    }
    this.chart.dispose()
    this.chart = null
  },
  methods: {
    initChart() {
      this.chart = echarts.init(this.$el, 'macarons')
      this.chart.setOption({
        tooltip: {
          trigger: 'item',
          formatter: '{a} <br/>{b} : {c} ({d}%)'
        },
        legend: {
          left: 'center',
          bottom: '10',
          data: ['Industries', 'Technology', 'Forex', 'Gold', 'Forecasts']
        },
        series: [
          {
            name: 'WEEKLY WRITE ARTICLES',
            type: 'pie',
            roseType: 'radius',
            radius: [15, 95],
            center: ['50%', '38%'],
            data: [
              { value: 320, name: 'Industries' },
              { value: 240, name: 'Technology' },
              { value: 149, name: 'Forex' },
              { value: 100, name: 'Gold' },
              { value: 59, name: 'Forecasts' }
            ],
            animationEasing: 'cubicInOut',
            animationDuration: 2600
          }
        ]
      })
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div :class="className" :style="{height:height,width:width}" />
</template>
<script>
import echarts from 'echarts'
require('echarts/theme/macarons') // echarts theme
import resize from './mixins/resize'
const animationDuration = 3000
export default {
  mixins: [resize],
  props: {
    className: {
      type: String,
      default: 'chart'
    },
    width: {
      type: String,
      default: '100%'
    },
    height: {
      type: String,
      default: '300px'
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      chart: null
    }
  },
  mounted() {
    this.$nextTick(() => {
      this.initChart()
    })
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    if (!this.chart) {
      return
    }
    this.chart.dispose()
    this.chart = null
  },
  methods: {
    initChart() {
      this.chart = echarts.init(this.$el, 'macarons')
      this.chart.setOption({
        tooltip: {
          trigger: 'axis',
          axisPointer: { // 坐标轴指示器，坐标轴触发有效
            type: 'shadow' // 默认为直线，可选为：'line' | 'shadow'
          }
        },
        radar: {
          radius: '66%',
          center: ['50%', '42%'],
          splitNumber: 8,
          splitArea: {
            areaStyle: {
              color: 'rgba(127,95,132,.3)',
              opacity: 1,
              shadowBlur: 45,
              shadowColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,.5)',
              shadowOffsetX: 0,
              shadowOffsetY: 15
            }
          },
          indicator: [
            { name: 'Sales', max: 10000 },
            { name: 'Administration', max: 20000 },
            { name: 'Information Techology', max: 20000 },
            { name: 'Customer Support', max: 20000 },
            { name: 'Development', max: 20000 },
            { name: 'Marketing', max: 20000 }
          ]
        },
        legend: {
          left: 'center',
          bottom: '10',
          data: ['Allocated Budget', 'Expected Spending', 'Actual Spending']
        },
        series: [{
          type: 'radar',
          symbolSize: 0,
          areaStyle: {
            normal: {
              shadowBlur: 13,
              shadowColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,.2)',
              shadowOffsetX: 0,
              shadowOffsetY: 10,
              opacity: 1
            }
          },
          data: [
            {
              value: [5000, 7000, 12000, 11000, 15000, 14000],
              name: 'Allocated Budget'
            },
            {
              value: [4000, 9000, 15000, 15000, 13000, 11000],
              name: 'Expected Spending'
            },
            {
              value: [5500, 11000, 12000, 15000, 12000, 12000],
              name: 'Actual Spending'
            }
          ],
          animationDuration: animationDuration
        }]
      })
    }
  }
}
</script>

              label="ip"
              prop="ip"
              :rules="[{ required: true, message: 'ip不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isIP, message: '请输入正确ip！', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input  v-model="formItem.ip" />

          </el-form-item>

        <el-col :span="12"  >
          <el-form-item

          >

            <el-input-number v-model="formItem.maxTem" :step="0.1" :precision="1" :min="formItem.minTem?formItem.minTem:0" :max="100"/>

        <el-col :span="12"  >
          <el-form-item

            <el-input-number v-model="formItem.minTem" :step="0.1" :precision="1" :min="-40" :max="120"/>
          </el-form-item>

          >
            <el-input-number v-model="formItem.currentThreshold" :step="0.1" :precision="1" :min="-40" :max="120"/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12"  >
          <el-form-item
            label="双通道轮换控制"

        <el-col :span="12"  >

            label="双通道轮换控制时间"

          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
