<!--          <el-form-item-->
<!--            label="通道1控制状态"-->
<!--            prop="channelControlStatus1"-->
<!--            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '通道1控制状态不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"-->
<!--          >-->
<!--            <dict-select v-model="formItem.channelControlStatus1" dict-type="jufe_channel_control_status"/>-->
<!--          </el-form-item>-->
<!--        </el-col>-->
<!--        <el-col :span="12"  >-->
<!--          <el-form-item-->
<!--            label="通道2控制状态"-->
<!--            prop="channelControlStatus2"-->
<!--            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '通道2控制状态不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"-->
<!--          >-->
<!--            <dict-select v-model="formItem.channelControlStatus2" dict-type="jufe_channel_control_status"/>-->
<!--          </el-form-item>-->
<!--        </el-col>-->
<!--      </el-row>-->
    </el-form>
    <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
      <el-button  type="primary" :loading="saveLoading" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button  @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
</template>
<script>
import {
  add,update
} from "@/api/airconditioner/airconditioner";
import {isInt, isIP} from '@/utils/validate'
import { getToken } from '@/utils/auth'
import Treeselect from "@riophae/vue-treeselect";
export default {
  name: "AirConditionerAdd",
  components: {Treeselect},
  props:{
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default() {
        return { hidden: false, breadcrumb: true }
      }
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    title:{
      type:String,
      default:''
    },
    buildTreeData:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
      // 上传参数
      uploadPicUrl: {
        // 设置上传的请求头部
        headers: { Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken() },
        // 上传的地址 /网关/控制器
        url: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API + "/jufe/apksource/upload",
        // 上传的文件列表
        fileList: []
      },
      headers: {
        Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken(),
      },
    }
  },
  created() {
    if(this.formItem.id){
      this.uploadPicUrl.fileList.push(this.formItem.apkUrl)
    }
  },
  methods: {
    isIP,
    isInt:isInt,
    chooseRoom(node,nodeId){
      if(node.type==='room'){
        this.formItem.roomName = node.label
        this.formItem.roomId = node.code
      }
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.resetForm('form')
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['form'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          if (this.formItem.id) {
            // 修改
            update(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          } else {
            add(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          }
        }
      })
    },
    loadData() {
      this.$emit('loadData')
    },
    // 文件提交处理
    submitUpload() {
      this.$refs.uploadPicUrl.submit();
    },
    // 文件上传中处理
    handleFileUploadProgressPicUrl(event, file, fileList) {
      this.uploadPicUrl.isUploading = true;
    },
    // 文件上传成功处理
    handleFileSuccessPicUrl(response, file, fileList) {
      this.uploadPicUrl.isUploading = false;
      this.formItem.apkUrl = response.data.url;
    },
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery" :records.sync="records" :buildTreeData="buildTreeData"/>
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleUpdate()"
          v-hasPermi="['device:airconditioner:add']"
        >新增
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records">
      <el-table-column type="index" label="序号" align="center" width="50"/>
      <el-table-column label="教室编号" align="center" prop="roomId"/>
      <el-table-column label="教室名称" align="center" prop="roomName" width="120"/>
      <el-table-column label="空调名称" align="center" prop="name" width="120"/>
      <el-table-column label="IP" align="center" prop="ip" width="120"/>
      <el-table-column label="端口" align="center" prop="port" width="80"/>
      <el-table-column label="网关ID" align="center" prop="gateway" width="150"/>
      <el-table-column label="湿度" align="center" prop="hum" width="80"/>
      <el-table-column label="温度" align="center" prop="tem" width="80"/>
      <el-table-column label="空调控制器发射自定义红外" align="center" prop="customIremission" width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="空调通道1自动控制" align="center" prop="params.channelAutoControl1Name" width="80"/>
      <el-table-column label="空调通道2自动控制" align="center" prop="params.channelAutoControl2Name" width="80"/>
      <el-table-column label="湿度校准值" align="center" prop="humCalibration" width="90"/>
      <el-table-column label="温度校准值" align="center" prop="temCalibration" width="90"/>
      <el-table-column label="温度上限" align="center" prop="maxTem" width="80"/>
      <el-table-column label="温度下限" align="center" prop="minTem" width="80"/>
      <el-table-column label="空调温度自动控制回差" align="center" prop="temHysteresis" width="80"/>
      <el-table-column label="空调电流阈值" align="center" prop="currentThreshold" width="80"/>
      <el-table-column label="通道1电流" align="center" prop="electricCurrent1" width="80"/>
      <el-table-column label="通道2电流" align="center" prop="electricCurrent2" width="80"/>
      <el-table-column label="控制模式" align="center" prop="params.controlModelName" width="80"/>
      <el-table-column label="双通道轮换控制" align="center" prop="params.channelRotationControlName" width="80"/>
      <el-table-column label="双通道轮换控制时间设置（分钟）" align="center" prop="channelRotationControlTime" width="110"/>
      <el-table-column label="通道1控制状态" align="center" prop="params.channelControlStatus1Name" width="110"/>
      <el-table-column label="通道2控制状态" align="center" prop="params.channelControlStatus2Name" width="110"/>
      <el-table-column label="通道1运行状态" align="center" prop="params.runningStatus1Name" width="110"/>
      <el-table-column label="通道2运行状态" align="center" prop="params.runningStatus2Name" width="110"/>
      <el-table-column label="在线状态" align="center" prop="params.onlineStatusName" width="110"/>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" fixed="right" width="250">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)" v-hasPermi="['device:airconditioner:edit']">修改</el-button>
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-delete" @click="handleDelete(scope.row)" v-hasPermi="['device:airconditioner:remove']">删除</el-button>
          <el-dropdown size="mini" @command="(command) => handleCommand(command, scope.row)" trigger="click">
            <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-d-arrow-right">控制指令</el-button>
            <el-dropdown-menu slot="dropdown" >
              <el-dropdown-item command="RemoteCtrl"  >切换空调远程控制模式</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="RemoteHeatOn"  >远程开启空调制热</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="RemoteCoolOn"  >远程开启空调制冷</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="RemoteOff"  >远程关闭空调</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="AutoCtrl"  >切换空调自动控制模式</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="RotationEnabled"  >开启空调自动控制双机切换</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="RotationDisable"  >关闭空调自动控制双机切换</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="OneAutoCtrlOn"  >空调通道1开启自动控制</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="OneAutoCtrlOff"  >空调通道1关闭自动控制</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="TwoAutoCtrlOn"  >空调通道2开启自动控制</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="TwoAutoCtrlOff"  >空调通道2关闭自动控制</el-dropdown-item>
            </el-dropdown-menu>
          </el-dropdown>
          <el-dropdown size="mini" @command="(command) => handleCommand(command, scope.row)" trigger="click">
            <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-d-arrow-right">更多指令</el-button>
            <el-dropdown-menu slot="dropdown">
              <el-dropdown-item command="CustomIREmission"  >空调控制器发射自定义红外</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="RotationTime"  >空调自动控制双机时间</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="UpperLimitSet"  >空调自动控制模式温度上限设置</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="LowerLimitSet"  >空调自动控制模式温度下限设置</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="ReturnDiffSet"  >空调自动控制温度回差值设置</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="CurrentThr"  >空调电流阈值</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="TempComp"  >温度校准值</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="HumComp"  >湿度校准值</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="Timing"  >空调控制器时间校正</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="Restart"  >重启网关</el-dropdown-item>
            </el-dropdown-menu>
          </el-dropdown>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList"
    />
    <Add ref="add" v-if="addVisible" :visible.sync="addVisible" @loadData="getList" :form-item="formItem" :buildTreeData="buildTreeData"
         :title="title"
    />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { list, del,sendOrder } from '@/api/airconditioner/airconditioner'
import Search from './search'
import Add from './add'
import {tree} from "@/api/location/location";
export default {
  components: { Search, Add },
  name: 'AirConditioner',
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      addVisible: false,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        roomId: null,
        name:null,
      },
      formItem: {},
      title: '新增',
      buildTreeData:null
    }
  },
  created() {
    tree({ }).then(e=>{
      this.buildTreeData = e.data
    })
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true
      list(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        console.log(response.rows)
        this.records = response.rows
        this.total = response.total
        this.loading = false
      }).catch(e => {
        this.loading = false
      })
    },
    // 更多操作触发
    handleCommand(command, row) {
      const device1 = "AirConditioner"
      const device2 = "Gateway"
      const data = {
        device : null,
        cmd : command,
        id : row.id
      }
      if(command ==='Restart'){
        data.device = device2
      }else {
        data.device = device1
      }
      sendOrder(data).then(e=>{
      })
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1
      this.getList()
    },
    /** 新增&修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.title = '新增'
      this.showDetail = false
      if (row) {
        this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
        this.title = '修改'
      }
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const ids = row.id ;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确定删除?').then(function() {
        return del(ids);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.formItem = {
        id:null,
        roomId: null,
        roomName: null,
        name: null,
        ip: null,
        port: null,
        gateway: null,
        channelAutoControl1: null,
        channelAutoControl2: null,
        humCalibration: null,
        temCalibration: null,
        maxTem: null,
        minTem: null,
        temHysteresis: null,
        currentThreshold: null,
        controlModel: null,
        channelRotationControl: null,
        channelRotationControlTime: null,
        channelControlStatus1: null,
        channelControlStatus2: null
      }
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery" :records.sync="records"/>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records">
      <el-table-column type="index" label="序号" align="center" width="50"/>
      <el-table-column label="网关ID" align="center" prop="gateway"/>
      <el-table-column label="设备类型" align="center" prop="params.deviceName"/>
      <el-table-column label="设备指令" align="center" prop="params.cmdName"/>
      <el-table-column label="是否成功" align="center" prop="isSuccess"/>
      <el-table-column label="返回信息" align="center" prop="message"/>
      <el-table-column label="操作人" align="center" prop="createBy"/>
      <el-table-column label="操作时间" align="center" prop="createTime"/>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList"
    />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { list, del } from '@/api/airconditioner/airconditionerlog'
import Search from './search'
export default {
  components: { Search },
  name: 'AirConditionerLog',
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        versionNum: null,
      },
      formItem: {},
      title: '新增'
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true
      list(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows
        this.total = response.total
        this.loading = false
      }).catch(e => {
        this.loading = false
      })
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1
      this.getList()
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.formItem = {
        id:null,
        versionNum: null,
        apkUrl: null
      }
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" :inline="true" label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="版本号" prop="versionNum">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.versionNum"  placeholder="请输入版本号" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
export default {
  name: "AirConditionerSearch",
  components: {
    Treeselect
  },
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
    };
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.queryParams.dataRange = []
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>
<style scoped>
  .line-style{
    float: right;
    display: flex;
    margin-right: 20px;
  }
  .itemstyle{
    margin-left: 20px;
    margin-right: 20px;
  }
</style>
<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" :inline="true" label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item
      label="所属教室"
      prop="roomId"
    >
      <treeselect v-model="queryParams.roomId" :options="buildTreeData" :disable-branch-nodes="true"
                  placeholder="选择教室" style="width: 200px;" />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="名称" prop="name">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.name"  placeholder="请输入名称" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
export default {
  name: "AirConditionerSearch",
  components: {
    Treeselect
  },
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    },
    buildTreeData:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
    };
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.queryParams.dataRange = []
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <div>
  <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
    <el-form ref="form" :model="formItem" label-width="140px" :disabled="showDetail">
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="教室"
            prop="roomId"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '教室不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <treeselect v-model="formItem.roomId" :options="buildTreeData" :disable-branch-nodes="true"
                        placeholder="选择教室" :disabled="showDetail"
                        @select="selectRoom"
            />
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="设备编码"
            prop="code"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '设备编码不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.code" maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="设备名称"
            prop="name"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '设备名称不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.name" maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="IP"
            prop="ipCode"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: 'IP不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isIP, message: '请输入正确IP', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.ipCode"  maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="网关"
            prop="gateway"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '网关不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isIP, message: '请输入正确网关', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.gateway" maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12" >
          <el-form-item
            label="子网掩码"
            prop="mask"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '子网掩码不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isIP, message: '请输入正确子网掩码', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.mask" maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="mac"
            prop="mac"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: 'mac不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isMac, message: '请输入正确MAC', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.mac" maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row>
        <el-form-item
        >
          <el-table
            :data="formItem.items"
            style="width: 100%"
            max-height="520"
          >
          <el-table-column
            align="center"
            label="节点">
            <template v-slot="scope">
              <el-form-item
                label-width="0"
                :prop="'items.' + scope.$index + '.nodeId'"
                :rules="[
                  { required: true, message: '节点不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },
                  { validator: isInt, message: '请输入正确节点,节点为数字格式！', trigger: 'blur' }
                ]
              ">
                <el-input v-model="scope.row.nodeId" maxlength="2" show-word-limit/>
              </el-form-item>
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
            <el-table-column
              align="center"
              label="名称">
              <template v-slot="scope">
                <el-form-item
                  label-width="0"
                  :prop="'items.' + scope.$index + '.type'"
                  :rules="[
                    { required: true, message: '名称不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }
                  ]
                ">
                  <dict-select v-model="scope.row.type" dict-type="room_device_type"></dict-select>
                </el-form-item>
              </template>
            </el-table-column>
            <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" fixed="right" width="300" v-if="!showDetail">
              <template v-slot="scope">
                <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-delete"  @click="removeItem(scope.row)">删除节点</el-button>
              </template>
            </el-table-column>
          </el-table>
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" v-if="!showDetail" icon="el-icon-add" @click="addItem" >新增节点</el-button>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-row>
    </el-form>
    <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
      <el-button type="primary" v-if="!showDetail" :loading="saveLoading"  @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button v-if="!showDetail" @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  add,update
} from "@/api/devServiceCenter/roomDevice";
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
import {isInt,isIP,isMac} from '@/utils/validate'
export default {
  name: "CollectorAdd",
  components: {
    Treeselect
  },
  props:{
    buildTreeData:{
      type:Array,
      default(){
        return []
      }
    },
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default:{}
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    showDetail: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    title:{
      type:String,
      default:''
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
      mapVisable:false,
      groups:[],
      rooms:[]
    }
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    isInt:isInt,
    isIP:isIP,
    isMac:isMac,
    selectRoom(node,nodeId){
      if(node.type==='room'){
        this.formItem.roomName = node.label
        this.formItem.roomCode = node.code
      }
    },
    addItem(){
      this.formItem.items.push({
        type:null
      })
    },
    removeItem(row){
      this.formItem.items.splice(this.formItem.items.indexOf(row),1)
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.resetForm('form')
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['form'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          if (this.formItem.id) {
            // 修改
            update(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          } else {
            add(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          }
        }
      })
    },
    loadData() {
      this.$emit('loadData')
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery"
            :records.sync="records"
            :buildTreeData="buildTreeData"
            />
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleUpdate()"
          v-hasPermi="['device:collector:add']"
        >新增
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-setting"
          size="mini"
          @click="cancelSet()"
        >阈值设置
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
      <el-table-column type="index" label="序号" align="center" width="50" />
      <el-table-column label="设备编号" align="center" prop="code" width="200"/>
      <el-table-column label="设备名称" align="center" prop="name"  />
      <el-table-column label="教室编号" align="center" prop="roomId"  width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="所属教室" align="center" prop="roomName" />
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" fixed="right" width="300">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)" v-hasPermi="['device:collector:edit']">编辑</el-button>
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-search" @click="handleDetail(scope.row)">查看</el-button>
          <!-- <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleUpdateStatus(scope.row)"
                     v-hasPermi="['device:collector:edit']">{{scope.row.relayStatus=='1'?"停用":"启用"}}</el-button> -->
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
                     v-hasPermi="['device:collector:remove']">删除</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList" />
    <Add ref="add" v-if="addVisible" :visible.sync="addVisible"
         @loadData="getList"
         :form-item="formItem"
         :showDetail="showDetail"
         :title="title"
         :buildTreeData="buildTreeData"
    />
    <el-dialog v-if="setVisible" title="阈值设置" :visible.sync="setVisible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
      <el-form ref="setForm" :model="setItem" label-width="140px" >
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item
              label="最小温度"
              prop="minWd"
              :rules="[{ required: true, message: '最小温度不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isNumber, message: '请输入数字', trigger: 'blur' }]"
            >
              <el-input v-model="setItem.minWd" maxlength="6" style="width: 200px;">
                <el-button slot="append" >℃</el-button>
              </el-input>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item
              label="最大温度"
              prop="maxWd"
              :rules="[{ required: true, message: '最大温度不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isNumber, message: '请输入数字', trigger: 'blur' }]"
            >
              <el-input v-model="setItem.maxWd" maxlength="6" style="width: 200px;">
                <el-button slot="append" >℃</el-button>
              </el-input>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item
              label="最小湿度"
              prop="minSd"
              :rules="[{ required: true, message: '最小湿度不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isNumber, message: '请输入数字', trigger: 'blur' }]"
            >
              <el-input v-model="setItem.minSd" maxlength="6" style="width: 200px;">
                <el-button slot="append" >%rh</el-button>
              </el-input>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item
              label="最大湿度"
              prop="maxSd"
              :rules="[{ required: true, message: '最大湿度不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isNumber, message: '请输入数字', trigger: 'blur' }]"
            >
              <el-input v-model="setItem.maxSd" maxlength="6" style="width: 200px;">
                <el-button slot="append" >%rh</el-button>
              </el-input>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item
              label="最小光照"
              prop="minWd"
              :rules="[{ required: true, message: '最小光照不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isNumber, message: '请输入数字', trigger: 'blur' }]"
            >
              <el-input v-model="setItem.minGz" maxlength="6" style="width: 200px;">
                <el-button slot="append" >lx</el-button>
              </el-input>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item
              label="最大光照"
              prop="maxWd"
              :rules="[{ required: true, message: '最大光照不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isNumber, message: '请输入数字', trigger: 'blur' }]"
            >
              <el-input v-model="setItem.maxGz" maxlength="6" style="width: 200px;">
                <el-button slot="append" >lx</el-button>
              </el-input>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item
              label="最小PM2.5"
              prop="minPm1"
              :rules="[{ required: true, message: '最小PM2.5不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isNumber, message: '请输入数字', trigger: 'blur' }]"
            >
              <el-input v-model="setItem.minPm1" maxlength="6" style="width: 200px;">
                <el-button slot="append" >ug/m³</el-button>
              </el-input>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item
              label="最大PM2.5"
              prop="maxPm1"
              :rules="[{ required: true, message: '最大PM2.5不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isNumber, message: '请输入数字', trigger: 'blur' }]"
            >
              <el-input v-model="setItem.maxPm1" maxlength="6" style="width: 200px;">
                <el-button slot="append" >ug/m³</el-button>
              </el-input>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item
              label="最小PM10"
              prop="minPm2"
              :rules="[{ required: true, message: '最小PM10不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isNumber, message: '请输入数字', trigger: 'blur' }]"
            >
              <el-input v-model="setItem.minPm2" maxlength="6" style="width: 200px;">
                <el-button slot="append" >ug/m³</el-button>
              </el-input>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item
              label="最大PM10"
              prop="maxPm2"
              :rules="[{ required: true, message: '最大PM10不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isNumber, message: '请输入数字', trigger: 'blur' }]"
            >
              <el-input v-model="setItem.maxPm2" maxlength="6" style="width: 200px;">
                <el-button slot="append" >ug/m³</el-button>
              </el-input>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" :loading="saveLoading" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  list,
  update,
  del,
} from "@/api/devServiceCenter/roomDevice";
import Search from "./search";
import Add from "./add";
import { isNumber } from '@/utils/validate'
import { tree } from '@/api/location/location'
import { getBaseInfo, setCancel } from '@/api/jufe/reservationset'
export default {
  components: { Search, Add },
  name: "RoomDevice",
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      saveLoading: false,
      addVisible:false,
      setVisible:false,
      ids:[],
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        code:null,
        name: null,
        roomId:null,
      },
      formItem:{},
      setItem:{
        id:1,
        minWd:null,
        maxWd:null,
        minSd:null,
        maxSd:null,
        minGz:null,
        maxGz:null,
        minPm1:null,
        maxPm1:null,
        minPm2:null,
        maxPm2:null
      },
      title:'新增设备',
      showDetail:false,
      buildTreeData:[],
    };
  },
  created() {
    tree({ }).then(e=>{
      this.buildTreeData = e.data
    })
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    isNumber:isNumber,
    cancelSet() {
      this.setVisible = true
      getBaseInfo().then(e=>{
        this.setItem = e.data
      })
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.setVisible = false
      this.resetForm('setForm')
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['setForm'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          // 修改
          setCancel(this.setItem).then(e => {
            this.saveLoading = false
            this.$message.success('保存成功')
            this.handleClose()
            this.getList()
          }).catch(e=>{
            this.saveLoading = false
          })
        }
      })
    },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.deviceId)
    },
    /** 查询计划列列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      list(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      }).catch(e=>{
        this.loading = false
      });
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 新增&修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.title='新增设备'
      this.showDetail=false
      if (row) {
        this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
        this.title = '编辑设备'
      }
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    handleUpdateStatus(row){
      const updateItem = {id:row.id,relayStatus:row.relayStatus==='1'?'2':'1'}
      update(updateItem).then(e => {
        this.$message.success('保存成功')
        this.getList()
      })
    },
    handleDetail(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
      this.title='门锁详情'
      this.showDetail = true
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const ids = row.id
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确定删除?如果删除该继电器将无法使用!').then(function() {
        return del(ids);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.showDetail = false
      this.formItem = {
        id:null,
        roomId: null,
        roomCode: null,
        roomName:null,
        code:null,
        ipCode:null,
        gateway: null,
        mask: null,
        mac:null,
        items:[]
      }
    },
    isSixLength(rule, value, callback) {
      const pattern = /^\d{6}$/
      if (value && pattern.test(value) && value !== 0) {
        callback()
      } else if (value && !pattern.test(value)) {
        callback(new Error('请输入六位数字！'))
      } else {
        callback()
      }
    },
    isMac(rule, value, callback) {
      var pattern = /^[0-9A-Z]+$/
      if (value && pattern.test(value) && value !== 0) {
        callback()
      } else if (value && !pattern.test(value)) {
        callback(new Error('请输入正确门卡！'))
      } else {
        callback()
      }
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" :inline="true" label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="设备编号" prop="code">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.code"  placeholder="请输入设备编号" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="设备名称" prop="name">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.name"  placeholder="请输入设备名称" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item
      label="所属教室"
      prop="roomId"
    >
      <treeselect v-model="queryParams.roomId" :options="buildTreeData" :disable-branch-nodes="true"
                  placeholder="选择教室" style="width: 200px;" />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
import {  listGroupOnly } from '@/api/jufe/grouping'
import {listRoomOnly} from '@/api/jufe/room'
export default {
  name: "Plan",
  components: {
    Treeselect
  },
  props:{
    buildTreeData:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    },
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      groups:[],
      rooms:[]
    };
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.queryParams.dataRange = []
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>
<style scoped>
  .line-style{
    float: right;
    display: flex;
    margin-right: 20px;
  }
  .itemstyle{
    margin-left: 20px;
    margin-right: 20px;
  }
</style>
<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <div>
  <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
    <el-form ref="form" :model="formItem" label-width="140px">
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="教室"
            prop="roomId"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '教室不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <treeselect v-model="formItem.roomId" :options="buildTreeData" :disable-branch-nodes="true"
                        placeholder="选择教室"
                        @select="selectRoom"
            />
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="设备编码"
            prop="code"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '设备编码不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.code" maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="设备名称"
            prop="name"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '设备名称不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.name" maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="IP"
            prop="ip"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: 'IP不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isIP, message: '请输入正确IP', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.ip"  maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="端口"
            prop="gateway"
            :rules="[{ validator: isInt, message: '请输入正确端口', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.port" maxlength="5" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="mac"
            prop="mac"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: 'mac不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isMac, message: '请输入正确MAC', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.mac" maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
    </el-form>
    <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
      <el-button type="primary"  :loading="saveLoading"  @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button  @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  add,update
} from "@/api/jufe/speaker";
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
import {isInt,isIP,isMac} from '@/utils/validate'
export default {
  name: "CollectorAdd",
  components: {
    Treeselect
  },
  props:{
    buildTreeData:{
      type:Array,
      default(){
        return []
      }
    },
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default:{}
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    title:{
      type:String,
      default:''
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
      mapVisable:false,
      groups:[],
      rooms:[]
    }
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    isInt:isInt,
    isIP:isIP,
    isMac:isMac,
    selectRoom(node,nodeId){
      if(node.type==='room'){
        this.formItem.roomName = node.label
        this.formItem.roomCode = node.code
      }
    },
    addItem(){
      this.formItem.items.push({
        type:null
      })
    },
    removeItem(row){
      this.formItem.items.splice(this.formItem.items.indexOf(row),1)
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.resetForm('form')
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['form'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          if (this.formItem.id) {
            // 修改
            update(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          } else {
            add(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          }
        }
      })
    },
    loadData() {
      this.$emit('loadData')
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery"
            :records.sync="records"
            :buildTreeData="buildTreeData"
            />
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleUpdate()"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:speaker:add']"
        >新增
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
      <el-table-column type="index" label="序号" align="center" width="50" />
      <el-table-column label="设备编号" align="center" prop="code" width="200"/>
      <el-table-column label="设备名称" align="center" prop="name"  />
      <el-table-column label="教室编号" align="center" prop="roomId"  width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="所属教室" align="center" prop="roomName" />
      <el-table-column label="设备IP" align="center" prop="ip" />
      <el-table-column label="设备端口" align="center" prop="port" />
      <el-table-column label="设备MAC" align="center" prop="mac" />
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" fixed="right" width="300">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)" v-hasPermi="['jufe:speaker:edit']">编辑</el-button>
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
                     v-hasPermi="['jufe:speaker:remove']">删除</el-button>
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-search" @click="testSpeaker(scope.row)">试听</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList" />
    <Add ref="add" v-if="addVisible" :visible.sync="addVisible"
         @loadData="getList"
         :form-item="formItem"
         :title="title"
         :buildTreeData="buildTreeData"
    />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  list,
  update,
  del, testSpeaker,
} from "@/api/jufe/speaker";
import Search from "./search";
import Add from "./add";
import { isNumber } from '@/utils/validate'
import { tree } from '@/api/location/location'
export default {
  components: { Search, Add },
  name: "RoomDevice",
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      saveLoading: false,
      addVisible:false,
      ids:[],
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        code:null,
        name: null,
        roomId:null,
      },
      formItem:{},
      title:'新增设备',
      buildTreeData:[],
    };
  },
  created() {
    tree({ }).then(e=>{
      this.buildTreeData = e.data
    })
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    isNumber:isNumber,
    handleClose() {
      this.setVisible = false
      this.resetForm('setForm')
    },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.deviceId)
    },
    /** 查询计划列列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      list(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      }).catch(e=>{
        this.loading = false
      });
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 新增&修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.title='新增设备'
      this.showDetail=false
      if (row) {
        this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
        this.title = '编辑设备'
      }
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    testSpeaker(row){
      testSpeaker(row).then(e => {
      })
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const ids = row.id
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确定删除?如果删除该继电器将无法使用!').then(function() {
        return del(ids);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.showDetail = false
      this.formItem = {
        id:null,
        roomId: null,
        roomName:null,
        code:null,
        ip:null,
        port: null,
        mac:null,
      }
    },
    isSixLength(rule, value, callback) {
      const pattern = /^\d{6}$/
      if (value && pattern.test(value) && value !== 0) {
        callback()
      } else if (value && !pattern.test(value)) {
        callback(new Error('请输入六位数字！'))
      } else {
        callback()
      }
    },
    isMac(rule, value, callback) {
      var pattern = /^[0-9A-Z]+$/
      if (value && pattern.test(value) && value !== 0) {
        callback()
      } else if (value && !pattern.test(value)) {
        callback(new Error('请输入正确门卡！'))
      } else {
        callback()
      }
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" :inline="true" label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="设备编号" prop="code">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.code"  placeholder="请输入设备编号" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="设备名称" prop="name">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.name"  placeholder="请输入设备名称" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item
      label="所属教室"

  </el-form>
</template>

  name: 'Page401',
  data() {
    return {
      errGif: errGif + '?' + +new Date()
    }
  },
  methods: {
    back() {
      if (this.$route.query.noGoBack) {
        this.$router.push({ path: '/' })
      } else {
        this.$router.go(-1)
      }
    }
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <div class="dashboard-editor-container">
    <panel-group @handleSetLineChartData="handleSetLineChartData" />
    <el-row style="background:#fff;padding:16px 16px 0;margin-bottom:32px;">
      <line-chart :chart-data="lineChartData" />
    </el-row>
    <el-row :gutter="32">
      <el-col :xs="24" :sm="24" :lg="8">
        <div class="chart-wrapper">
          <raddar-chart />
        </div>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :xs="24" :sm="24" :lg="8">
        <div class="chart-wrapper">
          <pie-chart />
        </div>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :xs="24" :sm="24" :lg="8">
        <div class="chart-wrapper">
          <bar-chart />
        </div>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import PanelGroup from './dashboard/PanelGroup'
import LineChart from './dashboard/LineChart'
import RaddarChart from './dashboard/RaddarChart'
import PieChart from './dashboard/PieChart'
import BarChart from './dashboard/BarChart'
const lineChartData = {
  newVisitis: {
    expectedData: [100, 120, 161, 134, 105, 160, 165],
    actualData: [120, 82, 91, 154, 162, 140, 145]
  },
  messages: {
    expectedData: [200, 192, 120, 144, 160, 130, 140],
    actualData: [180, 160, 151, 106, 145, 150, 130]
  },
  purchases: {
    expectedData: [80, 100, 121, 104, 105, 90, 100],
    actualData: [120, 90, 100, 138, 142, 130, 130]
  },
  shoppings: {
    expectedData: [130, 140, 141, 142, 145, 150, 160],
    actualData: [120, 82, 91, 154, 162, 140, 130]
  }
}
export default {
  name: 'Index',
  components: {
    PanelGroup,
    LineChart,
    RaddarChart,
    PieChart,
    BarChart
  },
  data() {
    return {
      lineChartData: lineChartData.newVisitis
    }
  },
  methods: {
    handleSetLineChartData(type) {
      this.lineChartData = lineChartData[type]
    }
  }
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
.dashboard-editor-container {
  padding: 32px;
  background-color: rgb(240, 242, 245);
  position: relative;
  .chart-wrapper {
    background: #fff;
    padding: 16px 16px 0;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }
}

  .chart-wrapper {
    padding: 8px;
  }
