<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
    <el-form ref="form" :model="formItem" label-width="140px">
      <el-form-item
        label="版本号"
        prop="versionNum"
        :rules="[{ required: true, message: '版本号不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isInt, message: '请输入正确版本号,版本号为数字格式！', trigger: 'blur' }]"
      >
        <el-input  maxlength="8" v-model="formItem.versionNum" />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="文件" ref="image" prop="apkUrl">
        <el-upload
          ref="uploadPicUrl"
          :limit="1"
          accept=".apk"
          :action="uploadPicUrl.url"
          :headers="uploadPicUrl.headers"
          :file-list="uploadPicUrl.fileList"
          :on-progress="handleFileUploadProgressPicUrl"
          :on-success="handleFileSuccessPicUrl"
          :auto-upload="true">
          <el-button slot="trigger" size="small" type="primary">选取文件</el-button>
          <div slot="tip" class="el-upload__tip">只能上传apk文件</div>
        </el-upload>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
      <el-button  type="primary" :loading="saveLoading" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button  @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
</template>
<script>
import {
  add,update
} from "@/api/jufe/apksource";
import {isInt} from '@/utils/validate'
import { getToken } from '@/utils/auth'
export default {
  name: "ApkSource",
  props:{
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default() {
        return { hidden: false, breadcrumb: true }
      }
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    title:{
      type:String,
      default:''
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
      // 上传参数
      uploadPicUrl: {
        // 设置上传的请求头部
        headers: { Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken() },
        // 上传的地址 /网关/控制器
        url: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API + "/jufe/apksource/upload",
        // 上传的文件列表
        fileList: []
      },
      headers: {
        Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken(),
      },
    }
  },
  created() {
    if(this.formItem.id){
      this.uploadPicUrl.fileList.push(this.formItem.apkUrl)
    }
  },
  methods: {
    isInt:isInt,
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.resetForm('form')
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['form'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          if (this.formItem.deviceId) {
            // 修改
            update(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          } else {
            add(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          }
        }
      })
    },
    loadData() {
      this.$emit('loadData')
    },
    // 文件提交处理
    submitUpload() {
      this.$refs.uploadPicUrl.submit();
    },
    // 文件上传中处理
    handleFileUploadProgressPicUrl(event, file, fileList) {
      this.uploadPicUrl.isUploading = true;
    },
    // 文件上传成功处理
    handleFileSuccessPicUrl(response, file, fileList) {
      this.uploadPicUrl.isUploading = false;
      this.formItem.apkUrl = response.data.url;
    },
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery" :records.sync="records"/>
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleUpdate()"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:apksource:add']"
        >新增
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records">
      <el-table-column type="index" label="序号" align="center" width="50"/>
      <el-table-column label="版本号" align="center" prop="versionNum"/>
      <el-table-column key="status" label="下载" align="center" width="120">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-download" @click="downloadApk(scope.row)" >下载</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" fixed="right" width="200">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-delete" @click="handleDelete(scope.row)" v-hasPermi="['jufe:lock:remove']">删除</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList"
    />
    <Add ref="add" v-if="addVisible" :visible.sync="addVisible" @loadData="getList" :form-item="formItem"
         :title="title"
    />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { list, del } from '@/api/jufe/apksource'
import Search from './search'
import Add from './add'
export default {
  components: { Search, Add },
  name: 'Apksource',
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      addVisible: false,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        versionNum: null,
      },
      formItem: {},
      title: '新增'
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true
      list(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows
        this.total = response.total
        this.loading = false
      }).catch(e => {
        this.loading = false
      })
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1
      this.getList()
    },
    /** 新增&修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.title = '新增'
      this.showDetail = false
      if (row) {
        this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
        this.title = '修改'
      }
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const ids = row.id ;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确定删除?').then(function() {
        return del(ids);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    downloadApk(row){
      let a = document.createElement('a')
      a.href =row.apkUrl
      a.click();
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.formItem = {
        id:null,
        versionNum: null,
        apkUrl: null
      }
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" :inline="true" label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="版本号" prop="versionNum">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.versionNum"  placeholder="请输入版本号" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
export default {
  name: "Plan",
  components: {
    Treeselect
  },
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
    };
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.queryParams.dataRange = []
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>
<style scoped>
  .line-style{
    float: right;
    display: flex;
    margin-right: 20px;
  }
  .itemstyle{
    margin-left: 20px;
    margin-right: 20px;
  }
</style>
<template>
    <div>
        <el-dialog title="选择门锁" :visible.sync="openLocationList" width="1000px"    append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
            <div class="el-dialog-div" style="height:680px;">
                <div class="leftdiv" style = "max-height:640px;overflow: auto">
                    <div class="head-container">
                    <el-input v-model="locationName" placeholder="请输入楼层名称" clearable size="small" prefix-icon="el-icon-search"
                        style="margin-bottom: 20px" />
                    </div>
                    <el-tree :data="locationOptions" :props="defaultProps" :expand-on-click-node="false"
                    :filter-node-method="filterNode" ref="tree" node-key="id" default-expand-all highlight-current
                    @node-click="handleNodeClick" />
                </div>
                <div class="rightdiv" >
                    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch" label-width="68px"  style="margin-left: 20px;">
                    <el-form-item label="教室编号" prop="roomCode">
                        <el-input v-model="queryParams.roomCode" placeholder="请输教室编号" clearable  @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" />
                    </el-form-item> 
                    <el-form-item label="教室名称" prop="roomName">
                        <el-input v-model="queryParams.roomName" placeholder="请输入教室名称" clearable @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" />
                    </el-form-item>
                    <el-form-item>
                        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
                        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
                    </el-form-item>
                    <el-form-item>
                        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-submit" size="mini"  @click="handleSetRoomSubmit">确定</el-button> 
                    </el-form-item>
                    </el-form> 
                    <el-table ref="multipleTable" :row-key='getRowkey' v-loading="loading" :data="roomList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange" style="height:500px;overflow:auto">
                    <el-table-column :reserve-selection="true" type="selection" width="55" align="center" v-model="buildRooms"  :default-selection="buildRooms"/>
                    <el-table-column type="index" width="50" align="center" label="序号" />
                    <el-table-column label="教室编号" align="center" prop="roomCode" width="100" />
                    <el-table-column label="教室名称" align="center" prop="roomName" /> 
                    <el-table-column label="教室别名" align="center" prop="roomBm" /> 
                    </el-table> 
                    <pagination v-show="total>0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                        @pagination="getList" />
                </div>
            </div>
      </el-dialog> 
    </div>
  </template>
  <script>
     import {
      listRoom,
    } from "@/api/jufe/room";
    import {
      listTeaInfo,
    } from "@/api/jufe/teaInfo";
    import {
      locationTree
    } from '@/api/location/location'
    import {
      deptTreeSelect
    } from "@/api/system/user";
    import Treeselect from "@riophae/vue-treeselect";
    import "@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css";
    import { getToken } from "@/utils/auth";
    export default {
      name: "BuildRoom",
      props: {
        buildRooms: null,
        visible: {
            type: Boolean,
            default () {
                return false
            },
            rowkey:{
                type:String,
                default:'id'
            }
        },
      },
      components: {
        Treeselect
      },
      data() {
        return {
            openLocationList: true,
          // 部门树选项
          deptOptions: undefined,
          locationOptions: [],
          questionForm: {},
          // 遮罩层
          loading: true,
          // 选中数组
          ids: [],
          // 门锁实体
          rooms: [], 
          // 选中的双向数据
          transvalue: [],
          // 非单个禁用
          single: true,
          single1: true,
          // 非多个禁用
          multiple: true,
          // 显示搜索条件
          showSearch: true,
          // 总条数
          total: 0,
          //  表格数据
          roomList: [],
          // 弹出层标题
          title: "",
          // 是否显示弹出层
          open: false,
          openRoom: false,
          openroomPower: false, 
          // 查询参数
          queryParams: {
            pageNum: 1,
            pageSize: 10,
            roomName: null,
            roomCode: null
          },
          queryParamsRoomPower: {
            pageNum: 1,
            pageSize: 10,
            powerCode: null,
            name: null,
            powerIp: null,
          },
          // 表单参数
          form: {},
          // 表单校验
          rules: {
          },
          defaultProps: {
            children: "children",
            label: "label"
          },
          // 楼层名称
          locationName: undefined,
          roomValues: [],
          // 用户导入参数
          upload: {
            // 是否显示弹出层（用户导入）
            open: false,
            // 弹出层标题（用户导入）
            title: "",
            // 是否禁用上传
            isUploading: false,
            // 是否更新已经存在的用户数据
            updateSupport: 0,
            memberType: 1,
            // 设置上传的请求头部
            headers: {
              Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken()
            }, 
          },
        };
      },
      watch: {
        // 根据名称筛选树
        locationName(val) {
          this.$refs.tree.filter(val);
        }
      },
      created() {
        this.getTreeselect();
        //this.rooms = this.buildRooms;
        if(this.buildRooms!=undefined&&this.buildRooms.length>0){
          this.buildRooms.forEach(item=>{
            item.isShow = false;
            return item;
          })
        }
        this.getList();
        listTeaInfo().then(response => {
          this.teaInfoList = response.rows;
        });
        this.getDeptTree();
      },
      methods: {
        getRowkey(row){
          return row.roomId
        },
        // 关闭方法
        handleClose() {
            this.$emit('update:visible', false)
        },
        openDialogRoom() {
          this.openRoom = true
        },
        openDialogRoomPower() {
          this.openRoomPower = true;
          this.getRoomPowerList();
        },
        /** 查询教室信息列表 <!-- this.$refs.multipleTable.toggleRowSelection(row, true); -->*/
        getList() {
          this.loading = false;
          listRoom(this.queryParams).then(response => {
            this.roomList = response.rows; 
            if(this.roomList!=null&& this.roomList.length>0 ){
                this.roomList.forEach(item=>{
                  for(let i=0;i<this.buildRooms.length;i++){
                      if(item.roomId == this.buildRooms[i].roomId){
                            this.$refs.multipleTable.toggleRowSelection(item, true);
                            this.buildRooms[i].isShow =true ;
                      }
                  }
                })
            }
            this.total = response.total;
            this.loading = false;
          });
        }, 
        // 表单重置
        reset() {
          this.form = {
            roomId: null,
            roomName: null,
            roomCode: null
          };
          this.resetForm("form");
        },
        /** 搜索按钮操作 */
        handleQuery() {
          this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
          this.getList();
        },
        /** 重置按钮操作 */
        resetQuery() {
          this.resetForm("queryForm");
          this.queryParams.locationId = undefined;
          this.$refs.tree.setCurrentKey(null);
          this.handleQuery();
        },
        // 多选框选中数据
        handleSelectionChange(selection) {
          const uniqueList = Array.from(new Set(selection.map(item => item.roomId))).map(roomId => {
            return selection.find(item => item.roomId === roomId);
          });
          /**  selection.forEach(item => { */
          /**    let flag =false;  */
          /** }); */
         this.multipleSelection = uniqueList 
         this.ids = uniqueList.map(item => item.roomId)
         this.single = uniqueList.length !== 1
         this.multiple = !uniqueList.length
         this.rooms = uniqueList.map(item => item); 
        }, 
           /**  for(let i=0;i<this.buildRooms.length;i++){  */
           /**     if(item.roomId == this.buildRooms.roomId){  */
            /**       flag= true;  */
            /**    }  */
            /**    if(!flag){  */
            /**       this.buildRooms.push(item);  */
            /**    }  */
           /**   }  */
        /** 查询位置下拉树结构 */
        getTreeselect() {
          locationTree().then(response => {
            this.locationOptions = response.data
          })
        },
        // 筛选节点
        filterNode(value, data) {
          if (!value) return true;
          return data.label.indexOf(value) !== -1;
        },
        // 节点单击事件
        handleNodeClick(data) {
          this.queryParams.locationId = data.id;
          this.handleQuery();
        },
        /** 查询部门下拉树结构 */
        getDeptTree() {
          deptTreeSelect().then(response => {
            this.deptOptions = response.data;
          });
        }, 
        handleSetRoomSubmit(){
          if(this.buildRooms!=undefined&&this.buildRooms.length>0){
            this.buildRooms.forEach(item=>{
              if(item.isShow==undefined || item.isShow == false){
                  this.rooms.push(item);
              }
            })
          }
          const uniqueList = Array.from(new Set(this.rooms.map(item => item.roomId))).map(roomId => {
            return this.rooms.find(item => item.roomId === roomId);
          });
          this.$emit('buildRoomChang', uniqueList);
          this.handleClose();
        }
      }
    };
  </script>
  <style scoped>
    .leftdiv {
      width: 18%;
      float: left;
    }
    .rightdiv {
      width: 80%;
      float: left;
    }
    .custom-tree-node {
      flex: 1;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      font-size: 14px;
      padding-right: 8px;
    }
  </style>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch" label-width="68px">
      <el-form-item label="事件名称" prop="eventName">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.eventName"
          placeholder="请输入事件名称"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="音频名称" prop="audioName">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.audioName"
          placeholder="请输入音频名称"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="上传人" prop="uploadUserName">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.uploadUserName"
          placeholder="请输入上传人"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item>
        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleAdd"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:audio:add']"
        >新增</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="danger"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleStopAllAudio"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:audio:cancelPlay']"
        >取消播放</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <right-toolbar :showSearch.sync="showSearch" @queryTable="getList"></right-toolbar>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="infoList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
       <el-table-column type="index" width="50" align="center" label="序号" />
      <el-table-column label="事件名称" align="center" prop="eventName" />
      <el-table-column label="语音类型" align="center" prop="params.typeName" />
      <el-table-column label="音频名称" align="center" prop="audioName" />
      <el-table-column label="播放文本" align="center" prop="text" :show-overflow-tooltip="true"/>
      <el-table-column label="上传人" align="center" prop="uploadUserName" />
      <el-table-column label="更新时间" align="center" prop="updateTime" />
      <el-table-column label="教室范围" align="center" prop="roomNames" :show-overflow-tooltip="true"/>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:audio:edit']"
          >修改</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-delete"
            @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:audio:remove']"
          >删除</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-upload"
            @click="handleListen(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:audio:listen']"
          >实时播报</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination
      v-show="total>0"
      :total="total"
      :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
      :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
      @pagination="getList"
    />
    <!-- 添加或修改教室音频设置对话框 -->
    <el-dialog :title="title" v-if="open" :visible.sync="open" width="500px" append-to-body>
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="100px">
        <el-form-item label="事件名称" prop="eventName"  :rules="[{ required: true, message: '请输入事件名', trigger: 'blur' }]">
          <el-input v-model="form.eventName" placeholder="请输入事件名称" />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="播放类型" prop="eventName"  :rules="[{ required: true, message: '请选择播放类型', trigger: 'blur' }]">
          <dict-select v-model="form.type" dict-type="school_audio_type"/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="播放音量" prop="volume"  :rules="[{ required: true, message: '请输入播放音量', trigger: 'blur' }]">
          <el-input-number v-model="form.volume" :min="1" :max="100" label="描述文字"></el-input-number>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item v-if="form.type==='2'" label="播放文本" prop="text"  :rules="[{ required: true, message: '请输入播放文本', trigger: 'blur' }]">
          <el-input type="textarea" v-model="form.text" placeholder="请输入播放文本" show-word-limit rows="3" max="200"/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item v-if="form.type==='1'" label="上传音频:" prop="audioUrl"  :rules="[{ required: true, message: '请上传音频文件', trigger: 'blur' }]">
          <el-upload
            ref="uploadPicUrl"
            :limit="1"
            accept=".MP3"
            :action="uploadPicUrl.url"
            :headers="uploadPicUrl.headers"
            :file-list="uploadPicUrl.fileList"
            :before-upload="beforeUpload"
            :on-progress="handleFileUploadProgressPicUrl"
            :on-success="handleFileSuccessPicUrl"
            :auto-upload="true">
            <el-button slot="trigger" size="small" type="primary">选取文件</el-button><span style="color: #999999;font-size: 8px;margin-left: 10px;" >只能上传mp3音频文件</span>
          </el-upload>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item v-if="form.type==='1'"  prop="classScheduleVoiceName">
          <div class="audio-box">
            <div>{{form.audioName}}</div>
            <audio controls :src="this.form.audioUrl"></audio>
          </div>
        </el-form-item>
         <el-form-item label="教室" prop="roomRefs" :rules="[{ required: true, message: '请选择教室', trigger: 'blur' }]">
          <el-button type="primary" @click="handleBuildRoom" :title="roomSelTitle" >{{roomSelTitle}}
          </el-button>
            <div style="overflow-y:auto;max-height: 250px;">
            <div v-for="item in buildRoomShow" >{{item}}</div>
            </div>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
     <!-- 在线试听 -->
    <el-dialog :title="title" v-if="openListen" :visible.sync="openListen" width="500px" append-to-body>
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="100px">
        <el-form-item label="事件名称:"   >
          <div>{{form.eventName}}</div>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="播放文本:" v-if="form.type==='2'"  >
          <div>{{form.text}}</div>
        </el-form-item>
         <el-form-item label="教室:" >
            <div style="overflow-y:auto;" >
                {{form.roomNames}}
            </div>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" style="text-align:center" >
<!--        <audio ref="listenAudio" v-show='false' controls :src="this.form.audioUrl"></audio>-->
<!--        <el-button  type="primary" @click="listenPageAudio">{{this.audioRunTitle}}</el-button>-->
        <el-button  type="primary" @click="sendToBoard('1')">实时播报</el-button>
        <el-button  type="primary" @click="sendToBoard('0')">停止播报</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
     <BuildRoom v-if="visibleBuildRoom" :visible.sync="visibleBuildRoom" :buildRooms="form.roomRefs"
      @buildRoomChang="buildRoomChang"></BuildRoom>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {listInfo, getInfo, delInfo, addInfo, updateInfo, playAudio, stopPlay} from "@/api/jufe/audio";
import BuildRoom from "@/views/jufe/audio/buildAudioRoomDailog";
import {getToken} from "@/utils/auth";
export default {
  name: "Info",
  components: {
    BuildRoom
  },
  data() {
    return {
      playStatus: false,
      //音频播放状态
      audioRunStatus:false,
      //按钮显示文字
      audioRunTitle : '试听',
      //实时播放title
      // picurl: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API,
      // 上传参数
      uploadPicUrl: {
        // 设置上传的请求头部
        headers: { Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken() },
        // 上传的地址 /网关/控制器
        url: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API + "/file/upload",
        // 上传的文件列表
        fileList: []
      },
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      //在线试听
      openListen: false,
      // 非单个禁用
      single: true,
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      //引入插件是否可见
      visibleBuildRoom: false,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 教室音频设置表格数据
      infoList: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      buildRoomShow: [],
      roomSelTitle: "请选择教室",
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        eventName: null,
        audioName: null,
        audioUrl: null,
        uploadUserId: null,
        uploadUserName: null,
        createBy: null,
        deptId: null,
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {
        roomRefs: []
      },
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
      }
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
  },
  methods: {
    beforeUpload(val) {
      let size50M = val.size / 1024 / 1024 < 500
      if (!size50M) {
        this.$message.error('上传音频大小不能超过50MB!');
        return false
      }
    },
    resetUploadPicUrl(){
      // 上传参数
      this.uploadPicUrl= {
        // 设置上传的请求头部
        headers: { Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken() },
        // 上传的地址 /网关/控制器
        url: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API + "/file/upload",
        // 上传的文件列表
        fileList: []
      }
    },
    // 文件上传中处理
    handleFileUploadProgressPicUrl(event, file, fileList) {
      this.uploadPicUrl.isUploading = true;
    },
     // 文件上传成功处理
    handleFileSuccessPicUrl(response, file, fileList) {
      this.uploadPicUrl.isUploading = false;
      this.form.audioName = response.data.name.split("_")[0]+'.mp3';
      this.form.audioUrl = response.data.url;
      this.$refs.uploadPicUrl.clearFiles();
    },
    /** 查询教室音频设置列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listInfo(this.queryParams).then(response => {
        this.infoList = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    // 取消按钮
    cancel() {
      this.open = false;
      this.openListen = false;
      this.reset();
    },
    //试听音频
    listenPageAudio(){
      if(!this.audioRunStatus){
        this.$refs.listenAudio.play();
        this.audioRunStatus = true;
        this.audioRunTitle = '停止';
        this.$refs.listenAudio.pause();
        this.audioRunStatus = false;
        this.audioRunTitle = '试听';
      }
    },
    sendToBoard(playStatus){
      this.form.playStatus = playStatus;
      playAudio(this.form).then(response => {
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("操作成功");
      });
    },
    handleStopAllAudio(){
      playAudio({playStatus:0}).then(response => {
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("取消成功");
      });
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.form = {
        id: null,
        type:null,
        volume:100,
        eventName: null,
        audioName: null,
        audioUrl: null,
        text:null,
        uploadUserId: null,
        uploadUserName: null,
        createById: null,
        createBy: null,
        createTime: null,
        updateById: null,
        updateBy: null,
        updateTime: null,
        deptId: null,
        delFlag: null,
        roomRefs: [],
      };
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.id)
      this.single = selection.length!==1
      this.multiple = !selection.length
    },
    /** 新增按钮操作 */
    handleAdd() {
      this.reset();
      this.open = true;
      this.title = "新增";
      if(this.$refs.uploadPicUrl!=undefined){
        this.$refs.uploadPicUrl.clearFiles();
      }
    },
    /** 楼栋按钮操作 */
    handleBuildRoom() {
      this.visibleBuildRoom = true;
    },
    /** 修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset();
      const id = row.id || this.ids
      getInfo(id).then(response => {
        this.form = response.data;
        this.open = true;
        this.title = "修改";
        this.buildRoomChang(this.form.roomRefs);
      });
    },
    handleListen(row){
      this.reset();
      const id = row.id || this.ids
      getInfo(id).then(response => {
        this.form = response.data;
        this.openListen = true;
        this.title = "实时播报";
      });
    },
    buildRoomChang(selection) {
      if (selection) {
        this.form.roomRefs = selection.map(item => {
          return item
        }).filter(item2 => item2 !== undefined);
        this.form.roomRefs = selection;
        this.buildRoomShow = this.form.roomRefs.map(item => item.roomCode + ':' + item.roomName + ';');
        if (selection.length > 0) {
          this.roomSelTitle = "重新选择教室";
        } else {
          this.roomSelTitle = "请选择教室";
        }
      } else {
        this.form.roomRefs = []
        this.buildRoomShow = []
        this.roomSelTitle = "请选择教室";
      }
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs["form"].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          if (this.form.id != null) {
            updateInfo(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          } else {
            addInfo(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          }
        }
      });
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const ids = row.id || this.ids;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除教室音频为"' + row.eventName+ '"的数据项？').then(function() {
        return delInfo(ids);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.download('jufe/info/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `info_${new Date().getTime()}.xlsx`)
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery" :records.sync="records"/>
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-setting"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleBlackSet"
        >黑名单设置
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records">
      <el-table-column type="index" label="序号" align="center" width="50"/>
      <el-table-column label="学工号" align="center" prop="userCode" width="200"/>
      <el-table-column label="姓名" align="center" prop="userName" width="200"/>
      <el-table-column label="所属部门" align="center" prop="deptName" width="200"/>
      <el-table-column label="原因" align="center" prop="reason" />
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" fixed="right" width="200">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-delete" @click="handleDelete(scope.row)">移除</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList"
    />
    <el-dialog v-if="setVisible" title="移除黑名单" :visible.sync="setVisible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
      <el-form ref="setForm" :model="setItem" label-width="140px" >
          <el-form-item
            label="移除违约次数"
            prop="breakNum"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '移除违约次数不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isInt, message: '请输入数字', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input-number v-model="setItem.breakNum" :max="userBreakNum" :min="userBreakNum===maxBreakNum?1:0"/>
            <span style="padding-left: 20px; ">当前违约次数：{{userBreakNum}}次</span>
          </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" :loading="saveLoading" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog v-if="removeVisible" title="黑名单设置" :visible.sync="removeVisible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleCloseBlack">
      <el-form ref="blackForm" :model="baseSetItem" label-width="140px" >
        <el-form-item
          label="剩余清空时间"
        >
          {{baseSetItem.remainDays}} 天
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item
          label="定时清空黑名单"
          prop="maxBreakNum"
          :rules="[{ validator: isInt, message: '请输入定时清空黑名单天数', trigger: 'blur' }]"
        >
          <el-input  v-model="baseSetItem.autoRemoveBlack" maxlength="1" placeholder="请填写定时清空黑名单天数" style="width: 200px;" >
            <el-button slot="append" >天</el-button>
          </el-input>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" :loading="saveBlackLoading" @click="submitFormBlack">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="handleCloseBlack">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { list, del ,getBreakNum } from '@/api/jufe/black'
import Search from './search'
import { isInt } from '@/utils/validate'
import {getBaseInfo, setCancel} from "@/api/jufe/reservationset";
export default {
  components: { Search },
  name: 'Black',
  data() {
    return {
      setVisible:false,
      removeVisible:false,
      saveLoading: false,
      saveBlackLoading: false,
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 检测记录总条数
      recordTotal: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      maxBreakNum: 0,
      userBreakNum:0,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageSize:10,
        pageNum:1,
        userCode: null,
        userName: null,
      },
      setItem:{
        blackInfoId:null,
        breakNum:0
      },
      baseSetItem:{
        blackInfoId:null,
        breakNum:0
      },
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    isInt:isInt,
    /** 查询列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true
      list(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows
        this.total = response.total
        this.loading = false
      }).catch(e => {
        this.loading = false
      })
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      getBreakNum(row.userId).then(res=>{
        this.setVisible = true
        this.setItem.blackInfoId = row.blackInfoId
        this.maxBreakNum = res.data.maxBreakNum
        this.userBreakNum = res.data.userBreakNum
      })
    },
    handleBlackSet() {
      this.removeVisible = true
      getBaseInfo().then(e=>{
        this.baseSetItem = e.data
      })
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.setVisible = false
      this.resetForm('setForm')
    },
    handleCloseBlack() {
      this.removeVisible = false
      this.saveBlackLoading = false
      this.resetForm('blackForm')
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['setForm'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          // 修改
          del(this.setItem).then(e => {
            this.saveLoading = false
            this.$message.success('移除成功')
            this.handleClose()
            this.getList()
          }).catch(e=>{
            this.saveLoading = false
          })
        }
      })
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitFormBlack() {
      this.$refs['blackForm'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveBlackLoading = true
          // 修改
          setCancel(this.baseSetItem).then(e => {
            this.saveBlackLoading = false
            this.$message.success('保存成功')
            this.handleCloseBlack()
            this.getList()
          }).catch(e=>{
            this.saveBlackLoading = false
          })
        }
      })
    },
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" :inline="true" label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="学工号" prop="userCode">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.userCode"  placeholder="请输入学工号" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="姓名" prop="userName">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.userName"  placeholder="请输入姓名" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
export default {
  name: "Plan",
  components: {
    Treeselect
  },
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
    };
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.queryParams.dataRange = []
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>
<style scoped>
  .line-style{
    float: right;
    display: flex;
    margin-right: 20px;
  }
  .itemstyle{
    margin-left: 20px;
    margin-right: 20px;
  }
</style>
var ws = new WebSocket("ws://localhost:8080/");
ws.binaryType = "arraybuffer";
var context = new AudioContext();
var source = null;
ws.onmessage = function(event) {
    if (source === null) {
        context.resume();
        source = context.createBufferSource();
        context.decodeAudioData(event.data, function(buffer) {
            source.buffer = buffer;
            source.connect(context.destination);
            source.start(0);
        });
    } else {
        context.decodeAudioData(event.data, function(buffer) {
            var newBuffer = context.createBuffer(1, buffer.length, context.sampleRate);
            newBuffer.copyToChannel(buffer.getChannelData(0), 0, 0);
            source.buffer = concatAudioBuffers(source.buffer, newBuffer);
        });
    }
};
ws.onclose = function() {
    source.stop();
};
function concatAudioBuffers(buffer1, buffer2) {
    var length = buffer1.length + buffer2.length;
    var newBuffer = context.createBuffer(1, length, context.sampleRate);
    newBuffer.getChannelData(0).set(buffer1.getChannelData(0), 0);
    newBuffer.getChannelData(0).set(buffer2.getChannelData(0), buffer1.length);
    return newBuffer;
}
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch" label-width="68px">
      <el-form-item label="班牌编号" prop="boardCodeLike">
        <el-input v-model="queryParams.boardCodeLike" placeholder="请输入班牌编号" clearable @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" />

      <el-form-item label="班牌名称" prop="boardName">

      </el-form-item>

      </el-form-item>

      <!-- <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button type="warning" plain icon="el-icon-download" size="mini" @click="handleExport"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:board:export']">导出</el-button>

      <right-toolbar :showSearch.sync="showSearch" @queryTable="getList"></right-toolbar>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="boardList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
      <el-table-column type="index" width="50" align="center" label="序号" />
      <el-table-column label="班牌编号" align="center" prop="boardCode" />
      <el-table-column label="班牌名称" align="center" prop="boardName" />
      <el-table-column label="班牌IP" align="center" prop="ipAddress" />
      <!-- <el-table-column label="班牌状态" align="center" prop="status">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <dict-tag :options="dict.type.device_board_status" :value="scope.row.status" />

      </el-table-column> -->
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" fixed="right">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:board:edit']">编辑</el-button>
          <!-- <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleUpdateStatus(scope.row)"

          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleLook(scope.row)">查看</el-button>

      @pagination="getList" />

        <el-form-item label="班牌编号" prop="boardCode" :hidden="form.boardId == null">
          <el-input v-model="form.boardCode" placeholder="请输入班牌编号" :disabled="true" />
          <div style="color: #02a7f0;" v-if="form.boardId == null">注：不填写系统自动生成教室编号</div>
        </el-form-item>

          <el-select v-model="form.status" placeholder="请选择班牌状态" clearable :disabled="title=='查看班牌信息'">
            <el-option v-for="dict in dict.type.device_board_status" :key="dict.value" :label="dict.label"
              :value="dict.value" />
          </el-select>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="备注" prop="remark">
          <el-input v-model="form.remark" type="textarea" placeholder="请输入备注" :disabled="title=='查看班牌信息' || status=='2'"
          maxlength="200" show-word-limit rows="3" resize="none"/>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm" v-if="title!='查看班牌信息'">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">{{title=='查看班牌信息'?"返 回":"取 消"}}</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false" :before-close="handleClose">

        <el-form-item label="文件" ref="image" prop="apkUrl">
          <ImageUpload :limit="1"  v-model="logoItem.bpLogo" :fileSize="20"/>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button  type="primary" :loading="logoLoading" @click="submitLogoForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button  @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
      </div>

<script>
  import {
    listBoard,
    getBoard,
    delBoard,
    addBoard,
    updateBoard,updateBoardStatus
  } from "@/api/jufe/board";
  import {getToken} from "@/utils/auth";
  import {updateInfo} from "@/api/jufe/schoolBaseSetInfo";
  import {getBaseInfo} from "@/api/jufe/reservationset"
  export default {
    name: "Board",
    dicts: ['device_board_status'],
    data() {
      return {
        // 遮罩层
        loading: true,
        // 选中数组
        ids: [],
        // 非单个禁用
        single: true,
        // 非多个禁用
        multiple: true,
        // 显示搜索条件
        showSearch: true,
        // 总条数
        total: 0,
        // 班牌信息表格数据
        boardList: [],
        // 弹出层标题
        title: "",
        // 是否显示弹出层
        open: false,
        // 查询参数
        queryParams: {
          pageNum: 1,
          pageSize: 10,
          ipAddress: null,
          boardName: null,
          boardCodeLike: null,
          status: null,
        },
        // 表单参数
        form: {},
        // 表单校验
        rules: {
          boardName: [
            { required: true, message: "参数名称不能为空", trigger: "blur" }
          ],
          ipAddress: [
            { required: true, message: "班牌IP不能为空", trigger: "blur" },
            {
              pattern: /^(1\d{2}|2[0-4]\d|25[0-5]|[1-9]\d|[1-9])\.(1\d{2}|2[0-4]\d|25[0-5]|[1-9]\d|\d)\.(1\d{2}|2[0-4]\d|25[0-5]|[1-9]\d|\d)\.(1\d{2}|2[0-4]\d|25[0-5]|[1-9]\d|\d)$/,
              message: '请输入正确的IP',
              trigger: 'blur'
            }
          ],
          status: [
            { required: true, message: "状态不能为空", trigger: "blur" }
          ],
        },
        status:undefined,
        visible:false,
        logoItem:{
          bpLogo:null
        },
        logoLoading: false,
        headers: {
          Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken(),
        },
      };
    },
    created() {
      this.getList();
    },
    methods: {
      /** 查询班牌信息列表 */
      getList() {
        this.loading = true;
        listBoard(this.queryParams).then(response => {
          this.boardList = response.rows;
          this.total = response.total;
          this.loading = false;
        });
      },
      // 取消按钮
      cancel() {
        this.open = false;
        this.status = undefined;
        this.reset();
      },
      // 表单重置
      reset() {
        this.form = {
          boardId: null,
          roomId: null,
          ipAddress: null,
          boardName: null,
          boardCode: null,
          status: "1",
          createBy: null,
          createTime: null,
          updateBy: null,
          updateTime: null,
          remark: null,
          delFlag: null,
          deptId: null
        };
        this.resetForm("form");
      },
      /** 搜索按钮操作 */
      handleQuery() {
        this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
        this.getList();
      },
      /** 重置按钮操作 */
      resetQuery() {
        this.resetForm("queryForm");
        this.handleQuery();
      },
      // 多选框选中数据
      handleSelectionChange(selection) {
        this.ids = selection.map(item => item.boardId)
        this.single = selection.length !== 1
        this.multiple = !selection.length
      },
      /** 新增按钮操作 */
      handleAdd() {
        this.open = true;
        this.reset();
        this.title = "添加班牌信息";
      },
      /** 修改按钮操作 */
      handleUpdate(row) {
        this.reset();
        const boardId = row.boardId || this.ids
        getBoard(boardId).then(response => {
          this.form = response.data;
          this.open = true;
          this.status = this.form.status;
          this.title = "修改班牌信息";
        });
      },
      /** 查看按钮操作 */
      handleLook(row) {
        this.reset();
        const boardId = row.boardId || this.ids
        getBoard(boardId).then(response => {
          this.form = response.data;
          this.open = true;
          this.title = "查看班牌信息";
        });
      },
      /** 提交按钮 */
      submitForm() {
        this.$refs["form"].validate(valid => {
          if (valid) {
            if (this.form.boardId != null) {
              updateBoard(this.form).then(response => {
                this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
                this.open = false;
                this.getList();
              });
            } else {
              addBoard(this.form).then(response => {
                this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
                this.open = false;
                this.getList();
              });
            }
          }
        });
      },
      /** 删除按钮操作 */
      handleDelete(row) {
        const boardIds = row.boardId || this.ids;
        this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除,删除后该班牌将无法正常显示信息').then(function() {
          return delBoard(boardIds);
        }).then(() => {
          this.getList();
          this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
        }).catch(() => {});
      },
      /** 启用停用 按钮操作 */
      handleUpdateStatus(row) {
        const boardIds = row.boardId || this.ids;
        this.$modal.confirm(row.status=="1"?'是否确认停用，停用后该班牌将无法正常显示信息':'是否确认启用').then(function() {
          return updateBoardStatus(boardIds);
        }).then(() => {
          this.getList();
          this.$modal.msgSuccess(row.status=="1"?'停用成功':'启用成功');
        }).catch(() => {});
      },
      /** 导出按钮操作 */
      handleExport() {
        this.download('jufe/board/export', {
          ...this.queryParams
        }, `board_${new Date().getTime()}.xlsx`)
      },
      openLogo(){
        this.visible=true
        getBaseInfo().then(e=>{
          console.log('------------',e.data)
          this.logoItem = e.data
        })
      },
      handleClose() {
        this.visible = false
        this.resetForm('logoForm')
      },
      submitLogoForm() {
        this.$refs['logoForm'].validate(valid => {
          if (valid) {
            this.logoLoading = true
            console.log(this.logoItem)
            // 修改
            updateInfo(this.logoItem).then(e => {
              this.logoLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.logoLoading = false
            })
          }
        })
      },
    }
  };
</script>
<template>
  <div>
    <el-dialog title="选择位置" :visible.sync="openLocationList" width="400px" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose"
      :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-table v-if="refreshTable" v-loading="loading" :data="buildPosList" row-key="locationId" ref="table"
        :default-expand-all="isExpandAll" :tree-props="{children: 'children', hasChildren: 'hasChildren'}"
        @selection-change="handleSelectionChange" @select="dialogCheck">
        <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" :selectable="selectable">
        </el-table-column>
        <el-table-column prop="locationName" label="位置名称"></el-table-column>
      </el-table>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
  import {
    getAllLocationList
  } from "@/api/jufe/grouping";
  export default {
    name: "buildPos",
    props: {
      buildPosId: null,
      visible: {
        type: Boolean,
        default () {
          return false
        }
      },
    },
    data() {
      return {
        //弹窗开关
        openLocationList: true,
        // 遮罩层
        loading: true,
        // 重新渲染表格状态
        refreshTable: true,
        // 楼栋 表格数据
        buildPosList: [],
        // 是否展开，默认全部展开
        isExpandAll: true,
        // 选中数组
        ids: [],
        names: [],
        selectioned: undefined
      }
    },
    created() {
      // this.ticketStatusIn = undefined;
      // this.ticketStatusOut = undefined;
      this.openLocationList = true;
      this.getListLocation();
    },
    methods: {
      // 关闭方法
      handleClose() {
        this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      },
      getListLocation() {
        this.loading = true;
        this.refreshTable = false;
        getAllLocationList(this.buildPosId).then(response => {
          this.buildPosList = this.handleTree(response.data, "locationId");
          this.totalMembercard = response.total;
          this.refreshTable = true;
          this.loading = false;
        });
      },
      dialogCheck: function(selection, row) {
        this.$refs.table.clearSelection()
        if (selection.length === 0) { // 判断selection是否有值存在
          return
        }
        if (row) {
          this.selectioned = row
        // this.locations = selection.map(item => item)
          this.locations = row
          this.$refs.table.toggleRowSelection(row, true)
        }
      },
      // 多选框选中数据
      handleSelectionChange(selection) {
        // this.locations = selection.map(item => item)
      },
      /** 提交按钮 */
      submitForm() {
        this.$emit('buildPosChang', this.locations)
        this.handleClose();
      },
      selectable(row, index) {
        return row.children == null //为true的时候可以选，为false则不可选择
      }
    }
  }
</script>

  /deep/ .el-table th.el-table__cell > .cell .el-checkbox{
        display: none;
    }
</style>

  <script>
    import {
      listLock,
    } from "@/api/jufe/cardInfo";
    import {
      listTeaInfo,
    } from "@/api/jufe/teaInfo";
    import {
      locationTree
    } from '@/api/location/location'
    import {
      deptTreeSelect
    } from "@/api/system/user";
    import Treeselect from "@riophae/vue-treeselect";
    import "@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css";
    import { getToken } from "@/utils/auth";
    export default {
      name: "BuildLock",
      props: {
        buildLocks: null,
        visible: {
            type: Boolean,
            default () {
                return false
            },
            rowkey:{
                type:String,
                default:'id'
            }
        },
      },
      components: {
        Treeselect
      },
      data() {
        return {
            openLocationList: true,
          // 部门树选项
          deptOptions: undefined,
          locationOptions: [],
          questionForm: {},
          // 遮罩层
          loading: true,
          // 选中数组
          ids: [],
          // 门锁实体
          locks: [],
          // 选中的双向数据
          transvalue: [],
          // 非单个禁用
          single: true,
          single1: true,
          // 非多个禁用
          multiple: true,
          // 显示搜索条件
          showSearch: true,
          // 总条数
          total: 0,
          //  表格数据
          lockList: [],
          // 弹出层标题
          title: "",
          // 是否显示弹出层
          open: false,
          openLock: false,
          openlockPower: false,
          // 查询参数
          queryParams: {
            pageNum: 1,
            pageSize: 10,
            roomName: null,
            roomCode: null,
            deviceName: null,
            deviceCode: null,
          },
          queryParamsLockPower: {
            pageNum: 1,
            pageSize: 10,
            powerCode: null,
            name: null,
            powerIp: null,
          },
          // 表单参数
          form: {},
          // 表单校验
          rules: {
          },
          defaultProps: {
            children: "children",
            label: "label"
          },
          // 楼层名称
          locationName: undefined,
          lockValues: [],
          // 用户导入参数
          upload: {
            // 是否显示弹出层（用户导入）
            open: false,
            // 弹出层标题（用户导入）
            title: "",
            // 是否禁用上传
            isUploading: false,
            // 是否更新已经存在的用户数据
            updateSupport: 0,
            memberType: 1,
            // 设置上传的请求头部
            headers: {
              Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken()
            },
          },
        };
      },
      watch: {
        // 根据名称筛选树
        locationName(val) {
          this.$refs.tree.filter(val);
        }
      },
      created() {
        this.getTreeselect();
        this.locks = this.buildLocks;
        this.getList();
        listTeaInfo().then(response => {
          this.teaInfoList = response.rows;
        });
        this.getDeptTree();
      },
      methods: {
        getRowkey(row){
          return row.deviceId
        },
        // 关闭方法
        handleClose() {
            this.$emit('update:visible', false)
        },
        openDialogLock() {
          this.openLock = true
        },
        openDialogLockPower() {
          this.openLockPower = true;
          this.getLockPowerList();
        },
        /** 查询教室信息列表 <!-- this.$refs.multipleTable.toggleRowSelection(row, true); -->*/
        getList() {
          this.loading = false;
          listLock(this.queryParams).then(response => {
            this.lockList = response.rows;
            this.total = response.total;
            this.loading = false;
          });
        },
        // 表单重置
        reset() {
          this.form = {
            deviceId: null,
            roomName: null,
            roomCode: null,
            deviceCode: null,
            deviceName: null,
          };
          this.resetForm("form");
        },
        /** 搜索按钮操作 */
        handleQuery() {
          this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
          this.getList();
        },
        /** 重置按钮操作 */
        resetQuery() {
          this.resetForm("queryForm");
          this.queryParams.locationId = undefined;
          this.$refs.tree.setCurrentKey(null);
          this.handleQuery();
        },
        // 多选框选中数据
        handleSelectionChange(selection) {
          this.multipleSelection = selection
          this.ids = selection.map(item => item.deviceId)
          this.single = selection.length !== 1
          this.multiple = !selection.length
          this.locks = selection.map(item => item);
        },
        /** 查询位置下拉树结构 */
        getTreeselect() {
          locationTree().then(response => {
            this.locationOptions = response.data
          })
        },
        // 筛选节点
        filterNode(value, data) {
          if (!value) return true;
          return data.label.indexOf(value) !== -1;
        },
        // 节点单击事件
        handleNodeClick(data) {
          this.queryParams.locationId = data.id;
          this.handleQuery();
        },
        /** 查询部门下拉树结构 */
        getDeptTree() {
          deptTreeSelect().then(response => {
            this.deptOptions = response.data;
          });
        },
        handleSetLockSubmit(){
            this.$emit('buildLockChang', this.locks);
            this.handleClose();
        }
      }
    };
  </script>
  <style scoped>
    .leftdiv {
      width: 18%;
      float: left;
    }
    .rightdiv {
      width: 80%;
      float: left;
    }
    .custom-tree-node {
      flex: 1;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      font-size: 14px;
      padding-right: 8px;
    }
  </style>
<template>
    <div>
        <el-dialog title="选择门锁" :visible.sync="openLocationList" width="1000px"    append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
            <div class="el-dialog-div" style="height:680px;">
                <div class="leftdiv" style = "max-height:640px;overflow: auto">
                    <div class="head-container">
                    <el-input v-model="locationName" placeholder="请输入楼层名称" clearable size="small" prefix-icon="el-icon-search"
                        style="margin-bottom: 20px" />
                    </div>
                    <el-tree :data="locationOptions" :props="defaultProps" :expand-on-click-node="false"
                    :filter-node-method="filterNode" ref="tree" node-key="id" default-expand-all highlight-current
                    @node-click="handleNodeClick" />
                </div>
                <div class="rightdiv" >
                    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch" label-width="68px"  style="margin-left: 20px;">
                    <el-form-item label="教室编号" prop="roomCode">
                        <el-input v-model="queryParams.roomCode" placeholder="请输教室编号" clearable  @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" />
                    </el-form-item>
                    <el-form-item label="教室名称" prop="roomName">
                        <el-input v-model="queryParams.roomName" placeholder="请输入教室名称" clearable @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" />
                    </el-form-item>
                    <el-form-item label="门锁编号" prop="deviceCode">
                        <el-input v-model="queryParams.deviceCode" placeholder="请输门锁编号" clearable @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" />
                    </el-form-item>
                    <el-form-item label="门锁名称" prop="deviceName">
                        <el-input v-model="queryParams.deviceName" placeholder="请输入门锁名称" clearable @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" />
                    </el-form-item>
                    <el-form-item>
                        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
                        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
                    </el-form-item>
                    <el-form-item>
                        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-submit" size="mini"  @click="handleSetLockSubmit">确定</el-button>
                    </el-form-item>
                    </el-form>
                    <el-table ref="multipleTable" :row-key='getRowkey' v-loading="loading" :data="lockList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange" style="height:500px;overflow:auto">
                    <el-table-column :reserve-selection="true" type="selection" width="55" align="center" v-model="buildLocks"  :default-selection="buildLocks"/>
                    <el-table-column type="index" width="50" align="center" label="序号" />
                    <el-table-column label="教室编号" align="center" prop="roomCode" width="100" />
                    <el-table-column label="教室名称" align="center" prop="roomName" />
                    <el-table-column label="门锁编号" align="center" prop="deviceCode" />
                    <el-table-column label="门锁名称" align="center" prop="deviceName" />
                    </el-table>
                    <pagination v-show="total>0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize" :page-sizes="[30,100,200]"
                        @pagination="getList" />
                </div>
            </div>
      </el-dialog>
    </div>
  </template>
  <script>
    import {
      listLock,
    } from "@/api/jufe/cardInfo";
    import {
      listTeaInfo,
    } from "@/api/jufe/teaInfo";
    import {
      locationTree
    } from '@/api/location/location'
    import {
      deptTreeSelect
    } from "@/api/system/user";
    import Treeselect from "@riophae/vue-treeselect";
    import "@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css";
    import { getToken } from "@/utils/auth";
    export default {
      name: "BuildLock",
      props: {
        buildLocks: null,
        visible: {
            type: Boolean,
            default () {
                return false
            },
            rowkey:{
                type:String,
                default:'id'
            }
        },
      },
      components: {
        Treeselect
      },
      data() {
        return {
            openLocationList: true,
          // 部门树选项
          deptOptions: undefined,
          locationOptions: [],
          questionForm: {},
          // 遮罩层
          loading: true,
          // 选中数组
          ids: [],
          // 门锁实体
          locks: [],
          // 选中的双向数据
          transvalue: [],
          // 非单个禁用
          single: true,
          single1: true,
          // 非多个禁用
          multiple: true,
          // 显示搜索条件
          showSearch: true,
          // 总条数
          total: 0,
          //  表格数据
          lockList: [],
          // 弹出层标题
          title: "",
          // 是否显示弹出层
          open: false,
          openLock: false,
          openlockPower: false,
          // 查询参数
          queryParams: {
            pageNum: 1,
            pageSize: 30,
            roomName: null,
            roomCode: null,
            deviceName: null,
            deviceCode: null,
          },
          queryParamsLockPower: {
            pageNum: 1,
            pageSize: 10,
            powerCode: null,
            name: null,
            powerIp: null,
          },
          // 表单参数
          form: {},
          // 表单校验
          rules: {
          },
          defaultProps: {
            children: "children",
            label: "label"
          },
          // 楼层名称
          locationName: undefined,
          lockValues: [],
          // 用户导入参数
          upload: {
            // 是否显示弹出层（用户导入）
            open: false,
            // 弹出层标题（用户导入）
            title: "",
            // 是否禁用上传
            isUploading: false,
            // 是否更新已经存在的用户数据
            updateSupport: 0,
            memberType: 1,
            // 设置上传的请求头部
            headers: {
              Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken()
            },
          },
        };
      },
      watch: {
        // 根据名称筛选树
        locationName(val) {
          this.$refs.tree.filter(val);
        }
      },
      created() {
        this.getTreeselect();
        //this.locks = this.buildLocks;
        if(this.buildLocks!=undefined&&this.buildLocks.length>0){
          this.buildLocks.forEach(item=>{
            item.isShow = false;
            return item;
          })
        }
        this.getList();
        listTeaInfo().then(response => {
          this.teaInfoList = response.rows;
        });
        this.getDeptTree();
      },
      methods: {
        getRowkey(row){
          return row.deviceId
        },
        // 关闭方法
        handleClose() {
            this.$emit('update:visible', false)
        },
        openDialogLock() {
          this.openLock = true
        },
        openDialogLockPower() {
          this.openLockPower = true;
          this.getLockPowerList();
        },
        /** 查询教室信息列表 <!-- this.$refs.multipleTable.toggleRowSelection(row, true); -->*/
        getList() {
          this.loading = false;
          listLock(this.queryParams).then(response => {
            this.lockList = response.rows;
            if(this.lockList!=null&& this.lockList.length>0 ){
                this.lockList.forEach(item=>{
                  for(let i=0;i<this.buildLocks.length;i++){
                      if(item.deviceId == this.buildLocks[i].deviceId){
                            this.$refs.multipleTable.toggleRowSelection(item, true);
                            this.buildLocks[i].isShow =true ;
                      }
                  }
                })
            }
            this.total = response.total;
            this.loading = false;
          });
        },
        // 表单重置
        reset() {
          this.form = {
            deviceId: null,
            roomName: null,
            roomCode: null,
            deviceCode: null,
            deviceName: null,
          };
          this.resetForm("form");
        },
        /** 搜索按钮操作 */
        handleQuery() {
          this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
          this.getList();
        },
        /** 重置按钮操作 */
        resetQuery() {
          this.resetForm("queryForm");
          this.queryParams.locationId = undefined;
          this.$refs.tree.setCurrentKey(null);
          this.handleQuery();
        },
        // 多选框选中数据
        handleSelectionChange(selection) {
          const uniqueList = Array.from(new Set(selection.map(item => item.deviceId))).map(deviceId => {
            return selection.find(item => item.deviceId === deviceId);
          });
          /**  selection.forEach(item => { */
          /**    let flag =false;  */
          /** }); */
         this.multipleSelection = uniqueList
         this.ids = uniqueList.map(item => item.deviceId)
         this.single = uniqueList.length !== 1
         this.multiple = !uniqueList.length
         this.locks = uniqueList.map(item => item);
        },
           /**  for(let i=0;i<this.buildLocks.length;i++){  */
           /**     if(item.deviceId == this.buildLocks.deviceId){  */
            /**       flag= true;  */
            /**    }  */
            /**    if(!flag){  */
            /**       this.buildLocks.push(item);  */
            /**    }  */
           /**   }  */
        /** 查询位置下拉树结构 */
        getTreeselect() {
          locationTree().then(response => {
            this.locationOptions = response.data
          })
        },
        // 筛选节点
        filterNode(value, data) {
          if (!value) return true;
          return data.label.indexOf(value) !== -1;
        },
        // 节点单击事件
        handleNodeClick(data) {
          this.queryParams.locationId = data.id;
          this.handleQuery();
        },
        /** 查询部门下拉树结构 */
        getDeptTree() {
          deptTreeSelect().then(response => {
            this.deptOptions = response.data;
          });
        },
        handleSetLockSubmit(){
          if(this.buildLocks!=undefined&&this.buildLocks.length>0){
            this.buildLocks.forEach(item=>{
              if(item.isShow==undefined || item.isShow == false){
                  this.locks.push(item);
              }
            })
          }
          const uniqueList = Array.from(new Set(this.locks.map(item => item.deviceId))).map(deviceId => {
            return this.locks.find(item => item.deviceId === deviceId);
          });
          this.$emit('buildLockChang', uniqueList);
          this.handleClose();
        }
      }
    };
  </script>
  <style scoped>
    .leftdiv {
      width: 18%;
      float: left;
    }
    .rightdiv {
      width: 80%;
      float: left;
    }
    .custom-tree-node {
      flex: 1;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      font-size: 14px;
      padding-right: 8px;
    }
  </style>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch" label-width="100px">
      <el-form-item label="门卡ID" prop="cardCode">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.cardCode"
          placeholder="请输入门卡ID"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="门卡名称" prop="cardName">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.cardName"
          placeholder="请输入门卡名称"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <!-- <el-form-item label="状态" prop="status">
        <el-select
