        >
          <el-option
            v-for="dict in dict.type.sys_normal_disable"
            :key="dict.value"
            :label="dict.label"
            :value="dict.value"
          />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item> -->
      <el-form-item label="使用人" prop="userName">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.userName"
          placeholder="请输入使用人"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item>
        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleAdd"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:cardinfo:add']"
        >新增</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <right-toolbar :showSearch.sync="showSearch" @queryTable="getList"></right-toolbar>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="infoList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column type="index" width="50" align="center" label="序号" fixed="left"/>
      <el-table-column label="门卡ID" align="center" prop="cardCode" />
      <el-table-column label="门卡名称" align="center" prop="cardName" />
      <el-table-column label="使用人" align="center" prop="userName" />
      <el-table-column label="备注" align="center" prop="remark" />
      <!-- <el-table-column label="状态" align="center" prop="status"  >
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-switch
            v-model="scope.row.status"
            active-value="0"
            inactive-value="1"
            @change="handleStatusChange(scope.row)"
          ></el-switch>
        </template>
      </el-table-column> -->
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:cardinfo:edit']"
          >修改</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-delete"
            @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:cardinfo:remove']"
          >删除</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination
      v-show="total>0"
      :total="total"
      :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
      :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
      @pagination="getList"
    />
    <!-- 添加或修改门卡对话框 -->
    <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="open" width="500px" append-to-body>
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="80px">
        <el-form-item label="门卡ID" prop="cardCode" :rules="[{ required: true, message: '门卡ID不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isMac, trigger: 'blur' }]">
          <el-input v-model="form.cardCode" :disabled="editStatus" placeholder="请输入门卡ID" maxlength="10" minlength="10"   show-word-limit/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="门卡名称" prop="cardName"  :rules="[{ required: true, message: '门卡名称不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]" >
          <el-input v-model="form.cardName"  placeholder="请输入门卡名称" maxlength="50"   show-word-limit/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="门卡权限" prop="lockRefs" :rules="[{ required: true, message: '请选择门卡权限', trigger: 'blur' }]" >
          <el-button type="primary" @click="handleBuildLock" :title="lockSelTitle" v-if="operType!=2">{{lockSelTitle}}
          </el-button>
          <p>已选：{{buildLockShow}} 个</p>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="使用人" prop="userName">
          <el-select v-model="form.userName" placeholder="请选择使用人" filterable>
            <el-option-group
              v-for="group in groupUsers"
              :key="group.type"
              :label="group.label">
              <el-option v-if="group.type==='1'"
                v-for="item in group.users"
                :key="item.stuId"
                :label="item.stuName"
                :value="item.stuName">
                <span style="float: left">{{ item.stuName }}</span>
                <span style="float: right; color: #8492a6; font-size: 13px">{{ item.className }}</span>
              </el-option>
              <el-option v-if="group.type==='2'"
                         v-for="item in group.users"
                         :key="item.teaUserId"
                         :label="item.teaUserName"
                         :value="item.teaUserName">
                <span style="float: left">{{ item.teaUserName }}</span>
                <span style="float: right; color: #8492a6; font-size: 13px">{{ item.userDeptName }}</span>
              </el-option>
              <el-option v-if="group.type==='3'"
                         v-for="item in group.users"
                         :key="item.tempUserId"
                         :label="item.tempUserName"
                         :value="item.tempUserName">
                <span style="float: left">{{ item.tempUserName }}</span>
                <span style="float: right; color: #8492a6; font-size: 13px">{{ item.tempUnit }}</span>
              </el-option>
            </el-option-group>
          </el-select>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="备注" prop="remark">
          <el-input v-model="form.remark" type="textarea"   maxlength="100"   placeholder="请输入备注"    show-word-limit></el-input>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="状态">
              <el-radio-group v-model="form.status">
                <el-radio
                  v-for="dict in dict.type.sys_normal_disable"
                  :key="dict.value"
                  :label="dict.value"
                >{{dict.label}}</el-radio>
              </el-radio-group>
            </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
      <BuildLock v-if="visibleBuildLock" :visible.sync="visibleBuildLock" :buildLocks="form.lockRefs"
      @buildLockChang="buildLockChang"></BuildLock>
    </div>
</template>
<script>
import { listInfo, getInfo, delInfo, addInfo, updateInfo,changeCardStatus,listUsers } from "@/api/jufe/cardInfo";
import BuildLock from "@/views/jufe/cardInfo/buildLockDialogOne";
export default {
  name: "Info",
  components: {
    BuildLock
  },
  dicts: ['sys_normal_disable','temp_user_type'],
  data() {
    return {
      groupUsers:[],
      editStatus:true,
      visibleBuildLock: false,
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      // 非单个禁用
      single: true,
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 门卡表格数据
      infoList: [],
      //选的的门锁集合
      buildLockShow: "0",
      //门锁集合
      buildLocks: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      //lock选择
      lockSelTitle: "请选择门锁",
      //操作类型
      operType:0,
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        cardCode: null,
        cardName: null,
        userName: null,
        status: null,
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {
      },
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
      }
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
    this.getGroupUsers()
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询门卡列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listInfo(this.queryParams).then(response => {
        this.infoList = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    getGroupUsers(){
      listUsers().then(res=>{
        this.groupUsers = res.data
      })
    },
    // 取消按钮
    cancel() {
      this.open = false;
      this.reset();
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.form = {
        id: null,
        cardCode: null,
        cardName: null,
        userName: null,
        remark: null,
        status: "0",
        delFlag: null,
        lockRefs:[]
      };
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.id)
      this.single = selection.length!==1
      this.multiple = !selection.length
    },
    /** 新增按钮操作 */
    handleAdd() {
      this.reset();
      this.editStatus = false;
      this.open = true;
      this.title = "添加门卡";
    },
    /** 修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset();
      this.editStatus =  true;
      const id = row.id || this.ids
      getInfo(id).then(response => {
        this.form = response.data;
        this.form.lockRefs.map(item => {
          item.deviceId = item.lockId ;
          return item
        })
        this.buildLockShow = this.form.lockRefs.length;
        this.open = true;
        this.title = "修改门卡";
      });
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs["form"].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          if (this.form.id != null) {
            updateInfo(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.buildLockShow = 0;
              this.getList();
            });
          } else {
            addInfo(this.form).then(response => {
              if(response.data == 1){
                this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
                this.open = false;
                this.buildLockShow = 0;
                this.getList();
              }else if(response.data == -2){
                this.$modal.msgError("门卡ID不能重复");
              }else if(response.data == -1){
                this.$modal.msgError("门卡名称不能重复");
              }
            });
          }
        }
      });
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const ids = row.id || this.ids;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除门卡编号为"' + ids + '"的数据项？').then(function() {
        return delInfo(ids);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.download('jufe/info/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `info_${new Date().getTime()}.xlsx`)
    },
    isMac(rule, value, callback) {
      var pattern = /^[0-9A-Z]+$/
      if (value && pattern.test(value) && value !== 0) {
        callback()
      } else if (value && !pattern.test(value)) {
        callback(new Error('请输入正确门卡！'))
      } else {
        callback()
      }
    },
    // 用户状态修改
    handleStatusChange(row) {
      let text = row.status === "0" ? "启用" : "停用";
      this.$modal.confirm('确认要' + text + '"' + row.cardName + '"吗？').then(function() {
        return changeCardStatus(row.id, row.status);
      }).then(() => {
        this.$modal.msgSuccess(text + "成功");
      }).catch(function() {
        row.status = row.status === "0" ? "1" : "0";
      });
    },
    /** 楼栋按钮操作 */
    handleBuildLock() {
      this.visibleBuildLock = true;
    },
    buildLockChang(selection) {
      if (selection) {
        this.form.lockRefs = selection.map(item => {
          item.lockId = item.deviceId;
          return item
        }).filter(item2 => item2 !== undefined);
        this.form.lockRefs = selection;
        this.buildLockShow = selection.length+"";
        if (selection.length > 0) {
          this.lockSelTitle = "重新选择门锁";
        } else {
          this.lockSelTitle = "请选择门锁";
        }
      } else {
        this.form.lockRefs = []
        this.buildLockShow = "0";
        this.lockSelTitle = "请选择门锁";
      }
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <div class="common-container">
    <div class="common-left">
      <el-input
        placeholder="输入关键字进行过滤"
        v-model="filterText">
      </el-input>
      <el-tree
        class="filter-tree zhtreelist"
        :data="locationOptions"
        :props="defaultProps"
        :expand-on-click-node="false"
        default-expand-all
        :filter-node-method="filterNode"
        node-key="id"
        highlight-current
        @node-click="handleNodeClick"
        ref="tree">
      </el-tree>
    </div>
    <div class="common-right">
      <div class="top-list-xontain">
        <div class="top-list topbg1">
          <div class="top-title">门锁开</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.openNumberLock}}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="top-list topbg1">
          <div class="top-title">门锁关</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.noOpenNumberLock}}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="top-list topbg2">
          <div class="top-title">门锁电池低于20%</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.lowBatteryNumber}}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="top-list topbg3">
          <div class="top-title">空开开</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.openNumberSwitch}}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="top-list topbg3">
          <div class="top-title">空开关</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.noOpenNumberSwitch}}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="top-list topbg3">
          <div class="top-title">在线</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.onlineNumber}}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="top-list topbg3">
          <div class="top-title">离线</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.noOnlineNumber}}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="title-icon"><span></span>总控</div>
      <div class="middle-contain">
        <div class="middle-kuang">
          <div class="middle-kuang-left">
            <el-select v-model="value" placeholder="请选择">
              <el-option
                v-for="item in options"
                :key="item.value"
                :label="item.label"
                :value="item.value">
              </el-option>
            </el-select>
          </div>
          <div class="middle-kuang-right">
            <div class="middle-kuang-text" v-html="roomNameMiddle">
            </div>
            <div class="middle-kuang-button" v-if="value == '选项1'">
              <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" plain @click="powersSubmit('1','all', '全闭子空开')">全闭子空开</el-button>
              <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" @click="powersSubmit('2','all', '打开子空开')">打开子空开</el-button>
              <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" plain @click="powersSubmit('3','all', '全闭总空开')">全闭总空开</el-button>
              <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" @click="powersSubmit('4','all', '打开总空开')">打开总空开</el-button>
            </div>
            <div class="middle-kuang-button" v-else-if="value == '选项2'">
              <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" @click="locksSubmit('2','all', '全闭')">全闭</el-button>
              <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" @click="locksSubmit('1','all', '全开')">全开</el-button>
              <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" disabled>常开</el-button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="title-icon"><span></span>教室控制</div>
      <div class="middle-contain">
        <div class="width100 line-two">
          <el-form :model="roomParams" ref="roomParams" size="small" :inline="true"
                   label-width="90px">
            <el-form-item label="教室编号:" prop="roomCode">
              <el-input
                v-model="roomParams.roomCode"
                placeholder="请输入教室编号"
                clearable
                @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
              />
            </el-form-item>
            <el-form-item label="教室名称:" prop="roomName">
              <el-input
                v-model="roomParams.roomName"
                placeholder="请输入教室名称"
                clearable
                @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
              />
            </el-form-item>
            <el-form-item>
              <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
              <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-form>
          <div class="button-list">
            <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" class="allbutton-yellow" @click="checkboxDoors">批量控制门锁</el-button>
            <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" class="allbutton-pink" @click="checkboxpowers">批量控制电源</el-button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="logList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
          <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
          <el-table-column label="教室编号" align="center" prop="roomCode" width="100" />
          <el-table-column label="教室名称" align="center" prop="roomName" :show-overflow-tooltip="true" />
          <el-table-column label="门锁开关" align="center" width="200">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <span class="span-blue">门锁开</span>{{ scope.row.openNumberLock }}<span class="span-pink">门锁关</span>{{ scope.row.noOpenNumberLock }}
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
          <el-table-column label="门锁电量" align="center" width="150">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <span class="span-yellow">低于20%</span>{{ scope.row.lowBatteryNumber }}
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
          <el-table-column label="空开开关" align="center" width="200">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <span class="span-blue">空开开</span>{{ scope.row.openNumberSwitch }}<span class="span-pink">空开关</span>{{ scope.row.noOpenNumberSwitch }}
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
          <el-table-column label="在线状态" align="center" width="200">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <span class="span-blue">在线</span>{{ scope.row.onlineNumber }}<span class="span-pink">离线</span>{{ scope.row.noOnlineNumber }}
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
          <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" width="100">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <el-button type="primary" size="mini" class="button-list" @click="gotoDetail(scope.row.roomId, scope.row.roomName, scope.row.roomCode)">进入教室</el-button>
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
        </el-table>
        <pagination
          v-show="total>0"
          :total="total"
          :page.sync="roomParams.pageNum"
          :limit.sync="roomParams.pageSize"
          @pagination="getList"
        />
      </div>
    </div>
    <el-dialog title="批量控制门锁" :visible.sync="checkboxDoorsOpen" width="500px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <div class="dialog-content">
        <div class="dialog-title">控制开关选择</div>
        <div class="dialog-con">
          <el-button type="primary" plain class="button-list" @click="locksSubmit('2','part')">全闭</el-button>
          <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" @click="locksSubmit('1','part')">全开</el-button>
          <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" disabled>常开</el-button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitFormSetLock" >确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog title="批量控制门锁" :visible.sync="checkboxpowersOpen" width="600px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <div class="dialog-content">
        <div class="dialog-title">控制开关选择</div>
        <div class="dialog-con">
          <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" plain @click="powersSubmit('1','part')">全闭子空开</el-button>
          <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" @click="powersSubmit('2','part')">打开子空开</el-button>
          <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" plain @click="powersSubmit('3','part')">全闭总空开</el-button>
          <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" @click="powersSubmit('4','part')">打开总空开</el-button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitFormSetPower" >确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {locationTree} from '@/api/location/location'
import { countRoom, listRoom,  PowerNode, updateLock} from '@/api/jufe/command'
export default {
  components: {},
  name: 'command',
  watch: {
    filterText(val) {
      this.$refs.tree.filter(val);
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      checkboxDoorsOpen:false,
      checkboxpowersOpen:false,
      roomNameMiddle:"全部教室",
      roomNameModal:"全部教室",
      // 控制开关的参数
      buttonParams: {
        locationId: 0,
        type: null,
        ids: [],
      },
      // 查询参数
      roomParams: {
        locationId: null,
        roomName: null,
        roomCode: null,
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
      },
      // 左侧树数据
      locationOptions: [],
      // 表格数据
      logList: [],
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      options: [{
        value: '选项1',
        label: '电源控制'
      }, {
        value: '选项2',
        label: '门锁控制'
      }],
      value: '选项1',
      topList:{
        openNumberSwitch:0,
        onlineNumber:0,
        noOpenNumberLock:0,
        openNumberLock:0,
        lowBatteryNumber:0,
        noOpenNumberSwitch:0,
        noOnlineNumber:0,
      },
      filterText: '',
      defaultProps: {
        children: 'children',
        label: 'label'
      }
  }
}
,
created(){
  this.getTreeselect();
  this.getList();
  this.getRoomList()
}
,
methods: {
  filterNode(value, data) {
    if (!value) return true;
    return data.label.indexOf(value) !== -1;
  },
  /** 查询位置下拉树结构 */
  getTreeselect() {
    locationTree().then(response => {
      this.locationOptions = response.data
    })
  },
  // 节点单击事件
  handleNodeClick(data, Node) {
    if(Node.level == 2){
      this.roomNameMiddle = Node.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + data.label;
      this.roomNameModal = Node.parent.data.label +  data.label;
    }else if(Node.level == 3){
      this.roomNameMiddle = Node.parent.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + Node.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + data.label;
      this.roomNameModal = Node.parent.parent.data.label + Node.parent.data.label +  data.label;
    }else if(Node.level == 4){
      this.roomNameMiddle = Node.parent.parent.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + Node.parent.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + Node.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + data.label;
      this.roomNameModal = Node.parent.parent.parent.data.label + Node.parent.parent.data.label +  Node.parent.data.label + data.label;
    }else if(Node.level == 5){
      this.roomNameMiddle = Node.parent.parent.parent.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + Node.parent.parent.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + Node.parent.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + Node.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + data.label;
      this.roomNameModal = Node.parent.parent.parent.parent.data.label + Node.parent.parent.parent.data.label + Node.parent.parent.data.label + Node.parent.data.label + data.label;
    }else if(Node.level == 6){
      this.roomNameMiddle = Node.parent.parent.parent.parent.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + Node.parent.parent.parent.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + Node.parent.parent.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + Node.parent.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + Node.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + data.label;
      this.roomNameModal = Node.parent.parent.parent.parent.parent.data.label + Node.parent.parent.parent.parent.data.label + Node.parent.parent.parent.data.label + Node.parent.parent.data.label + Node.parent.data.label + data.label;
    }else {
      this.roomNameMiddle = data.label
      this.roomNameModal = data.label
    }
    this.roomParams.locationId = data.id;
    this.buttonParams.locationId = data.id;
    this.getRoomList();
    this.getList();
  },
  getRoomList(){
    countRoom(this.roomParams).then(response => {
      if(response.data){
        this.topList = response.data
      }
    })
  },
  /** 查询教室信息列表 */
  getList() {
    this.loading = false;
    listRoom(this.roomParams).then(response => {
      if(response.code == 200){
        if(response.data){
          this.topList = response.data
        }
        this.logList = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      }
    });
  },
  gotoDetail(id, roomName, roomCode) {
    this.$router.push({path: "/commandRoom", query:{id:id, roomName:roomName, roomCode:roomCode}})
  },
  /** 搜索按钮操作 */
  handleQuery() {
    this.roomParams.pageNum = 1;
    this.getList()
    this.getRoomList();
  },
  /** 重置按钮操作 */
  resetQuery() {
    this.resetForm("roomParams");
    this.roomParams.locationId = 0;
    this.$refs.tree.setCurrentKey(null);
    this.handleQuery();
  },
  // 多选框选中数据
  handleSelectionChange(selection) {
    this.buttonParams.ids = selection.map(item => item.roomId)
    // this.single = selection.length!==1
    // this.multiple = !selection.length
  },
  checkboxDoors(){
    if(this.buttonParams.ids.length == 0){
      this.$modal.msgError("请选择表格中教室");
      return
    }
    this.checkboxDoorsOpen = true
  },
  checkboxpowers(){
    if(this.buttonParams.ids.length == 0){
      this.$modal.msgError("请选择表格中教室");
      return
    }
    this.checkboxpowersOpen = true
  },
  powersSubmit(index, isAll, itemText){
    let newText = '( ' + this.roomNameModal + ' ) ' + '是否确定全部' + itemText
    this.$modal.confirm(newText).then(()=>{
      this.buttonParams.type = index;
      if(isAll == 'all'){
        this.buttonParams.ids = []
        this.submitEvery();
      }
    }).catch(() => {});
  },
  submitEvery(){
    PowerNode(this.buttonParams).then(item=>{
      this.getRoomList();
      this.getList();
    })
  },
  /** 提交按钮 */
  submitFormSetPower() {
    this.submitEvery();
  },
  locksSubmit(index, isAll){
    this.buttonParams.type = index;
    if(isAll == 'all'){
      this.buttonParams.ids = []
      this.submitLockEvery();
    }
  },
  submitLockEvery(){
    updateLock(this.buttonParams).then(item=>{
      this.getRoomList();
      this.getList();
    })
  },
  /** 提交按钮 */
  submitFormSetLock(){
    this.submitLockEvery();
  },
  // 取消按钮
  cancel() {
    this.checkboxDoorsOpen = false;
    this.checkboxpowersOpen = false;
    this.reset();
  },
}
}
</script>

    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 30px;
    font-size: 18px;
  }
  .dialog-con{
    width: 100%;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    .button-list{
      flex: 1;
      margin-left: 20px;
      margin-right: 20px;
    }
  }
}
</style>
<template>
  <div class="common-container">
    <div class="common-left">
      <el-input placeholder="输入关键字进行过滤" v-model="filterText">
      </el-input>
      <el-tree class="filter-tree zhtreelist" :data="locationOptions" :props="defaultProps"
        :expand-on-click-node="false" default-expand-all :filter-node-method="filterNode" node-key="id"
        highlight-current @node-click="handleNodeClick" ref="tree">
      </el-tree>
    </div>
    <div class="common-right">
      <div class="top-list-xontain">
        <div class="top-list topbg1">
          <div class="top-title">门锁开</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.openNumberLock}}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="top-list topbg1">
          <div class="top-title">门锁关</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.noOpenNumberLock}}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="top-list topbg2">
          <div class="top-title">门锁电池低于20%</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.lowBatteryNumber}}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="top-list topbg3">
          <div class="top-title">空开开</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.openNumberSwitch}}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="top-list topbg3">
          <div class="top-title">空开关</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.noOpenNumberSwitch}}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="top-list topbg4">
          <div class="top-title">在线</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.onlineNumber}}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="top-list topbg4">
          <div class="top-title">离线</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.noOnlineNumber}}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="title-icon"><span></span>总控</div>
      <div class="middle-contain">
        <div class="middle-kuang">
          <div class="middle-kuang-left">
            <el-select v-model="value" placeholder="请选择">
              <el-option v-for="item in options" :key="item.value" :label="item.label" :value="item.value">
              </el-option>
            </el-select>
          </div>
          <div class="middle-kuang-right">
            <div class="middle-kuang-text" v-html="roomNameMiddle">
            </div>
            <div class="middle-kuang-button" v-if="value == '选项1'">
              <div class="buttonleft">
                <span style="color:#0074FF;">子空开</span>
                <el-button type="primary" :disabled="disableStyle" class="button-list"
                @click="powersSubmit(2,'all', '打开子空开')">全开</el-button>
                <el-button type="primary" :disabled="disableStyle" class="button-list"
                @click="powersSubmit(1,'all', '全关子空开')">全关</el-button>
              </div>
              <div class="buttonright">
                <span style="color:#0074FF;">总空开</span>
                <el-button type="primary" :disabled="disableStyle" class="button-list"
                @click="powersSubmit(4,'all', '打开总空开')">全开</el-button>
                <el-button type="primary" :disabled="disableStyle" class="button-list"
                @click="powersSubmit(3,'all', '全关总空开')">全关</el-button>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="middle-kuang-button" v-else-if="value == '选项2'">
              <el-button type="primary" :disabled="disableStyle" class="button-list"
                @click="locksSubmit(2,'all', '全关')">全关</el-button>
              <el-button type="primary" :disabled="disableStyle" class="button-list"
                @click="locksSubmit(1,'all', '全开')">全开</el-button>
              <el-button type="primary" :disabled="disableStyle" class="button-list"
                @click="locksSubmit(3,'all', '常开')">常开</el-button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="title-icon"><span></span>教室控制</div>
      <div class="middle-contain">
        <div class="width100 line-two">
          <el-form :model="roomParams" ref="roomParams" size="small" :inline="true" label-width="90px">
            <el-form-item label="教室编号:" prop="roomCode">
              <el-input v-model="roomParams.roomCode" placeholder="请输入教室编号" clearable
                @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" />
            </el-form-item>
            <el-form-item label="教室名称:" prop="roomName">
              <el-input v-model="roomParams.roomName" placeholder="请输入教室名称" clearable
                @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" />
            </el-form-item>
            <el-form-item>
              <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
              <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-form>
          <div class="button-list">
            <!-- <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" class="allbutton-yellow" @click="checkboxDoors">批量控制门锁 -->
            <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" class="allbutton-yellow" @click="getListDeviceCountInfo(1)">批量控制门锁
            </el-button>
            <!-- <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" class="allbutton-pink" @click="checkboxpowers">批量控制电源 -->
              <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" class="allbutton-pink" @click="getListDeviceCountInfo(2)">批量控制电源
            </el-button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="logList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
          <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
          <el-table-column label="教室编号" align="center" prop="roomCode" width="100" />
          <el-table-column label="教室名称" align="center" prop="roomName" :show-overflow-tooltip="true" />
          <el-table-column label="楼栋位置" align="center" prop="location_name" width="200" />
          <el-table-column label="门锁开关" align="center" width="200">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <span class="span-blue">门锁开</span>{{ scope.row.openNumberLock }}<span
                class="span-pink">门锁关</span>{{ scope.row.noOpenNumberLock }}
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
          <el-table-column label="门锁电量" align="center" width="150">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <span class="span-yellow">低于20%</span>{{ scope.row.lowBatteryNumber }}
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
          <el-table-column label="空开开关" align="center" width="200">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <span class="span-blue">空开开</span>{{ scope.row.openNumberSwitch }}<span
                class="span-pink">空开关</span>{{ scope.row.noOpenNumberSwitch }}
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
          <el-table-column label="在线状态" align="center" width="200">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <span class="span-blue">在线</span>{{ scope.row.onlineNumber }}<span
                class="span-pink">离线</span>{{ scope.row.noOnlineNumber }}
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
          <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" width="200">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <el-button type="primary" size="mini" class="button-list"
                @click="gotoDetail(scope.row.roomId, scope.row.roomName, scope.row.roomCode)">进入教室</el-button>
              <!-- <el-button type="primary" size="mini" class="button-list"
                         @click="gotoMonitor(scope.row.roomId)">监控</el-button> -->
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
        </el-table>
        <pagination v-show="total>0" :total="total" :page.sync="roomParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="roomParams.pageSize"
          @pagination="getList" />
      </div>
    </div>
    <el-dialog title="批量控制门锁" :visible.sync="checkboxDoorsOpen" width="500px" append-to-body
      :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <div class="dialog-content">
        <div class="dialog-title">控制开关选择</div>
        <div class="dialog-con">
          <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" @click="locksSubmit(2,'part', '全关')">全关</el-button>
          <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" @click="locksSubmit(1,'part', '全开')">全开</el-button>
          <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" @click="locksSubmit(3,'part', '常开')">常开</el-button>
        </div>
        <div   style="color:#0074FF;margin-top: 10px;margin-left: 20px;">注：常开/常关操作不包含M型门锁</div>
      </div>
      <!--      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">-->
      <!--        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitFormSetLock" >确 定</el-button>-->
      <!--        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>-->
      <!--      </div>-->
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog title="批量控制电源" :visible.sync="checkboxpowersOpen" width="600px" append-to-body
      :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <div class="dialog-content">
        <div class="dialog-title">控制开关选择</div>
        <div class="dialog-con">
          <div class="buttonleftone">
            <span style="color:#0074FF;">子空开</span>
            <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" @click="powersSubmit(2,'part', '打开子空开')">全开</el-button>
            <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" @click="powersSubmit(1,'part', '全关子空开')">全关</el-button>
          </div>
          <div class="buttonrightone">
            <span style="color:#0074FF;">总空开</span>
            <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" @click="powersSubmit(3,'part', '全关总空开')">全关</el-button>
            <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" @click="powersSubmit(4,'part', '打开总空开')">全开</el-button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div   style="color:#0074FF;margin-top: 10px;">注:全开或全关操作不包含白名单中的空开</div>
      </div>
      <!--      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">-->
      <!--        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitFormSetPower" >确 定</el-button>-->
      <!--        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>-->
      <!--      </div>-->
    </el-dialog>
    <!-- 视频监控窗口 -->
    <el-dialog v-if="monitor.open" :title="monitor.title" :visible.sync="monitor.open" @closed="monitorClosed" width="100%"
               :close-on-click-modal="false" destroy-on-close fullscreen>
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12" v-for="(item,index) in monitor.videos" style="padding: 20px 20px">
          <stream-player :key="index"  :url="'rtsp://'+item.cameraUser+':'+item.cameraPassword+'@'+item.cameraIp+':'+item.cameraPort+'/h264/ch01/main/av_stream'"
          />
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
  import StreamPlayer from "@/components/StreamPlayer"
  import {
    locationTree
  } from '@/api/location/location'
  import {
    getMonitors,
    countRoom,
    countListRoom,
    listRoom,
    PowerNode,
    updateLock,
    confirmSelf
  } from '@/api/jufe/command'
  export default {
    components: {StreamPlayer},
    name: 'command',
    watch: {
      filterText(val) {
        this.$refs.tree.filter(val);
      }
    },
    data() {
      return {
        monitor: {
          title: "视频监控",
          open: false,
          videos: []
        },
        disableStyle: false, //按钮，默认可点击，数据为空，禁用
        checkboxDoorsOpen: false,
        checkboxpowersOpen: false,
        roomNameMiddle: "全部教室",
        roomNameModal: "全部教室",
        // 控制开关的参数
        buttonParams: {
          locationId: 0,
          type: null,
          ids: [],
          roomIds: []
        },
        // 查询参数
        roomParams: {
          locationId: null,
          location_name: null,
          roomName: null,
          roomCode: null,
          pageNum: 1,
          pageSize: 10,
        },
        // 左侧树数据
        locationOptions: [],
        // 表格数据
        logList: [],
        // 遮罩层
        loading: true,
        // 总条数
        total: 0,
        options: [{
          value: '选项1',
          label: '电源控制'
        }, {
          value: '选项2',
          label: '门锁控制'
        }],
        value: '选项1',
        topList: {
          openNumberSwitch: 0,
          onlineNumber: 0,
          noOpenNumberLock: 0,
          openNumberLock: 0,
          lowBatteryNumber: 0,
          noOpenNumberSwitch: 0,
          noOnlineNumber: 0,
          onlineNumberSwitchLvF: 0,
          offlineNumberSwitchLvF: 0,
          onlineNumberSwitchLvt: 0,
          offlineNumberSwitchLvt: 0,
          onlineNumberLock: 0,
          noOnlineNumberLock: 0,
        },
        listSelectCountInfo:{
          onlineNumberSwitchLvF: 0,
          offlineNumberSwitchLvF: 0,
          onlineNumberSwitchLvt: 0,
          offlineNumberSwitchLvt: 0,
          onlineNumberLock: 0,
          noOnlineNumberLock: 0,
        },
        filterText: '',
        defaultProps: {
          children: 'children',
          label: 'label'
        }
      }
    },
    created() {
      this.getTreeselect();
      this.getList();
      this.getRoomList()
    },
    methods: {
      filterNode(value, data) {
        if (!value) return true;
        return data.label.indexOf(value) !== -1;
      },
      /** 查询位置下拉树结构 */
      getTreeselect() {
        locationTree().then(response => {
          this.locationOptions = response.data
        })
      },
      // 节点单击事件
      handleNodeClick(data, Node) {
        if (Node.level == 2) {
          this.roomNameMiddle = Node.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + data.label;
          this.roomNameModal = Node.parent.data.label + data.label;
        } else if (Node.level == 3) {
          this.roomNameMiddle = Node.parent.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + Node.parent
            .data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + data.label;
          this.roomNameModal = Node.parent.parent.data.label + Node.parent.data.label + data.label;
        } else if (Node.level == 4) {
          this.roomNameMiddle = Node.parent.parent.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + Node
            .parent.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + Node.parent.data.label +
            ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + data.label;
          this.roomNameModal = Node.parent.parent.parent.data.label + Node.parent.parent.data.label + Node.parent.data
            .label + data.label;
        } else if (Node.level == 5) {
          this.roomNameMiddle = Node.parent.parent.parent.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' +
            Node.parent.parent.parent.data.label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + Node.parent.parent.data
            .label + ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + Node.parent.data.label +
            ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + data.label;
          this.roomNameModal = Node.parent.parent.parent.parent.data.label + Node.parent.parent.parent.data.label + Node
            .parent.parent.data.label + Node.parent.data.label + data.label;
        } else if (Node.level == 6) {
          this.roomNameMiddle = Node.parent.parent.parent.parent.parent.data.label +
            ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + Node.parent.parent.parent.parent.data.label +
            ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + Node.parent.parent.parent.data.label +
            ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + Node.parent.parent.data.label +
            ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + Node.parent.data.label +
            ' <span class="hengxian-line">—</span> ' + data.label;
          this.roomNameModal = Node.parent.parent.parent.parent.parent.data.label + Node.parent.parent.parent.parent
            .data.label + Node.parent.parent.parent.data.label + Node.parent.parent.data.label + Node.parent.data
            .label + data.label;
        } else {
          this.roomNameMiddle = data.label
          this.roomNameModal = data.label
        }
        this.roomParams.locationId = data.id;
        this.buttonParams.locationId = data.id;
        this.getRoomList();
        this.getList();
      },
      getRoomList() {
        countRoom(this.roomParams).then(response => {
          if (response.data) {
            this.topList = response.data;
          }
        })
      },
      /** 获取选择房间的设备统计信息 */
      getListDeviceCountInfo(type){
        if (this.buttonParams.roomIds.length == 0) {
          this.$modal.msgError("请选择表格中教室");
          return
        }
        const roomIds = this.buttonParams.roomIds;
        this.roomParams.roomIds= roomIds;
        countListRoom(this.roomParams).then(response => {
          if (response.data) {
            this.listSelectCountInfo = response.data;
            if(type==1){
              if((this.listSelectCountInfo.onlineNumberLock+this.listSelectCountInfo.noOnlineNumberLock)<1){
                this.$modal.msgError("当前无可控制门锁");
                return;
              }else if(this.listSelectCountInfo.noOnlineNumberLock>0&&this.listSelectCountInfo.onlineNumberLock==0){
                this.$modal.msgError("教室内门锁处于离线状态，暂不可控制");
                return;
              }
              this.checkboxDoorsOpen = true
            }else{
              if((this.listSelectCountInfo.onlineNumberSwitchLvF+this.listSelectCountInfo.offlineNumberSwitchLvF+this.listSelectCountInfo.onlineNumberSwitchLvt+this.listSelectCountInfo.offlineNumberSwitchLvt)<1){
                this.$modal.msgError("当前无可控制空开");
                return;
              }else if((this.listSelectCountInfo.onlineNumberSwitchLvF+this.listSelectCountInfo.onlineNumberSwitchLvt)<1){
                this.$modal.msgError("教室内空开处于离线状态，暂不可控制");
                return;
              }
              this.checkboxpowersOpen = true
            }
          }
        })
      },
      /** 查询教室信息列表 */
      getList() {
        this.loading = false;
        listRoom(this.roomParams).then(response => {
          if (response.code == 200) {
            if (response.data) {
              this.topList = response.data
            }
            this.logList = response.rows;
            this.total = response.total;
            this.disableSwitch()
            this.loading = false;
          }
        });
      },
      disableSwitch() {
        if (this.logList.length == 0) {
          this.disableStyle = true
        } else {
          this.disableStyle = false
        }
      },
      gotoDetail(id, roomName, roomCode) {
        this.$router.push({
          path: "/commandRoom",
          query: {
            id: id,
            roomName: roomName,
            roomCode: roomCode,
            locationId: this.buttonParams.locationId
          }
        })
      },
      /** 搜索按钮操作 */
      handleQuery() {
        this.roomParams.pageNum = 1;
        this.getList()
        this.getRoomList();
      },
      /** 重置按钮操作 */
      resetQuery() {
        this.resetForm("roomParams");
        this.roomParams.locationId = 0;
        this.$refs.tree.setCurrentKey(null);
        this.handleQuery();
      },
      // 多选框选中数据
      handleSelectionChange(selection) {
        this.buttonParams.roomIds = selection.map(item => item.roomId)
      },
      checkboxDoors() {
        if (this.buttonParams.roomIds.length == 0) {
          this.$modal.msgError("请选择表格中教室");
          return
        }
        this.checkboxDoorsOpen = true
      },
      checkboxpowers() {
        getListDeviceCountInfo
        if (this.buttonParams.roomIds.length == 0) {
          this.$modal.msgError("请选择表格中教室");
          return
        }
        this.checkboxpowersOpen = true
      },
      powersSubmit(index, isAll, itemText) {
        this.buttonParams.type = index;
        if (isAll == 'all') {
          if(index==1||index==2){
            if((this.topList.onlineNumberSwitchLvF+this.topList.offlineNumberSwitchLvF)<1){
              this.$modal.msgError("当前无可控制子空开");
              return;
            }else if(this.topList.offlineNumberSwitchLvF>0&&this.topList.onlineNumberSwitchLvF==0){
              this.$modal.msgError("教室内子空开处于离线状态，暂不可控制");
              return;
            }
          }else if(index==3||index==4){
            if((this.topList.onlineNumberSwitchLvt+this.topList.offlineNumberSwitchLvt)<1){
              this.$modal.msgError("当前无可控制总空开");
              return;
            }else if(this.topList.offlineNumberSwitchLvt>0&&this.topList.onlineNumberSwitchLvt==0){
              this.$modal.msgError("教室内总空开处于离线状态，暂不可控制");
              return;
            }
          }
          if (this.logList.length != 0) {
            let newText = '( ' + this.roomNameModal + ' ) ' + '是否确定全部' + itemText
            if(index==1||index==2){
              let msgRemind = "操作不包含白名单中的空开";
              if(index==1){
                msgRemind="注:全关"+msgRemind;
              }else{
                msgRemind="注:全开"+msgRemind;
              }
              confirmSelf(this,newText,msgRemind);
            }else{
              this.$modal.confirm(newText).then(() => {
                // 与子空开逻辑保持一致，可以通过列表勾选批量控制，如果不勾选则控制全部
                // this.buttonParams.roomIds = []
                this.submitEvery();
              }).catch(() => {});
            }
          } else {
            this.$modal.msgError("暂无可用数据");
            return
          }
        } else {
          if(index==1||index==2){
            if((this.listSelectCountInfo.onlineNumberSwitchLvF+this.listSelectCountInfo.offlineNumberSwitchLvF)<1){
              this.$modal.msgError("当前无可控制子空开");
              return;
            }else if(this.listSelectCountInfo.offlineNumberSwitchLvF>0&&this.listSelectCountInfo.onlineNumberSwitchLvF==0){
              this.$modal.msgError("教室内子空开处于离线状态，暂不可控制");
              return;
            }
          }else if(index==3||index==4){
            if((this.listSelectCountInfo.onlineNumberSwitchLvt+this.listSelectCountInfo.offlineNumberSwitchLvt)<1){
              this.$modal.msgError("当前无可控制总空开");
              return;
            }else if(this.listSelectCountInfo.offlineNumberSwitchLvt>0&&this.listSelectCountInfo.onlineNumberSwitchLvt==0){
              this.$modal.msgError("教室内总空开处于离线状态，暂不可控制");
              return;
            }
          }
          this.checkboxDoorsOpen = false;
          this.checkboxpowersOpen = false;
          this.submitEvery();
        }
      },
      submitEvery() {
        PowerNode(this.buttonParams).then(item => {
          if (item.code == 200) {
            if (item.msg == "修改成功") {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("操作成功");
            } else {
              this.$modal.msgWarning(item.msg);
            }
            this.getRoomList();
            this.getList();
          } else {
            this.$modal.msgError(item.msg);
          }
        })
      },
      /** 提交按钮 */
      submitFormSetPower() {
        this.submitEvery();
      },
      locksSubmit(index, isAll, itemText) {
        this.buttonParams.type = index;
        if (isAll == 'all') {
          if((this.topList.onlineNumberLock+this.topList.noOnlineNumberLock)<1){
              this.$modal.msgError("当前无可控制门锁");
              return;
            }else if(this.topList.noOnlineNumberLock>0&&this.topList.onlineNumberLock==0){
              this.$modal.msgError("教室内门锁处于离线状态，暂不可控制");
              return;
            }
          if (this.logList.length != 0) {
            let newText = '( ' + this.roomNameModal + ' ) ' + '是否确定全部' + itemText
            if(index==2||index==3){
              const h = this.$createElement;
              this.$confirm('', {
                title: '系统提示',
                message:h('div',null, [
                  h('div',{ class:'el-icon-warning',style:'color:#f90;font-size:30px;' }),
                  h('span',{ style:'margin-left:10px;font-size:14px;line-height:30px; vertical-align:top;'}, newText),
                  // h('div',{ class:'el-message-box__message'}, messageo),
                  h('p',{ style:'margin:10px 0 0 40px;font-size:10px;color:#0074FF;' },'注：常开/常关操作不包含M型门锁')
                ]),
                confirmButtonText: '确定',
                cancelButtonText: '取消',
                customClass:'del-model',
                closeOnClickModal:false,
                closeOnPressEscape:false,
                }).then(() => {
                  this.buttonParams.roomIds = []
                  this.submitLockEvery();
                }).catch(() => {
              });
            }else{
              this.$modal.confirm(newText).then(() => {
                this.buttonParams.roomIds = []
                this.submitLockEvery();
              }).catch(() => {});
            }
          } else {
            this.$modal.msgError("暂无可用数据");
            return;
          }
        } else {
          this.checkboxDoorsOpen = false;
          this.checkboxpowersOpen = false;
          this.submitLockEvery();
        }
      },
      submitLockEvery() {
        updateLock(this.buttonParams).then(item => {
          if (item.code == 200) {
            this.$modal.msgSuccess("操作成功");
            this.getRoomList();
            this.getList();
          } else {
            this.$modal.msgError(item.msg);
          }
        })
      },
      /** 提交按钮 */
      submitFormSetLock() {
        this.submitLockEvery();
      },
      // 取消按钮
      cancel() {
        this.checkboxDoorsOpen = false;
        this.checkboxpowersOpen = false;
        this.reset();
      },
      gotoMonitor(roomId){
        getMonitors(roomId).then(e=>{
          this.monitor.open = true
          this.monitor.videos = e.data
        })
      },
      monitorClosed(){
        this.monitor.open = false
        this.monitor.videos = []
      }
    }
  }
</script>

              </el-select>

              <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handlePowerQuery">搜索</el-button>
              <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
              <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" class="allbutton-pink" @click="checkboxpowers">批量控制空开
              </el-button>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-form>
          <el-table v-loading="loading2" :data="powertopList2" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange2"
            @select="select" @select-all="selectAll" row-key="powerNodeId" :default-expand-all="false" ref="table">
            <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" :key="1" />
            <el-table-column label="编号" align="left" prop="powerNodeNum" :key="2" />
            <el-table-column label="名称" align="center" prop="powerNodeNode" :key="3" />
            <el-table-column label="类型" align="center" :key="4">
              <template slot-scope="scope">
                <div v-if="scope.row.deviceNodeType == '1'">
                  总电源
                </div>
                <div v-else-if="scope.row.deviceNodeType == '2'">
                  总空开
                </div>
                <div v-else-if="scope.row.deviceNodeType == '3'">
                  子电源
                </div>
                <div v-else-if="scope.row.deviceNodeType == '4'">
                  子空开
                </div>
              </template>
            </el-table-column>
            <el-table-column label="教室编号" align="center" prop="roomCode" :key="5" />
            <el-table-column label="教室名称" align="center" prop="roomName" :key="6" />
            <el-table-column label="是否在白名单内" align="center" :key="7">
              <template slot-scope="scope">
                <template v-if="scope.row.deviceNodeType == '4'">
                  <div class="tag-open" v-if="scope.row.inWhiteList == '1'">
                    是
                  </div>
                  <div class="tag-close" v-else>
                    否
                  </div>
                </template>
                <template  v-else>
                  <div>
                    --
                  </div>
                </template>
              </template>
            </el-table-column>
            <el-table-column label="在线状态" align="center" :key="8">
              <template slot-scope="scope">
                <template v-if="scope.row.deviceNodeType == '4'||scope.row.deviceNodeType == '2'">
                  <div class="tag-open" v-if="scope.row.onlineStatus == '1'">
                    在线
                  </div>
                  <div class="tag-close" v-else>
                    离线
                  </div>
                </template>
              </template>
            </el-table-column>
            <el-table-column label="开关状态" align="center" :key="9">
              <template slot-scope="scope">
                <div v-if="scope.row.deviceNodeType == '2' || scope.row.deviceNodeType == '4'|| scope.row.onlineStatus == '1'">
                  <div class="tag-open" v-if="scope.row.onoffStatus == '1'">
                    开
                  </div>
                  <div class="tag-close" v-else-if="scope.row.onoffStatus == '0'">
                    关
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div v-else>
                  --
                </div>
              </template>
            </el-table-column>
            <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" fixed="right" width="250" :key="10">
              <template slot-scope="scope">
                <template v-if="scope.row.onlineStatus == '1'">
                  <div v-if="scope.row.deviceNodeType == '2' || scope.row.deviceNodeType == '4'">
                    <template v-if="scope.row.onoffStatus == '1' && scope.row.deviceNodeType == '2'">
                      <!--                    开-->
                      <el-button size="mini" type="primary" @click="powersSubmit(3,'only', '关闭总空开', scope.row)">关闭总空开
                      </el-button>
                    </template>
                    <template v-else-if="scope.row.onoffStatus == '1' && scope.row.deviceNodeType == '4'">
                      <!--                    关-->
                      <el-button size="mini" type="primary" @click="powersSubmit(1,'only', '关闭子空开', scope.row)">关闭子空开
                      </el-button>
                    </template>
                    <template v-else-if="scope.row.onoffStatus == '0' && scope.row.deviceNodeType == '2'">
                      <!--                    关-->
                      <el-button size="mini" type="primary" @click="powersSubmit(4,'only', '打开总空开', scope.row)">打开总空开
                      </el-button>
                    </template>
                    <template v-else-if="scope.row.onoffStatus == '0' && scope.row.deviceNodeType == '4'">
                      <!--                    关-->
                      <el-button size="mini" type="primary" @click="powersSubmit(2,'only', '打开子空开', scope.row)">打开子空开
                      </el-button>
                    </template>
                  </div>
                  <div v-else>
                    --
                  </div>
                </template>
                <template v-else >
                  <!--                  为离线状态的时候，为空-->
                </template>
              </template>
            </el-table-column>
          </el-table>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <el-dialog title="批量控制门锁" :visible.sync="checkboxDoorsOpen" width="500px" append-to-body
      :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <div class="dialog-content">
        <div class="dialog-title">控制开关选择</div>
        <div class="dialog-con">
          <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" @click="locksSubmit(2,'part', '全关')">全关</el-button>
          <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" @click="locksSubmit(1,'part', '全开')">全开</el-button>
          <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" @click="locksSubmit(1,'part', '常开')">常开</el-button>
        </div>
        <div style="color:#0074FF;margin-top: 10px;margin-left: 20px;">注：常开/常关操作不包含M型门锁</div>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog title="批量控制空开" :visible.sync="checkboxpowersOpen" width="600px" append-to-body
      :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <div class="dialog-content">
        <div class="dialog-title">控制开关选择</div>
        <div class="dialog-con">
          <el-button type="primary" class="button-list"  @click="powerNodesSubmit(0, '全关')">全关</el-button>
          <el-button type="primary" class="button-list" @click="powerNodesSubmit(1,'打开空开')">全开</el-button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog title="查看密码" :visible.sync="passwordOpen" width="300px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <div class="dialog-content">
        <div class="dialog-title" style="height: 30px" v-if="passWordValue == null">密码为空</div>
        <div class="dialog-title" style="height: 30px" v-else>{{passWordValue}}</div>
        <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer" style="text-align: center;">
          <el-button type="primary" @click="cancel">知道了</el-button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
  import {
    countRoom,
    listRoom,
    PowerNode,
    updatePowerNodeSelect,
    updateLock,
    ClassRoom,
    PowerTableList,
    confirmSelf
  } from '@/api/jufe/command'
  export default {
    components: {},
    name: 'commandRoom',
    dicts: ['is_or_not','door_lock_type'],
    watch: {
      "$route.query": {
        immediate: true, // 第一次的数据，也要当做是一种变化
        // 处理函数（不能修改名字） handler('新的值'，'旧的值')
        handler(new_value, old_value) {
          // this.value='选项2';
          this.topList = {
            openNumberSwitch: 0,
            onlineNumber: 0,
            noOpenNumberLock: 0,
            openNumberLock: 0,
            lowBatteryNumber: 0,
            noOpenNumberSwitch: 0,
            noOnlineNumber: 0,
            noOnlineNumberLock: 0,
            onlineNumberLock: 0
          }
          this.logList = []
          this.powertopList2 = []
          this.roomId = this.$route.query.id;
          this.roomParams.roomId = this.$route.query.id;
          this.powerParams.roomId = this.$route.query.id;
          this.buttonParams.roomIds = []
          this.buttonParams.roomIds.push(this.$route.query.id)
          // 按钮开关的id
          this.buttonParams.locationId = this.$route.query.locationId;
          // id:id, roomName:roomName, roomCode:roomCode
          this.roomNameMiddle = '<span class="numbers">NO.</span>' + this.$route.query.roomName + ' ' + this.$route
            .query.roomCode
          this.roomNameModal = this.$route.query.roomName + ' ' + this.$route.query.roomCode
          this.roomName = this.$route.query.roomName;
          this.roomCode = this.$route.query.roomCode
          this.getList()
          this.getRoomList()
          this.getPowerList()
        },
      }
    },
    data() {
      return {
        passWordValue: "",
        roomNameModal: "",
        customColor: '#ff0000',
        passwordOpen: false,
        checkboxDoorsOpen: false,
        checkboxpowersOpen: false,
        roomName: "",
        roomCode: "",
        roomNameMiddle: "",
        // 控制开关的参数
        buttonParams: {
          locationId: 0,
          roomIds: [],
          type: null,
          ids: [],
        },
        nodeSelectInfo:[],
        lockSelectInfo:[],
        // 门锁查询参数
        roomParams: {
          roomId: null,
          deviceCode: null,
          deviceName: null,
          openStatus: null,
          onlineStatus: null,
          eleQuantitySelect: [0, 100],
          pageNum: 1,
          pageSize: 10,
        },
        // 电源查询参数
        powerParams: {
          roomId: null,
          powerNodeNum: null,
          powerNodeNode: null,
          onoffStatus: null,
          onlineStatus: null,
          pageNum: 1,
          pageSize: 10,
        },
        // 表格数据
        logList: [],
        // 遮罩层
        loading: true,
        // 总条数
        total: 0,
        // 表格数据2
        powertopList2: [],
        // 遮罩层
        loading2: true,
        // 总条数
        total2: 0,
        zaixianOnoff: [{
            value: "1",
            label: "在线"
          },
          {
            value: "0",
            label: "离线"
          }
        ],
        switchOff: [{
            value: "1",
            label: "开"
          },
          {
            value: "2",
            label: "关"
          }
        ],
        switchOff2: [{
            value: "1",
            label: "开"
          },
          {
            value: "0",
            label: "关"
          }
        ],
        switchOnline: [{
            value: "1",
            label: "在线"
          },
          {
            value: "2",
            label: "离线"
          }
        ],
        options: [{
          value: '选项1',
          label: '门锁控制'
        }, {
          value: '选项2',
          label: '电源控制'
        }],
        value: '选项2',
        topList: {
          openNumberSwitch: 0,
          onlineNumber: 0,
          noOpenNumberLock: 0,
          openNumberLock: 0,
          lowBatteryNumber: 0,
          noOpenNumberSwitch: 0,
          noOnlineNumber: 0,
          noOnlineNumberLock: 0,
          onlineNumberLock: 0
        },
        createdFlag: true,
        roomId: 0,
      }
    },
    created() {
      this.getList()
      this.getRoomList()
      this.getPowerList()
    },
    methods: {
      /** 搜索按钮操作 */
      handleQuery() {
        this.roomParams.pageNum = 1;
        this.getList()
        this.getRoomList()
      },
      /** 搜索按钮操作 */
      handlePowerQuery() {
        this.powerParams.pageNum = 1;
        this.getList()
        this.getPowerList()
      },
      /** 重置按钮操作 */
      resetQuery() {
        this.resetForm("roomParams");
        this.resetForm("powerParams");
        this.roomParams = {
          roomId: this.roomId,
          deviceCode: null,
          deviceName: null,
          openStatus: null,
          onlineStatus: null,
          eleQuantitySelect: [0, 100],
          pageNum: 1,
          pageSize: 10,
        };
        this.powerParams = {
            roomId: this.roomId,
            powerNodeNum: null,
            powerNodeNode: null,
            onoffStatus: null,
            onlineStatus: null,
            pageNum: 1,
            pageSize: 10,
          },
          this.handleQuery();
        this.getPowerList()
      },
      // 多选框选中数据
      handleSelectionChange(selection) {
        this.lockSelectInfo = selection;
        this.buttonParams.ids = selection.map(item => item.deviceId)
      },
      // 多选框选中数据
      handleSelectionChange2(selection) {
        this.nodeSelectInfo = selection
        this.buttonParams.ids = selection.map(item => item.powerNodeId)
      },
      /** 查询教室信息列表 */
      getList() {
        this.loading = true;
        ClassRoom(this.roomParams).then(response => {
          if (response.code == 200) {
            if (response.data) {
              this.topList = response.data
            }
            this.logList = response.rows;
            this.logList.forEach((item) => {
              item.roomName = this.roomName;
              item.roomCode = this.roomCode;
            })
            this.total = response.total;
            this.loading = false;
            if (this.createdFlag) {
              this.value = '选项1';
              this.createdFlag = false;
            }
          }
        });
      },
      // 电源表格列表
      getPowerList() {
        this.loading2 = true;
        PowerTableList(this.powerParams).then(response => {
          if (response.code == 200) {
            if (response.data) {
              this.powertopList2 = response.data
            }
            this.powertopList2 = this.handleTree(response.rows, "powerNodeId");
            this.total2 = response.total;
            this.loading2 = false;
          }
        })
      },
      // 门锁上方信息
      getRoomList() {
        countRoom(this.roomParams).then(response => {
          if (response.data) {
            this.topList = response.data;
          }
        })
      },
      checkboxDoors() {
        if (this.buttonParams.ids.length == 0) {
          this.$modal.msgError("请选择表格中门锁");
          return
        }
        let onLineCount = 0;
        let locks = this.lockSelectInfo;
        if(locks!=null&&locks.length>0){
          locks.forEach(function(lock,index){
            if(lock.onlineStatus==1){
              onLineCount++;
            }
          })
        }
        if(onLineCount==0){
          this.$modal.msgError("所选的门锁均处于离线状态，暂不可控制");
          return;
        }
        this.checkboxDoorsOpen = true
      },
      checkboxpowers() {
        // if (this.buttonParams.ids.length == 0) {
        //   this.$modal.msgError("请选择表格中空开");
        //   return
        // }
          console.info(this.buttonParams.ids );
          console.info(this.powertopList2 );
        let onLineCount = 0;
        let countNode = 0;
        let nodes  = this.nodeSelectInfo;
        if(nodes!=null&&nodes.length>0){
          nodes.forEach(function(node,index){
            if((node.deviceNodeType==2 || node.deviceNodeType==4 )&&node.onlineStatus==1){
              onLineCount++;
            }
            if(node.deviceNodeType==2 || node.deviceNodeType==4 ){
              countNode++
            }
          })
        }
        if(countNode==0){
          this.$modal.msgError("请选择表格中空开");
          return
        }
        if(onLineCount==0){
          this.$modal.msgError("所选的空开均处于离线状态，暂不可控制");
          return;
        }
        this.checkboxpowersOpen = true;
      },
      /** 空开部分控制 */
      powerNodesSubmit(type,itemText){
        this.buttonParams.type = type;
        this.checkboxDoorsOpen = false;
        this.checkboxpowersOpen = false;
        this.buttonParams.ids = [];
        let onLineCount = 0;
        let nodes  = this.nodeSelectInfo;
        const ids = [];
        if(nodes!=null&&nodes.length>0){
          nodes.forEach(function(node,indexj){
            if((node.deviceNodeType==2 || node.deviceNodeType==4 )&&node.onlineStatus==1){
              onLineCount++;
              ids.push(node.powerNodeId);
            }
          })
        }else{
          this.$modal.msgError("请选择表格中空开");
          return
        }
        this.buttonParams.ids = ids
        if(onLineCount==0){
          this.$modal.msgError("请选择表格中在线的空开");
          return
        }
        this.submitSelectNode();
        this.buttonParams.ids = [];
      },
      /** 空开全部控制 */
      powersSubmit(index, isAll, itemText, item) {
        this.buttonParams.type = index;
        if (isAll == 'all') {
          if(index==1||index==2){
            if((this.topList.onlineNumberSwitchLvF+this.topList.offlineNumberSwitchLvF)<1){
              this.$modal.msgError("当前无可控制子空开");
              return;
            }else if(this.topList.offlineNumberSwitchLvF>0&&this.topList.onlineNumberSwitchLvF==0){
              this.$modal.msgError("教室内子空开处于离线状态，暂不可控制");
              return;
            }
          }else if(index==3||index==4){
            if((this.topList.onlineNumberSwitchLvt+this.topList.offlineNumberSwitchLvt)<1){
              this.$modal.msgError("当前无可控制总空开");
              return;
            }else if(this.topList.offlineNumberSwitchLvt>0&&this.topList.onlineNumberSwitchLvt==0){
              this.$modal.msgError("教室内总空开处于离线状态，暂不可控制");
              return;
            }
          }
          let newText =  '( ' + this.roomNameModal + ' ) ' + '是否确定全部' + itemText
          if(index==1||index==2){
            let msgRemind = "操作不包含白名单中的空开";
            if(index==1){
              msgRemind="注:全关"+msgRemind;
            }else{
              msgRemind="注:全开"+msgRemind;
            }
            confirmSelf(this,newText,msgRemind);
          }else{
            this.$modal.confirm(newText).then(() => {
              this.buttonParams.ids = []
              this.submitEvery();
            }).catch(() => {});
          }
        } else if (isAll == 'part') {
          this.checkboxDoorsOpen = false;
          this.checkboxpowersOpen = false;
          this.submitEvery();
        } else if (isAll == 'only') {
          this.buttonParams.ids = [];
          this.buttonParams.ids.push(item.powerNodeId)
          this.buttonParams.isBatch = 0;
          let onlyoneText = '( ' + this.roomNameModal + '  ' + item.powerNodeNode + ' ) ' + '是否确定' + itemText
          this.$modal.confirm(onlyoneText).then(() => {
            this.submitEvery();
          }).catch(() => {});
        }
      },
      submitSelectNode(){
        updatePowerNodeSelect(this.buttonParams).then(item => {
          if (item.code == 200) {
            if (item.data == 0) {
              this.$modal.msgWarning("无效操作，无可修改设备。");
            } else {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("操作成功");
            }
            this.getRoomList();
            // this.getList();
            this.getPowerList()
          } else {
            this.$modal.msgError(item.msg);
          }
          this.buttonParams.ids = []
        })
      },
      submitEvery() {
        PowerNode(this.buttonParams).then(item => {
          if (item.code == 200) {
            if (item.data == 0) {
              this.$modal.msgWarning("无效操作，无可修改设备。");
            } else {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("操作成功");
            }
            this.getRoomList();
            // this.getList();
            this.getPowerList()
          } else {
            this.$modal.msgError(item.msg);
          }
          this.buttonParams.ids = [];
          this.buttonParams.isBatch = null;
        })
      },
      /** 提交按钮 */
      submitFormSetPower() {
        this.submitEvery();
      },
      locksSubmit(index, isAll, itemText, item) {
        this.buttonParams.type = index;
        if (isAll == 'all') {
          if((this.topList.onlineNumberLock+this.topList.noOnlineNumberLock)<1){
              this.$modal.msgError("当前无可控制门锁");
              return;
            }else if(this.topList.noOnlineNumberLock>0&&this.topList.onlineNumberLock==0){
              this.$modal.msgError("教室内门锁处于离线状态，暂不可控制");
              return;
            }
          let newText = '( ' + this.roomNameModal + ' ) ' + '是否确定全部' + itemText;
          if(index==2||index==3){
            const h = this.$createElement;
            this.$confirm('', {
              title: '系统提示',
              message:h('div',null, [
                h('div',{ class:'el-icon-warning',style:'color:#f90;font-size:30px;' }),
                h('span',{ style:'margin-left:10px;font-size:14px;line-height:30px; vertical-align:top;'}, newText),
                // h('div',{ class:'el-message-box__message'}, messageo),
                h('p',{ style:'margin:10px 0 0 40px;font-size:10px;color:#0074FF;' },'注：常开/常关操作不包含M型门锁')
              ]),
              confirmButtonText: '确定',
              cancelButtonText: '取消',
              customClass:'del-model',
              closeOnClickModal:false,
              closeOnPressEscape:false,
              }).then(() => {
                this.buttonParams.ids = []
                this.submitLockEvery();
              }).catch(() => {
            });
          }else{
            this.$modal.confirm(newText).then(() => {
              this.buttonParams.ids = []
              this.submitLockEvery();
            }).catch(() => {});
          }
        } else if (isAll == 'part') {
          this.checkboxDoorsOpen = false;
          this.checkboxpowersOpen = false;
          this.submitLockEvery();
        } else if (isAll == 'only') {
          this.buttonParams.ids = [];
          this.buttonParams.ids.push(item.deviceId)
          let onlyoneText = '( ' + this.roomNameModal + '  ' + item.deviceName + ' ) ' + '是否确定' + itemText
          this.$modal.confirm(onlyoneText).then(() => {
            this.submitLockEvery();
          }).catch(() => {});
        }
      },
      submitLockEvery() {
        updateLock(this.buttonParams).then(item => {
          if (item.code == 200) {
            this.$modal.msgSuccess("操作成功");
            this.getRoomList();
            this.getList();
          } else {
            this.$modal.msgError(item.msg);
          }
          this.buttonParams.ids = []
        })
      },
      /** 提交按钮 */
      submitFormSetLock() {
        this.submitLockEvery();
      },
      // 取消按钮
      cancel() {
        this.checkboxDoorsOpen = false;
        this.checkboxpowersOpen = false;
        this.passwordOpen = false;
      },
      showPassword(item) {
        this.passWordValue = item.passWord
        this.passwordOpen = true;
      },
      selectChange() {
        this.buttonParams.ids = [];
        this.getPowerList()
      },
      toggleSelection(row, select) {
        if (row) {
          this.$nextTick(() => {
            this.$refs.table && this.$refs.table.toggleRowSelection(row, select)
          })
        }
      },
      setChildren(children, type) {
        // 编辑多个子层级
        children.map(j => {
          this.toggleSelection(j, type)
          if (j.children) {
            this.setChildren(j.children, type)
          }
        })
      },
      // 选中父节点时，子节点一起选中取消
      select(selection, row) {
        if (selection.some(el => {
            return row.powerNodeId === el.powerNodeId
          })) {
          if (row.children) {
            // row.children.map(j => {
            //     this.toggleSelection(j, true)
            // })
            // 解决子组件没有被勾选到
            this.setChildren(row.children, true)
          }
        } else {
          if (row.children) {
            // row.children.map(j => {
            //     this.toggleSelection(j, false)
            // })
            this.setChildren(row.children, false)
          }
        }
      },
      // 选择全部
      selectAll(selection) {
        // tabledata第一层只要有在selection里面就是全选
        const isSelect = selection.some(el => {
          const tableDataIds = this.powertopList2.map(j => j.powerNodeId)
          return tableDataIds.includes(el.powerNodeId)
        })
        // tableDate第一层只要有不在selection里面就是全不选
        const isCancel = !this.powertopList2.every(el => {
          const selectIds = selection.map(j => j.powerNodeId)
          return selectIds.includes(el.powerNodeId)
        })
        if (isSelect) {
          selection.map(el => {
            if (el.children) {
              // el.children.map(j => {
              //     this.toggleSelection(j, true)
              // })
              // 解决子组件没有被勾选到
              this.setChildren(el.children, true)
            }
          })
        }
        if (isCancel) {
          this.powertopList2.map(el => {
            if (el.children) {
              // el.children.map(j => {
              //     this.toggleSelection(j, false)
              // })
              // 解决子组件没有被勾选到
              this.setChildren(el.children, false)
            }
          })
        }
        this.$emit('handleSelect', this.tableData)
      }
    }
  }
</script>

    }

    }

  .topbg3 {
    background: #FFF3E2;
    .top-con {
      color: #F6B65D;
    }
  }
  .topbg4 {
    background: #E1FFEB;
    .top-con {
      color: #12D745;
    }
  }
  .title-icon {
    width: 100%;
    color: #0074FF;
    display: flex;
    height: 25px;
    align-items: center;
    padding-left: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    margin-top: 10px;
    span {
      display: block;
      width: 5px;
      height: 10px;
      margin-right: 10px;
      border-radius: 3px;
      background: #0074FF;
    }
  }
  .middle-contain {
    margin-left: 10px;
    margin-right: 10px;
    width: calc(100% - 20px);
    .middle-kuang {
      border-radius: 10px;
      border: 1px #eee solid;
      padding: 10px;
      display: flex;
      height: 60px;
      .middle-kuang-left {
        width: 300px;
        height: 100%;
        border-right: 1px #eee solid;
        display: flex;
        justify-content: center;
        align-items: center;
      }
      .middle-kuang-right {
        display: flex;
        width: calc(100% - 310px);
        height: 100%;
        align-items: center;
        align-items: center;
        padding-left: 20px;
        .middle-kuang-text {
          margin-left: 20px;
          margin-right: 50px;
        }
        .button-list {
          margin-left: 10px;
          margin-right: 10px;
        }
      }
    }
  }
  .line-two {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .allbutton-yellow {
    background: #F6B65D;
    color: #fff;
    border: #F6B65D;
  }

    background: #F27CB1;
    color: #fff;
    border: #F27CB1;
  }
