  .tag-close {
    padding: 3px 5px;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-left: 8px;
    margin-right: 8px;
    border-radius: 5px;
  }
  .tag-open {
    background: #EFF5FD;
    color: #0074FF;
  }
  .tag-close {
    background: #FFF1F7;
    color: #F27CB1;
  }
  .slider-style {
    width: 250px;
    height: 30px;
  }
  .dialog-content {
    width: 100%;
    height: 120px;
    .dialog-title {
      width: 100%;
      text-align: center;
      margin-bottom: 30px;
      font-size: 18px;
    }
    .dialog-con {
      width: 100%;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      .button-list {
        flex: 1;
        margin-left: 20px;
        margin-right: 20px;
      }
    }

<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" label-width="68px">
      <el-form-item label="设备" prop="deviceType">
        <el-select v-model="queryParams.deviceType" placeholder="请选择设备" clearable @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery">
          <el-option v-for="dict in dict.type.authorize_device_type" :key="dict.value" :label="dict.label"
            :value="dict.value" />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item>
        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="tableData">
      <el-table-column label="序号" align="center" width="55" type="index" />
      <el-table-column label="设备" align="center" prop="deviceType">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <dict-tag :options="dict.type.authorize_device_type" :value="scope.row.deviceType" />
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="授权数量" align="center" prop="authorizeNum">
        <template slot-scope="scope"> {{ scope.row.authorizeNum }} {{ deviceUnit(scope.row.deviceType) }} </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作人" align="center" prop="updateBy" />
      <el-table-column label="操作时间" align="center" prop="updateTime" />
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['dev:authorize:edit']">授权</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
      @pagination="getList" />
    <el-dialog title="授权" :visible.sync="dialogVisible" width="25%">
      <el-form :model="form" :rules="rules" ref="form" size="small" label-width="80px">
        <el-form-item label="设备" prop="deviceType">
          <dict-tag :options="dict.type.authorize_device_type" :value="form.deviceType" />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="授权数量" prop="authorizeNum">
          <el-input v-model="form.authorizeNum" placeholder="请输入授权数量" maxlength="9" clearable
            @input="onIntInput('authorizeNum', $event)">
            <template slot="append">{{ deviceUnit(form.deviceType) }}</template>
          </el-input>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm" :loading="btnLoading">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { authorizeList, editAuthorizeNum } from "@/api/jufe/devAuthorize";
export default {
  name: "DevAuthorize",
  dicts: ["authorize_device_type"],
  data() {
    return {
      queryParams: {
        deviceType: "",
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
      },
      loading: false,
      btnLoading: false,
      tableData: [],
      total: 0,
      dialogVisible: false,
      form: {
        id: null,
        deviceType: "",
        authorizeNum: 0,
      },
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
        authorizeNum: [
          { required: true, message: "请输入授权数量", trigger: "blur" },
        ],
      },
    };
  },
  computed: {
    // 设备单位
    deviceUnit() {
      return function (deviceType) {
        if (deviceType === '5') {
          return "套";
        }
        return "台";
      }
    },
  },
  created() {
    this.handleQuery();
  },
  methods: {
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      authorizeList(this.queryParams).then((res) => {
        this.tableData = res.rows;
        this.total = res.total;
      }).finally(() => {
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.dialogVisible = true;
      this.form = {
        id: row.id,
        deviceType: row.deviceType,
        authorizeNum: row.authorizeNum,
      };
    },
    onIntInput(field, value) {
      const s = this.sanitizePositiveInt(value);
      this.$set(this.form, field, s);
    },
    sanitizePositiveInt(value) {
      if (value === undefined || value === null) return "";
      let str = String(value).replace(/\D/g, "");
      if (str === "") return "";
      const noLeading = str.replace(/^0+/, "");
      return noLeading === "" ? "0" : noLeading;
    },
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs.form.validate((valid) => {
        if (valid) {
          this.btnLoading = true;
          editAuthorizeNum(this.form).then((res) => {
            if (res.code === 200) {
              this.$message({
                message: "授权成功",
                type: "success",
              });
              this.dialogVisible = false;
              this.handleQuery();
            } else {
              this.$message({
                message: res.msg,
                type: "error",
              });
            }
          }).finally(() => {
            this.btnLoading = false;
          });
        }
      });
    },
    cancel() {
      this.dialogVisible = false;
      this.btnLoading = false;
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
  },
};
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" label-width="68px">
      <el-form-item label="设备" prop="deviceType">
        <el-select v-model="queryParams.deviceType" placeholder="请选择设备" clearable @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery">
          <el-option v-for="dict in dict.type.authorize_device_type" :key="dict.value" :label="dict.label"
            :value="dict.value" />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item>
        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="tableData">
      <el-table-column label="序号" align="center" width="55" type="index" />
      <el-table-column label="设备" align="center" prop="deviceType">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <dict-tag :options="dict.type.authorize_device_type" :value="scope.row.deviceType" />
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="授权数量" align="center" prop="authorizeNum">
        <template slot-scope="scope"> {{ scope.row.authorizeNum }} {{ deviceUnit(scope.row.deviceType) }} </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="已使用数量" align="center" prop="currentNum">
        <template slot-scope="scope"> 
          <span v-if="scope.row.currentNum >= scope.row.authorizeNum" style="color: red;">{{ scope.row.currentNum }} {{ deviceUnit(scope.row.deviceType) }}</span> 
          <span v-else>{{ scope.row.currentNum }} {{ deviceUnit(scope.row.deviceType) }}</span> 
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="未使用数量" align="center" prop="remainNum">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          {{ (scope.row.authorizeNum - scope.row.currentNum) >= 0 ? (scope.row.authorizeNum - scope.row.currentNum) : 0 }} {{ deviceUnit(scope.row.deviceType) }}
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
      @pagination="getList" />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { viewList } from "@/api/jufe/devAuthorize";
export default {
  name: "DevAuthorizeView",
  dicts: ["authorize_device_type"],
  data() {
    return {
      queryParams: {
        deviceType: "",
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
      },
      loading: false,
      tableData: [],
      total: 0,
    };
  },
  computed: {
    // 设备单位
    deviceUnit() {
      return function (deviceType) {
        if (deviceType === '5') {
          return "套";
        }
        return "台";
      }
    },
  },
  created() {
    this.handleQuery();
  },
  methods: {
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      viewList(this.queryParams).then((res) => {
        this.tableData = res.rows;
        this.total = res.total;
      }).finally(() => {
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
  },
};
</script>
<template>
  <div class="common-container">
    <div class="common-left">
      <el-input placeholder="输入关键字进行过滤" v-model="filterText">
      </el-input>
      <el-tree class="filter-tree zhtreelist" :data="locationOptions" :props="defaultProps"
        :expand-on-click-node="false" default-expand-all :filter-node-method="filterNode" node-key="id"
        highlight-current @node-click="handleNodeClick" ref="tree">
      </el-tree>
    </div>
    <div class="common-right">
      <div class="top-list-xontain">
        <div class="top-list topbg1">
          <div class="top-title">门锁开</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.openNumberLock}}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="top-list topbg1">
          <div class="top-title">门锁关</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.noOpenNumberLock}}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="top-list topbg2">
          <div class="top-title">门锁电池低于20%</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.lowBatteryNumber}}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="top-list topbg3">
          <div class="top-title">空开开</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.openNumberSwitch}}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="top-list topbg3">
          <div class="top-title">空开关</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.noOpenNumberSwitch}}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="top-list topbg4">
          <div class="top-title">在线</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.onlineNumber}}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="top-list topbg4">
          <div class="top-title">离线</div>
          <div class="top-con">{{topList.noOnlineNumber}}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="middle-contain" style="margin-top: 20px">
        <div class="width100 line-two">
          <el-form :model="roomParams" ref="roomParams" size="small" :inline="true" label-width="90px">
            <el-form-item label="编号:" prop="deviceCode">
              <el-input v-model="roomParams.deviceCode" placeholder="请输入编号" clearable
                @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" />
            </el-form-item>
            <el-form-item label="名称:" prop="deviceName">
              <el-input v-model="roomParams.deviceName" placeholder="请输入名称" clearable
                @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" />
            </el-form-item>
            <el-form-item label="开关状态" prop="openStatus">
              <el-select v-model="roomParams.openStatus" placeholder="请选择开关状态" clearable>
                  <el-option key="打开" label="打开" value="打开" />
                  <el-option key="关闭" label="关闭" value="关闭" />
              </el-select>
            </el-form-item>
            <el-form-item label="类型" prop="deviceType">
              <el-select v-model="roomParams.deviceType" placeholder="请选择类型" clearable>
                  <el-option key="门锁" label="门锁" value="门锁" />
                  <el-option key="总空开" label="总空开" value="总空开" />
                  <el-option key="子空开" label="子空开" value="子空开" />
              </el-select>
            </el-form-item>
            <el-form-item label="电量" prop="eleQuantitySelect">
              <div class="slider-style">
                <el-slider v-model="roomParams.eleQuantitySelect" range :step="10" :show-stops=true :max="100">
                </el-slider>
              </div>
            </el-form-item>
            <el-form-item label="在线状态" prop="onlineStatus">
              <el-select v-model="roomParams.onlineStatus" placeholder="请选择在线状态" clearable>
                  <el-option key="在线" label="在线" value="在线" />
                  <el-option key="离线" label="离线" value="离线" />
              </el-select>
            </el-form-item>
            <el-form-item>
              <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
              <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-form>
        </div>
        <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="logList">
          <el-table-column label="编号" align="center" prop="deviceCode" width="140" />
          <el-table-column label="名称" align="center" prop="deviceName" :show-overflow-tooltip="true" />
          <el-table-column label="楼栋位置" align="center" prop="locationName" />
          <el-table-column label="教室编号" align="center" prop="roomCode" />
          <el-table-column label="教室名称" align="center" prop="roomName" />
          <el-table-column label="类型" align="center" prop="deviceType" />
          <el-table-column label="开关状态" align="center" width="80">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <template v-if="scope.row.onlineStatus=='在线'">
                <span :class="scope.row.openStatus=='打开'?'span-blue':'span-pink'">{{scope.row.openStatus}}</span>
              </template>
              <template v-else>
                <span>--</span>
              </template>
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
          <el-table-column label="电量" align="center" width="150">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <template v-if="scope.row.deviceType == '门锁'">
                <template v-if="scope.row.eleQuantity == null">
                  <el-progress :color="customColor" :percentage="0"></el-progress>
                </template>
                <template v-else-if="scope.row.eleQuantity < 20 && scope.row.eleQuantity != null">
                  <el-progress :color="customColor" :percentage="scope.row.eleQuantity"></el-progress>
                </template>
                <template v-else>
                  <el-progress :percentage="scope.row.eleQuantity==null? '0': scope.row.eleQuantity">
                  </el-progress>
                </template>
              </template>
              <template v-else>
              </template>
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
          <el-table-column label="在线状态" align="center" width="80">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <span :class="scope.row.onlineStatus=='在线'?'span-blue':'span-pink'">{{scope.row.onlineStatus}}</span>
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
        </el-table>
        <pagination v-show="total>0" :total="total" :page.sync="roomParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="roomParams.pageSize"
          @pagination="getList" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
  import {
    locationTree
  } from '@/api/location/location'
  import {
    countRoom,
    listRoom,
    PowerNode,
    updateLock,
    EquipmentGetData
  } from '@/api/jufe/command'
  export default {
    components: {},
    name: 'command',
    watch: {
      filterText(val) {
        this.$refs.tree.filter(val);
      }
    },
    data() {
      return {
        customColor: '#ff0000',
        disableStyle: false, //按钮，默认可点击，数据为空，禁用
        checkboxDoorsOpen: false,
        checkboxpowersOpen: false,
        // 控制开关的参数
        buttonParams: {
          locationId: 0,
          type: null,
          ids: [],
          roomIds: []
        },
        // 查询参数
        roomParams: {
          locationId: null,
          roomId: null,
          deviceCode: null,
          deviceName: null,
          openStatus: null,
          deviceType: null,
          locationName: null,
          eleQuantitySelect: [0, 100],
          onlineStatus: null,
          pageNum: 1,
          pageSize: 10,
        },
        // 左侧树数据
        locationOptions: [],
        // 表格数据
        logList: [],
        // 遮罩层
        loading: true,
        // 总条数
        total: 0,
        topList: {
          openNumberSwitch: 0,
          onlineNumber: 0,
          noOpenNumberLock: 0,
          openNumberLock: 0,
          lowBatteryNumber: 0,
          noOpenNumberSwitch: 0,
          noOnlineNumber: 0,
        },
        filterText: '',
        defaultProps: {
          children: 'children',
          label: 'label'
        }
      }
    },
    created() {
      this.getTreeselect();
      this.getList();
      this.getRoomList()
    },
    methods: {
      filterNode(value, data) {
        if (!value) return true;
        return data.label.indexOf(value) !== -1;
      },
      /** 查询位置下拉树结构 */
      getTreeselect() {
        locationTree().then(response => {
          this.locationOptions = response.data
        })
      },
      // 节点单击事件
      handleNodeClick(data, Node) {
        this.roomParams.locationId = data.id;
        this.buttonParams.locationId = data.id;
        this.getRoomList();
        this.getList();
      },
      getRoomList() {
        countRoom(this.roomParams).then(response => {
          if (response.data) {
            this.topList = response.data
          }
        })
      },
      /** 查询教室信息列表 */
      getList() {
        this.loading = false;
        EquipmentGetData(this.roomParams).then(response => {
          if (response.code == 200) {
            if (response.data) {
              this.topList = response.data
            }
            this.logList = response.rows;
            this.total = response.total;
            this.loading = false;
          }
        });
      },
      /** 搜索按钮操作 */
      handleQuery() {
        this.roomParams.pageNum = 1;
        this.getList()
        this.getRoomList();
      },
      /** 重置按钮操作 */
      resetQuery() {
        this.resetForm("roomParams");
        this.roomParams.locationId = 0;
        this.$refs.tree.setCurrentKey(null);
        this.handleQuery();
      },
    }
  }
</script>

      text-align: center;

      font-size: 18px;
    }
    .dialog-con {
      width: 100%;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      .button-list {
        flex: 1;
        margin-left: 20px;
        margin-right: 20px;
      }
    }
  }
  .slider-style {
    width: 220px;
    height: 30px;
  }
</style>
<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
    <el-form ref="form" :model="formItem" label-width="140px" :disabled="showDetail">
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="24">
          <el-form-item
            label="楼栋"
            prop="buildPosId"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '楼栋不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <treeselect :disabled="showDetail||formItem.status==='1'" v-model="formItem.buildPosId" :disable-branch-nodes="true"
                        :options="locationOptions" :normalizer="normalizer" placeholder="选择楼栋" />
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="网关名称"
            prop="deviceName"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '网关名称不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.deviceName" :disabled="formItem.status==='1'" maxlength="50" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="网关IP"
            prop="gatewayIp"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '网关IP不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isIP, message: '请输入正确IP', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.gatewayIp" :disabled="formItem.status==='1'" maxlegnth="20" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="上位机端口"
            prop="upPort"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '上位机端口不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isInt, message: '请输入正确端口号', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.upPort"  :disabled="formItem.status==='1'" maxlength="6" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="下位机端口"
            prop="downPort"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '下位机端口不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isInt, message: '请输入正确端口号', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.downPort"  :disabled="formItem.status==='1'" maxlength="6" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="网关MAC"
            prop="mac"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '网关MAC不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isMac, message: '请输入正确MAC地址', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.mac" :disabled="formItem.status==='1'" maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="状态"
            prop="status"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '状态不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <DictSelect v-model="formItem.status" dict-type="sys_normal_disable" />
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="网关类型"
            prop="gatewayType"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '网关类型不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <DictSelect v-model="formItem.gatewayType" dict-type="dev_gateway_type" :disabled="formItem.status==='1'"/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row>
        <el-col>
          <el-form-item
            label="备注"
            prop="remark"
          >
            <el-input type="textarea" v-model="formItem.remark" :disabled="formItem.status==='1'" maxlength="100" show-word-limit rows="3" resize="none"/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
    </el-form>
    <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
      <el-button v-if="!showDetail" type="primary" :loading="saveLoading" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button v-if="!showDetail" @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
</template>
<script>
import {
  add,update
} from "@/api/jufe/gatewayInfo";
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
import {isInt,isIP,isMac} from '@/utils/validate'
export default {
  name: "GatewayInfoAdd",
  components: {
    Treeselect
  },
  props:{
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default() {
        return { hidden: false, breadcrumb: true }
      }
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    showDetail: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    locationOptions:{
      type:Array,
      default:[]
    },
    title:{
      type:String,
      default:''
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
    }
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    isMac:isMac,
    isInt:isInt,
    isIP:isIP,
    /** 转换位置数据结构 */
    normalizer(node) {
      if (node.children && !node.children.length) {
        delete node.children;
      }
      return {
        id: node.id,
        label: node.label,
        children: node.children
      };
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.resetForm('form')
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['form'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          if (this.formItem.deviceId) {
            // 修改
            update(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          } else {
            add(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          }
        }
      })
    },
    loadData() {
      this.$emit('loadData')
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery" :records.sync="records"
            :location-options="locationOptions"
    />
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleUpdate()"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:gatewayInfo:add']"
        >新增
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records">
      <el-table-column type="index" label="序号" align="center" width="50"/>
      <el-table-column label="网关名称" align="center" prop="deviceName"/>
      <el-table-column label="网关IP" align="center" prop="gatewayIp" width="130"/>
      <el-table-column label="楼栋" align="center" prop="buildPosName"  width="120" />
      <el-table-column label="MAC" align="center" prop="mac"  width="100" />
      <el-table-column label="上机位端口" align="center" prop="upPort" width="120"/>
      <el-table-column label="下机位端口" align="center" prop="downPort" width="120"/>
      <el-table-column label="网关类型" align="center" prop="params.gatewayTypeName" width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="在线状态" align="center" prop="params.onlineStatusName" width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="备注" align="center" prop="remark" width="180"/>
      <!-- <el-table-column key="status" label="状态" align="center" width="120">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-switch
            v-model="scope.row.status"
            active-value="0"
            inactive-value="1"
            @change="handleStatusChange(scope.row)"
          />
        </template>
      </el-table-column> -->
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" fixed="right" width="200">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)">修改</el-button>
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-search" @click="handleDetail(scope.row)">详情</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList"
    />
    <Add ref="add" v-if="addVisible" :visible.sync="addVisible" @loadData="getList" :form-item="formItem"
         :showDetail="showDetail" :location-options="locationOptions" :title="title"
    />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { exportData, list, update } from '@/api/jufe/gatewayInfo'
import Search from '@/views/jufe/gatewayInfo/search'
import Add from '@/views/jufe/gatewayInfo/add'
import { locationTree, locationTree1 } from '@/api/location/location'
export default {
  components: { Search, Add },
  name: 'Gateway',
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      exportLoading: false,
      addVisible: false,
      ids: [],
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        deviceName: null,
        buildPosId: null,
        gatewayIp: null,
        gatewayType: null,
        mac: null,
        status: null
      },
      formItem: {},
      locationOptions: [],
      gatewayTypes: [],
      title: '新增网关',
      showDetail: false
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getDicts('dev_gateway_type').then(e => {
      this.gatewayTypes = e.data
    })
    this.getList()
    this.getTreeselect()
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询部门下拉树结构 */
    getTreeselect() {
      locationTree1().then(response => {
        this.locationOptions = response.data
      })
    },
    /** 查询计划列列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true
      list(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows
        this.total = response.total
        this.loading = false
      }).catch(e => {
        this.loading = false
      })
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1
      this.getList()
    },
    /** 新增&修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.title = '新增网关'
      this.showDetail = false
      if (row) {
        this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
        this.title = '修改网关'
      }
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    handleDetail(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
      this.title = '网关详情'
      this.showDetail = true
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    // 更改状态
    handleStatusChange(row) {
      const text = row.status === '1' ? '确认要停用网关吗？停用后该网关下的门锁设备均不可使用！' : '确认要启用网关吗？'
      this.$confirm(text).then(() => {
        update({ deviceId: row.deviceId, status: row.status }).then(res => {
          if (res.code === 200) {
            this.$message.success('操作成功！')
            this.getList()
          }
        }).catch(e=>{
          row.status = row.status === '1' ? '0' : '1'
        })
      }).catch(function() {
        row.status = row.status === '1' ? '0' : '1'
      })
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.$confirm('是否确认导出所有数据项?', '警告', {
        confirmButtonText: '确定',
        cancelButtonText: '取消',
        type: 'warning'
      }).then(() => {
        this.exportLoading = true
        return exportData(this.queryParams)
      })
        .then((response) => {
          this.download(response.msg)
          this.exportLoading = false
        })
        .catch(() => {
          this.exportLoading = false
        })
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.formItem = {
        deviceName: null,
        buildPosId: null,
        gatewayIp: null,
        upPort: null,
        downPort: null,
        gatewayType: null,
        mac: null,
        status: null
      }
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" :inline="true" label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="网关名称" prop="deviceName">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.deviceName"  placeholder="请输入网关名称" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="网关IP" prop="gatewayIp">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.gatewayIp"  placeholder="请输入网关IP" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="网关MAC" prop="mac">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.mac"  placeholder="请输入网关MAC" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item
      label="楼栋"
      prop="buildPosId"
    >
      <treeselect v-model="queryParams.buildPosId" :options="locationOptions" :normalizer="normalizer" :disable-branch-nodes="true" placeholder="选择楼栋" STYLE="width: 220px;" />

    </el-form-item> -->
    <el-form-item
      label="网关类型"
      prop="gatewayType"
    >
      <DictSelect v-model="queryParams.gatewayType" dict-type="dev_gateway_type" :placeholder="'请选择网关类型'"/>

    <el-form-item
      label="在线状态"
      prop="onlineStatus"
    >
      <DictSelect v-model="queryParams.onlineStatus" dict-type="online_status" :placeholder="'请选择在线状态'" clearable/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
export default {
  name: "Plan",
  components: {
    Treeselect
  },
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    },
    locationOptions:{
      type:Array,
      default:[]
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
    };
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    /** 转换位置数据结构 */
    normalizer(node) {
      if (node.children && !node.children.length) {
        delete node.children;
      }
      return {
        id: node.id,
        label: node.label,
        children: node.children
      };
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.queryParams.dataRange = []
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>

        <template slot-scope="scope">

          {{scope.row.issuedStatus=='1'?'已下发':'未下发'}}

          <div class="tag-open" v-if="scope.row.onlineStatus == '1'">
            在线
          </div>
          <div class="tag-open" v-if="scope.row.onlineStatus == '0'">
            离线
          </div>
          <div class="tag-close" v-else>
          </div>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="备注" align="center" prop="remark" width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" width="220" fixed="right">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:grouping:edit']">编辑</el-button>
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleLook(scope.row)"
            >查看</el-button>
          <!-- <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleUpdateStatus(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:board:edit']">{{scope.row.isUsable=='1'?"停用":"启用"}}</el-button> -->
          <!-- <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-delete" @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:grouping:remove']">删除</el-button> -->
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleIssue(scope.row)"
            v-if="scope.row.issuedStatus != '1'" v-hasPermi="['jufe:board:issue']">下发</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total>0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize" :page-sizes="[10, 20, 30]"
      @pagination="getList" />
    <!-- 添加或修改分组信息对话框 -->
    <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="open" width="500px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="120px">
        <el-form-item label="网关" prop="upId">
          <el-select v-model="form.upId" placeholder="请选择网关" clearable :disabled="title=='查看分组信息' || status=='2'"
            @change="gatewayChange">
            <el-option v-for="dict in gatewayList" :key="dict.deviceId" :label="dict.deviceName"
              :value="dict.deviceId" />
          </el-select>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="分组名称" prop="deviceName">
          <el-input v-model="form.deviceName" placeholder="请输入分组名称" :disabled="title=='查看分组信息' || status=='2'"
            maxlength="20" show-word-limit />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="楼栋" prop="buildStorey">
          <el-button type="primary" @click="handleBuildPos" v-if="title!='查看分组信息' && status=='1'">请选择楼栋</el-button>
          {{buildPosShow}}
          <!-- <el-input v-model="form.buildPos" placeholder="请输入楼栋" :disabled="title=='查看分组信息' || status=='2'" /> -->
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="分组MAC" prop="deviceMac">
          <el-input v-model="form.deviceMac" placeholder="请输入分组MAC" :disabled="title=='查看分组信息' || status=='2'"
            maxlength="20" show-word-limit />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="分组IP" prop="deviceIp">
          <el-input v-model="form.deviceIp" placeholder="请输入分组IP" :disabled="title=='查看分组信息' || status=='2'" />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="分组端口" prop="devicePort">
          <el-input v-model="form.devicePort" placeholder="请输入分组端口" :disabled="title=='查看分组信息' || status=='2'"
            maxlength="6" show-word-limit />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="状态" prop="isUsable">
          <el-select v-model="form.isUsable" placeholder="请选择状态" clearable :disabled="title=='查看分组信息'">
            <el-option v-for="dict in dict.type.device_board_status" :key="dict.value" :label="dict.label"
              :value="dict.value" />
          </el-select>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="备注" prop="remark">
          <el-input v-model="form.remark" placeholder="请输入备注" type="textarea" :disabled="title=='查看分组信息' || status=='2'"
            maxlength="200" show-word-limit rows="3" resize="none" />
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm" v-if="title!='查看分组信息'">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog :title="upload.title" :visible.sync="upload.open" width="400px" append-to-body
      :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-upload ref="upload" :limit="1" accept=".xlsx, .xls" :headers="upload.headers"
        :action="upload.url + '?updateSupport=' + upload.updateSupport + '&memberType=' + upload.memberType + '&locationId=' + queryParams.locationId"
        :disabled="upload.isUploading" :on-progress="handleFileUploadProgress" :on-success="handleFileSuccess"
        :auto-upload="false" drag>
        <i class="el-icon-upload"></i>
        <div class="el-upload__text">
          将文件拖到此处，或
          <em>点击上传</em>
        </div>
        <div class="el-upload__tip" slot="tip">
          <!-- <el-checkbox v-model="upload.updateSupport" />是否更新已经存在的用户数据 -->
          <el-link type="info" style="font-size:12px; color:#1890ff" @click="importTemplate">下载模板</el-link>
        </div>
        <div class="el-upload__tip" style="color:red" slot="tip">提示：仅允许导入“xls”或“xlsx”格式文件！</div>
      </el-upload>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitFileForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="upload.open = false">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <BuildPos v-if="visibleBuildPos" :visible.sync="visibleBuildPos" :buildPosId="buildPosId"
      @buildPosChang="buildPosChang"></BuildPos>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
  import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
  import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
  import BuildPos from "@/views/jufe/buildpos/buildPosDialog";
  import {
    listGrouping,
    getGrouping,
    delGrouping,
    addGrouping,
    updateGrouping,
    updateGroupingStatus,
    getAllGatewayList,
    issueGrouping
  } from "@/api/jufe/grouping";
  import {
    getToken
  } from "@/utils/auth";
  import {
    locationTree
  } from '@/api/location/location'
  export default {
    name: "Grouping",
    components: {
      BuildPos,
      Treeselect
    },
    dicts: ['device_board_status'],
    data() {
      return {
        // 遮罩层
        loading: true,
        // 选中数组
        ids: [],
        // 非单个禁用
        single: true,
        // 非多个禁用
        multiple: true,
        // 显示搜索条件
        showSearch: true,
        // 总条数
        total: 0,
        // 分组信息表格数据
        groupingList: [],
        // 弹出层标题
        title: "",
        // 是否显示弹出层
        open: false,
        // 查询参数
        queryParams: {
          pageNum: 1,
          pageSize: 10,
          upId: null,
          deviceName: null,
          deviceIp: null,
          devicePort: null,
          deviceMac: null,
          isUsable: null,
          buildPos: null,
          buildStorey: null,
          issuedStatus: null,
          onlineStatus: null
        },
        // 查询参数
        queryBuildPosIdParams: {
          locationId: null
        },
        // 表单参数
        form: {},
        // 表单校验
        rules: {
          upId: [{
            required: true,
            message: "网关不能为空",
            trigger: "blur"
          }],
          deviceName: [{
            required: true,
            message: "分组名称不能为空",
            trigger: "blur"
          }],
          buildStorey: [{
            required: true,
            message: "楼栋不能为空",
            trigger: "blur"
          }],
          deviceMac: [{
            required: true,
            message: "分组MAC不能为空",
            trigger: "blur"
          }, {
            pattern: /^[0-9A-Z]{1,20}$/,
            message: '请输入正确的MAC',
            trigger: 'blur'
          }],
          deviceIp: [{
            required: true,
            message: "分组IP不能为空",
            trigger: "blur"
          }, {
            pattern: /^(1\d{2}|2[0-4]\d|25[0-5]|[1-9]\d|[1-9])\.(1\d{2}|2[0-4]\d|25[0-5]|[1-9]\d|\d)\.(1\d{2}|2[0-4]\d|25[0-5]|[1-9]\d|\d)\.(1\d{2}|2[0-4]\d|25[0-5]|[1-9]\d|\d)$/,
            message: '请输入正确的IP',
            trigger: 'blur'
          }],
          devicePort: [{
            required: true,
            message: "分组端口不能为空",
            trigger: "blur"
          }, {
            pattern: /-?[1-9]\d*/,
            message: '请输入正确的端口',
            trigger: 'blur'
          }],
        },
        status: undefined,
        gatewayList: [],
        visibleBuildPos: false,
        buildPosId: undefined,
        buildPosShow: undefined,
        buildSelectListName: [],
        locationOptions: [],
        // 用户导入参数
        upload: {
          // 是否显示弹出层（用户导入）
          open: false,
          // 弹出层标题（用户导入）
          title: "",
          // 是否禁用上传
          isUploading: false,
          // 是否更新已经存在的用户数据
          updateSupport: 0,
          memberType: 1,
          // 设置上传的请求头部
          headers: {
            Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken()
          },
          // 上传的地址
          url: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API + "/jufe/grouping/importData"
        },
      };
    },
    created() {
      this.getList();
      this.getTreeselect();
    },
    methods: {
      /** 查询分组信息列表 */
      getList() {
        this.loading = true;
        getAllGatewayList().then(response => {
          this.gatewayList = response.data;
        });
        listGrouping(this.queryParams).then(response => {
          this.groupingList = response.rows;
          this.total = response.total;
          this.loading = false;
        });
      },
      // 取消按钮
      cancel() {
        this.open = false;
        this.status = undefined;
        this.buildPosId = undefined;
        this.reset();
      },
      // 表单重置
      reset() {
        this.buildPosId = undefined;
        this.buildPosName = undefined;
        this.buildPosShow = undefined;
        this.form = {
          deviceId: null,
          upId: null,
          deviceName: null,
          deviceIp: null,
          devicePort: null,
          deviceMac: null,
          isUsable: "1",
          addTime: null,
          createBy: null,
          createTime: null,
          updateBy: null,
          updateTime: null,
          remark: null,
          delFlag: null,
          deptId: null,
          buildPos: null,
          buildStorey: null
        };
        this.resetForm("form");
      },
      /** 搜索按钮操作 */
      handleQuery() {
        this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
        this.getList();
      },
      /** 重置按钮操作 */
      resetQuery() {
        this.resetForm("queryForm");
        this.queryBuildPosIdParams.locationId = undefined;
        this.getTreeselect();
        this.handleQuery();
      },
      // 多选框选中数据
      handleSelectionChange(selection) {
        this.ids = selection.map(item => item.deviceId)
        this.single = selection.length !== 1
        this.multiple = !selection.length
      },
      /** 新增按钮操作 */
      handleAdd() {
        this.reset();
        this.open = true;
        this.status = this.form.isUsable;
        this.title = "添加分组信息";
      },
      /** 修改按钮操作 */
      handleUpdate(row) {
        this.reset();
        const deviceId = row.deviceId || this.ids
        getGrouping(deviceId).then(response => {
          this.form = response.data;
          this.open = true;
          this.status = this.form.isUsable;
          this.buildPosId = this.form.buildPos;
          this.title = "修改分组信息";
          this.gatewayChange(this.form.upId);
          this.buildPosShow = row.buildPosName;
        });
      },
      /** 提交按钮 */
      submitForm() {
        this.$refs["form"].validate(valid => {
          if (valid) {
            this.form.buildStorey = this.form.buildStorey.toString()
            if (this.form.deviceId != null) {
              updateGrouping(this.form).then(response => {
                this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
                this.open = false;
                this.getList();
              });
            } else {
              addGrouping(this.form).then(response => {
                this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
                this.open = false;
                this.getList();
              });
            }
          }
        });
      },
      /** 删除按钮操作 */
      handleDelete(row) {
        const deviceIds = row.deviceId || this.ids;
        this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除分组信息编号为"' + deviceIds + '"的数据项？').then(function() {
          return delGrouping(deviceIds);
        }).then(() => {
          this.getList();
          this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
        }).catch(() => {});
      },
      /** 导出按钮操作 */
      handleExport() {
        this.download('jufe/grouping/export', {
          ...this.queryParams
        }, `grouping_${new Date().getTime()}.xlsx`)
      },
      /** 查看按钮操作 */
      handleLook(row) {
        this.reset();
        const deviceId = row.deviceId || this.ids
        getGrouping(deviceId).then(response => {
          this.form = response.data;
          this.open = true;
          this.buildPosShow = row.buildPosName;
          this.title = "查看分组信息";
        });
      },
      /** 启用停用 按钮操作 */
      handleUpdateStatus(row) {
        const deviceIds = row.deviceId || this.ids;
        this.$modal.confirm(row.isUsable == "1" ? '是否确认停用,停用后该网关分组下的门锁设备均不可使用' : '是否确认启用').then(function() {
          return updateGroupingStatus(deviceIds);
        }).then(() => {
          this.getList();
          this.$modal.msgSuccess(row.isUsable=="1"?'停用成功':'启用成功');
        }).catch(() => {});
      },
      /** 网关按钮操作 */
      gatewayChange(val) {
        this.buildPosId = undefined;
        this.buildPosName = undefined;
        this.buildPosShow = undefined
        this.gatewayList.forEach(item => {
          if (item.deviceId == val) {
            this.buildPosId = item.buildPosId;
            this.buildPosName = item.buildPosName
            this.form.buildPos = this.buildPosId
          }
        });
      },
      /** 楼栋按钮操作 */
      handleBuildPos(row) {
        if (this.buildPosId) {
          this.buildPosId = this.buildPosId | row.buildPos;
          this.visibleBuildPos = true;
        } else {
          this.$modal.msgError("请先选择网关");
        }
      },
      /** 组件选择改变事件 */
      buildPosChang(selection) {
        var that = this
        if (selection) {
          this.buildPosShow = that.buildPosName + '-' + selection.locationName;
          this.form.buildStorey = selection.locationId;
        } else {
          this.form.buildStorey = undefined
          this.buildPosShow = undefined
        }
      },
      /** 导入按钮操作 */
      handleImport() {
        this.upload.title = "导入";
        this.upload.open = true;
      },
      // 文件上传中处理
      handleFileUploadProgress(event, file, fileList) {
        this.upload.isUploading = true;
      },
      // 文件上传成功处理
      handleFileSuccess(response, file, fileList) {
        this.upload.open = false;
        this.upload.isUploading = false;
        this.$refs.upload.clearFiles();
        this.$alert(response.msg, "导入结果", {
          dangerouslyUseHTMLString: true,
          customClass: 'message_box_alert'
        });
        this.getList();
      },
      /** 下载模板操作 */
      importTemplate() {
        this.download('/jufe/grouping/importTemplate', {}, `分组信息.xlsx`)
      },
      // 提交上传文件
      submitFileForm() {
        this.$refs.upload.submit();
      },
      /** 下发 按钮操作 */
      handleIssue(row) {
        const deviceIds = row.deviceId || this.ids;
        const loading = this.$loading({
          lock: true,
          text: 'Loading',
          spinner: 'el-icon-loading',
          background: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)'
        });
        issueGrouping(deviceIds).then(response => {
          this.getList();
          loading.close();
          this.$modal.msgSuccess("下发成功");
        });
      },
      /** 转换位置数据结构 */
      normalizer(node) {
        if (node.children && !node.children.length) {
          delete node.children;
        }
        return {
          id: node.id,
          label: node.label,
          children: node.children
        };
      },
      /** 查询部门下拉树结构 */
      getTreeselect() {
        this.queryParams.buildPosId = undefined;
        locationTree(this.queryBuildPosIdParams).then(response => {
          this.locationOptions = response.data
        })
      },
      queryGatewayChange(val) {
        this.queryParams.buildPosId = undefined;
        if (val != "") {
          this.gatewayList.forEach(item => {
            if (item.deviceId == val) {
              this.queryBuildPosIdParams.locationId = item.buildPosId;
              this.getTreeselect();
            }
          });
        } else {
          this.queryBuildPosIdParams.locationId = undefined;
          this.getTreeselect();
        }
      }
    }
  };
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch" label-width="90px">
      <el-form-item label="通知标题" prop="noticeName">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.noticeName"
          placeholder="请输入通知标题"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="发布人名称" prop="releaseUserName">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.releaseUserName"
          placeholder="请输入发布人名称"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="发布状态" prop="releaseStatus">
        <el-select v-model="queryParams.releaseStatus" placeholder="请选择发布状态" clearable size="small">
          <el-option v-for="dict in releaseStatusOptions" :key="dict.dictValue" :label="dict.dictLabel"
                     :value="dict.dictValue"/>
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item>
        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleAdd"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:messageInfo:add']"
        >新增
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
      <right-toolbar :showSearch.sync="showSearch" @queryTable="getList" :columns="columns"></right-toolbar>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="infoList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column label="序号" align="center" type="index" v-if="columns[0].visible"/>
      <el-table-column label="通知id" align="center" prop="noticeId" v-if="columns[1].visible"/>
      <el-table-column label="通知标题" align="center" prop="noticeName" v-if="columns[2].visible"/>
      <el-table-column label="通知内容" align="center" prop="noticeInfo" v-if="columns[3].visible" show-overflow-tooltip/>
      <el-table-column label="展示班牌" align="center" prop="boardName" v-if="columns[4].visible"/>
      <el-table-column label="发布人名称" align="center" prop="releaseUserName" v-if="columns[5].visible" width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="发布状态 " align="center" prop="releaseStatus" :formatter="releaseStatusFormat"
                       v-if="columns[6].visible" width="100">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <span v-if="scope.row.releaseStatus == 1">待发布</span>
          <span v-else-if="scope.row.releaseStatus == 2">已发布</span>
          <span v-else-if="scope.row.releaseStatus == 3">已下架</span>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="通知等级" align="center" prop="noticeLevel" v-if="columns[7].visible" />
      <el-table-column label="是否置顶" align="center" prop="params.toppingName" width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="创建时间" align="center" prop="addTime" width="120" v-if="columns[8].visible">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <span>{{ parseTime(scope.row.addTime, '{y}-{m}-{d} {h}:{i}:{s}') }}</span>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="创建时间" align="center" prop="addTime" width="120" v-if="columns[8].visible">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <span>{{ parseTime(scope.row.addTime, '{y}-{m}-{d} {h}:{i}:{s}') }}</span>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="有效时间" align="center" prop="releaseTime" width="280" v-if="columns[9].visible">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <span>{{ parseTime(scope.row.releaseTime, '{y}-{m}-{d} {h}:{i}') }} ~ {{ parseTime(scope.row.endTime, '{y}-{m}-{d} {h}:{i}') }}</span>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="添加人名称" align="center" prop="createById" v-if="columns[10].visible"/>
      <el-table-column label="修改人名称" align="center" prop="updateById" v-if="columns[11].visible"/>
      <el-table-column label="备注" align="center" prop="remark" v-if="columns[12].visible"/>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" width="120">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            @click="handleView(scope.row)"
            v-if="scope.row.releaseStatus == '2'"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:messageInfo:query']"
          >查看</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)"
            v-if="scope.row.releaseStatus != '2'"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:messageInfo:edit']"
          >修改</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            @click="handleupdateTime(scope.row)"
            v-if="scope.row.releaseStatus == '2'"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:messageInfo:editTime']"
          >下架</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-delete"
            v-if="scope.row.releaseStatus != '2'"
            @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:messageInfo:remove']"
          >删除</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination
      v-show="total>0"
      :total="total"
      :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
      :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
      @pagination="getList"
    />
    <!-- 添加或修改通知信息对话框 -->
    <el-dialog v-if="openView" :title="title" :visible.sync="openView" width="650px" append-to-body>
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="80px">
        <el-form-item label="通知标题" prop="noticeName">
          <el-input v-model="form.noticeName" placeholder="请输入通知标题"/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="展示班牌" prop="roomIds">
          <el-tree
            :data="roomOptions"
            :props="defaultProps"
            :expand-on-click-node="false"
            :filter-node-method="filterNode"
            :default-checked-keys="form.roomIds"
            show-checkbox
            ref="tree"
            checkedKeys="id"
            node-key="id"
            highlight-current
            @check="handleNodeClick"
          />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="有效时间" prop="timeArr">
          <el-date-picker clearable
            v-model="form.timeArr"
            type="datetimerange"
            value-format="yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"
            placeholder="请选择发布时间"
            :picker-options="timeRule"
            start-placeholder="发布时间"
            end-placeholder="结束时间"
          >
          </el-date-picker>
        </el-form-item>
<!--        <el-form-item label="结束时间" prop="endTime" >-->
<!--          <el-date-picker clearable-->
<!--            v-model="form.endTime"-->
<!--            type="datetime"-->
<!--            style="width: 330px"-->
<!--            value-format="yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"-->
<!--            placeholder="请选择结束时间"-->
<!--            :picker-options="endTimeRule"-->
<!--          >-->
<!--          </el-date-picker>-->
<!--        </el-form-item>-->
        <el-form-item label="通知内容" prop="noticeInfo">
          <el-input v-model="form.noticeInfo" type="textarea" placeholder="请输入内容" rows="3" maxlength="1000" show-word-limit/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="通知图片" prop="picUrl" v-if="!form.videoUrl">
          <ImageUpload v-model="form.picUrl" :limit="1" />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="通知视频" prop="videoUrl" v-if="!form.picUrl">
          <FileUpload v-model="form.videoUrl" :limit="1" :file-type="['mp4','avi','mpeg','wmv','mov']" :file-size="10"/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="通知等级" prop="noticeLevel">
          <el-input-number v-model="form.noticeLevel" placeholder="请选择通知等级" controls-position="right" :min="0" :step="0.0001" :precision="4" style="width: 330px"/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="放大显示" prop="topping">
          <el-switch
            v-model="form.topping"
            active-text="是"
            inactive-text="否"
            active-value="Y"
            inactive-value="N"
          >
          </el-switch>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm" :loading="saveLoading">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <!-- 查看通知信息对话框 -->
    <el-dialog v-if="open" :title="title" :visible.sync="open" width="650px" append-to-body>
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="80px" disabled="true">
        <el-form-item label="通知标题" prop="noticeName">
          <el-input v-model="form.noticeName" placeholder="请输入通知标题"/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="展示班牌" prop="roomIds">
          <el-tree
            :data="roomOptions"
            :props="defaultProps"
            :expand-on-click-node="false"
            :filter-node-method="filterNode"
            :default-checked-keys="form.roomIds"
            show-checkbox
            ref="tree"
            checkedKeys="id"
            node-key="id"
            highlight-current
            @check="handleNodeClick"
          />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="有效时间" prop="timeArr">
          <el-date-picker clearable
                          v-model="form.timeArr"
                          type="datetimerange"
                          value-format="yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"
                          placeholder="请选择发布时间"
                          :picker-options="timeRule"
                          start-placeholder="发布时间"
                          end-placeholder="结束时间"
          >
          </el-date-picker>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="通知内容" prop="noticeInfo">
          <el-input v-model="form.noticeInfo" type="textarea" placeholder="请输入内容" rows="3" maxlength="100" show-word-limit/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="通知等级" prop="noticeLevel">
          <el-input-number v-model="form.noticeLevel" placeholder="请选择通知等级" controls-position="right" :min="0" :step="0.0001" :precision="4" style="width: 330px"/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="是否置顶" prop="topping">
          <el-switch
            v-model="form.topping"
            active-text="是"
            inactive-text="否"
            active-value="Y"
            inactive-value="N"
          >
          </el-switch>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  listInfo,
  getMessageInfo,
  delInfo,
  addInfo,
  updateInfo,
  updateInfoTime,
} from "@/api/jufe/info";
import {getLocation, locationAndBOardTree} from "@/api/location/location";
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
export default {
  name: "Info",
  components: {
    Treeselect
  },
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      saveLoading:false,
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      // 非单个禁用
      single: true,
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      boardName: "",
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 通知信息表格数据
      infoList: [],
      releaseStatusOptions: [],
      // 部门树选项
      roomOptions: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      roomIds: [],
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      openView: false,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        noticeName: null,
        boardName: null,
        noticeInfo: null,
        releaseUserId: null,
        releaseUserName: null,
        releaseStatus: null,
        noticeLevel: null,
        addTime: null,
        roomIds: null,
        endTime: null,
        releaseTime: null,
        createById: null,
        updateById: null,
      },
      defaultProps: {
        children: "children",
        label: "label"
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {},
      columns: [
        { key: 0, label: `序号`, visible: true },
        { key: 1, label: `通知id`, visible: false },
        { key: 2, label: `通知标题`, visible: true },
        { key: 3, label: `通知内容`, visible: true },
        { key: 4, label: `展示班牌`, visible: true },
        { key: 5, label: `发布人名称`, visible: true },
        { key: 6, label: `发布状态`, visible: true },
        { key: 7, label: `通知等级`, visible: false },
        { key: 8, label: `创建时间`, visible: false },
        { key: 9, label: `发布时间`, visible: true },
        { key: 10, label: `添加人名称`, visible: false },
        { key: 11, label: `修改人名称`, visible: false },
        { key: 12, label: `备注`, visible: false }
      ],
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
        noticeInfo : [{ required: true, message: "通知内容不能为空", trigger: "blur" }],
        noticeName : [{ required: true, message: "通知标题不能为空", trigger: "blur" }],
        roomIds : [{ required: true, message: "展示班牌不能为空", trigger: "blur" }],
      },
      timeRule:{
        disabledDate: time =>{
          const year = new Date().getFullYear()
          const month = new Date().getMonth()
          const day = new Date().getDate()
          const start = new Date(year,month,day,0,0,0)
          return time.getTime() < start
        }
      },
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
    this.getTreeselect();
    this.getDicts("release_status").then((response) => {
      this.releaseStatusOptions = response.data;
    });
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询通知信息列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listInfo(this.queryParams).then(response => {
        this.infoList = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    // 取消按钮
    cancel() {
      this.open = false;
      this.openView = false;
      this.reset();
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.form = {
        noticeId: null,
        noticeName: null,
        noticeInfo: null,
        releaseUserId: null,
        releaseUserName: null,
        releaseStatus: "1",
        topping:'N',
        noticeLevel: null,
        addTime: null,
        endTime: null,
        releaseTime: null,
        createBy: null,
        createById: null,
        createTime: null,
        updateBy: null,
        updateById: null,
        updateTime: null,
        remark: null,
        roomIds: null,
        boardName: null,
        delFlag: null
      };
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    releaseStatusFormat(row, column) {
      return this.selectDictLabel(this.releaseStatusOptions, row.releaseStatus);
    },
    /** 查询部门下拉树结构 */
    getTreeselect() {
      locationAndBOardTree().then(e=>{
        this.roomOptions = e.data
      })
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.noticeId)
      this.single = selection.length!==1
      this.multiple = !selection.length
    },
    // 筛选节点
    filterNode(value, data) {
      if (!value) return true;
      return data.label.indexOf(value) !== -1;
    },
    // 节点单击事件
    handleNodeClick(node, nodeId) {
      const arr = this.$refs.tree.getCheckedNodes();
      this.form.roomIds = []
      arr.map(e => {
        if (e.type === 'room') {
          this.form.roomIds.push(e.id)
        }
      })
    },
    /** 新增按钮操作 */
    handleAdd() {
      this.reset();
      this.openView = true;
      this.title = "添加通知信息";
    },
    /** 查看按钮操作 */
    handleView(row) {
      this.reset()
      const noticeId = row.noticeId || this.ids
      getMessageInfo(noticeId).then(response => {
        response.data.timeArr = []
        this.form = response.data;
        if(this.form.releaseTime&&this.form.endTime){
          this.form.timeArr.push(this.form.releaseTime)
          this.form.timeArr.push(this.form.endTime)
        }
        this.form.roomIds = row.roomIds;
        this.open = true
        this.title = '查看通知信息'
      })
    },
    /** 修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset();
      const noticeId = row.noticeId || this.ids
      getMessageInfo(noticeId).then(response => {
        response.data.timeArr = []
        this.form = response.data;
        if(this.form.releaseTime&&this.form.endTime){
          this.form.timeArr.push(this.form.releaseTime)
          this.form.timeArr.push(this.form.endTime)
        }
        this.form.roomIds = row.roomIds;
        this.openView = true;
        this.title = "修改通知信息";
      });
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs["form"].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          if(this.form.timeArr&&this.form.timeArr.length){
            this.form.releaseTime = this.form.timeArr[0]
            this.form.endTime = this.form.timeArr[1]
          }
          if (this.form.noticeId != null) {
            updateInfo(this.form).then(response => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
              this.openView = false;
              this.getList();
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            });
          } else {
            addInfo(this.form).then(response => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
              this.openView = false;
              this.getList();
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            });
          }
        }
      });
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const noticeIds = row.noticeId || this.ids;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除通知标题为"' + row.noticeName + '"的数据项？').then(function() {
        return delInfo(noticeIds);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 下架按钮操作 */
    handleupdateTime(row) {
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认下架通知标题为"' + row.noticeName + '"的数据项？').then(function() {
        return updateInfoTime(row);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("下架成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.download('jufe:messageInfo/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `info_${new Date().getTime()}.xlsx`)
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <div>
  <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
    <el-form ref="form" :model="formItem" label-width="140px" :disabled="showDetail">
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="网关"
            prop="gatewayId"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '网关不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-select v-model="formItem.gatewayId" @change="getGroups" clearable filterable>
              <el-option
                v-for="item in gateways"
                :label="item.deviceName"
                :key="item.deviceId"
                :value="item.deviceId"
              />
            </el-select>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="分组网关"
            prop="groupId"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '分组网关不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-select v-model="formItem.groupId" @focus="focusGroup" @change="getRooms" clearable filterable>
              <el-option
                v-for="item in groups"
                :label="item.deviceName"
                :key="item.deviceId"
                :value="item.deviceId"
              />
            </el-select>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="选择教室"
            prop="roomId"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '教室不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-select v-model="formItem.roomId" @focus="focusRoom" clearable filterable>
              <el-option
                v-for="item in rooms"
                :label="item.roomName"
                :key="item.roomId"
                :value="item.roomId"
              />
            </el-select>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="门锁类型"
            prop="deviceType"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '门锁类型不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <DictSelect v-model="formItem.deviceType" dict-type="door_lock_type" clearable filterable  />
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12" v-if="formItem.deviceId!=null">
          <el-form-item
            label="门锁编号"
            prop="deviceCode"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.deviceCode" disabled maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="扩展编码"
            prop="expandCode"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.expandCode" maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="门锁名称"
            prop="deviceName"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '门锁名称不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.deviceName" maxlength="50" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="门锁MAC"
            prop="deviceMac"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '门锁MAC不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isMac, message: '请输入正确MAC地址', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.deviceMac" maxlength="30" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="IMEI"
            prop="imei"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.imei" maxlength="50" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="IMSI"
            prop="imsi"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.imsi" maxlength="50" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <!-- <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12">

          >
