      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="电池类型"
            prop="eleType"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '电池类型不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <DictSelect v-model="formItem.eleType" dict-type="dev_lock_ele_type" clearable filterable  />
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="信号强度"
            prop="eleType"
          >
            <el-tag v-if="formItem.signalStatus==='1'" type="success">高</el-tag>
            <el-tag v-if="formItem.signalStatus==='2'">中</el-tag>
            <el-tag v-if="formItem.signalStatus==='3'" type="danger">低</el-tag>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <!-- 20250122 隐藏 是否受任务控制和远程启停状态 -->
      <el-row v-if="false">
        <el-col :span="24">
          <el-form-item
            label="是否受任务控制"
            prop="status"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '是否受任务控制不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <DictSelect v-model="formItem.status" :type="'radio'" dict-type="sys_yes_no"/>
            <el-col>注：是否受定时任务与课程定时开关控制的设置。</el-col>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="24">
          <el-form-item
            label="远程启停状态"
            prop="isUsable"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '远程启停状态不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <DictSelect v-model="formItem.isUsable" :type="'radio'" dict-type="sys_normal_disable"/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row v-if="showDetail">
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="下发状态"
          >
            <DictSelect v-model="formItem.issuedStatus" dict-type="issued_status"  disabled/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="下发时间"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.issuedTime" disabled/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row v-if="showDetail">
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="密码设置状态"
          >
            <DictSelect v-model="formItem.setPassStatus" dict-type="set_pass_status"  disabled/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="当前电量"
          >
            <el-input v-model="formItem.eleQuantity" disabled/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row v-if="showDetail">
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="在线状态"
          >
            <DictSelect v-model="formItem.onlineStatus" dict-type="online_status"  disabled/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="门锁状态"
          >
            <DictSelect v-model="formItem.openStatus" dict-type="open_status"  disabled/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="24">
          <el-form-item
            label="备注"
            prop="remark"
          >
            <el-input type="textarea" v-model="formItem.remark" rows="3" resize="none" maxlength="200" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
    </el-form>
    <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
      <el-button type="primary" v-if="!showDetail" :loading="saveLoading"  @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button v-if="!showDetail" @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
    <Map v-if="mapVisable" :mapVisable.sync="mapVisable" :formItem="formItem"/>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  add,update
} from "@/api/jufe/lock";
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
import {isInt,isIP,isMac} from '@/utils/validate'
import Map from '@/views/jufe/lock/map'
import { listGroupOnly } from '@/api/jufe/grouping'
import { listRoom, listRoomOnly } from '@/api/jufe/room'
export default {
  name: "GatewayInfoAdd",
  components: {
    Treeselect,Map
  },
  props:{
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default:{}
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    showDetail: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    gateways:{
      type:Array,
      default(){
        return []
      }
    },
    title:{
      type:String,
      default:''
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
      mapVisable:false,
      groups:[],
      rooms:[]
    }
  },
  created() {
    //2026-01-22 门锁隐藏是否受任务控制和远程启停状态 并设置默认值
    this.formItem.status = 'N'
    this.formItem.isUsable = '0'
    if(this.formItem.deviceId){
      listGroupOnly({upId:this.formItem.gatewayId}).then(e=>{
        this.groups = e.rows
      })
      const that = this
      setTimeout(function () {
        that.getRooms()
      },1000);
    }
  },
  methods: {
    isInt:isInt,
    isIP:isIP,
    isMac:isMac,
    focusGroup(){
      if(!this.formItem.gatewayId){
        this.$message.error("请先选择网关！")
      }
    },
    getGroups(){
      this.formItem.groupId = null
      this.formItem.roomId = null
      listGroupOnly({upId:this.formItem.gatewayId}).then(e=>{
        this.groups = e.rows
      })
    },
    focusRoom(){
      if(!this.formItem.groupId){
        this.$message.error("请先选择分组网关！")
      }
    },
    getRooms(){
      let group
      this.groups.forEach(item=>{
        if(item.deviceId===this.formItem.groupId){
          group = item
        }
      })
      if(group){
        const params = {params:{locationIds:group.buildStorey}}
        listRoomOnly(params).then(e=>{
          this.rooms = e.rows
        })
      }else{
        this.rooms = []
      }
    },
    //打开地图
    openMap(){
      this.mapVisable=true
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.resetForm('form')
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['form'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          if (this.formItem.deviceId) {
            // 修改
            update(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          } else {
            add(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          }
        }
      })
    },
    loadData() {
      this.$emit('loadData')
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery"
            :records.sync="records"
            :gateways="gateways"

          v-hasPermi="['jufe:lock:add']"
        >新增

      <el-table-column label="门锁编号" align="center" prop="deviceCode" width="150"/>
      <el-table-column label="门锁名称" align="center" prop="deviceName"  width="200"/>
      <el-table-column label="教室编号" align="center" prop="roomCode"  width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="所属教室" align="center" prop="roomName" width="150" show-overflow-tooltip/>
      <el-table-column label="网关名称" align="center" prop="gatewayName" width="120"/>

      <el-table-column label="当前电量" align="center" prop="eleQuantity" width="80"/>
      <!-- 20250122 隐藏 是否受任务控制和远程启停状态 -->
      <!-- <el-table-column label="远程启停状态" align="center" prop="isUsable" width="80">

          <!-- <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleUpdateCard(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:lock:cardInfo']"  >设置门卡</el-button> -->
          <!-- <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleUpdateStatus(scope.row)"
                     v-hasPermi="['jufe:lock:edit']">{{scope.row.isUsable=='0'?"停用":"启用"}}</el-button> -->
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-setting" @click="handlePass('single',scope.row)" v-hasPermi="['jufe:lock:password']">设置密码</el-button>
          <el-button v-if="scope.row.issuedStatus==='0'" size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-setting" @click="handleIssued(scope.row)" v-hasPermi="['jufe:lock:issued']">下发</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize" :page-sizes="[10, 20, 30]"
                @pagination="getList" />
    <Add ref="add" v-if="addVisible" :visible.sync="addVisible"
         @loadData="getList"
         :form-item="formItem"
         :showDetail="showDetail"
         :title="title"
         :gateways="gateways"
    />
    <el-dialog v-if="passVisable" title="设置密码" :visible.sync="passVisable" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
      <el-form ref="passForm" :model="passItem" label-width="140px" >
        <el-form-item label="设置密码" prop="passWord"
          :rules="[{ required: true, message: '密码不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isSixLength, trigger: 'blur' }]"
        >
          <el-input type="text" v-model="passItem.passWord" autocomplete="off" minlength="6" maxlength="6"  />
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" :loading="saveLoading" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <!-- 添加门卡 -->
    <el-dialog v-if="cardVisable" title="添加门卡" :visible.sync="cardVisable" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
      <el-form ref="cardForm" :model="cardItem" label-width="140px" >
        <el-form-item label="添加门卡" prop="cardCode"
          :rules="[{ required: true, message: '门卡不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isMac, trigger: 'blur' }]"
        >
          <el-input type="text" v-model="cardItem.cardCode" autocomplete="off" minlength="6" maxlength="10"  />
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" :loading="saveLoading" @click="submitCardForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog :title="upload.title" :visible.sync="upload.open" width="400px" append-to-body
               :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-upload ref="upload" :limit="1" accept=".xlsx, .xls" :headers="upload.headers"
                 :action="upload.url + '?updateSupport=' + upload.updateSupport + '&memberType=' + upload.memberType + '&locationId=' + queryParams.locationId"
                 :disabled="upload.isUploading" :on-progress="handleFileUploadProgress" :on-success="handleFileSuccess"
                 :auto-upload="false" drag>
        <i class="el-icon-upload"></i>
        <div class="el-upload__text">
          将文件拖到此处，或
          <em>点击上传</em>
        </div>
        <div class="el-upload__tip" slot="tip">
          <!-- <el-checkbox v-model="upload.updateSupport" />是否更新已经存在的用户数据 -->
          <el-link type="info" style="font-size:12px; color:#1890ff" @click="importTemplate">下载模板</el-link>
        </div>
        <div class="el-upload__tip" style="color:red" slot="tip">提示：仅允许导入“xls”或“xlsx”格式文件！</div>
      </el-upload>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitFileForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="upload.open = false">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
     <el-dialog title="设置门卡" :visible.sync="cardInfoFromShow" width="750px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <!-- <el-form    label-width="120px" class="formCss">
        <el-form-item label="门卡">
          <el-button type="primary"   @click="addCardInfoToList" style="margin-left:20px">新增</el-button>
        </el-form-item>
        <template >
           <el-form-item v-for="(cardInfo, index) in cardInfoList" :key="index"
            :prop="'cardInfoList.' + index + '.cardCode'"
             :rules="[{ required: true, message: '门卡不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isMac, trigger: 'blur' }]"
             >
            <el-input v-model="cardInfo.cardCode" placeholder="请输入门卡" style="width:400px" autocomplete="off" maxlength="10"/>
            <el-button @click.prevent="removeCardInfoList(cardInfo)" style="margin-left:20px">删除
            </el-button>
          </el-form-item>
        </template>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
          <el-button type="primary" @click="submitCardInfosForm"  >确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cardInfoFromShow=false">取 消</el-button>
      </div> -->
      <el-form :model="dynamicValidateForm" ref="dynamicValidateForm" label-width="100px" class="demo-dynamic">
        <el-form-item
          v-for="(domain, index) in dynamicValidateForm.domains"
          :key="domain.key"
          :prop="'domains.' + index + '.cardCode'"
          :rules="[{ required: true, message: '门卡不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isMac, trigger: 'blur' }
          ]"
        >
          <el-input v-model="domain.cardCode" style="width:400px" maxlength="10"></el-input><el-button @click.prevent="removeDomain(domain)"  style="margin-left:20px">删除</el-button>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button @click="addDomainCard">添加门卡</el-button>
          <el-button type="primary" @click="submitCardInfosForm('dynamicValidateForm')">提交</el-button>
          <el-button @click="cardInfoFromShow=false">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>

<script>
import {
  list,
  update,
  del,
  setPassword,
  setCardInfo,
  issued,
  updateDevLockInfoIsUsable,
  getCardInfos,
  updateCardInfos
} from "@/api/jufe/lock";
import {listOnly} from "@/api/jufe/gatewayInfo"
import Search from "@/views/jufe/lock/search";
import Add from "@/views/jufe/lock/add";
import { isInt, isSixLength } from '@/utils/validate'
import { getToken } from '@/utils/auth'
import {updateBoardStatus} from "@/api/jufe/board";
export default {
  components: { Search, Add },
  name: "LockInfo",
  dicts: ['sys_normal_disable'],
  data() {
    return {
      dynamicValidateForm: {
          domains: [{
            cardCode: ''
          }]
        },
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      saveLoading: false,
      addVisible:false,
      passVisable:false,
      cardVisable:false,
      lockId:null,
      ids:[],
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        deviceCode:null,
        deviceName: null,
        gatewayId: null,
        groupId:null,
        roomId:null,
        roomName:null,
        deviceType:null,
        onlineStatus:null,
        openStatus:null,
        setPassStatus:null,
        isUsable:null,
        issuedStatus:null,
        eleType:null,
        params:{
          start:0,
          end:0
        }
      },
      formItem:{},
      passItem:{},
      cardItem:{},
      gateways:[],
      cardInfoList:[],
      title:'新增门锁',
      showDetail:false,
      cardInfoFromShow:false,
      // 用户导入参数
      upload: {
        load:null,
        // 是否显示弹出层（用户导入）
        open: false,
        // 弹出层标题（用户导入）
        title: "",
        // 是否禁用上传
        isUploading: false,
        // 是否更新已经存在的用户数据
        updateSupport: 0,
        memberType: 1,
        // 设置上传的请求头部
        headers: {
          Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken()
        },
        // 上传的地址
        url: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API + "/jufe/lock/importData"
      },
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getGateways()
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    isInt:isInt,
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.deviceId)
    },
    getGateways(){
      listOnly({status:"0"}).then(e=>{
        this.gateways = e.rows
      })
    },
    /** 查询计划列列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      list(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      }).catch(e=>{
        this.loading = false
      });
    },
  //添加到时间数组
    addCardInfoToList() {
      var newValue = {
        key: Date.now(),
        value:""
      };
      this.cardInfoList = [...this.cardInfoList, newValue]
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 启用停用 按钮操作 */
    handleUpdateStatus(row) {
      const deviceIds = row.deviceId || this.ids;
      this.$modal.confirm(row.isUsable=="0"?'是否确认停用，停用后该班牌将无法正常显示信息':'是否确认启用').then(function() {
        return updateDevLockInfoIsUsable(deviceIds);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess(row.isUsable=="0"?'停用成功':'启用成功');
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 新增&修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.title='新增门锁'
      this.showDetail=false
      if (row) {
        this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
        this.title = '编辑门锁'
      }
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    addTimeList() {
      this.timeListInfoFlag = false;
      var newValue = {
        key: Date.now(),
        value:""
      };
      this.taskSaveInfoForm.timeListInfo = [...this.taskSaveInfoForm.timeListInfo, newValue]
      this.timeListInfoFlag = true;
    },
    /** 设置门卡 */
    handleUpdateCard(row){
      this.resetForm("lockCardForm");
      var that = this;
      that.reset(); //后续处理
      const deviceId = row.deviceId;
      this.lockId =  row.deviceId;
      getCardInfos(deviceId).then(response => {
          this.cardInfoList = [];
          this.dynamicValidateForm.domains = [];
          this.cardInfoList = response.rows;
          this.cardInfoFromShow=true;
          this.dynamicValidateForm.domains  = response.rows;
      });
    },
    handleDetail(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
      this.title='门锁详情'
      this.showDetail = true
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    // 更改状态
    handleStatusChange(row) {
      const text = row.status === '0' ? '启用' : '停用'
      this.$confirm('确认要"' + text + '"单位吗?').then(() => {
        update({deviceId: row.deviceId, status: row.status }).then(res => {
          if (res.code === 200) {
            this.$message.success('操作成功！')
            this.getList()
          }
        })
      }).catch(function() {
        row.status = row.status === '0' ? '1' : '0'
      })
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const deviceIds = row.deviceId || this.ids;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确定删除?如果删除该门锁将无法使用!').then(function() {
        return del(deviceIds);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 下发 */
    handleIssued(row) {
      const deviceIds = row==null?this.ids:[row.deviceId];
      if(!deviceIds||deviceIds.length==0){
        this.$message.error("请选择下发的数据项")
        return
      }
      const loading = this.$loading({
        lock: true,
        text: 'Loading',
        spinner: 'el-icon-loading',
        background: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)'
      });
      issued(deviceIds).then(e=>{
        this.getList();
        loading.close();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("下发成功");
      })
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.showDetail = false
      this.formItem = {
        deviceId:null,
        deviceName: null,
        deviceIp: null,
        devicePort:null,
        deviceMac:null,
        deviceType:null,
        groupId: null,
        roomId: null,
        latitude:null,
        imei:null,
        imsi:null,
        gatewayId:null,
        deviceCode:null,
        expandCode:null,
        openRange:100
      }
    },
    isSixLength(rule, value, callback) {
      const pattern = /^\d{6}$/
      if (value && pattern.test(value) && value !== 0) {
        callback()
      } else if (value && !pattern.test(value)) {
        callback(new Error('请输入六位数字！'))
      } else {
        callback()
      }
    },
    isMac(rule, value, callback) {
      var pattern = /^[0-9A-Z]+$/
      if (value && pattern.test(value) && value !== 0) {
        callback()
      } else if (value && !pattern.test(value)) {
        callback(new Error('请输入正确门卡！'))
      } else {
        callback()
      }
    },
    handlePass(type,row){
      this.resetPass()
      let deviceIds
      if(type==='single'){
        this.passItem.passWord = row.passWord;
        deviceIds = [row.deviceId]
      }else if(type==='batch'){
        deviceIds = this.ids
        if(!this.ids||this.ids.length===0){
          this.$message.error("请选择数据！")
          return
        }
      }
      this.passItem.params.ids = deviceIds
      this.passVisable = true
    },
    //门卡
    handleCard(type,row){
      this.resetCard()
      let deviceIds
      if(type==='single'){
        deviceIds = [row.deviceId]
      }else if(type==='batch'){
        deviceIds = this.ids
        if(!this.ids||this.ids.length===0){
          this.$message.error("请选择数据！")
          return
        }
      }
      this.cardItem.params.ids = deviceIds
      this.cardVisable = true
    },
    //删除门卡集合中的元素
    removeCardInfoList(item) {
      var index = this.cardInfoList.indexOf(item);
      if (index !== -1) {
        this.cardInfoList.splice(index, 1);
      }
      this.$forceUpdate()
    },
    canclePass(type){
      let deviceIds
      if(type==='batch'){
        deviceIds = this.ids
        if(!this.ids||this.ids.length===0){
          this.$message.error("请选择数据！")
          return
        }
      }
      setPassword({params:{ids:deviceIds},passWord: null}).then(e=>{
        this.$message.success("取消密码成功！")
        this.getList();
      })
    },
    cancelCard(type){
      let deviceIds
      if(type==='batch'){
        deviceIds = this.ids
        if(!this.ids||this.ids.length===0){
          this.$message.error("请选择数据！")
          return
        }
      }
      setCardInfo({params:{ids:deviceIds},cardCode: ''}).then(e=>{
        this.$message.success("取消门卡成功！")
        this.getList();
      })
    },
    // 表单重置
    resetPass() {
      this.passItem = {
        passWord:null,
        checkPass:null,
        params:{
          ids:[]
        }
      }
    },
    // 表单重置
    resetCard(){
      this.cardItem = {
        cardCode:null,
        checkPass:null,
        params:{
          ids:[]
        }
      }
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.resetPass()
      this.passVisable = false
      this.resetCard()
      this.cardVisable = false
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['passForm'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          setPassword(this.passItem).then(e=>{
            this.saveLoading = false
            this.passVisable = false
            this.$message.success("设置成功！")
            this.getList();
          }).catch(e=>{
            this.saveLoading = false
          })
        }
      })
    },
    submitCardInfosForm(){
      this.$refs['dynamicValidateForm'].validate((valid) => {
        if (valid) {
          this.cardInfoList = this.dynamicValidateForm.domains;
          if(this.cardInfoList==undefined||this.cardInfoList.length==0){
            this.$modal.msgError("请输入门卡");
            return;
          }
          const cards = [];
          let flagInfo = false;
          this.cardInfoList.forEach((item) => {
            if(item.cardCode!=undefined && item.cardCode!=""){
              cards.push(item.cardCode);
            }else{
              this.$modal.msgError("门卡不能为空，请输入门卡或者删除");
              flagInfo =true;
              return;
            }
          })
          if(flagInfo){
            return;
          }
          this.saveLoading = true
          let lockInfo = {
            deviceId:this.lockId,
            cardCodes:cards
          }
          updateCardInfos(lockInfo).then(e=>{
            this.saveLoading = false
            this.cardInfoFromShow = false
            this.$message.success("设置成功！")
            this.getList();
          }).catch(e=>{
            this.saveLoading = false
          })
        } else {
          return false;
        }
      });
    },
    //设置nfc卡
    submitCardForm(){
      this.$refs['cardForm'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          setCardInfo(this.cardItem).then(e=>{
            this.saveLoading = false
            this.cardVisable = false
            this.$message.success("设置成功！")
            this.getList();
          }).catch(e=>{
            this.saveLoading = false
          })
        }
      })
    },
    /** 导入按钮操作 */
    handleImport() {
      this.upload.title = "导入";
      this.upload.open = true;
    },
    // 文件上传中处理
    handleFileUploadProgress(event, file, fileList) {
      this.upload.isUploading = true;
    },
    // 文件上传成功处理
    handleFileSuccess(response, file, fileList) {
      this.upload.open = false;
      this.upload.isUploading = false;
      this.$refs.upload.clearFiles();
      this.getList();
      this.upload.loading.close()
      this.$alert(response.msg, "导入结果", {
        dangerouslyUseHTMLString: true,
        customClass: 'message_box_alert'
      });
    },
    /** 下载模板操作 */
    importTemplate() {
      this.download('/jufe/lock/importTemplate', {}, `门锁管理数据导入模板.xlsx`)
    },
    // 提交上传文件
    submitFileForm() {
      this.upload.loading = this.$loading({
        lock: true,
        text: 'Loading',
        spinner: 'el-icon-loading',
        background: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)'
      });
      this.$refs.upload.submit();
    },
    submitFormCard() {
      this.$refs['dynamicValidateForm'].validate((valid) => {
        if (valid) {
          alert('submit!');
        } else {
          return false;
        }
      });
    },
    resetFormCard() {
      this.$refs['dynamicValidateForm'].resetFields();
    },
    removeDomain(item) {
      var index = this.dynamicValidateForm.domains.indexOf(item)
      if (index !== -1) {
        this.dynamicValidateForm.domains.splice(index, 1)
      }
    },
    addDomainCard() {
      this.dynamicValidateForm.domains.push({
        value: '',
        key: Date.now()
      });
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <el-dialog  :close-on-click-modal="false" width="1000px" height="800px" title="选择位置" :visible.sync="mapVisable" append-to-body>
    <template>
      <div id="container"></div>
    </template>
    <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
      <el-button type="primary" @click="chooseLocation">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button @click="closeLocationPage">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
</template>
<script>
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
export default {
  name: "Plan",
  components: {
    Treeselect
  },
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    mapVisable:{
      type:Boolean,
      default: false
    },
    formItem:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
    }
  },
  created() {
    console.log(this.formItem)
    this.openChooseDialog()
  },
  methods: {
    // 点击选择按钮打开地图
    openChooseDialog() {
      setTimeout(() => {
        this.initMap()
        if (this.formItem.latitude != null) {
          this.marker = new TMap.MultiMarker({
            map: this.map, //指定点标记图层所覆盖的地图容器
            // 设置点标记数据
            geometries: [{
              id: 'demo',//指定点标记id
              position: new TMap.LatLng(this.formItem.latitude.split(",")[1], this.formItem.latitude.split(",")[0])// 标记位置(经度，纬度，高度)
            }],
          });
          this.circle = new TMap.MultiCircle({
            map: this.map,
            geometries: [{
              id: 'circle',
              center: new TMap.LatLng(this.formItem.latitude.split(",")[1], this.formItem.latitude.split(",")[0]),       // 设置圆的中心
              radius: Number(this.formItem.openRange)  //设置圆的半径
            }]
          })
        }
      }, 200)
    },
    // 点击确定按钮
    chooseLocation() {
      this.$emit('update:formItem', this.formItem)
      // 关闭地图页
      this.$emit('update:mapVisable', false)
    },
    // 关闭地图页
    closeLocationPage() {
      this.$emit('update:mapVisable', false)
    },
    initMap() {
      this.TMap = window.TMap
      this.lat = 43.834004
      this.lng = 125.321022
      // 初始化地图
      this.map = new TMap.Map('container', {
        zoom: 15, // 设置地图缩放级别
        center: new TMap.LatLng(43.834004, 125.321022), // 设置地图中心点坐标
      }),
        //监听点击事件添加marker
        this.map.on("click", (evt) => {
          this.formItem.latitude = evt.latLng.lng.toFixed(6) + "," + evt.latLng.lat.toFixed(6)
          if (this.marker) {
            this.marker.remove('demo');
          }
          if (this.circle) {
            this.circle.remove(['circle']);
          }
          this.marker = new TMap.MultiMarker({
            map: this.map, //指定点标记图层所覆盖的地图容器
            // 设置点标记数据
            geometries: [{
              id: 'demo',//指定点标记id
              position: evt.latLng// 标记位置(经度，纬度，高度)
            }],
          });
          this.circle = new TMap.MultiCircle({
            map: this.map,
            geometries: [{
              id: 'circle',
              center: evt.latLng,       // 设置圆的中心
              radius: Number(this.formItem.openRange)  //设置圆的半径
            }]
          })
        });
    },
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" :inline="true" label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="教室编号" prop="roomCode">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.roomCode"  placeholder="请输入教室编号" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="门锁编号" prop="deviceCode">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.deviceCode"  placeholder="请输入门锁编号" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="门锁名称" prop="deviceName">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.deviceName"  placeholder="请输入门锁名称" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="网关名称" prop="gatewayId">
      <el-select v-model="queryParams.gatewayId" @change="getGroups" clearable>
        <el-option
          v-for="item in gateways"
          :label="item.deviceName"
          :key="item.deviceId"
          :value="item.deviceId"
        />
      </el-select>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="分组名称" prop="groupId">
      <el-select v-model="queryParams.groupId" @change="getRooms" clearable>
        <el-option
          v-for="item in groups"
          :label="item.deviceName"
          :key="item.deviceId"
          :value="item.deviceId"
        />
      </el-select>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item
      label="门锁类型"
      prop="deviceType"
    >
      <DictSelect v-model="queryParams.deviceType" dict-type="door_lock_type" :placeholder="'请选择门锁类型'" clearable/>
    </el-form-item>

      label="在线状态"
      prop="onlineStatus"
    >
      <DictSelect v-model="queryParams.onlineStatus" dict-type="online_status" :placeholder="'请选择在线状态'" clearable/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item
      label="门锁状态"
      prop="openStatus"
    >
      <DictSelect v-model="queryParams.openStatus" dict-type="open_status" :placeholder="'请选择门锁状态'" clearable/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item
      label="门状态"
      prop="openStatus"
    >
      <DictSelect v-model="queryParams.doorStatus" dict-type="door_status" :placeholder="'请选择门状态'" clearable/>
    </el-form-item>

    >
      <DictSelect v-model="queryParams.eleType" dict-type="dev_lock_ele_type" :placeholder="'请选择电池类型'" clearable/>
    </el-form-item>

      <DictSelect v-model="queryParams.issuedStatus" dict-type="issued_status" :placeholder="'请选择下发状态'" clearable/>

    >

    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item
      label="电量"
      prop="openStatus"
    >
      <el-col :span="11">
        <el-form-item prop="params.start">
          <el-input-number v-model="queryParams.params.start"  placeholder="大于等于" :min="0" :max="100" clearable style="width: 120px;" clearable/>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-col>
      <el-col class="line" :span="2" style="text-align: center;">-</el-col>
      <el-col :span="11">
        <el-form-item prop="params.end">
          <el-input-number v-model="queryParams.params.end"  placeholder="小于等于" :min="queryParams.params.start" :max="100" clearable style="width: 120px;" clearable/>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-col>
    </el-form-item>
    <!-- <el-form-item
      label="远程启停状态"
      prop="isUsable"
    >
      <DictSelect v-model="queryParams.isUsable" dict-type="sys_normal_disable" :placeholder="'请选择启停状态'" clearable/>
    </el-form-item> -->
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
import {  listGroupOnly } from '@/api/jufe/grouping'
import {listRoomOnly} from '@/api/jufe/room'
export default {
  name: "Plan",
  components: {
    Treeselect
  },
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    },
    gateways:{
      type:Array,
      default(){
        return []
      }
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      groups:[],
      rooms:[]
    };
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    getGroups(){
      this.queryParams.groupId = null
      if(!this.queryParams.gatewayId){
        this.$message.error("请选择网关！")
      }
      listGroupOnly({upId:this.queryParams.gatewayId}).then(e=>{
        this.groups = e.rows
      })
    },
    getRooms(){
      let group
      this.groups.forEach(item=>{
        if(item.deviceId===this.queryParams.groupId){
          group = item
        }
      })
      const params = {params:{locationIds:group.buildStorey}}
      listRoomOnly(params).then(e=>{
        this.rooms = e.rows
      })
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.queryParams.dataRange = []
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>
<style scoped>
  .line-style{

    display: flex;

  }
  .itemstyle{
    margin-left: 20px;
    margin-right: 20px;
  }
</style>
<template>

        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.deviceCode"
          placeholder="请输入门锁编号"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
