      <el-form-item label="门锁名称" prop="deviceName">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.deviceName"
          placeholder="请输入门锁名称"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="教室编号" prop="roomCode">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.roomCode"
          placeholder="请输入教室编号"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="教室名称" prop="roomName">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.roomName"
          placeholder="请输入教室名称"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="开关方式" prop="controlType">
        <el-select v-model="queryParams.controlType" placeholder="请选择状态" clearable>
          <el-option v-for="dict in dict.type.control_type_lock" :key="dict.value" :label="dict.label"
                     :value="dict.value" />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="开关操作" prop="operationOnoff">
        <el-select v-model="queryParams.operationOnoff" placeholder="请选择状态" clearable>
          <el-option v-for="dict in dict.type.operation_onoff_lock" :key="dict.value" :label="dict.label"
                     :value="dict.value" />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="操作结果" prop="operResult">
        <el-select v-model="queryParams.operResult" placeholder="请选择操作结果" clearable>
          <el-option v-for="dict in dict.type.oper_result" :key="dict.value" :label="dict.label"
                     :value="dict.value" />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="操作人员编号" prop="operUserNum" label-width="98px">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.operUserNum"
          placeholder="请输入操作人员编号"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="操作人员" prop="operUserName">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.operUserName"
          placeholder="请输入操作人员"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="操作时间" prop="operTime">
        <el-date-picker v-model="dateRange" size="small" style="width: 240px" value-format="yyyy-MM-dd" type="daterange"
                        range-separator="-" start-placeholder="开始时间" end-placeholder="结束时间"></el-date-picker>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item>
        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="warning"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-download"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleExport"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:locklog:export']"
        >导出</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <right-toolbar :showSearch.sync="showSearch" @queryTable="getList"></right-toolbar>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="logList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
      <el-table-column type="index" width="50" align="center" label="序号" />
      <el-table-column label="门锁编号" align="center" prop="deviceCode" />
      <el-table-column label="门锁名称" align="center" prop="deviceName" />
      <el-table-column label="教室编号" align="center" prop="roomCode" />
      <el-table-column label="教室名称" align="center" prop="roomName" />
      <el-table-column label="开关方式" align="center" prop="controlType" >
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <dict-tag :options="dict.type.control_type_lock" :value="scope.row.controlType" />
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="开关操作" align="center" prop="operationOnoff" >
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <dict-tag :options="dict.type.operation_onoff_lock" :value="scope.row.operationOnoff" />
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作结果" align="center" prop="operResult" >
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <dict-tag :options="dict.type.oper_result" :value="scope.row.operResult" />
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作人员编号" align="center" prop="operUserNum"  label-width="120px" />
      <el-table-column label="操作人员" align="center" prop="operUserName" />
      <el-table-column label="操作时间" align="center" prop="operTime" width="180" />
      <el-table-column label="课程信息" align="center" prop="courseName" />
      <el-table-column label="Nfc" align="center" prop="verNum" />
    </el-table>
    <pagination
      v-show="total>0"
      :total="total"
      :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
      :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
      @pagination="getList"
    />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { listLog, getLog, delLog, addLog, updateLog } from "@/api/jufe/locklog";
export default {
  name: "Log",
  dicts: ['control_type_lock','operation_onoff_lock','oper_result'],
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      // 非单个禁用
      single: true,
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 门锁控制日志表格数据
      logList: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      // 日期范围
      dateRange: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        deviceCode: null,
        deviceName: null,
        posName: null,
        roomId: null,
        operationOnoff: null,
        operUserId: null,
        operUserName: null,
        operTime: null,
        courseName: null,
        controlType: null,
        createById: null,
        updateById: null,
        delFalg: null,
        deptId: null,
        beginDate: null,
        endDate: null
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {},
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
      }
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询门锁控制日志列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      if (this.dateRange&&this.dateRange.length) {
        this.queryParams.beginDate = this.dateRange[0];
        this.queryParams.endDate = this.dateRange[1];
      }else{
        this.queryParams.beginDate = null;
        this.queryParams.endDate = null;
      }
      listLog(this.queryParams).then(response => {
        this.logList = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    // 取消按钮
    cancel() {
      this.reset();
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.dateRange = [];
      this.form = {
        deviceId: null,
        deviceCode: null,
        deviceName: null,
        posName: null,
        roomId: null,
        operationOnoff: null,
        operUserId: null,
        operUserName: null,
        operTime: null,
        courseName: null,
        controlType: null,
        createById: null,
        createBy: null,
        createTime: null,
        updateById: null,
        updateBy: null,
        updateTime: null,
        remark: null,
        delFalg: null,
        deptId: null,
        beginDate: null,
        endDate: null,
        dateRange: []
      };
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.dateRange = [];
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.deviceId)
      this.single = selection.length!==1
      this.multiple = !selection.length
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.download('jufe/locklog/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `门锁控制记录.xlsx`)
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch" label-width="68px">
      <el-form-item label="监控编号" prop="deviceNo">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.deviceNo"
          placeholder="请输入监控编号"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="监控名称" prop="deviceName">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.deviceName"
          placeholder="请输入监控名称"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="所属教室" prop="roomId">
        <treeselect v-model="queryParams.roomId"
                    :options="buildTreeData"
                    :disable-branch-nodes="true"
                    placeholder="选择楼栋"
                    @select="selectRoom"
                    style="width: 300px"
        />
      </el-form-item>
<!--      <el-form-item label="在线状态" prop="onlineStatus">-->
<!--        <el-select v-model="queryParams.onlineStatus" placeholder="请选择在线状态" clearable size="small">-->
<!--          <el-option label="在线" value="1" />-->
<!--          <el-option label="离线" value="0" />-->
<!--        </el-select>-->
<!--      </el-form-item>-->
      <el-form-item>
        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleAdd"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:monitorinfo:add']"
        >新增</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="danger"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-delete"
          size="mini"
          :disabled="multiple"
          @click="handleDelete"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:monitorinfo:remove']"
        >删除</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="warning"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-download"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleExport"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:monitorinfo:export']"
        >导出</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <!-- <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button type="info" plain icon="el-icon-upload2" size="mini" @click="handleImport"
        >导入</el-button>
      </el-col> -->
      <right-toolbar :showSearch.sync="showSearch" @queryTable="getList"></right-toolbar>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="infoList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
      <el-table-column label="监控名称" align="center" prop="deviceName" />
      <el-table-column label="监控编号" align="center" prop="deviceNo" />
      <el-table-column label="所属教室" align="center" prop="roomName" />
      <el-table-column label="监控用户名" align="center" prop="cameraUser" />
      <el-table-column label="监控密码" align="center" prop="cameraPassword" />
      <el-table-column label="监控IP" align="center" prop="cameraIp" />
<!--      <el-table-column label="在线状态" align="center" prop="onlineStatus" >-->
<!--        <template slot-scope="scope">-->
<!--          <span v-if="scope.row.onlineStatus == 1">在线</span>-->
<!--          <span v-else-if="scope.row.onlineStatus == 0">离线</span>-->
<!--        </template>-->
<!--      </el-table-column>-->
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <!-- <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-view"
            v-if="scope.row.onlineStatus != 0"
            @click="handleMonitor(scope.row)"
          >监控</el-button> -->
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:monitorinfo:edit']"
          >修改</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-delete"
            @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:monitorinfo:remove']"
          >删除</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination
      v-show="total>0"
      :total="total"
      :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
      :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
      @pagination="getList"
    />
    <!-- 添加或修改监控设备对话框 -->
    <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="open" width="500px" append-to-body>
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="100px">
        <el-form-item label="监控名称" prop="deviceName">
          <el-input v-model="form.deviceName" placeholder="请输入监控名称" maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="所属教室" prop="roomId">
          <treeselect v-model="form.roomId"
                      :options="buildTreeData"
                      :disable-branch-nodes="true"
                      placeholder="选择教室"
                      @select="selectRoom"/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="监控用户名" prop="cameraUser">
          <el-input v-model="form.cameraUser" placeholder="请输入内容" maxlength="10" show-word-limit/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="监控密码" prop="cameraPassword">
          <el-input v-model="form.cameraPassword" placeholder="请输入内容" maxlength="20" show-word-limit />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="监控IP" prop="cameraIp">
          <el-input v-model="form.cameraIp" placeholder="请输入内容" maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="设备描述" prop="remark">
          <el-input v-model="form.remark" type="textarea" placeholder="请输入内容" maxlength="200" show-word-limit/>
        </el-form-item>
<!--        <el-form-item label="在线状态" prop="onlineStatus">-->
<!--          <el-select v-model="form.onlineStatus" placeholder="请选择在线状态状态" >-->
<!--            <el-option v-for="dict in dict.type.online_status" :key="dict.value" :label="dict.label"-->
<!--                       :value="dict.value" />-->
<!--          </el-select>-->
<!--        </el-form-item>-->
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <!-- 视频监控窗口 -->
    <el-dialog :title="monitor.title" :visible.sync="monitor.open" @closed="monitorClosed" width="640px"
               :close-on-click-modal="false" destroy-on-close>
      <stream-player key="1" v-if="monitor.open" :url="monitor.video.source"/>
    </el-dialog>
    <!-- 用户导入对话框 -->
    <el-dialog v-if="upload.open" :title="upload.title" :visible.sync="upload.open" width="400px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false" :close-on-press-escape="false">
      <el-upload ref="upload" :limit="1" accept=".xlsx, .xls" :headers="upload.headers"
                 :action="upload.url + '?updateSupport=' + upload.updateSupport" :disabled="upload.isUploading"
                 :on-progress="handleFileUploadProgress" :on-success="handleFileSuccess"  :auto-upload="false" drag>
        <i class="el-icon-upload"></i>
        <div class="el-upload__text">
          将文件拖到此处，或
          <em>点击上传</em>
        </div>
        <div class="el-upload__tip" slot="tip">
          <el-link type="info" style="font-size:14px;color: #00afff;" @click="importTemplate">下载模板</el-link>
        </div>
        <div class="el-upload__tip" style="color:red" slot="tip">提示：仅允许导入“xls”或“xlsx”格式文件！</div>
      </el-upload>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitFileForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="upload.open = false">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { listInfo, getInfo, delInfo, addInfo, updateInfo,getStream } from "@/api/jufe/monitor.js";
import StreamPlayer from "@/components/StreamPlayer"
import {tree} from "@/api/location/location";
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
import {isIP} from "@/utils/validate";
import {getToken} from "@/utils/auth";
export default {
  name: "Info",
  components: {Treeselect, StreamPlayer},
  dicts: ['online_status'],
  props:{
    addType: {
      type: String,
      default() {
        return ''
      }
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      // 用户导入参数
      upload: {
        // 是否显示弹出层（用户导入）
        open: false,
        // 弹出层标题（用户导入）
        title: "导入",
        // 是否禁用上传
        isUploading: false,
        // 是否更新已经存在的用户数据
        updateSupport: 0,
        // 上传的文件列表
        fileList: [],
        // 设置上传的请求头部
        headers: {
          Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken()
        },
        // 上传的地址
        url: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API + "/jufe/monitor/importData"
      },
      buildTreeData:[],
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      // 非单个禁用
      single: true,
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 监控设备表格数据
      infoList: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      // 码流类型
      streamTypeOptions: [{
        dictLabel: "主码流",
        dictValue: 0
      }, {
        dictLabel: "子码流",
        dictValue: 1
      }, {
        dictLabel: "第三码流",
        dictValue: 2
      }],
      // 取流协议
      protocolOptions: [{
        dictLabel: "RTSP",
        dictValue: "rtsp"
      }, {
        dictLabel: "RTMP",
        dictValue: "rtmp"
      }, {
        dictLabel: "HLS",
        dictValue: "hls"
      }],
      transmodeOptions: [{
        dictLabel: "UDP",
        dictValue: 0
      }, {
        dictLabel: "TCP",
        dictValue: 1
      }],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        roomId: null,
        roomName: null,
        deviceName: null,
        deviceType: null,
        roomNo: null,
        onlineStatus:null,
        cameraUser:null,
        cameraPassword:null,
        cameraIp:null,
        cameraPort:null,
        ids:[]
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {},
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
        roomId: [
          { required: true, message: "位置ID不能为空", trigger: "blur" }
        ],
        deviceName: [
          { required: true, message: "监控名称不能为空", trigger: "blur" }
        ],
        cameraUser: [
          { required: true, message: "监控用户名不能为空", trigger: "blur" }
        ],
        cameraPassword: [
          { required: true, message: "监控密码不能为空", trigger: "blur" }
        ],
        cameraIp: [
          { required: true, message: "监控IP不能为空", trigger: "blur" },
          { validator: isIP, message: '请输入正确IP', trigger: 'blur' }
        ]
      },
      monitor: {
        title: "视频监控",
        open: false,
        video: {
          source: null
        }
      }
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
    this.getDicts("online_status").then((response) => {
      this.onlineStatusOptions = response.data;
    });
    tree().then(e=>{
      this.buildTreeData = e.data
    })
  },
  methods: {
    isIP:isIP,
    /** 查询监控设备列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listInfo(this.queryParams).then(response => {
        this.infoList = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    selectRoom(node,nodeId){
      if(node.type==='room'){
        this.form.roomName = node.label
        this.form.roomCode = node.code
      }
    },
    // 取消按钮
    cancel() {
      this.open = false;
      this.reset();
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.form = {
        deviceId: null,
        roomId: null,
        roomName: null,
        deviceNo: null,
        deviceName: null,
        deviceType: null,
        deviceManufacturer: null,
        streamType: null,
        protocol: null,
        transmode: null,
        remark: null,
        roomNo:null,
        onlineStatus:null,
        cameraUser:null,
        cameraPassword:null,
        cameraIp:null,
        cameraPort:null,
        createBy: null,
        createTime: null,
        updateBy: null,
        updateTime: null
      };
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    /** 视频监控 */
    handleMonitor(row) {
      this.monitor.title = row.roomName;
      this.monitor.video.source = 'rtsp://'+row.cameraUser+':'+row.cameraPassword+'@'+row.cameraIp+':'+row.cameraPort+'/h264/ch1/main/av_stream'
      // this.monitor.video.source = 'rtsp://admin:a1234567@192.168.1.231:554/h264/ch1/main/av_stream'
      this.monitor.open = true;
    },
    /** 监控关闭 */
    monitorClosed() {
      this.monitor.title = "视频监控";
      this.monitor.video.id = null;
      this.monitor.video.source = null;
    },
    releaseStatusFormat(row, column) {
      return this.selectDictLabel(this.onlineStatusOptions, row.onlineStatus);
    },
    // 多选框选中数hh据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.deviceId)
      this.single = selection.length!==1
      this.multiple = !selection.length
    },
    /** 新增按钮操作 */
    handleAdd() {
      this.reset();
      this.open = true;
      this.title = "添加监控设备";
    },
    /** 修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset();
      const deviceId = row.deviceId || this.ids
      getInfo(deviceId).then(response => {
        this.form = response.data;
        this.open = true;
        this.title = "修改监控设备";
      });
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs["form"].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          if (this.form.deviceId != null) {
            updateInfo(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          } else {
            addInfo(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          }
        }
      });
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const deviceIds = row.deviceId || this.ids;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除监控设备编号为"' + deviceIds + '"的数据项？').then(function() {
        return delInfo(deviceIds);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.queryParams.ids = []
      if(this.ids&&this.ids.length){
        this.queryParams.ids = this.ids
      }
      this.download('jufe/monitor/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `info_${new Date().getTime()}.xlsx`)
    },
    /** 导入按钮操作 */
    handleImport() {
      this.upload.title = "导入";
      this.upload.open = true;
    },
    /** 下载模板操作 */
    importTemplate() {
      this.download('/jufe/monitor/importTemplate', {}, `监控设备管理数据导入模板.xlsx`)
    },
    // 文件上传中处理
    handleFileUploadProgress(event, file, fileList) {
      this.upload.isUploading = true;
    },
    // 文件上传成功处理
    handleFileSuccess(response, file, fileList) {
      this.upload.open = false;
      this.upload.isUploading = false;
      let title
      if(response.code===200){
        title = "导入成功"
        this.$alert( response.msg,title, {
          dangerouslyUseHTMLString: true
        });
      }else{
        title = "导入失败"
        this.$alert("",title, {
          dangerouslyUseHTMLString: true,
          message: '<div style="max-height:800px;overflow-y:auto">'+response.msg+'</div>'
        });
      }
      this.getList();
    },
    // 提交上传文件
    submitFileForm() {
      this.$refs.upload.submit();
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <div>
  <el-dialog title="新增" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
    <el-form ref="form" :model="formItem" label-width="140px">
      <el-form-item
        label="上级"
        prop="parentId"
      >
        <treeselect ref="tree"  v-model="formItem.parentId" :options="powerTreeData"   placeholder="选择上级" @select="selectPower" @input="clearPower" :disabled="addType==='addSub'"/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        label="类型"
        prop="deviceNodeType"
        :rules="[{ required: true, message: '类型不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
      >
        <DictSelect v-model="formItem.deviceNodeType" :include.sync="includes" dict-type="device_node_type"/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        v-if="formItem.deviceNodeType==='2'||formItem.deviceNodeType==='4'"
        label="序号"
        prop="sortNum"
        :rules="[{ required: true, message: '序号不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isInt, message: '请输入正确序号', trigger: 'blur' }]"
      >
        <el-input v-model="formItem.sortNum" maxlength="4" show-word-limit/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        label="名称"
        prop="powerNodeNode"
        :rules="[{ required: true, message: '名称不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
      >
        <el-input v-model="formItem.powerNodeNode" maxlength="12" show-word-limit/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        v-if="formItem.deviceNodeType==='1'||formItem.deviceNodeType==='3'"
        label="IP"
        prop="ipAddress"
        :rules="[{ required: true, message: 'IP不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isIP, message: '请输入正确IP', trigger: 'blur' }]"
      >
        <el-input v-model="formItem.ipAddress" maxlength="20" show-word-limit />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        v-if="formItem.deviceNodeType==='1'||formItem.deviceNodeType==='3'"
        label="端口"
        prop="port"
        :rules="[{ required: true, message: '端口不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isInt, message: '请输入正确端口', trigger: 'blur' }]"
      >
        <el-input v-model="formItem.port" maxlength="5" show-word-limit />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        v-if="formItem.deviceNodeType==='1'||formItem.deviceNodeType==='3'"
        label="MAC"
        prop="mac"
        :rules="[{ required: true, message: 'MAC不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isMac, message: '请输入正确MAC地址', trigger: 'blur' }]"
      >
        <el-input v-model="formItem.mac" maxlength="30"  show-word-limit />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        label="教室"
        prop="roomId"
        :rules="[{ required: true, message: '教室不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
      >
        <treeselect v-model="formItem.roomId"
                    :options="buildTreeData"
                    :disable-branch-nodes="true"
                    placeholder="选择楼栋"
                    @select="selectRoom"
                    :disabled="addType==='addSub'||(formItem.parentId!=null&&formItem.parentId!=0)"/>
      </el-form-item>
<!--      <el-form-item-->
<!--        v-if="formItem.parentId==null||formItem.parentId==''"-->
<!--        label="密码"-->
<!--        prop="newPw"-->
<!--        :rules="[{ validator: isPassword2, trigger: 'blur' }]"-->
<!--      >-->
<!--        <el-input type="password" v-model="formItem.newPw" maxlength="20"  show-word-limit autocomplete="off"/>-->
<!--      </el-form-item>-->
      <el-form-item
        label="备注"
        prop="remark"
      >
        <el-input type="textarea" v-model="formItem.remark" maxlength="200" show-word-limit resize="none" rows="3"/>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
      <el-button type="primary"  @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button  @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  addPowerNode,
  updatePowerNode,
  powerTree
} from "@/api/jufe/powerNode";
import {tree} from '@/api/location/location'
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
import {isInt,isIP,isMac,isPassword2} from '@/utils/validate'
export default {
  name: "PowerAdd",
  components: {
    Treeselect,Map
  },
  props:{
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default:{}
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    addType: {
      type: String,
      default() {
        return ''
      }
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
      buildTreeData:[],
      powerTreeData:[],
      includes:['1','3']
    }
  },
  created() {
    if(this.formItem.parentId===0){
      this.formItem.parentId = null
    }
    tree().then(e=>{
      this.buildTreeData = e.data
    })
    powerTree().then(e=>{
      this.powerTreeData = e.data
      if(this.formItem.powerNodeId){
        this.powerTreeData.map(e=>{
          if(e.id===this.formItem.parentId){
            this.formItem.parentNodeType = e.deviceNodeType
          }
          if(e.children){
            e.children.map(e=>{
              if(e.id===this.formItem.parentId){
                this.formItem.parentNodeType = e.deviceNodeType
              }
              if(e.children){
                e.children.map(e=>{
                  if(e.id===this.formItem.parentId){
                    this.formItem.parentNodeType = e.deviceNodeType
                  }
                })
              }
            })
          }
        })
        this.changeIncludes(this.formItem.parentNodeType)
      }
    })
    if(this.formItem.parentNodeType){
      this.changeIncludes(this.formItem.parentNodeType)
    }
  },
  methods: {
    isInt:isInt,
    isIP:isIP,
    isMac:isMac,
    isPassword2:isPassword2,
    selectPower(node,nodeId){
      this.formItem.deviceNodeType = null
      this.formItem.roomId=node.roomId
      this.formItem.deviceLevel = Number(node.level) + 1
      this.changeIncludes(node.deviceNodeType)
    },
    clearPower(value,nodeId){
      this.formItem.deviceNodeType = null
      if(value!=undefined){
        return;
      }
      this.formItem.roomId=null
      this.formItem.parentId = null
      this.formItem.deviceLevel = 1
      this.changeIncludes('')
    },
    changeIncludes(parentNodeType){
      if(parentNodeType==='1'){
        this.includes = ['2','4']
      }else if(parentNodeType==='2'){
        this.includes = ['3']
      }else if(parentNodeType==='3'){
        this.includes = ['4']
      }else{
        this.includes = ['1','3']
      }
    },
    selectRoom(node,nodeId){
      if(node.type==='room'){
        this.formItem.roomName = node.label
        this.formItem.roomCode = node.code
      }
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.resetForm('form')
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['form'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          addPowerNode(this.formItem).then(e => {
            this.$message.success('保存成功')
            this.handleClose()
            this.loadData()
          })
        }
      })
    },
    loadData() {
      this.$emit('loadData')
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <div>
  <el-dialog title="详情" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
    <el-form ref="form" :model="formItem" label-width="140px" :disabled="true">
      <el-form-item
        label="上级"
        prop="parentId"
      >
        <treeselect ref="tree"  v-model="formItem.parentId" :options="powerTreeData"   placeholder="选择上级" :disabled="true"/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        label="类型"
        prop="deviceNodeType"
      >
        <DictSelect v-model="formItem.deviceNodeType" :include.sync="includes" dict-type="device_node_type"/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        v-if="formItem.deviceNodeType==='2'||formItem.deviceNodeType==='4'"
        label="序号"
        prop="sortNum"
      >
        <el-input v-model="formItem.sortNum" maxlength="4" show-word-limit/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        label="名称"
        prop="powerNodeNode"
      >
        <el-input v-model="formItem.powerNodeNode" maxlength="100" show-word-limit/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        v-if="formItem.deviceNodeType==='1'||formItem.deviceNodeType==='3'"
        label="IP"
        prop="ipAddress"
      >
        <el-input v-model="formItem.ipAddress" maxlength="20" show-word-limit />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        v-if="formItem.deviceNodeType==='1'||formItem.deviceNodeType==='3'"
        label="端口"
        prop="port"
      >
        <el-input v-model="formItem.port" maxlength="5" show-word-limit />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        label="教室"
        prop="roomId"
        :rules="[{ required: true, message: '教室不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
      >
        <treeselect v-model="formItem.roomId"
                    :options="buildTreeData"
                    :disable-branch-nodes="true"
                    placeholder="选择楼栋"
                    :disabled="true"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        v-if="formItem.deviceNodeType==='2'||formItem.deviceNodeType==='4'"
        label="在线状态"
        prop="deviceNodeType"
      >
        <DictSelect v-model="formItem.onlineStatus"  dict-type="online_status"/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        v-if="formItem.deviceNodeType==='2'||formItem.deviceNodeType==='4'"
        label="空开状态"
        prop="deviceNodeType"
      >
        <DictSelect v-model="formItem.onoffStatus" :include.sync="includes" dict-type="operation_onoff_pow" />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        label="备注"
        prop="remark"
      >
        <el-input type="textarea" v-model="formItem.remark" maxlength="200" show-word-limit resize="none" rows="3"/>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
  </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  addPowerNode,
  updatePowerNode,
  powerTree
} from "@/api/jufe/powerNode";
import {tree} from '@/api/location/location'
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
import {isInt,isIP} from '@/utils/validate'
export default {
  name: "PowerAdd",
  components: {
    Treeselect,Map
  },
  props:{
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default:{}
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
      buildTreeData:[],
      powerTreeData:[],
      includes:['1','3']
    }
  },
  created() {
    if(this.formItem.parentId===0){
      this.formItem.parentId = null
    }
    tree().then(e=>{
      this.buildTreeData = e.data
    })
    powerTree().then(e=>{
      this.powerTreeData = e.data
      if(this.formItem.powerNodeId){
        this.powerTreeData.map(e=>{
          if(e.id===this.formItem.parentId){
            this.formItem.parentNodeType = e.deviceNodeType
          }
          if(e.children){
            e.children.map(e=>{
              if(e.id===this.formItem.parentId){
                this.formItem.parentNodeType = e.deviceNodeType
              }
              if(e.children){
                e.children.map(e=>{
                  if(e.id===this.formItem.parentId){
                    this.formItem.parentNodeType = e.deviceNodeType
                  }
                })
              }
            })
          }
        })
        this.changeIncludes(this.formItem.parentNodeType)
      }
    })
    if(this.formItem.parentNodeType){
      this.changeIncludes(this.formItem.parentNodeType)
    }
  },
  methods: {
    isInt:isInt,
    isIP:isIP,
    changeIncludes(parentNodeType){
      if(parentNodeType==='1'){
        this.includes = ['2','4']
      }else if(parentNodeType==='2'){
        this.includes = ['3']
      }else if(parentNodeType==='3'){
        this.includes = ['4']
      }else{
        this.includes = ['1','3']
      }
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.resetForm('form')
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery"
            :records.sync="records"
            />
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleUpdate('','add')"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:powerNode:add']"
        >新增
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
      <!---->
      <!-- <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button type="info" plain icon="el-icon-upload2" size="mini" @click="handleImport" v-hasPermi="['jufe:powerNode:in']"
                   >导入
        </el-button>
      </el-col> -->
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="info"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-sort"
          size="mini"
          @click="toggleExpandAll"
        >展开/折叠</el-button>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records" row-key="powerNodeId"
              :default-expand-all="isExpandAll"
              v-if="refreshTable"
              :tree-props="{children: 'children', hasChildren: 'hasChildren'}" >
      <el-table-column label="编号" align="left" prop="powerNodeNum" width="150"/>
      <el-table-column label="名称" align="center" prop="powerNodeNode" width="200" />
      <el-table-column label="序号" align="center" width="50" prop="sortNum"/>
      <el-table-column label="教室编号" align="center" prop="roomCode" width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="所属教室" align="center" prop="roomName" show-overflow-tooltip width="200"/>
      <el-table-column label="类型" align="center" prop="params.deviceNodeTypeName" width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="IP" align="center" prop="ipAddress" show-overflow-tooltip width="150">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <span v-if="scope.row.deviceNodeType==='1'||scope.row.deviceNodeType==='3'">
              {{scope.row.ipAddress}}
          </span>
          <span v-else>
          </span>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="端口" align="center" prop="port" show-overflow-tooltip>
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <span v-if="scope.row.deviceNodeType==='1'||scope.row.deviceNodeType==='3'">
              {{scope.row.port}}
          </span>
          <span v-else>
          </span>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="在线状态" align="center" width="100">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <span v-if="scope.row.deviceNodeType==='1'||scope.row.deviceNodeType==='3'">
            --
          </span>
          <span v-else>
            {{scope.row.params.onlineStatusName}}
          </span>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="空开状态" align="center" width="100">
        <template v-slot="scope">
            <span v-if="scope.row.deviceNodeType==='1'||scope.row.deviceNodeType==='3'||scope.row.onlineStatus==='0'">
              --
            </span>
            <span v-else>
              {{scope.row.params.onoffStatusName}}
            </span>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="手动分闸" align="center" prop="netcon" width="100">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-tag v-if="scope.row.netcon==='0'">否</el-tag>
          <el-tag v-if="scope.row.netcon==='1'">是</el-tag>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="当前电压(V)" align="center" prop="vol" width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="当前电流(mA)" align="center" prop="cur" width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="当前功率(W)" align="center" prop="pwr" width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" fixed="right" width="300">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-button v-if="scope.row.deviceNodeType!=='4'" size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-plus"
                     @click="handleUpdate(scope.row,'add')" v-hasPermi="['jufe:powerNode:add']">下级添加</el-button>
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)" v-hasPermi="['jufe:powerNode:edit']">编辑</el-button>
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-search" @click="handleDetail(scope.row)">查看</el-button>
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-delete" @click="handleDelete(scope.row)" v-hasPermi="['jufe:powerNode:remove']">删除</el-button>
          </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <Add ref="add" v-if="addVisible" :visible.sync="addVisible"
         @loadData="getList"
         :form-item="formItem"
         :add-type="addType"
    />
    <Update ref="update" v-if="updateVisible" :visible.sync="updateVisible"
         @loadData="getList"
         :form-item="formItem"
    />
    <detail ref="detail" v-if="detailVisible" :visible.sync="detailVisible"
         @loadData="getList"
         :form-item="formItem"
    />
    <el-dialog :title="upload.title" :visible.sync="upload.open" width="400px" append-to-body
               :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-upload ref="upload" :limit="1" accept=".xlsx, .xls" :headers="upload.headers"
                 :action="upload.url + '?updateSupport=' + upload.updateSupport + '&memberType=' + upload.memberType + '&locationId=' + queryParams.locationId"
                 :disabled="upload.isUploading" :on-progress="handleFileUploadProgress" :on-success="handleFileSuccess"
                 :auto-upload="false" drag>
        <i class="el-icon-upload"></i>
        <div class="el-upload__text">
          将文件拖到此处，或
          <em>点击上传</em>
        </div>
        <div class="el-upload__tip" slot="tip">
          <!-- <el-checkbox v-model="upload.updateSupport" />是否更新已经存在的用户数据 -->
          <el-link type="info" style="font-size:12px; color:#1890ff" @click="importTemplate">下载模板</el-link>
        </div>
        <div class="el-upload__tip" style="color:red" slot="tip">提示：仅允许导入“xls”或“xlsx”格式文件！</div>
      </el-upload>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitFileForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="upload.open = false">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  listPowerNode,
  addPowerNode,
  updatePowerNode,
  delPowerNode
} from "@/api/jufe/powerNode";
import Search from "@/views/jufe/power/search";
import Add from "@/views/jufe/power/add";
import Update from "@/views/jufe/power/update";
import Detail from "@/views/jufe/power/detail";
import { getToken } from '@/utils/auth'
export default {
  components: { Search, Add ,Update,Detail },
  name: "Power",
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      saveLoading: false,
      addVisible:false,
      updateVisible:false,
      detailVisible:false,
      // 重新渲染表格状态
      refreshTable: true,
      // 是否展开，默认全部折叠
      isExpandAll: false,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        powerNodeNum:null,
        powerNodeNode: null,
        roomCode: null,
        onoffStatus:null,
        roomId:null,
        onlineStatus:null,
        params:{
        }
      },
      formItem:{},
      addType:"add",
      // 用户导入参数
      upload: {
        // 是否显示弹出层（用户导入）
        open: false,
        // 弹出层标题（用户导入）
        title: "",
        // 是否禁用上传
        isUploading: false,
        // 是否更新已经存在的用户数据
        updateSupport: 0,
        memberType: 1,
        // 设置上传的请求头部
        headers: {
          Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken()
        },
        // 上传的地址
        url: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API + "/jufe/powerNode/importData"
      },
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询计划列列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listPowerNode(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = this.handleTree(response.rows, "powerNodeId");
        this.loading = false;
      }).catch(e=>{
        this.loading = false
      });
    },
    /** 展开/折叠操作 */
    toggleExpandAll() {
      this.refreshTable = false;
      this.isExpandAll = !this.isExpandAll;
      this.$nextTick(() => {
        this.refreshTable = true;
      });
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.addType = null
      this.formItem = {
        powerNodeId:null,
        powerNodeNum: null,
        powerNodeNode: null,
        parentId: null,
        deviceLevel:1,
        sortNum: null,
        ipAddress: null,
        port:null,
        mac:null,
        powerNodePos: null,
        roomId: null,
        roomCode: null,
        roomName: null,
        deviceNodeType: null,
        newPw:null
      }
    },
    /** 新增&修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row,type) {
      this.reset()
      if(type==='add'){
        if (row) {
          this.addType = 'addSub'
          this.formItem.parentId = row.powerNodeId
          this.formItem.deviceLevel = Number(row.deviceLevel)+1
          this.formItem.roomId = row.roomId
          this.formItem.roomCode = row.roomCode
          this.formItem.roomName = row.roomName
          this.formItem.parentNodeType = row.deviceNodeType
        }
        this.addVisible = true
      }else{
        this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
        this.updateVisible=true
      }
    },
    handleDetail(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
      this.title='详情'
      this.detailVisible = true
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const deviceIds = row.powerNodeId || this.ids;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除数据项？').then(function() {
        return delPowerNode(deviceIds);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 导入按钮操作 */
    handleImport() {
      this.upload.title = "导入";
      this.upload.open = true;
    },
    // 文件上传中处理
    handleFileUploadProgress(event, file, fileList) {
      this.upload.isUploading = true;
    },
    // 文件上传成功处理
    handleFileSuccess(response, file, fileList) {
      this.upload.open = false;
      this.upload.isUploading = false;
      this.$refs.upload.clearFiles();
      this.$alert(response.msg, "导入结果", {
        dangerouslyUseHTMLString: true,
        customClass: 'message_box_alert'
      });
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 下载模板操作 */
    importTemplate() {
      this.download('/jufe/powerNode/importTemplate', {}, `电源管理数据导入模板.xlsx`)
    },
    // 提交上传文件
    submitFileForm() {
      this.$refs.upload.submit();
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" :inline="true" label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="编号" prop="powerNodeNum">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.powerNodeNum"  placeholder="请输入编号" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="名称" prop="powerNodeNode">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.powerNodeNode"  placeholder="请输入名称" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="教室编号" prop="roomCode">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.roomCode"  placeholder="请输入教室编号" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="所属教室" prop="roomName">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.roomName"  placeholder="请输入所属教室" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item
      label="空开状态"
      prop="onoffStatus"
    >
      <DictSelect v-model="queryParams.onoffStatus" dict-type="operation_onoff_pow" :placeholder="'请选择开关状态'" clearable/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item
      label="在线状态"
      prop="onlineStatus"
    >
      <DictSelect v-model="queryParams.onlineStatus" dict-type="online_status" :placeholder="'请选择在线状态'" clearable/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item
      label="设备类型"
      prop="deviceNodeType"
    >
      <DictSelect v-model="queryParams.deviceNodeType" dict-type="device_node_type" :placeholder="'请选择设备类型'" clearable/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
import { listGrouping } from '@/api/jufe/grouping'
import {listRoom} from '@/api/jufe/room'
export default {
  name: "Plan",
  components: {
    Treeselect
  },
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
    };
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.queryParams.dataRange = []
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>
<style scoped>
  .line-style{
    float: right;
    display: flex;
    margin-right: 20px;
  }
  .itemstyle{
    margin-left: 20px;
    margin-right: 20px;
  }
</style>
<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <div>
  <el-dialog title="编辑" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
    <el-form ref="form" :model="formItem" label-width="140px" >
      <el-form-item
        label="上级"
        prop="parentId"
      >
        <treeselect ref="tree"  v-model="formItem.parentId" :options="powerTreeData"   placeholder="选择上级"  :disabled="true"/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        label="类型"
        prop="deviceNodeType"
        :rules="[{ required: true, message: '类型不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
      >
        <DictSelect v-model="formItem.deviceNodeType" :include.sync="includes" dict-type="device_node_type"/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        v-if="formItem.deviceNodeType==='2'||formItem.deviceNodeType==='4'"
        label="序号"
        prop="sortNum"
        :rules="[{ required: true, message: '序号不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isInt, message: '请输入正确序号', trigger: 'blur' }]"
      >
        <el-input v-model="formItem.sortNum" maxlength="4" show-word-limit/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        label="名称"
        prop="powerNodeNode"
        :rules="[{ required: true, message: '名称不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
      >
        <el-input v-model="formItem.powerNodeNode" maxlength="12" show-word-limit/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        v-if="formItem.deviceNodeType==='1'||formItem.deviceNodeType==='3'"
        label="IP"
        prop="ipAddress"
        :rules="[{ required: true, message: 'IP不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isIP, message: '请输入正确IP', trigger: 'blur' }]"
      >
        <el-input v-model="formItem.ipAddress" maxlength="20" show-word-limit />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        v-if="formItem.deviceNodeType==='1'||formItem.deviceNodeType==='3'"
        label="端口"
        prop="port"
        :rules="[{ required: true, message: '端口不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isInt, message: '请输入正确端口', trigger: 'blur' }]"
      >
        <el-input v-model="formItem.port" maxlength="5" show-word-limit />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        v-if="formItem.deviceNodeType==='1'||formItem.deviceNodeType==='3'"
        label="MAC"
        prop="mac"
        :rules="[{ required: true, message: 'MAC不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isMac, message: '请输入正确MAC地址', trigger: 'blur' }]"
      >
        <el-input v-model="formItem.mac" maxlength="30"  show-word-limit />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        label="教室"
        prop="roomId"
        :rules="[{ required: true, message: '教室不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
      >
        <treeselect v-model="formItem.roomId"
                    :options="buildTreeData"
                    :disable-branch-nodes="true"
                    placeholder="选择楼栋"
                    @select="selectRoom"
                    :disabled="true"/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        v-if="formItem.parentId==null||formItem.parentId==''"
        label="密码"
        prop="newPw"
        :rules="[{ validator: isPassword2, trigger: 'blur' }]"
      >
        <el-input type="password" v-model="formItem.newPw" maxlength="20"  show-word-limit show-password autocomplete="off"/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        label="备注"
        prop="remark"
      >
        <el-input type="textarea" v-model="formItem.remark" maxlength="200" show-word-limit resize="none" rows="3"/>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
      <el-button v-if="!showDetail" type="primary"  @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button v-if="!showDetail" @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  addPowerNode,
  updatePowerNode,
  powerTree
} from "@/api/jufe/powerNode";
import {tree} from '@/api/location/location'
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
import {isInt,isIP,isPassword2} from '@/utils/validate'
export default {
  name: "PowerAdd",
  components: {
    Treeselect,Map
  },
  props:{
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default:{}
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    showDetail: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    title:{
      type:String,
      default:''
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
      buildTreeData:[],
      powerTreeData:[],
      includes:['1','3']
    }
  },
  created() {
    if(this.formItem.parentId===0){
      this.formItem.parentId = null
    }
    tree().then(e=>{
      this.buildTreeData = e.data
    })
    powerTree().then(e=>{
      this.powerTreeData = e.data
      if(this.formItem.powerNodeId){
        this.powerTreeData.map(e=>{
          if(e.id===this.formItem.parentId){
            this.formItem.parentNodeType = e.deviceNodeType
          }
          if(e.children){
            e.children.map(e=>{
              if(e.id===this.formItem.parentId){
                this.formItem.parentNodeType = e.deviceNodeType
              }
              if(e.children){
                e.children.map(e=>{
                  if(e.id===this.formItem.parentId){
                    this.formItem.parentNodeType = e.deviceNodeType
                  }
                })
              }
            })
          }
        })
        this.changeIncludes(this.formItem.parentNodeType)
      }
    })
    if(this.formItem.parentNodeType){
      this.changeIncludes(this.formItem.parentNodeType)
    }
  },
  methods: {
    isInt:isInt,
    isIP:isIP,
    isPassword2:isPassword2,
    selectPower(node,nodeId){
      this.formItem.deviceNodeType = null
      this.formItem.roomId=null
      this.formItem.deviceLevel = Number(node.level) + 1
      this.changeIncludes(node.deviceNodeType)
    },
    clearPower(value,nodeId){
      this.formItem.deviceNodeType = null
      this.formItem.roomId=null
      if(value!=undefined){
        return;
      }
      this.formItem.parentId = null
      this.formItem.deviceLevel = 1
      this.changeIncludes('')
    },
    changeIncludes(parentNodeType){
      if(parentNodeType==='1'){
        this.includes = ['2','4']
      }else if(parentNodeType==='2'){
        this.includes = ['3']
      }else if(parentNodeType==='3'){
        this.includes = ['4']
      }else{
        this.includes = ['1','3']
      }
    },
    selectRoom(node,nodeId){
      if(node.type==='room'){
        this.formItem.roomName = node.label
        this.formItem.roomCode = node.code
      }
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.resetForm('form')
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['form'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          // 修改
          updatePowerNode(this.formItem).then(e => {
            this.$message.success('保存成功')
            this.handleClose()
            this.loadData()
          })
        }
      })
    },
    loadData() {
      this.$emit('loadData')
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch" label-width="68px">
      <el-form-item label="电源编号" prop="powerCode">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.powerCode"
          placeholder="请输入电源编号"

          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />

        />

          placeholder="请输入教室名称"

          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="空开类型" prop="nodeType">

          <el-option v-for="dict in dict.type.device_node_type" :key="dict.value" :label="dict.label"
                     :value="dict.value" />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="开关方式" prop="controlType">

                     :value="dict.value" />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="操作人员编号" prop="operUserNum" label-width="98px">
        <el-input

          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"

      </el-form-item>

                        range-separator="-" start-placeholder="开始时间" end-placeholder="结束时间"></el-date-picker>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item>
        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="warning"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-download"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleExport"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:powerlog:export']"
        >导出</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <right-toolbar :showSearch.sync="showSearch" @queryTable="getList"></right-toolbar>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="logList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
      <el-table-column type="index" width="50" align="center" label="序号" />
      <el-table-column label="电源编号" align="center" prop="powerCode" />
      <el-table-column label="电源名称" align="center" prop="powerName" />
      <el-table-column label="空开编号" align="center" prop="deviceCode" />
      <el-table-column label="空开名称" align="center" prop="deviceName" />
      <el-table-column label="空开类型" align="center" prop="nodeType">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <dict-tag :options="dict.type.device_node_type" :value="scope.row.nodeType" />
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="教室编号" align="center" prop="roomCode" />
      <el-table-column label="教室名称" align="center" prop="roomName" />
      <el-table-column label="开关方式" align="center" prop="controlType" >
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <dict-tag :options="dict.type.control_type_pow" :value="scope.row.controlType" />
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="开关操作" align="center" prop="operation" >
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <dict-tag :options="dict.type.operation_onoff_pow" :value="scope.row.operation" />
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作结果" align="center" prop="operResult" >
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <dict-tag :options="dict.type.oper_result" :value="scope.row.operResult" />
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作人员编号" align="center" prop="operUserNum"  label-width="120px" />
      <el-table-column label="操作人员" align="center" prop="operUserName" />
      <el-table-column label="操作时间" align="center" prop="operTime" width="180" />
      <el-table-column label="课程信息" align="center" prop="courseName" />
    </el-table>
    <pagination
      v-show="total>0"
      :total="total"
      :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
      :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
      @pagination="getList"
    />
  </div>
