<script>
import { listLog } from "@/api/jufe/powerlog";
export default {
  name: "Log",
  dicts: ['control_type_pow','operation_onoff_pow','device_node_type','oper_result'],
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      // 非单个禁用
      single: true,
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 电源控制日志表格数据
      logList: [],
      // 日期范围
      dateRange: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        deviceCode: null,
        deviceName: null,
        posName: null,
        roomId: null,
        operation: null,
        operUserId: null,
        operUserName: null,
        courseName: null,
        controlType: null,
        operTime: null,
        createById: null,
        udpateById: null,
        delFalg: null,
        deptId: null,
        powerName: null,
        powerCode: null,
        roomCode:null,
        roomName:null,
        beginDate: null,
        endDate: null
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {},
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
      }
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询电源控制日志列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      if (this.dateRange&&this.dateRange.length) {
        this.queryParams.beginDate = this.dateRange[0];
        this.queryParams.endDate = this.dateRange[1];
      }else{
        this.queryParams.beginDate = null;
        this.queryParams.endDate = null;
      }
      listLog(this.queryParams).then(response => {
        this.logList = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    // 取消按钮
    cancel() {
      this.reset();
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.dateRange = [];
      this.form = {
        logId: null,
        deviceCode: null,
        deviceName: null,
        posName: null,
        roomId: null,
        operation: null,
        operUserId: null,
        operUserName: null,
        courseName: null,
        controlType: null,
        operTime: null,
        createById: null,
        createBy: null,
        udpateById: null,
        createTime: null,
        updateBy: null,
        updateTime: null,
        remark: null,
        delFalg: null,
        deptId: null,
        powerName: null,
        powerCode: null,
        roomCode:null,
        roomName: null,
        beginDate: null,
        endDate: null,
        dateRange: []
      };
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.dateRange = [];
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.logId)
      this.single = selection.length!==1
      this.multiple = !selection.length
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.download('jufe/powerlog/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `电源控制记录.xlsx`)
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery" :records.sync="records"/>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records">
      <el-table-column type="index" label="序号" align="center" width="50"/>
      <el-table-column label="电源编号" align="center" prop="powerNo"/>
      <el-table-column label="电源名称" align="center" prop="powerName"/>
      <el-table-column label="原密码" align="center" prop="oldPw"/>
      <el-table-column label="修改后密码" align="center" prop="newPw"/>
      <el-table-column label="响应状态" align="center" prop="params.statusName"/>
      <el-table-column label="操作人" align="center" prop="createBy"/>
      <el-table-column label="操作时间" align="center" prop="createTime" width="180"/>
      <el-table-column label="教室编号" align="center" prop="roomId"/>
      <el-table-column label="所属教室" align="center" prop="roomName" width="220"/>
      <el-table-column label="IP" align="center" prop="ip"/>
      <el-table-column label="端口" align="center" prop="port"/>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList"
    />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { list } from '@/api/jufe/powerupdatepw'
import Search from './search'
export default {
  components: { Search },
  name: 'PowerUpdatepwRecords',
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      addVisible: false,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        powerNo: null,
        status:null,
        createBy:null,
        dateRange:[],
        params:{}
      },
      formItem: {},
      title: '新增'
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true
      if (this.queryParams.dateRange&&this.queryParams.dateRange.length) {
        this.queryParams.params.beginDate = this.queryParams.dateRange[0];
        this.queryParams.params.endDate = this.queryParams.dateRange[1];
      }else{
        this.queryParams.params.beginDate = null;
        this.queryParams.params.endDate = null;
      }
      list(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows
        this.total = response.total
        this.loading = false
      }).catch(e => {
        this.loading = false
      })
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1
      this.getList()
    },
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" :inline="true" label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="电源编号">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.powerNo"  placeholder="请输入电源编号" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="响应状态">
      <dict-select v-model="queryParams.status" dict-type="dev_power_updatepw_status" placeholder="请选择响应状态"/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="操作人">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.createBy"  placeholder="请输入操作人" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="操作时间">
      <el-date-picker v-model="queryParams.dateRange" size="small"  value-format="yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss" type="datetimerange"
                      range-separator="-" start-placeholder="开始时间" end-placeholder="结束时间"></el-date-picker>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
export default {
  name: "PowerUpdatepwRecordsSearch",
  components: {
  },
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
    };
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      console.log(this.queryParams.dateRange)
      this.queryParams.dateRange = []
      console.log(this.queryParams.dateRange)
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery"
            :records.sync="records"
            />
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-check"
          size="mini"
          @click="openAudit()"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:report:audit']"
        >批量处理
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" :selectable="selectable"/>
      <el-table-column type="index" label="序号" align="center" width="50"/>
      <el-table-column label="上报时间" align="center" prop="createTime" />
      <el-table-column label="问题类型" align="center" prop="params.typeName" />
      <el-table-column label="问题描述" align="center" prop="describtion" :show-overflow-tooltip="true"/>
      <el-table-column label="图片" align="center" prop="picUrls" width="200">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-image v-for="item in scope.row.picList" :key="item" :src="item" style="width: 50px;height: 50px;margin-right: 10px;" :preview-src-list="scope.row.picList"></el-image>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="位置" align="center" prop="position" />
      <el-table-column label="上报人员" align="center" prop="createBy" />
      <el-table-column label="联系电话" align="center" prop="phone" />
      <el-table-column label="状态" align="center" prop="params.statusName" />
      <el-table-column label="问题来源" align="center" prop="params.sourceTypeName" />
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" width="100">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-button size="mini" v-if="scope.row.status==='UNPROCESSED'" type="text"
                     icon="el-icon-setting" @click="openAudit(scope.row)"
                     v-hasPermi="['jufe:report:audit']">处理</el-button>
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-search" @click="handleDetail(scope.row)">查看</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList"
    />
    <el-dialog v-if="visible" title="详情" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px"
               :close-on-click-modal="false" :destroy-on-close="true" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
      <el-descriptions title="上报信息" :column="1" border :labelStyle="{'width': '120px','text-align':'center'}">
        <el-descriptions-item label="问题描述" >{{ formItem.describtion }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="位置" >{{ formItem.position }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="机位号" >{{ formItem.seatNum }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="图片" v-if="formItem.pictureUrl!==null&&formItem.pictureUrl!==''">
          <el-image v-for="item in formItem.picList" :key="item" :src="item" style="width: 100px;height: 100px;margin-right: 20px;" :preview-src-list="formItem.picList"></el-image>
        </el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="上报人员" >{{ formItem.createBy }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="联系电话" >{{ formItem.phone }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="上报时间" >{{ formItem.createTime }}</el-descriptions-item>
      </el-descriptions>
      <el-descriptions title="处理信息" :column="1" border style="padding-top: 15px;" v-if="formItem.status==='PROCESSED'" :labelStyle="{'width': '120px','text-align':'center'}">
        <el-descriptions-item label="处理状态" >{{formItem.params.statusName}}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="处理人员" >{{formItem.dealBy}}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="处理时间">{{formItem.dealTime}}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="备注">{{formItem.dealRemark}}</el-descriptions-item>
      </el-descriptions>
    </el-dialog>
      <el-dialog key="auditVisible" v-show="auditVisible" title="处理" :visible.sync="auditVisible" width="800px" :destroy-on-close="true" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="closeAudit">
        <el-form ref="auditForm" :model="auditItem" label-width="140px" >
          <el-form-item
            label="处理结果"
            prop="status"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '处理结果不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <dict-select dict-type="jufe_school_report_status" v-model="auditItem.status" :exclude="['UNPROCESSED']"/>
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item
            label="备注"
            prop="dealRemark"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '备注不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input type="textarea" v-model="auditItem.dealRemark" maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-form>
        <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer" >
          <el-button type="primary"  @click="audit()">确定</el-button>
        </div>
      </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  list,
  audit
} from '@/api/jufe/report';
import Search from "./search";
import {update} from "@/api/jufe/reservationset";
export default {
  components: { Search },
  name: "Report",
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      showBtn: false,
      visible:false,
      auditVisible:false,
      batchAuditVisible:false,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      ids:[],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 20,
        createBy:null,
        phone: null,
        status: null,
        timeRange:null,
        params:{
        }
      },
      formItem:{},
      auditItem:{
        ids:[],
        dealRemark:null
      },
      setItem:{
        id:1,
        bpPassword:null
      },
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    selectable(row,index){
      if(row.status==='PROCESSED'||row.status==='NOTPROCESSED'){
        return false
      }else{
        return true
      }
    },
// 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.id)
    },
    /** 查询计划列列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      this.queryParams.params = {}
      if(this.queryParams.timeRange!=null&&this.queryParams.timeRange.length>0){
        this.queryParams.params.start = this.queryParams.timeRange[0]
        this.queryParams.params.end = this.queryParams.timeRange[1]
      }
      this.queryParams.ids = []
      list(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows
        console.log(this.records)
        this.total = response.total
        this.loading = false;
      }).catch(e=>{
        this.loading = false
      });
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    handleDetail(row) {
      this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
      this.visible = true
    },
    openAudit(row){
      this.auditItem = {
        ids:[],
        status:null,
        dealRemark:null
      }
      if(row){
          this.auditItem.ids.push(row.id)
      }else if(this.ids&&this.ids.length){
          this.auditItem.ids = this.ids
      }else{
        this.$message.error("请选择要处理的问题")
        return
      }
      this.auditVisible = true
    },
    audit(){
      this.$refs['auditForm'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          audit(this.auditItem).then(e=>{
            this.$message.success("处理成功")
            this.auditVisible = false
            this.getList()
          })
        }
      })
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.visible = false
    },
    closeAudit() {
      this.auditVisible = false
    },
    closeBatchAudit() {
      this.batchAuditVisible = false
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.queryParams.ids = this.ids
      this.download('jufe/reservation/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `预约信息数据.xlsx`)
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" :inline="true" label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="上报人员" prop="createBy">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.createBy"  placeholder="请输入上报人员" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="联系电话" prop="phone">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.phone"  placeholder="请输入联系电话" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="上报时间" prop="timeRange">
      <el-date-picker v-model="queryParams.timeRange" size="small"
                      value-format="yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"
                      format="yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"
                      type="datetimerange"
                    range-separator="-" start-placeholder="开始时间" end-placeholder="结束时间"/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="状态" prop="status">
      <DictSelect v-model="queryParams.status" dict-type="jufe_school_report_status" :placeholder="'请选择状态'"/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
import {tree} from '@/api/location/location'
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
export default {
  name: "ReservationSearch",
  components: {
    Treeselect
  },
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      buildTreeData:[],
    };
  },
  created() {
    const query = {}
    query.isReservation="1"
    tree(query).then(e=>{
      this.buildTreeData = e.data
    })
  },
  methods: {
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.queryParams.dataRange = []
      this.queryParams.roomId = null
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>
<style scoped>
  .line-style{
    float: right;
    display: flex;
    margin-right: 20px;
  }
  .itemstyle{
    margin-left: 20px;
    margin-right: 20px;
  }
</style>
<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <div>
  <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
    <el-form ref="form" :model="formItem" label-width="140px" :disabled="showDetail">
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="教室"
            prop="roomId"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '教室不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <treeselect v-model="formItem.roomId" :options="buildTreeData" :disable-branch-nodes="true"  placeholder="选择楼栋" :disabled="showDetail||(this.formItem.operate==='update')"/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="教室类型"
            prop="roomType"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '教室类型不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <DictSelect v-model="formItem.roomType" dict-type="room_type" :placeholder="'请选择教室类型'"/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="24">
          <el-form-item
            label="可预约周期"
            prop="weekDays"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '可预约周期不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
              <!--          <el-checkbox-->
              <!--            style="padding-left: 5px;padding-right: 5px;"-->
              <!--            v-for="item in weekDayList"-->
              <!--            :key="item.dictValue"-->
              <!--            :label="item.dictLabel"-->
              <!--            :value="item.dictValue"-->
              <!--            border-->
              <!--          />-->
              <el-checkbox-group v-model="formItem.weekDays" size="mini">
<!--                <el-checkbox v-for="item in weekDayList" :label="item.dictLabel" :key="item.dictValue" :true-label="item.dictValue"></el-checkbox>-->
                <el-checkbox-button v-for="item in weekDayList" :key="item.dictValue" :label="item.dictValue" >{{item.dictLabel}}</el-checkbox-button>
              </el-checkbox-group>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="24">
          <el-form-item
            label="可预约时间"
            prop="timeRanges"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '可预约时间不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-time-picker
              is-range
              range-separator="~"
              start-placeholder="开始时间"
              end-placeholder="结束时间"
              placeholder="选择时间范围"
              @change="chooseTime"
              v-model="timeRange"
              value-format="HH:mm:ss"
            />
            <el-col>
              <el-tag
                v-for="tag in this.formItem.timeRanges"
                closable
                @close="removeTime(tag)"
                :key="tag"
              >
                {{tag}}
              </el-tag>
            </el-col>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="可提前预约天数"
            prop="reservationDaysInfo"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '可提前预约天数不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isInt, message: '请输入正确天数', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input  v-model="formItem.reservationDaysInfo" maxlength="2"/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="预约审批设置"
            prop="approvalType"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '预约审批设置不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <DictSelect v-model="formItem.approvalType" dict-type="approval_type" :placeholder="'请选择预约审批'"/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item
            label="状态"
            prop="roomUseable"
          >
            <el-switch
              v-model="formItem.roomUseable"
              active-value="0"
              inactive-value="1"
            />
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="24">
          <el-form-item
            label="备注"
            prop="remark"
          >
            <el-input type="textarea" v-model="formItem.reservationRemark" maxlength="100" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
    </el-form>
    <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
      <el-button v-if="!showDetail" type="primary" :loading="saveLoading" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button v-if="!showDetail" @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  update,
} from "@/api/jufe/reservationset";
import {tree} from '@/api/location/location'
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
import {isInt,isIP} from '@/utils/validate'
export default {
  name: "ReservationDetail",
  components: {
    Treeselect,Map
  },
  props:{
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default:{}
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    showDetail: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    title:{
      type:String,
      default:''
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
      buildTreeData:[],
      weekDayList:[],
      timeRange:null
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getDicts("week_days_sel").then(e=>{
      this.weekDayList = e.data
    })
    const query = {}
    if(this.formItem.operate==='add'){
      query.isReservation="2"
    }
    tree(query).then(e=>{
      this.buildTreeData = e.data
    })
  },
  methods: {
    isInt:isInt,
    chooseTime(val){
      if(val){
        if(!this.formItem.timeRanges.includes(val[0]+'~'+val[1])){
          this.formItem.timeRanges.push(val[0]+'~'+val[1])
        }
      }
    },
    removeTime(tag){
      this.formItem.timeRanges.splice(this.formItem.timeRanges.indexOf(tag), 1);
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.resetForm('form')
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['form'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
            this.saveLoading = true
            // 修改
            update(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
        }
      })
    },
    loadData() {
      this.$emit('loadData')
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery"
            :records.sync="records"
            />
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-check"
          size="mini"
          @click="audit()"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:reservation:audit']"
        >一键审批
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="warning"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-download"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleExport"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:reservation:export']"
        >导出</el-button>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <!--:selectable="selectable"-->
      <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
      <el-table-column type="index" label="序号" align="center" width="50"/>
      <el-table-column label="预约教室" align="center" prop="roomName" width="120"/>
      <el-table-column label="楼栋位置" align="center" prop="locationName" width="200"/>
      <el-table-column label="申请时间" align="center" prop="createTime" :show-overflow-tooltip="true"/>
      <el-table-column label="预约时间" align="center" :show-overflow-tooltip="true">
        <template v-slot="scope">
            {{scope.row.reservationDate}}
            <template v-for="item in scope.row.timeInfoList">
              {{item.reservationStartTime}}~{{item.reservationEndTime}}
            </template>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="预约部门" align="center" prop="deptName" width="150"/>
      <el-table-column label="预约人" align="center" prop="userName" width="120"/>
      <el-table-column label="联系电话" align="center" prop="telephone" width="120"/>
      <el-table-column label="审批方式" align="center" prop="params.approvalTypeName" width="80"/>
      <el-table-column label="状态" align="center" >
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <span>{{scope.row.params.approvalStatusName}}<span v-if="scope.row.courseUse==='1'" style="border: 1px solid red;color: red;">课表占用</span></span>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="签到" align="center" >
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <span>{{scope.row.signFlag==='0'?'未签到':'已签到'}}</span>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" width="300">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" v-if="scope.row.inBlack==='N'" @click="openBlack(scope.row)" v-hasPermi="['jufe:black:add']">加入黑名单</el-button>
          <el-button size="mini" v-if="scope.row.approvalStatus==='1'&&scope.row.courseUse!=='1'" type="text" icon="el-icon-delete" @click="handleDetail(scope.row,'audit')" v-hasPermi="['jufe:reservation:audit']">审批</el-button>
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-search" @click="handleDetail(scope.row,'check')">查看</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize" :page-sizes="[20, 50, 100]"
                @pagination="getList"
    />
    <el-dialog v-if="visible" :title="title" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" :destroy-on-close="true" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
      <el-descriptions title="基本信息" :column="1" border style="text-align: center;">
        <el-descriptions-item label="申请时间" :label-style="{'min-width': '100px'}">{{formItem.reservationTime}}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="楼栋位置">{{ formItem.locationName }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="预约教室">{{ formItem.roomName }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="预约时间" :span="2">
          <el-col :span="8" v-for="item in  formItem.timeInfoList" style="text-align: center;">
            {{ formItem.reservationDate }} {{item.reservationStartTime}}~{{item.reservationEndTime}}
          </el-col>
        </el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="预约部门" >{{ formItem.deptName }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="预约人" >{{ formItem.userName }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="联系电话" >{{ formItem.telephone }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="预约描述" >{{ formItem.describtion }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="状态">
          <span>{{formItem.params.approvalStatusName}}
            <span v-if="formItem.courseUse==='1'" style="border: 1px solid red;color: red;">课表占用</span>
          </span>
        </el-descriptions-item>
      </el-descriptions>
      <el-descriptions title="审批信息" :column="1" border style="padding-top: 15px;text-align: center;" v-if="formItem.approvalStatus==='2'||formItem.approvalStatus==='3'">
        <el-descriptions-item label="审批人" >{{formItem.approvalUserName}}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="审批时间">{{formItem.approvalTime}}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item v-if="formItem.approvalStatus==='3'" label="拒绝原因">{{formItem.approvalComments}}</el-descriptions-item>
      </el-descriptions>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer" v-if="showBtn">
        <el-button  @click="handleClose">返 回</el-button>
        <el-button type="primary"  @click="openAudit">拒 绝</el-button>
        <el-button type="primary"  @click="audit('2')">通 过</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog key="auditVisible" v-show="auditVisible" title="拒绝原因" :visible.sync="auditVisible" width="800px" :destroy-on-close="true" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="closeAudit">
        <el-form ref="auditForm" :model="auditItem" label-width="140px" >
          <el-form-item
            label="拒绝原因"
            prop="approvalComments"
            :rules="[{ required: true, message: '拒绝原因不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
          >
            <el-input type="textarea" v-model="auditItem.approvalComments" maxlength="100" show-word-limit/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-form>
        <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer" v-if="showBtn">
          <el-button type="primary"  @click="audit('3')">确定</el-button>
        </div>
      </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog key="blackVisible" v-show="blackVisible" title="拉黑原因" :visible.sync="blackVisible" width="800px"  append-to-body :before-close="closeBlack">
      <el-form ref="blackForm" :model="blackItem" label-width="140px" >
        <el-form-item
          label="拉黑原因"
          prop="reason"
          :rules="[{ required: true, message: '拉黑原因不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
        >
          <el-input type="textarea" v-model="blackItem.reason" maxlength="100" show-word-limit/>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer" >
        <el-button type="primary"  @click="addBlack()">确定</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog key="batchAuditVisible" v-show="batchAuditVisible" title="一键审批" :visible.sync="batchAuditVisible" width="300px" :destroy-on-close="true" append-to-body :before-close="closeBatchAudit">
      <div style="text-align: center;">
        <el-button type="success"  @click="batchAudit('2')">同意</el-button>
        <el-button type="danger"   @click="batchAudit('3')">拒绝</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  list,
  audit
} from '@/api/jufe/reservationapproval';
import {
  addBlack
} from '@/api/jufe/black';
import Search from "./search";
import Add from "./add";
import { update } from '@/api/jufe/reservationset'
import search from "@/views/jufe/reservation/set/search";
import add from "@/views/jufe/reservation/approval/add";
export default {
  components: { Search, Add },
  name: "Reservation",
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      showBtn: false,
      visible:false,
      auditVisible:false,
      blackVisible:false,
      batchAuditVisible:false,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      ids:[],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 20,
        roomId:null,
        userName: null,
        locationName: null,
        approvalStatus:null,
        approvalType:null,
        timeRange:null,
        params:{
        }
      },
      formItem:{},
      auditItem:{
        ids:[],
        approvalComments:null
      },
      blackItem:{},
      title:'查看',
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
// 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.reservationId)
    },
    /** 查询计划列列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      this.queryParams.params = {}
      if(this.queryParams.timeRange!=null&&this.queryParams.timeRange.length>0){
        this.queryParams.params.start = this.queryParams.timeRange[0]
        this.queryParams.params.end = this.queryParams.timeRange[1]
      }
      this.queryParams.ids = []
      list(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows
        this.total = response.total
        this.loading = false;
      }).catch(e=>{
        this.loading = false
      });
    },
    selectable(row,index){
      if(row.approvalStatus != '1'){
        return false
      }else{
        return true
      }
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    handleDetail(row,type) {
      this.auditItem.ids = []
      this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
      this.auditItem.ids.push(this.formItem.reservationId)
      this.visible = true
      if(type==='audit'){
        this.showBtn = true
        this.title='审批'
      }else{
        this.showBtn = false
        this.title='查看'
      }
    },
    openAudit(){
      this.auditVisible = true
      this.auditItem.approvalComments = ''
    },
    audit(approvalStatus){
      if(approvalStatus){
        this.auditItem.approvalStatus = approvalStatus
        if(this.auditItem.approvalStatus==='2'){
          this.saveLoading = true
          audit(this.auditItem).then(e=>{
            this.saveLoading = false
            this.$message.success("操作成功")
            this.getList()
            this.closeAudit()
            this.handleClose()
          })
        }else{
          this.$refs['auditForm'].validate(valid => {
            if (valid) {
              this.saveLoading = true
              audit(this.auditItem).then(e=>{
                this.$message.success("操作成功")
                this.auditVisible = false
                this.batchAuditVisible = false
                this.visible = false
                this.getList()
              })
            }
          })
        }
      }else{
        this.auditItem.ids = []
        if(this.ids&&this.ids.length>0){
          this.auditItem.ids = this.ids
          this.batchAuditVisible = true
        }else{
          this.$message.error("请选择数据项！")
          return
        }
      }
    },
    batchAudit(approvalStatus){
      this.auditItem.approvalStatus = approvalStatus
      if(this.auditItem.approvalStatus==='2'){
        this.saveLoading = true
        audit(this.auditItem).then(e=>{
          this.$message.success("操作成功")
          this.getList()
          this.closeBatchAudit()
        })
      }else{
        this.openAudit()
        this.showBtn = true
        // this.$refs['auditForm'].validate(valid => {
        //   if (valid) {
        //     this.saveLoading = true
        //     audit(this.auditItem).then(e=>{
        //       this.$message.success("操作成功")
        //       this.getList()
        //       this.closeAudit()
        //       this.handleClose()
        //     })
        //   }
        // })
      }
    },
    openBlack(row){
      this.blackItem = {}
      this.blackItem.reservationId = row.reservationId
      this.blackVisible = true
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    addBlack() {
      this.$refs['blackForm'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          addBlack(this.blackItem).then(e=>{
            this.saveLoading = false
            this.$message.success('保存成功')
            this.closeBlack()
            this.getList()
          }).catch(e=>{
          })
        }
      })
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.visible = false
    },
    closeAudit() {
      this.auditVisible = false
    },
    closeBlack() {
      this.blackVisible = false
    },
    closeBatchAudit() {
      this.batchAuditVisible = false
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.queryParams.ids = this.ids
      this.download('jufe/reservation/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `预约信息数据.xlsx`)
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" :inline="true" label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="预约教室" prop="roomId">
      <treeselect v-model="queryParams.roomId" :options="buildTreeData" :disable-branch-nodes="true"  placeholder="选择教室" style="width: 200px;" />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="预约人" prop="userName">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.userName"  placeholder="请输入预约人" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="状态" prop="approvalStatus">
      <DictSelect v-model="queryParams.approvalStatus" dict-type="approval_status" :placeholder="'请选择预约状态'"/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="预约时间" prop="timeRange">
      <el-date-picker v-model="queryParams.timeRange" size="small" style="width: 240px" value-format="yyyy-MM-dd" type="daterange"
                    range-separator="-" start-placeholder="开始时间" end-placeholder="结束时间"/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="审批方式" prop="approvalType">
      <DictSelect v-model="queryParams.approvalType" dict-type="approval_type" :placeholder="'请选择审批方式'"/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
import {tree} from '@/api/location/location'
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
export default {
  name: "ReservationSearch",
  components: {
    Treeselect
  },
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      buildTreeData:[],
    };
  },
  created() {
    const query = {}
    query.isReservation="1"
    tree(query).then(e=>{
      this.buildTreeData = e.data
    })
  },
  methods: {
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.queryParams.dataRange = []
      this.queryParams.roomId = null
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>
<style scoped>
  .line-style{
    float: right;
    display: flex;
    margin-right: 20px;
  }
  .itemstyle{
    margin-left: 20px;
    margin-right: 20px;
  }
</style>
<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <div>
    <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body
               :before-close="handleClose">
      <el-form ref="form" :model="formItem" label-width="140px" :disabled="showDetail">
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item
              label="教室"
              prop="roomId"
              :rules="[{ required: true, message: '教室不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
            >
              <treeselect v-model="formItem.roomId" :options="buildTreeData" :disable-branch-nodes="true"
                          placeholder="选择教室" :disabled="showDetail||(this.formItem.operate==='update')"/>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item
              label="教室类型"
              prop="roomType"
              :rules="[{ required: true, message: '教室类型不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
            >
              <DictSelect v-model="formItem.roomType" dict-type="room_type" :placeholder="'请选择教室类型'"/>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item
              label="可预约日期"
              prop="timeArr"
              :rules="[{ required: true, message: '可预约日期不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
            >
              <el-date-picker clearable
                              @change="changeDateRange"
                              v-model="formItem.timeArr"
                              type="daterange"
                              value-format="yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"
                              placeholder="请选择可预约日期"
                              start-placeholder="开始时间"
                              end-placeholder="结束时间"
                              :picker-options="pickerOptions"
              >
              </el-date-picker>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item
              label="可预约周期"
              prop="weekDays"
              :rules="[{ required: true, message: '可预约周期不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
            >
              <el-checkbox-group v-model="formItem.weekDays" size="mini">
                <el-checkbox v-for="item in weekDayList" :key="item.dictValue" :label="item.dictValue"
                             v-if="item.status==='0'">{{ item.dictLabel }}
                </el-checkbox>
              </el-checkbox-group>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item
              label="可预约时间"
              prop="timeRanges"
              :rules="[{ required: true, message: '可预约时间不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
            >
              <el-time-picker
                is-range
                range-separator="~"
                start-placeholder="开始时间"
                end-placeholder="结束时间"
                placeholder="选择时间范围"
                @change="chooseTime"
                v-model="timeRange"
                value-format="HH:mm"
              />
              <el-col>
                <el-tag
                  style="margin-right: 10px;"
                  v-for="tag in this.formItem.timeRanges"
                  :closable="!showDetail"
                  @close="removeTime(tag)"
                  :key="tag"
                >
                  {{ tag }}
                </el-tag>
              </el-col>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item
              label="可预约人数"
              prop="seatNum"
              :rules="[{ required: true, message: '可预约人数不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isInt, message: '请输入正确人数', trigger: 'blur' }]"
            >
              <el-input v-model="formItem.seatNum"/>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item
              label="预约审批设置"
              prop="approvalType"
              :rules="[{ required: true, message: '预约审批设置不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
            >
              <DictSelect v-model="formItem.approvalType" dict-type="approval_type" :placeholder="'请选择预约审批'"/>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item
              label="状态"
              prop="roomUseable"
            >
              <el-switch
                v-model="formItem.roomUseable"
                active-value="0"
                inactive-value="1"
              />
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item
              label="备注"
              prop="remark"
            >
              <el-input type="textarea" v-model="formItem.reservationRemark" maxlength="100" show-word-limit
                        resize="none" placeholder="请填写备注"/>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button v-if="!showDetail" type="primary" :loading="saveLoading" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button v-if="!showDetail" @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  update,
} from "@/api/jufe/reservationset";
import {tree} from '@/api/location/location'
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
import {isInt, isIP} from '@/utils/validate'
export default {
  name: "PowerAdd",
  components: {
    Treeselect, Map
  },
  props: {
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default: {}
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    showDetail: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    title: {
      type: String,
      default: ''
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
      buildTreeData: [],
      inWeekDayList: [],
      weekDayList: [],
      timeRange: null,
      pickerOptions: {
        firstDayOfWeek: 1
      }
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getDicts("week_days_sel").then(e => {
      this.weekDayList = e.data
      if (this.formItem.roomId) {
        this.getWeeks()
      }
    })
    const query = {}
    if (this.formItem.operate === 'add') {
      query.isReservation = "2"
    }
    tree(query).then(e => {
      this.buildTreeData = e.data
    })
  },
  methods: {
    isInt: isInt,
    changeDateRange(val) {
      if (val) {
        this.formItem.reservationStart = val[0]
        this.formItem.reservationEnd = val[1]
        this.getWeeks()
      }
    },
    getWeeks() {
      if (this.formItem.reservationStart && this.formItem.reservationEnd) {
        let startDate = new Date(this.formItem.reservationStart); // 开始日期
        let endDate = new Date(this.formItem.reservationEnd); // 结束日期
        if (isNaN(startDate.getTime()) || isNaN(endDate.getTime())) {
          return "无效的日期格式";
        }
        this.inWeekDayList = []
        while (startDate <= endDate) {
          let dayOfWeek = startDate.getDay(); // 获取当前日期为周几（0-6）
          if (!this.inWeekDayList.includes(dayOfWeek)) {
            this.inWeekDayList.push(dayOfWeek);
          }
          startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() + 1); // 将日期加一天
        }
      }
      if (this.inWeekDayList && this.inWeekDayList.length) {
        this.weekDayList.forEach(e => {
          if (this.inWeekDayList.includes(Number(e.dictValue))) {
            e.status = '0'
          } else {
            e.status = '-1'
          }
        })
      }
    },
    chooseTime(val) {
      if (val) {
        let flag = false
        this.formItem.timeRanges.forEach(e => {
          const timeArr = e.split('~')
          if ((val[0] >= timeArr[0] && val[0] <= timeArr[1]) || (val[1] >= timeArr[0] && val[1] <= timeArr[1])) {
            flag = true
          }
        })
        if (flag) {
          this.$message.error("时间段不可重叠，请确认！")
          return
        }
        this.formItem.timeRanges.push(val[0] + '~' + val[1])
      }
    },
    removeTime(tag) {
      this.formItem.timeRanges.splice(this.formItem.timeRanges.indexOf(tag), 1);
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.resetForm('form')
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['form'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          let arr = []
          this.formItem.weekDays.forEach(e => {
            if (this.inWeekDayList.includes(Number(e))) {
              arr.push(e)
            }
          })
          this.formItem.weekDays = arr
          console.log('=================>>>>>', this.formItem)
          // 修改
          update(this.formItem).then(e => {
            this.saveLoading = false
            this.$message.success('保存成功')
            this.handleClose()
            this.loadData()
          }).catch(e => {
            this.saveLoading = false
          })
        }
      })
    },
    loadData() {
      this.$emit('loadData')
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery"
            :records.sync="records"
    />
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleUpdate('','add')"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:reservationset:edit']"
        >新增
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-setting"
          size="mini"
          @click="cancelSet()"
        >预约设置
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records">
      <el-table-column type="index" label="序号" align="center" width="50"/>
      <el-table-column label="教室编号" align="center" prop="roomCode" width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="教室名称" align="center" prop="roomName" width="200"/>
      <el-table-column label="楼栋位置" align="center" prop="locationName" width="200"/>
      <el-table-column label="教室类型" align="center" prop="params.roomTypeName" width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="可预约人数" align="center" prop="seatNum" width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="备注" align="center" prop="reservationRemark"/>
      <el-table-column key="roomUseable" label="状态" align="center" width="100">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-switch
            v-model="scope.row.roomUseable"
            active-value="0"
            inactive-value="1"
            @change="handleStatusChange(scope.row)"
          />
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" fixed="right" width="300">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleUpdate(scope.row,'update')"
                     v-hasPermi="['jufe:reservationset:edit']">编辑
          </el-button>
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-search" @click="handleDetail(scope.row)">查看</el-button>
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-delete" @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
                     v-hasPermi="['jufe:reservationset:remove']">删除
          </el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList"
    />
    <Add ref="add" v-if="addVisible" :visible.sync="addVisible"
         @loadData="getList"
         :form-item="formItem"
         :showDetail="showDetail"
         :title="title"
    />
    <el-dialog v-if="setVisible" title="预约设置" :visible.sync="setVisible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false"
               append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
      <el-form ref="setForm" :model="setItem" label-width="auto">
        <el-form-item
          label="可退定时间"
          prop="cancelTime"
          :rules="[{ required: true, message: '可退定时间不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isInt, message: '请输入正确小时数', trigger: 'blur' }]"
        >
          <el-input v-model="setItem.cancelTime" maxlength="2" style="width: 200px;">
            <el-button slot="append">分钟</el-button>
          </el-input>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item
          label="可提前预约天数"
          prop="reservationTime"
          :rules="[{ validator: isInt, message: '请输入正确天数', trigger: 'blur' },
            {pattern: /[1-7]\d*/, message: '请输入1-7之间的数值', trigger: 'blur' }]"
        >
          <el-input v-model="setItem.reservationTime" maxlength="1" placeholder="请填写可提前预约天数"
                    style="width: 200px;">
            <el-button slot="append">天</el-button>
          </el-input>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item
          label="可爽约次数"
          prop="maxBreakNum"
          :rules="[{ validator: isInt, message: '请输入正确次数', trigger: 'blur' }]"
        >
          <el-input v-model="setItem.maxBreakNum" maxlength="1" placeholder="请填写可爽约次数" style="width: 200px;">
            <el-button slot="append">次</el-button>
          </el-input>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" :loading="saveLoading" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  list,
  update,
  del,
  setCancel,
  getBaseInfo
} from "@/api/jufe/reservationset";
import {isInt} from '@/utils/validate'
import Search from "./search";
import Add from "./add";
export default {
  components: {Search, Add},
  name: "Reservation",
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      saveLoading: false,
      addVisible: false,
      setVisible: false,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        roomCode: null,
        roomName: null,
        locationName: null,
        roomType: null,
        isReservation: '1',
        params: {}
      },
      formItem: {},
      setItem: {
        id: 1,
        cancelTime: null,
        reservationTime: null,
        maxBreakNum: null
      },
      title: '新增',
      showDetail: false
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    isInt: isInt,
    //退订设置
    cancelSet() {
      this.setVisible = true
      this.setItem.cancelTime = null
      getBaseInfo().then(e => {
        this.setItem = e.data
      })
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.setVisible = false
      this.resetForm('setForm')
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['setForm'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          // 修改
          setCancel(this.setItem).then(e => {
            this.saveLoading = false
            this.$message.success('保存成功')
            this.handleClose()
            this.getList()
          }).catch(e => {
            this.saveLoading = false
          })
        }
      })
    },
    /** 查询计划列列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      list(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows
        this.total = response.total
        this.loading = false;
      }).catch(e => {
        this.loading = false
      });
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.formItem = {
        roomCode: null,
        roomType: null,
        reservationDaysInfo: null,
        approvalType: '1',
        weekDays: [],
        timeRanges: [],
        timeArr: [],
        reservationRemark: null,
        roomUseable: '0',
        operate: '',
        seatNum: 0,
      }
    },
    /** 新增&修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row, type) {
      this.reset()
      if (type === 'add') {
        this.title = '新增'
      } else {
        this.title = '编辑'
        row.timeArr = []
        this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
        if (this.formItem.reservationStart && this.formItem.reservationEnd) {
          this.formItem.timeArr.push(this.formItem.reservationStart)
          this.formItem.timeArr.push(this.formItem.reservationEnd)
        }
      }
      this.formItem.operate = type
      this.showDetail = false
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    handleDetail(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.title = '详情'
      this.showDetail = true
      this.addVisible = true
      row.timeArr = []
      this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
      if (this.formItem.reservationStart && this.formItem.reservationEnd) {
        this.formItem.timeArr.push(this.formItem.reservationStart)
        this.formItem.timeArr.push(this.formItem.reservationEnd)
      }
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const ids = row.roomId || this.ids;
      const roomName = row.roomName
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除教室名称为' + roomName + '"的数据项移除黑名单？').then(function () {
        return del(ids);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {
      });
    },
    // 更改状态
    handleStatusChange(row) {
      const text = row.roomUseable === '0' ? '启用' : '停用'
      this.$confirm('确认要' + text + '"' + row.roomName + '"吗?').then(() => {
        update({roomId: row.roomId, roomUseable: row.roomUseable}).then(res => {
          if (res.code === 200) {
            this.$message.success('操作成功！')
            this.getList()
          }
        })
      }).catch(function () {
        row.roomUseable = row.roomUseable === '0' ? '1' : '0'
      })
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" :inline="true" label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="教室编号" prop="roomCode">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.roomCode"  placeholder="请输入教室编号" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="教室名称" prop="roomName">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.roomName"  placeholder="请输入教室名称" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item
      label="教室类型"
      prop="roomType"
    >
      <DictSelect v-model="queryParams.roomType" dict-type="room_type" :placeholder="'请选择教室类型'"/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
export default {
  name: "RoomSearch",
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
    };
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.queryParams.dataRange = []
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>
<style scoped>
  .line-style{
    float: right;
    display: flex;
    margin-right: 20px;
  }
  .itemstyle{
    margin-left: 20px;
    margin-right: 20px;
  }
</style>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery"
            :records.sync="records"
    />
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records" >
      <el-table-column type="index" label="序号" align="center" width="50"/>
      <el-table-column label="课程名称" align="center" prop="courseName"/>
      <el-table-column label="上课教师" align="center" prop="stuWorkName" width="120" />
      <el-table-column label="教室编号" align="center" prop="roomCode" width="120" />
      <el-table-column label="课表教室编号" align="center" prop="syncRoomCode" width="120"/>
      <el-table-column label="教室名称" align="center" prop="roomName" />
      <el-table-column label="教学周" align="center" prop="teachingWeek" width="80"/>
      <el-table-column label="星期" align="center" prop="weekDay" width="80"/>
      <el-table-column label="日期" align="center" prop="courseDate" width="120"/>
      <el-table-column label="上课时间" align="center" prop="startTime" width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="下课时间" align="center" prop="endTime" width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="课程节次" align="center" prop="classSection" width="80"/>
      <!-- <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" fixed="right" width="100">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-search" @click="handleDetail(scope.row)">监控</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column> -->
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList"
    />
    <!-- 视频监控窗口 -->
    <el-dialog v-if="openMonitor" title="视频监控" :visible.sync="openMonitor" @closed="handleClose" width="1000px"
               :close-on-click-modal="false" destroy-on-close>
      <!-- 视频监控窗口 -->
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="12" v-for="(item,index) in videos" style="padding: 20px 20px">
          <stream-player :key="index"  :url="'rtsp://'+item.cameraUser+':'+item.cameraPassword+'@'+item.cameraIp+':'+item.cameraPort+'/h264/ch01/main/av_stream'"
          />
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <!--  -->
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  listScheduling,
} from "@/api/scheduling/scheduling";
import Search from "./search";
import VideoPlayer from '@/components/VideoPlayer'
import {
  getMonitors,
} from '@/api/jufe/command'
import StreamPlayer from "@/components/StreamPlayer/index.vue";
import monitor from "@/views/jufe/monitor/index.vue";
export default {
  computed: {
    monitor() {
      return monitor
    }
  },
  components: {StreamPlayer, Search,VideoPlayer },
  name: "Reservation",
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      saveLoading: false,
      openMonitor:false,
      videos:[],
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        roomCode:null,
        roomName: null,
        courseName: null,
        stuWorkName:null,
        courseDate:null,
        params:{
        }
      },
      formItem:{},
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    handleClose() {
      this.openMonitor = false
    },
    /** 查询计划列列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listScheduling(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows
        this.total = response.total
        this.loading = false;
      }).catch(e=>{
        this.loading = false
      });
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    handleDetail(row) {
      getMonitors(row.roomId).then(e=>{
        this.openMonitor = true
        this.videos = e.data
      })
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" :inline="true" label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="教室编号" prop="roomCode">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.roomCode"  placeholder="请输入教室编号" clearable />

    <el-form-item label="课程名称" prop="courseName">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.courseName"  placeholder="请输入课程名称" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="上课教师" prop="stuWorkName">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.stuWorkName"  placeholder="请输入上课教师" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="上课日期" prop="courseDate">
      <el-date-picker
        v-model="queryParams.courseDate"
        type="date"
        placeholder="请选择上课日期"
        clearable
        format="yyyy-MM-dd"
        :default-value="new Date()"
        value-format="yyyy-MM-dd"
      >
      </el-date-picker>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>

<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery"
            :records.sync="records"
    />
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records" >
      <el-table-column type="index" label="序号" align="center" width="50"/>
      <el-table-column label="课程名称" align="center" prop="courseName" />
      <el-table-column label="教室编号" align="center" prop="roomId" />
      <el-table-column label="教室名称" align="center" prop="roomName" />
      <el-table-column label="类型" align="center" prop="params.typeName" width="120"/>
      <el-table-column label="延时时长(分钟)" align="center" prop="delayNum" width="120"/>

      <el-table-column label="调课日期" align="center" prop="createTime" width="180"/>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList"
    />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  listExchange,
} from "@/api/scheduling/exchange";
import Search from "./search";
export default {
  components: { Search },
  name: "SchedulingExchange",
  data() {
    return {
      loading:false,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        roomId:null,
        roomName: null,
        courseName: null,
        courseDate:null,
        params:{
        }
      },
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询计划列列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listExchange(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows
        this.total = response.total
        this.loading = false;
      }).catch(e=>{
        this.loading = false
      });
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" :inline="true" label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="教室编号" prop="roomId">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.roomId"  placeholder="请输入教室编号" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="教室名称" prop="roomName">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.roomName"  placeholder="请输入教室名称" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="课程名称" prop="courseName">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.courseName"  placeholder="请输入课程名称" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="上课日期" prop="courseDate">
      <el-date-picker
        v-model="queryParams.courseDate"
        type="date"
        placeholder="请选择上课日期"
        clearable
        format="yyyy-MM-dd"
        :default-value="new Date()"
        value-format="yyyy-MM-dd"
      >
      </el-date-picker>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
export default {
  name: "RoomSearch",
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
    };
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.queryParams.dataRange = []
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>

  float: right;
  display: flex;
  margin-right: 20px;
}
.itemstyle{
  margin-left: 20px;
  margin-right: 20px;
}
