<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-card>
      <template slot="header">
        <span>课表设置</span>
      </template>
      <el-form :model="formItem" :rules="rules" ref="formRef" label-width="120px">
        <el-row :gutter="20">
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="学年" prop="schoolYear">
              <el-date-picker v-model="formItem.schoolYear" type="year" value-format="yyyy" placeholder="请选择学年" />
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row :gutter="20">
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="学期时间" prop="schoolWeekDay">
              <el-date-picker v-model="formItem.schoolWeekDay" type="daterange" value-format="yyyy-MM-dd"
                start-placeholder="开始日期" end-placeholder="结束日期" />
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row :gutter="20">
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="学期" prop="semesterType">
              <el-select v-model="formItem.semesterType" placeholder="请选择学期" clearable>
                <el-option v-for="dict in dict.type.school_semester_type" :key="dict.value" :label="dict.label"
                  :value="dict.value" />
              </el-select>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-form-item>
          <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSubmit">保存</el-button>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
    </el-card>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { getSchedulingSetting, updateSchedulingSetting } from "@/api/jufe/schedulingSetting";
export default {
  name: "SchedulingSetting",
  dicts: ["school_semester_type"],
  data() {
    return {
      formItem: {
        schoolYear: null,
        schoolWeekDay: null,
        semesterType: null,
      },
      rules: {
        schoolYear: [{ required: true, message: "请选择学年", trigger: "blur" }],
        schoolWeekDay: [{ required: true, message: "请选择学期时间", trigger: "blur" }],
        semesterType: [{ required: true, message: "请选择学期", trigger: "blur" }],
      },
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getSchedulingSetting()
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询课表设置 */
    getSchedulingSetting() {
      getSchedulingSetting().then((response) => {
        if (response.code === 200) {
          var data = response.data
          this.formItem = {
            schoolYear: data.schoolYear,
            schoolWeekDay: [data.schoolWeekStartDay, data.schoolWeekEndDay],
            semesterType: data.semesterType,
          }
        }
      })
    },
    /** 更新课表设置 */
    updateSchedulingSetting() {
      var params = {
        schoolYear: this.formItem.schoolYear,
        schoolWeekStartDay: this.formItem.schoolWeekDay[0],
        schoolWeekEndDay: this.formItem.schoolWeekDay[1],
        semesterType: this.formItem.semesterType,
      }
      updateSchedulingSetting(params).then((response) => {
        if (response.code === 200) {
          this.$message({
            message: "更新课表设置成功",
            type: "success",
          });
        }
      })
    },
    /** 提交课表设置 */
    handleSubmit() {
      this.$refs.formRef.validate((valid) => {
        if (valid) {
          this.updateSchedulingSetting()
        }
      })
    },
  },
};
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <!-- 添加或修改学校基础信息设置对话框 -->
    <el-card>
      <el-row>
        <el-col :span="16">
          <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" :label-position="labelPosition" label-width="160px">
            <h3>
              电源门锁设置:
            </h3>
            <div class="item-tab">
              <el-form-item label="课表提前控电控门时间:" prop="advanceTime">
                <el-input-number v-model="form.advanceTime"/>
              </el-form-item>
              <div style="padding-bottom: 20px;color: red;">
                <span class="el-form-item__required">*</span>注：课表上课时间-提起控门控电时间=实际控门控电时间
              </div>
              <el-form-item label="课表结束延迟断电时间:" prop="delayTime">
                <el-input-number v-model="form.delayTime"/>
              </el-form-item>
              <div style="padding-bottom: 20px;color: red;">
                <span class="el-form-item__required">*</span>注：课表下课时间+课表结束延迟断电时间=实际下课断电时间
              </div>
              <el-form-item label="最小不断电时间:" prop="keepOnTime">
                <el-input-number v-model="form.keepOnTime"/>
              </el-form-item>
              <div style="padding-bottom: 20px;color: red;">
                <span class="el-form-item__required">*</span>注：当两节课间隔大于或等于所设置的最小不断电时间时，不断电，否则断电
              </div>
              <el-form-item v-show="false" label="断电提醒:"></el-form-item>
              <div v-show="false" class="item-tab1">
                <el-form-item label="课表:" prop="classScheduleReminderStatus"
                              :formatter="classScheduleReminderStatusFormat"
                >
                  <el-switch v-model="form.classScheduleReminderStatus"
                             active-text="开"
                             inactive-text="关"
                             active-value="1"
                             inactive-value="2"
                  ></el-switch>
                </el-form-item>
                <el-form-item label="距结束时间提醒:" prop="classScheduleEndTime">
                  <el-input-number v-model="form.classScheduleEndTime"/>
                </el-form-item>
                <el-form-item label="上传音频:" prop="classScheduleVoiceUrl">
                  <el-upload
                    ref="uploadPicUrl"
                    :limit="1"
                    accept=".MP3"
                    :action="uploadPicUrl.url"
                    :headers="uploadPicUrl.headers"
                    :file-list="uploadPicUrl.fileList"
                    :before-upload="beforeUpload"
                    :on-progress="handleFileUploadProgressPicUrl"
                    :on-success="handleFileSuccessPicUrl1"
                    :auto-upload="true"
                  >
                    <el-button slot="trigger" size="small" type="primary">选取文件</el-button>
                    <span style="color: #999999;font-size: 8px;margin-left: 10px;">只能上传mp3音频文件</span>
                  </el-upload>
                </el-form-item>
                <el-form-item label="课表当前音频名称:" prop="classScheduleVoiceName">
                  <div class="audio-box">
                    <el-input v-model="form.classScheduleVoiceName" :disabled="true" style="width: 200px"/>
                    <audio controls :src="this.form.classScheduleVoiceUrl"></audio>
                  </div>
                </el-form-item>
                <el-form-item label="教室预约:" prop="roomOrderReminderStatus"
                              :formatter="roomOrderReminderStatusFormat"
                >
                  <el-switch v-model="form.roomOrderReminderStatus"
                             active-text="开"
                             inactive-text="关"
                             active-value="1"
                             inactive-value="2"
                  ></el-switch>
                </el-form-item>
                <el-form-item label="距结束时间提醒:" prop="roomOrderEndTime">
                  <el-input-number v-model="form.roomOrderEndTime"/>
                </el-form-item>
                <el-form-item label="上传音频:" prop="roomOrderVoiceUrl">
                  <el-upload
                    ref="uploadPicUrl"
                    :limit="1"
                    accept=".mp3"
                    :action="uploadPicUrl.url"
                    :headers="uploadPicUrl.headers"
                    :file-list="uploadPicUrl.fileList"
                    :before-upload="beforeUpload"
                    :on-progress="handleFileUploadProgressPicUrl"
                    :on-success="handleFileSuccessPicUrl2"
                    :auto-upload="true"
                  >
                    <el-button slot="trigger" size="small" type="primary">选取文件</el-button>
                    <span style="color: #999999;font-size: 8px;margin-left: 10px;">只能上传mp3音频文件</span>
                  </el-upload>
                </el-form-item>
                <el-form-item label="教室预约当前音频名称:" prop="roomOrderVosiceName">
                  <div class="audio-box">
                    <el-input v-model="form.roomOrderVoiceName" :disabled="true" style="width: 200px"/>
                    <audio controls :src="this.form.roomOrderVoiceUrl"></audio>
                  </div>
                </el-form-item>
              </div>
            </div>
          </el-form>
          <div class="dialog-footer">
            <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm">保存设置</el-button>
          </div>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="8">
          <h3>逻辑说明</h3>
          <ul>
            <li style="padding: 10px 0px;">
              1.当上下节课为相同的课，不进行断电和关门
            </li>
            <li style="padding: 10px 0px;">
              2.课表结束门锁不参与延时，即时关闭
            </li>
            <li style="padding: 10px 0px;">
              3.当课表进行延时下课操作时逻辑为：下节上课时间-提前控电时间）-（下课时间+延时时间+课表延迟时间）> 最小不断电时间
              【结果到（下课时间+延时时间+课表延迟时间）开始断电，到（下节上课时间-提前控电时间）开始供电】
            </li>
          </ul>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
    </el-card>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { getInfo, addInfo, updateInfo } from '@/api/jufe/schoolBaseSetInfo'
import { getToken } from '@/utils/auth'
export default {
  name: 'Info',
  props: {
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default() {
        return { hidden: false, breadcrumb: true }
      }
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      picurl: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API,
      // 上传参数
      uploadPicUrl: {
        // 设置上传的请求头部
        headers: { Authorization: 'Bearer ' + getToken() },
        // 上传的地址 /网关/控制器
        url: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API + '/file/upload',
        // 上传的文件列表
        fileList: []
      },
      headers: {
        Authorization: 'Bearer ' + getToken()
      },
      labelPosition: 'left',
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      strArr1: [],
      strArr2: [],
      classScheduleReminderStatusOptions: [],
      roomOrderReminderStatusOptions: [],
      // 非单个禁用
      single: true,
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 学校基础信息设置表格数据
      infoList: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: '',
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        keepOnTime: null,
        cancelTime: null,
        reservationTime: null,
        reminderTime: null,
        advanceTime: null,
        delayTime: null,
        classScheduleReminderStatus: null,
        roomOrderReminderStatus: null,
        classScheduleVoiceUrl: null,
        roomOrderVoiceUrl: null,
        classScheduleEndTime: null,
        roomOrderEndTime: null,
        classScheduleVoiceName: null,
        roomOrderVoiceName: null
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {},
      // 表单校验
      rules: {}
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    beforeUpload(val) {
      let size5M = val.size / 1024 / 1024 < 50
      if (!size5M) {
        this.$message.error('上传音频大小不能超过50MB!')
        return false
      }
    },
    // 文件提交处理
    submitUpload() {
      this.$refs.uploadPicUrl.submit()
    },
    // 文件上传中处理
    handleFileUploadProgressPicUrl(event, file, fileList) {
      this.uploadPicUrl.isUploading = true
    },
    // 文件上传成功处理
    handleFileSuccessPicUrl1(response, file, fileList) {
      this.uploadPicUrl.isUploading = false
      this.strArr1 = response.data.name.split('_', 1)
      this.formItem.classScheduleVoiceUrl = response.data.url
    },
    // 文件上传成功处理
    handleFileSuccessPicUrl2(response, file, fileList) {
      this.uploadPicUrl.isUploading = false
      this.strArr2 = response.data.name.split('_', 1)
      this.formItem.roomOrderVoiceUrl = response.data.url
    },
    getList() {
      this.loading = true
      getInfo().then(response => {
        this.form = response.data
        this.open = true
      })
    },
    // 数据来源字典翻译  class_schedule_reminder_status
    classScheduleReminderStatusFormat(row, column) {
      return this.selectDictLabel(this.classScheduleReminderStatusOptions, row.classScheduleReminderStatus)
    },
    // 数据来源字典翻译  room_order_reminder_status
    roomOrderReminderStatusFormat(row, column) {
      return this.selectDictLabel(this.roomOrderReminderStatusOptions, row.roomOrderReminderStatus)
    },
    // 取消按钮
    cancel() {
      this.open = false
      this.reset()
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['form'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          if (this.formItem.classScheduleVoiceUrl != null) {
            this.form.classScheduleVoiceUrl = this.formItem.classScheduleVoiceUrl
            this.form.classScheduleVoiceName = this.strArr1[0]
          }
          if (this.formItem.roomOrderVoiceUrl != null) {
            this.form.roomOrderVoiceUrl = this.formItem.roomOrderVoiceUrl
            this.form.roomOrderVoiceName = this.strArr2[0]
          }
          if (this.form.id != null) {
            updateInfo(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess('修改成功')
              this.open = false
              this.getList()
            })
          } else {
            addInfo(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess('新增成功')
              this.open = false
              this.getList()
            })
          }
        }
      })
    }
  }
}
</script>
<style scoped>
.item-tab {
  margin-left: 20px;
}
.item-tab1 {
  margin-left: 100px;
}
audio {
  height: 36px;
  margin-left: 20px;
}
.dialog-footer {
  margin-left: 380px;
}
.audio-box {
  width: 800px;
  height: 50px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
}
</style>

        <el-button type="warning" plain icon="el-icon-download" size="mini" @click="handleExport"

      </el-col>
      <right-toolbar :showSearch.sync="showSearch" @queryTable="getList"></right-toolbar>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="meetingItemList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
      <el-table-column label="主键ID" align="center" prop="id" />
      <el-table-column label="会议编号" align="center" prop="meetingId" />
      <el-table-column label="教师id" align="center" prop="teaUserId" />
      <el-table-column label="签到状态:0未到,1已到,2迟到,3请假" align="center" prop="state" />
      <el-table-column label="签到时间" align="center" prop="signin" width="180">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <span>{{ parseTime(scope.row.signin, '{y}-{m}-{d}') }}</span>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width">

    <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="open" width="500px" append-to-body>

          </el-date-picker>

              <el-input v-model="scope.row.state" placeholder="请输入会议状态:0未发布,1:已发布,2:已开始,3:已结束,4:已取消" />

      </div>

<script>
import { listMeetingItem, getMeetingItem, delMeetingItem, addMeetingItem, updateMeetingItem } from "@/api/jufe/schoolMeetingItem";
export default {
  name: "MeetingItem",
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      // 子表选中数据
      checkedSchoolMeetingInfo: [],
      // 非单个禁用
      single: true,
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 会议信息参会人员关联表格数据
      meetingItemList: [],
      // 会议信息表格数据
      schoolMeetingInfoList: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        meetingId: null,
        teaUserId: null,
        state: null,
        signin: null,
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {},
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
        meetingId: [
          { required: true, message: "会议编号不能为空", trigger: "blur" }
        ],
      }
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询会议信息参会人员关联列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listMeetingItem(this.queryParams).then(response => {
        this.meetingItemList = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    // 取消按钮
    cancel() {
      this.open = false;
      this.reset();
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.form = {
        id: null,
        meetingId: null,
        teaUserId: null,
        state: null,
        signin: null,
        updateBy: null,
        createBy: null,
        createTime: null,
        updateTime: null
      };
      this.schoolMeetingInfoList = [];
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.id)
      this.single = selection.length !== 1
      this.multiple = !selection.length
    },
    /** 新增按钮操作 */
    handleAdd() {
      this.reset();
      this.open = true;
      this.title = "添加会议信息参会人员关联";
    },
    /** 修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset();
      const id = row.id || this.ids
      getMeetingItem(id).then(response => {
        this.form = response.data;
        this.schoolMeetingInfoList = response.data.schoolMeetingInfoList;
        this.open = true;
        this.title = "修改会议信息参会人员关联";
      });
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs["form"].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.form.schoolMeetingInfoList = this.schoolMeetingInfoList;
          if (this.form.id != null) {
            updateMeetingItem(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          } else {
            addMeetingItem(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          }
        }
      });
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const ids = row.id || this.ids;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除会议信息参会人员关联编号为"' + ids + '"的数据项？').then(function () {
        return delMeetingItem(ids);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => { });
    },
    /** 会议信息序号 */
    rowSchoolMeetingInfoIndex({ row, rowIndex }) {
      row.index = rowIndex + 1;
    },
    /** 会议信息添加按钮操作 */
    handleAddSchoolMeetingInfo() {
      let obj = {};
      obj.name = "";
      obj.locationId = "";
      obj.state = "";
      obj.startTime = "";
      obj.endTime = "";
      obj.details = "";
      obj.initiator = "";
      obj.publish = "";
      this.schoolMeetingInfoList.push(obj);
    },
    /** 会议信息删除按钮操作 */
    handleDeleteSchoolMeetingInfo() {
      if (this.checkedSchoolMeetingInfo.length == 0) {
        this.$modal.msgError("请先选择要删除的会议信息数据");
      } else {
        const schoolMeetingInfoList = this.schoolMeetingInfoList;
        const checkedSchoolMeetingInfo = this.checkedSchoolMeetingInfo;
        this.schoolMeetingInfoList = schoolMeetingInfoList.filter(function (item) {
          return checkedSchoolMeetingInfo.indexOf(item.index) == -1
        });
      }
    },
    /** 复选框选中数据 */
    handleSchoolMeetingInfoSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.checkedSchoolMeetingInfo = selection.map(item => item.index)
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.download('schoolMeetingItem/meetingItem/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `meetingItem_${new Date().getTime()}.xlsx`)
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <div class="detail-page">
    <!-- 会议信息 -->
    <h3>会议信息</h3>
    <el-form :model="meetingForm" :rules="rules" label-width="80px">
      <el-row :gutter="20">
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item label="会议主题">
            <el-input
              v-if="pageType == 1"
              v-model="meetingForm.name"
              placeholder="一个会议主题"
              :disabled="true"
            ></el-input>
            <el-input
              v-else
              v-model="meetingForm.name"
              placeholder="一个会议主题"
              maxlength="50"
            ></el-input>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item label="会议地点">
            <el-input
              v-model="locationName"
              placeholder="A302"
              :disabled="true"
            ></el-input>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row :gutter="20">
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item label="会议时间">
            <el-input
              :value="
                formatTimeRange(meetingForm.startTime, meetingForm.endTime)
              "
              placeholder="2025-03-02 17:30-19:30"
              :disabled="true"
            ></el-input>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item label="发起人">
            <el-input
              v-model="meetingForm.initiator.nickName"
              placeholder="张三"
              :disabled="true"
            ></el-input>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
      <el-row :gutter="20">
        <el-col :span="12">
          <el-form-item label="会议内容">
            <el-input
              v-if="pageType == 1"
              type="textarea"
              v-model="meetingForm.details"
              placeholder="这是一个会议备注..."
              :autosize="{ minRows: 2, maxRows: 4 }"
              resize="none"
              :disabled="true"
            ></el-input>
            <el-input
              v-else
              type="textarea"
              v-model="meetingForm.details"
              placeholder="这是一个会议备注..."
              :autosize="{ minRows: 2, maxRows: 4 }"
              resize="none"
              maxlength="200"
            ></el-input>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-row>
    </el-form>
    <!-- 参会情况 -->
    <h3>参会情况</h3>
    <div class="attendance-tabs">
      <el-button-group>
        <el-button
          :type="activeTab === '' ? 'primary' : ''"
          @click="changeTab('')"
        >
          全部 ({{ statusCountMap[""] }})
        </el-button>
        <el-button
          :type="activeTab === '0' ? 'primary' : ''"
          @click="changeTab('0')"
        >
          未到 ({{ statusCountMap["0"] }})
        </el-button>
        <el-button
          :type="activeTab === '1' ? 'primary' : ''"
          @click="changeTab('1')"
        >
          已到 ({{ statusCountMap["1"] }})
        </el-button>
        <el-button
          :type="activeTab === '2' ? 'primary' : ''"
          @click="changeTab('2')"
        >
          迟到 ({{ statusCountMap["2"] }})
        </el-button>
        <el-button
          :type="activeTab === '3' ? 'primary' : ''"
          @click="changeTab('3')"
        >
          请假 ({{ statusCountMap["3"] }})
        </el-button>
      </el-button-group>
    </div>
    <el-table :data="paginatedData" style="width: 100%" border>
      <el-table-column label="序号" width="60"
        ><template v-slot="scope">{{
          scope.$index + 1
        }}</template></el-table-column
      >
      <el-table-column prop="nickName" label="姓名"></el-table-column>
      <el-table-column prop="userName" label="教职工号"></el-table-column>
      <el-table-column
        prop="dept.deptName"
        label="所在院系/部门"
      ></el-table-column>
      <!-- 签到状态列 -->
      <el-table-column label="签到状态">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-tag
            :type="stateType(scope.row.signInStatus)"
            :style="{ color: stateColor(scope.row.signInStatus) }"
          >
            {{ stateLabel(scope.row.signInStatus) }}
          </el-tag>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column
        prop="signInTime"
        label="签到时间"
        :formatter="formatTime"
      ></el-table-column>
      <el-table-column v-if="pageType == 0" prop="signInStatus" label="操作列">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button type="text" @click="openChangeStatus(scope.row)"
            >修改签到状态</el-button
          >
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <div class="pagination">
      <el-pagination
        layout="total, sizes, prev, pager, next, jumper"
        :total="total"
        :page-size="pageSize"
        :current-page="currentPage"
        @size-change="handleSizeChange"
        @current-change="handleCurrentChange"
      ></el-pagination>
      <!-- <pagination
        v-show="total > 0"
        :total="total"
        :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
        :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
        @pagination="getItemsInfos"
      /> -->
    </div>
    <div class="buttons">
      <el-button @click="handlePopState">返回</el-button>
      <el-button v-if="pageType == 1 " type="primary" @click="exportData"
        >导出</el-button
      >
      <el-button v-else type="primary" @click="submitForm">提交</el-button>
    </div>
    <el-dialog title="修改签到状态" :visible.sync="dialogFormVisible">
      <el-form :model="stateForm">
        <el-form-item label="姓名">
          <span>{{ stateForm.nickName }}</span>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="签到状态">
          <el-select v-model="stateForm.signInStatus" placeholder="请选择">
            <el-option
              v-for="item in signInStatusOptions"
              :key="item.value"
              :label="item.label"
              :value="item.value"
            />
          </el-select>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="签到时间" v-if="stateForm.signInStatus ==1||  stateForm.signInStatus ==2">
          <el-date-picker
            v-model="stateForm.signIn"
            type="datetime"
            value-format="yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"
            format="yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"
            placeholder="选择签到时间"
          >
          </el-date-picker>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button @click="dialogFormVisible = false">取 消</el-button>
        <el-button type="primary" @click="changeStatus()">确 定</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  getMeetingInfo,
  getItemsInfo,
  meetingSignIn,
  editDetails,
} from "@/api/jufe/schoolMeetingInfo";
import { getLocation, tree } from "@/api/location/location";
export default {
  name: "DetailPage",
  data() {
    return {
      pageType: 0,
      stateForm: { signInStatus: "", signIn: "" },
      dialogFormVisible: false,
      currentPage: 1,
      pageSize: 10,
      meetingForm: {
        theme: "",
        location: "",
        time: "",
        content: "",
        organizer: "",
        initiator: {
          nickName: "",
        },
        userData: [],
        locationId: "",
      },
      originalForm: {
        theme: "",
        location: "",
        time: "",
        content: "",
        organizer: "",
        initiator: {
          nickName: "",
        },
        userData: [],
        locationId: "",
      },
      activeTab: "",
      signInStatusOptions: [
        { label: "未到", value: "0" },
        { label: "已到", value: "1" },
        { label: "迟到", value: "2" },
        { label: "请假", value: "3" },
      ],
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        meetingId: "",
      },
      locationName: "",
      rules: {
        name: [
          { required: true, message: "会议主题不能为空", trigger: "blur" },
        ],
        details: [
          { required: true, message: "会议内容不能为空", trigger: "blur" },
        ],
      },
    };
  },
  computed: {
    // 根据 activeTab 过滤后的全部数据（不分页）
    filteredAllData() {
      const data = this.originalForm.userData || [];
      if (this.activeTab === "") {
        return [...data];
      } else {
        return data.filter((item) => item.signInStatus === this.activeTab);
      }
    },
    // 当前页要显示的数据（在 filteredAllData 基础上分页）
    paginatedData() {
      const start = (this.currentPage - 1) * this.pageSize;
      const end = start + this.pageSize;
      return this.filteredAllData.slice(start, end);
    },
    // 总数（用于 el-pagination）
    total() {
      return this.filteredAllData.length;
    },
    // 各状态数量统计
    statusCountMap() {
      const counts = {
        "": 0,
        0: 0,
        1: 0,
        2: 0,
        3: 0,
      };
      (this.originalForm.userData || []).forEach((item) => {
        const status = item.signInStatus;
        if (counts[status] !== undefined) {
          counts[status]++;
        }
        counts[""]++;
      });
      return counts;
    },
  },
  created() {
    this.queryParams.meetingId =
      this.$route.params && this.$route.params.meetingId;
    this.pageType = this.$route.query && this.$route.query.type;
    this.initMeetingInfo();
  },
  methods: {
    formatTime(row, column, cellValue) {
      if (!cellValue) return "";
      const date = new Date(cellValue);
      const year = date.getFullYear();
      const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0"); // 月份从 0 开始
      const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
      const hours = String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, "0");
      const minutes = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, "0");
      return `${year}-${month}-${day} ${hours}:${minutes}`;
    },
    changeTab(tab) {
      this.activeTab = tab;
      this.currentPage = 1; // 切换 tab 后回到第一页
    },
    handleSizeChange(size) {
      this.pageSize = size;
      this.currentPage = 1;
    },
    handleCurrentChange(page) {
      this.currentPage = page;
    },
    handlePopState() {
      if (
        // JSON.stringify(this.meetingForm) !== JSON.stringify(this.originalForm)
        this.pageType == 0
      ) {
        this.$modal.confirm("是否确认放弃更改？").then(() => {
          this.goBack();
        });
      } else {
        this.goBack();
      }
    },
    submitForm() {
      this.$modal.confirm("是否确认修改会议信息？").then(() => {
        editDetails(this.meetingForm);
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
        this.goBack();
      });
    },
    formatDate(value) {
      const date = new Date(value);
      const year = date.getFullYear();
      const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0");
      const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
      const hours = String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, "0");
      const minutes = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, "0");
      return `${year}-${month}-${day} ${hours}:${minutes}`;
    },
    formatDateForPicker(input) {
      if (!input) return "";
      const d = typeof input === "string" || typeof input === "number" ? new Date(input) : input;
      if (!(d instanceof Date) || isNaN(d.getTime())) return "";
      const y = d.getFullYear();
      const m = String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0");
      const day = String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
      const h = String(d.getHours()).padStart(2, "0");
      const min = String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2, "0");
      return `${y}-${m}-${day} ${h}:${min}`;
    },
    formatTimeRange(startTime, endTime) {
      const format = (timeStr) => {
        const date = new Date(timeStr);
        const year = date.getFullYear();
        const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0");
        const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
        const hour = String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, "0");
        const minute = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, "0");
        return { year, month, day, hour, minute };
      };
      const start = format(startTime);
      const end = format(endTime);
      // 如果是同一天，只显示一次日期
      return `${start.year}-${start.month}-${start.day} ${start.hour}:${start.minute} - ${end.hour}:${end.minute}`;
    },
    /** 查询会议参加人员列表 */
    // getItemsInfos() {
    //   this.loading = true;
    //   getItemsInfo(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
    //     console.log("getItemsInfo--->>>", response);
    //     this.meetingForm.userData = response.rows;
    //     // this.total = response.total;
    //     this.loading = false;
    //   });
    // },
    changeTab(tab) {
      this.activeTab = tab;
    },
    getStatusCount(status) {
      return (this.meetingForm?.userData || []).filter(
        (item) => (item.signInStatus ?? "").toString() === status
      ).length;
    },
    // 根据签到状态返回标签文本
    stateLabel(state) {
      const option = this.signInStatusOptions.find(
        (opt) => opt.value === state
      );
      return option ? option.label : "未签到";
    },
    stateType(state) {
      const typeMap = {
        0: "", // 默认无类型（灰色）
        1: "success", // 成功（绿色）
        2: "warning", // 警告（橙色）
        3: "info", // 信息（浅蓝色）
      };
      return typeMap[state] || "";
    },
    stateColor(state) {
      const colorMap = {
        0: "#0099ff", // 蓝色 - 0未到
        1: "#f59a23", // 橙色 - 1已到
        2: "#04c717", // 绿色 - 2迟到
        3: "#909399", // 深灰色 - 3请假
      };
      return colorMap[state] || "#303133"; // 默认颜色
    },
    initMeetingInfo() {
      getMeetingInfo(this.queryParams.meetingId)
        .then((response) => {
          this.meetingForm = response.data;
          this.originalForm = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.meetingForm));
          console.log("this.meetingForm----->>>>>", response.data);
        })
        .then(() => {
          tree({}).then((response) => {
            this.locationName = this.getNodePathLabel(
              this.meetingForm.locationId,
              response.data
            );
          });
        })
    },
    // 根据节点 id 获取其 label 及所有父级 label 的路径字符串
    // @param {number} targetId - 要查找的节点 id
    // @param {Array} treeData - 树形结构数组
    // @returns {string} 拼接后的路径字符串
    getNodePathLabel(targetId, treeData) {
      const path = [];
      function findNode(node, currentPath = []) {
        // 添加当前节点到路径中
        const newPath = [...currentPath, node];
        // 如果找到目标节点，返回路径
        if (node.id === targetId) {
          return newPath;
        }
        // 如果有 children，继续递归查找
        if (node.children && node.children.length > 0) {
          for (let child of node.children) {
            const result = findNode(child, newPath);
            if (result) return result;
          }
        }
        // 没找到返回 null
        return null;
      }
      // 遍历树查找路径
      for (let node of treeData) {
        const result = findNode(node);
        if (result) {
          path.push(...result);
          break;
        }
      }
      // 返回 label 拼接结果
      return path.map((n) => n.label).join("╲");
    },
    changeTab(tab) {
      this.activeTab = tab;
    },
    // handleSizeChange(val) {
    //   this.queryParams.pageSize = val;
    //   this.currentPage = 1;
    //   this.getItemsInfos();
    // },
    // handleCurrentChange(val) {
    //   this.currentPage = val;
    //   this.getItemsInfos();
    // },
    goBack() {
      // 返回逻辑
      const obj = { path: "/meeting/meetingInfo" };
      this.$tab.closeOpenPage(obj);
    },
    exportData() {
      // 导出逻辑
      this.download(
        "jufe/meetingInfo/exportMeetingInfo",
        {
          id: this.queryParams.meetingId,
        },
        `会议信息.xlsx`
      );
    },
    stateFormReset() {
      this.stateForm = { signInStatus: "", signIn: "" };
    },
    // openChangeStatus(row) {
    //   if (row != null) {
    //     this.dialogFormVisible = true;
    //     this.stateForm = row;
    //     this.stateForm.signIn = new Date(row.signInTime);
    //     this.stateForm.meetingId = this.queryParams.meetingId;
    //   }
    //   console.log(this.stateForm.signIn);
    // },
    openChangeStatus(row) {
      console.log("row--------------", row);
  if (row != null) {
    this.dialogFormVisible = true;
    this.stateForm.meetingId = this.queryParams.meetingId;
    this.stateForm.nickName = row.nickName;
    this.stateForm.signIn = this.formatDateForPicker(row.signInTime ?? this.meetingForm.startTime);
    this.stateForm.signInStatus = row.signInStatus;
    this.stateForm.userId = row.userId;
    this.stateForm.userName = row.userName;
  }
},
    changeStatus() {
      this.$confirm("是否修改签到状态?", "提示", {
        confirmButtonText: "确定",
        cancelButtonText: "取消",
        type: "warning",
      }).then(() => {
        if (!this.stateForm.signInStatus) {
          this.$message.warning("请选择签到状态");
          return;
        }
        // 设置 teaUserId
        this.stateForm.teaUserId = this.stateForm.userName;
        // this.stateForm.signIn = this.mergeDateAndSignInTime();
        console.log("this.stateForm.signIn", this.stateForm);
        // 提交请求
        meetingSignIn(this.stateForm).then((response) => {
          this.$message.success("修改成功");
          this.dialogFormVisible = false;
          this.stateFormReset();
          this.initMeetingInfo();
        });
      });
    },
    mergeDateAndSignInTime() {
      console.log("this.meetingForm.startTime----", this.meetingForm.startTime);
      console.log("this.stateForm.signIn--------", this.stateForm.signIn);
      const startTime = this.meetingForm.startTime;
      const signInTime = this.stateForm.signIn;
      // 1. 提取年月日部分
      const datePart = startTime.split("T")[0];
      // 2. 构造 ISO 格式时间字符串，并加上 +08:00 时区信息
      const mergedDateTimeStr = `${datePart}T${signInTime}:00+08:00`;
      // 3. 转成 Date 对象（正确识别为北京时间）
      const mergedDate = new Date(mergedDateTimeStr);
      return this.formatLocalTime(mergedDate);
    },
    formatLocalTime(date) {
      const year = date.getFullYear();
      const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0");
      const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
      const hours = String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, "0");
      const minutes = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, "0");
      // 获取当前时区偏移量（单位：分钟）
      const offsetMinutes = date.getTimezoneOffset();
      const offsetHours = String(
        Math.floor(Math.abs(offsetMinutes) / 60)
      ).padStart(2, "0");
      const offsetSign = offsetMinutes <= 0 ? "+" : "-";
      const offset = `${offsetSign}${offsetHours}:00`;
      return `${year}-${month}-${day}T${hours}:${minutes}:00${offset}`;
    },
  },
};
</script>

<script>
import treeselect from "@riophae/vue-treeselect";
import {
  listMeetingInfo,
  getMeetingInfo,
  delMeetingInfo,
  addMeetingInfo,
  updateMeetingInfo,
  getItems,
  publishMeeting,
} from "@/api/jufe/schoolMeetingInfo";
import TableSelect from "./TableSelect.vue";
import user from "@/store/modules/user";
import { deptTreeSelect } from "@/api/system/user";
import "@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css";
import {
  locationTree,
  locationAndBOardTree,
  tree,
} from "@/api/location/location";
export default {
  name: "MeetingInfo",
  components: { TableSelect, treeselect },
  dicts: ["meeting_status"],
  data() {
    return {
      meetDay: new Date(),
      startTimeRange: [
        new Date(2025, 5, 10, 0, 0),
        new Date(2025, 5, 10, 23, 59),
      ],
      user: user,
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      // 非单个禁用
      single: true,
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 会议信息表格数据
      meetingInfoList: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        name: null,
        state: null,
        startTime: null,
        initiator: [],
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {
        meetDay: new Date(),
        userData: [],
        initiator: [],
        startTimeRange: [
          new Date(2025, 5, 10, 0, 0),
          new Date(2025, 5, 10, 23, 59),
        ],
      },
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
        name: [
          { required: true, message: "会议主题不能为空", trigger: "blur" },
        ],
        meetDay: [
          { required: true, message: "会议日期不能为空", trigger: "blur" },
        ],
        startTimeRange: [
          { required: true, message: "会议时间不能为空", trigger: "blur" },
        ],
        details: [
          { required: true, message: "会议內容不能为空", trigger: "blur" },
        ],
        initiator: [
          { required: true, message: "会议發起人不能为空", trigger: "blur" },
        ],
        userData: [
          { required: true, message: "參会人員不能为空", trigger: "blur" },
        ],
        locationId: [
          { required: true, message: "会议地点不能为空", trigger: "blur" },
        ],
      },
      queryData: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        nickName: null,
        userName: null,
        deptId: null,
        status: 0,
        userType: 1,
      },
      userData: [],
      userTotal: 0,
      userTitleData: [
        {
          name: "姓名",
          prop: "nickName",
        },
        {
          name: "教职工号",
          prop: "userName",
        },
        {
          name: "所在院系/部门",
          prop: "deptName",
        },
      ],
      selUserShow: false,
      initiatorShow: false,
      initiator: [{ nickName: null, userName: null, userDeptName: null,userName:null}],
      locationList: [{ locationName: null, locationId: null }],
      deptOptions: [{ id: null, label: null, children: [] }],
      locationOptions: [{ id: null, label: null, type: null, children: [] }],
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
    this.getAllUserData();
    this.getDeptTree();
    this.getTreeselect();
  },
  computed: {
    processedLocationOptions() {
      return this.addIsDisabledFlag(this.locationOptions);
    },
  },
  methods: {
    addIsDisabledFlag(nodes) {
      return nodes.map((node) => {
        if (node.children && node.children.length > 0) {
          node.children = this.addIsDisabledFlag(node.children);
        } else if (!node.children && node.type !== "room") {
          node.isDisabled = true;
        }
        return node;
      });
    },
    startTimeRangePush() {
      this.form.startTimeRange = this.startTimeRange;
    },
    /** 查询会议信息列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listMeetingInfo(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.meetingInfoList = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    // 结束按钮
    cancel() {
      this.open = false;
      this.restdata();
    },
    restdata() {
      this.userTotal = 0;
      (this.initiator = [
        { nickName: null, userName: null, userDeptName: null,userName:null },
      ]),
        (this.meetDay = new Date());
      this.userData = [];
      this.queryData = {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        nickName: null,
        userName: null,
        deptId: null,
      };
      this.startTimeRange = [
        new Date(2025, 5, 10, 0, 0),
        new Date(2025, 5, 10, 23, 59),
      ];
      this.reset();
      this.resetSearchData();
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.form = {
        id: null,
        name: null,
        locationId: null,
        state: null,
        startTime: null,
        endTime: null,
        details: null,
        initiator: [{ nickName: null, teaUserNum: null, userDeptName: null,userName:null }],
        publish: "0",
        createBy: null,
        createTime: null,
        updateBy: null,
        updateTime: null,
        delFlag: null,
        userData: [],
        meetDay: "",
        startTimeRange: [
          new Date(2025, 5, 10, 0, 0),
          new Date(2025, 5, 10, 23, 59),
        ],
      };
      this.resetForm("form");
      console.log("user!!!!!",this.user);
      this.form.initiator = [
        {
          nickName: (this.form.initiator[0].nickName =
            this.user.state.nickName == null
              ? this.user.state.name
              : this.user.state.nickName),
          teaUserNum: (this.form.initiator[0].teaUserNum =
            this.user.state.name),
          userDeptName: (this.form.initiator[0].userDeptName =
            this.user.state.deptName),
          userName:(this.form.initiator[0].userName =
            this.user.state.name)
        },
      ];
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map((item) => item.id);
      this.single = selection.length != undefined && selection.length !== 1;
      this.multiple = selection.length == undefined && !selection.length;
    },
    /** 新增按钮操作 */
    handleAdd(id) {
      this.reset();
      this.open = true;
      this.title = "添加会议信息";
    },
    /** 修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset();
      const id = row.id || this.ids;
      getMeetingInfo(id)
        .then((response) => {
          this.startTimeRange = [
            this.formatDateHm(new Date(response.data.startTime)),
            this.formatDateHm(new Date(response.data.endTime)),
          ];
          response.data.meetDay = this.formatDateymd(
            new Date(response.data.startTime)
          );
          this.form = response.data;
          // 设置发起人信息
          this.form.initiator = [
            {
              nickName: this.form.initiator.nickName,
              teaUserNum: this.form.initiator.userId,
              userName: this.form.initiator.userName,
              userDeptName: this.form.initiator.dept.deptName,
            },
          ];
          this.open = true;
          this.title = "修改会议信息";
        })
        .catch((error) => {
          console.error("获取会议详情失败:", error);
          this.$modal.msgError("加载会议信息失败，请稍后再试");
        });
    },
    formatDateHm(date) {
      const hours = String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, "0");
      const minutes = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, "0");
      return `${hours}:${minutes}`;
    },
    formatDateymd(date) {
      const year = date.getFullYear();
      const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0");
      const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
      return `${year}-${month}-${day}`;
    },
   async submitForm() {
  try {
    // 验证表单
    const valid = await new Promise((resolve) => {
      this.$refs["form"].validate((valid) => resolve(valid));
    });
    if (!valid) return;
    console.log("提交表单:", this.form);
    // 创建深拷贝对象，避免污染原始数据
    const submitForm = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.form));
    // 处理时间范围
    submitForm.startTime = this.startTimeRange[0];
    submitForm.endTime = this.startTimeRange[1];
    // 安全处理 initiator
    if (submitForm.initiator && Array.isArray(submitForm.initiator) && submitForm.initiator.length > 0) {
      submitForm.initiator = submitForm.initiator[0].userName || '';
    } else {
      submitForm.initiator = '';
      // 可选提示
      // this.$modal.msgWarning("请选择发起人");
      // return;
    }
    // 提交请求
    if (submitForm.id != null) {
      await updateMeetingInfo(submitForm);
      this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
    } else {
      await addMeetingInfo(submitForm);
      this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
    }
    this.open = false;
    this.restdata();
    this.getList();
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("提交表单时发生错误:", error);
    this.$modal.msgError("提交失败，请检查输入内容");
  }
},
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const ids = row.id || this.ids;
      this.$modal
        .confirm('是否确认删除会议信息编号为"' + ids + '"的数据项？')
        .then(function () {
          return delMeetingInfo(ids);
        })
        .then(() => {
          this.getList();
          this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
        });
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.download(
        "schoolMeetingInfo/meetingInfo/export",
        {
          ...this.queryParams,
        },
        `meetingInfo_${new Date().getTime()}.xlsx`
      );
    },
    selUser() {
      this.resetSearchData();
      this.userData = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.userData));
      this.form.userData = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.form.userData));
      this.$refs.userSelect.init(this.form.userData);
      this.selUserShow = true;
    },
    addTableData() {
      const queryData = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.queryData));
      queryData.pageNum = null;
      queryData.pageSize = 9999;
      getItems(queryData).then((response) => {
        this.$refs.userSelect.concatSelectDate(response.rows);
      });
    },
    selinitiator() {
      this.resetSearchData();
      // this.form.initiator = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.form.initiator));
      this.$refs.initiator.init(this.form.initiator);
      this.initiatorShow = true;
    },
    getAllUserData() {
      this.dialogLoading = true;
      getItems(this.queryData).then((response) => {
        this.userData = response.rows;
        this.userTotal = response.total;
        this.dialogLoading = false;
      });
    },
    getUserData(data) {
      this.queryData.pageNum = data.pageNum;
      this.queryData.pageSize = data.pageSize;
      this.getAllUserData();
    },
    sureUserSelect(data) {
      this.form.userData = data;
      this.$refs.form.validateField("userData");
    },
    sureinitiator(data) {
      this.form.initiator[0] = data[0];
      this.$refs.form.validateField("initiator");
    },
    /** 【人员】选择器校验未通过 */
    noUserValidate(data) {
      this.$message.error("每个寝室最多添加16名人员！");
    },
    noinitiatorValidate(data) {
      this.$message.error("只能选择1名人员！");
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作，更新【人员】选择器数据 */
    handleSearch() {
      this.queryData.pageNum = 1;
      this.getAllUserData();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作，更新【人员】选择器数据 */
    resetSearchData() {
      this.resetForm("queryData");
      this.queryData = {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        nickName: null,
        userName: null,
        deptId: null,
      };
      this.handleSearch();
    },
    getDeptTree() {
      deptTreeSelect().then((response) => {
        this.deptOptions = response.data;
      });
    },
    /** 转换部门数据结构 */
    normalizerDept(node) {
      const normalized = {
        id: node.id,
        label: node.label,
      };
      // 只有当 children 是一个非空数组时才添加
      if (Array.isArray(node.children) && node.children.length > 0) {
        normalized.children = node.children;
      }
      return normalized;
    },
    /** 查询位置下拉树结构 */
    getTreeselect() {
      // tree({}).then((response) => {
      //   console.log("位置下拉树结构--->>>", response);
      // });
      locationAndBOardTree({}).then((response) => {
        this.locationOptions = response.data;
        console.log("2222222222222--->>>", this.locationOptions);
      });
    },
    getLabelById(id) {
      const findLabel = (options, id) => {
        for (const option of options) {
          if (option.id === id) {
            return option.label;
          }
          if (option.children && option.children.length > 0) {
            const result = findLabel(option.children, id);
            if (result) return result;
          }
        }
        return null;
      };
      return findLabel(this.locationOptions, id) || "未知地点";
    },
    stateColor(state) {
      const colorMap = {
        0: "#0099ff", // 蓝色 - 未发布
        1: "#f59a23", // 橙色 - 已发布
        2: "#04c717", // 绿色 - 已开始
        3: "#909399", // 深灰色 - 已结束
        4: "#3d0505", // 灰色 - 已结束
      };
      return colorMap[state] || "#303133"; // 默认颜色
    },
    buttonText(state) {
      const statusTextMap = {
        0: "发布", // 未发布
        1: "取消", // 已发布
        2: "编辑", // 已开始
        3: "编辑",
        4: "    ",
      };
      return statusTextMap[state] || "";
    },
    shouldShowButton(state) {
      return ["0", "1", "2", "3", "4"].includes(state);
    },
    handleAction(row, type) {
      console.log("当前操作的会议信息:", row.state);
      type ? type : (type = row.state);
      switch (type) {
        case "0":
          // 处理发布逻辑
          this.$modal
            .confirm('是否确认发布"' + row.name + '"会议？')
            .then(() => {
              return publishMeeting(row.id, 1, row.startTime).then(() => {
                this.$modal.msgSuccess("发布成功");
              });
            })
            .then(() => {
              this.getList();
            });
          break;
        case "1":
          // 处理解取消逻辑
          this.$modal
            .confirm('是否确认取消发布"' + row.name + '"会议？')
            .then(() => {
              return publishMeeting(row.id, 0).then(() => {
                this.$modal.msgError("已取消");
              });
            })
            .then(() => {
              this.getList();
            });
          break;
        case "2":
          // 处理查看详情逻辑
          console.log("查看会议详情:", row);
          break;
        default:
          // 结束会议
          this.$modal
            .confirm('是否确认结束会议"' + row.name + '"的会议？')
            .then(() => {
              return publishMeeting(row.id, 4).then(() => {
                this.$modal.msgSuccess("结束成功");
              });
            })
            .then(() => {
              this.getList();
            })
            .catch(() => {});
          break;
      }
    },
    /** 会议详情操作 */
    meetingDetail(row, type) {
      const meetingId = row.id;
      const validType = type === 1 ? 1 : 0;
      this.$router.push({
        name: "DetailPage",
        params: {
          meetingId,
        },
        query: {
          type: validType,
        },
      });
    },
  },
};
</script>
<style scoped lang="scss">
.button-group {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; /* 定义三列，每列占据1/3宽度 */
  .el-button {
    justify-self: center; /* 按钮水平居中 */
    width: 100%; /* 按钮宽度占满所在单元格 */
  }
  .el-button:nth-child(2) {
    margin: 0;
    grid-area: 1 / 2;
    display: block;
  }
  .el-button:nth-child(3) {
    margin: 0;
    grid-area: 1 / 3;
    display: block;
  }
}
</style>
<style lang="scss">
.meeting-details-tooltip {
  max-width: 360px;
  white-space: normal;
  word-break: break-all;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}
</style>
<template>
  <el-dialog
    :title="`请选择${name}`"
    :visible="dialogVisible"
    v-loading="loading"
    :close-on-click-modal="false"
    append-to-body
    width="60%"
    :before-close="handleClose">
    <div>
      <div>
        <slot name="filterSlot"></slot>
        <div class="addAllBtn">
          <el-button type="primary" v-if="CanAddAll" size="mini" @click="handleAddAll">添加全部</el-button>
        </div>
        <el-table
          :data="tableData"
          max-height="350"
          style="width: 100%">
          <el-table-column type="index" label="序号" width="55" align="center">
<!--            <template #default="scope">-->
<!--              <div>-->
<!--                {{ (queryParams.pageNum -1) *queryParams.pageSize + scope.$index +1 }}-->
<!--              </div>-->
<!--            </template>-->
          </el-table-column>
          <el-table-column
            v-for="item in tableTitles"
            :key="item.prop"
            :prop="item.prop"
            :label="item.name"
            show-overflow-tooltip
            min-width="150">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <span v-if="item.isDict">{{ scope.row[item.prop] | dictFilter(scope.row,item,that) }}</span>
              <span v-else>{{ scope.row[item.prop] }}</span>
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
          <el-table-column
            fixed="right"
            label="操作"
            width="130">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleAdd(scope.row)"
                         :disabled="isDoorDisable(scope.row)">添加至下方列表
              </el-button>
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
        </el-table>
        <pagination v-show="tableTotal > 0" :total="tableTotal" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                    @pagination="getTableData" />
      </div>
      <div>
        <div style="display: flex;justify-content: space-between;align-items: center;">
          <p class="sel-title"> 已选择{{ name }}</p>
          <el-button type="primary" size="mini" @click="handleDeleteAll">删除全部</el-button>
        </div>
        <el-table
          :data="selData"
          max-height="350"
          style="width: 100%">
          <el-table-column
            type="index"
            label="序号"
            align="center"
            width="50">
          </el-table-column>
          <el-table-column
            v-for="item in tableTitles"
            :key="item.prop"
            :prop="item.prop"
            :label="item.name"
            show-overflow-tooltip
            min-width="150">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <span v-if="item.isDict">{{ scope.row[item.prop] | dictFilter(scope.row,item,that) }}</span>
              <span v-else>{{ scope.row[item.prop] }}</span>
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
          <el-table-column
            fixed="right"
            label="操作"
            width="130">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleDelete(scope.row)">移除
              </el-button>
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
        </el-table>
      </div>
    </div>
    <span slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
      <el-button @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
      <el-button type="primary" @click="sure">确 定</el-button>
    </span>
  </el-dialog>
</template>
<script>
export default {
  props: {
    /* dialog是否显示 */
    dialogVisible: {
      required: true,
      type: Boolean,
      default: false,
    },
    /* 名称 */
    name: {
      required: true,
      type: String,
      default: '',
    },
    /* id的key值，用于保存添加的数据 */
    idKey: {
      require:true,
      type: String,
      default: '',
    },
    /* 表格 表头数据 */
    tableTitle: {
      required: true,
      type: Array,
      default: [],
    },
    /* 表格数据 */
    tableData: {
      required: true,
      type: Array,
      default: [],
    },
    /* 表格全部数据条数 */
    tableTotal: {
      required: true,
      type: Number,
      default: 0,
    },
    /* 表格选中数据 */
    tableSelData: {
      required: true,
      type: Array||String,
    },
    /* 可选择最大数量
    *  当【max】有值时应隐藏添加全部按钮
    * */
    max: {
      type: Number,
      default: null,
    },
    /*
     * 添加按钮点击时的校验字段，默认一类只能选择一个，
     * 添加全部时不校验，当【addValidate】有值时应隐藏添加全部按钮
    */
    addValidate: {
      type: String,
      default: '',
    },
    /* 是否展示添加全部按钮 */
    CanAddAll: {
      type: Boolean,
      default: true,
    },
  },
  watch:{
    // tableSelData(){
    //   this.selData=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.tableSelData));
    // },
    tableTitle(){
      this.tableTitles=this.tableTitle;
    }
  },
  filters:{
    dictFilter(val,row,column,that){
      return that.selectDictLabel(column.DictsList, val)
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      that: this, // 保存this以便filter中使用
      loading:false,
      selData:JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.tableSelData)),
      tableTitles:this.tableTitle,
      queryParams:{
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
      },
    };
  },
  created() {
    console.log(this.tableTitles);
    this.tableTitles.map(item =>{
      if (item.isDict){
        this.getDicts(item.Dicts).then(response => {
          item.DictsList = response.data;
        })
      }
    })
  },
  mounted() {
  },
  methods: {
    // 提供给父组件，初始化方法
    init(data){
      this.selData = data;
      this.queryParams = {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
      }
    },
    // 提供给父组件，开启loading
    openLoading(){
      this.loading = false;
    },
    // 提供给父组件，关闭loading
    closeLoading(){
      this.loading = false;
    },
    handleClose(done) {
      this.$confirm('确认关闭？')
        .then(_ => {
          done(
            this.$emit('update:dialogVisible', false)
          );
        })
        .catch(_ => {});
    },
    isDoorDisable(row) {
      let flag = false
      this.selData.forEach(item => {
        if (item[this.idKey] == row[this.idKey]) {
          flag = true
        }
      })
      return flag
    },
    getTableData(){
      // 调取父组件方法，获取全部分页数据
      this.$emit('getTableData',this.queryParams);
    },
    // 添加全部
    handleAddAll(){
      // 调取父组件方法，获取全部分页数据
      this.$emit('addTableData');
      // 更改传入参数
    },
    // 删除全部
    handleDeleteAll(){
      this.selData = []
    },
    // 添加单个
    handleAdd(row) {
      let flag = false
      this.selData.forEach(item => {
        if (item[this.idKey] == row[this.idKey]) {
          flag = true
        }
      })
      let types = []
      /*
       * 当开启addValidate，校验当前传入字段类型，只能选择一种，
       * 例：电表数据【插排电表，照明电表】一类只能选择一个添加
      */
      if (this.addValidate){
        this.selData.forEach(item => {
          types.push(item[this.addValidate])
        })
      }
      if (types.includes(row[this.addValidate])) {
        // 校验未通过，返回给父组件信息，父组件进行提示
        this.$emit('noValidate', row);
        return
      }
      if (this.max&&this.selData.length>this.max){
        // 校验未通过，返回给父组件信息，父组件进行提示
        this.$emit('noValidate', row);
        return
      }
      if (!flag) {
        this.selData.push(row)
      }
    },
    // 删除单个
    handleDelete(row) {
      const arr = this.selData
      let id1 = arr.findIndex(item => item[this.idKey] === row[this.idKey]);
      this.selData.splice(id1, 1)
    },
   concatSelectDate(data) {
  this.selData = this.selData.concat(data);
  // 使用 Map 根据 id 去重，保留最后一个出现的元素
  const seen = new Map();
  this.selData.forEach(item => {
    seen.set(item[this.idKey], item);  // 以 id 为 key，value 是整个对象
  });
  this.selData = Array.from(seen.values());
},
    // 确认
    sure(){
      /*let types = []
      /!*
       * 当开启addValidate，校验当前传入字段类型，只能选择一种，
       * 例：电表数据【插排电表，照明电表】一类只能选择一个添加
      *!/
      if (this.addValidate){
        this.selData.forEach(item => {
          types.push(item[this.addValidate])
        })
      }*/
      if (this.max&&this.selData.length>this.max){
        // 校验未通过，返回给父组件信息，父组件进行提示
        this.$emit('noValidate', null);
        return
      }
      this.$emit('sureSelect', this.selData);
      this.$emit('update:dialogVisible', false)
    }
  }
};
</script>
<style scoped lang="scss">
.addAllBtn{
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.sel-title{
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 500;
}
</style>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form
      ref="queryForm"
      size="small"
      :model="queryForm"
      label-width="auto"
      :inline="true"
    >
      <el-form-item prop="queryDate">
        <el-date-picker
          v-model="queryForm.queryDate"
          type="daterange"
          clearable
          :picker-options="dateRangeOptions"
          range-separator="至"
          start-placeholder="开始日期"
          end-placeholder="结束日期"
          @change="handleDateChange"
        />
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <el-row :gutter="20">
      <el-col :span="8">
        <el-card>
          <div class="text-center">
            <h2>
              <count-to
                :start-val="0"
                :end-val="meetingTotal"
                :duration="3600"
                class="card-panel-num"
              />
            </h2>
            <span>会议数量</span>
          </div>
        </el-card>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="8">
        <el-card>
          <div class="text-center">
            <h2>
              <count-to
                :start-val="0"
                :end-val="actualAttendeeTotal"
                :duration="3600"
                class="card-panel-num"
              />
            </h2>
            <span>实际参会人员统计</span>
          </div>
        </el-card>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="8">
        <el-card>
          <div class="text-center">
            <h2>
              <count-to
                :start-val="0"
                :end-val="averageAttendanceRate"
                :duration="3600"
                :decimals="2"
                class="card-panel-num"
              />%
            </h2>
            <span>平均参会率</span>
          </div>
        </el-card>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <!-- 会议数量趋势-折线图 -->
    <el-card style="margin-top: 20px">
      <div ref="lineChart" style="height: 400px"></div>
    </el-card>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import CountTo from "vue-count-to";
import * as echarts from "echarts";
import { getMeetingStatistics } from "@/api/jufe/schoolMeetingStatistics";
export default {
  name: "Statistics",
  components: {
    CountTo,
  },
  data() {
    return {
      dateRangeMin: null,
      dateRangeOptions: {
        onPick: ({ minDate, maxDate }) => {
          this.dateRangeMin = minDate;
        },
        disabledDate: (time) => {
          if (this.dateRangeMin) {
            const base = this.dateRangeMin.getTime();
            const span = 30 * 24 * 3600 * 1000;
            return time.getTime() > base + span || time.getTime() < base - span;
          }
          return false;
        },
      },
      queryForm: {
        queryDate: (() => {
          const end = new Date();
          const start = new Date(end);
          start.setDate(end.getDate() - 6);
          return [start, end];
        })(),
      },
      // 会议数量
      meetingTotal: 0,
      // 实际参会人员统计
      actualAttendeeTotal: 0,
      // 平均参会率
      averageAttendanceRate: 0,
      // 会议数量趋势折线图数据
      mettingTrendData: {
        data: [],
        meetingNum: [],
      },
      lineChart: null,
    };
  },
  watch: {
    "queryForm.queryDate"(val) {
      if (!val || !val.length) {
        this.dateRangeMin = null;
      }
    },
  },
  mounted() {
    this.calculateChartDate();
    this.getMeetingStatisticsInfo();
    this.initLineChart();
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询统计信息 */
    getMeetingStatisticsInfo() {
      getMeetingStatistics(this.queryForm).then((response) => {
        const data = response.data;
        console.log(data);
        if (response.code == 200) {
          this.meetingTotal = data.meetingTotal;
          this.actualAttendeeTotal = data.actualAttendeeTotal;
          this.averageAttendanceRate = data.averageAttendanceRate;
          this.mettingTrendData.meetingNum = data.meetingTotalList;
        }
        this.updateLineChartData();
      });
    },
    /** 初始化折线图 */
    initLineChart() {
      this.lineChart = echarts.init(this.$refs.lineChart);
      this.lineChart.setOption({
        title: {
          text: "会议数量趋势",
        },
        tooltip: {
          trigger: "item",
          formatter: "会议数量：{c}",
        },
        xAxis: {
          type: "category",
          data: this.mettingTrendData.data,
        },
        yAxis: {
          type: "value",
        },
        series: [
          {
            name: "会议数量",
            data: this.mettingTrendData.meetingNum,
            type: "line",
          },
        ],
      });
    },
    /** 日期选择器改变时触发 */
    handleDateChange() {
      if (!this.queryForm.queryDate || !this.queryForm.queryDate.length) {
        return;
      }
      this.calculateChartDate();
      this.getMeetingStatisticsInfo();
    },
    /** 图表数据更新 */
    updateLineChartData() {
      this.lineChart.setOption({
        xAxis: {
          data: this.mettingTrendData.data,
        },
        series: [
          {
            data: this.mettingTrendData.meetingNum,
          },
        ],
      });
    },
    /** 计算图标日期 */
    calculateChartDate() {
      if (!this.queryForm.queryDate || !this.queryForm.queryDate.length) {
        return;
      }
      var startDate = this.queryForm.queryDate[0];
      var endDate = this.queryForm.queryDate[1];
      // 生成横坐标日期数组，仅显示日
      const days = [];
      const current = new Date(startDate);
      while (current <= endDate) {
        days.push(current.getDate());
        current.setDate(current.getDate() + 1);
      }
      this.mettingTrendData.data = days;
    },
  },
};
</script>
<template>
    <div class="app-container">
        <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch"
            label-width="68px">
            <el-form-item label="会议主题" prop="meetingName">
                <el-input v-model="queryParams.meetingName" placeholder="请输入会议主题" clearable
                    @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" />
            </el-form-item>
            <el-form-item label="会议时间" prop="meetingDate">
                <el-date-picker clearable v-model="queryParams.meetingDate" type="date" value-format="yyyy-MM-dd"
                    placeholder="请选择会议时间">
                </el-date-picker>
            </el-form-item>
            <el-form-item label="会议地点" prop="locationName">
                <el-input v-model="queryParams.locationName" placeholder="请输入会议地点" clearable
                    @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" />
            </el-form-item>
            <el-form-item>
                <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
                <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
            </el-form-item>
        </el-form>
        <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="tableData">
            <el-table-column label="序号" align="center" width="55" type="index" />
            <el-table-column label="会议主题" align="center" prop="meetingName" />
            <el-table-column label="会议时间" align="center" prop="meetingDate">
                <template slot-scope="scope">
                    {{ scope.row.meetingDate }} {{ formatDateMinute(scope.row.meetingStartTime) }}-{{ formatDateMinute(scope.row.meetingEndTime) }}
                </template>
            </el-table-column>
            <el-table-column label="会议地点" align="center" prop="locationName" />
            <el-table-column label="未签到人数" align="center" prop="unSignNum">
                <template slot-scope="scope">
                    <el-button type="text" @click="showUnSignDialog(scope.row.id)">{{ scope.row.unSignNum }}</el-button>
                </template>
            </el-table-column>
            <el-table-column label="已签到人数" align="center" prop="signNum" />
            <el-table-column label="通知发起时间" align="center" prop="createTime" />
        </el-table>
        <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
            :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize" @pagination="getList" />
        <el-dialog title="未签到人员列表" :visible.sync="dialogVisible" width="50%">
            <el-table v-loading="unSignLoading" :data="unSignTableData">
                <el-table-column label="序号" align="center" width="55" type="index" />
                <el-table-column label="姓名" align="center" prop="nickName" />
                <el-table-column label="教职工号" align="center" prop="userName" />
                <el-table-column label="所在院系/部门" align="center" prop="deptName" />
                <el-table-column label="签到状态" align="center" prop="state">
                    <template slot-scope="scope">
                        <dict-tag :options="dict.type.metting_state" :value="scope.row.state" />
                    </template>
                </el-table-column>
            </el-table>
            <pagination v-show="unSignTableTotal > 0" :total="unSignTableTotal" :page.sync="unSignQueryParams.pageNum"
                :limit.sync="unSignQueryParams.pageSize" @pagination="getUnSignList" />
            <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
                <el-button @click="dialogVisible = false">关闭</el-button>
            </div>
        </el-dialog>
    </div>
</template>
<script>
import { warnlist, unSignList } from '@/api/jufe/schoolMeetingWarn'
import { parseTime } from '@/utils/chenrise'
export default {
    name: 'SchoolMeetingWarn',
    dicts: ["metting_state"],
    data() {
        return {
            queryParams: {
                meetingName: '',
                meetingDate: '',
                locationName: '',
                pageNum: 1,
                pageSize: 10,
            },
            showSearch: true,
            loading: false,
            tableData: [],
            total: 0,
            dialogVisible: false,
            unSignTableData: [],
            unSignTableTotal: 0,
            unSignQueryParams: {
                warnId: null,
                pageNum: 1,
                pageSize: 10,
            },
            unSignLoading: false,
        }
    },
    created() {
        this.handleQuery()
    },
    methods: {
        handleQuery() {
            this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
            this.getList()
        },
        formatDateMinute(time, format = '{h}:{i}') {
            return parseTime(time, format)
        },
        resetQuery() {
            this.resetForm("queryForm");
            this.handleQuery();
        },
        getList() {
            this.loading = true
            warnlist(this.queryParams).then(response => {
                this.tableData = response.rows;
                this.total = response.total;
                this.loading = false;
            })
        },
        getUnSignList() {
            this.unSignLoading = true
            unSignList(this.unSignQueryParams).then(response => {
                this.unSignTableData = response.rows;
                this.unSignTableTotal = response.total;
                this.unSignLoading = false;
            })
        },
        showUnSignDialog(warnId) {
            this.unSignQueryParams.warnId = warnId
            this.getUnSignList()
            this.dialogVisible = true
        },
    },
}
</script>
<template>
    <div>
        <el-dialog title="选择房间" :visible.sync="openLocationList" width="1000px"    append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
            <div class="el-dialog-div" style="height:680px;">
                <div class="leftdiv" style = "max-height:640px;overflow: auto">
                    <div class="head-container">
                    <el-input v-model="locationName" placeholder="请输入楼层名称" clearable size="small" prefix-icon="el-icon-search"
                        style="margin-bottom: 20px" />
                    </div>
                    <el-tree :data="locationOptions" :props="defaultProps" :expand-on-click-node="false"
                    :filter-node-method="filterNode" ref="tree" node-key="id" default-expand-all highlight-current
                    @node-click="handleNodeClick" />
                </div>
                <div class="rightdiv" >
                    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch" label-width="68px"  style="margin-left: 20px;">
                    <el-form-item label="教室名称" prop="roomName">
                        <el-input v-model="queryParams.roomName" placeholder="请输入教室名称" clearable @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" />
                    </el-form-item>
                    <el-form-item label="教室编号" prop="roomCode">
                        <el-input v-model="queryParams.roomCode" placeholder="请输教室编号" clearable
                        @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery" />
                    </el-form-item> 
                    <el-form-item>
                        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
                        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
                        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-submit" size="mini"  @click="handleSetRoomSubmit">确定</el-button> 
                    </el-form-item>
                    </el-form> 
                    <el-table  :row-key='getRowkey' v-loading="loading" :data="roomList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange" style="height:500px;overflow:auto">
                    <el-table-column :reserve-selection="true" type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
                    <el-table-column type="index" width="50" align="center" label="序号" />
                    <el-table-column label="教室编号" align="center" prop="roomCode" width="100" />
                    <el-table-column label="教室名称" align="center" prop="roomName" />
                    <el-table-column label="教室别名" align="center" prop="roomBm" />
                    </el-table> 
                    <pagination v-show="total>0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                        @pagination="getList" />
                </div>
            </div>
      </el-dialog> 
    </div>
