  <script>
    import {
      listRoom,
    } from "@/api/jufe/room";
    import {
      listTeaInfo,
    } from "@/api/jufe/teaInfo";
    import {
      locationTree
    } from '@/api/location/location'
    import {
      deptTreeSelect
    } from "@/api/system/user";
    import Treeselect from "@riophae/vue-treeselect";
    import "@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css";
    import { getToken } from "@/utils/auth";
    export default {
      name: "BuildRoom",
      props: {
        buildRooms: null,
        visible: {
            type: Boolean,
            default () {
                return false
            },
            rowkey:{
                type:String,
                default:'id'
            }
        },
      },
      dicts: ['device_room_status'],
      components: {
        Treeselect
      },
      data() {
        return {
            openLocationList: true,
          // 部门树选项
          deptOptions: undefined,
          locationOptions: [],
          questionForm: {},
          // 遮罩层
          loading: true,
          loadingRoomPower: false,
          // 选中数组
          ids: [],
          // 房间实体
          rooms: [], 
          // 选中的双向数据
          transvalue: [],
          // 非单个禁用
          single: true,
          single1: true,
          // 非多个禁用
          multiple: true,
          // 显示搜索条件
          showSearch: true,
          // 总条数
          total: 0,
          // 班牌信息表格数据
          roomList: [],
          // 弹出层标题
          title: "",
          // 是否显示弹出层
          open: false,
          openLock: false,
          openRoomPower: false, 
          // 查询参数
          queryParams: {
            pageNum: 1,
            pageSize: 10,
            roomName: null,
            roomCode: null,
          },
          queryParamsRoomPower: {
            pageNum: 1,
            pageSize: 10,
            powerCode: null,
            name: null,
            powerIp: null,
          },
          // 表单参数
          form: {},
          // 表单校验
          rules: {
          },
          defaultProps: {
            children: "children",
            label: "label"
          },
          // 楼层名称
          locationName: undefined,
          lockValues: [],
          // 用户导入参数
          upload: {
            // 是否显示弹出层（用户导入）
            open: false,
            // 弹出层标题（用户导入）
            title: "",
            // 是否禁用上传
            isUploading: false,
            // 是否更新已经存在的用户数据
            updateSupport: 0,
            memberType: 1,
            // 设置上传的请求头部
            headers: {
              Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken()
            }, 
            // 上传的地址
            url: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API + "/jufe/room/importData"
          },
        };
      },
      watch: {
        // 根据名称筛选树
        locationName(val) {
          this.$refs.tree.filter(val);
        }
      },
      created() {
        this.getTreeselect();
        this.getList();
        listTeaInfo().then(response => {
          this.teaInfoList = response.rows;
        });
        this.getDeptTree();
      },
      methods: {
        getRowkey(row){
          return row.roomId
        },
        // 关闭方法
        handleClose() {
            this.$emit('update:visible', false)
        },
        openDialogLock() {
          this.openLock = true
        },
        openDialogRoomPower() {
          this.openRoomPower = true;
          this.getRoomPowerList();
        },
        /** 查询教室信息列表 */
        getList() {
          this.loading = false;
          listRoom(this.queryParams).then(response => {
            this.roomList = response.rows; 
            this.total = response.total;
            this.loading = false;
          });
        }, 
        // 表单重置
        reset() {
          this.form = {
            roomId: null,
            roomName: null,
            roomCode: null,
          };
          this.resetForm("form");
        },
        /** 搜索按钮操作 */
        handleQuery() {
          this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
          this.getList();
          this.handleSelectionChange(this.buildRooms)
        },
        /** 重置按钮操作 */
        resetQuery() {
          this.resetForm("queryForm");
          this.queryParams.locationId = undefined;
          this.$refs.tree.setCurrentKey(null);
          this.handleQuery();
        },
        // 多选框选中数据
        handleSelectionChange(selection) {
          this.multipleSelection = selection
          this.ids = selection.map(item => item.roomId)
          this.single = selection.length !== 1
          this.multiple = !selection.length
          this.rooms = selection.map(item => item);
        },
        // 多选框选中数据
        handleSelectionChangeRoomPower(selection) {
          this.idsRoomPower = selection.map(item => item.powerId)
          this.single1 = selection.length !== 1
        },
        /** 查询位置下拉树结构 */
        getTreeselect() {
          locationTree().then(response => {
            this.locationOptions = response.data
          })
        },
        // 筛选节点
        filterNode(value, data) {
          if (!value) return true;
          return data.label.indexOf(value) !== -1;
        },
        // 节点单击事件
        handleNodeClick(data) {
          this.queryParams.locationId = data.id;
          this.handleQuery();
        },
        /** 查询部门下拉树结构 */
        getDeptTree() {
          deptTreeSelect().then(response => {
            this.deptOptions = response.data;
          });
        }, 
        handleSetRoomSubmit(){
            this.$emit('buildRoomChang', this.rooms);
            this.handleClose();
        }
      }
    };
  </script>

      float: left;
    }
    .rightdiv {

      flex: 1;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      font-size: 14px;
      padding-right: 8px;
    }
  </style>

      <right-toolbar :showSearch.sync="showSearch" @queryTable="getList"></right-toolbar>

    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="infoList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
      <el-table-column type="index" width="50" align="center" label="序号" />
      <el-table-column label="任务名称" align="center" prop="taskName" />
      <el-table-column label="控制教室" align="center" prop="roomNames" />
      <el-table-column label="任务周期" align="center" prop="taskCycle">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <dict-tag :options="dict.type.task_cycle" :value="scope.row.taskCycle" />
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="计划开始执行时间" align="center" prop="taskStartTime" width="180">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          {{parseTime(scope.row.taskStartTime,"{y}-{m}-{d}")}}
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="计划结束执行时间" align="center" prop="taskEndTime" width="180">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          {{scope.row.taskStatus!='4'?parseTime(scope.row.taskEndTime,"{y}-{m}-{d}"):parseTime(scope.row.taskEndTime,"{y}-{m}-{d} {h}:{i}:{s}")}}
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="状态" align="center" prop="taskStatus">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <dict-tag :options="dict.type.task_status" :value="scope.row.taskStatus" />
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)"
             v-if="scope.row.taskStatus==1">编辑</el-button>
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-detail" @click="handleDeteil(scope.row)"
            >查看</el-button>
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-delete" @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
             v-if="scope.row.taskStatus==1">删除</el-button>
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-setting" @click="handleCancelTask(scope.row)"
             v-if="scope.row.taskStatus==2">强制结束</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total>0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
      @pagination="getList" />
    <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="open" width="750px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-form ref="taskSaveInfoForm" :model="taskSaveInfoForm" :rules="rules" label-width="120px" class="formCss">
        <el-form-item label="任务名称" prop="taskName">
          <el-input v-model="taskSaveInfoForm.taskName" placeholder="请输入任务名称" :disabled="operType==2" />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="教室" prop="roomRefs" :rules="[{ required: true, message: '请选择教室', trigger: 'blur' }]">
          <el-button type="primary" @click="handleBuildRoom" :title="roomSelTitle" v-if="operType!=2">{{roomSelTitle}}
          </el-button>
          <div v-for="item in buildRoomShow">{{item}}</div>
          <!-- <el-input v-model="form.buildPos" placeholder="请输入楼栋" :disabled="title=='查看分组信息' || status=='2'" /> -->
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="任务周期" prop="taskCycle" :rules="[{ required: true, message: '请选择任务周期', trigger: 'blur' }]">
          <el-select v-model="taskSaveInfoForm.taskCycle" placeholder="请选择任务周期" :disabled="operType==2"
            @change="changeDeviceTypeValue($event)">
            <el-option v-for="dict in dict.type.task_cycle" :key="dict.value" :label="dict.label" :value="dict.value">
            </el-option>
          </el-select>
          <el-button @click="addCycleDates" type="primary" v-if="visSelectDate&&operType!=2" style="margin-left:20px">新增
          </el-button>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="" v-if="visSelectWeekDay" prop="checkboxGroupVal">
          <!--          按周-->
          <el-checkbox-group size="small" v-model="checkboxGroup">
            <el-checkbox :disabled="operType==2" @change="val =>changeWeekDaySel(val,dict)"
              v-for="dict in dict.type.week_days_sel" :label="dict.label" :value="dict.value" :key="dict.value"
              style="margin-right:8px">{{dict.label}} </el-checkbox>
          </el-checkbox-group>
        </el-form-item>
        <template v-if="visSelectDate">
          <!--          自定义-->
          <el-form-item v-for="(cycleDate, index) in taskSaveInfoForm.cycleDates" :key="cycleDate.key"
            :prop="'cycleDates.' + index + '.value'" :rules="[{
              required: true,
              message: '日期不能为空',
              trigger: 'blur'}
            ]">
            <el-date-picker v-model="cycleDate.value" type="daterange" range-separator="至" start-placeholder="开始日期"
              end-placeholder="结束日期" :disabled="operType==2" format="yyyy-MM-dd" value-format="yyyy-MM-dd"
              >
            </el-date-picker>
            <el-button @click.prevent="removeCycleDates(cycleDate)" v-if="operType!=2" style="margin-left:20px">删除
            </el-button>
          </el-form-item>
        </template>
        <el-form-item label="计划执行时间" prop="startTimeAndEndTime"
                      :rules="[{ required: true, message: '请选择执行时间', trigger: 'blur' }]">
          <el-date-picker :disabled="operType==2" v-model="taskSaveInfoForm.startTimeAndEndTime" type="daterange"
                          @change='pickerTimeChange' format="yyyy-MM-dd" value-format="yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"
                          range-separator="-" :default-time="['00:00:00','23:59:59']" start-placeholder="开始日期" end-placeholder="结束日期">
          </el-date-picker>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="开启关闭时间">
          <el-button type="primary" v-if="operType!=2" @click="addTimeList" style="margin-left:20px">新增</el-button>
        </el-form-item>
        <template v-if="timeListInfoFlag">
          <el-form-item v-for="(timesone, index) in  taskSaveInfoForm.timeListInfo " :key="timesone.key"
            :prop="'timeListInfo.' + index + '.value'" :rules="{
              required: true,
              message: '时间不能为空',
              trigger: 'blur',
            }">
            <el-time-picker is-range arrow-control v-model="timesone.value" range-separator="至" start-placeholder="开始时间"
              end-placeholder="结束时间" placeholder="选择时间范围" :disabled="operType==2" format="HH:mm:ss"
              value-format="HH:mm:ss" >
            </el-time-picker>
            <el-button @click.prevent="removeTimeInfoList(timesone)" v-if="operType!=2" style="margin-left:20px">删除
            </el-button>
          </el-form-item>
        </template>
        <el-form-item label="备注" prop="remark">
          <el-input v-model="taskSaveInfoForm.remark" :disabled="operType==2" type="textarea" placeholder="请输入内容">
          </el-input>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm" v-if="operType !=2">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <BuildRoom v-if="visibleBuildRoom" :visible.sync="visibleBuildRoom" :buildRooms="taskSaveInfoForm.roomRefs"
      @buildRoomChang="buildRoomChang"></BuildRoom>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
  import {
    listInfo,
    getInfo,
    delInfo,
    addInfo,
    updateInfo,
    cancelTaskInfo
  } from "@/api/jufe/schtask";
  import {
    getBaseSetInfo,
    updateBaseSetInfo
  } from "@/api/jufe/basesetinfo";
  import BuildRoom from "@/views/jufe/schtask/buildRoomDialog";
  import {checkTaskDates} from "@/utils/validate";
  export default {
    name: "Info",
    components: {
      BuildRoom
    },
    dicts: ['task_status', 'task_cycle', 'week_days_sel'],
    data() {
      return {
        checkboxGroup: [],
        //周几
        // 遮罩层
        loading: true,
        // 选中数组
        ids: [],
        // 非单个禁用
        single: true,
        // 非多个禁用
        multiple: true,
        // 显示搜索条件
        showSearch: true,
        // 总条数
        total: 0,
        // 任务信息主表格数据
        infoList: [],
        //开始结束任务时间
        startTimeAndEndTime: [],
        // 弹出层标题
        title: "",
        //
        roomSelTitle: "请选择教室",
        // 是否显示弹出层
        open: false,
        openBaseSetInfo: false,
        // 查询参数
        queryParams: {
          pageNum: 1,
          pageSize: 10,
          taskName: null,
          deviceType: null,
          taskStatus: null
        },
        // 表单参数
        form: {},
        // 表单校验
        rules: {
          taskName: [{
              required: true,
              message: "任务名称不能为空",
              trigger: "blur"
            },
            {
              max: 100,
              message: '任务名称长度不能超过100',
              trigger: 'blur'
            }
          ],
          remark: [{
            max: 100,
            message: '备注长度不能超过100',
            trigger: 'blur'
          }],
          taskCycle: [{
            required: true,
            message: "请选择任务周期",
            trigger: "blur"
          }],
        },
        pickerOptions: {
          disabledDate: (time) => {
            return this.dealDisabledDate(time);
          }
        },
        //引入插件是否可见
        visibleBuildRoom: false,
        //选的的房间集合
        buildRoomShow: [],
        //房间集合
        buildRooms: [],
        //选择周几是否可见
        visSelectWeekDay: false,
        //选择日期是否可见
        visSelectDate: false,
        timeListInfoFlag: true,
        cycleDates: [{
          value: "",
        }, ],
        timeListInfo: [{
          value: "",
        }, ],
        // form表单
        taskSaveInfoForm: {
          startTimeAndEndTime: [],
          //房间信息
          roomRefs: [],
          //周期信息，1 当选择周期为天的时候 此值为空，
          //         2 周期为星期的时候 创建多个实体，实体内参数为weekDay,weekDay值为星期几，然后将实体放入cycleInfos
          //         3 周期自定的时候 创建多个实体， taskCycleStartDate，taskCycleEndDate 为所选日期，多个日期创建多个实体，放入到cycleInfos
          cycleInfos: [],
          //针对设备开关时间的数组，同样创建实体将开始时间 openTime ，closeTime
          timeInfos: [],
          cycleDates: [],
          timeListInfo: [],
          //周几
          checkboxGroupVal: [],
        },
        baseSetInfoForm: {
          keepOnTime: undefined
        },
        // 0新增 1修改 2查看
        operType: 0,
      };
    },
    created() {
      this.getList();
    },
    methods: {
      dealDisabledDate(time) {
        if (new Date(time).getTime() > new Date().getTime()) {
          return time.getTime() >= (new Date().getTime()); //时间范围必须是时间戳
        } else {
          return time.getTime() < Date.now() - 2 * 8.64e7; //8.64e7就是一天的时间戳 24*60*60*1000   两天之内 根据自己需求来定
        }
      },
      /** 查询任务信息主列表 */
      getList() {
        this.loading = true;
        listInfo(this.queryParams).then(response => {
          this.infoList = response.rows;
          this.total = response.total;
          this.loading = false;
        });
      },
      // 取消按钮
      cancel() {
        this.open = false;
        this.reset();
      },
      // 表单重置
      reset() {
        this.form = {
          taskName: null,
          deviceType: null,
          taskStatus: null
        };
        this.resetForm("form");
        // this.resetForm("taskSaveInfoForm");
        this.checkboxGroup = []
        this.taskSaveInfoForm = {
          startTimeAndEndTime: [],
          //房间信息
          roomRefs: [],
          //周期信息
          cycleInfos: [],
          //针对设备开关时间的数组，同样创建实体将开始时间 openTime ，closeTime
          timeInfos: [],
          //周期日期
          cycleDates: [],
          //开关时间
          timeListInfo: [],
          //复选框的值
          checkboxGroupVal: []
        };
        this.buildRoomShow = [];
      },
      /** 搜索按钮操作 */
      handleQuery() {
        this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
        this.getList();
      },
      /** 重置按钮操作 */
      resetQuery() {
        this.resetForm("queryForm");
        this.handleQuery();
      },
      // 多选框选中数据
      handleSelectionChange(selection) {
        this.ids = selection.map(item => item.taskId)
        this.single = selection.length !== 1
        this.multiple = !selection.length
      },
      /** 新增按钮操作 */
      handleAdd() {
        this.resetForm("taskSaveInfoForm");
        this.operType = 0;
        this.reset();
        this.startTimeAndEndTime = [];
        this.open = true;
        this.changeDeviceTypeValue(1)
        this.title = "添加任务信息";
      },
      /** 修改按钮操作 */
      handleUpdate(row) {
        this.resetForm("taskSaveInfoForm");
        var that = this;
        that.operType = 1;
        that.reset();
        const taskId = row.taskId
        getInfo(taskId).then(response => {
          that.title = "修改任务信息";
          that.taskSaveInfoForm = response.data;
          that.checkboxGroup = []
          let getWeekdayNum = []
          that.taskSaveInfoForm.checkboxGroupVal = []
          let zidingyiValue = []
          that.$set(that.taskSaveInfoForm,'cycleDates', [])
          // that.taskSaveInfoForm.cycleDates = []
          response.data.cycleInfos.forEach(item => {
            if (item.weekDay != null) {
              getWeekdayNum.push(item.weekDay.toString())
              that.taskSaveInfoForm.checkboxGroupVal.push({
                label: "",
                raw: item,
                value: item.weekDay.toString()
              })
            } else {
              zidingyiValue = [item.taskCycleStartDate, item.taskCycleEndDate]
              var newValue = {
                value: zidingyiValue,
                key: 'c'+item.infoId,
              };
              that.taskSaveInfoForm.cycleDates = [...that.taskSaveInfoForm.cycleDates, newValue]
            }
          })
          // 周-点选数据
          that.taskSaveInfoForm.checkboxGroupVal = []
          that.dict.type.week_days_sel.forEach((item, index) => {
            for (let i = 0; i < getWeekdayNum.length; i++) {
              if (item.value == getWeekdayNum[i]) {
                getWeekdayNum[i] = item.label
                that.taskSaveInfoForm.checkboxGroupVal.push({
                  label: item.label,
                  value: item.value.toString()
                })
              }
            }
            if (that.taskSaveInfoForm.checkboxGroupVal[index] != undefined) {
              if (item.value == that.taskSaveInfoForm.checkboxGroupVal[index].value) {
                that.taskSaveInfoForm.checkboxGroupVal[index].label = item.label
              }
            }
          })
          that.checkboxGroup = getWeekdayNum
          // 任务执行时间
          that.taskSaveInfoForm.startTimeAndEndTime = [response.data.taskStartTime, response.data.taskEndTime]
          that.$set(that.taskSaveInfoForm,'timeListInfo', [])
          let secondsOne = {}
          response.data.timeInfos.forEach(item => {
            secondsOne = [item.openTime, item.closeTime]
            var newValue = {
              key: 't'+item.infoId,
              value: secondsOne
            };
            that.taskSaveInfoForm.timeListInfo = [...that.taskSaveInfoForm.timeListInfo, newValue]
          })
          that.open = true;
          that.changeDeviceTypeValue(parseInt(that.taskSaveInfoForm.taskCycle))
          that.buildRoomShow = that.taskSaveInfoForm.roomRefs.map(item => item.roomCode + ':' + item.roomName +
            ';');
          // that.resetFormForEdit();
        });
      },
      dateToMs(date) {
        let result = new Date(date).getTime();
        return result;
      },
      // 转中国标准时间
      formatterDate(date) {
        let result = new Date(date);
        return result;
      },
      /** 查看详情 */
      handleDeteil(row) {
        this.operType = 2;
        this.reset();
        const taskId = row.taskId;
        getInfo(taskId).then(response => {
          this.title = "查看任务信息";
          this.taskSaveInfoForm = response.data;
          this.checkboxGroup = []
          let getWeekdayNum = []
          this.taskSaveInfoForm.checkboxGroupVal = []
          let zidingyiValue = []
          this.taskSaveInfoForm.cycleDates = []
          response.data.cycleInfos.forEach(item => {
            if (item.weekDay != null) {
              getWeekdayNum.push(item.weekDay.toString())
              this.taskSaveInfoForm.checkboxGroupVal.push({
                label: "",
                raw: item,
                value: item.weekDay.toString()
              })
            } else {
              zidingyiValue = [item.taskCycleStartDate, item.taskCycleEndDate]
              var newValue = {
                value: zidingyiValue,
                key: 'c'+item.infoId
              };
              this.taskSaveInfoForm.cycleDates = [...this.taskSaveInfoForm.cycleDates, newValue]
            }
          })
          // 周-点选数据
          this.taskSaveInfoForm.checkboxGroupVal = []
          this.dict.type.week_days_sel.forEach((item, index) => {
            for (let i = 0; i < getWeekdayNum.length; i++) {
              if (item.value == getWeekdayNum[i]) {
                getWeekdayNum[i] = item.label
                this.taskSaveInfoForm.checkboxGroupVal.push({
                  label: item.label,
                  value: item.value.toString()
                })
              }
            }
            if (this.taskSaveInfoForm.checkboxGroupVal[index] != undefined) {
              if (item.value == this.taskSaveInfoForm.checkboxGroupVal[index].value) {
                this.taskSaveInfoForm.checkboxGroupVal[index].label = item.label
              }
            }
          })
          this.checkboxGroup = getWeekdayNum
          // 任务执行时间
          this.taskSaveInfoForm.startTimeAndEndTime = [response.data.taskStartTime, response.data.taskEndTime]
          this.taskSaveInfoForm.timeListInfo = []
          let secondsOne = {}
          response.data.timeInfos.forEach(item => {
            secondsOne = [item.openTime, item.closeTime]
            this.taskSaveInfoForm.timeListInfo.push({
              key: 't'+item.infoId,
              value: secondsOne
            })
          })
          this.changeDeviceTypeValue(parseInt(this.taskSaveInfoForm.taskCycle))
          this.buildRoomShow = this.taskSaveInfoForm.roomRefs.map(item => item.roomCode + ':' + item.roomName +
            ';');
          this.open = true;
        });
      },
      //更新或者详情返现数据
      resetFormForEdit() {
        this.buildRoomShow = this.taskSaveInfoForm.roomRefs.map(item => item.roomCode + ':' + item.roomName + ';');
        this.startTimeAndEndTime = [this.taskSaveInfoForm.taskStartTime, this.taskSaveInfoForm.taskEndTime]
        this.changeDeviceTypeValue(this.taskSaveInfoForm.taskCycle)
        this.open = true;
        this.$set(this.taskSaveInfoForm, "cycleDates", [])
        this.$set(this.taskSaveInfoForm, "timeListInfo", [])
        this.$set(this.taskSaveInfoForm, "checkboxGroupVal", [])
        this.changeDeviceTypeValue(this.taskSaveInfoForm.taskCycle);
      },
      /** 提交按钮 */
      submitForm() {
        var that = this;
        //数据进行校验
        //加入房间信息
        that.$refs["taskSaveInfoForm"].validate(valid => {
          if (valid) {
            if (that.taskSaveInfoForm.taskCycle == 1) {
              that.taskSaveInfoForm.cycleInfos = [];
            } else if (that.taskSaveInfoForm.taskCycle == 2) {
              if (that.taskSaveInfoForm.checkboxGroupVal == undefined || that.taskSaveInfoForm.checkboxGroupVal
                .length == 0) {
                that.$modal.msgError("请选择每周内执行日");
                return;
              } else {
                const dates = that.taskSaveInfoForm.checkboxGroupVal;
                const cycleInfosInner = []
                dates.forEach((item) => {
                  const dateInfo = {
                    taskCycle: 2,
                    weekDay: item.value
                  };
                  cycleInfosInner.push(dateInfo)
                })
                that.taskSaveInfoForm.cycleInfos = cycleInfosInner;
              }
            } else if (that.taskSaveInfoForm.taskCycle == 3) {
              if (that.taskSaveInfoForm.cycleDates == undefined || that.taskSaveInfoForm.cycleDates.length == 0) {
                that.$modal.msgError("请添加自定义任务日期");
                return;
              } else {
                const dates = that.taskSaveInfoForm.cycleDates;
                const cycleInfosInner = []
                dates.forEach((item) => {
                  const dateInfo = {
                    taskCycle: 3,
                    taskCycleStartDate: item.value[0],
                    taskCycleEndDate: item.value[1],
                  };
                  cycleInfosInner.push(dateInfo)
                })
                that.taskSaveInfoForm.cycleInfos = cycleInfosInner;
              }
            }
            if (that.taskSaveInfoForm.timeListInfo == undefined || that.taskSaveInfoForm.timeListInfo.length == 0) {
              that.$modal.msgError("请添加开启关闭时间");
              return;
            } else {
              const dates = that.taskSaveInfoForm.timeListInfo;
              const timesInfo = [];
              dates.forEach((item) => {
                const timeInfo = {
                  openTime: item.value[0],
                  closeTime: item.value[1],
                };
                timesInfo.push(timeInfo)
              })
              that.taskSaveInfoForm.timeInfos = timesInfo;
            }
            that.taskSaveInfoForm.taskStartTime = that.taskSaveInfoForm.startTimeAndEndTime[0]
            that.taskSaveInfoForm.taskEndTime = that.taskSaveInfoForm.startTimeAndEndTime[1]
            const messageInfo =  checkTaskDates(that.taskSaveInfoForm);
            if( messageInfo!=""){
              that.$modal.msgError(messageInfo);
              return;
            }
            if (that.taskSaveInfoForm.taskId != null) {
              updateInfo(that.taskSaveInfoForm).then(response => {
                that.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
                that.open = false;
                that.getList();
              });
            } else {
              addInfo(that.taskSaveInfoForm).then(response => {
                that.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
                that.open = false;
                that.getList();
              });
            }
          }
        });
      },
      formatDate(cellValue) {
        if (cellValue == null || cellValue == "") return "";
        var date = new Date(cellValue)
        var year = date.getFullYear()
        var month = date.getMonth() + 1 < 10 ? '0' + (date.getMonth() + 1) : date.getMonth() + 1
        var day = date.getDate() < 10 ? '0' + date.getDate() : date.getDate()
        var hours = date.getHours() < 10 ? '0' + date.getHours() : date.getHours()
        var minutes = date.getMinutes() < 10 ? '0' + date.getMinutes() : date.getMinutes()
        var seconds = date.getSeconds() < 10 ? '0' + date.getSeconds() : date.getSeconds()
        return year + '-' + month + '-' + day + ' ' + hours + ':' + minutes + ':' + seconds
      },
      /** 删除按钮操作 */
      handleDelete(row) {
        const taskIds = row.taskId || this.ids;
        this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除任务信息数据项？').then(function() {
          return delInfo(taskIds);
        }).then(() => {
          this.getList();
          this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
        }).catch(() => {});
      },
      /** 强制结束 */
      handleCancelTask(row) {
        const taskIds = row.taskId || this.ids;
        this.$modal.confirm('是否确认强制结束任务名称为"' + row.taskName + '"的数据项？').then(function() {
          return cancelTaskInfo(taskIds);
        }).then(() => {
          this.getList();
          this.$modal.msgSuccess("结束成功");
        }).catch(() => {});
      },
      //任务周期选择事件
      changeDeviceTypeValue(value) {
        if (value == 1) {
          this.visSelectWeekDay = false;
          this.visSelectDate = false;
        } else if (value == 2) {
          this.visSelectWeekDay = true;
          this.visSelectDate = false;
        } else if (value == 3) {
          this.visSelectWeekDay = false;
          this.visSelectDate = true;
        }
      },
      pickerTimeChange(obj) {},
      //星期复选框操作事件方法
      changeWeekDaySel(val, item) {
        if (val) {
          this.taskSaveInfoForm.checkboxGroupVal.push(item)
        } else {
          var index = this.taskSaveInfoForm.checkboxGroupVal.indexOf(item);
          if (index !== -1) {
            this.taskSaveInfoForm.checkboxGroupVal.splice(index, 1);
          }
        }
      },
      /** 楼栋按钮操作 */
      handleBuildRoom() {
        this.visibleBuildRoom = true;
      },
      /** 组件选择改变事件 */
      buildRoomChang(selection) {
        if (selection) {
          this.taskSaveInfoForm.roomRefs = selection.map(item => {
            return item
          }).filter(item2 => item2 !== undefined);
          this.taskSaveInfoForm.roomRefs = selection;
          this.buildRoomShow = this.taskSaveInfoForm.roomRefs.map(item => item.roomCode + ':' + item.roomName + ';');
          if (selection.length > 0) {
            this.roomSelTitle = "重新选择教室";
          } else {
            this.roomSelTitle = "请选择教室";
          }
        } else {
          this.taskSaveInfoForm.roomRefs = []
          this.buildRoomShow = []
          this.roomSelTitle = "请选择教室";
        }
      },
      //添加到周期数组
      addCycleDates() {
        this.visSelectDate = false;
        var newValue = {
          value: [],
          key: Date.now(),
        };
        this.taskSaveInfoForm.cycleDates = [...this.taskSaveInfoForm.cycleDates, newValue]
        this.visSelectDate = true;
      },
      //添加到时间数组
      addTimeList() {
        this.timeListInfoFlag = false;
        var newValue = {
          key: Date.now(),
          value:""
        };
        this.taskSaveInfoForm.timeListInfo = [...this.taskSaveInfoForm.timeListInfo, newValue]
        this.timeListInfoFlag = true;
      },
      //移除时间数组
      removeCycleDates(item) {
        var index = this.taskSaveInfoForm.cycleDates.indexOf(item);
        if (index !== -1) {
          this.taskSaveInfoForm.cycleDates.splice(index, 1);
        }
        this.$forceUpdate()
      },
      //移除时间数组
      removeTimeInfoList(item) {
        var index = this.taskSaveInfoForm.timeListInfo.indexOf(item);
        if (index !== -1) {
          this.taskSaveInfoForm.timeListInfo.splice(index, 1);
        }
        this.$forceUpdate()
      },
      /** 不断电时间设置 按钮操作 */
      handleBaseSetInfo() {
        getBaseSetInfo().then(response => {
          this.baseSetInfoForm = response.data;
          this.openBaseSetInfo = true;
        });
      },
      /** 不断电时间设置 提交按钮 */
      submitbaseSetInfoForm() {
        this.$refs["baseSetInfoForm"].validate(valid => {
          if (valid) {
            updateBaseSetInfo(this.baseSetInfoForm).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
              this.openBaseSetInfo = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          }
        });
      },
    }
  };
</script>
<style  >
input::-webkit-outer-spin-button,
input::-webkit-inner-spin-button {
    -webkit-appearance: none;
}
input[type="number"]{
    -moz-appearance: textfield;
}
</style>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery"
            :records.sync="records"
            />
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-setting"
          size="mini"
          @click="cancelSet"
        >巡课密码</el-button>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records" >
      <el-table-column type="index" label="序号" align="center" width="50"/>
      <el-table-column label="课程名称" align="center" prop="courseName" />
      <el-table-column label="主讲教师" align="center" prop="teacher" />
      <el-table-column label="教室编码" align="center" prop="roomId" />
      <el-table-column label="课节" align="center" prop="section"/>
      <el-table-column label="课程时间" align="center" prop="courseTime" />
      <el-table-column label="巡课时间" align="center" prop="createTime" />
      <el-table-column label="评分" align="center" prop="score" />
      <el-table-column label="图片" align="center" prop="picUrls" width="200">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-image v-for="item in scope.row.picList" :key="item" :src="item" style="width: 50px;height: 50px;margin-right: 10px;" :preview-src-list="scope.row.picList"></el-image>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" width="100">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-button size="mini" type="text"
                     icon="el-icon-setting" @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
                     v-hasPermi="['jufe:teachingInspection:remove']">删除</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList"
    />
    <el-dialog v-if="setVisible" title="巡课密码" :visible.sync="setVisible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
      <el-form ref="setForm" :model="setItem" label-width="140px" >
        <el-form-item
          label="巡课密码"
          prop="bpPassword"
          :rules="[{ required: true, message: '巡课密码不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isNumber, message: '请输入数字', trigger: 'blur' }]"
        >
          <el-input v-model="setItem.bpPassword" maxlength="4">
          </el-input>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" :loading="saveLoading" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  list,
  del
} from '@/api/jufe/teachinginspection';
import Search from "./search";
import { getBaseInfo, setCancel } from '@/api/jufe/reservationset'
import { isNumber } from '@/utils/validate'
import de from "element-ui/src/locale/lang/de";
export default {
  components: { Search },
  name: "Report",
  data() {
    return {
      setVisible:false,
      saveLoading:false,
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      ids:[],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 20,
        createBy:null,
        phone: null,
        status: null,
        timeRange:null,
        params:{
        }
      },
      setItem:{
        id:1,
        bpPassword:null
      },
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询计划列列表 */
    isNumber:isNumber,
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      this.queryParams.params = {}
      if(this.queryParams.timeRange!=null&&this.queryParams.timeRange.length>0){
        this.queryParams.params.start = this.queryParams.timeRange[0]
        this.queryParams.params.end = this.queryParams.timeRange[1]
      }
      list(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows
        this.records.forEach(e=>{
          e.picList = []
          e.picList.push(e.picUrl)
        })
        console.log(this.records)
        this.total = response.total
        this.loading = false;
      }).catch(e=>{
        this.loading = false
      });
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const ids = row.id;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除数据项？').then(function() {
        return del(ids);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    cancelSet() {
      this.setVisible = true
      getBaseInfo().then(e=>{
        this.setItem = e.data
      })
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.setVisible = false
      this.resetForm('setForm')
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['setForm'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          // 修改
          setCancel(this.setItem).then(e => {
            this.saveLoading = false
            this.$message.success('保存成功')
            this.handleClose()
            this.getList()
          }).catch(e=>{
            this.saveLoading = false
          })
        }
      })
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" :inline="true" label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="课程名称" prop="courseName">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.courseName"  placeholder="请输入课程名称" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="主讲教师" prop="teacher">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.teacher"  placeholder="请输入主讲教师" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="巡课时间" prop="timeRange">
      <el-date-picker v-model="queryParams.timeRange" size="small"
                      value-format="yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"
                      format="yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"
                      type="datetimerange"
                    range-separator="-" start-placeholder="开始时间" end-placeholder="结束时间"/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
export default {
  name: "ReservationSearch",
  components: {
  },
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
    };
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.queryParams.dataRange = []
      this.queryParams.roomId = null
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>

      <el-table-column label="设备名称" align="center" prop="deviceName" width="150"/>

  list

      // 遮罩层

        }
      },
    }
  },

    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询计划列列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      this.queryParams.params = {}
      if(this.queryParams.timeRange!=null&&this.queryParams.timeRange.length>0){

<script>
import {
  whiteListList,
  selectLocationUnderDevice,
  getList,
  delList,
  addList,
  powerNodeList
} from "@/api/jufe/list";
import {tree} from "@/api/location/location";
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
import {listPowerNode} from "@/api/jufe/powerNode";
export default {
  name: "List",
  components: {
    Treeselect
  },
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 遮罩层
      addloading: true,
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      powerNodeNames: [],
      powerNodeIds: [],
      // 非单个禁用
      single: true,
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 部门树选项
      roomOptions: undefined,
      // 电源白名单表格数据
      listList: [],
      addWhiteList: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      // 是否显示弹出层
       open: false,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        deptId: null,
        inWhiteList: null,
        inWhiteTime: null,
        addWhiteUserId: null,
        addWhiteUserName: null,
        roomId: null,
        roomCode: null,
        roomName: null,
        deviceLevel: null,
        actionStatus: null,
        deviceNodeType: null,
        powerNodeId: null,
        powerNodeNum: null,
        powerNodeName: null,
        powerNodeParentId: null,
        powerNodeParentName: null,
        powerNodeParentNum: null,
        updateById: null,
        createById: null,
      },
      // 查询参数
      queryParams1: {
        deptId: null,
        inWhiteList: null,
        inWhiteTime: null,
        addWhiteUserId: null,
        addWhiteUserName: null,
        roomId: null,
        roomCode: null,
        roomName: null,
        deviceLevel: null,
        deviceNodeType: null,
        actionStatus: null,
        powerNodeId: null,
        powerNodeNum: null,
        powerNodeName: null,
        powerNodeParentId: null,
        powerNodeParentName: null,
        powerNodeParentNum: null,
        updateById: null,
        createById: null,
        locationId: null,
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {},
      defaultProps: {
        children: "children",
        label: "label"
      },
      disabled : false,
      checkAll: false, //全选
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
      }
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
    this.getTreeselect();
    this.getPowerNodeList();
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询电源白名单列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      whiteListList(this.queryParams).then(response => {
        this.listList = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    /** 查询电源白名单列表 */
    getPowerNodeList() {
      this.loading = true;
      powerNodeList(this.queryParams1).then(response => {
        this.addWhiteList = this.handleTree(response.rows, "powerNodeId");
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    checkDeviceNodeType(row, index) {
      if(row.deviceNodeType == "4"){
        return true;
      }else {
        return false;
      }
    },
    // 取消按钮
    cancel() {
      this.open = false;
      this.reset();
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.form = {
        powerNodeWhiteId: null,
        remark: null,
        delFlag: null,
        deptId: null,
        inWhiteList: null,
        inWhiteTime: null,
        addWhiteUserId: null,
        addWhiteUserName: null,
        roomId: null,
        roomCode: null,
        roomName: null,
        deviceLevel: null,
        deviceNodeType: null,
        actionStatus: "0",
        powerNodeId: null,
        powerNodeNum: null,
        powerNodeName: null,
        powerNodeParentId: null,
        powerNodeParentName: null,
        powerNodeParentNum: null,
        createTime: null,
        updateById: null,
        updateBy: null,
        updateTime: null,
        createById: null,
        createBy: null
      };
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    /** 查询部门下拉树结构 */
    getTreeselect() {
      tree().then(e=>{
        this.roomOptions = e.data
      })
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    }, /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handlePowerQuery() {
      this.getPowerNodeList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    /** 新增重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery1() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.getPowerNodeList();
    },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChangePower(selection) {
      this.powerNodeIds = selection.map(item => item.powerNodeId)
      this.single = selection.length!==1
      this.multiple = !selection.length
    },
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.powerNodeWhiteId)
      this.powerNodeNames = selection.map(item => item.powerNodeName)
      this.single = selection.length!==1
      this.multiple = !selection.length
    },
    // 筛选节点
    filterNode(value, data) {
      if (!value) return true;
      return data.label.indexOf(value) !== -1;
    },
    // 节点单击事件
    handleNodeClick(data) {
      if(data.type === "location"){
        this.queryParams1.locationId = data.id;
        this.getRoomAndDeviceList();
      }else if(data.type === "room"){
        this.queryParams1.roomId = data.id;
        this.getDeviceList();
      }
    },
    /** 查询楼栋下的教室与设备 */
    getRoomAndDeviceList() {
      this.addloading = true;
      selectLocationUnderDevice(this.queryParams1).then(response => {
        this.addWhiteList  = this.handleTree(response.rows, "powerNodeId");
        this.addloading = false;
      });
    },
    /** 查询教室下的设备 */
    getDeviceList() {
      this.addloading = true;
      this.addWhiteList= [],
      listPowerNode(this.queryParams1).then(response => {
        this.addWhiteList = response.rows;
        this.addloading = false;
      });
    },
    /** 新增按钮操作 */
    handleAdd() {
      this.reset();
      this.open = true;
      this.title = "添加电源白名单";
      this.queryParams1.inWhiteList = 0;
      powerNodeList(this.queryParams1).then(response => {
        this.addWhiteList = this.handleTree(response.rows, "powerNodeId");
        this.addloading = false;
      });
      },
    /** 修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset();
      const powerNodeWhiteId = row.powerNodeWhiteId || this.ids
      getList(powerNodeWhiteId).then(response => {
        this.form = response.data;
        this.open = true;
        this.title = "修改电源白名单";
      });
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.reset();
      const powerNodeId = this.powerNodeIds;
      if(this.powerNodeIds.length != 0){
        addList(powerNodeId).then(response => {
          this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
          this.open = false;
          this.getList();
        });
      }else{
        this.$modal.alertWarning("您当前还未选择设备");
      }
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const powerNodeWhiteIds = row.powerNodeWhiteId || this.ids;
      const powerNodeNames = row.powerNodeName || this.powerNodeNames;
      if(powerNodeWhiteIds==null||powerNodeWhiteIds.length==0){
        this.$modal.alertWarning("请选择需要移除的数据");
        return;
      }
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除电源名称为"' + powerNodeNames + '"的数据项？').then(function() {
        return delList( powerNodeWhiteIds);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.download('jufe:whiteList/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `list_${new Date().getTime()}.xlsx`)
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-row :gutter="20">
      <el-col :span="4" :xs="24">
        <div class="head-container">
          <el-input
            v-model="locationName"
            placeholder="请输入名称"
            clearable
            size="small"
            prefix-icon="el-icon-search"
            style="margin-bottom: 20px"
          />
        </div>
        <div class="head-container">
          <el-tree
            :data="locationOptions"
            :props="defaultProps"
            :expand-on-click-node="false"
            :filter-node-method="filterNode"
            ref="tree"
            node-key="id"
            default-expand-all
            highlight-current
            @node-click="handleNodeClick"
          />
        </div>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="20" :xs="24">
        <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch"
                 label-width="68px">
          <el-form-item label="名称" prop="locationName">
            <el-input
              v-model="queryParams.locationName"
              placeholder="请输入名称"
              clearable
              @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
            />
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item label="别名" prop="anotherName">
            <el-input
              v-model="queryParams.anotherName"
              placeholder="请输入别名"
              clearable
              @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
            />
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item label="负责人" prop="userId">
            <el-select v-model="queryParams.userId" placeholder="请选择负责人" size="small" filterable clearable>
              <el-option v-for="item in teaInfoList" :key="item.user_id" :label="item.nick_name+'-'+item.dept_name"
                         :value="item.user_id" />
            </el-select>
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item label="数据来源" prop="dataSources">
            <el-select v-model="queryParams.dataSources" placeholder="请选择数据来源" clearable size="small">
              <el-option label="对接" value="1" />
              <el-option label="自建" value="2" />
            </el-select>
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item>
            <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
            <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-form>
        <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
          <el-col :span="1.5">
            <el-button
              type="primary"
              plain
              icon="el-icon-plus"
              size="mini"
              @click="handleAdd"
              v-hasPermi="['jufe:location:add']"
            >新增
            </el-button>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="1.5">
            <el-button
              type="success"
              plain
              icon="el-icon-edit"
              size="mini"
              :disabled="multiple"
              @click="handleSetPrincipal"
              v-hasPermi="['jufe:location:editPrincipal']"
            >批量设置负责人
            </el-button>
          </el-col>
          <right-toolbar :showSearch.sync="showSearch" @queryTable="getList"></right-toolbar>
        </el-row>
        <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="locationList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange"
                  :tree-props="{children: 'children', hasChildren: 'hasChildren'}">
          <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center"/>
          <el-table-column label="序号" align="center" type="index" width="80"/>
          <el-table-column label="名称" align="center" prop="locationName"/>
          <el-table-column label="上级位置" align="center" prop="parentName"/>
          <el-table-column label="别名" align="center" prop="anotherName"/>
          <el-table-column label="负责人" align="center" prop="userName">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <div v-for="item in scope.row.userName">{{item}}</div>
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
          <el-table-column label="数据来源" align="center" prop="dataSources" :formatter="dataSourcesFormat">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <span v-if="scope.row.dataSources == 1" >对接</span>
              <span v-else-if="scope.row.dataSources == 2" >自建</span>
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
          <el-table-column label="备注" align="center" prop="remark" show-overflow-tooltip/>
          <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width">
            <template slot-scope="scope">
              <el-button v-if="scope.row.ancestors.split(',').length < 3" size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-plus"
                         @click="handleUnderAdd(scope.row)" v-hasPermi="['jufe:location:add']">下级添加</el-button>
              <el-button
                size="mini"
                type="text"
                icon="el-icon-edit"
                @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)"
                v-hasPermi="['jufe:location:edit']"
              >修改
              </el-button>
              <el-button
                size="mini"
                type="text"
                icon="el-icon-edit"
                @click="handleView(scope.row)"
                v-hasPermi="['jufe:location:query']"
              >查看</el-button>
              <el-button
                size="mini"
                type="text"
                icon="el-icon-delete"
                @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
                v-hasPermi="['jufe:location:remove']"
              >删除
              </el-button>
            </template>
          </el-table-column>
        </el-table>
        <pagination
          v-show="total>0"
          :total="total"
          :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
          :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
          @pagination="getList"
        />
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <!-- 添加或修改位置对话框 -->
    <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="open" width="500px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="100px">
        <el-form-item label="上级位置" prop="parentId" v-if="form.parentId != 0">
          <treeselect v-model="form.parentId" :options="locationOptions"  placeholder="选择上级位置" :disabled=isDisabled />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="名称" prop="locationName">
          <el-input v-model="form.locationName" placeholder="请输入名称" maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="别名" prop="anotherName">
          <el-input v-model="form.anotherName" placeholder="请输入别名" maxlength="20" show-word-limit/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="负责人" prop="principal">
          <el-select v-model="form.principal" multiple placeholder="请选择负责人" size="small" style="width:360px" filterable clearable>
            <el-option v-for="item in teaInfoList" :key="item.user_id" :label="item.nick_name+'-'+item.dept_name"
                       :value="item.user_id" />
          </el-select>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="备注" prop="remark">
          <el-input type="textarea"
                    rows="3"
                    resize="none"
                    maxlength="90"
                    show-word-limit
                    v-model="form.remark"
                    placeholder="请输入备注"/>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <!-- 查看位置对话框 -->
    <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="openwatch" width="500px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="100px" :disabled="true">
        <el-form-item label="上级位置" prop="parentId" v-if="form.parentId != 0">
          <treeselect v-model="form.parentId" :options="locationOptions" placeholder="选择上级位置" disabled="disabled"/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="名称" prop="locationName">
          <el-input v-model="form.locationName" placeholder="请输入名称" maxlength="20" show-word-limit />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="别名" prop="anotherName">
          <el-input v-model="form.anotherName" placeholder="请输入别名" maxlength="20" show-word-limit />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="负责人" prop="principal">
          <el-select v-model="form.principal" multiple placeholder="请选择负责人" size="small" style="width:360px" filterable clearable >
            <el-option v-for="item in teaInfoList" :key="item.user_id" :label="item.nick_name+'-'+item.dept_name"
                       :value="item.user_id" />
          </el-select>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="数据来源" prop="dataSources" :formatter="dataSourcesFormat">
          <el-select style="width:350px;" v-model="form.dataSources" placeholder="请选择" clearable size="small" >
            <el-option label="对接" value="1" />
            <el-option label="自建" value="2" />
          </el-select>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="备注" prop="remark">
          <el-input type="textarea"
                    rows="3"
                    resize="none"
                    maxlength="90"
                    show-word-limit
                    v-model="form.remark"
                    placeholder="请输入备注"
                    :disabled="true"/>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog title="批量设置负责人" :visible.sync="openSetPrincipal" width="600px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" label-width="120px">
        <el-form-item label="负责人" prop="principal">
          <el-select v-model="form.principal" multiple placeholder="请选择负责人" size="small" filterable clearable
                     style="width:440px" >
            <el-option v-for="item in teaInfoList" :key="item.user_id" :label="item.nick_name+'-'+item.dept_name" :value="item.user_id" />
          </el-select>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitFormSetPrincipal">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  listLocation,
  getLocation,
  delLocation,
  addLocation,
  updateLocation,
  locationTree, updatePrincipal
} from "@/api/location/location";
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
import {listTeaInfo} from "@/api/jufe/room";
export default {
  name: "Location",
  components: {
    Treeselect
  },
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      names: [],
      deviceNos: [],
      // 非单个禁用
      single: true,
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      //数据来源字典
      dataSourcesOptions: [],
      openSetPrincipal: false,
      //负责人集合
      teaInfoList: [],
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      locationName: undefined,
      // 部门树选项
      locationOptions: undefined,
      locationOption: undefined,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 位置表格数据
      locationList: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      openwatch: false,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        parentId:null,
        locationName: null,
        anotherName: null,
        parentName: null,
        userId: null,
        userName: null,
        locDeptId: null,
        deptName: null,
        dataSources: null,
        deptId: null
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {},
      defaultProps: {
        children: "children",
        label: "label"
      },
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
        locationName: [{
          required: true,
          message: "名称不能为空",
          trigger: "blur"
        }],
        parentId: [{
          required: true,
          message: "上级位置不能为空",
          trigger: "blur"
        }],
      },
      isDisabled: false
    };
  },
  watch: {
    // 根据名称筛选树
    locationName(val) {
      this.$refs.tree.filter(val);
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
    this.getTreeselect();
    listTeaInfo().then(response => {
      this.teaInfoList = response.data;
    });
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询位置列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listLocation(this.queryParams).then(response => {
        this.locationList = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
        this.locationList.forEach((item) => {
          var userName = item.userName;
          item.userName = [];
          if (userName) {
            item.userName = userName.split(',');
          }
        });
      })
    },
    // 筛选节点
    filterNode(value, data) {
      if (!value) return true;
      return data.label.indexOf(value) !== -1;
    },
    // 节点单击事件
    handleNodeClick(data) {
      this.queryParams.locationId = data.id;
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    // 数据来源字典翻译
    dataSourcesFormat(row, column) {
      return this.selectDictLabel(this.dataSourcesOptions, row.dataSources);
    },
    // 取消按钮
    cancel() {
      this.open = false;
      this.openwatch = false;
      this.openSetPrincipal = false;
      this.reset();
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.form = {
        parentId: null,
        locationId: null,
        locationName: null,
        anotherName: null,
        userId: null,
        userName: null,
        locDeptId: null,
        deptName: null,
        createBy: null,
        createTime: null,
        updateBy: null,
        updateTime: null,
        remark: null,
        delFlag: null,
        principal: [],
        dataSources: null,
        deptId: null
      };
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    /** 查询部门下拉树结构 */
    getTreeselect() {
      locationTree().then(response => {
        this.locationOptions = response.data
      });
    },
    /** 转换位置数据结构 */
    normalizer(node) {
      if (node.children && !node.children.length) {
        delete node.children;
      }
      return {
        id: node.locationId,
        label: node.locationName,
        children: node.children
      };
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList()
    },
    /** 查看按钮操作 */
    handleView(row) {
      this.reset()
      const locationId = row.locationId || this.ids
      getLocation(locationId).then(response => {
        this.form.principal = row.principal;
        this.form = response.data
        this.openwatch = true
        this.title = '查看'
      })
      // listLocation().then(response => {
      //   this.locationOption = this.handleTree(response.rows, "locationId");
      // });
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.queryParams.locationId = undefined;
      this.$refs.tree.setCurrentKey(null);
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.locationId)
      this.names = selection.map(item => item.locationName)
      this.single = selection.length !== 1
      this.multiple = !selection.length
    },
    /** 新增按钮操作 */
    handleAdd() {
      this.reset();
      if(this.queryParams.locationId != null){
        getLocation(this.queryParams.locationId).then(response => {
          var ancestor = response.data.ancestors;
          var index = ancestor.indexOf(',');
          var num =0;
          while(index !== -1){
            num++;
            index = ancestor.indexOf(',',index + 1)
          }
          if(num == 2){
            this.open = false;
            this.$modal.msgError("当前楼栋已为最低层级，不允许再添加下级!");
            return
          }
          this.form.parentId = this.queryParams.locationId;
          this.isDisabled= false;
          this.open = true;
          this.title = "添加楼栋"
        });
      }else{
        this.form.parentId = this.queryParams.locationId;
        this.isDisabled= false;
        this.open = true;
        this.title = "添加楼栋"
      }
      listLocation().then(response => {
        this.locationOption = this.handleTree(response.rows, "locationId");
      });
    },/** 下级添加按钮操作 */
    handleUnderAdd(row,type) {
      this.reset();
      this.form.parentId = row.locationId
      this.isDisabled= true;
      this.open = true;
      this.title = "添加位置"
      listLocation().then(response => {
        this.locationOption = this.handleTree(response.rows, "locationId");
      });
    },
    /** 修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset();
      if (row.parentId != 0){
        this.isDisabled = true;
      }
      const locationId = row.locationId || this.ids
      getLocation(locationId).then(response => {
        this.form = response.data;
        this.open = true;
        this.title = "修改位置";
        this.form.principal = row.principal;
      });
      listLocation().then(response => {
        this.locationOption = this.handleTree(response.rows, "locationId");
      });
    },
    /** 批量设置负责人 按钮操作 */
    handleSetPrincipal() {
      this.reset();
      this.openSetPrincipal = true;
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitFormSetPrincipal() {
      updatePrincipal({ids:this.ids,principal:this.form.principal}).then(response => {
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
        this.openSetPrincipal = false;
        this.getList();
      });
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs["form"].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          if (this.form.locationId != null) {
            updateLocation(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
              this.getTreeselect();
            });
          } else {
            addLocation(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
              this.getTreeselect();
            });
          }
        }
      });
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const locationIds = row.locationId || this.ids;
      const locationNames = row.locationName || this.names;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除名称为"' + locationNames + '"的数据项？').then(function () {
        return delLocation(locationIds);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.getTreeselect();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {
      });
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.download('jufe/location/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `location_${new Date().getTime()}.xlsx`)
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <div class="login">
    <el-form ref="loginForm" :model="loginForm" :rules="loginRules" class="login-form">
      <h3 class="title">智慧实验室管控平台扩容</h3>
      <el-form-item prop="username">
        <el-input
          v-model="loginForm.username"
          type="text"
          auto-complete="off"
          placeholder="账号"
        >
          <svg-icon slot="prefix" icon-class="user" class="el-input__icon input-icon" />
        </el-input>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item prop="password">
        <el-input
          v-model="loginForm.password"
          type="password"
          auto-complete="off"
          placeholder="密码"
          @keyup.enter.native="handleLogin"
        >
          <svg-icon slot="prefix" icon-class="password" class="el-input__icon input-icon" />
        </el-input>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item prop="code" v-if="captchaEnabled">
        <el-input
          v-model="loginForm.code"
          auto-complete="off"
          placeholder="验证码"
          style="width: 63%"
          @keyup.enter.native="handleLogin"
        >
          <svg-icon slot="prefix" icon-class="validCode" class="el-input__icon input-icon" />
        </el-input>
        <div class="login-code">
          <img :src="codeUrl" @click="getCode" class="login-code-img"/>
        </div>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-checkbox v-model="loginForm.rememberMe" style="margin:0px 0px 25px 0px;">记住密码</el-checkbox>
      <el-form-item style="width:100%;">
        <el-button
          :loading="loading"
          size="medium"
          type="primary"
          style="width:100%;"
          @click.native.prevent="handleLogin"
        >
          <span v-if="!loading">登 录</span>
          <span v-else>登 录 中...</span>
        </el-button>
        <div style="float: right;" v-if="register">
          <router-link class="link-type" :to="'/register'">立即注册</router-link>
        </div>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <!--  底部  -->
    <div class="el-login-footer">
      <span>Copyright © 2026 宸升 All Rights Reserved.V2.0</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { getCodeImg } from "@/api/login";
import Cookies from "js-cookie";
import { encrypt, decrypt } from '@/utils/jsencrypt'
import { sendNoticeForLogin } from '@/api/assets/warn'
export default {
  name: "Login",
  data() {
    return {
      codeUrl: "",
      loginForm: {
        username: "",
        password: "",
        rememberMe: false,
        code: "",
        uuid: ""
      },
      loginRules: {
        username: [
          { required: true, trigger: "blur", message: "请输入您的账号" }
        ],
        password: [
          { required: true, trigger: "blur", message: "请输入您的密码" }
        ],
        code: [{ required: true, trigger: "change", message: "请输入验证码" }]
      },
      loading: false,
      // 验证码开关
      captchaEnabled: true,
      // 注册开关
      register: false,
      redirect: undefined
    };
  },
  watch: {
    $route: {
      handler: function(route) {
        this.redirect = route.query && route.query.redirect;
      },
      immediate: true
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getCode();
    this.getCookie();
  },
  methods: {
    getCode() {
      getCodeImg().then(res => {
        this.captchaEnabled = res.captchaEnabled === undefined ? true : res.captchaEnabled;
        if (this.captchaEnabled) {
          this.codeUrl = "data:image/gif;base64," + res.img;
          this.loginForm.uuid = res.uuid;
        }
      });
    },
    getCookie() {
      const username = Cookies.get("username");
      const password = Cookies.get("password");
      const rememberMe = Cookies.get('rememberMe')
      this.loginForm = {
        username: username === undefined ? this.loginForm.username : username,
        password: password === undefined ? this.loginForm.password : decrypt(password),
        rememberMe: rememberMe === undefined ? false : Boolean(rememberMe)
      };
    },
    handleLogin() {
      this.$refs.loginForm.validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.loading = true;
          if (this.loginForm.rememberMe) {
            Cookies.set("username", this.loginForm.username, { expires: 30 });
            Cookies.set("password", encrypt(this.loginForm.password), { expires: 30 });
            Cookies.set('rememberMe', this.loginForm.rememberMe, { expires: 30 });
          } else {
            Cookies.remove("username");
            Cookies.remove("password");
            Cookies.remove('rememberMe');
          }
          this.$store.dispatch("Login", this.loginForm).then(() => {
            this.$router.push({ path: this.redirect || "/" }).catch(()=>{});
            this.getAssetsWarnNoticy()
          }).catch(() => {
            this.loading = false;
            if (this.captchaEnabled) {
              this.getCode();
            }
          });
        }
      });
    },
    // 获取资产告警通知
    getAssetsWarnNoticy() {
      setTimeout(() => {
        sendNoticeForLogin().then(res => {
        })
      }, 5000)
    }
  }
};
</script>

<script>
import * as echarts from 'echarts'
export default {
  name: "Login",
  props: {
    percenData:Array,
  },
  data() {
    return {
    };
  },
  mounted(){
    let echart = echarts.init(this.$refs.detailechartDiv1);
    //模拟数据
    // var data = [{
    //   "RYLB_TEXT": "在线数量",
    //   "A01008_BA_2": 30
    // }, {
    //   "RYLB_TEXT": "离线数量",
    //   "A01008_BA_2": 40
    // },];
    var data = this.percenData
    var orgOptions = {
      "linkExtendList": [],
      "chart_type": "metaPortlet",
      "keys": [{
        "col": "RYLB_TEXT",
        "colType": "varchar",
        "values": [],
        "display": true,
        "id": "29b19207-f4b8-43ca-9391-d921ec15ac4b",
        "type": "eq",
        "$$hashKey": "object:713",
        "alias": "RYLB_TEXT"
      }],
      "values": [{
        "name": "",
        "cols": [{
          "col": "A01008_BA_2",
          "colDataType": "decimal",
          "expCalFormulaReplace": "",
          "series": {
            "percentile": true,
            "decimaldigits": 2
          },
          "expCalFormula": "",
          "column_type": "measure",
          "aggregate_type": "sum",
          "$$hashKey": "object:717",
          "alias": "A01008"
        }],
        "$$hashKey": "object:711"
      }],
      "groups": [],
      "filters": [],
      "newChartType": "",
      "option": {
        "DESCRIPTION": "需要一个行维，一个轴字段",
        "BAMetaAttributes": {
          "isshowline": '2'
        },
        "chartColorSet": "technologyblue",
        "richTitle": "",
        "chartColorList": ["#51ddf4", "#e5a506", "#fd767e", "#258df4", "#138c44", "#f9ff06", "#ed1b48",
          "#8cc63f", "#0000ff", "#9b0094", "#15e532", "#ff6700", "#cd70e0", "#238c5c", "#4657f2"
        ],
        "title": {
          "subtext": "",
          "left": "center",
          "text": "",
          "textStyle": {
            "fontFamily": "sans-serif",
            "color": "rgb(255, 255, 255)",
            "fontSize": "12",
            "fontStyle": "normal",
            "fontWeight": "normal"
          },
          "subtextStyle": {
            "fontFamily": "sans-serif",
            "color": "rgb(255, 255, 255)",
            "fontSize": "12",
            "fontStyle": "normal",
            "fontWeight": "normal"
          }
        },
        "metaPortletType": "096999ce-ce75-4787-856b-090c4a92af51",
        "autorefresh": false
      }
    };
    var namefield = orgOptions.keys[0].col; //行维字段名
    var valuefield = orgOptions.values[0].cols[0].col; //轴字段名1
    var tooltipFormatter = "{b}: {c} 个";
    var tooltip = {
      show: true,
      trigger: 'item',
      formatter: tooltipFormatter
    };
    if (!tooltipFormatter) {
      tooltip.show = false
    }
    var seriesName = orgOptions.values[0].cols[0].alias || orgOptions.values[0].cols[0].col;
    name = data[0][namefield];
    var colorList = ['#0092F3', '#F49F32', '#FFD42A', '#F87F01'];
    var showData = []; //显示的data
    var sum = 0;
    for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
      var item = data[i];
      var obj = {
        value: item[valuefield],
        name: item[namefield]
      };
      showData.push(obj);
      sum = sum + item[valuefield];
    }
    var option = {
      color: colorList,
      tooltip: tooltip,
      title: {
        zlevel: 0,
        text: sum + "个",
        top: '45%',
        left: '35%',
        textAlign: 'center',
        itemGap: 10,
        textStyle: {
          color: '#000',
          fontSize: 20,
        },
        subtextStyle: {
          fontSize: 20,
          color: '#000',
        },
      },
      grid: {
        right: 150,
        top: 20,
      },
      legend: {
        show: true,
        right: 180,
        top: 'center',
        type: 'scroll',
        orient: 'vertical',
        align: 'left',
        icon: "rect",
        itemWidth: 10,
        itemHeight: 10,
        itemGap: 30,
        formatter: (name) => {
          var thisItem;
          for (var i = 0; i < showData.length; i++) {
            if (showData[i].name === name) {
              thisItem = showData[i];
            }
          }
          // return (
          //   // {name|' + item.name + '} "{name|" + name + "}  \n {percent|"
          //   "{name|" + name + "} " + "\n" + "{name|" + thisItem.value + '条' + "} " + "{percent|" + ((thisItem.value /
          //     sum) * 100).toFixed(0) + "%}"
          // );
          return (
            "{name|" + name + "} " + '   ' + "{number|" + (thisItem.value)  + "个}"
          );
        },
        textStyle: {
          color: "#999999", //元字颜色
          rich: {
            name: {
              color: '#999999',
              fontSize: 16,
              lineHeight: 20,
            },
            number: {
              color: '#0074FF',
              fontSize: 16,
              lineHeight: 20,
            }
          }
        },
      },
      series: [
        // 主要展示层的
        {
          name: seriesName,
          radius: ['45%', '62%'],
          center: ['35%', '50%'],
          type: 'pie',
          hoverOffset: 0,
          label: {
            show: false,
            color: '#eeeeee',
            fontSize: 14
          },
          labelLine: {
            normal: {
              show: false,
              lineStyle: {
                color: '#d3d3d3'
              },
              align: 'right'
            },
            color: "#000",
            emphasis: {
              show: false,
            }
          },
          data: showData
        },
      ]
    };
    echart.setOption(option);
  },
  methods: {
  }
};
</script>

<template>
  <div id="cdwl" class="container">

              <div class="item-num" :class="{'red': item.count != 0 && item.name != '有课教室数'}" :style="{'font-size': left1Width*11/274+'px'}">{{ item.count }}</div>

          <div class="left1-item1" @click="handleReset">

          >
            <three-pie v-if="powerPercent!=null" name="电源在线占比" :value="powerPercent" start-color="#00FBBF" end-color="#0CB1B4" />
            <three-pie v-if="lockPercent!=null" name="门锁在线占比" :value="lockPercent" start-color="#65F2F5" end-color="#2B72FC" />

            :list-items="listItems1"
          />

        </div>
        <!-- 右五 -->

          <grid-header header-text="当天手动调课记录" />
          <daily-record v-if="this.listItems3.length > 0" :list-items="listItems3" />
          <img v-else class="que" src="@/assets/images/index/que.png">
        </div>
