</template>
<script>
import MerchantInfo from '@/components/Index/MerchantInfo.vue'
import TimerStatistics from '@/components/Index/TimerStatistics.vue'
import DataMonitoring from '@/components/Index/DataMonitoring.vue'
import DailyRecord from '@/components/Index/DailyRecord.vue'
import GridHeader from '@/components/Index/GridHeader.vue'
import SwitchComponent from '@/components/Index/SwitchComponent.vue'
import ThreePie from '@/components/Index/ThreePie.vue'
import Barchart from './charts/BarChart'
import GateTreeChart from '@/views/charts/GateTreeChart'
import PowerTreeChart from '@/views/charts/PowerTreeChart'
import { getRoomStatusNums, getRoomList, getPowNum, getExchanges, listData, countData, getPowerData } from '@/api/index'
import Vue from 'vue'
import fullscreen from 'vue-fullscreen'
Vue.use(fullscreen)
export default {
  components: {
    MerchantInfo, TimerStatistics, DataMonitoring, DailyRecord, GridHeader,
    ThreePie, Barchart, GateTreeChart, PowerTreeChart, SwitchComponent
  },
  data() {
    return {
      // 左一被选中的
      selectLeftOne: [],
      isSchedule: null,
      theDate: '',
      theWeek: '',
      allfull: false, // 是否全屏
      leftOneList: [],
      listItems: [],
      listItems1: [],
      listItems2: [],
      listItems3: [],
      powerPercent: null,
      lockPercent: null,
      techingWeek: null,
      classSection: null,
      syncPercent: null,
      syncPercent1: null,
      // 获取元素宽度高度
      left1Width: null,
      headerWidth: null,
      centerZIndex: 1,  // 弹窗组件的z-index等级
      rightZIndex: 1
    }
  },
  computed: {
    shouldShowPie() {
      return this.powerPercent !== null && this.lockPercent !== null && this.syncPercent !== null && this.syncPercent1 !== null
    }
  },
  mounted() {
    this.getCurrentDateTime()
    this.updateTopContentHeight()
    window.addEventListener('resize', this.updateTopContentHeight)
    getRoomStatusNums().then(res => {
      this.leftOneList = res.data
    })
    this.getRoomList()
    listData({ jobGroupNe: 'TBCD' }).then(res => {
      this.listItems1 = res.data
    })
    listData({ jobGroup: 'TBCD' }).then(res => {
      this.listItems2 = res.data
    })
    getExchanges().then(res => {
      // 把日期时间转化为时间
      this.listItems3 = res.data.map(obj => {
        if (obj.createTime) {
          return {
            ...obj,
            createTime: obj.createTime.split(' ')[1]
          }
        }
        return obj
      })
    })
    getPowNum().then(res => {
      this.powerPercent = res.data.powerPercent
      this.lockPercent = res.data.lockPercent
      // 如果有课就赋值，并存储到localStorage
      if (res.data.techingWeek) {
        this.techingWeek = res.data.techingWeek
        localStorage.setItem('techingWeek', res.data.techingWeek)
      } else {
        // 如果无课，尝试从localStorage中恢复
        this.techingWeek = localStorage.getItem('techingWeek') || this.techingWeek
      }
      // 如果有课时段就赋值，并存储到localStorage
      if (res.data.classSection) {
        this.classSection = res.data.classSection
        localStorage.setItem('classSection', res.data.classSection)
      } else {
        // 如果无课时段，尝试从localStorage中恢复
        this.classSection = localStorage.getItem('classSection') || this.classSection
      }
    })
    countData({ jobGroup: 'TBCD' }).then(res => {
      this.syncPercent = res.data
    })
    countData({ jobGroup: 'DEFAULT' }).then(res => {
      this.syncPercent1 = res.data
    })
    this.refresh()
  },
  created() {
    this.techingWeek = localStorage.getItem('techingWeek') || null
    this.classSection = localStorage.getItem('classSection') || null
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    window.removeEventListener('resize', this.updateTopContentHeight)
    clearInterval(this.refreshIntervalLeft1)
    clearInterval(this.refreshIntervalLeft2)
    clearInterval(this.refreshIntervalRight1)
    clearInterval(this.refreshIntervalRight3)
    clearInterval(this.refreshIntervalRight4)
    clearInterval(this.refreshIntervalRight5)
  },
  methods: {
    // 查询左二列表
    getRoomList() {
      getRoomList({ querys: this.selectLeftOne.join(','), isSchedule: this.isSchedule }).then(res => {
        this.listItems = res.rows
      })
    },
    // 左一选择
    setActive(key) {
      const index = this.selectLeftOne.indexOf(key)
      if (index > -1) {
        // 如果key已经在selectLeftOne中，就从数组中移除它
        this.selectLeftOne.splice(index, 1)
      } else {
        // 如果key不在selectLeftOne中，就加入到数组中
        this.selectLeftOne.push(key)
      }
      this.getRoomList()
    },
    // 左一重置
    handleReset() {
      this.selectLeftOne = []
      this.getRoomList()
    },
    // 组装时间
    getCurrentDateTime: function() {
      // 获取当前时间
      var now = new Date()
      // 获取年、月、日
      var year = now.getFullYear()
      var month = now.getMonth() + 1 // 月份从0开始，需要加1
      var day = now.getDate()
      // 获取星期
      var weekdays = ['日', '一', '二', '三', '四', '五', '六']
      var dayOfWeek = now.getDay()
      var weekday = '星期' + weekdays[dayOfWeek]
      // 格式化输出
      this.theDate = year + '年' + this.addZeroPrefix(month) + '月' + this.addZeroPrefix(day) + '日 '
      this.theWeek = weekday
    },
    addZeroPrefix: function(num) {
      // 在单个数字前加上0前缀
      return num < 10 ? '0' + num : num
    },
    // 双击全屏
    dboubleClick() {
      this.$store.commit('SET_MENUFLAG')
      // 事件总线起始页面
      this.$fullscreen.toggle()
    },
    // 根据宽度计算字号
    updateTopContentHeight() {
      this.$nextTick(() => {
        this.left1Width = this.$refs.left1.offsetWidth
        this.headerWidth = this.$refs.header.offsetWidth
      })
    },
    // 定时刷新
    refresh() {
      // 左1定时
      this.refreshIntervalLeft1 = setInterval(() => {
        getRoomStatusNums().then(res => {
          this.leftOneList = res.data
        })
      }, 60000)
      // 左2定时
      this.refreshIntervalLeft2 = setInterval(() => {
        this.getRoomList()
      }, 60000)
      // 右1和左上标题定时
      this.refreshIntervalRight1 = setInterval(() => {
        getPowNum().then(res => {
          this.powerPercent = res.data.powerPercent
          this.lockPercent = res.data.lockPercent
          // 如果res.data.techingWeek存在，更新techingWeek并存储到localStorage
          if (res.data.techingWeek) {
            this.techingWeek = res.data.techingWeek
            localStorage.setItem('techingWeek', res.data.techingWeek)
          } else {
            // 如果不存在，则尝试从localStorage获取
            this.techingWeek = localStorage.getItem('techingWeek') || this.techingWeek
          }
          // 同理对classSection进行处理
          if (res.data.classSection) {
            this.classSection = res.data.classSection
            localStorage.setItem('classSection', res.data.classSection)
          } else {
            this.classSection = localStorage.getItem('classSection') || this.classSection
          }
        })
        countData({ jobGroup: 'TBCD' }).then(res => {
          this.syncPercent = res.data
        })
        countData({ jobGroup: 'DEFAULT' }).then(res => {
          this.syncPercent1 = res.data
        })
      }, 60000)
      // 右3定时
      this.refreshIntervalRight3 = setInterval(() => {
        listData({ jobGroupNe: 'TBCD' }).then(res => {
          this.listItems1 = res.data
        })
      }, 60000)
      // 右4定时
      this.refreshIntervalRight4 = setInterval(() => {
        listData({ jobGroup: 'TBCD' }).then(res => {
          this.listItems2 = res.data
        })
      }, 60000)
      // 右5定时
      this.refreshIntervalRight5 = setInterval(() => {
        getExchanges().then(res => {
          // 把日期时间转化为时间
          this.listItems3 = res.data.map(obj => {
            if (obj.createTime) {
              return {
                ...obj,
                createTime: obj.createTime.split(' ')[1]
              }
            }
            return obj
          })
        })
      }, 60000)
    },
    // 切换实验室/教室
    changeClassroom(value) {
      if (value === 1) {
        this.isSchedule = null
      } else {
        this.isSchedule = '1'
      }
      this.getRoomList()
    },
    // 中间部分弹窗打开层级升高
    centerZIndexHeigh(newCondition) {
      if (newCondition) {
        this.centerZIndex = 2    // 打开时是2，关闭时是1
      }
    },
    // 中间部分弹窗关闭层级降低
    centerZIndexLow(newCondition) {
      if (!newCondition) {
        this.centerZIndex = 1    // 打开时是2，关闭时是1
      }
    },
    // 右侧部分弹窗打开层级升高
    rightZIndexHeigh(newCondition) {
      if (newCondition) {
        this.rightZIndex = 2    // 打开时是2，关闭时是1
      }
    },
    // 右侧部分弹窗关闭层级降低
    rightZIndexLow(newCondition) {
      if (!newCondition) {
        this.rightZIndex = 1    // 打开时是2，关闭时是1
      }
    }
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch" label-width="68px">
      <el-form-item label="任务名称" prop="jobName">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.jobName"
          placeholder="请输入任务名称"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="任务组名" prop="jobGroup">
        <el-select v-model="queryParams.jobGroup" placeholder="请选择任务组名" clearable>
          <el-option
            v-for="dict in dict.type.sys_job_group"
            :key="dict.value"
            :label="dict.label"
            :value="dict.value"
          />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="任务状态" prop="status">
        <el-select v-model="queryParams.status" placeholder="请选择任务状态" clearable>
          <el-option
            v-for="dict in dict.type.sys_job_status"
            :key="dict.value"

            :value="dict.value"
          />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="执行状态" prop="status">

          v-model="queryParams.lastStatus"

          clearable
        >
          <el-option
            v-for="dict in dict.type.sys_common_status"
            :key="dict.value"

          />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item>
        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">

          icon="el-icon-plus"

          v-hasPermi="['monitor:job:add']"
        >新增</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">

          type="success"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-edit"
          size="mini"
          :disabled="single"
          @click="handleUpdate"
          v-hasPermi="['monitor:job:edit']"
        >修改</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="danger"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-delete"
          size="mini"
          :disabled="multiple"
          @click="handleDelete"
          v-hasPermi="['monitor:job:remove']"
        >删除</el-button>
      </el-col>

        <template slot-scope="scope">

        <template slot-scope="scope">

          ></el-switch>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>

        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="最后执行时间" align="center" prop="createTime" width="180">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <span>{{ parseTime(scope.row.lastTime) }}</span>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['monitor:job:edit']"
          >修改</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-delete"
            @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['monitor:job:remove']"
          >删除</el-button>
          <el-dropdown size="mini" @command="(command) => handleCommand(command, scope.row)" v-hasPermi="['monitor:job:changeStatus', 'monitor:job:query']">
            <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-d-arrow-right">更多</el-button>
            <el-dropdown-menu slot="dropdown">
              <el-dropdown-item command="handleRun" icon="el-icon-caret-right"
                v-hasPermi="['monitor:job:changeStatus']">执行一次</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="handleView" icon="el-icon-view"
                v-hasPermi="['monitor:job:query']">任务详细</el-dropdown-item>
              <el-dropdown-item command="handleJobLog" icon="el-icon-s-operation"
                v-hasPermi="['monitor:job:query']">调度日志</el-dropdown-item>
            </el-dropdown-menu>
          </el-dropdown>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination
      v-show="total>0"
      :total="total"
      :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
      :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
      @pagination="getList"
    />
    <!-- 添加或修改定时任务对话框 -->
    <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="open" width="800px" append-to-body>
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="120px">
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="任务名称" prop="jobName">
              <el-input v-model="form.jobName" placeholder="请输入任务名称" />
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="任务分组" prop="jobGroup">
              <el-select v-model="form.jobGroup" placeholder="请选择任务分组">
                <el-option
                  v-for="dict in dict.type.sys_job_group"
                  :key="dict.value"
                  :label="dict.label"
                  :value="dict.value"
                ></el-option>
              </el-select>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item prop="invokeTarget">
              <span slot="label">
                调用方法
                <el-tooltip placement="top">
                  <div slot="content">
                    Bean调用示例：ryTask.ryParams('ry')
                    <br />Class类调用示例：com.chenrise.quartz.task.RyTask.ryParams('ry')
                    <br />参数说明：支持字符串，布尔类型，长整型，浮点型，整型
                  </div>
                  <i class="el-icon-question"></i>
                </el-tooltip>
              </span>
              <el-input v-model="form.invokeTarget" placeholder="请输入调用目标字符串" />
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item label="cron表达式" prop="cronExpression">
              <el-input v-model="form.cronExpression" placeholder="请输入cron执行表达式">
                <template slot="append">
                  <el-button type="primary" @click="handleShowCron">
                    生成表达式
                    <i class="el-icon-time el-icon--right"></i>
                  </el-button>
                </template>
              </el-input>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item label="执行策略" prop="misfirePolicy">
              <el-radio-group v-model="form.misfirePolicy" size="small">
                <el-radio-button label="1">立即执行</el-radio-button>
                <el-radio-button label="2">执行一次</el-radio-button>
                <el-radio-button label="3">放弃执行</el-radio-button>
              </el-radio-group>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="是否并发" prop="concurrent">
              <el-radio-group v-model="form.concurrent" size="small">
                <el-radio-button label="0">允许</el-radio-button>
                <el-radio-button label="1">禁止</el-radio-button>
              </el-radio-group>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="状态">
              <el-radio-group v-model="form.status">
                <el-radio
                  v-for="dict in dict.type.sys_job_status"
                  :key="dict.value"
                  :label="dict.value"
                >{{dict.label}}</el-radio>
              </el-radio-group>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <el-dialog title="Cron表达式生成器" :visible.sync="openCron" append-to-body destroy-on-close class="scrollbar">
      <crontab @hide="openCron=false" @fill="crontabFill" :expression="expression"></crontab>
    </el-dialog>
    <!-- 任务日志详细 -->
    <el-dialog title="任务详细" :visible.sync="openView" width="700px" append-to-body>
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" label-width="120px" size="mini">
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="任务编号：">{{ form.jobId }}</el-form-item>
            <el-form-item label="任务名称：">{{ form.jobName }}</el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="任务分组：">{{ jobGroupFormat(form) }}</el-form-item>
            <el-form-item label="创建时间：">{{ form.createTime }}</el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="cron表达式：">{{ form.cronExpression }}</el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="下次执行时间：">{{ parseTime(form.nextValidTime) }}</el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item label="调用目标方法：">{{ form.invokeTarget }}</el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="任务状态：">
              <div v-if="form.status == 0">正常</div>
              <div v-else-if="form.status == 1">失败</div>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="是否并发：">
              <div v-if="form.concurrent == 0">允许</div>
              <div v-else-if="form.concurrent == 1">禁止</div>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="执行策略：">
              <div v-if="form.misfirePolicy == 0">默认策略</div>
              <div v-else-if="form.misfirePolicy == 1">立即执行</div>
              <div v-else-if="form.misfirePolicy == 2">执行一次</div>
              <div v-else-if="form.misfirePolicy == 3">放弃执行</div>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button @click="openView = false">关 闭</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { listJob, getJob, delJob, addJob, updateJob, runJob, changeJobStatus } from "@/api/monitor/job";
import Crontab from '@/components/Crontab'
export default {
  components: { Crontab },
  name: "Job",
  dicts: ['sys_job_group', 'sys_job_status','sys_common_status'],
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      // 非单个禁用
      single: true,
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 定时任务表格数据
      jobList: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      // 是否显示详细弹出层
      openView: false,
      // 是否显示Cron表达式弹出层
      openCron: false,
      // 传入的表达式
      expression: "",
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        jobName: undefined,
        jobGroup: undefined,
        status: undefined,
        lastStatus:null
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {},
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
        jobName: [
          { required: true, message: "任务名称不能为空", trigger: "blur" }
        ],
        invokeTarget: [
          { required: true, message: "调用目标字符串不能为空", trigger: "blur" }
        ],
        cronExpression: [
          { required: true, message: "cron执行表达式不能为空", trigger: "blur" }
        ]
      }
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询定时任务列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listJob(this.queryParams).then(response => {
        this.jobList = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    // 任务组名字典翻译
    jobGroupFormat(row, column) {
      return this.selectDictLabel(this.dict.type.sys_job_group, row.jobGroup);
    },
    // 取消按钮
    cancel() {
      this.open = false;
      this.reset();
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.form = {
        jobId: undefined,
        jobName: undefined,
        jobGroup: undefined,
        invokeTarget: undefined,
        cronExpression: undefined,
        misfirePolicy: 1,
        concurrent: 1,
        status: "0"
      };
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.jobId);
      this.single = selection.length != 1;
      this.multiple = !selection.length;
    },
    // 更多操作触发
    handleCommand(command, row) {
      switch (command) {
        case "handleRun":
          this.handleRun(row);
          break;
        case "handleView":
          this.handleView(row);
          break;
        case "handleJobLog":
          this.handleJobLog(row);
          break;
        default:
          break;
      }
    },
    // 任务状态修改
    handleStatusChange(row) {
      let text = row.status === "0" ? "启用" : "停用";
      this.$modal.confirm('确认要"' + text + '""' + row.jobName + '"任务吗？').then(function() {
        return changeJobStatus(row.jobId, row.status);
      }).then(() => {
        this.$modal.msgSuccess(text + "成功");
      }).catch(function() {
        row.status = row.status === "0" ? "1" : "0";
      });
    },
    /* 立即执行一次 */
    handleRun(row) {
      this.$modal.confirm('确认要立即执行一次"' + row.jobName + '"任务吗？').then(function() {
        return runJob(row.jobId, row.jobGroup);
      }).then(() => {
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("执行成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 任务详细信息 */
    handleView(row) {
      getJob(row.jobId).then(response => {
        this.form = response.data;
        this.openView = true;
      });
    },
    /** cron表达式按钮操作 */
    handleShowCron() {
      this.expression = this.form.cronExpression;
      this.openCron = true;
    },
    /** 确定后回传值 */
    crontabFill(value) {
      this.form.cronExpression = value;
    },
    /** 任务日志列表查询 */
    handleJobLog(row) {
      const jobId = row.jobId || 0;
      this.$router.push({ path: '/monitor/job-log/index', query: { jobId: jobId } })
    },
    /** 新增按钮操作 */
    handleAdd() {
      this.reset();
      this.open = true;
      this.title = "添加任务";
    },
    /** 修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset();
      const jobId = row.jobId || this.ids;
      getJob(jobId).then(response => {
        this.form = response.data;
        this.open = true;
        this.title = "修改任务";
      });
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm: function() {
      this.$refs["form"].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          if (this.form.jobId != undefined) {
            updateJob(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          } else {
            addJob(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          }
        }
      });
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const jobIds = row.jobId || this.ids;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除定时任务编号为"' + jobIds + '"的数据项？').then(function() {
        return delJob(jobIds);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.download('schedule/job/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `job_${new Date().getTime()}.xlsx`)
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch" label-width="68px">
      <el-form-item label="任务名称" prop="jobName">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.jobName"
          placeholder="请输入任务名称"
          clearable
          style="width: 240px"
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="任务组名" prop="jobGroup">
        <el-select
          v-model="queryParams.jobGroup"
          placeholder="请选择任务组名"
          clearable
          style="width: 240px"
        >
          <el-option
            v-for="dict in dict.type.sys_job_group"
            :key="dict.value"
            :label="dict.label"
            :value="dict.value"
          />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="执行状态" prop="status">
        <el-select
          v-model="queryParams.status"
          placeholder="请选择执行状态"
          clearable
          style="width: 240px"
        >
          <el-option
            v-for="dict in dict.type.sys_common_status"
            :key="dict.value"
            :label="dict.label"
            :value="dict.value"
          />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="执行时间">
        <el-date-picker
          v-model="dateRange"
          style="width: 240px"
          value-format="yyyy-MM-dd"
          type="daterange"
          range-separator="-"
          start-placeholder="开始日期"
          end-placeholder="结束日期"
        ></el-date-picker>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item>
        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="danger"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-delete"
          size="mini"
          :disabled="multiple"
          @click="handleDelete"
          v-hasPermi="['monitor:job:remove']"
        >删除</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="danger"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-delete"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleClean"
          v-hasPermi="['monitor:job:remove']"
        >清空</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="warning"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-download"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleExport"
          v-hasPermi="['monitor:job:export']"
        >导出</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="warning"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-close"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleClose"
        >关闭</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <right-toolbar :showSearch.sync="showSearch" @queryTable="getList"></right-toolbar>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="jobLogList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
      <el-table-column label="日志编号" width="80" align="center" prop="jobLogId" />
      <el-table-column label="任务名称" align="center" prop="jobName" :show-overflow-tooltip="true" />
      <el-table-column label="任务组名" align="center" prop="jobGroup" :show-overflow-tooltip="true">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <dict-tag :options="dict.type.sys_job_group" :value="scope.row.jobGroup"/>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="调用目标字符串" align="center" prop="invokeTarget" :show-overflow-tooltip="true" />
      <el-table-column label="日志信息" align="center" prop="jobMessage" :show-overflow-tooltip="true" />
      <el-table-column label="执行状态" align="center" prop="status">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <dict-tag :options="dict.type.sys_common_status" :value="scope.row.status"/>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="执行时间" align="center" prop="createTime" width="180">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <span>{{ parseTime(scope.row.createTime) }}</span>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-view"
            @click="handleView(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['monitor:job:query']"
          >详细</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination
      v-show="total>0"
      :total="total"
      :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
      :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
      @pagination="getList"
    />
    <!-- 调度日志详细 -->
    <el-dialog title="调度日志详细" :visible.sync="open" width="700px" append-to-body>
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" label-width="100px" size="mini">
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="日志序号：">{{ form.jobLogId }}</el-form-item>
            <el-form-item label="任务名称：">{{ form.jobName }}</el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="任务分组：">{{ form.jobGroup }}</el-form-item>
            <el-form-item label="执行时间：">{{ form.createTime }}</el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item label="调用方法：">{{ form.invokeTarget }}</el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item label="日志信息：">{{ form.jobMessage }}</el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item label="执行状态：">
              <div v-if="form.status == 0">正常</div>
              <div v-else-if="form.status == 1">失败</div>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="24">
            <el-form-item label="异常信息：" v-if="form.status == 1">{{ form.exceptionInfo }}</el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button @click="open = false">关 闭</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { getJob} from "@/api/monitor/job";
import { listJobLog, delJobLog, cleanJobLog } from "@/api/monitor/jobLog";
export default {
  name: "JobLog",
  dicts: ['sys_common_status', 'sys_job_group'],
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 调度日志表格数据
      jobLogList: [],
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      // 日期范围
      dateRange: [],
      // 表单参数
      form: {},
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        jobName: undefined,
        jobGroup: undefined,
        status: undefined
      }
    };
  },
  created() {
    const jobId = this.$route.query.jobId;
    if (jobId !== undefined && jobId != 0) {
      getJob(jobId).then(response => {
        this.queryParams.jobName = response.data.jobName;
        this.queryParams.jobGroup = response.data.jobGroup;
        this.getList();
      });
    } else {
      this.getList();
    }
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询调度日志列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listJobLog(this.addDateRange(this.queryParams, this.dateRange)).then(response => {
          this.jobLogList = response.rows;
          this.total = response.total;
          this.loading = false;
        }
      );
    },
    // 返回按钮
    handleClose() {
      const obj = { path: "/monitor/job" };
      this.$tab.closeOpenPage(obj);
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.dateRange = [];
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.jobLogId);
      this.multiple = !selection.length;
    },
    /** 详细按钮操作 */
    handleView(row) {
      this.open = true;
      this.form = row;
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const jobLogIds = this.ids;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除调度日志编号为"' + jobLogIds + '"的数据项？').then(function() {
        return delJobLog(jobLogIds);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 清空按钮操作 */
    handleClean() {
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认清空所有调度日志数据项？').then(function() {
        return cleanJobLog();
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("清空成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.download('schedule/job/log/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `log_${new Date().getTime()}.xlsx`)
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" label-width="68px">
      <el-form-item label="登录地址" prop="ipaddr">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.ipaddr"
          placeholder="请输入登录地址"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="用户名称" prop="userName">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.userName"
          placeholder="请输入用户名称"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item>
        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <el-table
      v-loading="loading"
      :data="list.slice((pageNum-1)*pageSize,pageNum*pageSize)"
      style="width: 100%;"
    >
      <el-table-column label="序号" type="index" align="center">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <span>{{(pageNum - 1) * pageSize + scope.$index + 1}}</span>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="会话编号" align="center" prop="tokenId" :show-overflow-tooltip="true" />
      <el-table-column label="登录名称" align="center" prop="userName" :show-overflow-tooltip="true" />
      <el-table-column label="主机" align="center" prop="ipaddr" :show-overflow-tooltip="true" />
      <el-table-column label="登录时间" align="center" prop="loginTime" width="180">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <span>{{ parseTime(scope.row.loginTime) }}</span>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-delete"
            @click="handleForceLogout(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['monitor:online:forceLogout']"
          >强退</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total>0" :total="total" :page.sync="pageNum" :limit.sync="pageSize" />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { list, forceLogout } from "@/api/monitor/online";
export default {
  name: "Online",
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 表格数据
      list: [],
      pageNum: 1,
      pageSize: 10,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        ipaddr: undefined,
        userName: undefined
      }
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询登录日志列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      list(this.queryParams).then(response => {
        this.list = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    /** 强退按钮操作 */
    handleForceLogout(row) {
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认强退名称为"' + row.userName + '"的用户？').then(function() {
        return forceLogout(row.tokenId);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("强退成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <el-dialog title="巡检上报问题" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
    <el-card>
      <el-descriptions
        title="基础信息"
        :column="1"
        border
        :label-style="{'width': '120px','text-align':'center'}"
        :content-style="{'text-align':'center'}"
      >
        <el-descriptions-item label="巡检点名称">{{ formItem.pointName }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="位置描述">{{ formItem.location }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item v-if="formItem.faultType" label="故障类型">{{ formItem.params.faultTypeName }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="巡检人">{{ formItem.userName }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="上报时间">{{ formItem.arriveTime }}</el-descriptions-item>
      </el-descriptions>
    </el-card>
    <el-divider />
    <el-card>
      <el-descriptions
        :column="3"
        title="巡检项"
        border
        :label-style="{'width': '160px','text-align':'center'}"
        :content-style="{'text-align':'center'}"
      >
        <el-descriptions-item v-for="item in formItem.itemInspects" :label="item.inspectName" :content-style="{'text-align':'center','color':item.result==='2'?'red':'green'}">{{ item.params.resultName }}</el-descriptions-item>
      </el-descriptions>
      <el-descriptions :column="1" border :label-style="{'width': '160px'}">
        <el-descriptions-item label="图片">
          <el-image v-for="item in formItem.pictureList" v-if="formItem.pictureUrl&&formItem.pictureUrl.length" :key="item" :src="item" :preview-src-list="formItem.pictureList"  style="width: 50px;height: 50px;margin-right: 10px;" />
          <span v-else>暂无图片</span>
        </el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="情况说明">{{ formItem.description }}</el-descriptions-item>
      </el-descriptions>
    </el-card>
    <el-divider />
    <el-card v-if="formItem.processStatus==='2'">
      <el-descriptions
        title="问题处理"
        :column="1"
        border
        :label-style="{'width': '120px','text-align':'center'}"
        :content-style="{'text-align':'center'}"
      >
        <el-descriptions-item label="处理状态">{{ formItem.params.processStatusName }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="处理人员">{{ formItem.dealBy }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="完成处理时间">{{ formItem.dealTime }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="处理结果">{{ formItem.dealRemark }}</el-descriptions-item>
      </el-descriptions>
    </el-card>
    <el-card v-if="audit&&formItem.processStatus==='1'">
      <el-form ref="form" :model="auditItem" label-width="140px">
        <el-form-item label="处理结果" prop="dealRemark" :rules="[{ required: true, message: '处理结果不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]">
          <el-input v-model="auditItem.dealRemark" type="textarea" placeholder="请输入处理结果" maxlength="100" show-word-limit clearable />
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
    </el-card>
    <div v-if="audit&&formItem.processStatus==='1'" slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
      <el-button type="primary" :loading="saveLoading" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
</template>
<script>
import {
  getAbnormal, updateAbnormal
} from '@/api/patrol/abnormal'
import { addPoints, updatePoints } from '@/api/patrol/points'
export default {
  name: 'JobDetailAbnormal',
  components: {
  },
  props: {
    id: {
      type: Number,
      default: 0
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    audit: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    auditItem: {
      type: Object,
      default: {}
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
      formItem: {
        pictureList: [],
        params: {}
      }
    }
  },
  created() {
    getAbnormal(this.id).then(e => {
      this.formItem = e.data
      this.formItem.pictureList = []
      if (this.formItem.pictureUrl != null && this.formItem.pictureUrl != undefined) {
        this.formItem.pictureList = this.formItem.pictureUrl.split(',')
      }
    })
  },
  methods: {
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['form'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          updateAbnormal(this.auditItem).then(res => {
            this.saveLoading = false
            this.$message.success('保存成功')
            this.handleClose()
            this.loadData()
          })
        }
      })
    },
    loadData() {
      this.$emit('loadData')
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery"
            :records.sync="records"
            />
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="warning"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-download"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleExport"
          v-hasPermi="['patrol:abnormal:export']"
        >
          导出
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
      <el-table-column type="index" width="55"/>
      <el-table-column label="巡检点名称" align="center" prop="pointName" width="120"/>
      <el-table-column label="位置描述" align="center" prop="location" width="150"/>
      <el-table-column label="故障类型" align="center" prop="params.faultTypeName" width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="图片" align="center" >
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-image v-if="scope.row.pictureUrl&&scope.row.pictureUrl.length"
                    v-for="item in scope.row.pictureList"
                    :key="item"
                    :src="item"
                    style="width: 50px;height: 50px;margin-right: 20px;"
                    :preview-src-list="scope.row.pictureList">
          </el-image>
          <span v-else>暂无图片</span>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="情况说明" align="center" prop="description" width="180" show-overflow-tooltip/>
      <el-table-column label="巡检人员" align="center" prop="userName" width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="上报时间" align="center" prop="arriveTime" width="140" />
      <el-table-column label="状态" align="center" prop="params.processStatusName" width="100"/>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" width="100">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-eye"
            @click="handleDetail(scope.row)"
          >查看</el-button>
          <el-button
            v-if="scope.row.processStatus==='1'"
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-eye"
            @click="deal(scope.row)"
          >处理</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0"
                :total="total"
                :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
                :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList" />
    <Detail ref="add"
            v-if="addVisible"
            :visible.sync="addVisible"
            :id="id"
            :audit-item="auditItem"
            :audit="audit"
            @loadData="getList"/>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {listAbnormal,updateAbnormal} from "@/api/patrol/abnormal";
import Search from "./search";
import Detail from "./detail";
import Add from "@/views/jufe/reservation/set/add.vue";
export default {
  components: {Add, Search, Detail },
  name: "Abnormal",
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      addVisible:false,
      audit:false,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        pointName: null,
        faultType:null,
        processStatus: null,
        dateRange:[],
        params:{
          ids:[],
          startTime:null,
          endTime:null
        }
      },
      id:null,
      ids:null,
      auditItem:{
        id:null,
        processStatus:null,
        dealRemark: null
      }
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.id)
    },
    /** 查询计划列列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      this.queryParams.params.startTime = null
      this.queryParams.params.endTime = null
      if(this.queryParams.dateRange!=null&&this.queryParams.dateRange.length>0){
        this.queryParams.params.startTime = this.queryParams.dateRange[0]
        this.queryParams.params.endTime = this.queryParams.dateRange[1]
      }
      listAbnormal(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows;
        this.records.forEach(e=>{
          if(e.pictureUrl!=null&&e.pictureUrl!=undefined){
            e.pictureList = e.pictureUrl.split(",")
          }
        })
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      }).catch(e=>{
        this.loading = false
      });
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.queryParams.ids = null
      this.getList();
    },
    handleDetail(row) {
      this.id=row.id
      this.title='巡检上报问题'
      this.addVisible = true
      this.audit = false
    },
    deal(row) {
      this.id = row.id
      this.title='处理巡检问题'
      this.addVisible = true
      this.audit = true
      this.auditItem.id = row.id
      this.auditItem.processStatus = "2"
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.queryParams.params.ids = null
      this.queryParams.params.ids = this.ids
        this.download('patrol/abnormal/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `巡检问题上报.xlsx`)
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true"  label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="巡检点名称" prop="pointName">
      <el-input
        v-model="queryParams.pointName"
        placeholder="请输入巡检点名称"
        clearable
        @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
      />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="故障类型" prop="faultType">
      <dict-select v-model="queryParams.faultType" clearable placeholder="请选择故障类型" dict-type="patrol_fault_type"/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="状态" prop="processStatus">
      <dict-select v-model="queryParams.processStatus" clearable placeholder="请选择状态" dict-type="patrol_process_status"/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="问题上报时间" prop="dateRange">
      <el-date-picker
        v-model="queryParams.dateRange"
        type="datetimerange"
        align="right"
        unlink-panels
        range-separator="至"
        start-placeholder="开始日期"
        end-placeholder="结束日期"
        :picker-options="pickerOptions"
        value-format="yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss">
      </el-date-picker>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
export default {
  name: "PlanSearch",
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      pickerOptions: {
        shortcuts: [{
          text: '最近一周',
          onClick(picker) {
            const end = new Date();
            const start = new Date();
            start.setTime(start.getTime() - 3600 * 1000 * 24 * 7);
            picker.$emit('pick', [start, end]);
          }
        }, {
          text: '最近一个月',
          onClick(picker) {
            const end = new Date();
            const start = new Date();
            start.setTime(start.getTime() - 3600 * 1000 * 24 * 30);
            picker.$emit('pick', [start, end]);
          }
        }, {
          text: '最近三个月',
          onClick(picker) {
            const end = new Date();
            const start = new Date();
            start.setTime(start.getTime() - 3600 * 1000 * 24 * 90);
            picker.$emit('pick', [start, end]);
          }
        }]
      },
    };
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.queryParams.dataRange = []
      this.queryParams.params.ids = null
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
    <el-form ref="form" :model="formItem" label-width="140px">
      <el-form-item
        label="版本号"
        prop="versionNum"
        :rules="[{ required: true, message: '版本号不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isInt, message: '请输入正确版本号,版本号为数字格式！', trigger: 'blur' }]"
      >
        <el-input  maxlength="8" v-model="formItem.versionNum" />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="文件" ref="image" prop="apkUrl">
        <el-upload
          ref="uploadPicUrl"
          :limit="1"
          accept=".apk"
          :action="uploadPicUrl.url"
          :headers="uploadPicUrl.headers"
          :file-list="uploadPicUrl.fileList"
          :on-progress="handleFileUploadProgressPicUrl"
          :on-success="handleFileSuccessPicUrl"
          :auto-upload="true">
          <el-button slot="trigger" size="small" type="primary">选取文件</el-button>
          <div slot="tip" class="el-upload__tip">只能上传apk文件</div>
        </el-upload>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
      <el-button  type="primary" :loading="saveLoading" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button  @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
</template>
<script>
import {
  add,update
} from "@/api/patrol/apksource";
import {isInt} from '@/utils/validate'
import { getToken } from '@/utils/auth'
export default {
  name: "ApkSource",
  props:{
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default() {
        return { hidden: false, breadcrumb: true }
      }
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    title:{
      type:String,
      default:''
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
      // 上传参数
      uploadPicUrl: {
        // 设置上传的请求头部
        headers: { Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken() },
        // 上传的地址 /网关/控制器
        url: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API + "/patrol/apksource/upload",
        // 上传的文件列表
        fileList: []
      },
      headers: {
        Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken(),
      },
    }
  },
  created() {
    if(this.formItem.id){
      this.uploadPicUrl.fileList.push(this.formItem.apkUrl)
    }
  },
  methods: {
    isInt:isInt,
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.resetForm('form')
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['form'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          if (this.formItem.deviceId) {
            // 修改
            update(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          } else {
            add(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          }
        }
      })
    },
    loadData() {
      this.$emit('loadData')
    },
    // 文件提交处理
    submitUpload() {
      this.$refs.uploadPicUrl.submit();
    },
    // 文件上传中处理
    handleFileUploadProgressPicUrl(event, file, fileList) {
      this.uploadPicUrl.isUploading = true;
    },
    // 文件上传成功处理
    handleFileSuccessPicUrl(response, file, fileList) {
      this.uploadPicUrl.isUploading = false;
      this.formItem.apkUrl = response.data.url;
    },
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery" :records.sync="records"/>
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleUpdate()"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:apksource:add']"
        >新增
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records">
      <el-table-column type="index" label="序号" align="center" width="50"/>
      <el-table-column label="版本号" align="center" prop="versionNum"/>
      <el-table-column key="status" label="下载" align="center" width="120">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-download" @click="downloadApk(scope.row)" >下载</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" fixed="right" width="200">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-delete" @click="handleDelete(scope.row)" v-hasPermi="['jufe:lock:remove']">删除</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList"
    />
    <Add ref="add" v-if="addVisible" :visible.sync="addVisible" @loadData="getList" :form-item="formItem"
         :title="title"
    />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { list, del } from '@/api/patrol/apksource'
import Search from './search'
import Add from './add'
export default {
  components: { Search, Add },
  name: 'Apksource',
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      addVisible: false,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        versionNum: null,
      },
      formItem: {},
      title: '新增'
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true
      list(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows
        this.total = response.total
        this.loading = false
      }).catch(e => {
        this.loading = false
      })
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1
      this.getList()
    },
    /** 新增&修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.title = '新增'
      this.showDetail = false
      if (row) {
        this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
        this.title = '修改'
      }
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const ids = row.id ;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确定删除?').then(function() {
        return del(ids);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    downloadApk(row){
      let a = document.createElement('a')
      a.href =row.apkUrl
      a.click();
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.formItem = {
        id:null,
        versionNum: null,
        apkUrl: null
      }
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" :inline="true" label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="版本号" prop="versionNum">
      <el-input v-model="queryParams.versionNum"  placeholder="请输入版本号" clearable />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
export default {
  name: "Plan",
  components: {
    Treeselect
  },
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
    };
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.queryParams.dataRange = []
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>
<style scoped>
  .line-style{
    float: right;
    display: flex;
    margin-right: 20px;
  }
  .itemstyle{
    margin-left: 20px;
    margin-right: 20px;
  }
</style>
<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <div>
  <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
    <el-form ref="form" :model="formItem" label-width="140px" :disabled="showDetail">
      <el-form-item label="巡检组名称" prop="groupName" :rules="[{ required: true, message: '巡检组名称不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]">
        <el-input v-model="formItem.groupName" placeholder="请输入巡检组名称" maxlength="50" show-word-limit clearable/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="巡检组成员" prop="userNum" :rules="[{ required: true, message: '巡检组成员不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          size="small"
          @click="openUser"
        >
          选择
        </el-button>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-table
        :data="formItem.users"
        style="width: 100%"
        max-height="520"
      >
        <el-table-column label="序号" align="center" type="index" />
        <el-table-column label="姓名" align="center" prop="nickName" />
<!--        <el-table-column label="手机号" align="center" prop="phonenumber" />-->
        <el-table-column label="所在部门" align="center" prop="dept.deptName" />
      </el-table>
    </el-form>
    <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer" v-if="!showDetail">
      <el-button type="primary"  :loading="saveLoading"  @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
  <Users v-if="userVisible" :visible.sync="userVisible" :formItem="formItem"/>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  addGroups,updateGroups
} from "@/api/patrol/groups";
import Users from './users'
import {isInt} from "@/utils/validate";
export default {
  name: "GroupsAdd",
  components: {
    Users
  },
  props:{
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default:{}
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    showDetail: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    title:{
      type:String,
      default:''
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
      userVisible:false,
    }
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    isInt:isInt,
    removePoint(val){
      this.formItem.users.splice(val, 1);
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.resetForm('form')
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    //打开地图
    openUser(){
      this.userVisible=true
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['form'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          if (this.formItem.id) {
            // 修改
            updateGroups(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          } else {
            addGroups(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          }
        }
      })
    },
    loadData() {
      this.$emit('loadData')
    },
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery"
            :records.sync="records"
            />
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleUpdate()"
          v-hasPermi="['patrol:groups:add']"
        >新增巡检组
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
      <el-table-column label="序号" align="center" type="index" />
      <el-table-column label="巡检组名称" align="center" prop="groupName" />
      <el-table-column label="巡检组成员" align="center" prop="groupMembers" />
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['patrol:groups:edit']"
          >修改</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-eye"
            @click="handleDetail(scope.row)"
          >查看</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-delete"
            @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['patrol:groups:remove']"
          >删除</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList" />
    <Add ref="add" v-if="addVisible" :visible.sync="addVisible"
         @loadData="getList"
         :form-item="formItem"
         :showDetail="showDetail"
         :title="title"
    />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  listGroups,delGroups
} from "@/api/patrol/groups";
import Search from "./search";
import Add from "./add";
export default {
  components: { Search, Add },
  name: "Groups",
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      addVisible:false,
      ids:[],
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        groupName: null,
        groupMembers:null
      },
      formItem:{},
      title:'新增巡检组',
      showDetail:false,
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.id)
    },
    /** 查询计划列列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listGroups(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      }).catch(e=>{
        this.loading = false
      });
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 新增&修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.title='新增巡检组'
      this.showDetail=false
      if (row) {
        row.userNum = row.users.length
        this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
        this.title = '编辑巡检组'
      }
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    handleDetail(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
      this.title='巡检组详情'
      this.showDetail = true
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const ids = row.id || this.ids;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确定删除?如果删除该巡检组，将无法使用!').then(function() {
        return delGroups(ids);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.showDetail = false
      this.formItem = {
        id: null,
        name: null,
        users:[],
        userNum:null
      }
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true"  label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="巡检组名称" prop="groupName">
      <el-input
        v-model="queryParams.groupName"
        placeholder="请输入巡检组名称"
        clearable
        @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
      />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="巡检组成员" prop="groupMembers">
      <el-input
        v-model="queryParams.groupMembers"
        placeholder="请输入巡检组成员"
        clearable
        @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
      />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
export default {
  name: "GroupSearch",
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
    };
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <div>
  <el-dialog title="选择巡检人" :visible.sync="visible" width="900px" height="900px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="closePage">
    <el-transfer
      v-model="selectIds"
      :data="allRecords"
      :titles="['未选', '已选']"
      filterable
      :props="{
        key: 'userId',
        label: 'nickName'
      }"
      :render-content="renderFunc"
      :filter-method="filterFunc"
    />
    <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
      <el-button type="primary"  :loading="saveLoading"  @click="choose">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button @click="closePage">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  listUsers,
} from "@/api/patrol/groups";
export default {
  name: "RoutePoints",
  components: {
    Map
  },
  props:{
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default:{}
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
      allRecords:[],
      selectIds: [],
      selectRecords:[]
    }
  },
  created() {
    listUsers({userType:'01,02',isPatrol:'Y'}).then((response) => {
        this.allRecords = response.rows;
    })
    if(this.formItem.users!=undefined&&this.formItem.users.length>0){
       this.formItem.users.forEach(e=>{
         this.selectIds.push(e.userId)
       })
    }
  },
  methods: {
    renderFunc(h, option) {
      //- {option.phonenumber}
      return <span>{ option.nickName } - { option.dept?option.dept.deptName:'' } </span>;
    },
    filterFunc(query, item) {
      return item.nickName.indexOf(query)>-1
    },
    // 点击确定按钮
    choose() {
      this.selectRecords = []
      this.allRecords.forEach(e=>{
        if(this.selectIds.includes(e.userId)){
          this.selectRecords.push(e)
        }
      })
      if(this.selectRecords.length===0){
        this.formItem.userNum = null
      }else {
        this.formItem.userNum = this.selectRecords.length
      }
      this.formItem.users = this.selectRecords
      this.$emit('update:formItem', this.formItem)
      // 关闭地图页
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
    },
    // 关闭地图页
    closePage() {
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
    },
  }
}
</script>
<style scoped>

  background: #FFFFFF;
  display: inline-block;
  vertical-align: middle;
  width: 338px;
  height: 600px;
  max-height: 100%;
  -webkit-box-sizing: border-box;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  position: relative;
}
/deep/ .el-transfer-panel__list.is-filterable {
  height: 500px;
  padding-top: 0;
}
</style>

        <DictSelect v-model="formItem.type" dict-type="patrol_check_type"/>

      <el-form-item
        label="巡检项排序"

        :rules="[{ required: true, message: '巡检项排序不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]"
      >
        <el-input-number v-model="formItem.sortNum" placeholder="请输入巡检项排序" controls-position="right" :min="0" :step="0.01" :precision="2" :max="9999" style="width: 330px"/>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>

<script>
import {
  addItem,updateItem
} from "@/api/patrol/inspectionitem";
import {isInt} from '@/utils/validate'
export default {
  name: "InspectionItemAdd",
  props:{
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default() {
        return { hidden: false, breadcrumb: true }
      }
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    title:{
      type:String,
      default:''
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
    }
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    isInt:isInt,
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.resetForm('form')
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['form'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          if (this.formItem.id) {
            // 修改
            updateItem(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          } else {
            addItem(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          }
        }
      })
    },
    loadData() {
      this.$emit('loadData')
    },
    // 文件提交处理
    submitUpload() {
      this.$refs.uploadPicUrl.submit();
    },
    // 文件上传中处理
    handleFileUploadProgressPicUrl(event, file, fileList) {
      this.uploadPicUrl.isUploading = true;
    },
    // 文件上传成功处理
    handleFileSuccessPicUrl(response, file, fileList) {
      this.uploadPicUrl.isUploading = false;
      this.formItem.apkUrl = response.data.url;
    },
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery" :records.sync="records"/>
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleUpdate()"
          v-hasPermi="['patrol:inspectionItem:add']"
        >新增
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records">
      <el-table-column type="index" label="序号" align="center" width="50"/>
      <el-table-column label="巡检项" align="center" prop="name"/>
      <el-table-column label="类型" align="center" prop="typeName"/>
      <el-table-column label="排序" align="center" prop="sortNum"/>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width" fixed="right" width="200">
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-edit" @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)" v-hasPermi="['jufe:lock:edit']">修改</el-button>
          <el-button size="mini" type="text" icon="el-icon-delete" @click="handleDelete(scope.row)" v-hasPermi="['jufe:lock:remove']">删除</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList"
    />
    <Add ref="add" v-if="addVisible" :visible.sync="addVisible" @loadData="getList" :form-item="formItem"
         :title="title"
    />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { listItem, delItem } from '@/api/patrol/inspectionitem'
import Search from './search'
import Add from './add'
export default {
  components: { Search, Add },
  name: 'InspectionItem',
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      addVisible: false,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        type: null,
      },
      formItem: {},
      title: '新增'
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true
      listItem(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows
        this.total = response.total
        this.loading = false
      }).catch(e => {
        this.loading = false
      })
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1
      this.getList()
    },
    /** 新增&修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.title = '新增'
      this.showDetail = false
      if (row) {
        this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
        this.title = '修改'
      }
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const ids = row.id ;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确定删除?').then(function() {
        return delItem(ids);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.formItem = {
        id:null,
        name: null,
        type: null,
        sortNum: null,
      }
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" :inline="true" label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="类型" prop="type">
      <DictSelect v-model="queryParams.type" dict-type="patrol_check_type"/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
import Treeselect from '@riophae/vue-treeselect';
import '@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css';
export default {
  name: "Plan",
  components: {
    Treeselect
  },
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
    };
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.queryParams.dataRange = []
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
