<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <div>
  <el-dialog title="巡检上报问题" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
    <el-card>
      <el-descriptions title="基础信息" :column="1" border
                       :labelStyle="{'width': '120px','text-align':'center'}"
                       :content-style="{'text-align':'center'}">
        <el-descriptions-item label="巡检点名称">{{formItem.pointName}}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="位置描述">{{formItem.location }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="故障类型" v-if="formItem.faultType">{{formItem.params.faultTypeName}}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="巡检人">{{ formItem.userName }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="上报时间">{{ formItem.arriveTime }}</el-descriptions-item>
      </el-descriptions>
    </el-card>
    <el-divider/>
    <el-card >
      <el-descriptions :column="3" title="巡检项" border   :labelStyle="{'width': '160px','text-align':'center'}"
                       :content-style="{'text-align':'center'}">
        <el-descriptions-item v-for="item in formItem.itemInspects" :label="item.inspectName" :content-style="{'text-align':'center','color':item.result==='2'?'red':'green'}">{{item.params.resultName}}</el-descriptions-item>
      </el-descriptions>
      <el-descriptions :column="1"  border  :labelStyle="{'width': '150px'}">
        <el-descriptions-item label="图片" >
          <el-image v-if="formItem.pictureUrl&&formItem.pictureUrl.length" v-for="item in formItem.pictureList" :key="item" :src="item" style="width: 100px;height: 100px;margin-right: 20px;" :preview-src-list="formItem.pictureList"></el-image>
          <span v-else>暂无图片</span>
        </el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="情况说明" >{{formItem.description}}</el-descriptions-item>
      </el-descriptions>
    </el-card>
    <el-divider/>
    <el-card   v-if="formItem.processStatus==='2'" >
      <el-descriptions title="问题处理" :column="1" border  :labelStyle="{'width': '120px','text-align':'center'}"
                       :content-style="{'text-align':'center'}">
        <el-descriptions-item label="处理状态">{{formItem.params.processStatusName}}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="处理人员">{{formItem.dealBy }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="完成处理时间">{{ formItem.dealTime }}</el-descriptions-item>
        <el-descriptions-item label="处理结果">{{ formItem.dealRemark }}</el-descriptions-item>
      </el-descriptions>
    </el-card>
  </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  getAbnormal
} from "@/api/patrol/job";
export default {
  name: "JobDetailAbnormal",
  components: {
  },
  props:{
    jobId: {
      type: Number,
      default:0
    },
    pointId:{
      type:Number,
      default:0
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      formItem:{
        pictureList:[],
        params:{}
      }
    }
  },
  created() {
    getAbnormal(this.jobId,this.pointId).then(e=>{
      this.formItem = e.data
      this.formItem.pictureList = []
      if(this.formItem.pictureUrl!=null&&this.formItem.pictureUrl!=undefined){
        this.formItem.pictureList = this.formItem.pictureUrl.split(",")
      }
    })
  },
  methods:{
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <div>
  <el-dialog title="任务详情" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
    <el-descriptions  :column="1" border>
      <el-descriptions-item label="任务名称">{{formItem.name}}</el-descriptions-item>
      <el-descriptions-item label="任务状态">{{formItem.params.statusName }}</el-descriptions-item>
      <el-descriptions-item label="计划任务时间">{{formItem.startTime}} - {{formItem.endTime}}</el-descriptions-item>
      <el-descriptions-item label="实际执行时间">{{formItem.realStartTime}} - {{formItem.realEndTime}}</el-descriptions-item>
      <el-descriptions-item label="巡检人员">{{ formItem.userName }}</el-descriptions-item>
      <el-descriptions-item label="巡检模式">{{ formItem.params.modeName }}</el-descriptions-item>
      <el-descriptions-item label="巡检结果">
        正常：<span style="color:green;">{{formItem.params.normalNum}}</span>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;
        异常：<span style="color:red;">{{formItem.params.abnormalNum}}</span>
      </el-descriptions-item>
    </el-descriptions>
    <el-divider></el-divider>
    <el-table
      key="userTable"
      :data="formItem.items"
      style="width: 100%"
      max-height="400"
    >
      <el-table-column label="序号" align="center" type="index" />
      <el-table-column label="巡检点名称" align="center" prop="pointName" />
      <el-table-column label="巡检结果" align="center" >
        <template v-slot="scope">
          <el-tag v-if="scope.row.result==='1'" type="success">正常</el-tag>
          <el-tag v-if="scope.row.result==='2'" @click="showAbnormal(scope.row)" type="danger">异常</el-tag>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="巡检人员" align="center" prop="userName"/>
      <el-table-column label="巡检时间" align="center" prop="arriveTime"/>
    </el-table>
    <Abnormal ref="add" v-if="abnormalVisable" :visible.sync="abnormalVisable"
            :job-id="jobId" :point-id="pointId"
    />
  </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  getJob
} from "@/api/patrol/job";
import Abnormal from "./abnormal"
export default {
  name: "JobDetail",
  components: {
    Abnormal
  },
  props:{
    jobId: {
      type: Number,
      default:0
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
      abnormalVisable:false,
      pointId:null,
      formItem:{
        params:{}
      }
    }
  },
  created() {
    getJob(this.jobId).then(e=>{
      this.formItem = e.data
    })
  },
  methods:{
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    showAbnormal(row){
      this.pointId = row.pointId
      this.abnormalVisable = true
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery"
            :records.sync="records"
            />
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="warning"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-download"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleExport"
          v-hasPermi="['patrol:job:export']"
        >
          导出
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records" >
      <el-table-column type="index" />
      <el-table-column label="任务名称" align="center" prop="name" width="220"/>
      <el-table-column label="任务开始时间" align="center" prop="startTime" width="180"/>
      <el-table-column label="任务结束时间" align="center" prop="endTime" width="180"/>
      <el-table-column label="实际开始时间" align="center" prop="realStartTime" width="180"/>
      <el-table-column label="实际结束时间" align="center" prop="realEndTime" width="180"/>
      <el-table-column label="巡检人员" align="center" prop="userName" />
      <el-table-column label="巡检模式" align="center" prop="params.modeName"/>
      <el-table-column label="任务状态" align="center" prop="params.statusName"/>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-eye"
            @click="handleDetail(scope.row)"
          >查看</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList" />
    <Detail ref="add" v-if="addVisible" :visible.sync="addVisible"
         @loadData="getList"
         :job-id="formItem.id"
    />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  listJob
} from "@/api/patrol/job";
import Search from "./search";
import Detail from "./detail";
export default {
  components: { Search, Detail },
  name: "Job",
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      addVisible:false,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        name: null,
        mode:null,
        status:null,
        dateRange:[],
        startDate:null,
        endDate:null,
        params:{}
      },
      formItem:{},
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询计划列列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      this.queryParams.params.start = null
      this.queryParams.params.end = null
      if(this.queryParams.dateRange&&this.queryParams.dateRange.length){
          this.queryParams.params.start = this.queryParams.dateRange[0]
          this.queryParams.params.end = this.queryParams.dateRange[1]
      }
      listJob(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      }).catch(e=>{
        this.loading = false
      });
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    handleDetail(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
      this.formItem.dateRange = [this.formItem.startDate,this.formItem.endDate]
      this.title='巡检任务详情'
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.showDetail = false
      this.formItem = {
        id: null,
        name: null,
        startTime: null,
        endTime: null,
        realStartTime: null,
        realEndTime: null,
        userId: null,
        userName: null,
        mode: null,
        status: null,
      }
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.download('patrol/job/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `巡检任务.xlsx`)
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true"  label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="任务名称" prop="name">
      <el-input
        v-model="queryParams.name"
        placeholder="请输入任务名称"
        clearable
        @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
      />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="巡检模式" prop="mode">
      <dict-select dict-type="patrol_mode" v-model="queryParams.mode" clearable/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="任务状态" prop="status">
      <dict-select dict-type="patrol_job_status" v-model="queryParams.status" clearable/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="计划日期范围" prop="dateRange">
      <el-date-picker
        v-model="queryParams.dateRange"
        type="daterange"
        align="right"
        unlink-panels
        range-separator="至"
        start-placeholder="开始日期"
        end-placeholder="结束日期"
        value-format="yyyy-MM-dd"
        :picker-options="pickerOptions">
      </el-date-picker>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
export default {
  name: "PlanSearch",
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      pickerOptions: {
        shortcuts: [{
          text: '最近一周',
          onClick(picker) {
            const end = new Date();
            const start = new Date();
            start.setTime(start.getTime() - 3600 * 1000 * 24 * 7);
            picker.$emit('pick', [start, end]);
          }
        }, {
          text: '最近一个月',
          onClick(picker) {
            const end = new Date();
            const start = new Date();
            start.setTime(start.getTime() - 3600 * 1000 * 24 * 30);
            picker.$emit('pick', [start, end]);
          }
        }, {
          text: '最近三个月',
          onClick(picker) {
            const end = new Date();
            const start = new Date();
            start.setTime(start.getTime() - 3600 * 1000 * 24 * 90);
            picker.$emit('pick', [start, end]);
          }
        }]
      },
    };
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.queryParams.dataRange = []
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container" >
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button

          </template>

          </template>

          <template v-slot="scope">

<script>
import { listJxz, syncJXZ, updateStatus } from '@/api/patrol/jxz'
export default {
  name: "Info",
  data() {
    return {
      jxzList:[]
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
  },
  methods: {
    getList() {
      listJxz().then(res => {
        this.jxzList = res.data;
      });
    },
    updateSignle(id,status){
      const params = {id:id,status:status}
      const loading = this.$loading({
        lock: true,
        text: 'Loading',
        spinner: 'el-icon-loading',
        background: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)'
      });
      updateStatus(params).then(res=>{
          this.getList()
          loading.close()
      }).catch(e=>{
        loading.close()
      })
    },
    updateBatch(xq,status){
      const params = {xq:xq,status:status}
      const loading = this.$loading({
        lock: true,
        text: 'Loading',
        spinner: 'el-icon-loading',
        background: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)'
      });
      updateStatus(params).then(res=>{
        this.getList()
        loading.close()
      }).catch(e=>{
        loading.close()
      })
    },
    syncJxz(){
      const loading = this.$loading({
        lock: true,
        text: 'Loading',
        spinner: 'el-icon-loading',
        background: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)'
      });
      syncJXZ().then(res=>{
        this.getList()
        loading.close()
      }).catch(e=>{
        loading.close()
      })
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <div>
  <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
    <el-form ref="form" :model="formItem" label-width="140px" :disabled="showDetail">
      <el-tabs type="border-card">
        <el-tab-pane label="基本信息">
          <el-form-item label="计划名称" prop="name" :rules="[{ required: true, message: '计划名称不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]">
            <el-input v-model="formItem.name" placeholder="请输入计划名称" maxlength="50" show-word-limit clearable/>
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item label="巡检模式" prop="mode" :rules="[{ required: true, message: '巡检模式不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]">
            <dict-select type="radio" v-model="formItem.mode" dict-type="patrol_mode" placeholder="请选择巡检模式"/>
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item label="巡检项" prop="inspectItemidsArr" :rules="[{ required: true, message: '巡检项不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]">
            <el-select v-model="formItem.inspectItemidsArr" placeholder="请选择" multiple style="width: 500px;">
              <el-option-group
                v-for="(item,index) in inspectList"
                :label="item.name"
                :key="index"
              >
                <el-option
                  v-for="item1 in item.children"
                  :key="item1.id"
                  :label="item1.name"
                  :value="item1.id+''">
                </el-option>
              </el-option-group>
            </el-select>
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item label="循环周期" prop="periodType" :rules="[{ required: true, message: '循环周期不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]">
            <dict-select v-model="formItem.periodType" dict-type="patrol_period_type" placeholder="请选择循环周期"/>
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item label="任务执行时间"  class="is-required">
            <el-row>
              <el-col :span="3">
                <el-form-item prop="startWeek" v-if="formItem.periodType==='4'">
                <dict-select key="startWeek" :exclude="startWeekEc"   clearable
                             v-model="formItem.startWeek" :dict-type="'patrol_plan_week'" @change="changeWeek('1')"/>
                </el-form-item>
                <el-form-item prop="startDay" v-else-if="formItem.periodType==='5'">
                <dict-select key="startMonth" :exclude="startMonthEc"  clearable
                             v-model="formItem.startDay" :dict-type="'patrol_plan_month'" @change="changeMonth('1')"/>
                </el-form-item>
              </el-col>
              <el-col :span="7">
                <el-time-picker
                  style="width: 150px;"
                  format="HH:mm"
                  value-format="HH:mm"
                  v-model="formItem.startTime"
                  placeholder="开始时间">
                </el-time-picker>
              </el-col>
              <el-col :span="1">至</el-col>
              <el-col :span="3">
                <dict-select key="endWeek" :exclude="endWeekEc" v-if="formItem.periodType==='4'" clearable
                             v-model="formItem.endWeek" dict-type="patrol_plan_week" @change="changeWeek('2')"/>
                <dict-select key="endMonth" :exclude="endMonthEc" v-else-if="formItem.periodType==='5'" clearable
                             v-model="formItem.endDay" dict-type="patrol_plan_month" @change="changeMonth('2')"/>
              </el-col>
              <el-col :span="7">
                <el-time-picker
                  style="width: 150px;"
                  format="HH:mm"
                  value-format="HH:mm"
                  :picker-options="{
                    selectableRange:formItem.startTime+':00-23:59:59'
                  }"
                  v-model="formItem.endTime"
                  placeholder="结束时间">
                </el-time-picker>
              </el-col>
            </el-row>
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item label="计划日期范围" prop="dateRange" :rules="[{ required: true, message: '计划日期范围不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]">
            <el-date-picker
              @change="changeDateRange"
              v-model="formItem.dateRange"
              value-format="yyyy-MM-dd"
              type="daterange"
              range-separator="至"
              start-placeholder="开始日期"
              end-placeholder="结束日期"
              :picker-options="pickerOptions"
            >
            </el-date-picker>
            <el-button type="primary" @click="reviewJob" v-if="!showDetail">任务预览</el-button>
          </el-form-item>
          <el-table
            v-if="!showDetail"
            :data="jobList"
            style="width: 100%"
            max-height="300"
          >
            <el-table-column
              prop="title"
              align="center"
              label="根据输入的循环周期、任务执行时间、计划日期范围，将生成如下任务：">
            </el-table-column>
          </el-table>
        </el-tab-pane>
        <el-tab-pane label="巡检内容" >
          <el-form-item label="巡检内容" class="is-required" v-if="!showDetail">
            <el-button @click="openPoint" type="primary">选择巡检内容</el-button>
          </el-form-item>
          <el-table
            key="pointTable"
            :data="formItem.points"
            style="width: 100%"
            max-height="520"
          >
            <el-table-column
              prop="name"
              align="center"
              width="200"
              label="巡检点名称">
            </el-table-column>
            <el-table-column
              prop="location"
              align="center"
              label="巡检点位置">
            </el-table-column>
            <el-table-column
              width="100"
              align="center"
              label="排序">
              <template v-slot="scope">
                <el-form-item
                  label-width="0"
                  :prop="'points.' + scope.$index + '.sortNum'"
                  :rules="[
                  { required: true, message: '排序号不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isInt, message: '请输入正确排序号', trigger: 'blur' }
                ]">
                  <el-input
                    v-model="scope.row.sortNum"
                    placeholder="请输入排序号"
                  />
                </el-form-item>
              </template>
            </el-table-column>
          </el-table>
        </el-tab-pane>
        <el-tab-pane label="巡检人员">
          <el-form-item label="巡检人员" class="is-required" v-if="!showDetail">
            <el-button @click="openUser" type="primary">选择巡检人员</el-button>
          </el-form-item>
          <el-table
            key="userTable"
            :data="formItem.users"
            style="width: 100%"
            max-height="520"
          >
            <el-table-column label="序号" align="center" type="index" />
            <el-table-column label="姓名" align="center" prop="nickName" />
<!--            <el-table-column label="手机号" align="center" prop="phonenumber" />-->
            <el-table-column label="所在部门" align="center" prop="dept.deptName" />
          </el-table>
        </el-tab-pane>
      </el-tabs>
    </el-form>
    <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer" v-if="!showDetail">
      <el-button type="primary"  :loading="saveLoading"  @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
    <Points v-if="pointVisable" :visible.sync="pointVisable" :formItem="formItem"/>
    <Users v-if="userVisable" :visible.sync="userVisable" :formItem="formItem"/>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  addPlan,updatePlan,reviewJob,getInspectList
} from "@/api/patrol/plan";
import Points from './points'
import Users from './users'
import {isInt} from "@/utils/validate";
export default {
  name: "PlanAdd",
  components: {
    Users,
    Points
  },
  props:{
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default:{}
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    showDetail: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    title:{
      type:String,
      default:''
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      pickerOptions: {
        disabledDate(time) {
          return time.getTime() < Date.now();
        },
        // shortcuts: [{
        //   text: '今天',
        //   onClick(picker) {
        //     picker.$emit('pick', new Date());
        //   }
        // }, {
        //   text: '昨天',
        //   onClick(picker) {
        //     const date = new Date();
        //     date.setTime(date.getTime() - 3600 * 1000 * 24);
        //     picker.$emit('pick', date);
        //   }
        // }, {
        //   text: '一周前',
        //   onClick(picker) {
        //     const date = new Date();
        //     date.setTime(date.getTime() - 3600 * 1000 * 24 * 7);
        //     picker.$emit('pick', date);
        //   }
        // }]
      },
      saveLoading: false,
      pointVisable:false,
      userVisable:false,
      startWeekEc:[],
      endWeekEc:[],
      startMonthEc:[],
      endMonthEc:[],
      jobList:[],
      inspectList:[]
    }
  },
  created() {
    if(this.formItem.id){
      this.formItem.points.sort(function(a,b){
        return a.sortNum-b.sortNum //a-b为升序
      })
    }
    getInspectList().then(e=>{
      this.inspectList = e.rows
      const allChildren = this.inspectList.flatMap(inspect => inspect.children || []);
      const validIdSet = new Set(allChildren.map(child => String(child.id)));
      this.formItem.inspectItemidsArr = this.formItem.inspectItemidsArr.filter(item => 
        validIdSet.has(String(item))
      );
    })
  },
  methods: {
    isInt:isInt,
    changeDateRange(val){
      if(val){
        this.formItem.startDate = val[0]
        this.formItem.endDate = val[1]
      }
    },
    changeWeek(val){
      if(val==='1'){
        this.endWeekEc = []
        if(this.formItem.startWeek){
            let start = Number(this.formItem.startWeek)
            for(let i = start;i>0;i--){
              this.endWeekEc.push(""+i)
            }
        }
      }else{
        this.startWeekEc = []
        if(this.formItem.endWeek){
          let end = Number(this.formItem.endWeek)
          for(let i = end;i<8;i++){
            this.startWeekEc.push(""+i)
          }
        }
      }
    },
    changeMonth(val){
      if(val==='1'){
        this.endMonthEc = []
        if(this.formItem.startDay){
          let start = Number(this.formItem.startDay)
          for(let i = start;i>0;i--){
            this.endMonthEc.push(""+i)
          }
        }
      }else{
        this.startMonthEc = []
        if(this.formItem.endDay){
          let end = Number(this.formItem.endDay)
          for(let i = end;i<32;i++){
            this.startMonthEc.push(""+i)
          }
        }
      }
    },
    //任务预览
    reviewJob(){
      if(!this.formItem.startDate||!this.formItem.endDate){
        this.$message.error("请选择计划日期范围！")
        return
      }
      if(this.formItem.periodType==='4'){
        if(!this.formItem.startWeek||!this.formItem.startTime||!this.formItem.endWeek||!this.formItem.endTime){
            this.$message.error("请选择任务执行时间！")
          return
        }
      }else if(this.formItem.periodType==='5'){
        if(!this.formItem.startDay||!this.formItem.startTime||!this.formItem.endDay||!this.formItem.endTime){
          this.$message.error("请选择任务执行时间！")
          return
        }
      }
      reviewJob(this.formItem).then(res=>{
        this.jobList = res.data
      })
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.resetForm('form')
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    //打开巡检点
    openPoint(){
      this.pointVisable=true
    },
    openUser(){
      this.userVisable=true
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['form'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          if(!this.formItem.users||this.formItem.users.length===0){
            this.$message.error("请至少选择一个巡检组或巡检人员！")
            return
          }
          if(!this.formItem.points||this.formItem.points.length===0){
            this.$message.error("请至少选择一个巡检路线或巡检点！")
            return
          }
          if(this.formItem.periodType==='4'){
            if(!this.formItem.startWeek||!this.formItem.startTime||!this.formItem.endWeek||!this.formItem.endTime){
              this.$message.error("请选择任务执行时间！")
              return
            }
          }else if(this.formItem.periodType==='5'){
            if(!this.formItem.startDay||!this.formItem.startTime||!this.formItem.endDay||!this.formItem.endTime){
              this.$message.error("请选择任务执行时间！")
              return
            }
          }else{
            if(!this.formItem.startTime||!this.formItem.endTime){
              this.$message.error("请选择任务执行时间！")
              return
            }
          }
          this.saveLoading = true
          this.formItem.inspectItemids = this.formItem.inspectItemidsArr.join(",")
          if (this.formItem.id) {
            // 修改
            updatePlan(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          } else {
            addPlan(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          }
        }
      })
    },
    loadData() {
      this.$emit('loadData')
    },
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery"
            :records.sync="records"
            />
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleUpdate()"
          v-hasPermi="['patrol:plan:add']"
        >新增计划
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
      <el-table-column label="序号" align="center" type="index" />
      <el-table-column label="计划名称" align="center" prop="name" />
      <el-table-column label="循环类型" align="center" prop="params.periodTypeName" />
      <el-table-column label="计划日期范围" align="center" >
          <template v-slot="scope">
            {{scope.row.startDate}}至{{scope.row.endDate}}
          </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="计划状态" align="center" prop="params.statusName" />
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button
            v-if="scope.row.status==='1'||scope.row.status==='4'"
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['patrol:plan:edit']"
          >编辑</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-eye"
            @click="handleDetail(scope.row)"
          >查看</el-button>
          <el-button
            v-if="scope.row.status==='4'"
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-video-play"
            @click="updateStatus(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['patrol:plan:updateStatus']"
          >启动</el-button>
          <el-button
            v-if="scope.row.status==='2'"
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-video-pause"
            @click="updateStatus(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['patrol:plan:updateStatus']"
          >暂停</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-delete"
            @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['patrol:plan:remove']"
          >删除</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList" />
    <Add ref="add" v-if="addVisible" :visible.sync="addVisible"
         @loadData="getList"
         :form-item="formItem"
         :showDetail="showDetail"
         :title="title"
    />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  listPlan,delPlan,updatePlanStatus
} from "@/api/patrol/plan";
import Search from "./search";
import Add from "./add";
export default {
  components: { Search, Add },
  name: "Plan",
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      addVisible:false,
      ids:[],
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        name: null,
        periodType:null,
        status:null,
        dateRangeStart:[],
        dateRangeEnd:[],
        params:{
          start_startDate:null,
          end_startDate:null,
          start_endDate:null,
          end_endDate:null
        }
      },
      formItem:{},
      title:'新增巡检计划',
      showDetail:false,
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.id)
    },
    /** 查询计划列列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      this.queryParams.params.start_startDate = null
      this.queryParams.params.end_startDate = null
      this.queryParams.params.start_endDate = null
      this.queryParams.params.end_endDate = null
      if(this.queryParams.dateRangeStart&&this.queryParams.dateRangeStart.length){
        this.queryParams.params.start_startDate = this.queryParams.dateRangeStart[0]
        this.queryParams.params.end_startDate = this.queryParams.dateRangeStart[1]
      }
      if(this.queryParams.dateRangeEnd&&this.queryParams.dateRangeEnd.length){
        this.queryParams.params.start_endDate = this.queryParams.dateRangeEnd[0]
        this.queryParams.params.end_endDate = this.queryParams.dateRangeEnd[1]
      }
      listPlan(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      }).catch(e=>{
        this.loading = false
      });
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 新增&修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.title='新增巡检计划'
      this.showDetail=false
      if (row) {
        row.inspectItemidsArr = []
        row.dateRange = []
        this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
        this.formItem.dateRange = [this.formItem.startDate,this.formItem.endDate]
        if(this.formItem.inspectItemids&&this.formItem.inspectItemids.length){
          this.formItem.inspectItemidsArr = this.formItem.inspectItemids.split(",")
        }
        this.title = '编辑巡检计划'
      }
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    handleDetail(row) {
      this.reset()
      row.inspectItemidsArr = []
      this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
      this.formItem.dateRange = [this.formItem.startDate,this.formItem.endDate]
      if(this.formItem.inspectItemids&&this.formItem.inspectItemids.length){
        this.formItem.inspectItemidsArr = this.formItem.inspectItemids.split(",")
      }
      this.title='巡检计划详情'
      this.showDetail = true
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const ids = row.id || this.ids;
      let title = "是否确定删除?计划删除后，将无法按原定计划定时生成任务!";
      this.$modal.confirm(title).then(function() {
        return delPlan(ids);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    updateStatus(row) {
      const title = row.status==='2'?'暂停，暂停后已生成的任务不影响，后续不再生成任务！':'启动，启动后将按当前计划日期范围继续生成任务'
      const status = row.status==='2'?'4':'2'
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确定'+title).then(function() {
        return updatePlanStatus({id:row.id,status:status});
      }).then((res) => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess(res.msg);
      }).catch((res) => {
        // this.$modal.msgSuccess(res.msg);
      });
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.showDetail = false
      this.formItem = {
        id: null,
        name: null,
        periodType:null,
        startWeek:null,
        startDay:null,
        startTime:null,
        endWeek:null,
        endDay:null,
        endTime:null,
        dateRange:null,
        startDate:null,
        endDate:null,
        routes:[],
        points:[],
        groups:[],
        users:[],
        inspectItemids:null,
        inspectItemidsArr:[]
      }
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <div>
  <el-dialog title="选择巡检点" :visible.sync="visible" width="900px" height="900px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="closePage">
    <el-tabs v-model="activeName" type="card" @tab-click="changeTab">
      <el-tab-pane label="巡检路线" name="first">
        <el-transfer
          ref="routes"
          key="routes"
          v-model="selectRouteIds"
          :data="allRoutes"
          :titles="['未选', '已选']"
          filterable
          :props="{
            key: 'id',
            label: 'name'
          }"
          :render-content="renderRouteFunc"
          :filter-method="filterRouteFunc"
          @change="selectRoute"
        />
      </el-tab-pane>
      <el-tab-pane label="巡检点" name="second">
        <el-transfer
            ref="points"
            key="points"
            v-model="selectIds"
            :data="allPoints"
            :titles="['未选', '已选']"
            filterable
            :props="{
              key: 'id',
              label: 'name'
            }"
            :render-content="renderFunc"
            :filter-method="filterFunc"
          />
      </el-tab-pane>
    </el-tabs>
    <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
      <el-button type="primary"  :loading="saveLoading"  @click="choose">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button @click="closePage">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  listAllPoints,
} from "@/api/patrol/points";
import {
  listAllRoutes,
} from "@/api/patrol/routes";
export default {
  name: "RoutePoints",
  components: {
    Map
  },
  props:{
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default:{}
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
      activeName:'first',
      allPoints:[],
      selectIds: [],
      selectPoints:[],
      allRoutes:[],
      selectRouteIds: [],
      selectRoutes:[]
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.listAllRoutes()
    let routePoints = []
    if(this.formItem.routes&&this.formItem.routes.length>0){
      this.selectRoutes = []
      this.selectRouteIds = []
      this.formItem.routes.forEach(e=>{
        this.selectRouteIds.push(e.id)
        this.selectRoutes.push(e)
        routePoints = routePoints.concat(e.items)
      })
    }
    this.listAllPoints()
    if(this.formItem.points&&this.formItem.points.length>0){
      let att = this.formItem.points.filter(item => !routePoints.includes(item));
      this.selectPoints = []
      this.selectIds = []
      att.forEach(e=>{
        this.selectIds.push(e.id)
      })
    }
  },
  methods: {
    changeTab(tab){
      if(tab.name==='second'){
        this.listAllPoints()
      }
    },
    listAllPoints(){
      let params = {params: {}}
      if(this.selectRoutes&&this.selectRoutes.length>0){
        let notInIds = []
        this.selectRoutes.forEach(e=>{
          e.items.forEach(item=>{
            notInIds.push(item.id)
          })
        })
        // 排除巡检路线中包含的巡检点
        this.selectIds = this.selectIds.filter(item => !notInIds.includes(item));
        params.params.notInIds = notInIds
      }
      listAllPoints(params).then((response) => {
        this.allPoints = response.rows;
      })
    },
    listAllRoutes(){
      listAllRoutes({}).then((response) => {
        this.allRoutes = response.rows;
      })
    },
    renderFunc(h, option) {
      return <span>{ option.name } - { option.location }</span>;
    },
    filterFunc(query, item) {
      return item.name.indexOf(query)>-1 || item.location.indexOf(query)>-1
    },
    renderRouteFunc(h, option) {
      return <span>{ option.name }</span>;
    },
    filterRouteFunc(query, item) {
      return item.name.indexOf(query)>-1
    },
    selectRoute(){
      this.selectRoutes = []
      this.allRoutes.forEach(e=>{
        if(this.selectRouteIds.includes(e.id)){
          this.selectRoutes.push(e)
        }
      })
    },
    // 点击确定按钮
    choose() {
      let index = 1
      this.selectPoints = []
      this.selectRoutes.forEach(e=>{
        e.items.forEach(item=>{
          item.sortNum = index
          this.selectPoints.push(item)
          index++
        })
      })
      this.allPoints.forEach(e=>{
        if(this.selectIds.includes(e.id)){
          e.sortNum = index
          this.selectPoints.push(e)
          index++
        }
      })
      // selectPoints去除重复数据
      this.selectPoints = this.selectPoints.filter((item, index, arr) => {
        return arr.findIndex(t => t.id === item.id) === index
      })
      this.formItem.routes = this.selectRoutes
      this.formItem.points = this.selectPoints
      this.$emit('update:formItem', this.formItem)
      // 关闭地图页
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
    },
    // 关闭地图页
    closePage() {
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
    },
  }
}
</script>
<style scoped>
/deep/ .el-transfer .el-transfer-panel {
  border: 1px solid #e6ebf5;
  border-radius: 4px;
  overflow: hidden;

  box-sizing: border-box;

}

  height: 500px;
  padding-top: 0;
}

<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true"  label-width="auto">
    <el-form-item label="计划名称" prop="name">
      <el-input
        v-model="queryParams.name"
        placeholder="请输入计划名称"
        clearable
        @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
      />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="循环类型" prop="periodType">
      <DictSelect dict-type="patrol_period_type" v-model="queryParams.periodType" clearable placeholder="请选择循环类型"/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="计划状态" prop="status">
      <DictSelect dict-type="patrol_plan_status" v-model="queryParams.status" clearable placeholder="请选择计划状态"/>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="计划开始日期范围" prop="dateRangeStart" >
      <el-date-picker
        v-model="queryParams.dateRangeStart"
        type="daterange"
        align="right"
        unlink-panels
        range-separator="至"
        start-placeholder="开始日期"
        end-placeholder="结束日期"
        :picker-options="pickerOptions"
        value-format="yyyy-MM-dd"
      >
      </el-date-picker>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item label="计划结束日期范围" prop="dateRangeEnd">
      <el-date-picker
        v-model="queryParams.dateRangeEnd"
        type="daterange"
        align="right"
        unlink-panels
        range-separator="至"
        start-placeholder="开始日期"
        end-placeholder="结束日期"
        :picker-options="pickerOptions"
        value-format="yyyy-MM-dd"
      >
      </el-date-picker>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
export default {
  name: "PlanSearch",
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      pickerOptions: {
        shortcuts: [{
          text: '最近一周',
          onClick(picker) {
            const end = new Date();
            const start = new Date();
            start.setTime(start.getTime() - 3600 * 1000 * 24 * 7);
            picker.$emit('pick', [start, end]);
          }
        }, {
          text: '最近一个月',
          onClick(picker) {
            const end = new Date();
            const start = new Date();
            start.setTime(start.getTime() - 3600 * 1000 * 24 * 30);
            picker.$emit('pick', [start, end]);
          }
        }, {
          text: '最近三个月',
          onClick(picker) {
            const end = new Date();
            const start = new Date();
            start.setTime(start.getTime() - 3600 * 1000 * 24 * 90);
            picker.$emit('pick', [start, end]);
          }
        }]
      },
    };
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.queryParams.dataRange = []
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <div>
  <el-dialog title="选择巡检人员" :visible.sync="visible" width="900px" height="900px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="closePage">
    <el-tabs v-model="activeName" type="card" @tab-click="changeTab">
      <el-tab-pane label="巡检组" name="first">
        <el-transfer
          ref="groups"
          key="groups"
          v-model="selectGroupIds"
          :data="allGroups"
          :titles="['未选', '已选']"
          filterable
          :props="{
            key: 'id',
            label: 'name'
          }"
          :render-content="renderGroupFunc"
          :filter-method="filterGroupFunc"
          @change="selectGroup"
        />
      </el-tab-pane>
      <el-tab-pane label="巡检人员" name="second">
        <el-transfer
            ref="users"
            key="users"
            v-model="selectIds"
            :data="allUsers"
            :titles="['未选', '已选']"
            filterable
            :props="{
              key: 'userId',
              label: 'nickName'
            }"
            :render-content="renderFunc"
            :filter-method="filterFunc"
          />
      </el-tab-pane>
    </el-tabs>
    <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
      <el-button type="primary"  :loading="saveLoading"  @click="choose">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button @click="closePage">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  listAllGroups,listUsers
} from "@/api/patrol/groups";
export default {
  name: "GroupUsers",
  components: {
  },
  props:{
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default:{}
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
      activeName:'first',
      allUsers:[],
      selectIds: [],
      selectUsers:[],
      allGroups:[],
      selectGroupIds: [],
      selectGroups:[]
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.listAllGroups()
    let groupUsers = []
    if(this.formItem.groups&&this.formItem.groups.length>0){
      this.selectGroups = []
      this.selectGroupIds = []
      this.formItem.groups.forEach(e=>{
        this.selectGroupIds.push(e.id)
        this.selectGroups.push(e)
        groupUsers = groupUsers.concat(e.users)
      })
    }
    this.listAllUsers()
    if(this.formItem.users&&this.formItem.users.length>0){
      let att = this.formItem.users.filter(item => !groupUsers.includes(item));
      this.selectUsers = []
      this.selectIds = []
      att.forEach(e=>{
        this.selectIds.push(e.userId)
      })
    }
  },
  methods: {
    changeTab(tab){
      if(tab.name==='second'){
        this.listAllUsers()
      }
    },
    listAllUsers(){
      let params = {userType:'01,02',isPatrol:'Y'}
      if(this.selectGroups&&this.selectGroups.length>0){
        let notInIds = []
        this.selectGroups.forEach(e=>{
          e.users.forEach(item=>{
            notInIds.push(item.userId)
          })
        })
        // 排除巡检组中包含的巡检人员
        this.selectIds = this.selectIds.filter(item => !notInIds.includes(item));
        params.notInIds = notInIds.join(",")
      }
      listUsers(params).then((response) => {
        this.allUsers = response.rows;
      })
    },
    listAllGroups(){
      listAllGroups({}).then((response) => {
        this.allGroups = response.rows;
      })
    },
    renderFunc(h, option) {
      //- {option.phonenumber}
      return <span>{ option.nickName } - { option.dept?option.dept.deptName:'' } </span>;
    },
    filterFunc(query, item) {
      //|| item.phonenumber.indexOf(query)>-1   || item.dept.deptName.indexOf(query)>-1
      return item.nickName.indexOf(query)>-1
    },
    renderGroupFunc(h, option) {
      return <span>{ option.groupName }</span>;
    },
    filterGroupFunc(query, item) {
      return item.groupName.indexOf(query)>-1
    },
    selectGroup(){
      this.selectGroups = []
      this.allGroups.forEach(e=>{
        if(this.selectGroupIds.includes(e.id)){
          this.selectGroups.push(e)
        }
      })
    },
    // 点击确定按钮
    choose() {
      this.selectUsers = []
      this.selectGroups.forEach(e=>{
        e.users.forEach(item=>{
          this.selectUsers.push(item)
        })
      })
      this.allUsers.forEach(e=>{
        if(this.selectIds.includes(e.userId)){
          this.selectUsers.push(e)
        }
      })
      // selectUsers去除重复数据
      this.selectUsers = this.selectUsers.filter((item, index, arr) => {
        return arr.findIndex(t => t.userId === item.userId) === index
      })
      this.formItem.groups = this.selectGroups
      this.formItem.users = this.selectUsers
      this.$emit('update:formItem', this.formItem)
      // 关闭地图页
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
    },
    // 关闭地图页
    closePage() {
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
    },
  }
}
</script>

  vertical-align: middle;

}

}

<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <div>
  <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
    <el-form ref="form" :model="formItem" label-width="140px" :disabled="showDetail">
      <el-form-item label="巡检点名称" prop="name" :rules="[{ required: true, message: '巡检点名称不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]">
        <el-input v-model="formItem.name" placeholder="请输入巡检点名称" maxlength="10" show-word-limit clearable/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="位置描述" prop="location">
        <el-input v-model="formItem.location" placeholder="请输入位置描述" maxlength="20" show-word-limit clearable/>
      </el-form-item>
<!--      <el-form-item label="巡检点状态" prop="status">-->
<!--        <el-button-->
<!--          type="success"-->
<!--          plain-->
<!--          size="mini"-->
<!--        >正常-->
<!--        </el-button>-->
<!--      </el-form-item>-->
      <el-form-item label="巡检点类型" prop="typeArr" :rules="[{ required: true, message: '巡检点类型不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]">
<!--        <dict-select v-model="formItem.typeArr" :type="'checkbox'" dict-type="patrol_point_type" placeholder="请选择巡检点类型" @change="changeType"/>-->
        <el-checkbox-group v-model="formItem.typeArr" placeholder="请选择巡检点类型" @change="changeType">
          <el-checkbox  v-for="item in type_options" :key="item.dictValue" :label="item.dictValue">{{item.dictLabel }}</el-checkbox>
        </el-checkbox-group>
      </el-form-item>
      <!-- <el-form-item label="扫码时获取定位" prop="getLocation" v-if="scanShow">
        <el-switch
          v-model="formItem.getLocation"

          inactive-value="N"
        >

      <!-- <el-form-item label="巡检点坐标" prop="coordinate" :rules="[{ required: true, message: '巡检点坐标不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]" v-if="scanShow&&formItem.getLocation==='Y'">
        <el-input v-model="formItem.coordinate" placeholder="请选择巡检点坐标" disabled >
          <template v-if="!showDetail" slot="append">
            <el-button type="primary" @click="openMap" style="color: #FFFFFF;background-color: #1890ff;border-color: #1890ff;">点击选择</el-button>
          </template>
        </el-input>
      </el-form-item> -->
      <el-form-item label="NFC卡ID" prop="nfcId" :rules="[{ required: true, message: 'NFC卡ID不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]" v-if="nfcShow">
        <el-input v-model="formItem.nfcId" placeholder="请输入NFC卡ID" maxlength="50" show-word-limit clearable/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="二维码"  v-if="formItem.id&&showDetail&&scanShow">
        <el-row>
          <el-image :src="formItem.qrCodeUrl" ></el-image>
<!--          <div class="qrcode" ref="qrcode"></div>-->
        </el-row>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer" v-if="!showDetail">
      <el-button type="primary"  :loading="saveLoading"  @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
  <Map v-if="mapVisable" :mapVisable.sync="mapVisable" :formItem="formItem" :radius="radius"/>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  addPoints,updatePoints
} from "@/api/patrol/points";
import {isInt,isIP} from '@/utils/validate'
// import Qrcode from "@/views/patrol/points/qrcode";
import QRCode from 'qrcodejs2';
import Map from '@/views/patrol/points/map'
export default {
  name: "PointsAdd",
  components: {
    Map,QRCode
  },
  props:{
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default:{}
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    showDetail: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    title:{
      type:String,
      default:''
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
      mapVisable:false,
      nfcShow:false,
      scanShow:false,
      type_options:[],
      radius:null,
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getDicts("patrol_point_type").then(e => {
      this.type_options = e.data
    })
    this.getConfigKey("patrol.point.radius").then(e=>{
      this.radius = e.msg
    })
    this.changeType(this.formItem.typeArr)
  },
  mounted() {
  },
  methods: {
    isInt: isInt,
    isIP: isIP,
    changeType(val) {
      if (val.includes('2')) {
        this.nfcShow = true
      } else {
        this.nfcShow = false
      }
      if (val.includes('1')) {
        this.scanShow = true
      } else {
        this.scanShow = false
      }
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.resetForm('form')
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    //打开地图
    openMap() {
      this.mapVisable = true
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['form'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          if (this.formItem.typeArr != null && this.formItem.typeArr.length > 0) {
            this.formItem.type = this.formItem.typeArr.join(",")
          }
          if (this.formItem.id) {
            // 修改
            updatePoints(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          } else {
            addPoints(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          }
        }
      })
    },
    loadData() {
      this.$emit('loadData')
    },
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery"
            :records.sync="records"
            />
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleUpdate()"
          v-hasPermi="['patrol:points:add']"
        >新增巡检点
        </el-button>
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-refresh"
          size="mini"
          @click="syncRoom()"
          v-hasPermi="['patrol:points:syncroom']"
        >同步教室巡检点
        </el-button>
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-download"
          size="mini"
          @click="downloadFilesList()"
          v-hasPermi="['patrol:points:export']"
        >导出二维码
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
      <el-table-column label="序号" align="center" type="index" />
      <el-table-column label="巡检点名称" align="center" prop="name" />
      <el-table-column label="位置描述" align="center" prop="location" />
<!--      <el-table-column label="巡检点状态" align="center" prop="params.statusName"/>-->
      <el-table-column label="巡检点类型" align="center" prop="params.typeName"/>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['patrol:points:edit']"
          >修改</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-eye"
            @click="handleDetail(scope.row)"
          >查看</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-delete"
            @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['patrol:points:remove']"
          >删除</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList" />
    <Add ref="add" v-if="addVisible" :visible.sync="addVisible"
         @loadData="getList"
         :form-item="formItem"
         :showDetail="showDetail"
         :title="title"
    />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  listPoints, delPoints, exportPoints, syncSchoolRoom
} from '@/api/patrol/points'
import Search from "@/views/patrol/points/search";
import Add from "@/views/patrol/points/add";
import QRCode from 'qrcodejs2';
import JSZip from 'jszip';
import FileSaver from 'file-saver';
export default {
  components: { Search, Add },
  name: "Point",
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      addVisible:false,
      ids:[],
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      points:[],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        name: null,
        status: null,
        type: null,
        ids:null,
      },
      formItem:{},
      title:'新增门锁',
      showDetail:false,
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.id)
      this.points = selection.map(item=>item)
    },
    /** 查询计划列列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listPoints(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      }).catch(e=>{
        this.loading = false
      });
    },
    /**
     * 同步教室作为巡检点
     * */
    syncRoom() {
      const loading = this.$loading({
        lock: true,
        text: 'Loading',
        spinner: 'el-icon-loading',
        background: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)'
      });
      syncSchoolRoom().then(res=>{
        this.getList()
        loading.close()
      }).catch(res=>{
        loading.close()
      })
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 新增&修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.title='新增巡检点'
      this.showDetail=false
      if (row) {
        row.typeArr = []
        this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
        if(this.formItem.type!=null&&this.formItem.type.length>0){
          this.formItem.typeArr=this.formItem.type.split(",")
        }
        this.title = '编辑巡检点'
      }
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    handleDetail(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
      this.formItem.typeArr = []
      if(this.formItem.type!=null&&this.formItem.type.length>0){
        this.formItem.typeArr=this.formItem.type.split(",")
      }
      this.title='巡检点详情'
      this.showDetail = true
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const ids = row.id || this.ids;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确定删除?如果删除该巡检点将无法使用!').then(function() {
        return delPoints(ids);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.showDetail = false
      this.formItem = {
        id: null,
        name: null,
        location: null,
        status: "1",
        typeArr:[],
        type: null,
        getLocation: 'Y',
        coordinate: null,
        nfcId: null
      }
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    downloadFilesList(){
      if(this.ids!=null&&this.ids.length>0){
        this.queryParams.ids = this.ids
      }
      this.$download.zip("/patrol/points/downloadImages",this.queryParams, "二维码.zip");
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <el-dialog  :close-on-click-modal="false" width="1000px" height="800px" title="选择位置" :visible.sync="mapVisable" append-to-body>
    <template>
      <el-autocomplete
        v-model="mapPoint.title"
        :fetch-suggestions="search"
        placeholder="请输入内容"
        @select="handleSelect"
        class="position-absolute"
        :trigger-on-focus="false"
      >
        <template #default="{ item }">
          <div class="item">
            <div class="map-title">{{ item.title }}</div>
<!--            <div class="subtitle">{{ item.address.length>12?item.address.substr(0,12)+'···':item.address }}</div>-->
          </div>
        </template>
      </el-autocomplete>
      <div id="container">
      </div>
    </template>
    <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
      <el-button type="primary" @click="chooseLocation">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button @click="closeLocationPage">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
</template>
<script>
import axiosJsonp from 'axios-jsonp'
import {searchMap} from "@/api/patrol/points";
export default {
  name: "Map",
  components: {
  },
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    mapVisable:{
      type:Boolean,
      default: false
    },
    formItem:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    radius:{
      type:String,
      default:null
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      mapPoint:{},
      markers:[]
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.openChooseDialog()
    // this.search()
  },
  methods: {
    // 点击选择按钮打开地图
    openChooseDialog() {
      setTimeout(() => {
        this.initMap()
        if (this.formItem.coordinate != null) {
          this.marker = new TMap.MultiMarker({
            map: this.map, //指定点标记图层所覆盖的地图容器
            // 设置点标记数据
            geometries: [{
              id: 'demo',//指定点标记id
              position: new TMap.LatLng(this.formItem.coordinate.split(",")[1], this.formItem.coordinate.split(",")[0])// 标记位置(经度，纬度，高度)
            }],
          });
          this.map.setCenter(new TMap.LatLng(this.formItem.coordinate.split(",")[1], this.formItem.coordinate.split(",")[0]))
        }
      }, 200)
    },
    // 点击确定按钮
    chooseLocation() {
      this.$emit('update:formItem', this.formItem)
      // 关闭地图页
      this.$emit('update:mapVisable', false)
    },
    // 关闭地图页
    closeLocationPage() {
      this.$emit('update:mapVisable', false)
    },
    initMap() {
      this.TMap = window.TMap
      this.lat = 43.834004
      this.lng = 125.321022
      // 初始化地图
      this.map = new TMap.Map('container', {
        zoom: 15, // 设置地图缩放级别
        center: new TMap.LatLng(this.lat, this.lng), // 设置地图中心点坐标
      }),
        //监听点击事件添加marker
      this.map.on("click", (evt) => {
        this.formItem.coordinate = evt.latLng.lng.toFixed(6) + "," + evt.latLng.lat.toFixed(6)
        if (this.marker) {
          this.marker.remove('demo');
        }
        if (this.circle) {
          this.circle.remove(['circle']);
        }
        this.marker = new TMap.MultiMarker({
          map: this.map, //指定点标记图层所覆盖的地图容器
          // 设置点标记数据
          geometries: [{
            id: 'demo',//指定点标记id
            position: evt.latLng// 标记位置(经度，纬度，高度)
          }],
        });
        this.map.setCenter(new TMap.LatLng(evt.latLng.lat, evt.latLng.lng))
      });
    },
    search(queryString, cb) {
      if(queryString==null||queryString==''){
        return
      }
      searchMap(queryString).then((response) => {
        cb(response.data);
      }).catch((error) => {
        console.error(error);
      });
    },
    handleSelect(item){
      this.mapPoint = item
      if (this.marker) {
        this.marker.remove('demo');
      }
      this.map.panTo(new TMap.LatLng(item.location.lat,item.location.lng));
      this.formItem.coordinate = item.location.lng+','+item.location.lat
      const marker = {height:0,lat:item.location.lat,lng:item.location.lng}
      this.marker = new TMap.MultiMarker({
        map: this.map, //指定点标记图层所覆盖的地图容器
        // 设置点标记数据
        geometries: [{
          id: 'demo',//指定点标记id
          position: marker// 标记位置(经度，纬度，高度)
        }],
      });
    }
  }
}
</script>
<style scoped>

  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  text-align: left;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: bold;
}

  left: 28px;
  top: 90px;
  z-index: 99999;
}
/deep/ .el-input {
  z-index: 999999;
}
</style>
<template>
  <div id="meQrcode" :title="qrText">
    <div class="qrcode_box">
      <img class="qrcode_canvas" id="qrcode_canvas" ref="qrcode_canvas" alt="二维码" />
      <img v-if="qrLogo" class="qrcode_logo" ref="qrcode_logo" :src="qrLogo" alt="logo" />
      <canvas :width="qrSize" :height="qrSize" class="canvas" ref="canvas" id="canvas"></canvas>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import QRCode from "qrcode";
import logo from "@/assets/images/profile.jpg";
export default {
  props: {
    //二维码存储内容
    qrUrl: {
      type: String,
      default: "你不配"
    },
    //二维码尺寸（正方形 长宽相同）
    qrSize: {
      type: Number,
      default: 300
    },
    //二维码底部文字
    qrText: {
      default: "美女"
    },
    //二维码中部logo 如果写default: ""则不生成logo
    qrLogo: {
      type: String,
      default: logo
    },
    //logo尺寸（正方形 长宽相同）
    qrLogoSize: {
      type: Number,
      default: 40
    },
    //底部说明文字字号
    qrTextSize: {
      type: Number,
      default: 14
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {};
  },
  methods: {
    /**
     * @argument qrUrl        二维码内容
     * @argument qrSize       二维码大小
     * @argument qrText       二维码中间显示文字
     * @argument qrTextSize   二维码中间显示文字大小(默认16px)
     * @argument qrLogo       二维码中间显示图片
     * @argument qrLogoSize   二维码中间显示图片大小(默认为80)
     */
    handleQrcodeToDataUrl() {
      let qrcode_canvas = this.$refs.qrcode_canvas;
      let qrcode_logo = this.$refs.qrcode_logo;
      let canvas = this.$refs.canvas;
      const that = this;
      QRCode.toDataURL(
        this.qrUrl,
        { errorCorrectionLevel: "H" },
        (err, url) => {
          qrcode_canvas.src = url;
          // 画二维码里的logo// 在canvas里进行拼接
          let ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
          setTimeout(() => {
            //获取图片
            ctx.drawImage(qrcode_canvas, 0, 0, that.qrSize, that.qrSize);
            if (that.qrLogo) {
              //设置logo大小
              //设置获取的logo将其变为圆角以及添加白色背景
              ctx.fillStyle = "#fff";
              ctx.beginPath();
              let logoPosition = (that.qrSize - that.qrLogoSize) / 2; //logo相对于canvas居中定位
              let h = that.qrLogoSize + 10; //圆角高 10为基数(logo四周白色背景为10/2)
              let w = that.qrLogoSize + 10; //圆角宽
              let x = logoPosition - 5;
              let y = logoPosition - 5;
              let r = 5; //圆角半径
              ctx.moveTo(x + r, y);
              ctx.arcTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + h, r);
              ctx.arcTo(x + w, y + h, x, y + h, r);
              ctx.arcTo(x, y + h, x, y, r);
              ctx.arcTo(x, y, x + w, y, r);
              ctx.closePath();
              ctx.fill(); qrcode_logo.onload = function () {
                ctx.drawImage(
                  qrcode_logo,
                  logoPosition,
                  logoPosition,
                  that.qrLogoSize,
                  that.qrLogoSize
                );
              }
            }
            if (that.qrText) {
              //设置字体
              let fpadd = 10; //规定内间距
              ctx.font = "bold " + that.qrTextSize + "px Arial";
              let tw = ctx.measureText(that.qrText).width; //文字真实宽度
              let ftop = that.qrSize - that.qrTextSize; //根据字体大小计算文字top
              let fleft = (that.qrSize - tw) / 2; //根据字体大小计算文字left
              let tp = that.qrTextSize / 2; //字体边距为字体大小的一半可以自己设置
              ctx.fillStyle = "#fff";
              ctx.fillRect(
                fleft - tp / 2,
                ftop - tp / 2,
                tw + tp,
                that.qrTextSize + tp
              );
              ctx.textBaseline = "top"; //设置绘制文本时的文本基线。
              ctx.fillStyle = "#333";
              ctx.fillText(that.qrText, fleft, ftop);
            }
            qrcode_canvas.src = canvas.toDataURL();
          }, 0);
        }
      );
    },
  },
  mounted() {
    this.handleQrcodeToDataUrl();
  },
  updated() {
    this.handleQrcodeToDataUrl();
  },
};
</script>
<style scoped>
.qrcode_box,
#meQrcode {
  display: inline-block;
}
.qrcode_box img {
  display: none;
}
</style>

    <el-form-item label="巡检点名称" prop="name">
      <el-input
        v-model="queryParams.name"
        placeholder="请输入巡检点名称"
        clearable
        @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
      />
    </el-form-item>

      <DictSelect v-model="queryParams.type" dict-type="patrol_point_type" placeholder="请选择类型" clearable/>
    </el-form-item> -->

      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
