<script>
export default {
  name: "PointSearch",
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    },
    gateways:{
      type:Array,
      default(){
        return []
      }
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
    };
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.queryParams.dataRange = []
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <div>
  <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="visible" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
    <el-form ref="form" :model="formItem" label-width="140px" :disabled="showDetail">
      <el-form-item label="路线名称" prop="name" :rules="[{ required: true, message: '路线名称不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]">
        <el-input v-model="formItem.name" placeholder="请输入路线名称" maxlength="50" show-word-limit clearable/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="巡检点" prop="pointCount" :rules="[{ required: true, message: '巡检点不能为空', trigger: 'blur' }]">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          size="small"
          @click="openPoint"
        >
          选择
        </el-button>
        <el-input v-model="formItem.pointCount" type="hidden"></el-input>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-table
        :data="formItem.items"
        style="width: 100%"
        max-height="520"
      >
        <el-table-column
          prop="name"
          align="center"
          width="200"
          label="巡检点名称">
        </el-table-column>
        <el-table-column
          prop="location"
          align="center"
          label="巡检点位置">
        </el-table-column>
        <el-table-column
          width="100"
          align="center"
          label="排序">
          <template v-slot="scope">
            <el-form-item
              label-width="0"
              :prop="'items.' + scope.$index + '.sortNum'"
              :rules="[
                  { required: true, message: '排序号不能为空', trigger: 'blur' },{ validator: isInt, message: '请输入正确排序号', trigger: 'blur' }
                ]">
              <el-input
                v-model="scope.row.sortNum"
                placeholder="请输入排序号"
              />
            </el-form-item>
          </template>
        </el-table-column>
      </el-table>
    </el-form>
    <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer" v-if="!showDetail">
      <el-button type="primary"  :loading="saveLoading"  @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
  <Points v-if="pointVisable" :visible.sync="pointVisable" :formItem="formItem"/>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  addRoutes,updateRoutes
} from "@/api/patrol/routes";
import Points from './points'
import {isInt} from "@/utils/validate";
export default {
  name: "RoutesAdd",
  components: {
    Points
  },
  props:{
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default:{}
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    showDetail: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
    title:{
      type:String,
      default:''
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
      pointVisable:false,
    }
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    isInt:isInt,
    removePoint(val){
      this.formItem.items.splice(val, 1);
    },
    handleClose() {
      this.saveLoading = false
      this.resetForm('form')
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
      this.$emit('close')
    },
    //打开地图
    openPoint(){
      this.pointVisable=true
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs['form'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          const newArr=this.formItem.items.map(item=>item.sortNum.toString());
          const isRepeat=newArr.some((item,index,arr)=>arr.indexOf(item)!=index);
          if(isRepeat){
            this.$message.error('排序号有重复！请确认')
            return
          }
          this.saveLoading = true
          if (this.formItem.id) {
            // 修改
            updateRoutes(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          } else {
            addRoutes(this.formItem).then(e => {
              this.saveLoading = false
              this.$message.success('保存成功')
              this.handleClose()
              this.loadData()
            }).catch(e=>{
              this.saveLoading = false
            })
          }
        }
      })
    },
    loadData() {
      this.$emit('loadData')
    },
    // // 单行校验
    // validateFieldRow(form, index) {
    //   for (const item of this.$refs[form].fields) {
    //     if (Number(item.prop.split('.')[1]) === index) {
    //       this.$refs[form].validateField(item.prop, err => {
    //         if (err !== '' && err !== undefined) {
    //           throw new Error(err)
    //         }
    //       })
    //     }
    //   }
    // },
    // // 单列校验
    // validateField(form, index, fieldName) {
    //   let result = true
    //   this.$refs[form].validateField('items.' + index + '.' + fieldName, err => {
    //     if (err !== '' && err !== undefined) {
    //       result = false
    //     }
    //   })
    //   return result
    // },
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <Search :query-params="queryParams" @search="handleQuery"
            :records.sync="records"
            />
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleUpdate()"
          v-hasPermi="['patrol:routes:add']"
        >新增路线
        </el-button>
      </el-col>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="records" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
      <el-table-column label="序号" align="center" type="index" />
      <el-table-column label="路线名称" align="center" prop="name" />
      <el-table-column label="巡检点数量" align="center" prop="pointCount" />
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['patrol:routes:edit']"
          >修改</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-eye"
            @click="handleDetail(scope.row)"
          >查看</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-delete"
            @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['patrol:routes:remove']"
          >删除</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination v-show="total > 0" :total="total" :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum" :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
                @pagination="getList" />
    <Add ref="add" v-if="addVisible" :visible.sync="addVisible"
         @loadData="getList"
         :form-item="formItem"
         :showDetail="showDetail"
         :title="title"
    />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  listRoutes,delRoutes
} from "@/api/patrol/routes";
import Search from "./search";
import Add from "./add";
export default {
  components: { Search, Add },
  name: "Routes",
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: false,
      addVisible:false,
      ids:[],
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 计划列表格数据
      records: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        name: null,
      },
      formItem:{},
      title:'新增巡检路线',
      showDetail:false,
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.id)
    },
    /** 查询计划列列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listRoutes(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.records = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      }).catch(e=>{
        this.loading = false
      });
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 新增&修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.title='新增巡检路线'
      this.showDetail=false
      if (row) {
        if(row.params.inUse.toString()==='true'){
          this.$message.error("该巡检路线已被计划占用，不可编辑!")
          return
        }
        this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
        this.title = '编辑巡检路线'
      }
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    handleDetail(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.formItem = this.$copy(row)
      this.title='巡检路线详情'
      this.showDetail = true
      this.addVisible = true
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const ids = row.id || this.ids;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确定删除?如果删除该路线，将无法使用!').then(function() {
        return delRoutes(ids);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.showDetail = false
      this.formItem = {
        id: null,
        name: null,
        pointCount: null,
        items:[]
      }
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <!-- 检测记录弹出框 -->
  <div>
  <el-dialog title="选择巡检点" :visible.sync="visible" width="900px" height="900px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="closePointsPage">
    <el-transfer
      v-model="selectIds"
      :data="allPoints"
      :titles="['未选', '已选']"
      filterable
      :props="{
        key: 'id',
        label: 'name'
      }"
      :render-content="renderFunc"
      :filter-method="filterFunc"
    />
    <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
      <el-button type="primary"  :loading="saveLoading"  @click="choosePoints">确 定</el-button>
      <el-button @click="closePointsPage">取 消</el-button>
    </div>
  </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  listAllPoints,
} from "@/api/patrol/points";
export default {
  name: "RoutePoints",
  components: {
    Map
  },
  props:{
    formItem: {
      type: Object,
      default:{}
    },
    visible: {
      type: Boolean,
      default() {
        return false
      }
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      saveLoading: false,
      allPoints:[],
      selectIds: [],
      selectPoints:[]
    }
  },
  created() {
    listAllPoints({}).then((response) => {
        this.allPoints = response.rows;
    })
    if(this.formItem.items!=undefined&&this.formItem.items.length>0){
       this.formItem.items.forEach(e=>{
         this.selectIds.push(e.id)
       })
    }
  },
  methods: {
    renderFunc(h, option) {
      return <span>{ option.name } - { option.location }</span>;
    },
    filterFunc(query, item) {
      return item.name.indexOf(query)>-1 || item.location.indexOf(query)>-1
    },
    // 点击确定按钮
    choosePoints() {
      this.selectPoints = []
      let index = 1
      this.allPoints.forEach(e=>{
        if(this.selectIds.includes(e.id)){
          e.sortNum = index
          this.selectPoints.push(e)
          index++
        }
      })
      this.formItem.items = this.selectPoints
      if(this.selectPoints.length===0){
        this.formItem.pointCount = null
      }else {
        this.formItem.pointCount = this.selectPoints.length
      }
      this.$emit('update:formItem', this.formItem)
      // 关闭地图页
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
    },
    // 关闭地图页
    closePointsPage() {
      this.$emit('update:visible', false)
    },
  }
}
</script>

}

}

<template>
  <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true"  label-width="100px">
    <el-form-item label="路线名称" prop="name">
      <el-input
        v-model="queryParams.name"
        placeholder="请输入路线名称"
        clearable
        @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
      />
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item>
      <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
      <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
</template>
<script>
export default {
  name: "RouteSearch",
  props:{
    queryParams:{
      type:Object,
      default:null
    },
    records:{
      type:Array,
      default: []
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
    };
  },
  created() {
  },
  methods: {
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.$emit('search')
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.queryParams.dataRange = []
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.$emit('search')
    },
  }
};
</script>
<script>
export default {
  created() {
    const { params, query } = this.$route
    const { path } = params
    this.$router.replace({ path: '/' + path, query })
  },
  render: function(h) {
    return h() // avoid warning message
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="register">
    <el-form ref="registerForm" :model="registerForm" :rules="registerRules" class="register-form">
      <h3 class="title">智慧实验室管控平台扩容</h3>
      <el-form-item prop="username">
        <el-input v-model="registerForm.username" type="text" auto-complete="off" placeholder="账号">
          <svg-icon slot="prefix" icon-class="user" class="el-input__icon input-icon" />
        </el-input>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item prop="password">
        <el-input
          v-model="registerForm.password"
          type="password"
          auto-complete="off"
          placeholder="密码"
          @keyup.enter.native="handleRegister"
        >
          <svg-icon slot="prefix" icon-class="password" class="el-input__icon input-icon" />
        </el-input>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item prop="confirmPassword">
        <el-input
          v-model="registerForm.confirmPassword"
          type="password"
          auto-complete="off"
          placeholder="确认密码"
          @keyup.enter.native="handleRegister"
        >
          <svg-icon slot="prefix" icon-class="password" class="el-input__icon input-icon" />
        </el-input>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item prop="code" v-if="captchaEnabled">
        <el-input
          v-model="registerForm.code"
          auto-complete="off"
          placeholder="验证码"
          style="width: 63%"
          @keyup.enter.native="handleRegister"
        >
          <svg-icon slot="prefix" icon-class="validCode" class="el-input__icon input-icon" />
        </el-input>
        <div class="register-code">
          <img :src="codeUrl" @click="getCode" class="register-code-img"/>
        </div>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item style="width:100%;">
        <el-button
          :loading="loading"
          size="medium"
          type="primary"
          style="width:100%;"
          @click.native.prevent="handleRegister"
        >
          <span v-if="!loading">注 册</span>
          <span v-else>注 册 中...</span>
        </el-button>
        <div style="float: right;">
          <router-link class="link-type" :to="'/login'">使用已有账户登录</router-link>
        </div>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <!--  底部  -->
    <div class="el-register-footer">
      <span>Copyright © 2018-2022 chenrise.vip All Rights Reserved.</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { getCodeImg, register } from "@/api/login";
export default {
  name: "Register",
  data() {
    const equalToPassword = (rule, value, callback) => {
      if (this.registerForm.password !== value) {
        callback(new Error("两次输入的密码不一致"));
      } else {
        callback();
      }
    };
    return {
      codeUrl: "",
      registerForm: {
        username: "",
        password: "",
        confirmPassword: "",
        code: "",
        uuid: ""
      },
      registerRules: {
        username: [
          { required: true, trigger: "blur", message: "请输入您的账号" },
          { min: 2, max: 20, message: '用户账号长度必须介于 2 和 20 之间', trigger: 'blur' }
        ],
        password: [
          { required: true, trigger: "blur", message: "请输入您的密码" },
          { min: 5, max: 20, message: '用户密码长度必须介于 5 和 20 之间', trigger: 'blur' }
        ],
        confirmPassword: [
          { required: true, trigger: "blur", message: "请再次输入您的密码" },
          { required: true, validator: equalToPassword, trigger: "blur" }
        ],
        code: [{ required: true, trigger: "change", message: "请输入验证码" }]
      },
      loading: false,
      captchaEnabled: true
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getCode();
  },
  methods: {
    getCode() {
      getCodeImg().then(res => {
        this.captchaEnabled = res.captchaEnabled === undefined ? true : res.captchaEnabled;
        if (this.captchaEnabled) {
          this.codeUrl = "data:image/gif;base64," + res.img;
          this.registerForm.uuid = res.uuid;
        }
      });
    },
    handleRegister() {
      this.$refs.registerForm.validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.loading = true;
          register(this.registerForm).then(res => {
            const username = this.registerForm.username;
            this.$alert("<font color='red'>恭喜你，您的账号 " + username + " 注册成功！</font>", '系统提示', {
              dangerouslyUseHTMLString: true,
              type: 'success'
            }).then(() => {
              this.$router.push("/login");
            }).catch(() => {});
          }).catch(() => {
            this.loading = false;
            if (this.captchaEnabled) {
              this.getCode();
            }
          })
        }
      });
    }
  }
};
</script>

<template>
  <div ref="bar" class="bar-chart" :style="{height: '100%', width: '100%'}" />
</template>
<script>
import * as echarts from 'echarts'
import resize from '../../charts/mixins/resize'
export default {
  mixins: [resize],
  props: {
    chartData: {
      type: Object,
      default: () => ({})
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      chart: null
    }
  },
  watch: {
    // 监听 chartData 的变化
    chartData: {
      deep: true,
      handler(newData) {
        if (newData && Object.keys(newData).length > 0) {
          this.setOptions()
        }
      }
    }
  },
  mounted() {
    this.initChart()
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    if (this.chart !== null) {
      this.chart.dispose()
    }
  },
  methods: {
    initChart() {
      this.chart = echarts.init(this.$refs.bar)
      this.setOptions()
    },
    setOptions() {
      const that = this
      // 创建x轴数据的副本，并追加0直到长度为10
      const xDataWithZeros = that.chartData.xDatas.slice() // 首先复制原始数组
      while (xDataWithZeros.length < 10) {
        xDataWithZeros.push('')
      }
      this.chart.setOption({
        legend: {
          icon: 'circle',
          textStyle: {
            color: '#FFFFFF'
          },
          top: '6%'
        },
        tooltip: {
          trigger: 'axis',
          axisPointer: {
            type: 'shadow'
          },
          // backgroundColor: 'rgba(17, 112, 144, 0.7)', // 白色背景，70% 不透明度
          borderWidth: 0, // 无边框
          textStyle: {
            color: '#fff' // 文字颜色
          },
          formatter: function(params) {
            let res = '<div style="margin-bottom: 8px;"><b>' + params[0].axisValue + '</b></div>' // 显示完整的X轴标签在第一行并添加底部距离
            params.forEach(function(item) {
              res += '<div style="display: flex; align-items: center;">' +
                    '<span style="display:inline-block;margin-right:10px;border-radius:50%;width:10px;height:10px;background-color:' + item.color + ';"></span>' +
                    item.seriesName + '：' + item.value + '</div><br/>' // 显示每个系列的颜色块、名称和值
            })
            return res
          }
        },
        grid: {
          left: '3%',
          right: '4%',
          bottom: '8%',
          containLabel: true
        },
        xAxis: {
          type: 'category',
          axisLabel: {
            color: '#FFFFFF',
            interval: 0,
            formatter: function(value) {
              // 当文字长度超过5时使用省略号
              return value.length > 5 ? `${value.slice(0, 5)}...` : value
            }
          },
          // data: that.chartData.xDatas
          data: xDataWithZeros // 使用新数组作为x轴的数据
        },
        yAxis: {
          type: 'value',
          minInterval: 1, // 设置y轴的最小刻度间隔为1
          axisLabel: {
            color: '#FFFFFF',
            formatter: function(value) {
              return value
            }
          },
          splitLine: {
            show: true,
            lineStyle: {
              color: '#465A64',
              width: 0.5,
              type: 'solid'
            }
          }
        },
        series: [
          {
            name: that.chartData.yDatas[0].name,
            type: 'bar',
            stack: 'total',
            color: '#5AAEF3',
            data: that.chartData.yDatas[0].data
          },
          {
            name: that.chartData.yDatas[1].name,
            type: 'bar',
            stack: 'total',
            color: '#78FFF7',
            data: that.chartData.yDatas[1].data
          },
          {
            name: that.chartData.yDatas[2].name,
            type: 'bar',
            stack: 'total',
            color: '#A8DFFA',
            data: that.chartData.yDatas[2].data
          },
          {
            name: that.chartData.yDatas[3].name,
            type: 'bar',
            stack: 'total',
            color: '#62D9AD',
            data: that.chartData.yDatas[3].data
          },
          {
            name: that.chartData.yDatas[4].name,
            type: 'bar',
            stack: 'total',
            color: '#FF974C',
            data: that.chartData.yDatas[4].data
          },
          {
            name: that.chartData.yDatas[5].name,
            type: 'bar',
            stack: 'total',
            color: '#FFDC4C',
            data: that.chartData.yDatas[5].data
          },
          {
            name: that.chartData.yDatas[6].name,
            type: 'bar',
            stack: 'total',
            color: '#6D61E4',
            data: that.chartData.yDatas[6].data
          },
          {
            name: that.chartData.yDatas[7].name,
            type: 'bar',
            stack: 'total',
            color: '#E65A56',
            data: that.chartData.yDatas[7].data
          },
          {
            name: that.chartData.yDatas[8].name,
            type: 'bar',
            stack: 'total',
            color: '#5B6E96',
            data: that.chartData.yDatas[8].data
          },
          {
            name: that.chartData.yDatas[9].name,
            type: 'bar',
            stack: 'total',
            color: '#c90e7b',
            data: that.chartData.yDatas[9].data
          }
        ]
      })
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>

<script>
import resize from '../../charts/mixins/resize.js'
import * as echarts from 'echarts'
export default {
    name: 'departmentCharts',
    mixins: [resize],
    props: {
        bmyyChartData: {
            type: Object,
            default: () => ({})
        },
    },
    data() {
        return {
            chart: null,
            // 控制轮播
            index: 0,
            timer: null
        }
    },
    watch: {
        // 监听 bmyyChartData 的变化
        bmyyChartData: {
            deep: true,
            handler(newData) {
                if (newData && Object.keys(newData).length > 0) {
                    this.setOptions()
                }
            }
        },
    },
    methods: {
        depart(data) {
            this.$emit('bmyyTab', data)
        },
        // 绘制立方柱体
        cube() {
            // 绘制左侧面
            const CubeLeft = echarts.graphic.extendShape({
                shape: {
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0
                },
                buildPath: function (ctx, shape) {
                    const xAxisPoint = shape.xAxisPoint
                    const c0 = [shape.x - 20, shape.y]
                    const c1 = [shape.x - 28, shape.y - 8]
                    const c2 = [xAxisPoint[0] - 28, xAxisPoint[1] - 8]
                    const c3 = [xAxisPoint[0] - 20, xAxisPoint[1]]
                    ctx.moveTo(c0[0], c0[1]).lineTo(c1[0], c1[1]).lineTo(c2[0], c2[1]).lineTo(c3[0], c3[1]).closePath()
                }
            })
            // 绘制右侧面
            const CubeRight = echarts.graphic.extendShape({
                shape: {
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0
                },
                buildPath: function (ctx, shape) {
                    const xAxisPoint = shape.xAxisPoint
                    const c1 = [shape.x - 20, shape.y]
                    const c2 = [xAxisPoint[0] - 20, xAxisPoint[1]]
                    const c3 = [xAxisPoint[0] - 7, xAxisPoint[1] - 4]
                    const c4 = [shape.x - 7, shape.y - 4]
                    ctx.moveTo(c1[0], c1[1]).lineTo(c2[0], c2[1]).lineTo(c3[0], c3[1]).lineTo(c4[0], c4[1]).closePath()
                }
            })
            // 绘制顶面
            const CubeTop = echarts.graphic.extendShape({
                shape: {
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0
                },
                buildPath: function (ctx, shape) {
                    const c1 = [shape.x - 20, shape.y]
                    const c2 = [shape.x - 7, shape.y - 4]
                    const c3 = [shape.x - 15, shape.y - 12]
                    const c4 = [shape.x - 28, shape.y - 8]
                    ctx.moveTo(c1[0], c1[1]).lineTo(c2[0], c2[1]).lineTo(c3[0], c3[1]).lineTo(c4[0], c4[1]).closePath()
                }
            })
            // 注册三个面图形
            echarts.graphic.registerShape('CubeLeft', CubeLeft)
            echarts.graphic.registerShape('CubeRight', CubeRight)
            echarts.graphic.registerShape('CubeTop', CubeTop)
        },
        cube2() {
            // 绘制左侧面
            const CubeLeft2 = echarts.graphic.extendShape({
                shape: {
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0
                },
                buildPath: function (ctx, shape) {
                    const xAxisPoint = shape.xAxisPoint
                    const c0 = [shape.x + 20, shape.y]
                    const c1 = [shape.x + 12, shape.y - 8]
                    const c2 = [xAxisPoint[0] + 12, xAxisPoint[1] - 8]
                    const c3 = [xAxisPoint[0] + 20, xAxisPoint[1]]
                    ctx.moveTo(c0[0], c0[1]).lineTo(c1[0], c1[1]).lineTo(c2[0], c2[1]).lineTo(c3[0], c3[1]).closePath()
                }
            })
            // 绘制右侧面
            const CubeRight2 = echarts.graphic.extendShape({
                shape: {
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0
                },
                buildPath: function (ctx, shape) {
                    const xAxisPoint = shape.xAxisPoint
                    const c1 = [shape.x + 20, shape.y]
                    const c2 = [xAxisPoint[0] + 20, xAxisPoint[1]]
                    const c3 = [xAxisPoint[0] + 33, xAxisPoint[1] - 4]
                    const c4 = [shape.x + 33, shape.y - 4]
                    ctx.moveTo(c1[0], c1[1]).lineTo(c2[0], c2[1]).lineTo(c3[0], c3[1]).lineTo(c4[0], c4[1]).closePath()
                }
            })
            // 绘制顶面
            const CubeTop2 = echarts.graphic.extendShape({
                shape: {
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0
                },
                buildPath: function (ctx, shape) {
                    const c1 = [shape.x + 20, shape.y]
                    const c2 = [shape.x + 33, shape.y - 4]
                    const c3 = [shape.x + 25, shape.y - 12]
                    const c4 = [shape.x +12, shape.y - 8]
                    ctx.moveTo(c1[0], c1[1]).lineTo(c2[0], c2[1]).lineTo(c3[0], c3[1]).lineTo(c4[0], c4[1]).closePath()
                }
            })
            // 注册三个面图形
            echarts.graphic.registerShape('CubeLeft2', CubeLeft2)
            echarts.graphic.registerShape('CubeRight2', CubeRight2)
            echarts.graphic.registerShape('CubeTop2', CubeTop2)
        },
        initChart() {
            this.chart = echarts.init(this.$refs.bmyy)
            this.setOptions()
        },
        setOptions() {
            // console.log(this.bmyyChartData,'asdfgfdsa')
            const that = this
            this.chart.setOption({
                tooltip: {
                    trigger: 'axis',
                    backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.7)',
                    borderWidth: 0,
                    textStyle: {
                        color: '#fff'
                    },
                    formatter: function (params) {
                        var res = '<div><p>' + '部门名称：' + params[0].name + '</p>'
                        res += '<p style="text-align: left">' + '预约数量：' + params[0].value + '次' + '</p></div><p style="text-align: left">' + '爽约数量：' + params[1].value + '次' + '</p></div>'
                        return res;
                    },
                },
                grid: {  // 布满div
                    top: "35px",
                    left: "50px",
                    right: "25px",
                    bottom: "6px",
                    containLabel: true
                },
                xAxis: {
                    type: 'category',
                    data: that.bmyyChartData.xDatas,
                    axisLine: {
                        show: true,
                    },
                    axisTick: {
                        show: false,
                        length: 9,
                        alignWithLabel: true,
                        lineStyle: {
                            color: '#7DFFFD'
                        }
                    },
                    axisLabel: {
                        show: true,
                        fontSize: 12,
                        color: '#fff'
                    }
                },
                yAxis: [
                    {
                        type: 'value',
                        min: 0,
                        name: '数量：次   ',
                        axisLine: {
                            show: false,
                            lineStyle: {
                                color: 'white'
                            }
                        },
                        axisLine: {
                            show: false,
                            lineStyle: {
                                color: 'white'
                            }
                        },
                        splitLine: {
                            show: true,
                            lineStyle: {
                                type: 'dashed',
                                color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)'
                            }
                        },
                        axisTick: {
                            show: false
                        },
                        axisLabel: {
                            show: true,
                            fontSize: 12
                        },
                        boundaryGap: ['20%', '20%']
                    }
                ],
                series: [
                    {
                        type: 'custom',
                        renderItem: (params, api) => {
                            console.log(api.coord([api.value(0), 0]), 'xxxxxxxx')
                            const location = api.coord([api.value(0), api.value(1)])
                            var color =
                                new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                                    {
                                        offset: 0,
                                        color: '#5cc4eb'
                                    },
                                    {
                                        offset: 0.8,
                                        color: '#21658c'
                                    }
                                ])
                            return {
                                type: 'group',
                                children: [
                                    {
                                        type: 'CubeLeft',
                                        shape: {
                                            api,
                                            x: location[0],
                                            y: location[1],
                                            xAxisPoint: api.coord([api.value(0), 0])
                                        },
                                        style: {
                                            fill: (color = new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                                                {
                                                    offset: 0,
                                                    color: '#5cc4eb'
                                                },
                                                {
                                                    offset: 0.8,
                                                    color: '#21658c'
                                                }
                                            ]))
                                        }
                                    },
                                    {
                                        type: 'CubeRight',
                                        shape: {
                                            api,
                                            x: location[0],
                                            y: location[1],
                                            xAxisPoint: api.coord([api.value(0), 0])
                                        },
                                        style: {
                                            fill: (color = new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                                                {
                                                    offset: 0,
                                                    color: '#048fd4'
                                                },
                                                {
                                                    offset: 0.8,
                                                    color: '#195684'
                                                }
                                            ]))
                                        }
                                    },
                                    {
                                        type: 'CubeTop',
                                        shape: {
                                            x: location[0],
                                            y: location[1],
                                        },
                                        style: {
                                            fill: (color = new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                                                {
                                                    offset: 0,
                                                    color: '#65c7ec'
                                                },
                                                {
                                                    offset: 1,
                                                    color: '#65c7ec'
                                                }
                                            ]))
                                        }
                                    }
                                ]
                            }
                        },
                        data: that.bmyyChartData.ydata
                    },
                    {
                        type: 'custom',
                        renderItem: (params, api) => {
                            const location = api.coord([api.value(0), api.value(1)])
                            var color =
                                new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                                    {
                                        offset: 0,
                                        color: '#5cc4eb'
                                    },
                                    {
                                        offset: 0.8,
                                        color: '#21658c'
                                    }
                                ])
                            return {
                                type: 'group',
                                children: [
                                    {
                                        type: 'CubeLeft2',
                                        shape: {
                                            api,
                                            x: location[0],
                                            y: location[1],
                                            xAxisPoint: api.coord([api.value(0), 0])
                                        },
                                        style: {
                                            fill: (color = new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                                                {
                                                    offset: 0,
                                                    color: '#61EFA6'
                                                },
                                                {
                                                    offset: 0.8,
                                                    color: '#11A659'
                                                }
                                            ]))
                                        }
                                    },
                                    {
                                        type: 'CubeRight2',
                                        shape: {
                                            api,
                                            x: location[0],
                                            y: location[1],
                                            xAxisPoint: api.coord([api.value(0), 0])
                                        },
                                        style: {
                                            fill: (color = new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                                                {
                                                    offset: 0,
                                                    color: '#61EFA6'
                                                },
                                                {
                                                    offset: 0.8,
                                                    color: '#11A659'
                                                }
                                            ]))
                                        }
                                    },
                                    {
                                        type: 'CubeTop2',
                                        shape: {
                                            x: location[0],
                                            y: location[1],
                                        },
                                        style: {
                                            fill: (color = new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                                                {
                                                    offset: 0,
                                                    color: '#61EFA6'
                                                },
                                                {
                                                    offset: 1,
                                                    color: '#61EFA6'
                                                }
                                            ]))
                                        }
                                    }
                                ]
                            }
                        },
                        data: that.bmyyChartData.ydata1
                    },
                ]
            })
        },
        autoTooltip() {
            this.chart.dispatchAction({
                type: 'showTip',
                seriesIndex: 0,
                dataIndex: this.index,
            });
            if (this.index > (this.bmyyChartData.xDatas.length - 2)) {
                this.index = 0
            } else {
                this.index++
            }
        },
        mouseover() {
            clearInterval(this.timer);
        },
        mouseout() {
            this.timer = setInterval(() => {
                this.autoTooltip();
            }, 3000);
        },
    },
    mounted() {
        this.cube()
        this.cube2()
        this.initChart()
        this.timer = setInterval(() => {
            this.autoTooltip();
        }, 3000);
    },
    beforeDestroy() {
        // 销毁图表实例，释放内存
        if (this.chart !== null) {
            this.chart.dispose()
        }
        clearInterval(this.timer)
    },
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
.reservation {
    width: 100%;
    height: calc(100% - 16%);
    position: relative;
    .content {
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
    }
}
</style>
<template>
  <div class="container-header" @dblclick="dboubleClick">
    <div class="header-date-box">
      <div class="header-time">{{ currentTime }}</div>
      <div class="header-date">{{ currentDate }}</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import Vue from 'vue'
import fullscreen from 'vue-fullscreen'
Vue.use(fullscreen)
export default {
  data() {
    return {
      now: new Date()
    }
  },
  computed: {
    currentTime() {
      // 格式化时间
      return this.now.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour12: false, hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit' })
    },
    currentDate() {
      const weekdays = ['星期日', '星期一', '星期二', '星期三', '星期四', '星期五', '星期六']
      const dayName = weekdays[this.now.getDay()]
      const date = this.now.toISOString().slice(0, 10)
      return `${date} ${dayName}`
    }
  },
  mounted() {
    // 每1000毫秒（1秒）更新时间
    this.timer = setInterval(() => {
      this.now = new Date()
    }, 1000)
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    // 清除定时器
    if (this.timer) {
      clearInterval(this.timer)
    }
  },
  methods: {
    dboubleClick() {
      this.$store.commit('SET_MENUFLAG')
      this.$fullscreen.toggle()
    }
  }
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
@import '../scss/index.scss';
</style>
<template>
  <div class="item-header">
    <div class="item-title">{{ titleDesc }}</div>
    <div v-if="showDataPicker" class="change-data">
      <el-date-picker
        v-model="value1"
        class="picker"
        type="datetimerange"
        range-separator="至"
        start-placeholder="开始日期"
        end-placeholder="结束日期"
        :clearable="false"
        value-format="yyyy-MM-dd-HH-mm-ss"
        @change="dateChange"
      />
    </div>
    <div v-if="showMore" class="more" @click="clickMore">更多</div>
    <div v-if="showSele" class="date-all">
      <div class="more" data-type="0" :class="{ sele: selectedType === 'ALL' }" @click="dateSele('ALL')">全部</div>
      <div class="more" data-type="1" :class="{ sele: selectedType === 'YESTERDAY' }" @click="dateSele('YESTERDAY')">昨日</div>
      <div class="more" data-type="2" :class="{ sele: selectedType === 'DAY' }" @click="dateSele('DAY')">今日</div>
      <div class="more" data-type="3" :class="{ sele: selectedType === 'MONTH' }" @click="dateSele('MONTH')">本月</div>
      <div class="more" data-type="4" :class="{ sele: selectedType === 'YEAR' }" @click="dateSele('YEAR')">今年</div>
    </div>
    <div v-if="problemSele" class="date-all">
      <div class="more" data-type="0" :class="{ sele: selectedType === 'ALL' }" @click="dateSele('ALL')">全部</div>
      <div class="more" data-type="1" :class="{ sele: selectedType === 'DAY' }" @click="dateSele('DAY')">日</div>
      <div class="more" data-type="2" :class="{ sele: selectedType === 'MONTH' }" @click="dateSele('MONTH')">月</div>
      <div class="more" data-type="3" :class="{ sele: selectedType === 'YEAR' }" @click="dateSele('YEAR')">年</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
export default {
  name: 'ItemHeader',
  props: {
    titleDesc: {
      type: String,
      default: ''
    },
    showDataPicker: {
      type: Boolean,
      default: false
    },
    showMore: {
      type: Boolean,
      default: false
    },
    showSele: {
      type: Boolean,
      default: false
    },
    problemSele: {
      type: Boolean,
      default: false
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      value1: '',
      selectedType: 'ALL'
    }
  },
  methods: {
    clickMore() {
      this.$emit('click-more')
    },
    dateChange(value) {
      this.$emit('date-change', value)
    },
    dateSele(type) {
      this.selectedType = type
      this.$emit('date-sele', type)
    }
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <div class="item2">
    <item-header :title-desc="'实时报警分类'" :show-more="chartData.xDatas && chartData.xDatas.length > 0" @click-more="clickMore" />
    <div class="item-desc null-box">
      <bar-charts v-if="chartData.xDatas && chartData.xDatas.length > 0" :chart-data="chartData" />
      <img v-else class="null-img" src="@assets/images/board/null.png">
    </div>
    <warn-dialog v-if="showDialog" @close-dialog="showDialog = false" />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import ItemHeader from './ItemHeader' // 区块头部
import BarCharts from './BarCharts' // 左二柱状图
import WarnDialog from './WarnDialog'
import { warnTop } from '@/api/safeBoard/safeBoard.js'
export default {
  components: { ItemHeader, BarCharts, WarnDialog },
  data() {
    return {
      showDialog: false,
      chartData: {}
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getChart()
    this.refreshData = setInterval(this.getChart, 60000)
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    clearInterval(this.refreshData)
  },
  methods: {
    // 图表
    getChart() {
      warnTop().then(res => {
        this.chartData = res.data
      })
    },
    clickMore() {
      this.showDialog = true
    }
  }
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
@import '../scss/index.scss';
</style>
<template>
  <div ref="bar" class="bar-chart" :style="{height: '100%', width: '100%'}" />
</template>
<script>
import * as echarts from 'echarts'
import resize from '../../charts/mixins/resize'
export default {
  mixins: [resize],
  props: {
    chartData: {
      type: Object,
      default: () => ({})
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      chart: null
    }
  },
  watch: {
    // 监听 chartData 的变化
    chartData: {
      deep: true,
      handler(newData) {
        if (newData && Object.keys(newData).length > 0) {
          this.setOptions()
        }
      }
    }
  },
  mounted() {
    this.initChart()
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    if (this.chart !== null) {
      this.chart.dispose()
    }
  },
  methods: {
    initChart() {
      this.chart = echarts.init(this.$refs.bar)
      this.setOptions()
    },
    setOptions() {
      const that = this
      // 创建x轴数据的副本，并追加0直到长度为10
      const xDataWithZeros = that.chartData.xDatas.slice() // 首先复制原始数组
      while (xDataWithZeros.length < 10) {
        xDataWithZeros.push('')
      }
      this.chart.setOption({
        legend: {
          icon: 'circle',
          textStyle: {
            color: '#FFFFFF'
          },
          top: '6%'
        },
        tooltip: {
          trigger: 'axis',
          axisPointer: {
            type: 'shadow'
          },
          backgroundColor: 'rgba(17, 112, 144, 0.7)', // 白色背景，70% 不透明度
          borderWidth: 0, // 无边框
          textStyle: {
            color: '#fff' // 文字颜色
          },
          formatter: function(params) {
            let res = '<div style="margin-bottom: 8px;"><b>' + params[0].axisValue + '</b></div>' // 显示完整的X轴标签在第一行并添加底部距离
            params.forEach(function(item) {
              res += '<div style="display: flex; align-items: center;">' +
            '<span style="display:inline-block;margin-right:10px;border-radius:50%;width:10px;height:10px;background-color:' + item.color + ';"></span>' +
            item.seriesName + '：' + item.value + '</div><br/>' // 显示每个系列的颜色块、名称和值
            })
            return res
          }
        },
        grid: {
          left: '3%',
          right: '4%',
          bottom: '8%',
          containLabel: true
        },
        xAxis: {
          type: 'category',
          axisLabel: {
            color: '#FFFFFF',
            interval: 0,
            formatter: function(value) {
              // 当文字长度超过5时使用省略号
              return value.length > 5 ? `${value.slice(0, 5)}...` : value
            }
          },
          // data: that.chartData.xDatas
          data: xDataWithZeros // 使用新数组作为x轴的数据
        },
        yAxis: {
          type: 'value',
          minInterval: 1, // 设置y轴的最小刻度间隔为1
          axisLabel: {
            color: '#FFFFFF',
            formatter: function(value) {
              return value
            }
          },
          splitLine: {
            show: true,
            lineStyle: {
              color: '#465A64',
              width: 0.5,
              type: 'solid'
            }
          }
        },
        series: [
          {
            name: that.chartData.yDatas[0].name,
            type: 'bar',
            stack: 'total',
            color: '#3FD5E1',
            data: that.chartData.yDatas[0].data
          },
          {
            name: that.chartData.yDatas[1].name,
            type: 'bar',
            stack: 'total',
            color: '#779DFF',
            data: that.chartData.yDatas[1].data
          },
          {
            name: that.chartData.yDatas[2].name,
            type: 'bar',
            stack: 'total',
            color: '#D67C15',
            data: that.chartData.yDatas[2].data
          }
        ]
      })
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="dialog-bg">
    <div class="dialog-container">
      <div class="dialog-title">巡检异常统计全部</div>
      <div class="dialog-close" @click="closeDialog"><i class="el-icon-close" /></div>
      <div class="dialog-body">
        <div class="dialog-search">
          <el-input v-model="queryParams.pointName" placeholder="请输入巡检点名称" @keyup.enter.native="getList">
            <template #suffix>
              <i class="el-icon-search" @click="getList" />
            </template>
          </el-input>
          <el-date-picker
            v-model="dateValue"
            class="picker transparent-bg"
            type="datetimerange"
            range-separator="至"
            start-placeholder="开始日期"
            end-placeholder="结束日期"
            :clearable="false"
            value-format="yyyy-MM-dd-HH-mm-ss"
            @change="dateChange"
          />
        </div>
        <div class="dialog-table">
          <div class="dia-table">
            <div class="dia-table-header">
              <div class="dia-header-item">巡检点名称</div>
              <div class="dia-header-item">巡检异常</div>
              <div class="dia-header-item">巡检点异常</div>
              <div class="dia-header-item">未巡检</div>
            </div>
            <div v-for="(item, index) in tableList" :key="index" class="dia-table-row">
              <div class="dia-row-item">{{ item.point_name }}</div>
              <div class="dia-row-item">{{ item.xjyc_num }}</div>
              <div class="dia-row-item">{{ item.xjdyc_num }}</div>
              <div class="dia-row-item">{{ item.wxj_num }}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="board-pagination center">
          <pagination
            v-show="total > 0"
            :small="true"
            :total="total"
            :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
            :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
            :layout="'total, prev, pager, next, jumper'"
            @pagination="getList"
          />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { abnormalMore } from '@/api/safeBoard/safeBoard.js'
export default {
  data() {
    return {
      dateValue: '',
      queryParams: {
        roomId: '',
        start: '',
        end: '',
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10
      },
      total: 0,
      tableList: []
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    getList() {
      console.log(this.queryParams)
      abnormalMore(this.queryParams).then(res => {
        this.tableList = res.rows
        this.total = res.total
      })
    },
    // 搜索条件时间段
    dateChange(value) {
      this.queryParams.start = value[0]
      this.queryParams.end = value[1]
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1
      this.getList()
    },
    closeDialog() {
      // 先清空搜索条件、表格、分页再关闭
      this.dateValue = ''
      this.queryParams.roomId = ''
      this.$emit('close-dialog')
    }
  }
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
@import '../scss/index.scss';
</style>

  <div class="item-desc desc1">
    <div class="grid-box">

      <div>
        <div class="grid-box-title">未巡检数</div>
        <div class="grid-box-num">{{ sumNum }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

<script>
export default {
  props: {
    patrolNum: {
      type: Number,
      default: 0
    },
    pointNum: {
      type: Number,
      default: 0
    },
    sumNum: {
      type: Number,

    }

<style lang="scss" scoped>
@import '../scss/index.scss';
</style>
<template>
  <div class="item-desc" :class="{'null-box': showNull}">
    <div v-if="!showNull" class="table-container">
      <div class="table">
        <div class="table-header">
          <div class="header-item width10"><div class="ellipsis">序号</div></div>
          <div class="header-item width70"><div class="ellipsis">上报时间</div></div>
          <div class="header-item width70"><div class="ellipsis">上报地点</div></div>
          <div class="header-item"><div class="ellipsis">上报类型</div></div>
          <div class="header-item"><div class="ellipsis">上报人员</div></div>
          <div class="header-item"><div class="ellipsis">联系电话</div></div>
        </div>
        <div v-for="(item, index) in tableList" :key="index" class="table-row">
          <div class="row-item width10"><div class="ellipsis">{{ index + 1 }}</div></div>
          <div class="row-item width70"><div class="ellipsis">{{ item.createTime }}</div></div>
          <div class="row-item width70"><div class="ellipsis">{{ item.position }}</div></div>
          <div class="row-item"><div class="ellipsis">{{ item.params.typeName }}</div></div>
          <div class="row-item"><div class="ellipsis">{{ item.createBy ? item.createBy : '班牌上报' }}</div></div>
          <div class="row-item"><div class="ellipsis">{{ item.phone }}</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div v-if="!showNull" class="board-pagination">
      <pagination
        v-show="total > 0"
        :small="true"
        :total="total"
        :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
        :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
        :layout="'total, prev, pager, next, jumper'"
        @pagination="getList"
      />
    </div>
    <img v-else class="table-null-img" src="@assets/images/board/null.png">
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { reportList } from '@/api/safeBoard/safeBoard.js'
export default {
  data() {
    return {
      showNull: false,
      tableList: [],
      total: 0,
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 4,
        queryType: ''
      }
    }
  },
  props: {
    type: {
      type: String,
      default: ''
    }
  },
  watch: {
    type(newType) {
      this.queryParams.queryType = newType
      this.getList()
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
    this.refreshData = setInterval(this.getList, 60000)
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    clearInterval(this.refreshData)
  },
  methods: {
    getList() {
      reportList(this.queryParams).then(e => {
        this.showNull = e.total === 0
        this.tableList = e.rows
        this.total = e.total
      })
    }
  }
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
@import '../scss/index.scss';
</style>
<template>
    <div class="reservation">
        <div class="content" id="charts" ref="yyqs" @mouseover="mouseover" @mouseout="mouseout">
        </div>
    </div>
</template>
<script>
import resize from '../../charts/mixins/resize.js'
import * as echarts from 'echarts'
export default {
    name: 'reservationCharts',
    mixins: [resize],
    props: {
        chartData: {
            type: Object,
            default: () => ({})
        },
    },
    data() {
        return {
            chart: null,
            timer: null,
            timerTool: null,
            index: 0,
            indexTool: 0
        }
    },
    watch: {
        // 监听 chartData 的变化
        chartData: {
            deep: true,
            handler(newData) {
                if (newData && Object.keys(newData).length > 0) {
                    this.setOptions()
                }
            }
        },
    },
    methods: {
        reserva(data) {
            this.$emit('yyqsTab', data)
        },
        initChart() {
            this.chart = echarts.init(this.$refs.yyqs)
            this.setOptions()
        },
        setOptions() {
            const that = this
            const newFormatData = that.chartData.ydatas.map(item => {
                const key = Object.keys(item)[0];
                return {
                    name: key,
                    type: 'line',
                    stack: 'Total',
                    data: item[key],
                    symbol: "circle",
                    SymbolSize: 14
                };
            })
            this.chart.setOption({
                grid: {  // 布满div
                    top: "45px",
                    left: "50px",
                    right: "25px",
                    bottom: "40px"
                },
                dataZoom: [
                    {
                        type: 'slider',
                        show: true,
                        xAxisIndex: [0],
                        start: 0,
                        end: 40,
                        handleSize: 8,
                        height: 10,
                        bottom: 10,
                        fillerColor: 'rgba(54, 162, 235, 0.2)',
                        borderColor: 'rgba(54, 162, 235, 1)',
                        borderWidth: 1,
                        textStyle: {
                            color: 'rgba(54, 162, 235, 0)'
                        },
                    }
                ],
                tooltip: {
                    trigger: 'axis',
                    backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.7)',
                    borderWidth: 0,
                    textStyle: {
                        color: '#fff'
                    },
                    formatter: function (params) {
                        // console.log(params, 'aaaaa')
                        var result = '时间：' + params[0].name + '<br/>';
                        // params.every(data => { console.log(data) })
                        params.forEach(function (item) {
                            if (item.value > 0) {
                                result += item.seriesName + '预约次数' + ': ' + item.value + '次<br/>';
                            }
                        });
                        let regex = /预约次数/;
                        if (regex.test(result)) {
                            return result;
                        } else {
                            return result += '该阶段各教室预约次数均为0'
                        }
                    }
                },
                legend: {
                    type: 'scroll',
                    // orient: 'vertical',
                    width: '35%',
                    padding: [10, 30, 0, 0],
                    right: '0',
                    icon: 'rect',
                    itemWidth: 18,
                    itemHeight: 3,
                    pageIconColor: '#fff',
                    pageIconInactiveColor: '#6b6b6b',
                    textStyle: {
                        color: '#fff'
                    },
                    pageTextStyle: {
                        color: '#fff'
                    },
                    data: that.chartData.legends
                },
                xAxis: {
                    type: 'category',
                    axisTick: { show: false },
                    data: that.chartData.xDatas,
                    axisLabel: {
                        color: '#fff'
                    }
                },
                yAxis: {
                    type: 'value',
                    name: '   数量：次',
                    axisLine: {
                        show: false,
                        lineStyle: {
                            color: 'white'
                        }
                    },
                    axisLabel: {
                        color: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 1)',
                    },
                    splitLine: {
                        // 网格线
                        show: true,
                        lineStyle: {
                            type: 'dashed',
                            width: 1,
                            color: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, .2)'
                        }
                    },
                },
                series: newFormatData
            })
        },
        autoDataZoom() {
            this.chart.dispatchAction({
                type: 'dataZoom',
                startValue: this.index,
                endValue: this.index + 4,
            });
            if (this.index > (this.chartData.xDatas.length - 6)) {
                this.index = 0
            } else {
                this.index++
            }
        },
        autoTooltip() {
            this.chart.dispatchAction({
                type: 'showTip',
                // type: 'dataZoom',
                seriesIndex: 0,
                dataIndex: this.indexTool,
                // startValue: this.index,
                // endValue: this.index + 4,
            });
            if (this.indexTool > (this.chartData.xDatas.length - 2)) {
                this.indexTool = 0
            } else {
                this.indexTool++
            }
        },
        mouseover() {
            clearInterval(this.timer);
            clearInterval(this.timerTool);
        },
        mouseout() {
            this.timer = setInterval(() => {
                this.autoDataZoom();
            }, 3000);
            this.timerTool = setInterval(() => {
                this.autoTooltip()
            }, 2000);
        },
    },
    mounted() {
        this.initChart()
        this.timer = setInterval(() => {
            this.autoDataZoom();
        }, 3000);
        this.timerTool = setInterval(() => {
            this.autoTooltip()
        }, 2000);
    },
    beforeDestroy() {
        // 销毁图表实例，释放内存
        if (this.chart !== null) {
            this.chart.dispose()
        }
        clearInterval(this.timer)
        clearInterval(this.timerTool)
    },
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
.reservation {
    width: 100%;
    height: 86%;
    position: relative;
    .content {
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        // background-color: beige;
        position: absolute;
        bottom: 0;
        left: 0;
        z-index: 1;
    }
}
</style>
<template>
  <div class="item1">
    <item-header :title-desc="'异常上报统计'" :show-sele="true" @date-sele="dateSele" />
    <patrol-grid :patrol-num="abnormalCount.xjyc" :point-num="abnormalCount.xjdyc" :sum-num="abnormalCount.wxjs" />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import ItemHeader from './ItemHeader' // 区块头部
import PatrolGrid from './PatrolGrid' // 右一区域
import { abnormalCount } from '@/api/safeBoard/safeBoard.js'
export default {
  components: { ItemHeader, PatrolGrid },
  data() {
    return {
      abnormalCount: {
        xjyc: 0,
        xjdyc: 0,
        wxjs: 0
      },
      type: ''
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.dateSele('ALL')
    this.refreshData = setInterval(() => {
      this.dateSele(this.type)
    }, 60000)
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    clearInterval(this.refreshData)
  },
  methods: {
    dateSele(type) {
      this.type = type
      abnormalCount(type).then(res => {
        this.abnormalCount = res.data
      })
    }
  }
}
</script>

@import '../scss/index.scss';
</style>

export default {
  components: { ItemHeader, ProblemTable },
  data() {
    return {
      type: ''
    }
  },
  methods: {

      this.type = type
    }
  }
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
@import '../scss/index.scss';
</style>
<template>
  <div class="item2">
    <item-header
      :title-desc="'巡检异常统计'"
      :show-more="true"
      :show-data-picker="true"
      @click-more="clickMore"
      @date-change="dateChange"
    />
    <div class="item-desc null-box">
      <line-charts v-if="chartData.xDatas && chartData.xDatas.length > 0" :chart-data="chartData" />
      <img v-else class="null-img" src="@assets/images/board/null.png">
    </div>
    <patrol-dialog v-if="showDialog" @close-dialog="showDialog = false" />
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import ItemHeader from './ItemHeader' // 区块头部
import LineCharts from './LineCharts' // 左二柱状图
import PatrolDialog from './PatrolDialog'
import { abnormalTop } from '@/api/safeBoard/safeBoard.js'
export default {
  components: { ItemHeader, LineCharts, PatrolDialog },
  data() {
    return {
      showDialog: false,
      chartData: {},
      total: 0,
      queryParams: {
        start: '',
        end: ''
      }
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getChart()
    this.refreshData = setInterval(this.getChart, 60000)
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    clearInterval(this.refreshData)
  },
  methods: {
    // 图表
    getChart() {
      abnormalTop(this.queryParams).then(res => {
        this.chartData = res.data
      })
    },
    // 切换图表日期范围
    dateChange(value) {
      if (value) {
        this.queryParams.start = value[0]
        this.queryParams.end = value[1]
      } else {
        this.queryParams.start = ''
        this.queryParams.end = ''
      }
      abnormalTop(this.queryParams).then(res => {
        this.chartData = res.data
      })
    },
    // 更多按钮-弹窗
    clickMore() {
      this.showDialog = true
    }
  }
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
@import '../scss/index.scss';
</style>
<template>
    <div ref="bar" class="bar-chart" :style="{ height: '100%', width: '100%' }" />
</template>
<script>
import * as echarts from 'echarts'
import resize from '../../charts/mixins/resize'
export default {
    name: "RoomTypeCharts",
    mixins: [resize],
    props: {
        roomTypeData: {
            type: Object,
            default: () => ({})
        }
    },
    data() {
        return {
            chart: null,
            interval:null
        }
    },
    watch: {
        // 监听 roomTypeData 的变化
        roomTypeData: {
            deep: true,
            handler(newData) {
                if (newData && Object.keys(newData).length > 0) {
                    this.setOptions()
                }
            }
        }
    },
    mounted() {
        this.initChart()
            this.interval = setInterval(() => {
                this.startAnimation();
            }, 3000);
    },
    beforeDestroy() {
        if (this.chart !== null) {
            this.chart.dispose()
        }
        clearInterval(this.interval)
    },
    methods: {
        initChart() {
            this.chart = echarts.init(this.$refs.bar)
            this.setOptions()
        },
        setOptions() {
            const that = this
            let roomTypeData = this.roomTypeData
            this.chart.setOption({
                grid: {  // 布满div
                    top: "0px",
                    left: "0px",
                    right: "0px",
                    bottom: "0px"
                },
                angleAxis: {
                    show: false,
                    type: 'value',
                    startAngle: 180, //极坐标初始角度
                    endAngle: 0,
                    splitLine: {
                        show: false,
                    },
                },
                barMaxWidth: 10, //圆环宽度
                radiusAxis: {
                    show: false,
                    type: 'category',
                },
                //圆环位置和大小
                polar: {
                    center: ['50%', '80%'],
                    radius: '170%',
                },
                series: [
                    {
                        type: 'bar',
                        stack: '测试',
                        data: [
                            {
                                //上层圆环，显示数据
                                value: roomTypeData.num,
                                name: 'sdfasdf',
                                itemStyle: {
                                    color: new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(1, 0, 0, 0, [
                                        {
                                            offset: 1,
                                            color: roomTypeData.colors[0],
                                        },
                                        {
                                            offset: 0.5,
                                            color: roomTypeData.colors[1],
                                        },
                                        {
                                            offset: 0,
                                            color: roomTypeData.colors[2],
                                        },
                                    ]),
                                },
                            },
                        ],
                        barGap: '-100%', //柱间距离,上下两层圆环重合
                        coordinateSystem: 'polar',
                        roundCap: true, //顶端圆角从 v4.5.0 开始支持
                        z: 2, //圆环层级，同zindex
                    },
                    {
                        //下层圆环，显示最大值
                        type: 'bar',
                        data: [
                            {
                                value: roomTypeData.total,
                                itemStyle: {
                                    color: {
                                        //图形渐变颜色方法，四个数字分别代表，右，下，左，上，offset表示0%到100%
                                        type: 'linear',
                                        x: 0,
                                        y: 0,
                                        x2: 1, //从左到右 0-1
                                        y2: 0,
                                        colorStops: [
                                            {
                                                offset: 0,
                                                color: roomTypeData.bgColor,
                                            },
                                            {
                                                offset: 1,
                                                color: roomTypeData.bgColor,
                                            },
                                        ],
                                    },
                                },
                            },
                        ],
                        barGap: '-100%',
                        coordinateSystem: 'polar',
                        roundCap: true,
                        z: 1,
                    },
                    {
                        stack: '测试',
                        type: 'bar',
                        data: [0.01],
                        showBackground: false,
                        coordinateSystem: 'polar',
                        roundCap: true,
                        z: 100,
                        barWidth: 10,
                        itemStyle: {
                            color: roomTypeData.textColor,
                            borderColor: roomTypeData.textColor,
                            borderWidth: 8,
                        },
                    },
                    {
                        name: '数据',
                        type: 'gauge',
                        startAngle: 210,
                        endAngle: -30,
                        radius: '70%',
                        min: 0,
                        max: roomTypeData.total,
                        splitNumber: 1,
                        axisLine: {
                            show: false,
                        },
                        center: ["50%", "82%"],
                        //仪表盘文字
                        axisLabel: {
                            show: true,
                            textStyle: {
                                fontSize: 16,
                                color: roomTypeData.textColor,
                                fontWeight: 600,
                                padding: -55
                            },
                        }, //刻度标签。
                        axisTick: {
                            show: false,
                        }, //刻度样式
                        splitLine: {
                            show: false,
                        }, //分隔线样式
                        pointer: {
                            show: false,
                        },
                        title: {
                            show: false,
                        },
                        detail: {
                            valueAnimation: true,
                            width: '60%',
                            borderRadius: 8,
                            offsetCenter: [0, '-45%'],
                            fontSize: 30,
                            fontWeight: '400',
                            formatter: '{value}', // %文字大小调整
                            color: roomTypeData.textColor
                        },
                        data: [
                            {
                                value: roomTypeData.num,
                            },
                        ],
                    },
                    {
                        name: '单位',
                        type: 'gauge',
                        //  center: ['20%', '50%'],
                        radius: '70%',
                        axisLine: {
                            show: false,
                        },
                        //仪表盘文字
                        axisLabel: {
                            show: false,
                        }, //刻度标签。
                        axisTick: {
                            show: false,
                        }, //刻度样式
                        splitLine: {
                            show: false,
                        }, //分隔线样式
                        detail: {
                            show: false,
                        },
                        pointer: {
                            show: false,
                        },
                        title: {
                            show: false,
                        },
                        data: [
                            {
                                value: roomTypeData.total,
                            },
                        ],
                    },
                ],
            })
        },
        startAnimation() {
            this.chart.dispose()
            this.initChart()
        }
    }
}
</script>
<template>
    <div class="head">
        <div class="tab">
            <div class="tabYear" :class="{ 'has-bg': year }" @click="changeYear">本年
            </div>
            <div class="tabMounth" :class="{ 'has-bg': mounth }" @click="changeMounth">本月
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</template>
<script>
export default {
    props: {
    },
    data() {
        return {
            year: true,
            mounth: false
        }
    },
    methods: {
        changeYear() {
            this.$emit('depart', 'YEAR')
            this.$emit('reserva', 'YEAR')
            this.year = true
            this.mounth = false
        },
        changeMounth() {
            this.$emit('depart', 'MONTH')
            this.$emit('reserva', 'MONTH')
            this.year = false
            this.mounth = true
        }
    },
}
</script>

<template>
    <div class="head">
        <div class="time">{{ currentDateTime }}</div>
