<script>
import resize from '../../charts/mixins/resize.js'
import * as echarts from 'echarts'
export default {
    name: 'timecharts',
    mixins: [resize],
    props: {
        timeChartData: {
            type: Object,
            default: () => ({})
        },
    },
    data() {
        return {
            chart: null,
            flage: false,
            timer: null,
            index: 0
        }
    },
    watch: {
        // 监听 timeChartData 的变化
        timeChartData: {
            deep: true,
            handler(newData) {
                if (newData && Object.keys(newData).length > 0) {
                    this.setOptions()
                }
            }
        },
    },
    methods: {
        initChart() {
            this.chart = echarts.init(this.$refs.sjqs)
            this.setOptions()
        },
        setOptions() {
            const that = this
            this.chart.setOption({
                grid: {  // 布满div
                    top: "35px",
                    left: "30px",
                    right: "25px",
                    bottom: "0",
                    containLabel: true
                },
                tooltip: {
                    trigger: 'axis',
                    backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.7)',
                    borderWidth: 0,
                    textStyle: {
                        color: '#fff'
                    },
                    formatter: function (params) {
                        var result = '时间：' + params[0].name + '<br/>';
                        params.forEach(function (item) {
                            result += '预约数量' + ': ' + item.value + '次<br/>';
                        });
                        return result;
                    }
                },
                xAxis: {
                    type: 'category',
                    axisTick: { show: false },
                    data: that.timeChartData.xDatas,
                    axisLabel: {
                        color: '#fff'
                    }
                },
                yAxis: {
                    type: 'value',
                    name: '数量：次',
                    axisLine: {
                        show: false,
                        lineStyle: {
                            color: 'white'
                        }
                    },
                    axisLabel: {
                        color: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 1)',
                        formatter: function (value) {
                            // return Math.round(value);
                            console.log(value, '11111111')
                            if (that.timeChartData.ydata.every(function (item) { return item === 0; })) {
                                return value * 10 / 2
                            }
                            return value
                        },
                    },
                    splitLine: {
                        // 网格线
                        show: true,
                        lineStyle: {
                            type: 'dashed',
                            width: 1,
                            color: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, .2)'
                        }
                    },
                },
                series: [
                    {
                        data: that.timeChartData.ydata,
                        type: 'line',
                        symbol: "circle",
                        SymbolSize: 4
                    }
                ]
            })
        },
        autoTooltip() {
            this.chart.dispatchAction({
                type: 'showTip',
                seriesIndex: 0,
                dataIndex: this.index,
            });
            if (this.index > (this.timeChartData.xDatas.length - 2)) {
                this.index = 0
            } else {
                this.index++
            }
        },
        mouseover() {
            clearInterval(this.timer);
        },
        mouseout() {
            this.timer = setInterval(() => {
                this.autoTooltip();
            }, 3000);
        }
    },
    mounted() {
        this.initChart()
        this.timer = setInterval(() => {
            this.autoTooltip();
        }, 3000);
    },
    beforeDestroy() {
        // 销毁图表实例，释放内存
        if (this.chart !== null) {
            this.chart.dispose()
        }
        clearInterval(this.timer)
    },
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>

    width: 100%;
    height: 84%;
    // background-image: url('~@assets/images/safeIcon/time.png');
    // background-size: 100% 100%;
    // background-repeat: no-repeat;
    position: relative;
    .content {
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
    }
}
</style>
<template>
  <div class="dialog-bg">
    <div class="dialog-container video-container">
      <div class="dialog-title">监控画面</div>
      <div class="dialog-close" @click="closeDialog"><i class="el-icon-close" /></div>
      <div class="dialog-video-box">
        <!-- 视频监控窗口 -->
        <div class="swiper-container">
          <div class="swiper-wrapper">
            <div
              v-for="(item, index) in cameras"
              :key="index"
              class="swiper-slide"
            >
              <stream-player
                :key="index"
                :url="'rtsp://'+item.cameraUser+':'+item.cameraPassword+'@'+item.cameraIp+':'+item.cameraPort+'/h264/ch01/main/av_stream'"
              />
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="swiper-pagination" />
          <div class="swiper-button-next" />
          <div class="swiper-button-prev" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import Swiper from 'swiper'
import 'swiper/css/swiper.min.css'
import StreamPlayer from '@/components/StreamPlayer'
export default {
  components: { StreamPlayer },
  props: {
    cameras: {
      type: Array,
      default: () => { [] }
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      swiper: null
    }
  },
  mounted() {
    this.getSwiper()
  },
  methods: {
    // 关闭弹窗
    closeDialog() {
      this.$emit('close-dialog')
    },
    // 轮播
    getSwiper() {
      this.swiper = new Swiper('.swiper-container', {
        loop: false, // 无缝
        slidesPerView: 1, // 一组1个
        spaceBetween: 100, // 间隔
        // 如果需要前进后退按钮
        navigation: {
          nextEl: '.swiper-button-next',
          prevEl: '.swiper-button-prev'
        },
        // 窗口变化,重新init,针对F11全屏和放大缩小,必须加
        observer: true,
        observeParents: true,
        // 如果需要分页器
        pagination: {
          el: '.swiper-pagination',
          clickable: true // 分页器可以点击
        }
      })
    }
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <div class="dialog-bg">
    <div class="dialog-container">
      <div class="dialog-title">历史报警分类</div>
      <div class="dialog-close" @click="closeDialog"><i class="el-icon-close" /></div>
      <div class="dialog-body">
        <div class="dialog-search">
          <el-input v-model="queryParams.roomId" placeholder="请输入教室编号" @keyup.enter.native="getList">
            <template #suffix>
              <i class="el-icon-search" @click="getList" />
            </template>
          </el-input>
          <el-date-picker
            v-model="dateValue"
            class="picker transparent-bg"
            type="datetimerange"
            range-separator="至"
            start-placeholder="开始日期"
            end-placeholder="结束日期"
            :clearable="false"
            value-format="yyyy-MM-dd-HH-mm-ss"
            @change="dateChange"
          />
        </div>
        <div class="dialog-table">
          <div class="dia-table">
            <div class="dia-table-header">
              <div class="dia-header-item">教室编号</div>
              <div class="dia-header-item">烟感/次</div>
              <div class="dia-header-item">窗磁/次</div>
              <div class="dia-header-item">水浸/次</div>
              <div class="dia-header-item">门锁/次</div>
              <div class="dia-header-item">电异常/次</div>
              <div class="dia-header-item">温度/次</div>
              <div class="dia-header-item">湿度/次</div>
              <div class="dia-header-item">光照/次</div>
              <div class="dia-header-item">pm2.5/次</div>
              <div class="dia-header-item">pm10/次</div>
            </div>
            <div v-for="(item, index) in tableList" :key="index" class="dia-table-row">
              <div class="dia-row-item">{{ item.room_id }}</div>
              <div class="dia-row-item">{{ item.yg_num }}</div>
              <div class="dia-row-item">{{ item.cc_num}}</div>
              <div class="dia-row-item">{{ item.sj_num }}</div>
              <div class="dia-row-item">{{ item.lock_num }}</div>
              <div class="dia-row-item">{{ item.power_num }}</div>
              <div class="dia-row-item">{{ item.wd_num }}</div>
              <div class="dia-row-item">{{ item.sd_num }}</div>
              <div class="dia-row-item">{{ item.gz_num }}</div>
              <div class="dia-row-item">{{ item.pm25_num }}</div>
              <div class="dia-row-item">{{ item.pm10_num }}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="board-pagination center">
          <pagination
            v-show="total > 0"
            :small="true"
            :total="total"
            :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
            :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
            :layout="'total, prev, pager, next, jumper'"
            @pagination="getList"
          />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { warnMore } from '@/api/safeBoard/safeBoard.js'
export default {
  data() {
    return {
      dateValue: '',
      queryParams: {
        roomId: '',
        start: '',
        end: '',
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10
      },
      total: 0,
      tableList: []
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods: {
    getList() {
      warnMore(this.queryParams).then(res => {
        this.tableList = res.rows
        this.total = res.total
      })
    },
    // 搜索条件时间段
    dateChange(value) {
      this.queryParams.start = value[0]
      this.queryParams.end = value[1]
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1
      this.getList()
    },
    closeDialog() {
      // 先清空搜索条件、表格、分页再关闭
      this.dateValue = ''
      this.queryParams.roomId = ''
      this.$emit('close-dialog')
    }
  }
}
</script>

</style>
<template>
  <div class="item-desc desc1">
    <div class="grid-box">
      <img class="img" src="@assets/images/board/baojing.png">
      <div>
        <div class="grid-box-title">今日报警数量</div>
        <div class="grid-box-num">{{ warnCount.todayWarning }}次</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="grid-box">
      <img class="img" src="@assets/images/board/shishi.png">
      <div>
        <div class="grid-box-title">实时报警数量</div>
        <div class="grid-box-num">{{ warnCount.nowWarning }}次</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="grid-box">
      <img class="img" src="@assets/images/board/zongbaojing.png">
      <div>
        <div class="grid-box-title">总报警数量</div>
        <div class="grid-box-num">{{ warnCount.totalWarning }}次</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { warnCount } from '@/api/safeBoard/safeBoard.js'
export default {
  data() {
    return {
      warnCount: {
        todayWarning: 0,
        nowWarning: 0,
        totalWarning: 0
      }
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.fetchWarningCounts()
    this.refreshData = setInterval(this.fetchWarningCounts, 60000)
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    clearInterval(this.refreshData)
  },
  methods: {
    fetchWarningCounts() {
      warnCount().then(res => {
        this.warnCount = res.data
      })
    }
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <div class="item-desc" :class="{'null-box': showNull}">
    <div v-if="!showNull" class="table-container">
      <div class="table">
        <div class="table-header">
          <div class="header-item width10"><div class="ellipsis">序号</div></div>
          <div class="header-item width70"><div class="ellipsis">报警时间</div></div>
          <div class="header-item"><div class="ellipsis">报警地点</div></div>
          <div class="header-item width70"><div class="ellipsis">报警设备</div></div>
          <div class="header-item"><div class="ellipsis">报警内容</div></div>
          <div class="header-item"><div class="ellipsis">当前数值</div></div>
          <div class="header-item width20"><div class="ellipsis">操作</div></div>
        </div>
        <div v-for="(item, index) in tableList" :key="index" class="table-row">
          <div class="row-item width10"><div class="ellipsis">{{ index + 1 }}</div></div>
          <div class="row-item width70"><div class="ellipsis">{{ item.createTime }}</div></div>
          <div class="row-item"><div class="ellipsis">{{ item.roomId }}</div></div>
          <div class="row-item width70"><div class="ellipsis">{{ item.deviceName }}</div></div>
          <div class="row-item"><div class="ellipsis">{{ item.params.subTypeName }}</div></div>
          <div class="row-item"><div class="ellipsis">{{ item.num }} {{ item.unit }}</div></div>
          <div class="row-item width20 monitoring-btn"><div class="ellipsis" @click="openVideo(item)">监控</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div v-if="!showNull" class="board-pagination">
      <pagination
        v-show="total > 0"
        :small="true"
        :total="total"
        :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
        :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
        :layout="'total, prev, pager, next, jumper'"
        @pagination="getList"
      />
    </div>
    <img v-else class="table-null-img" src="@assets/images/board/null.png">
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { warnList } from '@/api/safeBoard/safeBoard.js'
export default {
  data() {
    return {
      showNull: false,
      tableList: [],
      total: 0,
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 4
      }
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getList()
    this.refreshData = setInterval(this.getList, 60000)
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    clearInterval(this.refreshData)
  },
  methods: {
    getList() {
      warnList(this.queryParams).then(e => {
        this.showNull = e.total === 0
        this.tableList = e.rows
        this.total = e.total
      })
    },
    // 打开监控
    openVideo(item) {
      this.$emit('open-video', item)
    }
  }
}
</script>

<template>
    <div class="content">
        <div class="title" @dblclick="toggleFullScreen">
            <span>预约看板</span>
        </div>
        <div class="continer">
            <div class="tab">
                <Tab :unitone="'/次'" :unittwo="'/次'" :unitthree="'/个'" :unitfour="'/个'" :total="'总预约次数'" :totalNum="totalNum" :today="'预约今日次数'"
                    :todayNum="todayNum" :sign="'今日签到数'" :signNum="signNum" :idle="'空闲座位数'"
                    :idleNum="`${idleNum}/${seatNum}`"></Tab>
            </div>
            <div class="charts">
                <!-- 预约 -->
                <div class="charts-item yyqs">
                    <div class="tab-head yyqs-head">
                        <div class="tab">
                            <div class="tab-item tabYear" :class="{ 'has-bg': yyqsYear }" @click="changeYyqsYear">本年
                            </div>
                            <div class="tab-item tabMounth" :class="{ 'has-bg': yyqsMounth }" @click="changeYyqsMounth">本月
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <Reservation v-if="YyqsData.legends.length !== 0" :chartData="YyqsData" @yyqsTab="yyqsTab"></Reservation>
                    <div v-else class="nodata">
                        <img src="~@assets/images/nodata.png" alt="">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <!-- 部门  -->
                <div class="charts-item bmyy">
                    <div class="tab-head bmyy-head">
                        <div class="tab">
                            <div class="tab-item tabYear" :class="{ 'has-bg': bmyyYear }" @click="changeBmyyYear">本年
                            </div>
                            <div class="tab-item tabMounth" :class="{ 'has-bg': bmyyMounth }" @click="changeBmyyMounth">本月
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <departmentCharts v-if="BmyyData.xDatas.length !== 0" :bmyyChartData="BmyyData" @bmyyTab="bmyyTab"></departmentCharts>
                    <div v-else class="nodata">
                        <img src="~@assets/images/nodata.png" alt="">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <!-- 时间  -->
                <div class="charts-item sjqs">
                    <div class="charts-item-head"></div>
                    <TimeCharts v-if="SjqsData" :timeChartData='SjqsData'></TimeCharts>
                    <div v-else class="nodata">
                        <img src="~@assets/images/nodata.png" alt="">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <!-- 教室  -->
                <div class="charts-item schoolroom" :class="{ 'inactive-bg': !active, 'active-bg': active }">
                    <div class="head">
                        <div class="head-tab">
                            <div class="roomType" @click="changeRoomtype"></div>
                            <div class="yyType" @click="changeYytype"></div>
                        </div>
                        <div v-show="active" class="tab">
                            <div class="tab-item tabYear" :class="{ 'has-bg': years }" @click="year">本年
                            </div>
                            <div class="tab-item tabMounth" :class="{ 'has-bg': mounths }" @click="mounth">本月
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div v-if="JslxData" class="roomCharts">
                        <div class="batteryDeficitNum">
                            <RoomTypeCharts v-if="JslxData" :roomTypeData="JslxData"></RoomTypeCharts>
                            <div class="shortagesNumber">
                                <span>公共教室</span>
                                <img src="@/assets/images/safeIcon/yylxBot.png">
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <!-- <div class="lockTotal">

                            </div>

                            <span v-else class="bottonSpan">预约总数</span>
                            <img src="@/assets/images/safeIcon/yyTotal.png">
                        </div> -->
                        <div class="normalNum">
                            <RoomTypeCharts v-if="JslxData" :roomTypeData="JslxData"></RoomTypeCharts>
                            <div class="normalNumber">
                                <span>房间总数</span>
                                <img src="@/assets/images/equipment/shadowGreen.png">
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                        <img src="~@assets/images/nodata.png" alt="">
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</template>
<script>
import Tab from './components/Tab' // 头部
import Reservation from './components/ReservationCharts'
import TimeCharts from './components/TimeCharts'
import DepartmentCharts from './components/DepartmentCharts'
import { sharedashboard, getYyqs, getSjqs, getBmyy, getJslx, getYylx } from '@/api/safeBoard/share.js'
import RoomTypeCharts from './components/RoomTypeCharts.vue'
import Vue from 'vue'
import fullscreen from 'vue-fullscreen'
import { active } from 'sortablejs'
import { get } from 'sortablejs'
Vue.use(fullscreen)
export default {
    components: {
        Tab,
        Reservation,
        TimeCharts,
        DepartmentCharts,
        RoomTypeCharts
    },
    data() {
        return {
            intervalYylx: null,
            intervalJslx: null,
            totalNum: '',
            todayNum: '',
            signNum: '',
            idleNum: '',
            seatNum: '',
            // 预约趋势
            YyqsData: null,
            tab: 'YEAR',
            yyqsYear: true,
            yyqsMounth: false,
            // 部门预约
            BmyyData: null,
            bmyy: 'YEAR',
            bmyyYear: true,
            bmyyMounth: false,
            // 时间趋势
            SjqsData: null,
            // 公共教室类型
            JslxData: null,
            // 特殊教室类型
            speJslxData: null,
            // 教室切换开关
            active: false,
            roomDateTab: 'YEAR',
            years: true,
            mounths: false
        }
    },
    methods: {
        bmyyTab(data) {
            this.bmyy = data
            this.getBmyyData()
        },
        yyqsTab(data) {
            this.tab = data
            this.getData()
        },
        getData() {
            // 头部数据
            sharedashboard().then(res => {
                if (res.code == 200) {
                    this.totalNum = res.data.total
                    this.todayNum = res.data.today
                    this.signNum = res.data.signToday
                    this.seatNum = res.data.seatNum
                    this.idleNum = res.data.seatNum - res.data.signToday
                }
            }),
                // 预约趋势
                getYyqs(this.tab).then(res => {
                    this.YyqsData = null
                    if (res.code == 200) {
                        this.YyqsData = res.data
                    }
                })
            // 时间趋势
            getSjqs().then(res => {
                if (res.code == 200) {
                    this.SjqsData = res.data
                }
            })
        },
        // 部门预约
        getBmyyData() {
            getBmyy(this.bmyy).then(res => {
                if (res.code == 200) {
                    this.BmyyData = res.data
                }
            })
        },
        // 教室类型
        getJslxData() {
            getJslx().then(res => {
                // console.log(res, '教室类型')
                if (res.code == 200) {
                    this.JslxData = {
                        // total: res.data[2].value,
                        total: res.data[0].value+res.data[1].value,
                        num: res.data[0].value,
                        colors: [
                            'rgba(5, 57, 114, 0.5)',
                            'rgba(23, 118, 192, 0.6)',
                            'rgba(2, 174, 251, 0.69)',
                        ],
                        bgColor: 'rgba(14, 42, 97, 1)',
                        textColor: 'rgba(52, 158, 255, 1)'
                    }
                        // this.speJslxData = {
                        //     // total: res.data[2].value,
                        //     total: res.data[0].value+res.data[1].value,
                        //     num: res.data[1].value,
                        //     colors: [
                        //         'rgba(10, 47, 86, 0.5)',
                        //         'rgba(42, 167, 173, 0.6)',
                        //         'rgba(65, 255, 232, 0.69)'
                        //     ],
                        //     bgColor: 'rgba(14, 42, 97, 1)',
                        //     textColor: 'rgba(70, 253, 237, 1)'
                        // }
                }
            })
        },
        // 预约类型
        getYylxData(roomDateTab) {
            getYylx(roomDateTab).then(res => {
                // console.log(res, '预约类型')
                this.JslxData = {
                    // total: res.data[2].value,
                    total: res.data[0].value+res.data[1].value,
                    num: res.data[0].value,
                    colors: [
                        'rgba(5, 57, 114, 0.5)',
                        'rgba(23, 118, 192, 0.6)',
                        'rgba(2, 174, 251, 0.69)',
                    ],
                    bgColor: 'rgba(14, 42, 97, 1)',
                    textColor: 'rgba(52, 158, 255, 1)'
                }
                    // this.speJslxData = {
                    //     // total: res.data[2].value,
                    //     total: res.data[0].value+res.data[1].value,
                    //     num: res.data[1].value,
                    //     colors: [
                    //         'rgba(10, 47, 86, 0.5)',
                    //         'rgba(42, 167, 173, 0.6)',
                    //         'rgba(65, 255, 232, 0.69)'
                    //     ],
                    //     bgColor: 'rgba(14, 42, 97, 1)',
                    //     textColor: 'rgba(70, 253, 237, 1)'
                    // }
            })
        },
        // 切换教室类型
        changeRoomtype() {
            this.getJslxData()
            this.active = false
            this.years = true
            this.mounths = false
        },
        // 切换预约类型
        changeYytype() {
            this.getYylxData()
            this.active = true
            this.years = true
            this.mounths = false
        },
        year() {
            this.getYylxData('YEAR')
            this.years = true
            this.mounths = false
        },
        mounth() {
            this.getYylxData('MONTH')
            this.years = false
            this.mounths = true
        },
        // 预约趋势
        changeYyqsYear() {
            this.tab = 'YEAR'
            this.getData()
            this.yyqsYear = true,
                this.yyqsMounth = false
        },
        changeYyqsMounth() {
            this.tab = 'MONTH'
            this.getData()
            this.yyqsYear = false,
                this.yyqsMounth = true
        },
        // 部门
        changeBmyyYear() {
            this.bmyy = 'YEAR'
            this.getBmyyData()
            this.bmyyYear = true,
                this.bmyyMounth = false
        },
        changeBmyyMounth() {
            this.bmyy = 'MONTH'
            this.getBmyyData()
            this.bmyyYear = false,
                this.bmyyMounth = true
        },
        // 双击全屏
        toggleFullScreen() {
            this.$store.commit('SET_MENUFLAG')
            // 事件总线起始页面
            this.$fullscreen.toggle()
        }
    },
    mounted() {
        this.getData()
        this.getJslxData()
        this.getBmyyData()
    },
}
</script>

        <!-- 右三 -->
        <right-three />
      </div>

<script>
import BoardHeader from './components/Header' // 头部

import LeftTwo from './components/LeftTwo'

}

@import './scss/index.scss';

<template>
    <div class="content">
        <div class="title" @dblclick="toggleFullScreen">
            <img src="~@assets/images/safeIcon/shareText.png" alt="">
        </div>
        <div class="continer">
            <div class="tab">
                <Tab :unit="'/次'" :units="'/个'" :total="'总预约次数'" :totalNum="totalNum" :today="'预约今日次数'"
                    :todayNum="todayNum" :sign="'今日签到数'" :signNum="signNum" :idle="'空闲座位数'"
                    :idleNum="`${idleNum}/${seatNum}`"></Tab>
            </div>
            <div class="charts">
                <!-- 预约 -->
                <div class="charts-item yyqs">
                    <div class="tab-head yyqs-head">
                        <div class="tab">
                            <div class="tabYear" :class="{ 'has-bg': yyqsYear }" @click="changeYyqsYear">本年
                            </div>
                            <div class="tabMounth" :class="{ 'has-bg': yyqsMounth }" @click="changeYyqsMounth">本月
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <Reservation v-if="YyqsData" :chartData="YyqsData" @yyqsTab="yyqsTab"></Reservation>
                    <div v-else class="nodata">
                        <img src="~@assets/images/nodata.png" alt="">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <!-- 部门  -->
                <div class="charts-item bmyy">
                    <div class="tab-head bmyy-head">
                        <div class="tab">
                            <div class="tabYear" :class="{ 'has-bg': bmyyYear }" @click="changeBmyyYear">本年
                            </div>
                            <div class="tabMounth" :class="{ 'has-bg': bmyyMounth }" @click="changeBmyyMounth">本月
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <departmentCharts v-if="BmyyData" :bmyyChartData="BmyyData" @bmyyTab="bmyyTab"></departmentCharts>
                    <div v-else class="nodata">
                        <img src="~@assets/images/nodata.png" alt="">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <!-- 时间  -->
                <div class="charts-item sjqs">
                    <div class="charts-item-head"></div>
                    <TimeCharts v-if="SjqsData" :timeChartData='SjqsData'></TimeCharts>
                    <div v-else class="nodata">
                        <img src="~@assets/images/nodata.png" alt="">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <!-- 教室  -->
                <div class="charts-item schoolroom" :class="{ 'inactive-bg': !active, 'active-bg': active }">
                    <div class="head">
                        <div class="head-tab">
                            <div class="roomType" @click="changeRoomtype"></div>
                            <div class="yyType" @click="changeYytype"></div>
                        </div>
                        <div v-show="active" class="tab">
                            <div class="tabYear" :class="{ 'has-bg': years }" @click="year">本年
                            </div>
                            <div class="tabMounth" :class="{ 'has-bg': mounths }" @click="mounth">本月
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div v-if="JslxData" class="roomCharts">
                        <div class="batteryDeficitNum">
                            <RoomTypeCharts v-if="JslxData" :roomTypeData="JslxData"></RoomTypeCharts>
                            <div class="shortagesNumber">
                                <span>公共教室</span>
                                <img src="@/assets/images/safeIcon/yylxBot.png">
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="lockTotal">
                            <div class="lockNum">
                                <span class="lock">{{ JslxData.total }}</span>
                            </div>
                            <span v-if="!active" class="bottonSpan">房间总数</span>
                            <span v-else class="bottonSpan">预约总数</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="normalNum">
                            <RoomTypeCharts v-if="speJslxData" :roomTypeData="speJslxData"></RoomTypeCharts>
                            <div class="normalNumber">
                                <span>特殊教室</span>
                                <img src="@/assets/images/equipment/shadowGreen.png">
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div v-else class="nodata">
                        <img src="~@assets/images/nodata.png" alt="">
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</template>
<script>
import Tab from './components/Tab' // 头部
import Reservation from './components/ReservationCharts'
import TimeCharts from './components/TimeCharts'
import DepartmentCharts from './components/DepartmentCharts'
import { sharedashboard, getYyqs, getSjqs, getBmyy, getJslx, getYylx } from '@/api/safeBoard/share.js'
import RoomTypeCharts from './components/RoomTypeCharts.vue'
import Vue from 'vue'
import fullscreen from 'vue-fullscreen'
import { active } from 'sortablejs'
import { get } from 'sortablejs'
Vue.use(fullscreen)
export default {
    components: {
        Tab,
        Reservation,
        TimeCharts,
        DepartmentCharts,
        RoomTypeCharts
    },
    data() {
        return {
            intervalYylx: null,
            intervalJslx: null,
            totalNum: '',
            todayNum: '',
            signNum: '',
            idleNum: '',
            seatNum: '',
            // 预约趋势
            YyqsData: null,
            tab: 'YEAR',
            yyqsYear: true,
            yyqsMounth: false,
            // 部门预约
            BmyyData: null,
            bmyy: 'YEAR',
            bmyyYear: true,
            bmyyMounth: false,
            // 时间趋势
            SjqsData: null,
            // 公共教室类型
            JslxData: null,
            // 特殊教室类型
            speJslxData: null,
            // 教室切换开关
            active: false,
            roomDateTab: 'YEAR',
            years: true,
            mounths: false
        }
    },
    methods: {
        bmyyTab(data) {
            this.bmyy = data
            this.getBmyyData()
        },
        yyqsTab(data) {
            this.tab = data
            this.getData()
        },
        getData() {
            // 头部数据
            this.totalNum = 200
            this.todayNum = 50
            this.signNum = 43
            this.seatNum = 100
            this.idleNum = 100 - 43
            // 预约趋势
            this.YyqsData = {
                legends: ['101', '102', '103'],
                xDatas: ['2024-1', '2024-2', '2024-3', '2024-4', '2024-5', '2024-6', '2024-7', '2024-8', '2024-9', '2024-10', '2024-11', '2024-12'],
                ydatas: [{ '101': [6, 1, 0, 15, 0, 91, 22, 0, 0, 13, 9, 111] }, { '102': [6, 11, 0, 15, 0, 1, 22, 0, 200, 13, 9, 11] }, { '103': [0, 1, 0, 115, 3, 91, 22, 0, 66, 13, 9, 41] }]
            }
            // 时间趋势
            this.SjqsData = {
                xDatas: ["06.00-08.00", "08.00-10.00", "10.00-12.00", "12.00-14.00", "14.00-16.00", "16.00-18.00"],
                ydata: [10, 43, 12, 123, 11, 90]
            }
        },
        // 部门预约
        getBmyyData() {
            this.BmyyData = {
                xDatas: ["吉林财经大学", "校团委", "教务处", "党委办公室、校长办公室", "信息管理中心"],
                ydata: [2312, 1212, 1021, 782, 253]
            }
        },
        // 教室类型
        getJslxData() {
            this.JslxData = {
                total: 120,
                num: 100,
                colors: [
                    'rgba(5, 57, 114, 0.5)',
                    'rgba(23, 118, 192, 0.6)',
                    'rgba(2, 174, 251, 0.69)',
                ],
                bgColor: 'rgba(14, 42, 97, 1)',
                textColor: 'rgba(52, 158, 255, 1)'
            },
                this.speJslxData = {
                    total: 120,
                    num: 20,
                    colors: [
                        'rgba(10, 47, 86, 0.5)',
                        'rgba(42, 167, 173, 0.6)',
                        'rgba(65, 255, 232, 0.69)'
                    ],
                    bgColor: 'rgba(14, 42, 97, 1)',
                    textColor: 'rgba(70, 253, 237, 1)'
                }
        },
        // 预约类型
        getYylxData(roomDateTab) {
            console.log(roomDateTab)
            if (roomDateTab == 'YEAR' || undefined) {
                this.JslxData = {
                    // total: res.data[2].value,
                    total: 23000,
                    num: 18000,
                    colors: [
                        'rgba(5, 57, 114, 0.5)',
                        'rgba(23, 118, 192, 0.6)',
                        'rgba(2, 174, 251, 0.69)',
                    ],
                    bgColor: 'rgba(14, 42, 97, 1)',
                    textColor: 'rgba(52, 158, 255, 1)'
                },
                    this.speJslxData = {
                        // total: res.data[2].value,
                        total: 23000,
                        num: 5000,
                        colors: [
                            'rgba(10, 47, 86, 0.5)',
                            'rgba(42, 167, 173, 0.6)',
                            'rgba(65, 255, 232, 0.69)'
                        ],
                        bgColor: 'rgba(14, 42, 97, 1)',
                        textColor: 'rgba(70, 253, 237, 1)'
                    }
            } else if(roomDateTab=='MONTH'){
                this.JslxData = {
                    // total: res.data[2].value,
                    total: 3000,
                    num: 2100,
                    colors: [
                        'rgba(5, 57, 114, 0.5)',
                        'rgba(23, 118, 192, 0.6)',
                        'rgba(2, 174, 251, 0.69)',
                    ],
                    bgColor: 'rgba(14, 42, 97, 1)',
                    textColor: 'rgba(52, 158, 255, 1)'
                },
                    this.speJslxData = {
                        // total: res.data[2].value,
                        total: 3000,
                        num: 900,
                        colors: [
                            'rgba(10, 47, 86, 0.5)',
                            'rgba(42, 167, 173, 0.6)',
                            'rgba(65, 255, 232, 0.69)'
                        ],
                        bgColor: 'rgba(14, 42, 97, 1)',
                        textColor: 'rgba(70, 253, 237, 1)'
                    }
            }
        },
        // 切换教室类型
        changeRoomtype() {
            this.getJslxData()
            this.active = false
            this.years = true
            this.mounths = false
        },
        // 切换预约类型
        changeYytype() {
            this.getYylxData('YEAR')
            this.active = true
            this.years = true
            this.mounths = false
        },
        year() {
            this.getYylxData('YEAR')
            this.years = true
            this.mounths = false
        },
        mounth() {
            this.getYylxData('MONTH')
            this.years = false
            this.mounths = true
        },
        // 预约趋势
        changeYyqsYear() {
            this.tab = 'YEAR'
            this.getData()
            this.yyqsYear = true,
                this.yyqsMounth = false
        },
        changeYyqsMounth() {
            this.tab = 'MONTH'
            this.getData()
            this.yyqsYear = false,
                this.yyqsMounth = true
        },
        // 部门
        changeBmyyYear() {
            this.bmyy = 'YEAR'
            this.getBmyyData()
            this.bmyyYear = true,
                this.bmyyMounth = false
        },
        changeBmyyMounth() {
            this.bmyy = 'MONTH'
            this.getBmyyData()
            this.bmyyYear = false,
                this.bmyyMounth = true
        },
        // 双击全屏
        toggleFullScreen() {
            this.$store.commit('SET_MENUFLAG')
            // 事件总线起始页面
            this.$fullscreen.toggle()
        }
    },
    mounted() {
        this.getData()
        this.getJslxData()
        this.getBmyyData()
    },
}
</script>

<template>
  <div ref="bar" class="bar-chart" :style="{height: '100%', width: '100%'}"  @mouseover="mouseover" @mouseout="mouseout" />
</template>
<script>
import * as echarts from 'echarts'
import resize from '../../charts/mixins/resize'
export default {
  name: "barCharts",
  mixins: [resize],
  props: {
    chartData: {
      type: Object,
      default: () => ({})
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      chart: null,
      interval:null,
      index:0,
    }
  },
  watch: {
    // 监听 chartData 的变化
    chartData: {
      deep: true,
      handler(newData) {
        if (newData && Object.keys(newData).length > 0) {
          this.setOptions()
        }
      }
    },
  },
  mounted() {
    this.initChart()
    this.index = 0
    this.interval = setInterval(() => {
      this.startAnimation();
    }, 3000);
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    if (this.chart !== null) {
      this.chart.dispose()
    }
    clearInterval(this.interval)
  },
  methods: {
    mouseover() {
      clearInterval(this.interval);
    },
    mouseout() {
      this.interval = setInterval(() => {
        this.startAnimation();
      }, 3000);
    },
    initChart() {
      this.chart = echarts.init(this.$refs.bar)
      this.setOptions()
    },
    setOptions() {
      const that = this
      let color = [
        {
          start:'rgba(52, 158, 255, 1)',
          end:'rgba(52, 158, 255, 0)'
        },
        {
          start:'rgba(97, 239, 166, 1)',
          end:'rgba(97, 239, 166, 0)'
        },
        {
          start:'rgba(255, 189, 48, 1)',
          end:'rgba(255, 189, 48, 0)'
        }
      ]
      let seriesData = []
      if(that.chartData.yDatas) {
        that.chartData.yDatas.map((item,index) => {
          seriesData.push(
            {
              name:item.name,
              type: 'bar',
              itemStyle: {
                color: new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
                  { offset: 0, color: color[index].start },
                  { offset: 1, color: color[index].end }
                ]),
                borderRadius: [25, 25, 0, 0]
              },
              barWidth: 10,
              data: item.data,
            },
          )
        })
      }
      this.chart.setOption({
        grid:{  // 布满div
          top:"40px",
          left:"50px",
          right:"25px",
          bottom:"40px"
        },
        tooltip: {
          trigger: 'axis',
          backgroundColor:'rgba(0,0,0,0.7)',
          borderWidth: 0,
          textStyle:{
            color:'#fff'
          },
          axisPointer: {
            // Use axis to trigger tooltip
            type: 'shadow' // 'shadow' as default; can also be 'line' or 'shadow'
          },
          confine:true,
          formatter: function(params) {
            var res = '<div><p>' + '巡检点名称：' + params[0].name + '</p>'
            for (let i=0;i<params.length;i++){
              res += '<p style="text-align: left">' + params[i].seriesName + '：' +  params[i].value + '个' + '</p></div>'
            }
            return res;
          },
        },
        legend: {
          data: that.chartData.legends,
          textStyle: {
            color: "rgba(255, 255, 255, 1)"
          },
          top:8,
          right: 25,
          itemWidth: 16,
          itemHeight: 5
        },
        xAxis: {
          type: 'category',
          axisLine:{
            lineStyle:{
              color:'#fff'
            }
          },
          axisTick: {
            show: false
          },
          data: that.chartData.xDatas
        },
        yAxis: {
          name: "单位：个",
          axisLine:{
            lineStyle:{
              color:'#fff'
            }
          },
          splitLine: {
            show: true,
            lineStyle: {
              color:'#9f9f9f',
              type: 'dashed',
              width: 0.8
            }
          }
        },
        series:seriesData
        // series: [
        //   {
        //     name:'巡检异常',
        //     type: 'bar',
        //     itemStyle: {
        //       color: new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
        //         { offset: 0, color: 'rgba(52, 158, 255, 1)' },
        //         { offset: 1, color: 'rgba(52, 158, 255, 0)' }
        //       ]),
        //       borderRadius: [25, 25, 0, 0]
        //     },
        //     barWidth: 10,
        //     data: that.chartData.yDatas
        //   },
        //   {
        //     name:'巡检点异常',
        //     type: 'bar',
        //     itemStyle: {
        //       color: new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
        //         { offset: 0, color: 'rgba(97, 239, 166, 1)' },
        //         { offset: 1, color: 'rgba(97, 239, 166, 0)' }
        //       ]),
        //       borderRadius: [25, 25, 0, 0]
        //     },
        //     barWidth: 10,
        //     data: that.chartData.yDatas
        //   },
        //   {
        //     name:'未巡检',
        //     type: 'bar',
        //     itemStyle: {
        //       color: new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [
        //         { offset: 0, color: 'rgba(255, 189, 48, 1)' },
        //         { offset: 1, color: 'rgba(255, 189, 48, 0)' }
        //       ]),
        //       borderRadius: [25, 25, 0, 0]
        //     },
        //     barWidth: 10,
        //     data: that.chartData.yDatas
        //   }
        // ]
      })
    },
    startAnimation() {
      this.chart.dispatchAction({
        type: 'showTip',
        seriesIndex: 1,
        dataIndex: this.index,
      });
      let length = this.chartData.xDatas ? this.chartData.xDatas.length : 0
      if (this.index>(length-2)){
        this.index = 0
      }else {
        this.index++
      }
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div ref="bar" class="bar-chart" :style="{height: '100%', width: '100%'}" @mouseover="mouseover" @mouseout="mouseout" />
</template>
<script>
import * as echarts from 'echarts'
import resize from '../../charts/mixins/resize'
export default {
  name: "pieCharts",
  mixins: [resize],
  props: {
    chartData: {
      type: Array,
      default: () => ({})
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      chart: null,
      interval:null,
      index:0,
      seriesData:[],
    }
  },
  watch: {
    // 监听 chartData 的变化
    chartData: {
      deep: true,
      handler(newData) {
        if (newData && Object.keys(newData).length > 0) {
          this.setOptions()
        }
      }
    },
  },
  mounted() {
    this.initChart()
    this.index = 0
    this.interval = setInterval(() => {
      this.startAnimation();
    }, 3000);
    // 监听屏幕大小变化
    window.addEventListener('resize', this.screenAdatper)
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    if (this.chart !== null) {
      this.chart.dispose()
    }
    clearInterval(this.interval)
    // 组件销毁前移除监听,防止内存泄露
    window.removeEventListener('resize')
  },
  methods: {
    screenAdatper(){
      this.chart = echarts.init(this.$refs.bar)
      this.setOptions()
    },
    mouseover() {
      clearInterval(this.interval);
      //固定长度10，因为chartData数组长度固定
      let arr1 =Array.from({length: 10}, (_,index) => index)
      this.chart.dispatchAction({
        type: 'downplay',
        seriesIndex: 0,
        dataIndex: arr1,
      });
    },
    mouseout() {
      this.interval = setInterval(() => {
        this.startAnimation();
      }, 3000);
    },
    initChart() {
      this.chart = echarts.init(this.$refs.bar)
      this.setOptions()
    },
    setOptions() {
      const that = this
      let color = ['#349eff','#61efa6','#ffbd30', '#ff5455', '#6e38db', '#ff7200', '#23ffff', ]
      this.seriesData = []
      let seriesData = []
      let totalValue = 0
      this.chartData.map((v,i) => {
        seriesData.push(
          { value: v.value,
            name: v.name,
            itemStyle: { color: color[i%12] }
          }
        )
        if (v.value!=0){
          this.seriesData.push(
            { value: v.value,
              name: v.name,
              itemStyle: { color: color[i%12] }
            }
          )
          totalValue += v.value;
        }
      })
      this.chart.setOption({
        grid:{  // 布满div
          top:"0px",
          left:"50px",
          right:"25px",
          bottom:"40px"
        },
        tooltip: {
          trigger: 'none',
          confine:true,
        },
        legend: {
          type:'scroll',
          pageIconColor:'#fff',
          pageIconInactiveColor:'#6b6b6b',
          pageTextStyle:{
            color:'#fff'
          },
          pageIconSize:[10,10],
          orient: 'vertical',
          width:'35%',
          padding: [20, 20, 0,0],
          right: '0',
          icon:'rect',
          itemWidth: 16,
          itemHeight: 5,
          textStyle: {
            rich: {
              one: {
                width: 60,
                height: 30,
                color: '#fff',
                fontSize: 14,
                fontWeight: 500,
              },
              two: {
                width: 60,
                height: 30,
                color: '#fff',
                fontSize: 14,
                fontWeight: 500,
              }, three: {
                width: 60,
                height: 30,
                color: '#fff',
                fontSize: 14,
                fontWeight: 500,
              },
            },
          },
          formatter: (name) => {
            var total = 0;
            var target;
            var rate;
            for (var i = 0; i < seriesData.length; i++) {
              total += seriesData[i].value;
              if (seriesData[i].name == name) {
                target = seriesData[i].value;
              }
              rate = target==0?0:(( target / total)*100).toFixed(1)
            }
            return `{one|${name}} {two|${target}} {three|(${rate}%)}`;
          }
        },
        // title: {
        //   text: `{a|${totalValue}}`,
        //   top:'45%',
        //   left:'29.6%',
        //   textStyle: {
        //     rich:{
        //       a:{
        //         width:0,
        //         height:0,
        //         align:'center',
        //         fontWeight: 'bold',
        //         lineHeight:0,
        //         fontSize: 18,
        //         color: 'rgba(123, 184, 246, 1)'
        //       }
        //     }
        //   },
        //   subtext: '{b|报警数量(个)}',
        //   subtextStyle: {
        //     rich:{
        //       b:{
        //         width:0,
        //         align:'center',
        //         fontSize: 12,
        //         lineHeight:0,
        //         fontWeight: '400',
        //         color: '#fff',
        //       }
        //     }
        //   }
        // },
        series: [
          {
            type: 'pie',
            zlevel:1,
            center: ['38%', '50%'],
            radius: ['40%', '61%'],
            padAngle: 0,
            itemStyle: {
              borderRadius: 3
            },
            avoidLabelOverlap: true,
            label: {
              show: false,
              fontSize: 14,
              padding: [0, 0],
              position: 'outside',
              formatter: '{b}：{c}个'
            },
            emphasis: {
              label: {
                show: true,
                fontSize: 14,
                fontWeight: 'bold',
                color:'inherit'
              }
            },
            labelLine: {
              show: true,
              length:30,
              length2: 0
            },
            labelLayout:{
              verticalAlign:'middle',
            },
            data: this.seriesData
          },
          {
            type: 'pie',
            zlevel:0,
            center: ['38%', '50%'],
            radius: ['40%', '65%'],
            left:0,
            padAngle: 0,
            itemStyle: {
              borderRadius: 3
            },
            avoidLabelOverlap: true,
            label: {
              normal: {
                show: true,
                position: 'center', // 展示在中间位置
                formatter: () => {
                  return `{a|${totalValue}}\n{b|预警数量(个)}`
                },
                rich: {
                  a: {
                    fontFamily: 'Microsoft YaHei',
                    fontWeight: 'bold',
                    fontSize: this.transformFontSize(24),
                    color: '#ffffff'
                  },
                  b: {
                    fontFamily: 'Microsoft YaHei',
                    fontWeight: 400,
                    fontSize: this.transformFontSize(12),
                    color: '#ffffff',
                  }
                }
              }
            },
            labelLine: {
              show: true,
              length: 30,
              length2: 50
            },
            labelLayout: {
              verticalAlign: 'middle',
            },
            data: this.seriesData
          }
        ]
      })
    },
    // 根据不同的屏幕宽度换算字体大小
    transformFontSize(fontsize) {
      // 获取屏幕宽度
      const width = window.innerWidth
      const ratio = width / 1920
      if (width<1024){
        return parseInt(fontsize)
      }else{
        // 取下整
        return parseInt(fontsize * ratio)
      }
    },
    startAnimation() {
      this.chart.dispatchAction({
        type: 'downplay',
        seriesIndex: 0,
        dataIndex: this.index==0?this.seriesData.length-1:this.index-1,
      });
      this.chart.dispatchAction({
        type: 'highlight',
        seriesIndex: 0,
        dataIndex: this.index,
      });
      if (this.index>(this.seriesData.length-2)){
        this.index = 0
      }else {
        this.index++
      }
    }
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="tableBox">
    <div class="tableHead">
      <span v-for="headItem in tableData.tableHead">{{headItem}}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="tableBody" ref="scrollContainer"  @mouseover="mouseover" @mouseout="mouseout">
      <div class="tableLine" ref="scrollLine"
        v-for="(item,index) in tableData.tableList" :key="index">
        <span v-for="key in tableData.keys">{{key=='params.typeName'?item.params.typeName:(key=='createBy'?(item[key]?item[key]:'班牌上报'):item[key])}}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
export default {
  name: "scrollTable",
  props: {
    tableData: {
      type: Object,
      default: () => ({})
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      scrollTop: 0,
      scrollInterval:null,
    };
  },
  mounted() {
    this.startScroll();
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    clearInterval(this.scrollInterval)
  },
  methods: {
    mouseover() {
      clearInterval(this.scrollInterval);
    },
    mouseout() {
      this.startScroll();
    },
    startScroll() {
      let that = this
      this.scrollInterval = setInterval(() => {
        const container = that.$refs.scrollContainer;
        const scrollLine = that.$refs.scrollLine;
        container.scrollTop += scrollLine[0].clientHeight
        if (container.scrollTop >= container.scrollHeight - container.clientHeight ) {
          clearInterval(that.scrollInterval);
          setTimeout(()=>{
            container.scrollTop = 0
            that.startScroll();
          },3000)
        }
      }, 3000);
    },
    resetScroll() {
      clearInterval(this.scrollInterval);
      const container = this.$refs.scrollContainer;
      container.scrollTop = 0
      this.startScroll();
    }
  }
}
</script>

<template>
    <div class="head">
        <div class="time">{{ currentDateTime }}</div>
        <div class="head-bottom"></div>
        <div class="list">
            <div class="item" v-for="data in list">
                <div class="item-bottom">
                    <div class="num">{{ data.num }}</div>
                    <div class="text"><span class="text-one">{{ data.name }}</span><span class="text-two">{{ data.unit }}</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</template>
<script>
import moment from 'moment';
export default {
    props: {
      list:{
        type: Array,
        default: []
      }
    },
    data() {
        return {
            currentDateTime: '',
        }
    },
    methods: {
        updateDateTime() {
            this.currentDateTime = moment().format('YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss');
        }
    },
    mounted() {
        this.updateDateTime();
        setInterval(() => {
            this.updateDateTime();
        }, 1000);
    },
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>

        position: relative;
        bottom: -80%;
        .text-one,
        .text-two {
          font-family: Microsoft YaHei;
          // font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
          font-weight: 500;
          font-size: 0.8017vw;
          color: #fff;
        }
        .text-two {
          font-size: .6033vw;
        }
      }
    }
  }
  .head-bottom {
    width: 95%;
    // height: 4.2458vw;
    height: 3.2458vw;
    background-image: url('~@assets/images/safeIcon/bottom.png');
    background-size: 100% 100%;
    position: absolute;
    top: 13.025vw;
    right: 2.6042vw;
  }
}
</style>
<template>
  <div ref="bar" class="bar-chart" :style="{ height: '100%', width: '100%' }" @mouseover="mouseover"
    @mouseout="mouseout" />
</template>
<script>
import * as echarts from 'echarts'
import resize from '../../charts/mixins/resize'
export default {
  name: "waringLineCharts",
  mixins: [resize],
  props: {
    chartData: {
      type: Object,
      default: () => ({})
    },
    activetab: {
      type: Number,
      default: 1
    }
  },
  data() {
    return {
      chart: null,
      dataZoom: {
        startValue: 0,
        endValue: 6,
      },
      setInterval: null
    }
  },
  watch: {
    // 监听 chartData 的变化
    chartData: {
      deep: true,
      handler(newData) {
        if (newData && Object.keys(newData).length > 0) {
          this.setOptions()
        }
      }
    },
    activetab: {
      deep: true,
      handler(newData) {
        if (newData) {
          this.setOptions()
        }
      }
    },
  },
  mounted() {
    this.initChart()
    this.index = 0
    this.setInterval = setInterval(() => {
      this.startAnimation();
    }, 3000);
  },
  beforeDestroy() {
    clearInterval(this.setInterval);
    if (this.chart !== null) {
      this.chart.dispose()
    }
  },
  methods: {
    mouseover() {
      clearInterval(this.setInterval);
    },
    mouseout() {
      this.setInterval = setInterval(() => {
        this.startAnimation();
      }, 3000);
    },
    clear() {
      clearInterval(this.setInterval);
    },
    setOn() {
      this.index = 0
      this.setInterval = setInterval(() => {
        this.startAnimation();
      }, 3000);
    },
    initChart() {
      this.chart = echarts.init(this.$refs.bar)
      this.setOptions()
    },
    setOptions() {
      const that = this
      let color = ['#006CFF', '#FFC000', '#D0FCFF', '#FF7200', '#F5EF49', '#F54949', '#88F78B', '#97FFD7', '#00A1FF', '#CF4DFF', '#0CFEFF', '#6E38DB']
      let seriesData = []
      that.chartData.ydatas.map((item, index) => {
        const key = Object.keys(item)[0];
        seriesData.push({
          name: key,
          type: 'line',
          symbol: 'circle',
          symbolSize: 4,
          itemStyle: {
            color: color[index % 12]
          },
          lineStyle: {
            color: color[index % 12]
          },
          data: item[key]
        });
      })
      this.chart.setOption({
        grid: {  // 布满div
          top: "55px",
          left: "50px",
          right: "25px",
          bottom: that.chartData.xDatas.length > 7 ? "90px" : '60px'
        },
        tooltip: {
          trigger: 'axis',
          axisPointer: {
            type: 'shadow'
          },
          backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)',
          borderWidth: 0,
          textStyle: {
            color: '#fff'
          },
          confine: true,
          position: 'bottom',
          formatter: function (params) {
            var res = '<div><p>' + params[0].axisValue + '</p>'
            for (var i = 0; i < params.length; i++) {
              if (i % 2 === 0) {
                res += '<div style="min-width:180px;"><span style="display: inline-block;width:50%;text-align: left">' + params[i].seriesName + '：' + params[i].value + '</span>'
              } else {
                res += '<span style="text-align: left">' + params[i].seriesName + '：' + params[i].value + '</span></div>'
              }
            }
            res += '</div>'
            return res;
          },
        },
        legend: {
          type: 'scroll',
          pageIconColor: '#fff',
          pageIconInactiveColor: '#6b6b6b',
          pageTextStyle: {
            color: '#fff'
          },
          textStyle: {
            color: "rgba(255, 255, 255, 1)"
          },
          itemWidth: 18,
          itemHeight: 7,
          width: '35%',
          top: 18,
          right: 20,
          itemGap: 10,
          data: that.chartData.legends,
        },
        xAxis: {
          type: "category",
          data: that.chartData.xDatas,
          axisLine: {
            lineStyle: {
              color: '#fff'
            }
          },
          axisTick: {
            show: false
          },
        },
        yAxis: {
          name: "单位：个",
          type: 'value',
          axisLine: {
            lineStyle: {
              color: '#fff'
            }
          },
          splitLine: {
            show: true,
            lineStyle: {
              color: '#9f9f9f',
              type: 'dashed',
              width: 0.8
            }
          }
        },
        dataZoom: [
          {
            borderRadius: 0,
            height: 15,
            show: that.chartData.xDatas.length > 7,
            type: 'slider',
            startValue: that.dataZoom.startValue,
            endValue: that.dataZoom.endValue,
            minValueSpan: 6,
            maxValueSpan: 6,
            bottom: 50,
            textStyle: {
              color: 'rgba(54, 162, 235, 0)'
            },
          },
        ],
        series: seriesData
      })
    },
    startAnimation() {
      this.chart.dispatchAction({
        type: 'dataZoom',
        startValue: this.index,
        endValue: this.index + 5,
      });
      if ((this.index + 5) > (this.chartData.xDatas.length - 2)) {
        this.index = 0
      } else {
        this.index++
      }
    },
  }
}
</script>
<template>
  <div class="content">
    <div class="contentBox">
      <div class="contentTitle" @dblclick="dboubleClick">
		      <span>安全看板</span>
      </div>
      <div class="infoBox">
          <Tab :list="tabDataList"></Tab>
      </div>
      <div class="scrollBox">
        <div class="bottomBox">
          <div class="waring">
            <div class="tabList">
              <span :class="['tabbox', { active: activetab === item.value }]"
                    v-for="(item,index) in tabList"
                    @click="changeTab(item)"
                    :key="index">{{item.name}}</span>
            </div>
            <waring-line-charts ref="waringCharts"  v-if="waringchartData" :chart-data="waringchartData"/>
            <div v-else class="null-div">
              <img  class="null-img" src="@assets/images/nodata.png">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="inspection">
            <bar-charts v-if="barchartData" :chart-data="barchartData" />
            <div v-else class="null-div">
              <img  class="null-img" src="@assets/images/nodata.png">
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="bottomBox">
          <div class="EquipmentDistribution">
            <pie-charts v-if="piechartData" :chart-data="piechartData"/>
            <div v-else class="null-div">
              <img  class="null-img" src="@assets/images/nodata.png">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="batteryDeficit">
            <div class="tabList problemTab">
              <span :class="['tabbox', { active: activeProtab === item.value }]"
                    v-for="(item,index) in ProtabList"
                    @click="changeProTab(item)"
                    :key="index">{{item.name}}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="problemTable">
              <scrollTable ref="scrollTable" v-if="tableData.tableList.length>0" :tableData="tableData"/>
              <div v-else class="null-div">
                <img  class="null-img" src="@assets/images/nodata.png">
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import Tab from './components/Tab.vue' // 头部
import pieCharts from './components/pieCharts'
import barCharts from './components/barCharts'
import scrollTable from './components/scrollTable'
import waringLineCharts from './components/waringLineCharts'
import {
  warnCount,
  abnormalCount,
  abnormalTop,
  getAlarmClassification,
  getAlarmTrackingTrendByMonth,
  getAlarmTrackingTrendByYear,
  getSchoolReport
} from '@/api/safeBoard/safeBoard.js'
import Vue from 'vue'
import fullscreen from 'vue-fullscreen'
Vue.use(fullscreen)
export default {
  name: "index",
  components:{Tab,barCharts,waringLineCharts,pieCharts,scrollTable},
  data(){
    return{
      activetab:1,
      activeProtab:'ALL',
      tabList:[
        {
          name:'本年',
          value:1
        },
        {
          name:'本月',
          value:2
        },
      ],
      ProtabList:[
        {
          name:'全部',
          value:'ALL'
        },
        {
          name:'日',
          value:'DAY'
        },
        {
          name:'月',
          value:'MONTH'
        },
        {
          name:'年',
          value:'YEAR'
        },
      ],
      tabDataList:[
        {
          num:null,
          name:'总报警数量',
          unit:'/个'
        },
        {
          num:null,
          name:'今日报警数量',
          unit:'/个'
        },
        {
          num:null,
          name:'待处理报警数量',
          unit:'/个'
        },
        {
          num:null,
          name:'巡检异常',
          unit:'/个'
        },
        {
          num:null,
          name:'巡检点异常',
          unit:'/个'
        },
        {
          num:null,
          name:'未巡检数',
          unit:'/个'
        }
      ],
      statistics:{
      },
      waringchartData:null,
      barchartData:null,
      piechartData:null,
      problemList:[
        {
          time:'2024-10-24'
        }
      ],
      tableData:{
        tableHead:[],
        keys:[],
        tableList:[]
      },
      legends:[
        '门锁','水浸','烟感','窗磁','电源','温度','湿度','PM2.5','PM10','光照'
      ]
    }
  },
  mounted() {
    this.getList()
  },
  methods:{
    // 双击全屏
    dboubleClick() {
      this.$store.commit('SET_MENUFLAG')
      // 事件总线起始页面
      this.$fullscreen.toggle()
    },
    getList(){
      //获取上方统计数量
      warnCount().then(res => {
        this.tabDataList[0].num = res.data.totalWarning
        this.tabDataList[1].num = res.data.todayWarning
        this.tabDataList[2].num = res.data.nowWarning
      })
      abnormalCount('ALL').then(res => {
        this.tabDataList[3].num = res.data.xjyc
        this.tabDataList[4].num = res.data.xjdyc
        this.tabDataList[5].num = res.data.wxjs
      })
      //获取告警趋势
      this.getAlarmTrackingTrendByYear()
      //获取巡检异常统计
      this.abnormalTop()
      //获取实时告警分类
      this.getAlarmClassification()
      this.getTableData()
    },
    getAlarmTrackingTrendByYear(){
      getAlarmTrackingTrendByYear().then(res=>{
        let dataDemo0 = {
          "msg": "string",
          "code": 0,
          "data": {
            "xDatas": [],
            "legends": this.legends,
            "ydatas": [
              {'门锁':[]},
              {'水浸':[]},
              {'烟感':[]},
              {'窗磁':[]},
              {'电源':[]},
              {'温度':[]},
              {'湿度':[]},
              {'PM2.5':[]},
              {'PM10':[]},
              {'光照':[]},
            ]
          }
        }
        res.data.map((item,index)=>{
          dataDemo0.data.xDatas.push(item.month)
          dataDemo0.data.ydatas[0].门锁.push(item.lock_num)
          dataDemo0.data.ydatas[1].水浸.push(item.sj_num)
          dataDemo0.data.ydatas[2].烟感.push(item.yg_num)
          dataDemo0.data.ydatas[3].窗磁.push(item.cc_num)
          dataDemo0.data.ydatas[4].电源.push(item.power_num)
          dataDemo0.data.ydatas[5].温度.push(item.wd_num)
          dataDemo0.data.ydatas[6].湿度.push(item.sd_num)
          dataDemo0.data.ydatas[7]['PM2.5'].push(item.pm25_num)
          dataDemo0.data.ydatas[8].PM10.push(item.pm10_num)
          dataDemo0.data.ydatas[9].光照.push(item.gz_num)
        })
        // this.waringchartData = res.data
        this.waringchartData = dataDemo0.data
      })
    },
    getAlarmTrackingTrendByMonth(){
      getAlarmTrackingTrendByMonth().then(res=>{
        let dataDemo0 = {
          "msg": "string",
          "code": 0,
          "data": {
            "xDatas": [],
            "legends": this.legends,
            "ydatas": [
              {'门锁':[]},
              {'水浸':[]},
              {'烟感':[]},
              {'窗磁':[]},
              {'电源':[]},
              {'温度':[]},
              {'湿度':[]},
              {'PM2.5':[]},
              {'PM10':[]},
              {'光照':[]},
            ]
          }
        }
        res.data.map((item,index)=>{
          dataDemo0.data.xDatas.push(item.date)
          dataDemo0.data.ydatas[0].门锁.push(item.lock_num)
          dataDemo0.data.ydatas[1].水浸.push(item.sj_num)
          dataDemo0.data.ydatas[2].烟感.push(item.yg_num)
          dataDemo0.data.ydatas[3].窗磁.push(item.cc_num)
          dataDemo0.data.ydatas[4].电源.push(item.power_num)
          dataDemo0.data.ydatas[5].温度.push(item.wd_num)
          dataDemo0.data.ydatas[6].湿度.push(item.sd_num)
          dataDemo0.data.ydatas[7]['PM2.5'].push(item.pm25_num)
          dataDemo0.data.ydatas[8].PM10.push(item.pm10_num)
          dataDemo0.data.ydatas[9].光照.push(item.gz_num)
        })
        this.waringchartData = dataDemo0.data
      })
    },
    abnormalTop(){
      abnormalTop().then(res=>{
        this.barchartData = res.data
      })
    },
    getAlarmClassification(){
      getAlarmClassification().then(res=>{
        this.piechartData = [
          {value:res.data.lock_num,name:'门锁'},
          {value:res.data.sj_num,name:'水浸'},
          {value:res.data.yg_num,name:'烟感'},
          {value:res.data.cc_num,name:'窗磁'},
          {value:res.data.power_num,name:'电源'},
          {value:res.data.wd_num,name:'温度'},
          {value:res.data.sd_num,name:'湿度'},
          {value:res.data.pm25_num,name:'PM2.5'},
          {value:res.data.pm10_num,name:'PM10'},
          {value:res.data.gz_num,name:'光照'},
        ]
        // this.piechartData = [
        //   {value:1,name:'门锁'},
        //   {value:2,name:'水浸'},
        //   {value:res.data.yg_num,name:'烟感'},
        //   {value:res.data.cc_num,name:'窗磁'},
        //   {value:res.data.power_num,name:'电源'},
        //   {value:res.data.wd_num,name:'温度'},
        //   {value:res.data.sd_num,name:'湿度'},
        //   {value:res.data.pm25_num,name:'PM2.5'},
        //   {value:res.data.pm10_num,name:'PM10'},
        //   {value:res.data.gz_num,name:'光照'},
        // ]
      })
    },
    getTableData(){
      getSchoolReport({'queryType':this.activeProtab}).then(res=>{
        this.tableData = {
          tableHead:[
            '序号','上报时间','上报地点','上报类型','上报人员','联系电话'
          ],
          keys:[
            'seq','createTime','position','params.typeName','createBy','phone'
          ],
          tableList:res.rows
        }
        for (let i=0;i<this.tableData.tableList.length;i++){
          this.tableData.tableList[i].seq = i+1
        }
        this.$refs.scrollTable.resetScroll()
      })
      // this.tableData.tableList=[
      //   {seq:1,time:'2024-10-23',address:'2301',type:'消防',user:'张三',phone:'15844678367'},
      //   {seq:2,time:'2024-10-21',address:'1501',type:'烟感',user:'里斯',phone:'16744467865'},
      //   {seq:3,time:'2024-10-23',address:'2301',type:'消防',user:'张三',phone:'15844678367'},
      //   {seq:4,time:'2024-10-21',address:'1501',type:'烟感',user:'里斯',phone:'16744467865'},
      //   {seq:5,time:'2024-10-23',address:'2301',type:'消防',user:'张三',phone:'15844678367'},
      //   {seq:6,time:'2024-10-23',address:'2301',type:'消防',user:'张三',phone:'15844678367'},
      //   {seq:7,time:'2024-10-21',address:'1501',type:'烟感',user:'里斯',phone:'16744467865'},
      //   {seq:8,time:'2024-10-23',address:'2301',type:'消防',user:'张三',phone:'15844678367'},
      //   {seq:9,time:'2024-10-21',address:'1501',type:'烟感',user:'里斯',phone:'16744467865'},
      //   {seq:10,time:'2024-10-23',address:'2301',type:'消防',user:'张三',phone:'15844678367'},
      //   {seq:11,time:'2024-10-21',address:'1501',type:'烟感',user:'里斯',phone:'16744467865'},
      //   {seq:12,time:'2024-10-23',address:'2301',type:'消防',user:'张三',phone:'15844678367'},
      //   {seq:13,time:'2024-10-23',address:'2301',type:'消防',user:'张三',phone:'15844678367'}
      // ]
    },
    changeTab(item){
      this.activetab = item.value
      let lineCharts = this.$refs.waringCharts
      lineCharts.clear()
      if(item.value==1){
        this.getAlarmTrackingTrendByYear()
      }else{
        this.getAlarmTrackingTrendByMonth()
      }
      lineCharts.setOn()
    },
    changeProTab(item){
      this.activeProtab = item.value
      this.getTableData()
    }
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <div class="content">
    <div class="contentBox">
      <div class="contentTitle" @dblclick="dboubleClick">
        <img src="@/assets/images/safeSignage/safe.png" alt="">
      </div>
      <div class="infoBox">
          <Tab :list="tabDataList"></Tab>
      </div>
      <div class="scrollBox">
        <div class="bottomBox">
          <div class="waring">
            <div class="tabList">
              <span :class="['tabbox', { active: activetab === item.value }]"
                    v-for="(item,index) in tabList"
                    @click="changeTab(item)"
                    :key="index">{{item.name}}</span>
            </div>
            <waring-line-charts ref="waringCharts"  v-if="waringchartData" :chart-data="waringchartData"/>
            <div v-else class="null-div">
              <img  class="null-img" src="@assets/images/nodata.png">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="inspection">
            <bar-charts v-if="barchartData" :chart-data="barchartData" />
            <div v-else class="null-div">
              <img  class="null-img" src="@assets/images/nodata.png">
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="bottomBox">
          <div class="EquipmentDistribution">
            <pie-charts v-if="piechartData" :chart-data="piechartData"/>
          </div>
          <div class="batteryDeficit">
            <div class="tabList problemTab">
              <span :class="['tabbox', { active: activeProtab === item.value }]"
                    v-for="(item,index) in ProtabList"
                    @click="changeProTab(item)"
                    :key="index">{{item.name}}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="problemTable">
              <scrollTable ref="scrollTable" v-if="tableData.tableList.length>0" :tableData="tableData"/>
              <div v-else class="null-div">
                <img  class="null-img" src="@assets/images/nodata.png">
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

      this.getTableData()
    },

    abnormalTop(){
        this.barchartData = {
          legends: ["巡检异常", "巡检点异常", "未巡检"],
          xDatas:["3101", "3102", "3103"],
          yDatas: [
            {stack: "Total", data: [1, 0, 1], type: "bar", name: "巡检异常"},
            {stack: "Total", data: [0, 0, 0], type: "bar", name: "巡检点异常"},
            {stack: "Total", data: [1, 2, 1], type: "bar", name: "未巡检"}
          ]
        }
    },
    getAlarmClassification(){
        this.piechartData = [
          {value:1,name:'门锁'},
          {value:1,name:'水浸'},
          {value:2,name:'烟感'},
          {value:5,name:'窗磁'},

    },
    getTableData(){
        this.tableData = {
          tableHead:[
            '序号','上报时间','上报地点','上报类型','上报人员','联系电话'
          ],
          keys:[
            'seq','time','address','type','user','phone'
          ],
          tableList:[]
        }
      this.tableData.tableList=[

      this.$refs.scrollTable.resetScroll()
    },
    changeTab(item){
      this.activetab = item.value
      let lineCharts = this.$refs.waringCharts
      lineCharts.clear()
      if(item.value==1){
        this.getAlarmTrackingTrendByYear()
      }else{
        this.getAlarmTrackingTrendByMonth()
      }
      lineCharts.setOn()
    },
    changeProTab(item){
      this.activeProtab = item.value
      this.getTableData()
    }
  }
}
