<script>
import { listStuInfo, getStuInfo, delStuInfo, addStuInfo, updateStuInfo } from "@/api/schoolStuInfo/schoolStuInfo";
import Treeselect from "@riophae/vue-treeselect";
import "@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css";
import {deptTreeSelect} from "@/api/system/user";
import {getToken} from "@/utils/auth";
import ImageUpload from '@/components/ImageUpload'
import { validateIdCard } from "@/utils/validate";
import { uploadImage } from "@/api/schoolTeaInfo/teaInfo";
export default {
  name: "Info",
  components: { Treeselect , ImageUpload},
  data() {
    return {
      uploadUrl: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API + "/jufe/teaInfo/uploadPic",
      // 用户导入参数
      upload: {
        // 是否显示弹出层（用户导入）
        open: false,
        // 弹出层标题（用户导入）
        title: "导入",
        // 是否禁用上传
        isUploading: false,
        // 是否更新已经存在的用户数据
        updateSupport: 0,
        // 上传的文件列表
        fileList: [],
        // 设置上传的请求头部
        headers: {
          Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken()
        },
        // 上传的地址
        url: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API + "/jufe/stu/importSchoolStuInfo"
      },
      headers: {
        Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken(),
      },
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      // 非单个禁用
      single: true,
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 部门树选项
      stuDeptOptions: [],
      // 学生状态字典
      stuTypeOptions: [],
      //数据来源字典
      dataSourcesOptions: [],
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      disabled: false,
      // 需要用户信息表格数据
      infoList: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      openwatch: false,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        stuNum: null,
        stuName: null,
        idCard: null,
        sex: null,
        phoneNum: null,
        stuDeptId: null,
        stuDeptName: null,
        collegeCode: null,
        collegeName: null,
        picUrl: null,
        createById: null,
        intoYear: null,
        updateById: null,
        deptId: null,
        dataSources: null,
        classCode: null,
        className: null,
        stuType: null,
        address: null,
        remark: null,
        password: null,
        inSchoolStatus: null,
        ids:null
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {},
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
        stuNum : [{ required: true, message: "学号不能为空", trigger: "blur" },
          { min: 6, max: 30, message: '学号最低长度为6', trigger: 'blur' }],
        password: [
          { required: true, message: "登录密码不能为空", trigger: "blur" },
          { min: 5, max: 20, message: '登录密码长度必须介于 5 和 20 之间', trigger: 'blur' }
        ],
        stuName : [{ required: true, message: "姓名不能为空", trigger: "blur" }],
        stuType : [{ required: true, message: "学生类型不能为空", trigger: "blur" }],
        stuDeptId: [{ required: true, message: "所在院系/部门不能为空", trigger: "blur" }],
        phoneNum: [
          {
            pattern: /^1[3|4|5|6|7|8|9][0-9]\d{8}$/,
            message: "请输入正确的手机号码",
            trigger: "blur"
          }
        ],
        idCard: [
          {
            validator: validateIdCard,
            trigger: "blur"
          }
        ]
      },
      // 显隐列
      columns: [
        { key: 0, label: `学号`, visible: true },
        { key: 1, label: `姓名`, visible: true },
        { key: 2, label: `性别`, visible: true },
        { key: 3, label: `联系电话`, visible: true },
        { key: 4, label: `部门/所在院系`, visible: true },
        { key: 5, label: `学生类型`, visible: true },
        { key: 6, label: `身份证号`, visible: false },
        { key: 7, label: `学院编号`, visible: false },
        { key: 8, label: `学院名称`, visible: false },
        { key: 9, label: `人员图片`, visible: false },
        { key: 10, label: `创建人id`, visible: false },
        { key: 11, label: `入学年份`, visible: false },
        { key: 12, label: `更新人id`, visible: false },
        { key: 13, label: `部门id`, visible: false },
        { key: 14, label: `班级编号`, visible: false },
        { key: 15, label: `班级名称`, visible: false },
        { key: 16, label: `密码`, visible: false }
      ],
    };
  },
  watch: {
    // 根据名称筛选部门树
    deptName(val) {
      this.$refs.tree.filter(val);
    }
  },
  computed: {
    picUrlWithCacheBust() {
      if (!this.form.picUrl) return '';
      return `${this.form.picUrl}?t=${Date.now()}`;
    },
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
    this.getDeptTree();
    this.getDicts("stu_type").then(response => {
      this.stuTypeOptions = response.data;
    });
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询需要用户信息列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listStuInfo(this.queryParams).then(response => {
        this.infoList = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    // 学生类型字典翻译
    stuTypeFormat(row, column) {
      return this.selectDictLabel(this.stuTypeOptions, row.stuType);
    },
    // 数据来源字典翻译
    dataSourcesFormat(row, column) {
      return this.selectDictLabel(this.dataSourcesOptions, row.dataSources);
    },
    // 取消按钮
    cancel() {
      this.open = false;
      this.openwatch = false;
      this.disabled = false;
      this.reset();
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.form = {
        stuId: null,
        stuNum: null,
        stuName: null,
        idCard: null,
        sex: null,
        phoneNum: null,
        stuDeptId: null,
        stuDeptName: null,
        collegeCode: null,
        collegeName: null,
        picUrl: null,
        createById: null,
        createBy: null,
        intoYear: null,
        createTime: null,
        updateById: null,
        updateBy: null,
        updateTime: null,
        deptId: null,
        delFlag: null,
        classCode: null,
        className: null,
        dataSources: null,
        stuType: null,
        address: null,
        remark: null,
        password: null,
        inSchoolStatus:null
      };
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    /** 查询部门下拉树结构 */
    getDeptTree() {
      deptTreeSelect().then(response => {
        this.stuDeptOptions = response.data;
      });
    },
      // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.stuId)
      this.stuNums = selection.map(item => item.stuNum)
      this.single = selection.length!==1
      this.multiple = !selection.length
    },
    /** 查看按钮操作 */
    handleView(row) {
      this.reset()
      this.form = this.$copy(row)
      this.openwatch = true
      this.title = '查看'
    },
    /** 新增按钮操作 */
    handleAdd() {
      this.disabled = false;
      this.reset();
      this.open = true;
      this.title = "添加学生";
    },
    /** 修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset();
      const stuId = row.stuId || this.ids
      if(row.stuId != null){
        this.disabled = true;
      }
      getStuInfo(stuId).then(response => {
        this.form = response.data;
        this.open = true;
        this.title = "修改学生";
      });
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs["form"].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          if (this.form.stuId != null) {
            updateStuInfo(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          } else {
            addStuInfo(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          }
        }
      });
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const stuIds = row.stuId || this.ids;
      const stuNums = row.stuNum || this.stuNums;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除,删除后自动释放该人员的角色和权限。').then(function() {
        return delStuInfo(stuIds);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 导入按钮操作 */
    handleimportStuTemplate() {
      this.upload.title = "下载模板";
      this.upload.open = true;
    },
    /** 下载模板操作 */
    importStuTemplate() {
      this.download('jufe/stu/importStuTemplate/', {
      }, `学生导入数据模板.xlsx`)
    },
    // 文件上传中处理
    handleFileUploadProgress(event, file, fileList) {
      this.upload.isUploading = true;
    },
    // 文件上传成功处理
    handleFileSuccess(response, file, fileList) {
      this.upload.open = false;
      this.upload.isUploading = false;
      let title
      if(response.code===200){
        title = "导入成功"
        this.$alert( response.msg,title, {
          dangerouslyUseHTMLString: true
        });
      }else{
        title = "导入失败"
        this.$alert("",title, {
          dangerouslyUseHTMLString: true,
          message: '<div style="max-height:800px;overflow-y:auto">'+response.msg+'</div>'
        });
      }
      this.getList();
    },
    // 提交上传文件
    submitFileForm() {
      if(!this.$refs.upload.uploadFiles||this.$refs.upload.uploadFiles.length===0){
        this.$message.warning('请上传文件!')
        return
      }
      this.upload.open = false;
      this.$refs.upload.submit();
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.queryParams.ids = this.ids
      this.download('jufe/stu/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `学生信息.xlsx`)
    },
    handleAvatarSuccess(res, file) {
      this.imageUrl = URL.createObjectURL(file.raw);
    },
    beforeAvatarUpload(file) {
      const isJPG = file.type === "image/jpeg";
      const isLt2M = file.size / 1024 / 1024 < 5;
      if (!isJPG) {
        this.$message.error("只能上传 JPG 格式!");
        return false;
      }
      if (!isLt2M) {
        this.$message.error("大小不能超过 5MB!");
        return false;
      }
      const stuNum = this.form.stuNum;
      const newName = `${stuNum}.jpg`;
      const formData = new FormData();
      let imgurl ="";
      formData.append("file", file, newName);
      uploadImage(formData)
        .then((res) => {
          console.log("上传成功:", res);
          this.form.picUrl="";
          imgurl = res.msg; // 假设返回的是图片 URL
        }).then(() => {
          this.form.picUrl = imgurl;
        })
        .catch((err) => {
          console.error("上传失败:", err);
          this.$message.error("文件上传失败");
        });
      return false; // 阻止默认上传
    },
  }
};
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
  .avatar-uploader {
  border: 1px dashed #d9d9d9;
  border-radius: 6px;
  cursor: pointer;
  position: relative;

}

  border-color: #409eff;
}

  font-size: 28px;
  color: #8c939d;
  width: 178px;
  height: 178px;
  line-height: 178px;
  text-align: center;
}

  width: 178px;
  height: 178px;
  display: block;
}

  span {
    display: block;

    font: 12px/14px "微软雅黑";
  }
  span:nth-child(1) {
    color: red;
    font-weight: bold;
    font: 18px/20px "微软雅黑";
  }
}
.upload-with-tip {
  display: flex;
  align-items:flex-end; /* 垂直居中 */
  gap: 10px;            /* 控制间距 */
}
</style>

        >
      </el-col>

    </el-row>

      />

            style="width: 50px; height: 50px"

          >
            <div slot="error" class="image-slot">
              <i class="el-icon-user-solid" size="big"></i>
              <div style="font-size: 12px">暂无照片</div>
            </div>
          </el-image>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <!-- <el-table-column

      <!--        </template>-->
      <!--      </el-table-column>-->
      <el-table-column
        label="部门id"

      <el-table-column

      <el-table-column

            >查看</el-button
          >

            v-hasPermi="['jufe:teaInfo:edit']"
            v-if="scope.row"
            >修改</el-button
          >
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"

            @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:teaInfo:remove']"
            v-if="scope.row"
            >删除</el-button
          >
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination
      v-show="total > 0"
      :total="total"
      :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
      :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
      @pagination="getList"
    />
    <!-- 添加或修改教师信息对话框 -->
    <el-dialog
      :title="title"
      :visible.sync="open"
      width="500px"
      append-to-body
      :close-on-click-modal="false"
      :close-on-press-escape="false"
    >
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="130px">
        <el-form-item label="工号" prop="teaUserNum">
          <el-input
            v-model="form.teaUserNum"
            placeholder="请输入工号"
            minlength="6"
            maxlength="30"
            show-word-limit
            :disabled="disabled"
            autocomplete="off"
          />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="登录密码" prop="password" v-if="!form.teaUserId">
          <el-input
            v-model="form.password"
            placeholder="请输入登录密码"
            type="password"
            maxlength="20"
            show-password
            autocomplete="new-password"
          />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="姓名" prop="teaUserName">
          <el-input
            v-model="form.teaUserName"
            placeholder="请输入姓名"
            maxlength="30"
            show-word-limit
          />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="性别" prop="sex">
          <el-select v-model="form.sex" placeholder="请选择性别" clearable>
            <el-option label="男" value="1" />
            <el-option label="女" value="2" />
          </el-select>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="联系电话" prop="phoneNum">
          <el-input
            v-model="form.phoneNum"
            placeholder="请输入联系电话"
            maxlength="11"
            show-word-limit
          />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="身份证号" prop="idCard">
          <el-input
            v-model="form.idCard"
            placeholder="请输入身份证号"
            maxlength="18"
            show-word-limit
          />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="所在院系/部门" prop="userDeptId">
          <treeselect
            v-model="form.userDeptId"
            :options="userDeptOptions"
            placeholder="请选择所在院系/部门"
            style="width: 330px"
          />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="邮箱" prop="email">
          <el-input
            v-model="form.email"
            placeholder="请输入邮箱"
            maxlength="30"
            show-word-limit
          />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item v-if="form.teaUserNum" label="照片" ref="image" prop="picUrl" >
          <!-- <div v-if="!form.teaUserNum" class="picTip">
            <span>请先输入工号!!!</span>
          </div> -->
          <div  class="upload-with-tip">
            <el-upload
            ref="upload"
            class="avatar-uploader"
            :action="uploadUrl"
            :show-file-list="false"
            :on-success="handleAvatarSuccess"
            :before-upload="beforeAvatarUpload"
            :multiple="false"
            :limit="1"
          >
            <el-image v-if="form.picUrl" :src="picUrlWithCacheBust" fit="fill" class="avatar" />
            <i v-else class="el-icon-plus avatar-uploader-icon"></i>
          </el-upload>
          <el-tooltip placement="top" >
            <div slot="content">
              上传照片格式为.jpg或.jpeg<br />
              大小在20K-500K之间,最大不能超过5M<br />
              照片背景尽量为单色，人像清晰，<br />
              神态自然，无明显畸变；
            </div>
            <i class="el-icon-warning"></i>
          </el-tooltip>
          </div>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="住址" prop="address">
          <el-input
            v-model="form.address"
            placeholder="请输入住址"
            maxlength="30"
            show-word-limit
          />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="备注" prop="remark">
          <el-input
            v-model="form.remark"
            type="textarea"
            rows="3"
            placeholder="请输入备注"
            maxlength="30"
            show-word-limit
          />
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <!-- 查看教师信息对话框 -->
    <el-dialog
      :title="title"
      :visible.sync="openwatch"
      width="500px"
      append-to-body
      :close-on-click-modal="false"
      :close-on-press-escape="false"
    >
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="130px">
        <el-form-item label="工号" prop="teaUserNum">
          <el-input
            v-model="form.teaUserNum"
            placeholder="请输入工号"
            :disabled="true"
          />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="姓名" prop="teaUserName">
          <el-input
            v-model="form.teaUserName"
            placeholder="请输入人员姓名"
            :disabled="true"
          />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="性别" prop="sex">
          <el-select
            v-model="form.sex"
            placeholder="请选择性别"
            clearable
            size="small"
            :disabled="true"
          >
            <el-option label="男" value="1" />
            <el-option label="女" value="2" />
          </el-select>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="联系电话" prop="phoneNum">
          <el-input
            v-model="form.phoneNum"
            placeholder="请输入电话号码"
            :disabled="true"
          />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="身份证号" prop="idCard">
          <el-input
            v-model="form.idCard"
            placeholder="请输入身份证号"
            :disabled="true"
          />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="所在院系/部门" prop="userDeptId">
          <treeselect
            v-model="form.userDeptId"
            :options="userDeptOptions"
            placeholder="请选择所在院系/部门"
            style="width: 330px"
            :disabled="true"
          />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item
          label="数据来源"
          prop="dataSources"
          :formatter="dataSourcesFormat"
        >
          <el-select
            v-model="form.dataSources"
            placeholder="请选择"
            clearable
            :disabled="true"
          >
            <el-option label="对接" value="1" />
            <el-option label="自建" value="2" />
          </el-select>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="邮箱" prop="email">
          <el-input
            v-model="form.email"
            placeholder="请输入邮箱"
            :disabled="true"
          />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="照片" ref="image" prop="picUrl">
          <el-image
            v-if="form.picUrl"
            style="width: 100px; height: 100px"
            :src="form.picUrl"
          >
          <div slot="error" class="image-slot">
              <i class="el-icon-user-solid" size="big"></i>
              <div style="font-size: 12px">暂无照片</div>
            </div>
          </el-image>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="住址" prop="address">
          <el-input
            v-model="form.address"
            placeholder="请输入住址"
            :disabled="true"
          />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="备注" prop="remark">
          <el-input
            v-model="form.remark"
            placeholder="请输入备注"
            :disabled="true"
          />
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
    </el-dialog>
    <!-- 用户导入对话框 -->
    <el-dialog
      v-if="upload.open"
      :title="upload.title"
      :visible.sync="upload.open"
      width="400px"
      append-to-body
      :close-on-click-modal="false"
      :close-on-press-escape="false"
    >
      <el-upload
        ref="upload"
        :limit="1"
        accept=".xlsx, .xls"
        :headers="upload.headers"
        :action="upload.url + '?updateSupport=' + upload.updateSupport"
        :disabled="upload.isUploading"
        :on-progress="handleFileUploadProgress"
        :on-success="handleFileSuccess"
        :auto-upload="false"
        drag
      >
        <i class="el-icon-upload"></i>
        <div class="el-upload__text">
          将文件拖到此处，或
          <em>点击上传</em>
        </div>
        <div class="el-upload__tip" slot="tip">
          <el-link
            type="info"
            style="font-size: 14px; color: #00afff"
            @click="importStuTemplate"
            >下载模板</el-link
          >
        </div>
        <div class="el-upload__tip" style="color: red" slot="tip">
          提示：仅允许导入“xls”或“xlsx”格式文件！
        </div>
      </el-upload>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitFileForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="upload.open = false">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  listTeaInfo,
  getTeaInfo,
  delTeaInfo,
  addTeaInfo,
  updateTeaInfo,
  uploadImage,
} from "@/api/schoolTeaInfo/teaInfo";
import Treeselect from "@riophae/vue-treeselect";
import "@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css";
import { deptTreeSelect } from "@/api/system/user";
import { getToken } from "@/utils/auth";
import ImageUpload from "@/components/ImageUpload";
import { validateIdCard } from "@/utils/validate";
export default {
  name: "TeaInfo",
  components: { Treeselect, ImageUpload },
  data() {
    return {
      center11:
        "上传照片格式为.jpg或.jpeg，大小在20K-500K之间,最大不能超过5M；照片背景尽量为单色，人像清晰，神态自然，无明显畸变；",
      fits: ["fill", "contain", "cover", "none", "scale-down"],
      uploadUrl: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API + "/jufe/teaInfo/uploadPic",
      imageUrl: "",
      // 用户导入参数
      upload: {
        // 是否显示弹出层（用户导入）
        open: false,
        // 弹出层标题（用户导入）
        title: "导入",
        // 是否禁用上传
        isUploading: false,
        // 是否更新已经存在的用户数据
        updateSupport: 0,
        // 上传的文件列表
        fileList: [],
        // 设置上传的请求头部
        headers: {
          Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken(),
        },
        // 上传的地址
        url: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API + "/jufe/teaInfo/importSchoolTeaInfo",
      },
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      // 非单个禁用
      single: true,
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 默认密码
      initPassword: undefined,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      disabled: false,
      //数据来源字典
      dataSourcesOptions: [],
      // 教师信息表格数据
      teaInfoList: [],
      // 部门树选项
      userDeptOptions: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      openwatch: false,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        teaUserNum: null,
        teaUserName: null,
        sex: null,
        phoneNum: null,
        userDeptId: null,
        userDeptName: null,
        createById: null,
        updateById: null,
        picUrl: null,
        deptId: null,
        password: null,
        remark: null,
        address: null,
        dataSources: null,
        email: null,
        idCard: null,
        inSchoolStatus: null,
        ids: null,
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {},
      // 显隐列
      columns: [
        { key: 0, label: `主键id`, visible: false },
        { key: 1, label: `工号`, visible: true },
        { key: 2, label: `姓名`, visible: true },
        { key: 3, label: `性别`, visible: true },
        { key: 4, label: `联系电话`, visible: true },
        { key: 5, label: `用户所属部门`, visible: false },
        { key: 6, label: `用户所属部门名称`, visible: true },
        { key: 7, label: `部门id`, visible: false },
        { key: 8, label: `密码`, visible: false },
        { key: 9, label: `身份证号`, visible: false },
      ],
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
        teaUserNum: [
          { required: true, message: "工号不能为空", trigger: "blur" },
          { min: 6, max: 30, message: "工号最低长度为6", trigger: "blur" },
        ],
        teaUserName: [
          { required: true, message: "姓名不能为空", trigger: "blur" },
        ],
        userDeptId: [
          { required: true, message: "所在院系/部门不能为空", trigger: "blur" },
        ],
        phoneNum: [
          {
            pattern: /^1[3|4|5|6|7|8|9][0-9]\d{8}$/,
            message: "请输入正确的手机号码",
            trigger: "blur",
          },
        ],
        idCard: [
          {
            validator: validateIdCard,
            trigger: "blur",
          },
        ],
        password: [
          { required: true, message: "用户密码不能为空", trigger: "blur" },
          {
            min: 5,
            max: 20,
            message: "用户密码长度必须介于 5 和 20 之间",
            trigger: "blur",
          },
        ],
      },
    };
  },
  watch: {
    // 根据名称筛选部门树
    deptName(val) {
      this.$refs.tree.filter(val);
    },
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
    this.getDeptTree();
  },
  computed: {
  picUrlWithCacheBust() {
    if (!this.form.picUrl) return '';
    return `${this.form.picUrl}?t=${Date.now()}`;
  },
},
  methods: {
    getBigPic(picUrl) {
      return picUrl ? [picUrl] : [];
    },
    handleAvatarSuccess(res, file) {
      this.imageUrl = URL.createObjectURL(file.raw);
    },
    beforeAvatarUpload(file) {
      const isJPG = file.type === "image/jpeg";
      const isLt2M = file.size / 1024 / 1024 < 5;
      if (!isJPG) {
        this.$message.error("只能上传 JPG 格式!");
        return false;
      }
      if (!isLt2M) {
        this.$message.error("大小不能超过 5MB!");
        return false;
      }
      const teaUserNum = this.form.teaUserNum;
      const newName = `${teaUserNum}.jpg`;
      const formData = new FormData();
      let imgurl ="";
      formData.append("file", file, newName);
      uploadImage(formData)
        .then((res) => {
          console.log("上传成功:", res);
          this.form.picUrl="";
          imgurl = res.msg; // 假设返回的是图片 URL
        }).then(() => {
          this.form.picUrl = imgurl;
        })
        .catch((err) => {
          console.error("上传失败:", err);
          this.$message.error("文件上传失败");
        });
      return false; // 阻止默认上传
    },
    /** 查询教师信息列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listTeaInfo(this.queryParams).then((response) => {
        this.teaInfoList = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    // 文件提交处理
    submitUpload() {
      this.$refs.uploadPicUrl.submit();
    },
    // 数据来源字典翻译
    dataSourcesFormat(row, column) {
      return this.selectDictLabel(this.dataSourcesOptions, row.dataSources);
    },
    // 取消按钮
    cancel() {
      this.open = false;
      this.openwatch = false;
      this.disabled = false;
      this.reset();
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.form = {
        teaUserId: null,
        teaUserNum: null,
        teaUserName: null,
        sex: null,
        phoneNum: null,
        userDeptId: null,
        userDeptName: null,
        createById: null,
        createBy: null,
        createTime: null,
        updateById: null,
        updateBy: null,
        updateTime: null,
        deptId: null,
        delFlag: null,
        password: null,
        picUrl: null,
        remark: null,
        address: null,
        dataSources: null,
        email: null,
        idCard: null,
        inSchoolStatus: null,
      };
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 查看按钮操作 */
    handleView(row) {
      this.reset();
      this.form = this.$copy(row);
      this.openwatch = true;
      this.title = "查看";
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map((item) => item.teaUserId);
      this.teaUserNums = selection.map((item) => item.teaUserNum);
      this.single = selection.length !== 1;
      this.multiple = !selection.length;
    },
    /** 查询部门下拉树结构 */
    getDeptTree() {
      deptTreeSelect().then((response) => {
        this.userDeptOptions = response.data;
      });
    },
    /** 新增按钮操作 */
    handleAdd() {
      this.reset();
      this.disabled = false;
      this.open = true;
      this.title = "添加教师信息";
    },
    /** 修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset();
      const teaUserId = row.teaUserId || this.ids;
      if (row.teaUserId != null) {
        this.disabled = true;
      }
      getTeaInfo(teaUserId)
        .then((response) => {
          this.form = response.data;
          this.open = true;
          this.title = "修改教师信息";
          this.form.password = "";
        })
        .then(() => {
          this.getList();
        });
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs["form"].validate((valid) => {
        if (valid) {
          if (this.form.teaUserId != null) {
            updateTeaInfo(this.form).then((response) => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          } else {
            addTeaInfo(this.form).then((response) => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          }
        }
      });
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const teaUserIds = row.teaUserId || this.ids;
      const teaUserNums = row.teaUserNum || this.teaUserNums;
      this.$modal
        .confirm("是否确认删除,删除后自动释放该人员的角色和权限。")
        .then(function () {
          return delTeaInfo(teaUserIds);
        })
        .then(() => {
          this.getList();
          this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
        })
        .catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 导入按钮操作 */
    handleimportStuTemplate() {
      this.upload.title = "下载模板";
      this.upload.open = true;
    },
    /** 下载模板操作 */
    importStuTemplate() {
      this.download(
        "jufe/teaInfo/importTeaTemplate/",
        {},
        `教师导入数据模板.xlsx`
      );
    },
    // 文件上传中处理
    handleFileUploadProgress(event, file, fileList) {
      this.upload.isUploading = true;
    },
    // 文件上传成功处理
    handleFileSuccess(response, file, fileList) {
      this.upload.open = false;
      this.upload.isUploading = false;
      let title;
      if (response.code === 200) {
        title = "导入成功";
        this.$alert(response.msg, title, {
          dangerouslyUseHTMLString: true,
        });
      } else {
        title = "导入失败";
        this.$alert("", title, {
          dangerouslyUseHTMLString: true,
          message:
            '<div style="max-height:800px;overflow-y:auto">' +
            response.msg +
            "</div>",
        });
      }
      this.getList();
    },
    // 提交上传文件
    submitFileForm() {
      if (
        !this.$refs.upload.uploadFiles ||
        this.$refs.upload.uploadFiles.length === 0
      ) {
        this.$message.warning("请上传文件!");
        return;
      }
      this.upload.open = false;
      this.$refs.upload.submit();
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.queryParams.ids = this.ids;
      this.download(
        "jufe/teaInfo/export",
        {
          ...this.queryParams,
        },
        `教师信息.xlsx`
      );
    },
  },
};
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
.tablePic {
  max-height: 90%; /* 高度不超过单元格的90% */
  max-width: 90%; /* 宽度不超过单元格的90% */
  object-fit: contain; /* 自动缩放并保持比例 */
  vertical-align: middle;
}
.avatar-uploader {
  border: 1px dashed #d9d9d9;
  border-radius: 6px;
  cursor: pointer;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.avatar-uploader .el-upload:hover {
  border-color: #409eff;
}
.avatar-uploader-icon {
  font-size: 28px;
  color: #8c939d;
  width: 178px;
  height: 178px;
  line-height: 178px;
  text-align: center;
}
.avatar {
  width: 178px;
  height: 178px;
  display: block;
}
.picTip {
  span {
    display: block;
    color: #666;
    font: 12px/14px "微软雅黑";
  }
  span:nth-child(1) {
    color: red;
    font-weight: bold;
    font: 18px/20px "微软雅黑";
  }
}
.upload-with-tip {
  display: flex;
  align-items:flex-end; /* 垂直居中 */
  gap: 10px;            /* 控制间距 */
}
</style>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch" label-width="120px">
      <el-form-item label="工号" prop="tempUserCode">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.tempUserCode"
          placeholder="请输入工号"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="姓名" prop="tempUserName">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.tempUserName"
          placeholder="请输入姓名"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="性别" prop="sex">
        <el-select v-model="queryParams.sex" placeholder="请选择性别" clearable size="small">
          <el-option label="男" value="1" />
          <el-option label="女" value="2" />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="所在院系/部门" prop="unitId">
        <treeselect v-model="queryParams.unitId"
                    :options="unitOptions"
                    placeholder="请选择所在院系/部门"
                    style="width: 215px"/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="联系电话" prop="phoneNum">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.phoneNum"
          placeholder="请输入联系电话"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="身份证号" prop="idCard">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.idCard"
          placeholder="请输入身份证号"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item
        label="岗位"
        prop="job"
      >
        <DictSelect v-model="queryParams.job" dict-type="temp_user_type" :placeholder="'请选择岗位'" clearable/>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="单位" prop="tempUnit">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.tempUnit"
          placeholder="请输入单位"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="状态" prop="inSchoolStatus">
        <el-select v-model="queryParams.inSchoolStatus" placeholder="请选择状态" clearable size="small">
          <el-option label="有效" value="1" />
          <el-option label="无效" value="2" />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item>
        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleAdd"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:tempUser:add']"
        >新增</el-button>
      </el-col>
<!--      <el-col :span="1.5">-->
<!--        <el-button-->
<!--          type="success"-->
<!--          plain-->
<!--          icon="el-icon-edit"-->
<!--          size="mini"-->
<!--          :disabled="single"-->
<!--          @click="handleUpdate"-->
<!--          v-hasPermi="['jufe:tempUser:edit']"-->
<!--        >修改</el-button>-->
<!--      </el-col>-->
<!--      <el-col :span="1.5">-->
<!--        <el-button-->
<!--          type="danger"-->
<!--          plain-->
<!--          icon="el-icon-delete"-->
<!--          size="mini"-->
<!--          :disabled="multiple"-->
<!--          @click="handleDelete"-->
<!--          v-hasPermi="['jufe:tempUser:remove']"-->
<!--        >删除</el-button>-->
<!--      </el-col>-->
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
            type="success"
            plain
            icon="el-icon-setting"
            size="mini"
            @click="handleStatusDate('batch')"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:tempUser:tempStatusDate']"
          >选中设置有效时间
          </el-button>
        </el-col>
        <el-col :span="1.5">
          <el-button
            type="success"
            plain
            icon="el-icon-setting"
            size="mini"
            @click="handleStatusDate('all')"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:tempUser:tempStatusDate']"
            >全部设置有效时间
          </el-button>
        </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="warning"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-download"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleExport"
          v-hasPermi="['jufe:tempUser:export']"
        >导出</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button type="info" plain icon="el-icon-upload2" size="mini" @click="handleimportLsgTemplate"
        >导入</el-button>
      </el-col>
<!--      <right-toolbar :showSearch.sync="showSearch" @queryTable="getList" :columns="columns"></right-toolbar>-->
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="infoList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
      <el-table-column label="序号" align="center" type="index" width="50px"/>
      <el-table-column label="其他人员id" align="center" prop="tempUserId" v-if="columns[0].visible"/>
      <el-table-column label="工号" align="center" prop="tempUserCode" v-if="columns[1].visible"/>
      <el-table-column label="姓名" align="center" prop="tempUserName" v-if="columns[2].visible"/>
      <el-table-column label="性别" align="center" prop="sex" v-if="columns[3].visible">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          {{ scope.row.sex ? (scope.row.sex == 1 ? "男" : "女") : "" }}
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="联系电话" align="center" prop="phoneNum" v-if="columns[4].visible"/>
      <el-table-column label="身份证号" align="center" width="200" prop="idCard" v-if="columns[13].visible"/>
      <el-table-column label="所在部门，院系id" align="center" prop="unitId" v-if="columns[5].visible"/>
      <el-table-column label="所在院系/部门" align="center" prop="unitName" v-if="columns[6].visible"/>
      <el-table-column label="岗位" align="center" prop="job" >
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <dict-tag :options="dict.type.temp_user_type" :value="scope.row.job" />
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="创建人id" align="center" prop="createById" v-if="columns[7].visible"/>
      <el-table-column label="更新人id" align="center" prop="updateById" v-if="columns[8].visible"/>
      <el-table-column label="权限设置部门id" align="center" prop="deptId" v-if="columns[9].visible"/>
      <el-table-column label="单位" align="center" prop="tempUnit" />
      <el-table-column label="有效时间" align="center" prop="statusStartDate" width="180px">
         <template slot-scope="scope">
           {{ scope.row.statusStartDate }} 至 {{ scope.row.statusEndDate }}
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="备注" align="center" prop="remark" v-if="columns[12].visible" show-overflow-tooltip/>
      <el-table-column label="状态" align="center" prop="inSchoolStatus"   >
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <span v-if="scope.row.inSchoolStatus == 1" >有效</span>
          <span v-else-if="scope.row.inSchoolStatus == 2" >无效</span>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            @click="handleView(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:tempUser:query']"
          >查看</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:tempUser:edit']"
            v-if="scope.row.inSchoolStatus == 1"
          >修改</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-delete"
            @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['jufe:tempUser:remove']"
            v-if="scope.row.inSchoolStatus == 1"
          >删除</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination
      v-show="total>0"
      :total="total"
      :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
      :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
      @pagination="getList"
    />
    <!-- 添加或修改其他人员对话框 -->
    <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="open" width="500px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false" :close-on-press-escape="false">
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="130px">
        <el-form-item label="姓名" prop="tempUserName">
          <el-input v-model="form.tempUserName" placeholder="请输入其他人员姓名" minlength="6" maxlength="30" show-word-limit/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="性别" prop="sex">
          <el-select v-model="form.sex" placeholder="请选择性别" clearable size="small" style="width: 330px;">
            <el-option label="男" value="1" />
            <el-option label="女" value="2" />
          </el-select>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="联系电话" prop="phoneNum">
          <el-input v-model="form.phoneNum" placeholder="请输入联系电话" maxlength="11" show-word-limit />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="身份证号" prop="idCard">
          <el-input v-model="form.idCard" placeholder="请输入身份证号" maxlength="18" show-word-limit :disabled="disabled"/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item  label="登录密码" prop="password" v-if="!form.tempUserId">
          <el-input v-model="form.password" placeholder="请输入登录密码" type="password" maxlength="20" show-password/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="所在院系/部门" prop="unitId">
          <treeselect v-model="form.unitId" :options="unitOptions" :show-count="true" placeholder="请选择所在部门/院系" />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item
          label="岗位" prop="job">
          <DictSelect v-model="form.job" dict-type="temp_user_type"  style="width:330px" />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="有效时间" prop="startTimeAndEndTime"
                      :rules="[{ required: true, message: '请选择有效时间', trigger: 'blur' }]">
          <el-date-picker  v-model="form.startTimeAndEndTime" type="daterange"
                            format="yyyy-MM-dd" value-format="yyyy-MM-dd"
                          range-separator="-"  start-placeholder="开始日期" end-placeholder="结束日期" style="width:330px">
          </el-date-picker>
        </el-form-item>
        <!-- <el-form-item label="岗位"  prop="postIds">
          <el-select v-model="form.postIds" multiple placeholder="请选择岗位">
            <el-option
              v-for="item in postOptions"
              :key="item.postId"
              :label="item.postName"
              :value="item.postId"
              :disabled="item.status == 1"
            ></el-option>
          </el-select>
        </el-form-item> -->
        <el-form-item label="照片" ref="image" prop="picUrl">
          <ImageUpload :limit="1"  v-model="form.picUrl"/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="单位" prop="tempUnit">
          <el-input v-model="form.tempUnit" placeholder="请输入单位" maxlength="30" show-word-limit/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="备注" prop="remark">
          <el-input v-model="form.remark" type="textarea" :rows="3" placeholder="请输入备注信息" maxlength="100" show-word-limit/>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
      <!-- 查看其他人员对话框 -->
      <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="openwatch" width="500px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false" :close-on-press-escape="false">
        <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="110px">
          <el-form-item label="姓名" prop="tempUserName">
            <el-input v-model="form.tempUserName" placeholder="请输入其他人员姓名" :disabled="true"/>
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item label="性别" prop="sex">
            <el-select v-model="form.sex" placeholder="请选择性别" clearable size="small" :disabled="true"  style="width:350px" >
              <el-option label="男" value="1" />
              <el-option label="女" value="2" />
            </el-select>
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item label="联系电话" prop="phoneNum">
            <el-input v-model="form.phoneNum" placeholder="请输入联系电话" :disabled="true"/>
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item label="身份证号" prop="idCard">
            <el-input v-model="form.idCard" placeholder="请输入身份证号" :disabled="true"/>
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item label="所在院系/部门" prop="unitId">
            <treeselect v-model="form.unitId" :options="unitOptions" :show-count="true" placeholder="请选择所在部门/院系" :disabled="true"/>
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item
            label="岗位" prop="job">
            <DictSelect v-model="form.job" dict-type="temp_user_type" :disabled="true"  style="width:350px"  />
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item label="有效时间" prop="startTimeAndEndTime"
                      :rules="[{ required: true, message: '请选择有效时间', trigger: 'blur' }]">
            <el-date-picker  v-model="form.startTimeAndEndTime" type="daterange"
                            format="yyyy-MM-dd" value-format="yyyy-MM-dd"
                          range-separator="-"  start-placeholder="开始日期" end-placeholder="结束日期" style="width:350px" :disabled="true" >
            </el-date-picker>
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item label="照片" ref="image" prop="picUrl" :disabled="true">
            <el-image
              v-if="form.picUrl"
              style="width: 100px; height: 100px"
              :src="form.picUrl"></el-image>
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item label="单位" prop="tempUnit">
            <el-input v-model="form.tempUnit" placeholder="请输入单位" :disabled="true"/>
          </el-form-item>
          <el-form-item label="备注" prop="remark" >
            <el-input v-model="form.remark" type="textarea" :rows="3" placeholder="请输入备注信息" maxlength="100" show-word-limit :disabled="true"/>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-form>
        <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
          <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
          <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
        </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <!-- 用户导入对话框 -->
    <el-dialog v-if="upload.open" :title="upload.title" :visible.sync="upload.open" width="400px" append-to-body :close-on-click-modal="false" :close-on-press-escape="false">
      <el-upload ref="upload" :limit="1" accept=".xlsx, .xls" :headers="upload.headers"
                 :action="upload.url + '?updateSupport=' + upload.updateSupport" :disabled="upload.isUploading"
                 :on-progress="handleFileUploadProgress" :on-success="handleFileSuccess"  :auto-upload="false" drag>
        <i class="el-icon-upload"></i>
        <div class="el-upload__text">
          将文件拖到此处，或
          <em>点击上传</em>
        </div>
        <div class="el-upload__tip" slot="tip">
          <el-link type="info" style="font-size:14px;color: #00afff;" @click="importLsgTemplate">下载模板</el-link>
        </div>
        <div class="el-upload__tip" style="color:red" slot="tip">提示：仅允许导入“xls”或“xlsx”格式文件！</div>
      </el-upload>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitFileForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="upload.open = false">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
    <!-- 设置生效时间对话框 -->
    <el-dialog v-if="statusDateVisable" title="设置生效时间" :visible.sync="statusDateVisable" width="800px" :close-on-click-modal="false" append-to-body :before-close="handleClose">
      <el-form ref="statusDateForm" :model="statusDateItem" label-width="140px" >
        <el-form-item label="有效时间" prop="startTimeAndEndTime"
                      :rules="[{ required: true, message: '请选择有效时间', trigger: 'blur' }]">
            <el-date-picker  v-model="statusDateItem.startTimeAndEndTime" type="daterange"
                            format="yyyy-MM-dd" value-format="yyyy-MM-dd"
                          range-separator="-"  start-placeholder="开始日期" end-placeholder="结束日期" style="width:80%"  >
            </el-date-picker>
          </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" :loading="saveLoading" @click="submitStatusDatesForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="handleClose">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import {
  listInfo,
  getInfo,
  delInfo,
  addInfo,
  updateInfo,
  setStatusDates
} from "@/api/schoolTempUserInfo/info";
import {
  getToken
} from "@/utils/auth";
import Treeselect from "@riophae/vue-treeselect";
import "@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css";
import {deptTreeSelect} from "@/api/system/user";
import ImageUpload from '@/components/ImageUpload'
import { getUser } from "@/api/system/user";
import { validateIdCard } from "@/utils/validate";
export default {
  name: "Info",
  dicts: ['temp_user_type'],
  components: { Treeselect ,ImageUpload},
  data() {
    return {
      // 用户导入参数
      upload: {
        // 是否显示弹出层（用户导入）
        open: false,
        // 弹出层标题（用户导入）
        title: "导入",
        // 是否禁用上传
        isUploading: false,
        // 是否更新已经存在的用户数据
        updateSupport: 0,
        // 上传的文件列表
        fileList: [],
        // 设置上传的请求头部
        headers: {
          Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken()
        },
        // 上传的地址
        url: process.env.VUE_APP_BASE_API + "/jufe/tempUser/importSchoolTempUserInfo"
      },
      headers: {
        Authorization: "Bearer " + getToken(),
      },
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 岗位选项
      postOptions: [],
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      // 非单个禁用
      single: true,
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      saveLoading: false,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      disabled: false,
      // 其他人员表格数据
      infoList: [],
      // 部门树选项
      unitOptions: [],
      // 部门名称
      deptName: undefined,
      //设置生效时间是否显示
      statusDateVisable:false,
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      openwatch: false,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        tempUserName: null,
        tempUserCode: null,
        sex: null,
        phoneNum: null,
        unitId: null,
        unitName: null,
        address: null,
        createById: null,
        updateById: null,
        picUrl: null,
        job: null,
        tempUnit: null,
        remark: null,
        deptId: null,
        ids:null
      },
      statusDateItem:{},
      // 表单参数
      form: {
        startTimeAndEndTime:[]
      },
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
        tempUserName : [{ required: true, message: "姓名不能为空", trigger: "blur" }],
        unitId: [{ required: true, message: "所在院系/部门不能为空", trigger: "blur" }],
        job: [{ required: true, message: "岗位不能为空", trigger: "blur" }],
        phoneNum: [
          { required: true, message: "联系电话不能为空", trigger: "blur" },
          {
            pattern: /^1[3|4|5|6|7|8|9][0-9]\d{8}$/,
            message: "请输入正确的手机号码",
            trigger: "blur"
          }
        ],
        idCard:[
          { required: true, message: "身份证号不能为空", trigger: "blur" },
          { validator: validateIdCard, trigger: "blur" }
        ]
      },
      // 显隐列
      columns: [
        { key: 0, label: `临时工id`, visible: false },
        { key: 1, label: `工号`, visible: true },
        { key: 2, label: `姓名`, visible: true },
        { key: 3, label: `性别`, visible: true },
        { key: 4, label: `联系电话`, visible: true },
        { key: 5, label: `部门/所在院系id`, visible: false },
        { key: 6, label: `部门/所在院系`, visible: true },
        { key: 7, label: `创建人id`, visible: false },
        { key: 8, label: `更新人id`, visible: false },
        { key: 9, label: `权限设置部门id`, visible: false },
        { key: 10, label: `岗位`, visible: true },
        { key: 11, label: `住址`, visible: false },
        { key: 12, label: `备注`, visible: true },
        { key: 13, label: `身份证号`, visible: true }
      ],
    };
  },
  watch: {
    // 根据名称筛选部门树
    deptName(val) {
      this.$refs.tree.filter(val);
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
    this.getDeptTree();
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询其他人员列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listInfo(this.queryParams).then(response => {
        this.infoList = response.rows;
        this.total = response.total;
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    /** 查询部门下拉树结构 */
    getDeptTree() {
      deptTreeSelect().then(response => {
        this.unitOptions = response.data;
      });
    },
    // 取消按钮
    cancel() {
      this.open = false;
      this.openwatch = false;
      this.disabled = false;
      this.reset();
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.form = {
        tempUserId: null,
        tempUserName: null,
        tempUserCode: null,
        sex: null,
        phoneNum: null,
        unitId: null,
        unitName: null,
        createById: null,
        createBy: null,
        createTime: null,
        updateById: null,
        updateBy: null,
        updateTime: null,
        delFlag: null,
        picUrl: null,
        job: null,
        address: null,
        remark: null,
        deptId: null,
        tempUnit: null,
        startTimeAndEndTime:[]
      };
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.tempUserId)
      this.single = selection.length!==1
      this.multiple = !selection.length
    },
    /** 新增按钮操作 */
    handleAdd() {
      getUser().then(response => {
        this.postOptions = response.posts;
      });
      this.reset();
      this.disabled = false;
      this.open = true;
      this.title = "添加其他人员";
    },
    /** 修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset();
      const tempUserId = row.tempUserId || this.ids
      if(row.tempUserId != null){
        this.disabled = true;
      }
      getInfo(tempUserId).then(response => {
        response.data.startTimeAndEndTime = []
        this.form = response.data;
        if(this.form.statusStartDate){
          this.form.startTimeAndEndTime.push(this.form.statusStartDate);
        }
        if(this.form.statusEndDate){
          this.form.startTimeAndEndTime.push(this.form.statusEndDate);
        }
        this.open = true;
        this.title = "修改其他人员";
      });
    },
    handleStatusDate(type){
      this.resetStatusDateItem();
      let tempUserIds
      if(type==='batch'){
        tempUserIds = this.ids
        if(!this.ids||this.ids.length===0){
          this.$message.error("请选择数据！")
          return
        }
      }
      this.statusDateItem.ids = tempUserIds
      this.statusDateVisable = true;
    },
     // 表单重置
    resetStatusDateItem() {
      this.statusDateItem = {
        startTimeAndEndTime:[],
        statusDate:[],
        ids:[]
      }
    },
    //关闭方法
    handleClose() {
      this.statusDateVisable = false;
      this.resetStatusDateItem();
    },
  /** 提交按钮 */
    submitStatusDatesForm() {
      this.$refs['statusDateForm'].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.saveLoading = true
          this.statusDateItem.statusStartDate = this.statusDateItem.startTimeAndEndTime[0];
          this.statusDateItem.statusEndDate = this.statusDateItem.startTimeAndEndTime[1];
          // this.queryParams.statusStartDate = this.statusDateItem.startTimeAndEndTime[0];
          // this.queryParams.statusEndDate = this.statusDateItem.startTimeAndEndTime[1];
          // this.queryParams.ids = this.statusDateItem.ids;
          setStatusDates(this.statusDateItem).then(e=>{
            this.saveLoading = false
            this.statusDateVisable = false
            this.$message.success("设置成功！")
            this.getList();
          }).catch(e=>{
            this.saveLoading = false
          })
        }
      })
    },
    /** 查看按钮操作 */
    handleView(row) {
      this.reset()
      row.startTimeAndEndTime = []
      this.form = this.$copy(row)
      this.form.startTimeAndEndTime.push(this.form.statusStartDate);
      this.form.startTimeAndEndTime.push(this.form.statusEndDate);
      this.openwatch = true
      this.title = '查看'
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm() {
      this.$refs["form"].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          this.form.statusStartDate =  this.form.startTimeAndEndTime[0];
          this.form.statusEndDate =  this.form.startTimeAndEndTime[1];
          if (this.form.tempUserId != null) {
            updateInfo(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          } else {
            addInfo(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          }
        }
      });
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const tempUserIds = row.tempUserId || this.ids;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除,删除后自动释放该人员的角色和权限').then(function() {
        return delInfo(tempUserIds);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 导入按钮操作 */
    handleimportLsgTemplate() {
      this.upload.title = "下载模板";
      this.upload.open = true;
    },
    /** 下载模板操作 */
    importLsgTemplate() {
      this.download('jufe/tempUser/importLsgTemplate/', {
      }, `其他人员导入数据模板.xlsx`)
    },
    // 文件上传中处理
    handleFileUploadProgress(event, file, fileList) {
      this.upload.isUploading = true;
    },
    // 文件上传成功处理
    handleFileSuccess(response, file, fileList) {
      this.upload.open = false;
      this.upload.isUploading = false;
      let title
      if(response.code===200){
        title = "导入成功"
        this.$alert( response.msg,title, {
          dangerouslyUseHTMLString: true
        });
      }else{
        title = "导入失败"
        this.$alert("",title, {
          dangerouslyUseHTMLString: true,
          message: '<div style="max-height:800px;overflow-y:auto">'+response.msg+'</div>'
        });
      }
      this.getList();
    },
    // 提交上传文件
    submitFileForm() {
      if(!this.$refs.upload.uploadFiles||this.$refs.upload.uploadFiles.length===0){
        this.$message.warning('请上传文件!')
        return
      }
      this.upload.open = false;
      this.$refs.upload.submit();
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.queryParams.ids = this.ids
      this.download('jufe/tempUser/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `其他人员信息.xlsx`)
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch" label-width="68px">
      <el-form-item label="参数名称" prop="configName">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.configName"
          placeholder="请输入参数名称"
          clearable
          style="width: 240px"
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="参数键名" prop="configKey">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.configKey"
          placeholder="请输入参数键名"
          clearable
          style="width: 240px"
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="系统内置" prop="configType">
        <el-select v-model="queryParams.configType" placeholder="系统内置" clearable>
          <el-option
            v-for="dict in dict.type.sys_yes_no"
            :key="dict.value"
            :label="dict.label"
            :value="dict.value"
          />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="创建时间">
        <el-date-picker
          v-model="dateRange"
          style="width: 240px"
          value-format="yyyy-MM-dd"
          type="daterange"
          range-separator="-"
          start-placeholder="开始日期"
          end-placeholder="结束日期"
        ></el-date-picker>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item>
        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleAdd"
          v-hasPermi="['system:config:add']"
        >新增</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="success"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-edit"
          size="mini"
          :disabled="single"
          @click="handleUpdate"
          v-hasPermi="['system:config:edit']"
        >修改</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="danger"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-delete"
          size="mini"
          :disabled="multiple"
          @click="handleDelete"
          v-hasPermi="['system:config:remove']"
        >删除</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="warning"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-download"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleExport"
          v-hasPermi="['system:config:export']"
        >导出</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="danger"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-refresh"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleRefreshCache"
          v-hasPermi="['system:config:remove']"
        >刷新缓存</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <right-toolbar :showSearch.sync="showSearch" @queryTable="getList"></right-toolbar>
    </el-row>
    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="configList" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
      <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" align="center" />
      <el-table-column label="参数主键" align="center" prop="configId" />
      <el-table-column label="参数名称" align="center" prop="configName" :show-overflow-tooltip="true" />
      <el-table-column label="参数键名" align="center" prop="configKey" :show-overflow-tooltip="true" />
      <el-table-column label="参数键值" align="center" prop="configValue" />
      <el-table-column label="系统内置" align="center" prop="configType">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <dict-tag :options="dict.type.sys_yes_no" :value="scope.row.configType"/>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="备注" align="center" prop="remark" :show-overflow-tooltip="true" />
      <el-table-column label="创建时间" align="center" prop="createTime" width="180">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <span>{{ parseTime(scope.row.createTime) }}</span>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['system:config:edit']"
          >修改</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-delete"
            @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['system:config:remove']"
          >删除</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <pagination
      v-show="total>0"
      :total="total"
      :page.sync="queryParams.pageNum"
      :limit.sync="queryParams.pageSize"
      @pagination="getList"
    />
    <!-- 添加或修改参数配置对话框 -->
    <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="open" width="500px" append-to-body>
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="80px">
        <el-form-item label="参数名称" prop="configName">
          <el-input v-model="form.configName" placeholder="请输入参数名称" />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="参数键名" prop="configKey">
          <el-input v-model="form.configKey" placeholder="请输入参数键名" />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="参数键值" prop="configValue">
          <el-input v-model="form.configValue" placeholder="请输入参数键值" />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="系统内置" prop="configType">
          <el-radio-group v-model="form.configType">
            <el-radio
              v-for="dict in dict.type.sys_yes_no"
              :key="dict.value"
              :label="dict.value"
            >{{dict.label}}</el-radio>
          </el-radio-group>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="备注" prop="remark">
          <el-input v-model="form.remark" type="textarea" placeholder="请输入内容" />
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { listConfig, getConfig, delConfig, addConfig, updateConfig, refreshCache } from "@/api/system/config";
export default {
  name: "Config",
  dicts: ['sys_yes_no'],
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 选中数组
      ids: [],
      // 非单个禁用
      single: true,
      // 非多个禁用
      multiple: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 总条数
      total: 0,
      // 参数表格数据
      configList: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      // 日期范围
      dateRange: [],
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        pageNum: 1,
        pageSize: 10,
        configName: undefined,
        configKey: undefined,
        configType: undefined
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {},
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
        configName: [
          { required: true, message: "参数名称不能为空", trigger: "blur" }
        ],
        configKey: [
          { required: true, message: "参数键名不能为空", trigger: "blur" }
        ],
        configValue: [
          { required: true, message: "参数键值不能为空", trigger: "blur" }
        ]
      }
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询参数列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listConfig(this.addDateRange(this.queryParams, this.dateRange)).then(response => {
          this.configList = response.rows;
          this.total = response.total;
          this.loading = false;
        }
      );
    },
    // 取消按钮
    cancel() {
      this.open = false;
      this.reset();
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.form = {
        configId: undefined,
        configName: undefined,
        configKey: undefined,
        configValue: undefined,
        configType: "Y",
        remark: undefined
      };
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.queryParams.pageNum = 1;
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.dateRange = [];
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    /** 新增按钮操作 */
    handleAdd() {
      this.reset();
      this.open = true;
      this.title = "添加参数";
    },
    // 多选框选中数据
    handleSelectionChange(selection) {
      this.ids = selection.map(item => item.configId)
      this.single = selection.length!=1
      this.multiple = !selection.length
    },
    /** 修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset();
      const configId = row.configId || this.ids
      getConfig(configId).then(response => {
        this.form = response.data;
        this.open = true;
        this.title = "修改参数";
      });
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm: function() {
      this.$refs["form"].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          if (this.form.configId != undefined) {
            updateConfig(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          } else {
            addConfig(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          }
        }
      });
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      const configIds = row.configId || this.ids;
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除参数编号为"' + configIds + '"的数据项？').then(function() {
          return delConfig(configIds);
        }).then(() => {
          this.getList();
          this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
        }).catch(() => {});
    },
    /** 导出按钮操作 */
    handleExport() {
      this.download('system/config/export', {
        ...this.queryParams
      }, `config_${new Date().getTime()}.xlsx`)
    },
    /** 刷新缓存按钮操作 */
    handleRefreshCache() {
      refreshCache().then(() => {
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("刷新成功");
      });
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch">
      <el-form-item label="部门名称" prop="deptName">
        <el-input
          v-model="queryParams.deptName"
          placeholder="请输入部门名称"
          clearable
          @keyup.enter.native="handleQuery"
        />
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="状态" prop="status">
        <el-select v-model="queryParams.status" placeholder="部门状态" clearable>
          <el-option
            v-for="dict in dict.type.sys_normal_disable"
            :key="dict.value"
            :label="dict.label"
            :value="dict.value"
          />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item>
        <el-button type="primary" icon="el-icon-search" size="mini" @click="handleQuery">搜索</el-button>
        <el-button icon="el-icon-refresh" size="mini" @click="resetQuery">重置</el-button>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
    <el-row :gutter="10" class="mb8">
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="primary"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-plus"
          size="mini"
          @click="handleAdd"
          v-hasPermi="['system:dept:add']"
        >新增</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <el-col :span="1.5">
        <el-button
          type="info"
          plain
          icon="el-icon-sort"
          size="mini"
          @click="toggleExpandAll"
        >展开/折叠</el-button>
      </el-col>
      <right-toolbar :showSearch.sync="showSearch" @queryTable="getList"></right-toolbar>
    </el-row>
    <el-table
      v-if="refreshTable"
      v-loading="loading"
      :data="deptList"
      row-key="deptId"
      :default-expand-all="isExpandAll"
      :tree-props="{children: 'children', hasChildren: 'hasChildren'}"
    >
      <el-table-column prop="deptName" label="部门名称" width="400"></el-table-column>
      <el-table-column prop="orderNum" label="排序" width="200"></el-table-column>
      <el-table-column prop="status" label="状态" width="100">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <dict-tag :options="dict.type.sys_normal_disable" :value="scope.row.status"/>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="创建时间" align="center" prop="createTime" width="200">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <span>{{ parseTime(scope.row.createTime) }}</span>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column label="操作" align="center" class-name="small-padding fixed-width">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-edit"
            @click="handleUpdate(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['system:dept:edit']"
          >修改</el-button>
          <el-button
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-plus"
            @click="handleAdd(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['system:dept:add']"
          >新增</el-button>
          <el-button
            v-if="scope.row.parentId != 0"
            size="mini"
            type="text"
            icon="el-icon-delete"
            @click="handleDelete(scope.row)"
            v-hasPermi="['system:dept:remove']"
          >删除</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <!-- 添加或修改部门对话框 -->
    <el-dialog :title="title" :visible.sync="open" width="600px" append-to-body>
      <el-form ref="form" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="80px">
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="24" v-if="form.parentId !== 0">
            <el-form-item label="上级部门" prop="parentId">
              <treeselect v-model="form.parentId" :options="deptOptions" :normalizer="normalizer" placeholder="选择上级部门" />
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="部门名称" prop="deptName">
              <el-input v-model="form.deptName" placeholder="请输入部门名称" />
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="显示排序" prop="orderNum">
              <el-input-number v-model="form.orderNum" controls-position="right" :min="0" />
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="负责人" prop="leader">
              <el-input v-model="form.leader" placeholder="请输入负责人" maxlength="20" />
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="联系电话" prop="phone">
              <el-input v-model="form.phone" placeholder="请输入联系电话" maxlength="11" />
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
        <el-row>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="邮箱" prop="email">
              <el-input v-model="form.email" placeholder="请输入邮箱" maxlength="50" />
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
          <el-col :span="12">
            <el-form-item label="部门状态">
              <el-radio-group v-model="form.status">
                <el-radio
                  v-for="dict in dict.type.sys_normal_disable"
                  :key="dict.value"
                  :label="dict.value"
                >{{dict.label}}</el-radio>
              </el-radio-group>
            </el-form-item>
          </el-col>
        </el-row>
      </el-form>
      <div slot="footer" class="dialog-footer">
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm">确 定</el-button>
        <el-button @click="cancel">取 消</el-button>
      </div>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>
<script>
import { listDept, getDept, delDept, addDept, updateDept, listDeptExcludeChild } from "@/api/system/dept";
import Treeselect from "@riophae/vue-treeselect";
import "@riophae/vue-treeselect/dist/vue-treeselect.css";
export default {
  name: "Dept",
  dicts: ['sys_normal_disable'],
  components: { Treeselect },
  data() {
    return {
      // 遮罩层
      loading: true,
      // 显示搜索条件
      showSearch: true,
      // 表格树数据
      deptList: [],
      // 部门树选项
      deptOptions: [],
      // 弹出层标题
      title: "",
      // 是否显示弹出层
      open: false,
      // 是否展开，默认全部展开
      isExpandAll: true,
      // 重新渲染表格状态
      refreshTable: true,
      // 查询参数
      queryParams: {
        deptName: undefined,
        status: undefined
      },
      // 表单参数
      form: {},
      // 表单校验
      rules: {
        parentId: [
          { required: true, message: "上级部门不能为空", trigger: "blur" }
        ],
        deptName: [
          { required: true, message: "部门名称不能为空", trigger: "blur" }
        ],
        orderNum: [
          { required: true, message: "显示排序不能为空", trigger: "blur" }
        ],
        email: [
          {
            type: "email",
            message: "请输入正确的邮箱地址",
            trigger: ["blur", "change"]
          }
        ],
        phone: [
          {
            pattern: /^1[3|4|5|6|7|8|9][0-9]\d{8}$/,
            message: "请输入正确的手机号码",
            trigger: "blur"
          }
        ]
      }
    };
  },
  created() {
    this.getList();
  },
  methods: {
    /** 查询部门列表 */
    getList() {
      this.loading = true;
      listDept(this.queryParams).then(response => {
        this.deptList = this.handleTree(response.data, "deptId");
        this.loading = false;
      });
    },
    /** 转换部门数据结构 */
    normalizer(node) {
      if (node.children && !node.children.length) {
        delete node.children;
      }
      return {
        id: node.deptId,
        label: node.deptName,
        children: node.children
      };
    },
    // 取消按钮
    cancel() {
      this.open = false;
      this.reset();
    },
    // 表单重置
    reset() {
      this.form = {
        deptId: undefined,
        parentId: undefined,
        deptName: undefined,
        orderNum: undefined,
        leader: undefined,
        phone: undefined,
        email: undefined,
        status: "0"
      };
      this.resetForm("form");
    },
    /** 搜索按钮操作 */
    handleQuery() {
      this.getList();
    },
    /** 重置按钮操作 */
    resetQuery() {
      this.resetForm("queryForm");
      this.handleQuery();
    },
    /** 新增按钮操作 */
    handleAdd(row) {
      this.reset();
      if (row != undefined) {
        this.form.parentId = row.deptId;
      }
      this.open = true;
      this.title = "添加部门";
      listDept().then(response => {
        this.deptOptions = this.handleTree(response.data, "deptId");
      });
    },
    /** 展开/折叠操作 */
    toggleExpandAll() {
      this.refreshTable = false;
      this.isExpandAll = !this.isExpandAll;
      this.$nextTick(() => {
        this.refreshTable = true;
      });
    },
    /** 修改按钮操作 */
    handleUpdate(row) {
      this.reset();
      getDept(row.deptId).then(response => {
        this.form = response.data;
        this.open = true;
        this.title = "修改部门";
      });
      listDeptExcludeChild(row.deptId).then(response => {
        this.deptOptions = this.handleTree(response.data, "deptId");
      });
    },
    /** 提交按钮 */
    submitForm: function() {
      this.$refs["form"].validate(valid => {
        if (valid) {
          if (this.form.deptId != undefined) {
            updateDept(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("修改成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          } else {
            addDept(this.form).then(response => {
              this.$modal.msgSuccess("新增成功");
              this.open = false;
              this.getList();
            });
          }
        }
      });
    },
    /** 删除按钮操作 */
    handleDelete(row) {
      this.$modal.confirm('是否确认删除名称为"' + row.deptName + '"的数据项？').then(function() {
        return delDept(row.deptId);
      }).then(() => {
        this.getList();
        this.$modal.msgSuccess("删除成功");
      }).catch(() => {});
    }
  }
};
</script>
<template>
  <div class="app-container">
    <el-form :model="queryParams" ref="queryForm" size="small" :inline="true" v-show="showSearch" label-width="68px">
      <el-form-item label="字典名称" prop="dictType">
        <el-select v-model="queryParams.dictType">
          <el-option
            v-for="item in typeOptions"
            :key="item.dictId"
            :label="item.dictName"
            :value="item.dictType"
          />
        </el-select>
